text.en: Dua Kumayl
taught by Imam Ali(as)

Imam Ali(as) advised Kumayl Ibn Ziyad Nakha'i to recite this "Du'a" on the eve of (i.e. evening preceding) every Friday, or once a month or at least once in every year so that, added Imam Ali(AS), "Allah may protect thee from the evils of the enemies and the plots contrived by impostors. O' Kumayl! in consideration of thy companionship and understanding, I grant thee this honour of entrusting this "Du'a" to thee."

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ الَّتِي وَسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيٍْء
segments.transliteration: allahumma in-ni as-aluka bi-rah-matikal-lati wasi`at kul-la shay

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You by Your mercy, which embraces all things;

segments.arabic: وَبِقُوَّتِكَ الَّتِي قَهَرْتَ بِهَا كُلَّ شَيٍْء
segments.transliteration: wa bi-qu-watikal-lati qahar-ta biha kul-la shay

translation.en: And by Your strength, through which You dominatest all things,
And toward which all things are humble
And before which all things are lowly;

segments.arabic: وَبِجَبرُوتِكَ الَّتِي غَلَبْتَ بِهَا كُلَّ شَيٍْء
segments.transliteration: wa bi-jabarutikal-lati ghalab-ta biha kul-la shay

translation.en: And by Your invincibility through which You overwhelmest all things,

segments.arabic: وَبِعِزَّتِكَ الَّتِي لا يَقُومُ لَهَا شَيْءٌ
segments.transliteration: wa bi`izzatikal-lati la yaqumu laha shay

translation.en: And by Your might, which nothing can resist;
And by Your tremendousness, which has filled all things;
by Your force, which towers over all things;

segments.arabic: وَبِوَجْهِكَ الْبَاقِي بَعْدَ فَنَاءِ كُلِّ شَيٍْء
segments.transliteration: wa bi-waj-hikal-baqi ba`da fana-i kul-li shay

translation.en: And by Your face, which subsists after the annihilation of all things,

segments.arabic: وَبِأَسْمَائِكَ الَّتِي مَلأَتْ أَرْكَانَ كُلِّ شَيٍْء
segments.transliteration: wa bi-as-ma-ikal-lati malat ar-kana kul-li shay

translation.en: And by Your Names, which have filled the foundations of all things;
And by Your knowledge, which encompasses all things;

segments.arabic: وَبِنُورِ وَجْهِكَ الَّذِي أَضَاءَ لَهُ كُلُّ شَيٍْء
segments.transliteration: wa bi-nuri waj-hikal-ladhi ada-a lahu kul-lu shay

translation.en: And by the light of Your face, through which all things are illumined!
O Light! O All-holy!
O First of those who are first
And O Last of those who are last!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَ اغْفِرْ لِيَ الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تَهتِكُ الْعِصَمَ

translation.en: O Allah, forgive me those sins which tear apart safeguards!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَ اغْفِرْ لِيَ الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تُنْزِلُ النِّقَمَ

translation.en: O Allah, forgive me those sins which draw down adversities!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَ اغْفِرْ لِيَ الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تُغيِّرُ النِّعَمَ

translation.en: O Allah, forgive me those sins which alter blessings!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِيَ الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تَحْبِسُ الدُّعَاءَ

translation.en: O Allah forgive me those sins which hold back supplication!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِيَ الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تُنْزِلُ البَلاءَ

translation.en: O Allah, forgive me those sins which draw down tribulation!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي كُلَّ ذَنْبٍ أَذْنَبْتُهُ وَكُلَّ خَطِيئَةٍ أَخْطَأْتُهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma-igh-fir liya kul-la dham-bin adhnabtuhu wa kul-la khati-atin akh-tatuha

translation.en: O Allah, forgive me every sin I have committed and every mistake I have made!
O Allah, verily I seek nearness to You through remembrance of You,
And I seek intercession from You with Yourself,

segments.arabic: وَأَسْألُكَ بِجُودِكَ أَن تُدْنِيَنِي مِن قُرْبِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa as-aluka bi-judika an tud-ni-yani min qur-bik

translation.en: And I ask You through Your munificence to bring me near to Your proximity,
And to provide me with gratitude toward You
And to inspire me with Your remembrance.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ سُؤَالَ خَاضِعٍ مُّتَذَلِّلٍ خَاشِعٍ أَن تُسَامِحَنِي وَتَرْحَمَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma in-ni as-luka suala khadii'm-mutadhal-lilin kha-shii'n an tusamihani wa tar-hamani

translation.en: O Allah, verily I ask You with the asking of a submissive, abased and lowly man to show me forbearance, to have mercy on me

segments.arabic: وَتَجْعلَنِي بِقِسمِكَ رَاضِياً قَانِعاً، وَفِي جَمِيعِ الأَحْوَاِل مُتَوَاضِعاً
segments.transliteration: wa taj-`alani bi-qasamika radiyan qani`n wa fi jamii'l-ah-wali mutawadi`aa

translation.en: And to make me satisfied and content with Your appointment and [make me] humble in every state.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ وَأَسْألُكَ سُؤَالَ مَنِ اشْتَدَّتْ فَاقَتُهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa as-aluka suala manish-tad-dat faqatuh

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You the question of one whose indigence is extreme,
And who has stated to You in difficulties his need
And whose desire for what is with You has become great.
O Allah, Your force is tremendous, Your place is lofty,
And Your plan is hidden, Your command is manifest,

segments.transliteration: wa ghalaba qah-ruka wa jarat qud-ratuk

translation.en: And Your domination is overwhelming, Your power is unhindered
And escape from Your governance is impossible.
O Allah, I find no forgiver of my sins,
Nor concealer of my ugly acts

segments.arabic: وَ لا لِشَيٍْء مِّنْ عَمَلِيَ الْقَبِيحِ بِالْحَسَنِ مُبَدِّلاً غَيْرَكَ

translation.en: Nor transformer of any of my ugly acts into good acts but You
There is no god but You!
Glory be to You, and Thine is the praise!
I have wronged myself,
And I have been audacious in my ignorance

segments.arabic: وَسَكَنتُ إِلَی قَدِيمِ ذِكْرِكَ لِي وَمَنِّكَ عَلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: wa sakan-tu ila qadimi dhik-rika li wa man-nika `alay

translation.en: And I have depended upon Your ancient remembrance of me and Your favour toward me.
O Allah! O my Protector!
How many ugly things You hast concealed!

segments.arabic: وَكَم مِّن فَاِدحٍ مِّنَ البَلاءِ أَقَلْتَهُ

translation.en: How many burdensome tribulations You hast abolished!
And how many stumbles You hast prevented!
And how many ordeals You hast repelled!

segments.arabic: وَكَم مِّن ثَنَاٍء جَمِيلٍ لَّسْتُ أَهْلاً لَّهُ نَشَرْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa kam-min thana-in jamilil-las-tu ah-lal-lahu nashar-tah

translation.en: And how much beautiful praise, for which I was unworthy, You hast spread abroad!
O Allah, my tribulation is tremendous,
And my bad state is excessive,
And my acts are inadequate,
And my fetters have tied me down,
And my far-fetched hopes have held me back from my gain

segments.arabic: وَخَدَعَتْنِي الدُّنْيَا بِغُرُورِهَا وَنَفْسِي بِجِنَايَتِهَا [بِخِیَانَتِهَا] وَمِطَاِلي
segments.transliteration: wa khada`at-nid-dunya bi-ghururi-ha wa naf-si bi-jinayatiha wa mita-li

translation.en: And this world with its delusions, my own soul with its offences and my delay have deceived me.

segments.arabic: يَا سَيِّدِي فَأَسْألُكَ بِعِزَّتِكَ أَن لا يَحْجُبَ عَنْكَ دُعَائِي سُوءُ عَمَلِي وَفِعَاِلي
segments.transliteration: ya say-yidi fa-as-aluka bi-i'z-zatika an la yah-juba `an-ka du`aa-i suo-u `amali wa fi`ali

translation.en: O my Master! So I ask You by Your might not to let my evil works and acts veil my supplication from You,

segments.arabic: وَلا تَفْضَحنِي بِخَفِيِّ مَا اطَّلَعْتَ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ سِرِّي
segments.transliteration: wa-la taf-dah-ni bi-khafi-yi mat-tala`ta `ailayhi min sir-ri

translation.en: And not to disgrace me through the hidden things You knowest of my secrets

segments.arabic: وَلا تُعَاجِلْنِي بِالْعُقُوبَةِ عَلَى مَا عَمِلْتُهُ فِي خَلَوَاتِي
segments.transliteration: wa-la tu`ajil-ni bil-u'qubati `ala ma `amil-tuhu fi khalawati

translation.en: And not to hasten me to punishment for what I have done in private:
My evil acts in secrecy and my misdeeds
And my continuous negligence and my ignorance
And my manifold passions and my forgetfulness.

segments.arabic: وَكُنِ اللَّهُمَّ بِعِزَّتِكَ لِي فِي كُلِّ الأَحْوَاِل رَؤُوفاً
segments.transliteration: wa kunil-lahumma bi-i'z-zatika li fi kul-lil-ah-wali ra’ufa

translation.en: And by Your might, O Allah, be kind to me in all states
And be gracious to me in all affairs!

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي وَرَبِّي مَن لِّي غَيْرُكَ أَسْأَلُهُ كَشْفَ ضُرِّي وَالْنَّظَرَ فِي أَمْرِي
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa rab-bi mal-li ghayruka as-aluhu kash-fa dur-ri wan-nazara fi am-ri!

translation.en: My God and my Lord! Have I any but You from whom to ask removal of my affliction and regard for my affairs!

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي وَمَوْلاي أَجْرَيْتَ عَلَيَّ حُكْماً اتَّبَعْتُ فِيهِ هَوَى نَفْسِي،
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa maw-laya aj-rayta `alay-ya huk-mant-taba`tu fihi hawa naf-si

translation.en: My God and my Protector! You put into effect through me a decree in which I followed the caprice of my own soul

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ أَحْتَرِسْ فِيهِ مِن تَزْيينِ عَدُوِّي،
segments.transliteration: wa lam ah-taris fihi min tazyini `adu-wi

translation.en: And [I] did not remain wary of adorning my enemy.

segments.arabic: فَغَرَّنِي بِمَا أَهْوَى وَأَسْعَدَهُ عَلَى ذَلِكَ القَضَاءُ
segments.transliteration: fa-ghar-rani bi-ma ah-wa wa as-`adahu `ala dha-likal-qada

translation.en: So he deluded me through my soul's caprice and therein destiny favoured him

segments.arabic: فَتَجَاوَزْتُ بِمَا جَرَى عَلَيَّ مِنْ ذَلِكَ بَعْضَ حُدُودِكَ
segments.transliteration: fa-taja-waztu bi-ma jara `alay-ya min dha-lika ba`da hududik

translation.en: So, in what was put into effect through me in that situation, I transgressed some of Your statutes
And disobeyed some of Your commands.

segments.arabic: فَلَكَ الْحُجَّةُ عَلَيَّ فِي جَمِيعِ ذَلِكَ

translation.en: So Thine is the argument against me in all of that

segments.arabic: وَلا حُجَّةَ لِي فِيمَا جَرَی عَلَيَّ فِيهِ قَضَاؤُكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa-la huj-jata li fima jara `alay-ya fihi qadauka

translation.en: I have no argument in what Your destiny put into effect through me therein
nor in what Your decree and Your tribulation imposed upon me.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ أَتَيْتُكَ يَا إِلَهِي بَعْدَ تَقْصِيرِي وَإِسْرَافِي عَلَى نَفْسِي
segments.transliteration: wa qad ataytuka ya ilahi ba`da taq-siri wa is-rafi `ala naf-si

translation.en: Now I have come to You, My God, after my shortcoming and my immoderation toward myself,
Proffering my excuse, regretful,
Broken, apologizing,
Asking forgiveness, repenting,
Acknowledging, submissive, confessing.

segments.arabic: لا أَجِدُ مَفَرّاً مِّمَّا كَانَ مِنِّي

translation.en: I find no place to flee from what occurred through me,

segments.arabic: وَلا مَفْزَعاً أَتَوَجَّهُ إِلَيْهِ في أَمْرِي
segments.transliteration: wa-la mafza'an atawaj-jahu ilayhi fi am-ri

translation.en: Nor any place of escape to which I may turn in my affairs,

segments.arabic: غَيْرَ قَبُولِكَ عُذْرِي، وَإِدخَاِلكَ إِيَايَ فِي سَعَةٍ مِّن رَّحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ghayra qabulika u'dhri wa id-khalika i-yaya fi sa'tim-mir-rah-matik

translation.en: Other than Your acceptance of my excuse and Your entering me into the compass of Your mercy.
O Allah, so accept my excuse,
Have mercy upon the severity of my affliction
And release me from the tightness of my fetters,

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ ارْحَمْ ضَعْفَ بَدَنِي وَرِقَّةَ جِلْدِي وَدِقَّةَ عَظْمِي
segments.transliteration: ya rab-bir-ham da`fa badani wa riq-qata jil-di wa diq-qata `azmi

translation.en: My Lord, have mercy upon the weakness of my body, the thinness of my skin and the frailty of my bones.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ بَدَأَ خَلْقِي وَذِكْرِي وَتَرْبِيَتِي وَبِرِّي وَتَغْذِيَتِي
segments.transliteration: ya mam bada khal-qi wa dhik-ri wa tar-bi-yati wa biri wa tagh-dhi-yati

translation.en: O You who gave rise to my creation, to the remembrance of me, to the nurture of me, to goodness toward me and to nourishment on me,

segments.arabic: هَبْنِي لابْتِدَاءِ كَرَمِكَ وَسَاِلفِ بِرِّكَ بِي
segments.transliteration: hab-ni lb-tida-i karamika wa salifi bir-rika bi

translation.en: Bestow upon me for the sake of Your having given rise [to me] with generosity and Your previous goodness to me!

segments.transliteration: ya ilahi wa say-yidi wa rab-bi

translation.en: O Allah, my Master and my Lord!
Canst You see Yourself tormenting me with Your fire after I have professed Your Unity

segments.arabic: وَبَعْدَ مَا انْطَوَى عَلَيْهِ قَلْبِي مِن مَّعْرِفَتِكَ

translation.en: And after the knowledge of You my heart has embraced,

segments.transliteration: wa lahija bihi lisani min dhik-rik

translation.en: And the remembrance of You my tongue has constantly mentioned
And the love of You to which my mind has clung,

segments.arabic: وَبَعْدَ صِدْقِ اعْتِرَافِي وَدُعَائِي خَاضِعاً لِّرُبُوبِيَّتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ba`da sid-qi-`a-tirafi wa du`aa-i khadi`aal-li-rububi-yatika

translation.en: And after the sincerity of my confession and my supplication, humble before Your lordship?

segments.arabic: هَيْهَاتَ أَنتَ أَكْرَمُ مِنْ أَن تُضَيِّعَ مَن رَّبَّيْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: hayhata anta ak-ramu min an tuday-yi`a mar-rab-baytah

translation.en: Far be it from You! You art more generous than that You shouldst squander him whom You hast nurtured,
Or banish him whom You hast brought nigh,
Or drive away him whom You hast given an abode

segments.arabic: أَوْ تُسْلِّمَ إِلىَ الْبلاءِ مَن كَفَيْتَهُ وَرَحِمْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: aw tus-s-lima ilal-bala-i man kafay-tahu wa rahim-tah

translation.en: Or submit to tribulation him whom You hast spared and shown mercy.

segments.arabic: وَلَيْتَ شِعْرِي يَا سَيِّدِي وَإِلَهِي وَمَوْلاي
segments.transliteration: wa layta shi`a-ri yay say-yidi wa ilahi wa maw-lay

translation.en: Would that I knew, my Master, My God and my Protector,

segments.arabic: أَتُسَلِّطُ النَّارَ عَلَى وُجُوهٍ خَرَّتْ لِعَظَمَتِكَ سَاجِدَةً

translation.en: Whether You wilt give the Fire dominion over faces fallen down prostrate before Your Tremendousness,

segments.arabic: وَعَلَى أَلْسُنٍ نَّطَقَتْ بِتَوْحِيدِكَ صَادِقَةً وَّبِشُكْرِكَ مَادِحَةً
segments.transliteration: wa `ala al-sunin-nataqat bi-taw-hidika sadiqataw-wa bishuk-rika madihah

translation.en: And over tongues voicing sincerely the profession of Your Unity and giving thanks to You in praise,
And over hearts acknowledging Your Divinity through verification,

segments.arabic: وَعَلَى ضَمَائِرَ حَوَتْ مِنَ الْعِلْمِ بِكَ حَتَّى صَارَتْ خَاشِعَةً
segments.transliteration: wa `ala dama-ira hawat minal-i'l-mi bika hat-ta sarat khashi`ah

translation.en: And over minds encompassing knowledge of You until they have become humble

segments.arabic: وَعَلَى جَواِرحَ سَعَتْ إِلَى أَوْطَانِ تَعَبُّدِكَ طَائِعَةً وَّأَشَارَتْ بِاسْتِغْفَارِكَ مُذْعِنَةً
segments.transliteration: wa `ala jawariha sa't ila aw-tani ta'b-budika ta-i`ataw-wa asharat bis-tigh-farika mudhi'nah

translation.en: And over bodily members speeding to the places of Your worship in obedience and beckoning for Your forgiveness in submission.

segments.arabic: مَا هَكَذَا الظَّنُّ بِكَ وَلا أُخْبِرْنَا بِفَضْلِكَ عَنكَ
segments.transliteration: ma hkadhaz-zan-nu bika wa-la ukh-bir-na bi-fadlika `anka

translation.en: No such opinion is held of You! Nor has such been reported - thanks to Your bounty — concerning You,
O All-generous! My Lord,

segments.arabic: وَأَنتَ تَعْلَمُ ضَعْفِي عَن قَلِيلٍ مِّن بَلاءِ الدُّنْيَا وَعُقُوبَاتِهَا،
segments.transliteration: wa anta ta`lamu da`fi `an qalilim-min bala-id-dun-ya wa u'qubatiha

translation.en: And You knowest my weakness before a little of this world's tribulations and punishments,

segments.arabic: وَمَا يَجْرِي فِيهَا مِنَ الْمَكَارِهِ عَلَى أَهْلِهَا
segments.transliteration: wa ma yaj-ri fiha minal-makarihi `ala ah-liha

translation.en: And before those ordeals which befall its inhabitants,

segments.arabic: عَلَى أَنَّ ذَلِكَ بَلاءٌ وَّمَكْرُوهٌ، قَلِيلٌ مَّكْثُهُ، يَسِيرٌ بَقَاؤُهُ، قَصِيرٌ مُّدَّتُهُ
segments.transliteration: `ala an-na dha-lika bala-uw-wa mak-ruhun, qalilum-mak-thuhu, yasirum baqa-uhu, qasirum-mud-datuh

translation.en: Even though it is a tribulation and ordeal whose stay is short, whose subsistence is but little and, whose period is but fleeting.

segments.arabic: فَكَيْفَ احْتِمَاِلي لِبَلاءِ الآخِرَةِ وَجَلِيلِ وُقُوعِ الْمَكَارِهِ فِيهَا!
segments.transliteration: fa-kayfah-timali li-bala-il-akhirati wa jalili wuqui'l-makarihi fiha!

translation.en: So how can I endure the tribulations of the next world and the great ordeals that occur within it?

segments.arabic: وَهُوَ بَلاءٌ تَطُولُ مُدَّتُهُ، وَيَدُومُ مَقَامُهُ، وَلا يُخَفَّفُ عَنْ أَهْلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa huwa bala-un tatulu mud-datuhu, wa yadumu maqamuhu, wa-la yukhaf-fafu `an ah-lih

translation.en: For it is a tribulation whose period is long, whose station endures and whose sufferers are given no respite,

segments.arabic: لأَنَّهُ لا يَكُونُ إِلاَّ عَنْ غَضَبِكَ وَانتِقَامِكَ وَسَخَطِكَ
segments.transliteration: li-an-nahu la yakunu il-la `an ghadabika wan-tiqamika wa sakhatik

translation.en: Since it only occurs as a result of Your wrath, Your vengeance and Your anger,

segments.arabic: وَهَذَا مَا لا تَقُومُ لَهُ السَّمَاوَاتُ وَالأَرْضُ
segments.transliteration: wa hadha ma la taqumu lahus-samawatu wal-ardu

translation.en: And these cannot be withstood by the heavens and the earth.
O Master, so what about me?!

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ الضَّعِيفُ الذَّلِيلُ الْحَقِيرُ الْمِسْكِينُ الْمُسْتَكِينُ

translation.en: For I am Your weak, lowly, base, wretched and miserable slave.

segments.transliteration: ya ilahi wa rab-bi wa say-yidi wa maw-lay

translation.en: My God! My Lord! My Master! My Protector!
For which things would I complain to You?

segments.transliteration: wa lima minha adij-ju wa ab-ki

translation.en: And for which of them would I lament and weep?
For the pain and severity of chastisement?
Or for the length and period of tribulation?
So if You takest me to the punishments with Your enemies,

segments.transliteration: wa jama`ta bayni wa bayna ahli bala-ik

translation.en: And gatherest me with the people of Your tribulation

segments.transliteration: wa far-raq-ta bay-ni wa bay-na ahib-ba-ika wa aw-li-ya-ik

translation.en: And separatest me from Your friends and saints,

segments.arabic: فَهَبْنِي يَا إِلَهِي وَسَيِّدِي وَمَوْلايَ وَرَبِّي صَبَرْتُ عَلَى عَذَابِكَ،
segments.transliteration: fa-hab-ni ya ilahi wasay-yidi wa mawlaya wa rab-bi sabar-tu `ala `adhabika

translation.en: Then suppose, My God, my Master, my Protector and my Lord that I am able to endure Your chastisement,
How can I endure separation from You?
And suppose that I am able to endure the heat of Your fire,

segments.arabic: فَكَيْفَ أَصْبِرُ عَنِ النَّظَرِ إِلَى كَرَامَتِكَ

translation.en: How can I endure not gazing upon Your generosity?

segments.arabic: أَمْ كَيْفَ أَسْكُنُ فِي النَّارِ وَرَجَائِي عَفْوُكَ
segments.transliteration: am kayfa as-kunu fin-nari wa raja-i `af-wuk

translation.en: Or how can I dwell in the Fire while my hope is Your pardon?

segments.arabic: فَبِعِزَّتِكَ يَا سَيِّدِي وَمَوْلاي أُقْسِمُ صَادِقاً، لَئِن تَرَكْتَنِي نَاطِقاً
segments.transliteration: fabi-i'z-zatika ya say-yidi wa mawlaya uq-simu sadiqal-la-in tarak-tani natiqan

translation.en: So by Your might, my Master and my protector, I swear sincerely, if You leavest me with speech,

segments.arabic: لأَضِجَّنَّ إِلَيْكَ بَيْنَ أَهْلِهَا ضَجِيجَ الآمِلِينَ

translation.en: I will lament to You from the midst of the Fire's inhabitants with lamentation of the hopeful;
I will cry to You with the cry of those crying for help;
I will weep to You with the weeping of the bereft;

segments.arabic: وَلأُنَادِيَنَّكَ أَيْنَ كُنتَ يَا وَلِيَّ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa la-unadi-yan-naka ay-na kun-ta ya wali-yal-mu-minin

translation.en: And I will call to You, Where art You, O Sponsor of the believers,
O Goal of the hopes of Your knowers,
O Aid of those who seek assistance,
O Friend of the hearts of the sincere
And O God of all the world's inhabitants!

segments.arabic: أَفَتُرَاكَ، سُبْحَانَكَ يَا إِلَهِي وَبِحَمْدِكَ، تَسْمَعُ فِيهَا صَوْتَ عَبْدٍ مُّسْلِمٍ
segments.transliteration: afaturaka sub-hanaka ya ilahi wa biham-dika tas-mau' fiha saw-ta `ab-dim-mus-limin

translation.en: Canst You see Yourself — Glory be to You My God, and Thine is the praised — hearing within the Fire the voice of a slave surrendered to You,
Imprisoned there because of his violations,
Tasting the favour of its torment because of his disobedience,

segments.transliteration: wa hubisa bayna at-baqiha bijur-mih wa jariratih

translation.en: And confined within its levels because of his sin and crime,

segments.arabic: وَهُوَ يَضِجُّ إلَيْكَ ضَجِيجَ مُؤَمِّلٍ لِّرَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa huwa yadij-ju ilayka dajija muammilil-lirah-mat-k

translation.en: While he laments to You with the lament of one hopeful for Your mercy,
And calls to You with the tongue of those who profess Your Unity
And entreats You by Your lordship!

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْلاي فَكَيْفَ يَبقَى فِي الْعَذَابِ وَهُوَ يَرْجُو مَا سَلَفَ مِنْ حِلْمِكَ
segments.transliteration: ya mawlay fa-kayfa yabqa fil-`adhabi wa huwa yar-ju ma salafa min hil-mik

translation.en: My Protector, so how should he remain in the chastisement, while he has hope for Your previous clemency?

segments.arabic: أَمْ كَيْفَ تُؤْلِمُهُ النَّارُ وَهُوَ يَأمُلُ فَضْلَكَ وَرَحْمَتَكَ
segments.transliteration: am kayfa tu-limuhun-naru wa huwa ya-malu fadlaka wa rah-mataka

translation.en: Or how should the Fire cause him pain while he expects Your bounty and mercy?

segments.arabic: أَمْ كَيْفَ يُحْرِقُهُ لَهِيبُهَا وَأَنتَ تَسْمَعُ صَوْتَهُ وَتَرَى مَكَانَهُ
segments.transliteration: am kayfa yuh-riquhu lahibuha wa anta tas-mau' saw-tahu wa tara makanah

translation.en: Or how should its flames burn him, while You hearest his voice and seest his place?

segments.arabic: أَمْ كَيْفَ يَشْتَمِلُ عَلَيْهِ زَفِيرُهَا وَأَنتَ تَعْلَمُ ضَعْفَهُ
segments.transliteration: am kayfa yash-tamilu `ailayhi zafiruha wa anta ta`lamu da`fah

translation.en: Or how should its groaning encompass him, while You knowest his weakness?

segments.arabic: أَمْ كَيْفَ يَتَقَلْقَلُ بَيْنَ أَطْبَاقِهَا وَأَنتَ تَعْلَمُ صِدْقَهُ
segments.transliteration: am kayfa yataqalqalu bayna at-baqiha wa anta ta`lamu sid-qah

translation.en: Or how should he be convulsed among its levels, while You knowest his sincerity?

segments.arabic: أَمْ كَيْفَ تَزْجُرُهُ زَبَانِيَتُهَا وَهُوَ يُنَادِيكَ يَا رَبَّهُ
segments.transliteration: am kayfa tazjuruhu zabani-yatuha wa huwa yunadika ya rab-bah

translation.en: Or how should its keepers torture him while he calls out to You, O Lord?

segments.arabic: أَمْ كَيْفَ يَرْجُو فَضْلَكَ فِي عِتْقِهِ مِنْهَا فَتَتْرُكُهُ فِيهَا
segments.transliteration: am kayfa yar-ju fadlaka fi i't-qihi minha fatat-rukuhu fiha

translation.en: Or how should he have hope of Your bounty in freeing him from it, while You abandonest him within it?
Far be it from You! That is not what is expected of You,
Nor what is well-known of Your bounty,

segments.arabic: وَلا مُشْبِهٌ لِمَا عَامَلْتَ بِهِ الْمُوَحِّدِينَ مِنْ بِرِّكَ وَإِحْسَانِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa-la mush-biha lima `amal-ta bihil-muah-hidina mim bir-rika wa ih-sanik

translation.en: Nor it is similar to the goodness and kindness You hast shown to those who profess Your Unity.

segments.arabic: فَبِالْيَقِينِ أَقْطَعُ لَوْلا مَا حَكَمْتَ بِهِ مِن تَعْذِيبِ جَاحِدِيكَ
segments.transliteration: fa-bial-yaqini aq-tau' law-la ma hakam-ta bihi min ta`dhibi jahidik

translation.en: So I declare with certainty that were it not for what You hast decreed concerning the chastisement of Your deniers

segments.transliteration: wa qadayta bihi min ikh-laydi mu`anidik

translation.en: And what You hast foreordained concerning the everlasting home of those who stubbornly resist,
You wouldst make the Fire, all of it, coolness and safety,

segments.arabic: وَمَا كَانَ لأَحَدٍ فِيهَا مَقَرّاً وَّلا مُقَاماً
segments.transliteration: wa ma kana li-ahadin fiha maqar-raw-wa-la muqama

translation.en: And no one would have a place of rest or abode within it.

segments.arabic: لَّكِنَّكَ تَقَدَّسَتْ أَسْمَاؤُكَ أَقْسَمْتَ أَنْ تَمْلأَهَا مِنَ الْكَافِرِينَ،
segments.transliteration: lakin-naka taqad-dasat as-ma-uka aq-sam-ta an tam-laha minal-kafirina;

translation.en: But You—holy are Your Names—hast sworn that You wilt fill it with the unbelievers,
Both Jinn and men together,
And that You wilt place those who stubbornly resist therein forever.

segments.arabic: وَأَنتَ جَلَّ ثَنَاؤُكَ قُلْتَ مُبْتَدَئاً، وَّتَطَوَّلْتَ بِالإِنْعَامِ مُتَكَرِّماً
segments.transliteration: wa anta jal-la thana-uka qul-ta mub-tadiwaw-wa tataw-wal-ta bil-in-`ami mutakar-rima

translation.en: And You— majestic is Your eulogy— said at the beginning and wernt gracious through kindness as a favour,

segments.arabic: أَفَمَن كَانَ مُؤْمِنًا كَمَن كَانَ فَاسِقًا ۚ لَّا يَسْتَوُونَ
segments.transliteration: afaman kana muminan kaman kana fasiqal-la yas-tawun

translation.en: (What? Is he who has been believer like unto him who has been ungodly? They are not equal)

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي وَسَيِّدِي فَأَسْألُكَ بِالْقُدْرَةِ الَّتِي قَدَّرْتَهَا
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa say-yidi fa-as-aluka bial-qud-ratil-lati qad-dartaha

translation.en: My God and my Master! So I ask You by the power You hast apportioned

segments.arabic: وَبِالْقَضِيَّةِ الَّتِي حَتَمْتَهَا وَحَكَمْتَهَا وَغَلَبْتَ مَنْ عَلَيْهِ أَجْرَيْتَهَا
segments.transliteration: wa bil-qadi-yatil-lati hatam-taha wa hakam-taha wa ghalab-ta man `ailayhi aj-raytaha

translation.en: And by the decision which You hast determined and imposed and through which You hast overcome him toward whom it has been put into effect,

segments.arabic: أَن تَهَبَ لِي، فِي هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ، وَفِي هَذِهِ السَّاعَةِ
segments.transliteration: an tahaba li fi hadhihil-laylati wa fi hadhihis-sa'ah

translation.en: That You forgivest me in this night and at this hour
Every offence I have committed,
And every sin I have performed,
And every ugly thing I have concealed
And every folly I have enacted
Whether I have hidden or announced it,
Or I have concealed it or manifested it

segments.arabic: وَكُلَّ سَيِّئَةٍ أَمَرْتَ بِإِثْبَاتِهَا الْكِرَامَ الكَاتِبِينَ

translation.en: And every evil act which You hast commanded the Noble Writers to record,

segments.arabic: الَّذِينَ وَكَّلْتَهُم بِحِفْظِ مَا يَكُونُ مِنِّي
segments.transliteration: al-ladhina wak-kal-tahum bi-hif-zi ma yakunu min-ni

translation.en: Those whom You hast appointed to watch over what appears from me
And whom You hast made, along with my bodily members, witness against me.

segments.arabic: وَكُنتَ أَنتَ الرَّقِيبَ عَلَيَّ مِن وَّرَائِهِمْ،

translation.en: And You wast Yourself the Watcher over me from behind them,
And the Witness of what is hidden from them
But through Your mercy You concealed it
And through Your bounty You veiled it.

segments.arabic: وَأَن تُوَفِّرَ حَظِّي مِن كُلِّ خَيْرٍ أَنْزَلْتَهُ [تُنْزِلُهُ]
segments.transliteration: wa an tuwf-fira haz-zi min kul-li khayrin tunziluh

translation.en: [And I ask You] that You bestowest upon me an abundant share of every good You sendest down,
Or kindness You conferrest,
Or goodness You unfoldest,
Or provision You spreadest out,
Or sin You forgivest,
Or error You coverest.

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ
segments.transliteration: ya rab-bi ya rab-bi ya rabb

translation.en: My Lord! My Lord! My Lord!

segments.arabic: يَا إِلَهِي وَسَيِّدِي وَمَوْلاي وَمَاِلكَ رِقِّي
segments.transliteration: ya ilahi wa say-yidi wa maw-laya wa malika riq-qi

translation.en: My God! My Master! My Protector! Owner of my bondage!
O He in whose hand is my forelock!
O He who knows my affliction and my misery!
O He who is aware of my poverty and indigence!

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ
segments.transliteration: ya rab-bi ya ya rab-bi ya rabb

translation.en: My Lord! My Lord! My Lord!
I ask You by Your Truth and Your Holiness
And the greatest of Your Attributes and Names,

segments.arabic: أن تَجْعَلَ أَوْقَاتِي فِي اللَّيلِ وَالنَّهَارِ بِذِكْرِكَ مَعْمُورَةً،
segments.transliteration: an taj-`ala aw-qati fil-layli wan-nahari bi-dhik-rika ma`murah

translation.en: That You makest my times in the night and the day inhabited by Your remembrance,
And joined to Your service
And my works acceptable to You,

segments.arabic: حَتَّى تَكُونَ أَعْمَاِلي وَأَوْرَادِي كُلُّهَا وِرْداً وَّاحِداً،
segments.transliteration: hat-ta takuna a`mali wa aw-radi kul-luha wir-daw-wahidan

translation.en: So that my works and my litanies may all be a single litany
And my occupation with Your service everlasting.

segments.arabic: يَا سَيِّدِي، يَا مَنْ عَلَيْهِ مُعَوَّلِي

translation.en: My Master! O He upon whom I depend!
O He to whom I complain about my states!

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ
segments.transliteration: ya rab-bi ya rab-bi ya rabb

translation.en: My Lord! My Lord! My Lord!
Strengthen my bodily members in Your service,
And fortify my ribs in determination
And bestow upon me earnestness in my fear of You
And continuity in my being joined to Your service

segments.arabic: حَتَّى أَسْرَحَ إِلَيكَ فِي مَيَادِينِ السَّابِقِينَ

translation.en: So that I may move easily toward You in the battlefields of the foremost
And hurry to You among the prominent
And desire fervently Your proximity among the fervently desirous
And move nearer to You with the nearness of the sincere
And fear You with the fear of those who have certitude
And gather with the believers in Your vicinity.

segments.transliteration: allahumma wa man aradani bisuo-in farid-hu

translation.en: O Allah, whoever desires evil for me, desire [it] for him!
whoever deceives me-deceive him!

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنْ أَحَسَنِ عَبِيدِكَ نَصِيباً عِنْدَكَ

translation.en: And make me one of the most excellent of Your slaves in Portion from You,
And the nearest of them in station to You
And the most elected of them in proximity to You.

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّهُ لا يُنَالُ ذَلِكَ إِلاَّ بِفَضْلِكَ
segments.transliteration: fa-in-nahu la yunalu dha-lika il-la bi-fadlik

translation.en: For that cannot be attained except by Your bounty.
And grant generously to me through Your munificence,
And incline toward me with Your splendour
And protect me with Your mercy!
And make my tongue remember You without ceasing
And my heart enthralled by Your love!
And be gracious to me by answering me favourably,
And nullify my slips
And forgive my lapses!
For You hast decreed Your worship for Your servants
And commanded them to supplicate You
And assured them that they would be answered.
So toward You, my Lord, I have turned my face

segments.transliteration: wa ilayka ya rab-bi madad-tu yadi

translation.en: And toward You, my Lord, I have extended my hand.
So by Your might, comply with my supplication
And make me attain my desires!
Do not severe my hoping for Your Favours

segments.arabic: وَاكْفِنِي شَرَّ الْجِنِّ وَالإِنْسِ مِنْ أَعْدَائِي

translation.en: And spare me the evil of my enemies from among the jinn and men!
O He, whose pleasure is quickly achieved!

segments.arabic: اغْفِرْ لِمَن لا يَمْلِكُ إِلاَّ الدُّعَاءَ

translation.en: Forgive him who owns nothing but supplication
For You dost what You wilt.
O He whose Name is a remedy,
And whose remembrance is a cure,
And whose obedience is wealth!
Have mercy upon him whose capital is hope
And whose weapon is tears!
O Ample in blessings!
O Repeller of adversities!
O Light of those who are lonely in the darkness!
O Knower who was never taught!
Bless Muhammad and Muhammad's household!
And do with me what is worthy of You!

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَى رَسُولِهِ وَالأَئِمَّةِ الْمَيَامِينَ مِنْ آلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa sal-lallahu `ala rasulihi wal-aimmatil-mayamina min a-lihi

translation.en: And Allah bless His messenger and the holy Imams of his household
And give them abundant peace!

text.en: Dua Tawassul
Supplication of Seeking Intercession

`Allamah al-Majlisi has quoted some considerable books to have mentioned that Muhammad ibn Babawayh reported this supplication of Seeking Intercession (Du`a' al-Tawassul) from the Holy Imams (peace be upon them). Commenting, he added, “Whenever I said this supplication for any matter, I could find the traces of response immediately.”

segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka wa atawajjahu ilayka

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You and turn my face toward You
in the name of Your Prophet; the Prophet of Mercy,
Muhammad—may Allah send blessings to him and his Household.
O Abu’l-Qasim!
O Allah’s Messenger!
O Chief of Mercy!
O our master and chief!
We are turning our faces toward you, seeking your intercession
and your advocacy for us before Allah;
and we are presenting you [as our intermediary] for the settlement of our needs.
O well-esteemed with Allah,
intercede for us before Allah.
O Abu’l-Hasan!
O commander of the Believers!
O `Ali, son of Abu-Talib!
O Allah’s Argument against His creatures!
O our master and chief!
We are turning our faces toward you, seeking your intercession
and your advocacy for us before Allah;
and we are presenting you [as our intermediary] for the settlement of our needs.
O well-esteemed with Allah,
intercede for us before Allah.
O Fatimah, the Luminous Lady!
O daughter of Muhammad!
O delight of the Messenger’s eyes!
O our chief!
We are turning our faces toward you, seeking your intercession
and your advocacy for us before Allah;
and we are presenting you [as our intermediary] for the settlement of our needs.
O well-esteemed with Allah,
intercede for us before Allah.
O Abu-Muhammad!
O Hasan the son of `Ali!
O well-Chosen one!
O son of Allah’s Messenger!
O Allah’s Argument against His creatures!
O our master and chief!
we are turning our faces toward you, seeking your intercession
and your advocacy for us before Allah;
and we are presenting you [as our intermediary] for the settlement of our needs.
O well-esteemed with Allah,
intercede for us before Allah.
O Abu-`Abdullah!
O Husayn the son of `Ali!
O Martyr!
O son of Allah’s Messenger!
O Allah’s Argument against His creatures!
O our master and chief!
we are turning our faces toward you, seeking your intercession
and your advocacy for us before Allah;
and we are presenting you [as our intermediary] for the settlement of our needs.
O well-esteemed with Allah,
intercede for us before Allah.
O Abu’l-Hasan!
O `Ali the son of al-Husayn!
O Ornament of the Worshippers!
O son of Allah’s Messenger!
O Allah’s Argument against His creatures!
O our master and chief!
we are turning our faces toward you, seeking your intercession
and your advocacy for us before Allah;
and we are presenting you [as our intermediary] for the settlement of our needs.
O well-esteemed with Allah,
intercede for us before Allah.
O Abu-Ja`far!
O Muhammad the son of `Ali!
O Cleaver [of knowledge]!
O son of Allah’s Messenger!
O Allah’s Argument against His creatures!
O our master and chief!
we are turning our faces toward you, seeking your intercession
and your advocacy for us before Allah;
and we are presenting you [as our intermediary] for the settlement of our needs.
O well-esteemed with Allah,
intercede for us before Allah.
O Abu-`Abdullah!
O Ja`far the son of Muhammad!
O Veracious!
O son of Allah’s Messenger!
O Allah’s Argument against His creatures!
O our master and chief!
we are turning our faces toward you, seeking your intercession
and your advocacy for us before Allah;
and we are presenting you [as our intermediary] for the settlement of our needs.
O well-esteemed with Allah,
intercede for us before Allah.
O Abu’l-Hasan!
O Musa the son of Ja`far!
O Suppressor [of rage]!
O son of Allah’s Messenger!
O Allah’s Argument against His creatures!
O our master and chief!
we are turning our faces toward you, seeking your intercession
and your advocacy for us before Allah;
and we are presenting you [as our intermediary] for the settlement of our needs.
O well-esteemed with Allah,
intercede for us before Allah.
O Abu’l-Hasan!
O `Ali the son of Musa!
O Amicable!
O son of Allah’s Messenger!
O Allah’s Argument against His creatures!
O our master and chief!
we are turning our faces toward you, seeking your intercession
and your advocacy for us before Allah;
and we are presenting you [as our intermediary] for the settlement of our needs.
O well-esteemed with Allah,
intercede for us before Allah.
O Abu-Ja`far!
O Muhammad the son of `Ali!
O pious and magnanimous!
O son of Allah’s Messenger!
O Allah’s Argument against His creatures!
O our master and chief!
we are turning our faces toward you, seeking your intercession
and your advocacy for us before Allah;
and we are presenting you [as our intermediary] for the settlement of our needs.
O well-esteemed with Allah,
intercede for us before Allah.
O Abu’l-Hasan!
O `Ali the son of Muhammad!
O guide and pure!
O son of Allah’s Messenger!
O Allah’s Argument against His creatures!
O our master and chief!
we are turning our faces toward you, seeking your intercession
and your advocacy for us before Allah;
and we are presenting you [as our intermediary] for the settlement of our needs.
O well-esteemed with Allah,
intercede for us before Allah.
O Abu-Muhammad!
O Hasan the son of `Ali!
O immaculate resident of `Askar [city]!
O son of Allah’s Messenger!
O Allah’s Argument against His creatures!
O our master and chief!
we are turning our faces toward you, seeking your intercession
and your advocacy for us before Allah;
and we are presenting you [as our intermediary] for the settlement of our needs.
O well-esteemed with Allah,
intercede for us before Allah.
O successor of al-Hasan!
O descendant [of the Infallibles] and Argument [of Allah]!
O Riser, Awaited, and Well-guided!
O son of Allah’s Messenger!
O Allah’s Argument against His creatures!
O our master and chief!
we are turning our faces toward you, seeking your intercession
and your advocacy for us before Allah;
and we are presenting you [as our intermediary] for the settlement of our needs.
O well-esteemed with Allah,
intercede for us before Allah.

text.en: You may now beseech Almighty Allah to grant your needs, and they will be settled, if Allah permits. According to another narration, you may say the following words thereafter:

translation.en: O my chiefs and masters!
I am turning my face toward Allah in the names of you [all],
for you are my leaders and my supporters
on the day of my destitution and neediness
before Allah.
I am seeking your advocacy for me before Allah
and seeking your intercession for me before Allah;
so, (please) intercede for me before Allah
and save me from my sins before Allah,
for you are my means to Allah

segments.arabic: وَبِحُبِّكُمْ وَبِقُرْبِكُمْ أَرْجُو نَجَاةً مِنَ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa bihubbikum wa biqurbikum arju najatan mina allahi

translation.en: and through my love for you and my seeking nearness to you do I hope for salvation from Allah.
So, be my hope before Allah.
O my masters! O Allah’s intimate servants!
May Allah bless you all

segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu a`da'a allahi zalimihim

translation.en: and may Allah curse the enemies of Allah; those who wronged you,
from the past and the last generations.
Respond to us, O Lord of the Worlds!

text.en: Dua Ahad
recited after Ziarat of Imam Mahdi(ajtfs)for repelling calamities from Imam
Imam Sadiq (a.s) narrates that “one who recites this supplication for 40 mornings; he will be accounted amongst the helpers of Imam Mahdi (a.t.f.s)

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: O Allah: (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad—

translation.en: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
O Allah the Lord of the Great Light,
the Lord of the Elevated Throne,
the Lord of the swollen ocean,
the Revealer of the Torah, the Gospel, and the Psalms,
the Lord of shade and heat,
the Revealer of the Great Qur'an,
and the Lord of the Archangels,
the Prophets, and the Messengers:
O Allah, I beseech You in Your Noble Name,
in the Light of Your Luminous Face
and Your Eternal Kingdom.
O Ever-living! O Self-Subsistent!

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ  بِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي أَشْرَقَتْ بِهِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتُ وَالْأَرَضُونَ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka bismika alladhi ashraqat bihi alssamawatu wal-araduna

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of Your Name with which the heavens and the earth have lit up

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي يَصْلَحُ بِهِ الْأَوَّلُونَ وَٱلآخِرُونَ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi yasluhu bihi al-awwaluna wal-akhiruna

translation.en: and in Your Name with which the past and the coming generations have become upright!
O He Who has been always alive before the existence of all living things!

segments.transliteration: wa ya hayyan ba`da kulli hayyin

translation.en: O He Who shall be alive after the extinction of all living things!

segments.transliteration: wa ya hayyan hina la hayyu

translation.en: O He Who has been always alive even when there was nothing else alive!

segments.transliteration: ya muhyiya almawta wa mumita al-ahya'i

translation.en: O He Who revives the dead ones and causes the living ones to die!

segments.arabic: يَا حَيُّ لا إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: ya hayyu la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: O Ever-living! There is no god save You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ بَلِّغْ مَوْلاَنَا ٱلإِمَامَ ٱلْهَادِيَ ٱلْمَهْدِيَّ ٱلْقَائِمَ بِأَمْرِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma balligh mawlana al-imama alhadiya almahdiyya alqa'ima bi'amrika

translation.en: O Allah, convey to our master Imam al-Mahdi, the guide who is to undertake Your orders,

segments.arabic: صَلَوَاتُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰ آبَائِهِ ٱلطَّاهِرِينَ

translation.en: may Allah’s blessings be upon him and upon his immaculate fathers,
on behalf of all of the believing men and women
in the east and west of the earth
and in plains, mountains,
lands, and seas,
and on behalf of my parents
(convey to him) blessings that are as weighty as Allah’s Throne,
as much as the ink of His Words,

segments.arabic: وَمَا أحْصاهُ عِلْمُهُ وَأَحاطَ بِهِ كِتَابُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa ma ahsahu `ilmuhu wa ahata bihi kitabuhu

translation.en: and as many as that which is counted by His knowledge and encompassed by His Book.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أُجَدِّدُ لَهُ فِي صَبِيحَةِ يَوْمِي هٰذَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ujaddidu lahu fi sabihati yawmi hadha

translation.en: O Allah, I update to him in the beginning of this day
and throughout the days of lifetime a pledge,

segments.arabic: عَهْداً وَعَقْداً وَبَيْعَةً لَهُ فِي عُنُقِي

translation.en: a covenant, and allegiance to which I commit myself

segments.arabic: لا أَحُولُ عَنْه وَلا أَزُولُ أَبَداً
segments.transliteration: la ahulu `anhu wa la azulu abadan

translation.en: and from which I neither convert nor change.
O Allah, (please do) make me of his supporters,
sponsors, defenders,
and those who hurry in carrying out his instructions,
those who comply with his orders,
those who uphold him,
those who precede others to implementing his will,
and those who will be martyred before him.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنْ حَالَ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَهُ ٱلْمَوْتُ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلْتَهُ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِكَ حَتْماً مَقْضِيّاً
segments.transliteration: allahumma in hala bayni wa baynahu almawtu alladhi ja`altahu `ala `ibadika hatman maqdiyyan

translation.en: O Allah, if death that You have made inevitably and certainly incumbent upon Your servants stands between me and him,
then (please do) take me out of my grave using my shroud as dress,
unsheathing my sword,
holding my lance in my hand,

segments.arabic: مُلَبِّياً دَعْوَةَ ٱلدَّاعِي فِي ٱلْحَاضِرِ وَٱلْبَادِي

translation.en: and responding to the call of the Caller who shall announce (his advent) in urban areas and deserts.
O Allah, (please do) show me his magnificent mien
and his praiseworthy forehead,
delight my eyes by letting me have a look at him.
And (please) expedite his relief,
make his reappearance easy,
clear a spacious space for him,
guide me to follow his course,
give success to his issues,
and confirm his strength.
O Allah, construct Your lands through him
and refresh Your servants through him,
For You have said, and true are Your words:
“Corruption has appeared in the land and the sea
on account of what the hands of men have wrought.”
So, O Allah, (please) show us Your vicegerent,
the son of Your Prophet,
and the namesake of Your Messenger,
peace be upon him and his Household,

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ لا يَظْفَرَ بِشَيْءٍ مِنَ ٱلْبَاطِلِ إِلاَّ مَزَّقَهُ
segments.transliteration: hatta la yazfara bishay'in min albatili illa mazzaqahu

translation.en: so that he shall tear up any wrong item that he will face
and shall confirm and approve of the truth.
O Allah, (please) make him the shelter to whom Your wronged servants shall resort,

segments.arabic: وَنَاصِراً لِمَنْ لا يَجِدُ لَهُ نَاصِراً غَيْرَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa nasiran liman la yajidu lahu nasiran ghayraka

translation.en: the supporter of those who cannot find any supporter save You,

segments.arabic: وَمُجَدِّداً لِمَا عُطِّلَ مِنْ أَحْكامِ كِتَابِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa mujaddidan lima `uttila min ahkami kitabika

translation.en: the reviver of the laws of Your Book that have been suspended,

segments.arabic: وَمُشَيِّداً لِمَا وَرَدَ مِنْ أَعْلامِ دِينِكَ وَسُنَنِ نَبِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: wa mushayyidan lima warada min a`lami dinika wa sunani nabiyyika

translation.en: and the constructor of all signs of Your religion and instructions of Your Messenger,
peace be upon him and his Household, that he will see.

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْهُ ٱللَّهُمَّ مِمَّنْ حَصَّنْتَهُ مِنْ بَأْسِ ٱلْمُعْتَدِينَ
segments.transliteration: waj`alhu allahumma mimman hassantahu min ba'si almu`tadina

translation.en: O Allah, (please) include him with those whom You protect from the domination of the aggressors.
O Allah, (please) delight Your Prophet Muhammad,
peace be upon him and his Household,
as well as all those who followed him in his promulgation by making (us) see him,
and (please) have mercy upon our humiliation after him.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱكْشِفْ هٰذِهِ ٱلْغُمَّةَ عَنْ هٰذِهِ الْأُمَّةِ بِحُضُورِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ikshif hadhihi alghummata `an hadhihi al-ummati bihudurihi

translation.en: O Allah, (please) relieve this community from the (current) grief through presenting him
and expedite his advent for us:

segments.transliteration: innahum yarawnahu ba`idan wa narahu qariban

translation.en: “Surely, they think it to be far off, and We see it nigh.”
[do all that] In the name of Your mercy; O most merciful of all those who show mercy.

text.en: You may then slap your right thigh with your hand three times and, at each time, say the following words:

segments.arabic: الْعَجَلَ ٱلْعَجَلَ يَامَوْلايَ يَا صَاحِبَ ٱلزَّمَانِ
segments.transliteration: al`ajala al`ajala ya mawlaya ya sahiba alzzamani

translation.en: (We pray for Your) earliest advent, earliest advent, O Patron of the Age.

text.en: Dua Sabah
recited early in the morning
Narrated by Imam Ali (as)

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ يَا مَنْ دَلَعَ لِسَانَ ٱلصَّبَاحِ بِنُطْقِ تَبَلُّجِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ya man dala`a lisana alssabahi binutqi taballujihi

translation.en: O Allah, O He Who extended the morning's tongue in the speech of its dawning,

segments.arabic: وَسَرَّحَ قِطَعَ ٱللَّيْلِ ٱلْمُظْلِمِ بِغَيَاهِبِ تَلَجْلُجِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa sarraha qita`a allayli almuzlimi bighayahibi talajlujihi

translation.en: dispatched the fragments of the dark night into the gloom of its stammering,

segments.arabic: وَأَتْقَنَ صُنْعَ ٱلْفَلَكِ الدَّوَّارِ فِي مَقَادِيرِ تَبَرُّجِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa atqana sun`a alfalaki alddawwari fi maqadiri tabarrujihi

translation.en: made firm the structure of the turning spheres in the measure of its display,

segments.transliteration: wa sha`sha`a diya'a alshshamsi binuri ta'ajjujihi

translation.en: and beamed forth the brightness of the sun through the light of its blazing!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ دَلَّ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِهِ بِذَاتِهِ

translation.en: O He Who demonstrates His Essence by His Essence,
transcends from congeniality with His creatures,
and is exalted beyond conformity with His qualities!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ قَرُبَ مِنْ خَطَرَاتِ ٱلظُّنُونِ
segments.transliteration: ya man qaruba min khatarati alzzununi

translation.en: O He Who is near to the passing thoughts of opinions,
far from the regards of eyes,

segments.arabic: وَعَلِمَ بِمَا كَانَ قَبْلَ أَن يَكُونَ
segments.transliteration: wa `alima bima kana qabla an yakuna

translation.en: and knows what will be before it comes to be!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ أَرْقَدَنِي فِي مِهَادِ أَمْنِهِ وَأَمَانِهِ
segments.transliteration: ya man arqadani fi mihadi amnihi wa amanihi

translation.en: O He Who has put me at ease in the cradle of His security and sanctuary,

segments.arabic: وَأَيْقَظَنِي إِلَىٰ مَا مَنَحَنِي بِهِ مِنْ مِنَنِهِ وَإِحْسَانِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ayqazani ila ma manahani bihi min minanihi wa ihsanihi

translation.en: awakened me to the favors and kindness that He has bestowed upon me,

segments.arabic: وَكَفَّ أَكُفَّ السُّوءِ عَنِّي بِيَدِهِ وَسُلْطَانِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa kaffa akuffa alssu'i `anni biyadihi wa sultanihi

translation.en: and held back from me the claws of evil with His hand and His authority!

segments.arabic: صَلِّ اللَّهُمَّ عَلَىٰ ٱلدَّلِيلِ إِلَيْكَ فِي ٱللَّيْلِ ٱلأَلْيَلِ
segments.transliteration: salli allahumma `ala alddalili ilayka fi allayli al-alyali

translation.en: Bless, O Allah, the guide to You in the darkest night,

segments.arabic: وَٱلْمَاسِكِ مِنْ أَسْبَابِكَ بِحَبْلِ ٱلشَّرَفِ ٱلأَطْوَلِ
segments.transliteration: walmasiki min asbabika bihabli alshsharafi al-atwali

translation.en: who, of Your ropes, clings to the cord of the longest nobility,

segments.arabic: وَٱلنَّاصِعِ ٱلْحَسَبِ فِي ذِرْوَةِ ٱلْكَاهِلِ ٱلأَعْبَلِ
segments.transliteration: walnnasi`i alhasabi fi dhirwati alkahili al-a`bali

translation.en: whose pure lineage evident at the summit of stout shoulders,

segments.arabic: وَٱلثَّابِتِ ٱلْقَدَمِ عَلَىٰ زَحَاِليْفِهَا فِي ٱلزَّمَنِ ٱلأَوَّلِ
segments.transliteration: walththabiti alqadami `ala zahalifiha fi alzzamani al-awwali

translation.en: and whose feet were entrenched in spite of slippery places in ancient time.
And [bless] his household, the good, chosen, and pious.
Open for us, O Allah, the leaves of the morning's door
with the keys of mercy and prosperity!

segments.arabic: وَأَلْبِسْنِي ٱللَّهُمَّ مِنْ أَفْضَلِ خِلَعِ ٱلْهِدَايَةِ وَٱلصَّلاَحِ
segments.transliteration: wa albisni allahumma min afdali khila`i alhidayati walssalahi

translation.en: Clothe me, O Allah, with the most excellent robes of guidance and righteousness!

segments.arabic: وَٱغْرِسِ اللَّهُمَّ بِعَظَمَتِكَ فِي شِرْبِ جَنَانِي يَنَابِيعَ ٱلْخُشُوعِ
segments.transliteration: wa ighris allahumma bi`azamatika fi shirbi janani yanabi`a alkhushu`i

translation.en: Plant, O Allah, through Your tremendousness, the springs of humility in the watering place of my heart!

segments.arabic: وَأَجْرِ ٱللَّهُمَّ لِهَيْبَتِكَ مِنْ آمَاقِي زَفَرَاتِ ٱلدُّمُوعِ
segments.transliteration: wa ajri allahumma lihaybatika min amaqi zafarati alddumu`i

translation.en: Cause to flow, O Allah, through fear of You, tears of moaning from the corners of my eyes!

segments.arabic: وَأَدِّبِ ٱللَّهُمَّ نَزَقَ ٱلْخُرْقِ مِنِّي بِأَزِمَّةِ ٱلْقُنُوعِ
segments.transliteration: wa addib allahumma nazaqa alkhurqi minni bi-azimmati alqunu`i

translation.en: Chastise, O Allah, the recklessness of my clumsiness with the reins of contentment!

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِن لَمْ تَبْتَدِئْنِي ٱلرَّحْمَةُ مِنْكَ بِحُسْنِ ٱلتَّوْفِيقِ
segments.transliteration: ilahi in lam tabtadi'ni alrrahmatu minka bihusni alttawfiqi

translation.en: My God, if mercy from You does not begin with fair success for me,

segments.arabic: فَمَنِ ٱلسَّاِلكُ بِي إِلَيْكَ فِي وَاضِحِ ٱلطَّرِيقِ
segments.transliteration: faman alssaliku bi ilayka fi wadihi alttariqi

translation.en: then who can take me to You upon the evident path?

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ أَسْلَمَتْنِي أَنَاتُكَ لِقَائِدِ ٱلأَمَلِ وَٱلْمُنَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa in aslamatni anatuka liqa'idi al-amali walmuna

translation.en: If Your deliberateness should turn me over to the guide of hope and wishes,

segments.arabic: فَمَنِ ٱلْمُقِيلُ عَثَرَاتِي مِنْ كَبَوَاتِ ٱلْهَوَىٰ

translation.en: then who will annul my slips from the stumbles of caprice?

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ خَذَلَنِي نَصْرُكَ عِنْدَ مُحَارَبَةِ ٱلنَّفْسِ وَٱلشَّيْطَانِ
segments.transliteration: wa in khadhalani nasruka `inda muharabati alnnafsi walshshaytani

translation.en: If Your help should forsake me in the battle against the soul and Satan,

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ وَكَلَنِي خِذْلاَنُكَ إِلَىٰ حَيْثُ ٱلنَّصَبِ وَٱلْحِرْمَانِ
segments.transliteration: faqad wakalani khidhlanuka ila haythu alnnasabi walhirmani

translation.en: then Your forsaking will have submitted me to where there is hardship and deprivation.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي أَتَرَانِي مَا أَتَيْتُكَ إِلاَّ مِنْ حَيْثُ ٱلآمَاِل
segments.transliteration: ilahi atarani ma ataytuka illa min haythu al-amali

translation.en: My God, do You see that I have only come to You from the direction of hopes,

segments.arabic: أَمْ عَلِقْتُ بِأَطْرَافِ حِبَاِلكَ إِلاَّ حِينَ بَاعَدَتْنِي ذُنُوبِي عَنْ دَارِ ٱلْوِصَاِل
segments.transliteration: am `aliqtu bi-atrafi hibalika illa hina ba`adatni dhunubi `an dari alwisali

translation.en: or clung to the ends of Your cords when my sins have driven me from the house of union?

segments.arabic: فَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَطِيَّةُ الَّتِي ٱمْتَطَتْ نَفْسِي مِنْ هَوَاهَا
segments.transliteration: fabi'sa almatiyyatu allati imtatat nafsi min hawaha

translation.en: So what an evil mount upon which my soul has mounted-its caprice!

segments.arabic: فَوَاهاً لَهَا لِمَا سَوَّلَتْ لَهَا ظُنُونُهَا وَمُنَاهَا
segments.transliteration: fawahan laha lima sawwalat laha zununuha wa munaha

translation.en: Woe upon it for being seduced by its own opinions and wishes!

segments.arabic: وَتَبّاً لَهَا لِجُرْأَتِهَا عَلَىٰ سَيِّدِهَا وَمَوْلاهَا
segments.transliteration: wa tabban laha lijur'atiha `ala sayyidiha wa mawlaha

translation.en: Destruction be upon it for its audacity toward its Master and Protector!

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي قَرَعْتُ بَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ بِيَدِ رَجَائِي
segments.transliteration: ilahi qara`tu baba rahmatika biyadi raja'i

translation.en: My God, I have knocked upon the door of Your mercy with the hand of my hope,

segments.arabic: وَهَرَبْتُ إِلَيْكَ لاَجِئاً مِنْ فَرْطِ أَهْوَائِي
segments.transliteration: wa harabtu ilayka laji'an min farti ahwa'i

translation.en: fled to You seeking refuge from my excessive caprice,
and fixed the fingers of my love to the ends of Your cords.

segments.arabic: فَٱصْفَحِ اللَّهُمَّ عَمَّا كُنتُ أَجْرَمْتُهُ مِنْ زَلَلِي وَخَطَائِي
segments.transliteration: fasfah allahumma `amma kuntu ajramtuhu min zalali wa khata'i

translation.en: So pardon, O Allah, the slips and errors I have committed,
and release me from the foot-tangling of my robe,

segments.transliteration: fa'innaka sayyidi wa mawlaya wa mu`tamadi wa raja'i

translation.en: for You are my Master, my Protector, my Support and my Hope,

segments.arabic: وَأَنتَ غَايَةُ مَطْلُوبِي وَمُنَايَ فِي مُنْقَلَبِي وَمَثْوايَ
segments.transliteration: wa anta ghayatu matlubi wa munaya fi munqalabi wa mathwaya

translation.en: and You are the object of my search and my desire in my ultimate end and stable abode.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي كَيْفَ تَطْرُدُ مِسْكِيناً ٱلْتَجَأَ إِلَيْكَ مِنَ ٱلذُّنُوبِ هَارِباً
segments.transliteration: ilahi kayfa tatrudu miskinan iltaja'a ilayka mina aldhdhunubi hariban

translation.en: My God, how could You drive away a poor beggar who seeks refuge in You from sins, fleeing?

segments.arabic: أَم كَيْفَ تُخَيِّبُ مُستَرْشِداً قَصَدَ إِلَىٰ جَنَابِكَ سَاعِياً
segments.transliteration: am kayfa tukhayyibu mustarshidan qasada ila janabika sa`iyan

translation.en: How could You disappoint one seeking guidance who repairs to Your threshold, running?

segments.arabic: أَمْ كَيْفَ تَرُدُّ ظَمْآناً وَرَدَ إِلَىٰ حِيَاضِكَ شَارِباً
segments.transliteration: am kayfa taruddu zam'anan warada ila hiyadika shariban

translation.en: How could You reject a thirsty man who comes to Your pools to drink?

segments.arabic: كَلاَّ وَحِيَاضُكَ مُتْرَعَةٌ فِي ضَنْكِ ٱلْمُحُولِ
segments.transliteration: kalla wa hiyaduka mutra`atun fi danki almuhuli

translation.en: Never! For Your pools are full in the hardship of drought,
Your door is open for seeking and penetration,

segments.transliteration: wa anta ghayatu almas'uli wa nihayatu alma'muli

translation.en: and You are the goal of requests and the object of hopes.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي هٰذِهِ أَزِمَّةُ نَفْسِي عَقَلْتُهَا بِعِقَاِل مَشِيئَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi hadhihi azimmatu nafsi `aqaltuha bi`iqali mashi'atika

translation.en: My God, these are the reins of my soul I have bounded with the ties of Your will.

segments.arabic: وَهٰذِهِ أَعْبَاءُ ذُنُوبِي دَرَاْتُهَا بِعَفْوِكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa hadhihi a`ba'u dhunubi dara'tuha bi`afwika wa rahmatika

translation.en: These are the burdens of my sins I have averted with Your pardon and mercy.

segments.arabic: وَهٰذِهِ أَهْوَائِيَ ٱلْمُضِلَّةُ وَكَلْتُهَا إِلَىٰ جَنَابِ لُطفِكَ وَرَاْفَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa hadhihi ahwa'i almudillatu wakaltuha ila janabi lutfika wa ra'fatika

translation.en: These are my misleading caprices I have referred to the threshold of Your gentleness and kindliness.

segments.arabic: فَٱجْعَلِ ٱللَّهُمَّ صَبَاحِي هٰذَا نَازِلاً عَلَيَّ بِضِيَاءِ ٱلْهُدَىٰ
segments.transliteration: faj`al allahumma sabahi hadha nazilan `alayya bidiya'i alhuda

translation.en: So, make this morning of mine, O Allah, descend upon me with the radiance of guidance
and safety in religion and this world!

segments.transliteration: wa masa'i junnatan min kaydi al`ida

translation.en: And [make] my evening a shield against the deception of enemies
and a protection against the destructive blows of caprice!
Verily, You have power to do what You will!
You give the kingdom to whom You will,
seize the kingdom from whom You will,
exalt whom You will,
and abase whom You will.
In Your hand is the good
and You are powerful over all things.
You make the night to enter into the day,
make the day to enter into the night,
bring forth the living from the dead,
bring forth the dead from the living,

segments.transliteration: wa tarzuqu man tasha'u bighayri hisabin

translation.en: and provide whomsoever You will without measure!
There is no god but You!
Glory be to You, O Allah, and Yours is the praise!

segments.arabic: مَنْ ذَا يَعْرِفُ قَدْرَكَ فَلاَ يَخَافُكَ
segments.transliteration: man dha ya`rifu qadraka fala yakhafuka

translation.en: Who knows Your measure and yet does not fear You?

segments.arabic: وَمَن ذَا يَعْلَمُ مَا أَنتَ فَلاَ يَهَابُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa man dha ya`lamu ma anta fala yahabuka

translation.en: Who knows what You are and yet does not stand in awe of You?
Through Your power, You have joined disparate things,
through Your gentleness, You have cleaved apart the daybreak,
through Your generosity, You have illumined the dark shrouds of night,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْهَرْتَ ٱلْمِيَاهَ مِنَ ٱلصُّمِّ ٱلصَّيَاخِيدِ عَذْباً وَأُجَاجاً
segments.transliteration: wa anharta almiyaha mina alssummi alssayakhidi `adhban wa ujajan

translation.en: made waters, sweet and salt, flow forth from hard shining stones,

segments.transliteration: wa anzalta mina almu`sirati ma'an thajjajan

translation.en: sent dawn out of rain-clouds water cascading,

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلْتَ ٱلشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ لِلْبَرِيَّةِ سِرَاجاً وَهَّاجاً
segments.transliteration: wa ja`alta alshshamsa walqamara lilbariyyati sirajan wahhajan

translation.en: and appointed the sun and the moon a blazing lamp for the creatures

segments.arabic: مِنْ غَيْرِ أَن تُمَارِسَ فِيمَا ٱبْتَدَأْتَ بِهِ لُغُوباً وَلاَ عِلاَجاً
segments.transliteration: min ghayri an tumarisa fima ibtada'ta bihi lughuban wa la `ilajan

translation.en: without experiencing in that which You originated either weariness or effort.
So, O He Who is alone in might and subsistence
and dominates His slaves with death and annihilation,
(please) bless Muhammad and his household, the god-fearing,
answer my supplication, hear my call,

segments.transliteration: wa haqqiq bifadlika amali wa raja'i

translation.en: and actualize through Your favor my hope and desire.

segments.arabic: يَا خَيْرَ مَنْ دُعِيَ لِكَشْفِ ٱلضُّرِّ
segments.transliteration: ya khayra man du`iya likashfi alddurri

translation.en: O Best of those who are called to remove affliction
and object of hope in difficulty and ease!

segments.arabic: بِكَ أَنزَلْتُ حَاجَتِي فَلاَ تَرُدَّنِي مِنْ سَنِيِّ مَوَاهِبِكَ خَائِباً
segments.transliteration: bika anzaltu hajati fala taruddani min saniyyi mawahibika kha'iban

translation.en: I have stated my need to You; so, do not reject me despairing of Your exalted gifts.

segments.arabic: يَا كَرِيمُ يَا كَرِيمُ يَا كَرِيمُ
segments.transliteration: ya karimu ya karimu ya karimu

translation.en: O All-generous! O All-generous! O All-generous!
By Your mercy, O Most Merciful of the merciful!
May Allah bless the best of His creatures,
Muhammad, and his entire Household!

text.en: Prostrate and say (in Sajdah)

translation.en: My God, my heart is veiled,
my soul is deficient,
my intelligence is defeated,
my caprice is triumphant,
my obedience is little,
my disobedience is much,
and my tongue confesses of sinning;
so, what am I to do?
O He Who covers defects!
O He Who knows the unseen!
O He Who removes troubles!
Forgive my sins, all of them,

segments.transliteration: ya ghaffaru ya ghaffaru ya ghaffaru

translation.en: in the name of the sacredness of Muhammad and the household of Muhammad!

segments.arabic: يَا غَفَّارُ يَا غَفَّارُ يَا غَفَّارُ

translation.en: O All-forgiver! O All-forgiver! O All-forgiver!
By Your mercy, O Most Merciful of the merciful!

text.en: Dua Simaat
Recited on Friday before sunset
Imam Jafar bin Muhammad Al Sadiq(as) said that Allah swt taught this dua'a to prophet Musa to overcome his enemies. This dua'a is particularly recited in the closing hours before sunset on Friday

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِٱسْمِكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ ٱلاعْظَمِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bismika al`azimi ala`zami

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You by Your Name, the most great, most majestic,
most magnificent, and most noble;

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي إِذَا دُعِيتَ بِهِ عَلَىٰ مَغَاِلقِ أَبْوابِ ٱلسَّمَاءِ لِلْفَتْحِ بِٱلرَّحْمَةِ ٱنْفَتَحَتْ
segments.transliteration: alladhi idha du`ita bihi `ala maghaliqi abwabi alssama'i lilfathi bilrrahmati infatahat

translation.en: if You are besought thereby to open the closed doors of the sky, they will be opened with Your mercy,

segments.arabic: وَإِذَا دُعِيتَ بِهِ عَلَىٰ مَضَائِقِ أَبْوابِ الْأَرْضِ لِلْفَرَجِ ٱنْفَرَجَتْ
segments.transliteration: wa idha du`ita bihi `ala mada'iqi abwabi al-ardi lilfaraji infarajat

translation.en: if You are besought thereby to remove the narrow doors of the heavens for relief, they will be opened wide,

segments.arabic: وَإِذَا دُعِيتَ بِهِ عَلىٰ ٱلْعُسْرِ لِلْيُسْرِ تَيَسَّرَتْ
segments.transliteration: wa idha du`ita bihi `ala al`usri lilyusri tayassarat

translation.en: if You are besought thereby to make easy the difficulty, it will be easy,

segments.arabic: وَإِذَا دُعِيتَ بِهِ عَلىٰ الْأَمْواتِ لِلنُّشُورِ ٱنتَشَرَتْ
segments.transliteration: wa idha du`ita bihi `ala al-amwati lilnnushuri intasharat

translation.en: if You are besought thereby to restore the dead to life, they will rise from their graves,

segments.arabic: وَإِذَا دُعِيتَ بِهِ عَلَىٰ كَشْفِ ٱلْبَاسَاءِ وَٱلضَّرَّاءِ ٱنْكَشَفَتْ
segments.transliteration: wa idha du`ita bihi `ala kashfi alba'sa'i walddarra'i inkashafat

translation.en: if You are besought thereby to remove misery and adversity, they will be removed.
I also beseech You in the name of the Majesty of Your Noble Face;
the Noblest and most Honored of all faces
before Whom all faces bow down in submission,
all necks bend down in reverence,
all sounds yield,

segments.transliteration: wa wajilat lahu alqulubu min makhafatika

translation.en: and all hearts tremble out of fear of You.
I also beseech You by Your Might

segments.arabic: تُمْسِكُ ٱلسَّمَاء أَن تَقَعَ عَلىٰ ٱلارْضِ إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِكَ
segments.transliteration: tumsiku alssama'a an taqa`a `ala al-ardi illa bi'idhnika

translation.en: by which You prevent the sky from falling on the earth except with Your permission,

segments.arabic: وَتُمْسِكُ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَ ٱلأَرْضَ أَن تَزُولاَ
segments.transliteration: wa tumsiku alssamawati wal-arda an tazula

translation.en: and control the heavens and the earth so closely that they cannot move away from their positions,

segments.transliteration: wa bimashi'atika allati dana laha al`alamuna

translation.en: by Your Will, which the whole world obeys,

segments.arabic: وَبِكَلِمَتِكَ ٱلَّتِي خَلَقْتَ بِهَا ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَ ٱلأَرْضَ
segments.transliteration: wa bikalimatika allati khalaqta biha alssamawati wal-arda

translation.en: by Your Word by which You have created the heavens and the earth,

segments.transliteration: wa bihikmatika allati sana`ta biha al`aja'iba

translation.en: by Your Wisdom with which You have created the wonderful things,

segments.transliteration: wa khalaqta biha alzzulmata wa ja`altaha laylan

translation.en: created darkness, made it night,
made night the time of quiet and rest,

segments.transliteration: wa khalaqta biha alnnura wa ja`altahu naharan

translation.en: created light, made it daylight,
made day the time of movement and observation,

segments.arabic: وَخَلَقْتَ بِهَا ٱلشَّمْسَ وَجَعَلْتَ ٱلشَّمْسَ ضِيَاءاً
segments.transliteration: wa khalaqta biha alshshamsa wa ja`lta alshshamsa diya'an

translation.en: created the sun, made the sun light,

segments.arabic: وَخَلَقْتَ بِهَا ٱلقَمَرَ وَجَعَلْتَ ٱلقَمَرَ نُوراً
segments.transliteration: wa khalaqta biha alqamara wa ja`alta alqamara nuran

translation.en: created the moon, made the moon of light,
created heavenly bodies,

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلْتَهَا نُجُوماً وبُرُوجاً وَمَصَابِيحَ وَزِينَةً وَرُجُوماً
segments.transliteration: wa ja`ltaha nujuman wa burujan wa masabiha wa zinatan wa rujuman

translation.en: made them fixed stars, planets, lamps for guidance at night, means of decoration, and missiles,

segments.transliteration: wa ja`alta laha mashariqa wa maghariba

translation.en: created for them east and west,

segments.transliteration: wa ja`alta laha matali`a wa majariya

translation.en: created for them places of ascendancy and orbits,

segments.transliteration: wa ja`alta laha falakan wa masabiha

translation.en: created for them a firmament and spheres,

segments.arabic: وَقَدَّرْتَهَا فِي ٱلسَّمَاءِ مَنَازِلَ فَأَحْسَنتَ تَقْدِيرَهَا
segments.transliteration: wa qaddartaha fi alssama'i manazila fa-ahsanta taqdiraha

translation.en: fixed for them stages in the heaven with excellent fixing,
shaped the stars with excellent shaping,
measured them through Your Names with exact measurement,

segments.arabic: وَدَبَّرْتَهَا بِحِكْمَتِكَ تَدْبِيراً وَ أَحْسَنتَ تَدْبِيرَهَا
segments.transliteration: wa dabbartaha bihikmatika tadbiran fa-ahsanta tadbiraha

translation.en: designed through Your wisdom a system for them with excellent design,

segments.transliteration: wa sakhkhartaha bisultani allayli wa sultani alnnahari

translation.en: controlled the heavenly bodies through the influence of night and the influence of day,
and through hours, making them a means for the reckoning of years and counting,

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلْتَ رُؤْيَتَهَا لِجَمِيعِ النَّاسِ مَرْئً وَاحِداً
segments.transliteration: wa ja`alta ru'yataha lijami`i alnnasi mar'an wahidan

translation.en: and made all people see them alike.
I beseech You, O Allah, in the name of Your glory

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي كَلَّمْتَ بِهِ عَبْدَكَ وَرَسُولَكَ مُوسَىٰ بْنَ عِمْرَانَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ فِي ٱلْمُقَدَّسِينَ
segments.transliteration: alladhi kallamta bihi `abdaka wa rasulaka musa ibna `imrana `alayhi alssalamu fi almuqaddasina

translation.en: with which You addressed Your servant and Messenger, Moses the son of `Imran (`a) while he was in the company of angels;
an address even the favorite cherubim could not ever hear,
above the clouds of light,
above the box of evidence,

segments.arabic: فِي عَمُودِ ٱلنَّارِ وَفِي طُورِ سَيْنَاء
segments.transliteration: fi `amudi alnnari wa fi turi sayna'a

translation.en: within the pillar of fire on Mount Sinai
and on Mount Hurith
in the Holy Vale
in the sacred tract of land

segments.arabic: مِن جَانِبِ ٱلطُّورِ ٱلأَيْمَنِ مِنَ ٱلشَّجَرَةِ
segments.transliteration: min janibi altturi alaymani mina alshshajarati

translation.en: to the right of Taurus Mountain through a tree,

segments.arabic: وَفِي أَرْضِ مِصْرَ بِتِسْعِ آيَاتٍ بَيِّنَاتٍ
segments.transliteration: wa fi ardi misra bitis`i ayatin bayyinatin

translation.en: [and again addressed him] on the land of Egypt, after showing nine clear signs,

segments.transliteration: wa yawma faraqta libani isra'ila albahra

translation.en: and on the day You split the sea for the children of Israel,

segments.arabic: وَفِي ٱلْمُنْبَجِسَاتِ ٱلَّتِي صَنَعْتَ بِهَا ٱلْعَجَائِبَ فِي بَحْرِ سُوفٍ
segments.transliteration: wa fi almunbajisati allati sana`ta biha al`aja'iba fi bahri sufin

translation.en: and caused springs to flow from a stone, thereby displaying wonders of Your might in a deep sea,

segments.arabic: وَعَقَدْتَ مَاءَ ٱلْبَحْرِ فِي قَلْبِ ٱلْغَمْرِ كَٱلْحِجَارَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa `aqadta ma'a albahri fi qalbi alghamri kalhijarati

translation.en: on the day when You solidified the water of the sea in the midst of the storm,
caused the children of Israel to pass by the sea,

segments.arabic: وَتَمَّتْ كَلِمَتُكَ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ عَلَيْهِم بِمَا صَبرُوٱ
segments.transliteration: wa tammat kalimatuka alhusna `alayhim bima sabaru

translation.en: and fulfilled Your excellent promises made to them because of their calm endurance,

segments.arabic: وَأَوْرَثْتَهُم مَشَارِقَ ٱلارْضِ وَمَغَارِبَهَا ٱلَّتِي بَارَكْتَ فِيهَا لِلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa awrathtahum mashariqa al-ardi wa magharibaha allati barakta fiha lil`alamina

translation.en: made them the master of the East and the West in the earth wherein there are blessings for all the worlds,

segments.arabic: وَأَغْرَقْتَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَجُنُودَهُ وَمَرَاكِبَهُ فِي ٱليَمِّ
segments.transliteration: wa aghraqta fir`awna wa junudahu wa marakibahu fi alyammi

translation.en: drowned Pharaoh, his armies, and boats in the water.
[I beseech You] by Your Name, the great, the Most Great,
the Most Honorable, Most Majestic, and Most Noble,

segments.arabic: وَبِمَجْدِكَ ٱلَّذِي تَجَلَّيْتَ بِهِ لِمُوسَىٰ كَلِيمِكَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ فِي طُورِ سَيْنَاء
segments.transliteration: wa bimajdika alladhi tajallayta bihi limusa kalimika `alayhi alssalamu fi turi sayna'a

translation.en: and by Your Glory with which You revealed Yourself as light to Moses, Your addressee, peace be on him, on Mount Sinai,

segments.arabic: وَ لإِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ خَلِيلِكَ مِنْ قَبْلُ فِي مَسْجِدِ الْخَيْفِ
segments.transliteration: wa li'ibrahima `alayhi alssalamu khalilika min qablu fi masjidi alkhayfi

translation.en: and earlier radiated the light for Abraham, Your sincere friend peace be on him, in the Mosque of al-Khif,

segments.arabic: وَ لِإِسْحاقَ صَفِيِّكَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ فِي بِئْرِ شِيعٍ
segments.transliteration: wa li'ishaqa safiyyika `alayhi alssalamu fi bi'ri shi`in

translation.en: and for Isaac, Your chosen Prophet, peace be on him, in Shi` Well,

segments.arabic: وَلِيَعْقُوبَ نَبِيِّكَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ فِي بَيْتِ إِيلٍ
segments.transliteration: wa liya`quba nabiyyika `alayhi alssalamu fi bayti ilin

translation.en: and for Your Prophet Jacob, peace be on him, in Bayt «l,
and You fulfilled Your promise to Abraham, peace be on him,
Your oath in favor of Isaac,
Your witnessing favoring Jacob,
the fulfillments of Your promise to the faithful believers,
and Your Names with which You accepted the prayers of supplicants,

segments.arabic: وَبِمَجْدِكَ ٱلَّذِي ظَهَرَ لِمُوسَىٰ بْنِ عِمْرَانَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ قُبَّةِ ٱلرُّمَّانِ
segments.transliteration: wa bimajdika alladhi zahara limusa ibni `imrana `alayhi alssalamu `ala qubbati alrrummani

translation.en: and by Your Glory, which appeared to Moses, the son of `Imran, in al-Rumman Dome,

segments.arabic: وَبِآيَاتِكَ ٱلَّتِي وَقَعَتْ عَلَىٰ أَرْضِ مِصْرَ
segments.transliteration: wa bi-ayatika allati waqa`at `ala ardi misra

translation.en: and by Your Signs, which appeared in the land of Egypt
with great might and victory,
with powerful signs,
with the display of full command,
great power,
the affair of the perfect word,

segments.arabic: وَبِكَلِمَاتِكَ ٱلَّتِي تَفَضَّلْتَ بِهَا عَلَىٰ أَهْلِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلارْضِ
segments.transliteration: wa bikalimatika allati tafaddalta biha `ala ahli alssamawati wal-ardi

translation.en: and by Your words with which You do a favor to the inhabitants of the skies and the earth

segments.transliteration: wa ahli alddunya wa ahli al-akhirati

translation.en: and the people of this world and the Next World,

segments.arabic: وَبِرَحْمَتِكَ ٱلَّتِي مَنَنتَ بِهَا عَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa birahmatika allati mananta biha `ala jami`i khalqika

translation.en: and by Your Mercy with which You bestow graces upon all Your creatures,

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْتِطَاعَتِكَ الَّتِي أَقَمْتَ بِهَا عَلىٰ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa bistita`atika allati aqamta biha `ala al`alamina

translation.en: and by Your Power with which You dominate the worlds,

segments.arabic: وَبِنُورِكَ ٱلَّذِي قَدْ خَرَّ مِنْ فَزَعِهِ طُورُ سَيْنَاء
segments.transliteration: wa binurika alladhi qad kharra min faza`ihi turu sayna'a

translation.en: and by Your Light through fear of which Mount Sinai collapsed,

segments.transliteration: wa bi`ilmika wa jalalika wa kibriya'ika wa `izzatika

translation.en: and by Your Knowledge, Majesty, Greatness, Honor,

segments.transliteration: wa jabarutika allati lam tastaqillaha al-ardu

translation.en: and Might, which the earth could not bear,
the heavens bent down,
the great depths restrained themselves,
oceans and rivers became stable,
mountains yielded,
the earth became firm on its shoulders,
all creatures surrendered,

segments.transliteration: wa khafaqat laha alrriyahu fi jarayaniha

translation.en: the winds breathed in their flow,

segments.transliteration: wa khamadat laha alnniranu fi awtaniha

translation.en: and the flaming fires were extinguished in their places,

segments.arabic: وَبِسُلْطَانِكَ ٱلَّذِي عُرِفَتْ لَكَ بِهِ ٱلْغَلَبَةُ دَهْرَ ٱلدُّهُورِ
segments.transliteration: wa bisultanika alladhi `urifat laka bihi alghalabatu dahra aldduhuri

translation.en: and by Your authority through which You are acknowledged to have All-powerfulness all the times

segments.transliteration: wa humidta bihi fi alssamawati wal-aradina

translation.en: and for which You are praised in the heavens and the earth,

segments.arabic: وَبِكَلِمَتِكَ كَلِمَةِ ٱلصِّدْقِ ٱلَّتِي سَبَقَتْ لأَبِينَا آدَمَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ وَذُرِّيَّتِهِ بٱلرَّحْمَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa bikalimatika kalimati alssidqi allati sabaqat li-abina adama `alayhi alssalamu wa dhurriyyatihi bilrrahmati

translation.en: and by Your word, the Word of Truth, which had became mercy for our father Adam and his offspring,

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ  بِكَلِمَتِكَ ٱلَّتِي غَلَبَتْ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bikalimatika allati ghalabat kulla shay'in

translation.en: and by Your word that overcame everything,

segments.arabic: وَبِنُورِ وَجْهِكَ ٱلَّذِي تَجَلَّيْتَ بِهِ لِلْجَبَلِ
segments.transliteration: wa binuri wajhika alladhi tajallayta bihi liljabali

translation.en: and by the light of Your Face, which when You showed to the Mount,

segments.transliteration: faja`altahu dakkan wa kharra musa sa`iqan

translation.en: You caused it to crush into pieces, whereby Moses fainted and fell down,

segments.arabic: وَبِمَجْدِكَ ٱلَّذِي ظَهَرَ عَلَىٰ طُورِ سَينْاءَ
segments.transliteration: wa bimajdika alladhi zahara `ala turi sayna'a

translation.en: and by Your Glory, which appeared on Mount Sinai,

segments.arabic: فَكَلَّمْتَ بِهِ عَبْدَكَ وَرَسُولَكَ مُوسَىٰ بْنَ عِمْرَانَ
segments.transliteration: fakallamta bihi `abdaka wa rasulaka musa ibna `imrana

translation.en: and through which You addressed Your servant and Messenger, Moses, the son of `Imran,
and by Your appearance in Sa`ir,

segments.arabic: وَظُهُورِكَ فِي جَبَلِ فَارَانَ بِرَبَوَاتِ ٱلْمُقَدَّسِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa zuhurika fi jabali farana birabawati almuqaddasina

translation.en: and by Your appearance on Mount Faran on the heights of the holy ones,
When the troops of angels were in rows,
and with the submissiveness of the angels glorifying You,

segments.arabic: وَبِبَرَكَاتِكَ ٱلَّتِي بَارَكْتَ فِيهَا عَلَىٰ إِبْرَاهِيمَ خَلِيلِكَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: wa bibarakatika allati barakta fiha `ala ibrahima khalilika `alayhi alssalamu

translation.en: and by Your blessings by which You honored Abraham, Your sincere friend (`a)

segments.arabic: فِي امَّةِ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: fi ummati muhammadin salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi

translation.en: among the people of Muhammad, Your blessings be upon him and his household,
and You blessed Isaac, Your chosen prophet,
among the followers of Jesus, peace be on them both,
and You blessed Jacob, Your favored servant,
by including him among the followers of Moses, peace be on them both,

segments.arabic: وَبَارَكْتَ لِحَبِيبِكَ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa barakta lihabibika muhammadin salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi

translation.en: and blessed Your intimate beloved, Muhammad, may the blessings of Allah be upon him and his Household,
in his offspring, offspring, and people.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ وَكَمَا غِبْنَا عَنْ ذٰلِكَ وَلَمْ نَشْهَدْهُ وَآمَنَّا بِهِ وَلَمْ نَرَهُ صِدْقاً وَعَدْلاً
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa kama ghibna `an dhalika wa lam nash-had-hu wa amanna bihi wa lam narahu sidqan wa `adlan

translation.en: O Allah! Just as we were absent from that but we believe in it honestly and truly,

segments.arabic: ان تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: So we beseech You to send Your benedictions upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَ أَن تُبَارِكَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa an tubarika `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: to bless Muhammad and the household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa tarahham `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: and to have mercy on Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: كَأَفْضَلِ مَا صَلَّيْتَ وَبَارَكْتَ وَتَرَحَّمْتَ عَلَىٰ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَآلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ
