segments.transliteration: ka-afdali ma sallayta wa barakta wa tarahhamta `ala ibrahima wa ali ibrahima

translation.en: with the most auspicious benedictions, blessings, and mercy that You sent to Abraham and the posterity of Abraham.
Surely, You are Praiseworthy, Glorious,
and Doer of what You will.

segments.arabic: وَ أَنتَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ

translation.en: You are Powerful over all things.

text.en: You may now beseech Almighty Allah to grant you your personal requests. Then, say the following:

translation.en: O Allah, in the name of this prayer
and in the name of these Names
which none knows their exegesis
or their implicit meanings save You,
(please) send Your blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
do to me that of which You are worthy,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَفْعَلْ بِي مَا أَنَا أَهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa la taf`al bi ma ana ahluhu

translation.en: do not do to me what I deserve,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِي مِنْ ذُنُوبِي مَا تَقَدَّمَ مِنْهَا وَمَا تَأَخَّرَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir li min dhunubi ma taqaddama minha wa ma ta'akhkhara

translation.en: forgive my sins—past and future,
increase Your lawful sustenance for me,
and save me from the trouble of wicked men,
wicked neighbors,
wicked companions,
and wicked rulers.
Verily, You have power over all that You will to do
and You have full knowledge of all things.
Respond to me, O Lord of the worlds.

text.en: According to some copies of the supplication, the following statement is added before the latter portion:

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا حَنَّانُ يَا مَنَّانُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya hannanu ya mannanu

translation.en: O Allah! O All-tender! O Bestower!
O Fashioner of the heavens and the earth!
O Lord of Majesty and Honor!
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

text.en: Shaykh al-Majlisi has quoted Sayyid Ibn Baqi as saying, in al-Misbah, that the following supplicatory prayer is advisably said after Du`a' al-Simat:

translation.en: O Allah! I beseech You in the name of this prayer
and in the name of these Names

segments.arabic: ٱلَّتِي لاَ يَعْلَمُ تَفْسِيرَهَا وَلاَ تَاْوِيلَهَا
segments.transliteration: allati la ya`lamu tafsiraha wa la ta'wilaha

translation.en: which none knows their exegesis or interpretation

segments.transliteration: wa la batinaha wa la zahiraha ghayruka

translation.en: and none knows their implicit or explicit meanings save You,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: to send Your blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: wa an tarzuqani khayra alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: and to provide me with the good of this world and the Next World.

text.en: You may then mention your need and continue as follows:

translation.en: Do to me that of which You are worthy

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَفْعَلْ بِي مَا أَنَا اهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa la taf`al bi ma ana ahluhu

translation.en: but do not do to me what I deserve,

segments.arabic: وَٱنْتَقِمْ لِي مِنْ فُلانِ بْنِ فُلانٍ

translation.en: and exact vengeance from… [so-and-so]

text.en: You may here mention the name of your enemy

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِي مِنْ ذُنُوبِي مَا تَقَدَّمَ مِنْهَا وَمَا تَاخَّرَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir li min dhunubi ma taqaddama minha wa ma ta'akhkhara

translation.en: forgive my sins—past and future,

segments.transliteration: wa liwalidayya wa lijami`i almu'minina walmu'minati

translation.en: forgive my parents and all faithful believers—men and women,
increase Your lawful sustenance for me,
save me from the troubles of wicked men,
wicked neighbors,
wicked rulers,
wicked companions,
evil days,
and evil hours,
and exact vengeance for me on everyone who hatches secret plots against me,
on everyone who oppresses me,
seeks to do injustice to me, my wife,
my children, my brothers,
my neighbors, and my relatives
among faithful men and women.
Verily, You have power to do whatever You will to do
and You have full knowledge of all things.
Respond to me, O Lord of the worlds.

text.en: You may then say the following:

translation.en: O Allah! In the name of this prayer, I beseech You

segments.arabic: تَفَضَّلْ عَلَىٰ فُقَرَاءِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَاتِ بِٱلْغِنَىٰ وَٱلثَّرْوَةِ
segments.transliteration: tafaddal `ala fuqara'i almu'minina walmu'minati bilghina walththarwati

translation.en: to grant wealth and affluence to indigent faithful men and women,

segments.arabic: وَعَلَىٰ مَرْضَىٰ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَاتِ بِٱلشِّفَاء وَٱلصِّحَّةِ
segments.transliteration: wa `ala marda almu'minina walmu'minati bilshshafa'i walssihhati

translation.en: recovery and wellbeing to the sick faithful men and women,

segments.arabic: وَعَلَىٰ أَحْيَاءِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَاتِ بِٱللُّطْفِ وَٱلْكَرَامَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa `ala ahya'i almu'minina walmu'minati billutfi walkaramati

translation.en: bliss and clemency to the living faithful men and women,

segments.arabic: وَعَلَىٰ أَمْوَاتِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَاتِ بِٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ وَٱلرَّحْمَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa `ala amwati almu'minina walmu'minati bilmaghfirati walrrahmati

translation.en: remit the sins of, and have mercy on, the deceased faithful men and women,

segments.arabic: وَعَلَىٰ مُسَافِرِي ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَاتِ بِٱلرَّدِّ إِلَىٰ أَوْطَانِهِمْ سَالِمِينَ غَانِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa `ala musafiri almu'minina walmu'minati bilrraddi ila awtanihim salmina ghanimina

translation.en: and arrange the return of all faithful travelers with safety and gain,
by Your mercy, O Most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ خَاتَمِ ٱلنَّبِيِّينَ وَعِتْرَتِهِ ٱلطَّاهِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu `ala sayyidina muhammadin khatami alnnabiyyina wa `itratihi alttahirina

translation.en: May Allah send blessings to our master Muhammad, the Seal of the Prophets, and upon his Household, the purified
and send peace upon them in abundant measure.

text.en: Shaykh Ibn Fahad says that it is recommended to say the following prayer after Du`a' al-Simat:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اسْالُكَ بِحُرْمَةِ هٰذَا ٱلدُّعَاءِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bihurmati hadha alddu`a'i

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You in the name of the sacredness of this prayer

segments.transliteration: wa bima fata minhu mina al-asma'i

translation.en: the Names mentioned therein,<

segments.arabic: وَبِمَا يَشْتَمِلُ عَلَيْهِ مِنَ ٱلتَّفْسِيرِ وَٱلتَّدْبِيرِ
segments.transliteration: wa bima yashtamilu `alayhi mina alttafsiri walttadbiri

translation.en: and the explanation and deep meanings of these names

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي لاَ يُحِيطُ بِهِ إِلاَّ انْتَ…
segments.transliteration: alladhi la yuhitu bihi illa anta…

translation.en: that none comprehends save You...

text.en: Friday short recitation at sunset
Duas at the Last Hour of Friday
It is recommended to recite before sunset the famous prayer known as Du`a' al-Simat ( Shabbour)

Shaykh al-Tusi has mentioned that the last hour of Friday, which lasts to sunset, is the hour in which prayers are responded. Therefore, it is required to pray to Almighty Allah insistently at that hour. It has been also narrated that this hour begins when half of the sun disk sets and the other half only remains visible. Lady Fatimah al-Zahra' (peace be upon her), used to pray to Almighty Allah at this hour so that her prayers be answered. It is also recommended to say the following litany that is reported from the Holy Prophet (peace be upon him and his Household):

translation.en: Glory be to You! There is no god save You!
O All-tender! O All-bestower!
O Fashioner of the heavens and the earth!
O Lord of Majesty and Honor.

text.en: Duaa Nudba
It is recommended to recite this on Fridays & the 4 Idd days; the Idd ulFitr (1st Shawwal), the Idd al-Azha day (10th of Dhu’l-hijjah), the `Eid al-Ghadir day (18th of Du’l-hijjah).

translation.en: All praise be to Allah the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ نَبِيِّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu `ala sayyidina muhammadin nabiyyihi

translation.en: May Allah send blessings upon our master Muhammad His Prophet
and upon his Household and may He salute them with thorough salutation.
O Allah, all praise be to You
for Your decree that has been applied

segments.arabic: فِي اوْلِيَائِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱسْتَخْلَصْتَهُمْ لِنَفْسِكَ وَدِينِكَ
segments.transliteration: fi awliya'ika alladhina istakhlastahum linafsika wa dinika

translation.en: to Your vicegerents whom You have purely selected for Yourself and Your religion;

segments.arabic: إِِذِ ٱخْتَرْتَ لَهُمْ جَزِيلَ مَا عِنْدَكَ

translation.en: as You have chosen for them the abundance of what You have in possession;
that is the enduring pleasure

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي لا زَوَالَ لَهُ وَلاَ ٱضْمِحْلاَلَ
segments.transliteration: alladhi la zawala lahu wa la idmihlala

translation.en: that neither vanishes nor diminishes,
after You had already stipulated on them to renounce
all the ranks of this lowly world
along with all of its embellishments and ornaments,
and they accepted this stipulation.
As You knew that they would fulfill this stipulation,
You accepted and drew them near to You.
You thus provided them with sublime mention
and obvious approval,
made Your angels descend to them,
honored them with Your revelations,
supported them with Your knowledge,
and made them the channel to You
and the means to winning Your pleasure.
Therefore, You made some of them dwell in Your Garden
until You decided to take him out of there.
You bore another one on in Your Ark

segments.transliteration: wa najjaytahu wa man amana ma`ahu

translation.en: and saved him and those who believed with him
from perdition, out of Your mercy.
You took another one as Your intimate friend

segments.arabic: وَسَالَكَ لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ فِي ٱلآخِرِينَ فَأَجَبْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa sa'alaka lisana sidqin fi al-akhirina fa'ajabtahu

translation.en: and when he asked You to leave behind him a truthful mention, You responded to him
and made that (mention) to be eminent.

segments.transliteration: wa ba`dun kallamtahu min shajaratin takliman

translation.en: You spoke to another one from a tree directly

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلْتَ لَهُ مِنْ أَخِيهِ رِدْءاً وَوَزِيراً
segments.transliteration: wa ja`alta lahu min akhihi rid'an wa waziran

translation.en: and decided his brother to be his protector and representative.

segments.transliteration: wa ba`dun awladtahu min ghayri abin

translation.en: You made another one to be born without a father,
gave him clear-cut proofs
and aided him with the Sacred Spirit.
For each of them, You gave a code of law,
decided a certain course,
and finely chose successors;
well-trustworthy successors one after another,
each for a certain period,
in purpose of establishing Your religion
and acting as arguments against Your servants,
so that the truth should never leave its position
and the wrong should never overcome the people of the truth
and so that none should claim, saying,

segments.arabic: لَوْ لاَ ارْسَلْتَ إِِلَيْنَا رَسُولاًَ مُنْذِراً

translation.en: “If only You had sent to us a warning messenger
and established for us a guiding person,

segments.arabic: فَنَتَّبِعَ آيَاتِكَ مِنْ قَبْلِ أَنْ نَذِلَّ وَنَخْزَىٰ
segments.transliteration: fanattabi`a ayatika min qabli an nadhilla wa nakhza

translation.en: we should have followed Your signs before that we met humiliation and disgrace!”

segments.arabic: إِلَىٰ أَنِ ٱنْتَهَيْتَ بِٱلامْرِ إِلَىٰ حَبِيبِكَ وَنَجِيبِكَ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: ila an intahayta bil-amri ila habibika wa najibika muhammadin

translation.en: You then ended the matter with Your most-beloved and well-select one, Muhammad,
may Allah bless him and his Household.
He was—as exactly as You have chosen—
the master of all those whom You created,
the best of all those whom You selected,
the most favorite of all those whom You pointed out,
and the noblest of all those on whom You decided.
So, You preferred him to Your prophets,
sent him to the two dependents (men and jinn) from Your servants,
enabled him to tread on the east and the west of Your lands,
made subservient to him the Buraq (the celestial sumpter),
raised his soul to Your heavens,
and entrusted with him the knowledge of whatever passed

segments.transliteration: wa ma yakunu ila inqida'i khalqika

translation.en: and whatever shall come to pass up to the extinction of Your creatures.
You then granted him victory by means of awe & majesty
ordered (Archangels) Gabriel and Michael
as well as the marked angels to surround him,

segments.arabic: وَوَعَدْتَهُ أَنْ تُظْهِرَ دِينَهُ عَلَىٰ ٱلدِّينِ كُلِّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa wa`adtahu an tuzhira dinahu `ala alddini kullihi

translation.en: and promised him to make his faith prevail all other faiths
however much the polytheists may be averse.

segments.arabic: وَذٰلِكَ بَعْدَ أَنْ بَوَّأتَهُ مُبَوَّأَ صِدْقٍ مِنْ أَهْلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa dhalika ba`da an bawwa'tahu mubawwa'a sidqin min ahlihi

translation.en: You did all that after You had settled him in an honest position among his people,

segments.transliteration: wa ja`alta lahu wa lahum awwala baytin

translation.en: made for him and them the first house
ever located for the people; that is the house in Bakkah,
blessed and guidance for the worlds.
In it, there are clear-cut proofs.
It is the standing-place of Abraham,
and whoever enters it will be secured.

segments.arabic: وَقُلْتَ «إِِنَّمَا يُرِيدُ ٱللَّهُ لِيُذْهِبَ عَنْكُمُ ٱلرِّجْسَ
segments.transliteration: wa qulta innama yuridu allahu liyudhhiba `ankum alrrijsa

translation.en: You also said, “Allah only desires to keep away the uncleanness from you,
O people of the House,
and to purify you a thorough purifying.”
You then decided the reward of Muhammad,
Your blessings be upon him and his Household,
to be the love for them; as in Your Book
You said, “Say: I do not ask of you any reward for it
but love for my near relatives.”

segments.arabic: وَقُلْتَ «مَا سَالْتُكُمْ مِنْ أَجْرٍ فَهُوَ لَكُمْ.»
segments.transliteration: wa qulta ma sa'altukum min ajrin fahuwa lakum

translation.en: You also said, “Whatever reward I have asked of you, that is only for yourselves.”

segments.transliteration: wa qulta ma as'alukum `alayhi min ajrin

translation.en: You also said, “I do not ask you aught in return

segments.arabic: إِلاَّ مَنْ شَاءَ أَنْ يَتَّخِذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِ سَبِيلاًَ.»
segments.transliteration: illa man sha'a an yattakhidha ila rabbihi sabilan

translation.en: except that he who wills, may take the way to his Lord.”
They (i.e. the Prophet’s Household) have therefore been the way to You
and the course to Your pleasure.
When his (i.e. the Prophet) days passed,

segments.arabic: أَقَامَ وَلِيَّهُ عَلِيَّ بْنَ ابِي طَالِبٍ

translation.en: he appointed as successor his vicegerent `Ali the son of Abu-Talib,
Your blessings be upon both of them and their Household,
because he (the Prophet) was the warner
and `Ali was the guide for every people.
So, he (the Prophet) said in the presence of the people,
“As for each one who has taken me as his master,
`Ali is now his master.
O Allah, guard any one who is loyal to `Ali,
be the enemy of any one who antagonizes him,
support any one who supports him,
and disappoint any one who disappoints him.”

segments.arabic: وَقَالَ: ”مَنْ كُنْتُ أَنَا نَبِيَّهُ فَعَلِيٌّ امِيرُهُ.“
segments.transliteration: wa qala man kuntu ana nabiyyahu fa`aliyyun amiruhu

translation.en: He also said, “As for any one who has considered me as his Prophet, `Ali is now his commander.”

segments.transliteration: wa qala ana wa `aliyyun min shajaratin wahidatin

translation.en: He also said, “`Ali and I are of the same tree,

segments.transliteration: wa sa'iru alnnasi min shajarin shatta

translation.en: while all the other peoples are from various trees.”

segments.transliteration: wa ahallahu mahalla haruna min musa

translation.en: He endued him (i.e. `Ali) with the position that (Prophet) Aaron had with regard to (Prophet) Moses,

segments.arabic: فَقَالَ لَهُ: ”أَنْتَ مِنِّي بِمَنْزِلَةِ هَارُونَ مِنْ مُوسَىٰ
segments.transliteration: faqal lahu anta minni bimanzilati haruna min musa

translation.en: saying, “Your position to me is as same as Aaron’s position to Moses (in every thing)
except that there shall be no prophet after me.”

segments.transliteration: wa zawwajahu ibnatahu sayyidata nisa'i al`alamina

translation.en: He gave him in marriage his daughter the doyenne of the women of the worlds.

segments.arabic: وَأَحَلَّ لَهُ مِنْ مَسْجِدِهِ مَا حَلَّ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa ahalla lahu min masjidihi ma halla lahu

translation.en: He allowed him (alone) to do whatever he himself is allowed to do in his Mosque.
He closed all the doors (to the Mosque) except his (i.e. `Ali) door.
He then entrusted with him his knowledge and his wisdom,
saying, “I am the city of knowledge,
and `Ali is its door.
So, whoever wants this city and wisdom,
must come to it from its door.”

segments.transliteration: thumma qala anta akhi wa wasiyyi wa warithi

translation.en: He then said (to `Ali), “You are my brother, successor, and inheritor.
Your flesh is part of my flesh,
your blood is part of my blood,
your peace is my peace,
your war is my war,
and faith is mixed with your flesh and blood
as same as it is mixed with my flesh and blood.

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْتَ غَداً عَلَىٰ الْحَوْضِ خَلِيفَتِي

translation.en: On the morrow, you shall be my vicegerent on the (Divine) Pond.
You also settle my debts
and fulfill my commitments.
Your Shi`ah (i.e. adherents) shall be on pulpits of light,
white-faced, around me in Paradise.
They are my neighbors (therein).
Were it not for you `Ali,
true believers would not be recognized after me.”

segments.transliteration: wa kana ba`dahu hudan min alddalali

translation.en: Hence, he (i.e. `Ali), after the Prophet, was true guidance against straying off,
light against blindness,
the firmest rope of Allah,
and His straight path.
None would precede him in blood relation (with the Prophet)
or any priority in a religious affair,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يُلْحَقُ فِي مَنْقَبَةٍ مِنْ مَنَاقِبِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la yulhaqu fi manqabatin min manaqibihi

translation.en: and none would ever match him in any item of virtue.
He patterned after the Messenger,
may Allah’s blessings be upon both of them and their Household.
He fought for the sake of true interpretation (of the Qur'an).

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَأخُذُهُ فِي ٱللَّهِ لَوْمَةُ لاَئِمٍ
segments.transliteration: wa la ta'khudhuhu fi allahi lawmatu la'imin

translation.en: The blame of any blamer would never stop him from doing anything for the sake of Allah.
He thus exterminated the villains of the Arabs,
killed their heroes,
and eradicated their ferocious fighters.
He therefore filled in their hearts with malice

segments.transliteration: badriyyatan wa khaybariyyatan wa hunayniyyatan wa ghayrahunna

translation.en: from the battles of Badr, Khaybar, and Hunayn as well as others.
Therefore, they clang inseparably to opposing him
and attached upon dissenting him
until he had to kill the preachers, the unjust, and the apostates.
When he passed away

segments.arabic: وَقَتَلَهُ أَشْقَىٰ ٱلآخِرِينَ يَتْبَعُ أَشْقَىٰ ٱلأَوَّلِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa qatalahu ashqa al-akhirina yatba`u ashqa al-awwalina

translation.en: and he was killed by the most miserable of all of the late generations who will be attached to the most miserable of the past generations,
the decree of Allah’s Messenger,
may Allah bless him and his Household,
about the leadership of the successive guiding ones was not carried out;
rather, the people insisted on detesting him
and agreed unanimously on rupturing their relations with him
and moving away his descendants (from leadership),

segments.arabic: إِِلاَّ ٱلْقَلِيلَ مِمَّنْ وَفَىٰ لِرِعَايَةِ ٱلْحَقِّ فِيهِمْ
segments.transliteration: illa alqalila mimman wafa liri`ayati alhaqqi fihim

translation.en: except for a few ones who fulfilled the duty of observing their rights.
Many (of `Ali’s descendants) were therefore slain,
many others were taken as captives,
and many others were banished.
Decrees were thus applied to them
in a form expected to grant them excellent reward for that.
Verily, the earth is Allah’s;
He gives it in inheritance to whomever of His servants that He wishes;
and the end result shall be for the pious.
All glory be to our Lord.
Most certainly, the promise of our Lord shall come to pass.
Allah shall never fail to fulfill His promise.
He is the Almighty, the All-wise.

segments.arabic: فَعَلَىٰ ٱلأَطَائِبِ مِنْ أَهْلِ بَيْتِ مُحَمَّد وَعَلِيٍّ
segments.transliteration: fa`ala al-ata'ibi min ahli bayti muhammadin wa `aliyyin

translation.en: For the immaculate ones from the household of Muhammad and `Ali,
may Allah bless both of them and their household,
let weepers weep.
For them too, let lamenters lament.
For the like of them, let tears be shed,
screamers scream,
yellers yell,
and wailers wail.
Where is al-Hasan? Where is al-Husayn?
Where are the sons of al-Husayn;
a virtuous one after another,
and a veracious one after another?
Where is the course (to Allah) after a course?
Where is the best after the best?
Where are the rising suns?
Where are the shining moons?
Where are the brilliant stars?
Where are the authorities of the religion
and the foundations of knowledge?
Where is the left by Allah

segments.arabic: ٱلَّتِي لاََ تَخْلُو مِنَ ٱلْعِتْرَةِ ٱلْهَادِيةِ
segments.transliteration: allati la takhlu min al`itrati alhadiyati

translation.en: that is always represented by individuals from the guiding (Prophetic) offspring?
Where is the one prepared for cutting off the roots of the wrongdoers?
Where is the one awaited for mending every unevenness and crookedness?
Where is the one hoped for removing oppression and aggression?
Where is the one spared for refreshing the duties and traditions?
Where is the one chosen for restoring the faith and the code of law?

segments.transliteration: ayna almu'ammalu li'ihya'i alkitabi wa hududihi

translation.en: Where is the one expected to restore to life the Book and its provisions?

segments.transliteration: ayna muhyi ma`alimi alddini wa ahlihi

translation.en: Where is the reviver of the elements of the religion and its people?
Where is the one shattering the arms of the aggressors?
Where is the one demolishing the edifices of polytheism and hypocrisy?
Where is the one annihilating the people of wickedness,
disobedience, and tyranny?
Where is the one uprooting the branches of error and insurgence?
Where is the one effacing the traces of evasiveness and personal desires?
Where is the one severing the ropes of fabrication and forgery?
Where is the one terminating the insolent defiant and persistent rebels?

segments.arabic: أَيْنَ مُسْتَاصِلُ أَهْلِ ٱلْعِنَادِ وَٱلتَّضْلِيلِ وَٱلإِلْحَادِ
segments.transliteration: ayna musta'silu ahli al`inadi walttadlili wal-ilhadi

translation.en: Where is the one tearing up the people of obstinacy, misleading, and atheism?

segments.transliteration: ayna mu`izzu al-awliya'i wa mudhillu al-a`da'i

translation.en: Where is the one ennobling the saints and humiliating the enemies?
Where is the one bringing together (all scattered) words to piety?

segments.arabic: أَيْنَ بَابُ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي مِنْهُ يُؤْتَىٰ
segments.transliteration: ayna babu allahi alladhi minhu yu'ta

translation.en: Where is the door of Allah from which Allah is come?

segments.arabic: أَيْنَ وَجْهُ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي إِِلَيْهِ يَتَوَجَّهُ ٱلأَوْلِيَاءُ
segments.transliteration: ayna wajhu allahi alladhi ilayhi yatawajjahu al-awliya'u

translation.en: Where is the Face of Allah towards whom the saints turn their faces.

segments.arabic: أَيْنَ ٱلسَّبَبُ ٱلْمُتَّصِلُ بَيْنَ ٱلأَرْضِ وَٱلسَّمَاءِ
segments.transliteration: ayna alssababu almuttasilu bayna al-ardi walssama'i

translation.en: Where is the means of access that is connectedly extended between the earth and the heavens.
Where is the patron of the Conquest Day
and the stretcher of the pennon of true guidance?
Where is the one reunifying the dispersed parts of uprightness and contentment?

segments.arabic: أَيْنَ ٱلطَّالِبُ بِذُحُولِ ٱلأَنْبِيَاءِ وَأَبْنَاءِ ٱلأَنْبِيَاءِ
segments.transliteration: ayna alttalibu bidhuhuli al-anbiya'i wa abna'i al-anbiya'i

translation.en: Where is the one demanding with the vengeance of the Prophets and their sons?
Where is the one demanding with the blood of the one slain in Karbala'?

segments.arabic: أَيْنَ ٱلْمَنْصُورُ عَلَىٰ مَنِ ٱعْتَدَىٰ عَلَيْهِ وَٱفْتَرَىٰ

translation.en: Where is the one granted aid against whomever transgresses and forges lies against him?

segments.arabic: أَيْنَ ٱلْمُضْطَرُّ ٱلَّذِي يُجَابُ إِِذَا دَعَا
segments.transliteration: ayna almudtarru alladhi yujabu idha da`a

translation.en: Where is the distressed who is answered when he prays?

segments.arabic: أَيْنَ صَدْرُ ٱلْخَلاَئِقِ ذُو ٱلْبِرِّ وَٱلتَّقْوَىٰ
segments.transliteration: ayna sadru alkhala'iqi dhu albirri walttaqwa

translation.en: Where is the forepart of the creatures who enjoys dutifulness and piety?
Where is the son of the well-chosen Prophet,
the son of `Ali the well-pleased,
the son of Khadijah the glittery lady,
and the son of Fatimah the grand lady?
May my father and mother be ransoms for you.
May my soul be protection and shield for you.
O son of the chiefs drawn near!
O son of the most honorable, outstanding ones!
O son of the guiding and well-guided ones!
O son of the ever-best refined ones!
O son of the all-liberal and all-select ones!
O son of the immaculate and purified ones!
O son of the ample-giving, finely elected ones!
O son of the bounteous, most honorable ones!
O son of light-giving full moons!
O son of beaming lanterns!
O son of piercing flames!
O son of luminous stars!
O son of patent ways!
O son of obvious signs!
O son of perfect knowledge!
O son of renowned traditions!
O son of well-established features!
O son of well-known miracles!
O son of widely witnessed demonstrations!
O son of the straight path!
O son of the great news!

segments.arabic: يَا بْنَ مَنْ هُوَ فِي أُمِّ ٱلْكِتَابِ لَدَىٰ ٱللَّهِ عَلِيٌّ حَكِيمٌ
segments.transliteration: yabna man huwa fi ummi alkitabi lada allahi `aliyyun hakimun

translation.en: O son of him who is elevated and full of wisdom in the original of the Book with Allah.
O son of signs and manifestations!
O son of apparent points of evidence!
O son of clear-cut and dazzling substantiations!
O son of conclusive arguments!
O son of superabundant bounties!
O son of Taha and the decisive (verses)!
O son of Yasin and al-Dhariyat (the winnowing winds)!
O son of al-Tur (the Mount of Revelation) and al-`ªdiyat (the running steeds)!
O son of him who drew near and then bowed;
he therefore was the measure of two bows or closer still;
nearness and closeness to the Most High and Most Exalted (Lord)!

segments.arabic: لَيْتَ شِعْرِي أَيْنَ ٱسْتَقَرَّتْ بِكَ ٱلنَّوَىٰ
segments.transliteration: layta shi`ri ayna istaqarrat bika alnnawa

translation.en: How I wonder! Where has farness taken you?

segments.arabic: بَلْ أَيُّ أَرْضٍ تُقِلُّكَ أَوْ ثَرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: bal ayya ardin tuqilluka aw thara

translation.en: Or which land or soil is carrying you?

segments.arabic: أَبِرَضْوَىٰ أَوْ غَيْرِهَا أَمْ ذِي طُوَىٰٰ
segments.transliteration: abiradwa aw ghayriha am dhi tuwa

translation.en: Is it on (Mount) Radwa or elsewhere on (Mount) Dhi-Tuwa?

segments.arabic: عَزِيزٌ عَلَيَّ أَنْ أَرَىٰ ٱلْخَلْقَ وَلاَ تُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: `azizun `alayya an ara alkhalqa wa la tura

translation.en: It is hard for me that I can see all creatures but I can neither see you

segments.arabic: وَلاَ أَسْمَعُ لَكَ حَسِيساً وَلاَ نَجْوَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa la asma`u laka hasisan wa la najwa

translation.en: nor can I hear any whisper or confidential talk from you!

segments.arabic: عَزِيزٌ عَلَيَّ أَنْ تُحِيطَ بِكَ دُونِيَ ٱلْبَلْوَىٰ

translation.en: It is hard for me that ordeals encompass you, not me

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَنَالُكَ مِنِّي ضَجِيجٌ وَلاَ شَكْوَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa la yanaluka minni dajijun wa la shakwa

translation.en: and neither cry nor complaint from me can rally round you!

segments.arabic: بِنَفْسِي أَنْتَ مِنْ مُغَيَّبٍ لَمْ يَخْلُ مِنَّا
segments.transliteration: binafsi anta min mughayyabin lam yakhlu minna

translation.en: May my soul be ransom for you; for although you are hidden from us, you have never forsaken us.

segments.arabic: بِنَفْسِي أَنْتَ مِنْ نَازِحٍ مَا نَزَحَ عَنَّا
segments.transliteration: binafsi anta min nazihin ma nazaha `anna

translation.en: May my soul be ransom for you; for although you are away, you have never been away from us.
May my soul be ransom for you; for you are the wish of an eager

segments.transliteration: min mu'minin wa mu'minatin dhakara fahanna

translation.en: believing man or woman who mention you and miss you.

segments.arabic: بِنَفْسِي أَنْتَ مِنْ عَقِيدِ عِزٍّ لاَ يُسَامَىٰ

translation.en: May my soul be ransom for you; for you are an unmatched pioneer of dignity.

segments.arabic: بِنَفْسِي أَنْتَ مِنْ أَثِيلِ مَجْدٍ لاَ يُجَارَىٰ
segments.transliteration: binafsi anta min athili majdin la yujara

translation.en: May my soul be ransom for you; for you are an unrivaled origin of glory.

segments.arabic: بِنَفْسِي أَنْتَ مِنْ تِلاَدِ نِعَمٍ لاََ تُضَاهَىٰ
segments.transliteration: binafsi anta min tiladi ni`amin la tudaha

translation.en: May my soul be ransom for you; for you are unparalleled center of bounties.

segments.arabic: بِنَفْسِي أَنْتَ مِنْ نَصِيفِ شَرَفٍ لاََ يُسَاوَىٰ
segments.transliteration: binafsi anta min nasifi sharafin la yusawa

translation.en: May my soul be ransom for you; for you are unequaled in all-inclusive honor.

segments.arabic: إِلَىٰ مَتَىٰ أَحَارُ فِيكَ يَا مَوْلاَيَ وَإِِلَىٰ مَتَىٰ
segments.transliteration: ila mata aharu fika ya mawlaya wa ila mata

translation.en: Until when will I be bewildered about you, O my master, and until when?

segments.arabic: وَأَيَّ خِطَابٍ أَصِفُ فِيكَ وَأَيَّ نَجْوَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa ayya khitabin asifu fika wa ayya najwa

translation.en: In what kind of statement and in what kind of talk can I describe you?

segments.arabic: عَزِيزٌ عَلَيَّ أَنْ أُجَابَ دُونَكَ وَأُنَاغَىٰ

translation.en: It is hard for me that I can receive answers and words, but you cannot.

segments.arabic: عَزِيزٌ عَلَيَّ أَنْ أَبْكِيَكَ وَيَخْذُلَكَ ٱلْوَرَىٰ

translation.en: It is hard for me that I weep for you but the others disappoint you.

segments.arabic: عَزِيزٌ عَلَيَّ أَنْ يَجْرِيَ عَلَيْكَ دُونَهُمْ مَا جَرَىٰ

translation.en: It is hard for me that what has happened afflict you other than all the others.

segments.arabic: هَلْ مِنْ مُعِينٍ فَأُطِيلَ مَعَهُ ٱلْعَوِيلَ وَٱلْبُكَاءَ
segments.transliteration: hal min mu`inin fa'utila ma`ahu al`awila walbuka'a

translation.en: Is there any helper with whom I may lament and bewail as much as I wish?

segments.arabic: هَلْ مِنْ جَزُوعٍ فَأُسَاعِدَ جَزَعَهُ إِِذَا خَلاَ
segments.transliteration: hal min jazu`in fa'usa`ida jaza`ahu idha khala

translation.en: Is there any aggrieved one whom I can help in grief when he becomes tired?

segments.arabic: هَلْ قَذِيَتْ عَيْنٌ فَسَاعَدَتْهَا عَيْنِي عَلَىٰ ٱلْقَذَىٰ

translation.en: Is there any eye moling out and thus my eye may help it to mol out more?

segments.arabic: هَلْ إِِلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَحْمَدَ سَبِيلٌ فَتُلْقَىٰ
segments.transliteration: hal ilayka yabna ahmada sabilun fatulqa

translation.en: Is there any way to meet you, O son of Ahmad (the Prophet)?

segments.arabic: هَلْ يَتَّصِلُ يَوْمُنَا مِنْكَ بِعِدَةٍ فَنَحْظَىٰ
segments.transliteration: hal yattasilu yawmuna minka bi`idatin fanahza

translation.en: Will our day be promised to catch your day and we will thus achieve our hope?
When will we be able to join your refreshing springs and we will then be satiated?
When will we quench our thirst from your fresh water,
because thirst has been too long?
When will we accompany you in coming and going so that our eyes will be delighted?

segments.arabic: مَتَىٰ تَرَانَا وَنَرَاكَ وَقَدْ نَشَرْتَ لِوَاءَ ٱلنَّصْرِ تُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: mata tarana wa naraka wa qad nasharta liwa'a alnnasri tura

translation.en: When will you see us and we see you spreading the pennon of victory?

segments.arabic: اتَرَانَا نَحُفُّ بِكَ وَأَنْتَ تَؤُمُّ ٱلْمَلَأَ
segments.transliteration: atarana nahuffu bika wa anta ta'ummu almala'a

translation.en: Can it be that we surround you while you are leading the groups,
after you will have filled in the earth with justice,
tasted your enemies humiliation and punishment,

segments.transliteration: wa abarta al`utata wa jahadata alhaqqi

translation.en: annihilated the insolent defiant and the deniers of the truth,
cut off the roots of the arrogant,
eradicated the sources of the wrongdoers,

segments.arabic: وَنَحْنُ نَقُولُ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa nahnu naqulu alhamdu lillahi rabbi al`alamina

translation.en: and we keep on saying, “All praise be to Allah the Lord of the worlds?”
O Allah, You are verily the reliever from agonies and ordeals.
To You do I complain about the transgressions against me, for You alone are worthy of receiving complaints,
and You are alone the Lord of the Hereafter and this world.

segments.arabic: فَأَغِثْ يَا غِيَاثَ ٱلْمُسْتَغِيثِينَ عُبَيْدَكَ ٱلْمُبْتَلَىٰ

translation.en: So, (please) aid Your agonized worthless servant, O Aide of those who seek aid,

segments.transliteration: wa arihi sayyidahu ya shadida alquwa

translation.en: grant him (i.e. Your servant) chance to see his master, O Lord of mighty prowess,
remove from him misfortune and anguish, in the name of his master,

segments.arabic: وَبَرِّدْ غَلِيلَهُ يَا مَنْ عَلَىٰ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱسْتَوَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa barrid ghalilahu ya man `ala al`arshi istawa

translation.en: and satisfy his thirst, O He Who is established on the Throne
and He to Whom is the return and the final goal.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَنَحْنُ عَبِيدُكَ ٱلتَّائِقُونَ إِلَىٰ وَلِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa nahnu `abiduka altta'iquna ila waliyyika

translation.en: O Allah, we are Your servants who are fervently willing to meet Your vicegerent,
who reminds of You and Your Prophet;
and whom You have created as haven and refuge for us,

segments.transliteration: wa aqamtahu lana qiwaman wa ma`adhan

translation.en: You have appointed as foundation and source of protection for us,
and whom You have made to be the leader of the believers among us.
So, (please) convey to him greetings and salutations from us,

segments.transliteration: wa zidna bidhalika ya rabbi ikraman

translation.en: endue us with more honor, O my Lord, through that,

segments.transliteration: waj`al mustaqarrahu lana mustaqarran wa muqaman

translation.en: decide his settlement among us to be settlement and dwelling for us,

segments.transliteration: wa atmim ni`mataka bitaqdimika iyyahu amamana

translation.en: and perfect Your bounty by making him occupy the leading position before us
so that You shall allow us to enter the gardens of Your Paradise
and to accompany the martyrs from among Your elite ones.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad;([1])

segments.transliteration: wa salli `ala muhammadin jaddihi wa rasulika

translation.en: and send blessings upon Muhammad his grandfather and Your messenger;
the senior master,
upon his father the junior master,
upon his grandmother the grand veracious lady
Fatimah the daughter of Muhammad,
peace be upon him and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَعَلَىٰ مَنِ ٱصْطَفَيْتَ مِنْ آبَائِهِ ٱلْبَرَرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa `ala man istafayta min aba'ihi albararati

translation.en: upon his dutiful fathers whom You have chosen (over all others),
and upon him with such most favorable, most perfect,
most thorough, most permanent,
most abundant, and most plentiful

segments.arabic: مَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَىٰ أَحَدٍ مِنْ أَصْفِيَائِكَ

translation.en: blessings that You have ever sent upon any of Your elite ones
and well-chosen ones among Your creatures.

segments.arabic: وَصَلِّ عَلَيْهِ صَلاَةً لا غَايَةَ لِعَدَدِهَا
segments.transliteration: wa salli `alayhi salatan la ghayata li`adadiha

translation.en: And (please) bless him with such blessings whose number is infinite,
whose quantity is never-ending,
and whose time is interminable.
O Allah! Through him, establish all rights,
refute the entire wrong,
grant triumph to Your loyalists,
humiliate Your enemies,

segments.transliteration: wa sil allahumma baynana wa baynahu

translation.en: establish, O Allah, between him and us
a connection that leads us to accompany his ancestors,
include us with those who will take their vengeance
and keep constant under their shadow,
help us fulfill our duties towards him,
exert all efforts in obedience to him
and avoiding disobeying him,
bestow upon us with the favor of attaining his pleasure,

segments.transliteration: wa hab lana ra'fatahu wa rahmatahu

translation.en: and grant us his kindness, mercy,
prayer (for us), and his goodness

segments.arabic: مَا نَنَالُ بِهِ سَعَةً مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ma nanalu bihi sa`atan min rahmatika

translation.en: in an amount due to which we will gain a good deal of Your mercy
and achievement with You.
And, through him, render our prayers admitted,
our sins forgiven,
and our supplications responded.
And, through him too, make our sustenance expanded for us,
our distresses relieved,
and our needs granted.
And (please) receive us with Your Noble Face,
approve of our seeking nearness to You,
and have a merciful look at us
by which we will win perfect honor with You;
and, after that, do not ever take it away from us, in the name of Your magnanimity,
and give us a drink from the Pond of his grandfather,
may Allah bless him and his Household,
from his own cup and with his own hand,
such a replete, satiating,
pleasant, and wholesome drink
after which we shall never suffer from thirst.
O most merciful of all those who show mercy!

text.en: Dua Faraj- Azumal Bala

Shaykh Tabarsi (a.r.), the renowned commentator of the Holy Quran, has recorded this supplication in his book ‘Kunooz al- Najaah’ and says, ‘This supplication was taught by our master Saaheb al-Zamaan (a.t.f.s.) to Abul Hasan Muhammad Ibn Ahmad Ibn Abi al-Lais in the city of Baghdad at the Graves of Quraish ( مقابر قريش ), where the latter had taken refuge, due to fear of death. On account of the blessings of this supplication, he was saved. This dua'a is attributed to the living Imam Mehdi (atfs). It brings immediate help from our living imam. It is recommended to be recited often by Ulama .Kafami says in his book Baladul Amin that if a wrongfully confined prisoner recites this dua'a he will soon be set free.
If a person find himself surrounded by misfortunes or intrigues he must recite this dua'a to come through tight situations, deadlock and crises.

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful
O my Lord! The calamity has aggravated; the absence prolonged;
The curtain of modesty has been lifted; hope has been curtailed;
The earth has been narrow; and sky has been denied.
And You are the One from whom help is sought and complaints are made

segments.arabic: وَ عَلَيْكَ الْمُعَوَّلُ فِيْ الشِّدَّةِ وَالرَّخَاءِ،

translation.en: And in You we trust in the times of difficulty.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَي مُحَمَّدٍ وَّآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma salli ‘ala Muhammad wa ali Muhammad

translation.en: O Allah! Send blessings upon Muhammad (S) and the progeny of Muhammad (S),

segments.arabic: أُوْلِي الْأَمْرِ الَّذِيْنَ فَرَضْتَ عَلَيْنَا طَا عَتَهُمْ

translation.en: The possessors of authority whose obedience you have enjoined upon us

segments.arabic: وَ عَرَّفْتَنَا بِذَالِكَ مَنْزِلَتَهُمْ ، فَفَّرِجْ عَنَّا بِحَقِّهِمْ فَرَجاً عَاجِلاً قَرِيْباً كَلَمْحِ الْبَصَرِ أَوْ هُوَ أَقْرَبُ
segments.transliteration: Wa ‘arraftana bidhalika manzilatahum fafarrij ‘anna bi-haqqihim farajan ‘ajilan qariban kalamhi’l-basari aw huwa aqrab

translation.en: And by that made us aware of their position. Then make open for us, by their truth, an immediate opening, immediate as a wink or sooner.
O Muhammad! O ‘Ali! O ‘Ali! O Muhammad!

segments.arabic: اِكْفِيَانِيْ فَإِنَّكُمَا كَافِيَانِ وَ انْصُرَانِيْ فَإِنَّكُمَا نَاصِرَانِ
segments.transliteration: Ikfiyani fainnakuma kafiyani wa’n-surani fainnakuma nasiran

translation.en: Suffice me both of you as both of you are sufficient.Help me—two of you—for you are my helpers.
O our Master, O Master of the Time!
Help! Help!
Rescue me! Rescue me! Rescue me!
This moment! This moment! This moment!
Hasten, hasten, hasten!

segments.arabic: يَا أَرْحَمَ لرَّاحِمِيْنَ بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَّآلِهِ الطَّا هِرِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: Ya arhama’r-rahimina bi-haqqi Muhammad wa alihi’t-tahirin

translation.en: O Most Merciful of the Merciful,For the sake of Muhammad (S) and his holy progeny.

text.en: This du-a'a known as "supplication of the youth stricken for his sin," is quoted from the work of Kaf-ami and from Muhaj al Da-wat by Sayyid ibn Tawus. from Imam Ali ibn abi Talib(as) who wrote his dua'a and gave it to a paralized man instruction to recite after Isha salat

This dua'a contains ismi azam (the great name of Allah). Recite this dua'a after Isha salat. It brings countless blessings. All your legitimate desires will be fulfilled. It drives away poverty and sickness. Sins are for given. Debts are cleared. Enemies become friends. Domestic affairs are set aright. Disputes are settled in your favour. Prisoners are set free mental worries disappear. Prosperity, sound mind and healthy body stand by you at all times.
Mercy and forgiveness of sins are the main advantages the almighty Allah makes available if this dua'a is recited regularly..

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
O Allah, verily I beseech You by Your Name:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
O Lord of majesty and honor!
O Ever-living! O Self-subsistent!

segments.arabic: يَا حَيُّ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ أَنتَ
segments.transliteration: ya hayyu la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: O Ever-Living! There is no god but You!

segments.arabic: يَا هُوَ يَا مَنْ لاَ يَعْلَمُ مَا هُوَ
segments.transliteration: ya huwa ya man la ya`lamu ma huwa

translation.en: O He Whom none knows what He is,
nor how He is,
nor where He is,

segments.transliteration: wa la haythu huwa illa huwa

translation.en: nor in what respect He is, but He!
O Possessor of dominion and kingdom!
O Possessor of might and invincibility!

segments.arabic: يَا مَلِكُ يَا قُدُّوسُ يَا سَلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: ya maliku ya quddusu ya salamu

translation.en: O King! O All-holy! O Giver of peace!
O Granter of security! O All-preserver!

segments.arabic: يَا عَزِيزُ يَا جَبَّارُ يَا مُتَكَبِّرُ

translation.en: O Almighty! O All-compeller! O All-sublime!

segments.arabic: يَا خَاِلقُ يَا بَارِئُ يَا مُصَوِّرُ

translation.en: O Creator! O Maker! O Shaper!
O grantor of Benefits! O Director!
O Severe (in punishing the evildoers)! O Originator!
O Returner! O Destroyer!

segments.arabic: يَا وَدُودُ يَا مَحْمُودُ يَا مَعْبُودُ
segments.transliteration: ya wadudu ya mahmudu ya ma`budu

translation.en: O All-loving! O All-praiseworthy! O All-worshipped!
O Far! O Nigh!

segments.arabic: يَا مُجِيبُ يَا رَقِيبُ يَا حَسِيبُ

translation.en: O Responder! O Watcher! O Reckoner!
O Innovator! O Exalter!
O Inaccessible! O All-hearing!

segments.arabic: يَا عَلِيمُ يَا حَلِيمُ يَا كَرِيمُ

translation.en: O All-knowing! O All-clement! O All-generous!
O All-wise! O Eternal!
O All-high! O All-tremendous!
O All-commiserating! O All-gracious!
O Condemner! O Recourse!
O All-majestic! O All-handsome!
O Guardian! O Surety!
O Annuller! O Bestower!
O All-noble! O Leader!
O Guide! O All-Apparent!
O First! O Last!
O Outward! O Inward!
O All-steadfast! O Everlasting!
O Knower! O Decider!
O Judge! O Just!
O Separator! O Joiner!
O Pure! O Purifier!
O All-powerful! O All-able!
O All-great! O All-sublime!

segments.arabic: يَا وَاحِدُ يَا أَحَدُ يَا صَمَدُ
segments.transliteration: ya wahidu ya ahadu ya samadu

translation.en: O One! O Unique! O eternally Besought of all!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ
segments.transliteration: ya man lam yalid wa lam yulad

translation.en: O He Who begets not and was not begotten,

segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu kufwan ahadun

translation.en: equal to Whom is none,
Who has no consort,
with Him is no aide
nor has He taken any adviser,
nor needs He any assistant,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ كَانَ مَعَهُ مِنَ إِلٰهٍ غَيْرُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa la kana ma`ahu min ilahin ghayruhu

translation.en: nor with Him is any god but He—
there is no god but You.

segments.arabic: فَتَعَالَيْتَ عَمَّا يَقُولُ ٱلظَّالِمُونَ عُلُوّاً كَبِيراً

translation.en: So exalted are You above what the evildoers say, a great exaltation!

segments.arabic: يَا عَلِيُّ يَا شَامِخُ يَا بَاِذخُ

translation.en: O All-high! O All-lofty! O All-towering!

segments.arabic: يَا فَتَّاحُ يَا نَفَّاحُ يَا مُرْتَاحُ
segments.transliteration: ya fattahu ya naffahu ya murtahu

translation.en: O All-opener! O All-diffuser! O All-restful!

segments.arabic: يَا مُفَرِّجُ يَا نَاصِرُ يَا مُنْتَصِرُ
segments.transliteration: ya mufarriju ya nasiru ya muntasiru

translation.en: O Bestower of relief! O Helper! O Giver of victory!

segments.arabic: يَا مُدْرِكُ يَا مُهْلِكُ يَا مُنْتَقِمُ
segments.transliteration: ya mudriku ya muhliku ya muntaqimu

translation.en: O Comprehender! O Destroyer! O Avenger!
O Upraiser! O Inheritor!
O Seeker! O Vanquisher!
O He from Whom no fugitive can escape!

segments.arabic: يَا تَوَّابُ يَا أَوَّابُ يَا وَهَّابُ
segments.transliteration: ya tawwabu ya awwabu ya wahhabu

translation.en: O All-relenting! O All-forbearing! O All-bestower!
O Originator of all means!
O Opener of all doors!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ حَيْثُ مَا دُعِي أَجابَ
segments.transliteration: ya man haythu ma du`iya ajaba

translation.en: O He Who answers wherever He is called upon!
O All-Pure! O All-thankful!
O Exempter! O Forgiver!
O Light of light!
O Director of all affairs!
O All-subtle! O All-aware!
O Protector! O Illuminator!

segments.arabic: يَا بَصِيرُ يَا ظَهِيرُ يَا كَبِيرُ
segments.transliteration: ya basiru ya zahiru ya kabiru

translation.en: O All-seeing! O All-aiding! O All-great!
O Alone! O Solitary!

segments.arabic: يَا أَبَدُ  يَا سَنَدُ يَا صَمَدُ
segments.transliteration: ya abadu ya sanadu ya samadu

translation.en: O Eternity without end! O Support! O Everlasting Refuge!
O All-sufficient! O All-healing!
O All-fulfilling! O All-relieving!
O All-kind! O All-gracious!
O All-benevolent! O All-bountiful!
O All-beneficent! O All-solitary!
O He Who is exalted and dominates!
O He Who is master and exercises power!
O He Who is inward and aware!
O He Who is worshipped and thankful!
O He Who is disobeyed and forgives!
O He Who is not encompassed by thoughts,
nor perceived by vision,
and from Whom no trace remains hidden!
O Provider of mankind!
O Determiner of every lot!
O Lofty in place!
O Firm in supports!
O Transformer of times!
O Accepter of sacrifices!
O Lord of graciousness and benevolence!
O Lord of might and force!
O All-compassionate! O All-merciful!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ فِي شَأْنٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa kulla yawmin fi sha'nin

translation.en: O He Who is every day upon some labor!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاَ يَشْغَلُهُ شَأْنٌ عَنْ شَأْنٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yashghaluhu sha'nun `an sha'nin

translation.en: O He Who is not distracted from one labor by another!
O Tremendous in rank!
O He Who is in every place!
O He Who hears all sounds!
O He Who answers all supplications!
O He Who fulfils all entreaties!
O He Who provides all needs!
O He Who sends down blessings!
O He Who has mercy upon tears!
O He Who annuls slips!
O He Who removes troubles!
O He Who sponsors good things!
O He Who exalts in rank!
O He Who bestows requests!
O He Who gives life to the dead!
O He Who gathers all scattered things!
O He Who is aware of all intentions!
O He Who brings back what has passed away!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاَ تَشْتَبِهُ عَلَيْهِ الْأَصْواتُ

translation.en: O He for Whom sounds are never indistinct!
O He Who never becomes annoyed at requests
nor covered by shadows!
O Light of the earth and the heavens!
O Ample in blessings!
O Repeller of adversities!
O Maker of the breaths of life!
O He Who gathers together the nations!
O Healer of illnesses!
O Creator of light and darkness!
O Lord of munificence and generosity!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاَ يَطَأُ عَرْشَهُ قَدَمٌ

translation.en: O He upon Whose Throne no foot treads!
O Most Munificent of the most munificent!
O Most Generous of the most generous!
O Most Hearing of the hearers!
O Most Seeing of the viewers!
O Protector of those who seek protection!
O Sanctuary of the fearful!
O Asylum of the refugees!
O Patron of the believers!
O Helper of those who seek aid!
O Goal of the seekers!
O Companion of every stranger!
O Intimate of everyone alone!
O Refuge of every outcast!
O Shelter of every wanderer!
O Custodian of everyone astray!
O He Who is merciful to old men!
O He Who provides for small infants!
O He Who sets broken bones!
O He Who releases every prisoner!
O He Who enriches the miserable pauper!
O He Who safeguards the fearful seeker of protection!
O He Who governs and determines!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنِ ٱلْعَسِيرُ عَلَيْهِ سَهْلٌ يَسِيرٌ

translation.en: O He for Whom the difficult is simple and easy!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاَ يَحْتَاجُ إِلَىٰ تَفْسِيرٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yahtaju ila tafsirin

translation.en: O He Who never needs an explanation!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa `ala kulli shay'in qadirun

translation.en: O He Who is powerful over everything!'

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ خَبِيرٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa bikulli shay'in khabirun

translation.en: O He Who is aware of everything!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بِكُلِّ شَيءٍ بَصِيرٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa bikulli shay'in basirun

translation.en: O He Who sees everything!
O Sender of the winds!
O Cleaver of the dawn!
O Dispatcher of the spirits!
O Lord of munificence and forbearance!
O He in Whose Hand is every key!
O He Who hears every sound!
O He Who takes precedence over everything that passes away!

segments.arabic: يَا مُحْيِيَ كُلِّ نَفْسٍ بَعْدَ ٱلْمَوْتِ
segments.transliteration: ya muhyiya kulli nafsin ba`da almawti

translation.en: O He Who gives life to every soul after death!
O my Provision in my hardship!
O my Maintainer in my exile!
O my Intimate in my lonesomeness!
O my Sponsor in my blessings!
O my haven when the ways make me weary,
when relatives give me up
and when every companion forsakes me!

segments.arabic: يَا عِمَادَ مَنْ لاَ عِمَادَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Backing of him who has no backing!

segments.arabic: يَا سَنَدَ مَنْ لاَ سَنَدَ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: ya sanada man la sanada lahu

translation.en: O Support of him who has no support!

segments.arabic: يَا ذُخْرَ مَنْ لاَ ذُخْرَ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: ya dhukhra man la dhukhra lahu

translation.en: O Store of him who has no store!

segments.arabic: يَا حِرْزَ مَنْ لاَ حِرْزَ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: ya hirza man la hirza lahu

translation.en: O Sanctuary of him who has no sanctuary!

segments.arabic: يَا كَهْفَ مَنْ لاَ كَهْفَ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: ya kahfa man la kahfa lahu

translation.en: O Cave of him who has no cave!

segments.arabic: يَا كَنْزَ مَنْ لاَ كَنْزَ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: ya kanza man la kanza lahu

translation.en: O Treasure of him who has no treasure!

segments.arabic: يَا رُكْنَ مَنْ لاَ رُكْنَ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: ya rukna man la rukna lahu

translation.en: O castle of him who has no castle!

segments.arabic: يَا غِيَاثَ مَنْ لاَ غِيَاثَ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: ya ghiyatha man la ghiyatha lahu

translation.en: O Help of him who has no help!

segments.arabic: يَا جَارَ مَنْ لاَ جَارَ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: ya jara man la jara lahu

translation.en: O backer of him who has no backer!
O my Adjacent Neighbor!
O my Sturdy Pillar!
O My God in truth!
O Lord of the Ancient House!
O All-affectionate! O Friend!
Deliver me from the chains of strictures,

segments.arabic: وَٱصْرِفْ عَنِّي كُلَّ هَمٍّ وَغَمٍّ وَضِيقٍ
segments.transliteration: wasrif `anni kulla hammin wa ghammin wa diqin

translation.en: turn away from me every care, grief and distress,
protect me from the evil of that which I cannot bear,
and help me in that which I am able to bear!
O He Who returned Joseph to Jacob!
O He Who removed the affliction of Job!
O He Who forgave the sin of David!

segments.arabic: يَا رَافِعَ عِيسَىٰ بْنِ مَرْيَمَ وَمُنجِيهِ مِنْ أَيْدِى ٱلْيَهُودِ
segments.transliteration: ya rafi`a `isa ibni maryama wa munjiyahu min a y di alyahudi

translation.en: O He Who caused Jesus, the son of Mary, to ascend and delivered him from the hands of the Jews!

segments.arabic: يَا مُجِيبَ نِدَاءِ يُونُسَ فِي ٱلظُّلُمَاتِ
segments.transliteration: ya mujiba nida'i yunusa fi alzzulumati

translation.en: O He Who answered Jonah's call in the darkness!
O He Who chose Moses by spoken words!
O He Who forgave Adam his slip
and raised Idris to a high place through his mercy!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ نَجَّىٰ نُوحاً مِنَ ٱلغَرَقِ
segments.transliteration: ya man najja nuhan mina algharaqi

translation.en: O He Who saved Noah from drowning!
O He Who destroyed `ªd, the ancient,
and Thamud, and did not spare them,
and the people of Noah before;

segments.transliteration: innahum kanu hum azlama wa atgha

translation.en: certainly, they were most unjust and more rebellious,
and al-Mu'tafikah, He also overthrew.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ دَمَّرَ عَلَىٰ قَوْمِ لُوطٍ

translation.en: O He Who destroyed the people of Lot
and crushed the people of Shu`ayb!
O He Who took Abraham for a friend!
O You Who took Moses for an object of His words,

segments.arabic: وَٱتَّخَذَ مُحَمَّداً صَلَّىٰ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَعَلَيْهِمْ أَجْمَعِينَ حَبِيباً
segments.transliteration: wattkhadha muhammadan salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi wa `alayhim ajma`ina habiban

translation.en: and took Muhammad, may Allah bless him and his Household, for a beloved!
O He Who gave Luqman wisdom,
and bestowed upon Solomon a kingdom
such as may not befit anyone after him!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ نَصَرَ ذَا ٱلْقَرْنَيْنِ عَلىٰ ٱلْمُلُوكِ ٱلْجَبَابِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: ya man nasara dhalqarnayni `ala almuluki aljababirati

translation.en: O He Who gave Dhul-Qarnayn victory over the tyrannical kings!
O He Who gave al-Khadir (eternal) life

segments.arabic: وَرَدَّ لِيُوشَعَ بْنِ نُونٍ ٱلشَّمْسَ بَعْدَ غُرُوبِهَا
segments.transliteration: wa radda liyusha`a bni nunin alshshamsa ba`da ghurubiha

translation.en: and returned the sun to Joshua, the son of Nun, after its setting!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ رَبَطَ عَلَىٰ قَلْبِ أُمِّ مُوسَىٰ
segments.transliteration: ya man rabata `ala qalbi ummi musa

translation.en: O He Who strengthened the heart of Moses' mother,
and guarded the virginity of Mary, the daughter of `Imran!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ حَصَّنَ يَحْيَىٰ بْنَ زَكَرِيَّا مِنَ ٱلذَّنْبِ
segments.transliteration: ya man hassana yahya ibna zakariyya mina aldhdhanbi

translation.en: O He Who fortified John, the son of Zachariah, against sins
and calmed the anger of Moses!
O He Who gave Zachariah the good news of the birth of John!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ فَدَىٰ إِسْمَاعِيلَ مِنَ ٱلذَّبْحِ بِذِبْحٍ عَظِيمٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man fada isma`ila mina aldhdhabhi bidhibhin `azimin

translation.en: O He Who ransomed Ishmael from the sacrifice with a mighty sacrifice!
O He Who accepted the sacrifice of Abel
and placed a curse upon Cain!

segments.arabic: يَا هَازِمَ الْأَحْزابِ لِمُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: ya hazima al-ahzabi limuhammadin salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi

translation.en: O He Who routed the parties for Muhammad, may Allah bless him and his Household!
(please do) Bless Muhammad, the household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa `ala jami`i almursalina wa mala'ikatika almuqarrabina

translation.en: all the messengers, Your archangels,
and all those who obey You!

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِكُلِّ مَسْأَلَةٍ سَأَلَكَ بِها أَحَدٌ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bikulli mas'alatin sa'alaka biha ahadun

translation.en: I beseech You the supplication of every one who has besought you

segments.arabic: مِمَنْ رَضِيتَ عَنْهُ فَحَتَمْتَ لَهُ عَلىٰ ٱلإِجَابَةِ

translation.en: and with whom You have been pleased and thus decided to grant his request.

segments.arabic: يَا اَللَّهُ يَا اَللَّهُ يَا اَللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya allahu ya allahu

translation.en: O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!

segments.arabic: يَا رَحْمٰنُ يَا رَحْمٰنُ يَا رَحْمٰنُ
segments.transliteration: ya rahmanu ya rahmanu ya rahmanu

translation.en: O All-merciful! O All-merciful! O All-merciful!

segments.arabic: يَا رَحِيمُ يَا رَحِيمُ يَا رَحِيمُ
segments.transliteration: ya rahimu ya rahimu ya rahimu

translation.en: O All-compassionate! O All-compassionate! O All-compassionate!
O Lord of majesty and honor!
O Lord of majesty and honor!
O Lord of majesty and honor!

segments.arabic: بِهِ بِهِ بِهِ بِهِ بِهِ بِهِ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: bihi bihi bihi bihi bihi bihi bihi

translation.en: By Him! By Him! By Him! By Him! By Him! By Him! By Him!

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِكُلِّ ٱسْمٍ سَمَّيْتَ بِهِ نَفْسَكَ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka bikulli ismin sammayta bihi nafsaka

translation.en: I beseech You by every Name with which You have named Yourself

segments.arabic: أَوْ  أَنْزَلْتَهُ  فِي شَيْءٍ مِنْ كُتُبِكَ
segments.transliteration: aw anzaltahu fi shay'in min kutubika

translation.en: or which You have sent down in one of Your scriptures

segments.arabic: اوِ ٱسْتَاثَرْتَ بِهِ فِي عِلْمِ ٱلْغَيْبِ ٱلَّذِي عِنْدَكَ

translation.en: or kept for Yourself in the knowledge of the Unseen with You,
by the junctures of might for Your Throne,
by the utmost limit of mercy from Your Book,

segments.arabic: وَبِمَا ﴿وَلَوْ أَنّ َمَا فِي ٱلأَرْضِ مِنْ شَجَرَةٍ أَقْلاَمٌ
segments.transliteration: wa bima wa law anna ma fi al-ardi min shajaratin aqlamun

translation.en: by the fact that, “though all the trees in the earth were pens

segments.arabic: وَٱلْبَحْرُ يَمُدُّهُ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ سَبْعَةُ ابْحُرٍ
segments.transliteration: walbahru yamudduhu min ba`dihi sab`atu abhurin

translation.en: and the sea - seven seas after it to replenish it,
yet the words of Allah not be spent.
Allah is All-mighty, All-wise.”
And I beseech You by Your Most Excellent Names
that You have described in Your book thus saying,

segments.transliteration: wa lillahi al-asma'u alhusna fad`uhu biha

translation.en: “To Allah belong the Most Excellent Names, so call Him by them!”
And You said: “Call upon Me and I will answer you.”

segments.arabic: وَقُلْتَ: ﴿وَإِذَا سَأَلَكَ عِبَادِي عَنِّي فَإِنِّي قَرِيبٌ
segments.transliteration: wa qulta wa idha sa'alaka `ibadi `anni fa'inni qaribun

translation.en: And You said: “And when My servants ask you concerning Me, then surely I am very near;
I answer the prayer of the suppliant when he calls on Me.”

segments.arabic: وَقُلْتَ: ﴿قُلْ يَا عِبَادِيَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسْرَفُوا عَلَىٰ أَنْفُسِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: wa qulta qul ya `ibadiya alladhina asrafu `ala anfusihim

translation.en: And You said: “Say: O My servants who have been prodigal against yourselves;
do not despair of Allah's mercy.
Surely, Allah forgives all sins.
Surely, He is the All-forgiving, the All-compassionate.”
And I ask You, O my God,
I call You, O my Lord,
I please You, O my Master,

segments.arabic: وَأَطْمَعُ فِي إِجَابَتِي يَا مَوْلايَ كَمَا وَعَدتَّنِي
segments.transliteration: wa atma`u fi ijabati ya mawlaya kama wa`adtani

translation.en: and I desire for You to respond to me, O my Protector, just as You have promised me—
for I have called You just as You have commanded me.

segments.arabic: فَٱفْعَلْ بِي مَا أَنتَ أَهْلُهُ يَا كَرِيمُ
segments.transliteration: faf`al bi ma anta ahluhu ya karimu

translation.en: So, do to me what is worthy of You, O All-generous!
All praise be to Allah, the Lord of the Worlds.

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ أَجْمَعِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu `ala muhammadin wa alihi ajma`ina

translation.en: May Allah bless Muhammad and his entire Household.

text.en: Then you may pray Almighty Allah to grant you your personal requests and they will be granted, Allah willing. According to the narration mentioned in Muhaj al-Da`awat, one must say this supplication while being in a state of ritual purity.

Recited on the Days of Ayyamul Baydh (13th 14th & 15th) .This is a supplication of high eminence which is reported to have been brought by Angel Jibreel for the Holy Prophet (pbuh) when he was engrossed in prayers in Maqam-e-Ibrahim. Kafa'ami has reported this supplication in Baladul Amin and in Misbah. It is mentioned by him that the reward for the one reciting it during the Ayyam al-bidh ( i.e. on 13th, 14th & 15th day) of the Holy month of Ramadan, is that his sins are forgiven even if they are in such plenty as the drops of rain water, leaves of trees or sand of a desert. It is also very effective for the cure of the sick, fulfillment of debts, acquisition of wealth and relief from grief.

Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Most High!
Exalted are You. O Supreme!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Friend!
Exalted are You. O Master!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Resolute!
Exalted are You. O Foremost Creator!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Mortifying!
Exalted are You. O Deliverer!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Who throws down!
Exalted are You. O Gatherer!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Who does Honor!
Exalted are You. O Subduer!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Guardian!
Exalted are You. O Defending Administrator!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Capable Power!
Exalted are You. O Impenetrable!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Wise!
Exalted are You. O Forbearing!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Authority!
Exalted are You. O All-wise!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Liberal Giver!
Exalted are You. O Preventer!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Who brings about distress!
Exalted are You. O Who allows gains!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Who comes to help!
Exalted are You. O Reckoner!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Just!
Exalted are You. O Distinguisher!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Subtle!
Exalted are You. O Noble!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Lord!
Exalted are You. O Truth!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Splendid!
Exalted are You. O Author!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Granter of amnesty!
Exalted are You. O Avenger!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Bountiful!
Exalted are You. O Plentiful!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Clement!
Exalted are You. O Affectionate!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Alone!
Exalted are You. O Single!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Over-Seer!
Exalted are You. O Who surrounds everything!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Protecting Advocate!
Exalted are You. O Justice!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Manifest!
Exalted are You. O Persevering!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Benign!
Exalted are You. O Beloved One!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Who guides on the right path!
Exalted are You. O Who leads on to the true path!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Light!
Exalted are You. O Illuminator!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Ally!
Exalted are You. O Helper!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Patient!
Exalted are You. O Enduring!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Who takes away!
Exalted are You. O Who brings about!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Glorious!
Exalted are You. O Requiter!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Who gives help!
Exalted are You. O Who is called for help!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Splitter!
Exalted are You. O Ever-Present!
Keep us safe from the everlasting fire O Giver of Refuge!
Glory be to You. O Lord of Honor and Grace, invoked for blessings.
O Lord of Might and Majesty, Glory be to You.
There is no god but You.
“Glory be to You. Verily, I have been a wrongdoer.”

segments.transliteration: fastajabna lahu wa najjaynahu mina alghammi

translation.en: “So We heard his prayer and saved him from the anguish
Thus We save believers.”

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ أَجْمَعِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu `ala sayyidina muhammadin wa alihi ajma`ina

translation.en: Blessings of Allah be on our chief, Muhammad and his Household, one and all.
(All) praise be to Allah the Lord of the worlds.

segments.transliteration: wa hasbuna allahu wa ni`ma alwakilu

translation.en: Sufficient for us is Allah. He is the Best Protector.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi al`aliyyi al`azimi

translation.en: There is no power and no might except (with) Allah, the High, the Great.

text.en: The Supplication for saving from deviation.

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: شَهِدَ ٱللَّهُ أَنَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: shahida allahu annahu la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: “Allah bears witness that there is no god but He,
and (so do) the angels and those possessed of knowledge,
maintaining His creation with justice;

segments.arabic: لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa huwa al`azizu alhakimu

translation.en: there is no god but He, the Mighty, the Wise.
Surely, the (true) religion with Allah is Islam.”
I am the slave—feeble, sinful,
disobedient, needy, and ignoble—
I testify to my Benefactor, Creator,
Provider of me with my sustenance, and my Honorer,
as same as He has testified to Himself
and the angels have testified to Him
so have those possessed with knowledge amongst His servants
that there is no god save Him
the Lord of bounties, favors,
generosity, and kindness.
He is Omnipotent, Eternal,
All-knowing, Everlasting,
Ever-living, One and Only,
Self-existent, Endless,
All-hearing, All-Seeing,
Willing, Discriminating,
All-aware, and eternally Besought of all.
He is worthy of all these attributes,

segments.arabic: وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ مَا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ فِي عِزِّ صِفَاتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa huwa `ala ma huwa `alayhi fi `izzi sifatihi

translation.en: and He, characterized by all these sublime attributes,

segments.arabic: كَانَ قَوْيّاً قَبْلَ وُجُودِ ٱلْقُدْرَةِ وَٱلْقُوَّةِ
segments.transliteration: kana qawiyyan qabla wujudi alqudrati walquwwati

translation.en: was All-powerful prior to the existence of might and power,

segments.arabic: وَكَانَ عَلِيماً قَبْلَ إِيجَادِ ٱلْعِلْمِ وَٱلْعِلَّةِ
segments.transliteration: wa kana `aliman qabla ijadi al`ilmi wal`illati

translation.en: and All-knowing before the origination of knowledge and reason.

segments.arabic: لَمْ يَزَلْ سُلْطَاناً إِذْ لاَ مَمْلَكَةَ وَلاَ مَالَ
segments.transliteration: lam yazal sultanan idh la mamlakata wa la mala

translation.en: He has been always Authority when there was neither sovereignty nor wealth.

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَزَلْ سُبْحَاناً عَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ ٱلأَحْوَاِل
segments.transliteration: wa lam yazal subhanan `ala jami`i al-ahwali

translation.en: He has been always Glorious under all circumstances.

segments.arabic: وُجُودُهُ قَبْلَ ٱلْقَبْلِ فِي أَزَلِ ٱلآزَاِل
segments.transliteration: wujuduhu qabla alqabli fi azali al-azali

translation.en: His Being is before all precedence in the pre-eternity of sempiternity.

segments.arabic: وَبَقَاؤُهُ بَعْدَ ٱلْبَعْدِ مِنْ غَيْرِ ٱنتِقَالٍ وَلاَ زَوَالٍ
segments.transliteration: wa baqa'uhu ba`da alba`di min ghayri intiqalin wa la zawalin

translation.en: His Remaining will be after all endings without any extinction or disappearance.
He is self-Sufficient at the beginning and at the end
and All-independent inwardly and outwardly.
There is no injustice in His judgment,
nor is there unfairness in His management,
nor is there unfairness in His administration,
nor is there any escape from His sovereignty,
nor is there any shelter against His firm grip,
nor is there any salvation from His punishment.
His mercy overtakes His Wrath.

segments.transliteration: wa la yafutuhu ahadun idha talabahu

translation.en: None can escape Him when He summons.
He covers all logics for His obligatory decrees,

segments.transliteration: wa sawwa alttawfiqa bayna aldda`ifi walshsharifi

translation.en: treats absolutely equally the weak and the noble,
makes capable to carry out His commands,
and makes easy to abstain from His prohibitions.

segments.arabic: لَمْ يُكَلِّفِ ٱلطَّاعَةَ إِلاَّ دُونَ ٱلْوُسْعِ وَٱلطَّاقَةِ
segments.transliteration: lam yukallif altta`ata illa duna alwus`i walttaqati

translation.en: He does not make obedience a burden but according to one's real capacity.
All glory be to Him! How manifest His generosity is!
How sublime His standing is!
All glory be to Him! How magnificent to seek Him is!
How splendid His favors are!
He has sent the Prophets in order to show His justice,

segments.transliteration: wa nasaba al-awsya'a liyuzhira tawlahu wa fadlahu

translation.en: and appointed successors [for the Prophets] in order to make known His munificence and grace.

segments.transliteration: wa ja`alana min ummati sayyidi al-anbya'i

translation.en: He has made us of the community of the Chief of Prophets,
the most favorable of His saints,
the best of His elite ones,
and the most sublime of the pure ones;

segments.arabic: مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَسَلَّمَ
segments.transliteration: muhammadin salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi wa sallama

translation.en: that is Muhammad, may Allah send blessings and benedictions upon him and his Household.

segments.transliteration: amanna bihi wa bima da`ana ilayhi

translation.en: We thus believe in him, in all that to which he has called us,
in the Qur'an which He revealed to him,

segments.transliteration: wa biwasiyyihi alladhi nasabahu yawma alghadiri

translation.en: and in his Successor whom he appointed on the Ghadir Day
and to whom he referred by saying, “This is `Ali.”
I also bear witness that the Imams—the pious
and benign vicegerents [of Allah]
after the Chosen Prophet are:
`Ali, the subduer of the infidels.

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ بَعْدِهِ سَيِّدُ أَوْلاَدِهِ ٱلْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ
segments.transliteration: wa min ba`dihi sayyidu awladihi alhasanu ibnu `aliyyin

translation.en: Following him is the chief of his sons, al-Hasan, the son of `Ali.

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ أَخُوهُ ٱلسِّبْطُ ٱلتَّابِعُ لِمَرْضَاةِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْحُسَيْنُ
segments.transliteration: thumma akhuhu alssibtu alttabi`u limardati allahi alhusaynu

translation.en: Then comes his brother, the grandson and seeker of Allah’s pleasure; al-Husayn.
Then comes `Ali, the [distinctive] worshipper [of Allah].
Then comes the Cleaver (of knowledge), Muhammad.
Then comes the veracious Ja`far.
Then comes the suppressor of rage, Musa.
Then comes the pleased, `Ali.
Then comes the pious, Muhammad.
Then comes the refined, `Ali.
Then comes the pure resident of `Askar, al-Hasan.
Then comes the Argument, Successor, Assumer,
Awaited, Well-guided, and Expected
on account of whose existence, this world is kept in existence,
on account of whose blessing, the created beings are provided sustenance,
and on account of whose existence, the earth and the sky are kept in firmness.

segments.arabic: وَبِهِ يَمْلَأُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلأَرْضَ قِسْطاً وَعَدْلاً
segments.transliteration: wa bihi yamla'u allahu al-arda qistan wa `adlan

translation.en: Through him, Allah shall fill the earth with equity and justice
after it will be filled with inequity and injustice.
I also bear witness that their words are decisive arguments,
to comply with their orders is obligatory,
the obedience to them is commissioned [by Allah],
to love them is necessary and pre-ordained,
and to pattern after them will definitely achieve salvation,
but to oppose them will definitely bring about destruction.

segments.transliteration: wa hum sadatu ahli aljannati ajma`ina

translation.en: They are, moreover, the chiefs of all the inhabitants of Paradise,
the interceders on the Judgment Day,
and, undoubtedly, the leaders of the inhabitants of the earth,
and the best of the satisfied Successors [of the Prophets].
I also bear witness that death is certain,
the interrogation in the grave is certain,
the raising of the dead is certain,
the final assemblage is certain,
the Discriminating Bridge is certain,
the Scales [of deeds] is certain,
the calling into account is certain,
the record book [of deeds] is certain,
Paradise is certain,
Hellfire is certain,

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ آتِيَةٌ لاَ رَيْبَ فِيهَا
segments.transliteration: wa anna alssa`ata atiyatun la rayba fiha

translation.en: the Hour [of resurrection] will certainly come, without any dispute,

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَبْعَثُ مَنْ فِي ٱلْقُبُورِ
segments.transliteration: wa anna allaha yab`athu man fi alquburi

translation.en: and Allah shall raise up those who are in graves.
O Allah, in Your favor do I put my hope,
Your generosity and mercy do I expect confidently,

segments.arabic: لاَ عَمَلَ لِي أَسْتَحِقُّ بِهِ ٱلْجَنَّةَ

translation.en: I have no single deed by which I deserve Paradise,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ طَاعَةَ لِي أَسْتَوْجِبُ بِهَا ٱلرِّضْوَانَ
segments.transliteration: wa la ta`ata li astawjibu biha alrridwana

translation.en: nor do I have any act of obedience [to You] due to which I deserve Your pleasure;
except that I believe in Your Oneness and Your Justice
and I hope for Your benevolence and Your favor.

segments.arabic: وَتَشَفَّعْتُ إِلَيْكَ بِٱلنَّبِيِّ وَآلِهِ مِنْ أَحِبَّتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa tashaffa`tu ilayka bilnnabiyyi wa alihi min ahibbatika

translation.en: I thus seek the Prophet and his Household, Your most-beloved ones, to intercede for me before You;
and You are verily the most Generous of all those who treat generously
and the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.
May Allah send blessings to Our Prophet, Muhammad
and upon all of his Household,
the pure and immaculate,
and send upon them many many benedictions.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi al`aliyyi al`azimi

translation.en: There is no might and no power except with Allah, the All-high, the All-great.
O Allah! O most Merciful of all those who show mercy,

segments.arabic: إِنِّي أَوْدَعْتُكَ يَقِينِي هٰذَا وَثَبَاتَ دِينِي
segments.transliteration: inni awda`tuka yaqini hadha wa thabata dini

translation.en: I am depositing with You this faith of mine and my firmness on this belief;
and You are the ever-best of all those who keep deposits.
You have commanded us to keep safe deposits that are put with us;
so, (please) keep for me this deposit to give it back to me at the time of my death
and at the time of the interrogation of Munkar and Nakir;
[I beseech You] in the name of Your mercy; O most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ ٱلعَدِيلَةِ عِنْدَ ٱلْمَوْتِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni a`udhu bika mina al`adilati `inda almawti

translation.en: O Allah, I seek Your protection against deviation at the hour of death.

text.en: Dua Iftitah
To be recited each night
Du' al-Iftitah was taught by the Imam Mahdi (may Allah hasten his appearance) to recite every night during the month Ramadhan.
The Du'a is excellent for molding man's attitude towards his Creator, as it discusses many aspects of the wretchedness of the human being, and the grace of Allah (swt).

translation.en: O Allah, I begin the glorification of You with praising You
and You always guide us to the right out of Your favors upon us.

segments.transliteration: wa ayqantu annaka anta arhamu alrrahimina

translation.en: I am certain that You are the most Merciful of all those who show mercy
in situations of pardon and mercy,
the harshest in punishments
in situations of giving exemplary punishment and chastisement (to the wrongdoers),
and the greatest Omnipotent
in the domain of absolute power and might.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ اذِنْتَ لِي فِي دُعَائِكَ وَمَسْالَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma adhinta li fi du`a'ika wa mas'alatika

translation.en: O Allah, You have permitted me to pray and beseech You.
So, listen, O All-hearer, to my words of praise,
reply my prayer, O All-merciful,
and overlook my slips, O Oft-Forgiving.

segments.arabic: فَكَمْ يَا إِلٰهِي مِنْ كُرْبَةٍ قَدْ فَرَّجْتَهَا
segments.transliteration: fakam ya ilahi min kurbatin qad farrajtaha

translation.en: You, O my God, have relieved so many of my grievances,
dispelled so many of my sorrows,
overlooked so many of my slips,
spread over me many of Your mercies,
and unlocked so many rings of misfortunes (in which I was detained).

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لَمْ يَتَّخِذْ صَاحِبَةً وَلاَ وَلَداً
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi lam yattakhidh sahibatan wa la waladan

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has not betaken wife or son,

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ شَرِيكٌ فِي ٱلْمُلْكِ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu sharikun fi almulki

translation.en: Who has no partner in the sovereignty

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ وَلِيٌّ مِنَ ٱلذُّلِّ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu waliyyun min aldhdhulli
