translation.en: nor does He have any protecting friend through dependence.
And Magnify Him with all magnificence.
All praise be to Allah with full gratitude
for all His bounties.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ مُضَادَّ لَهُ فِي مُلْكِهِ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi la mudadda lahu fi mulkihi

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has no opposition in His rule

segments.transliteration: wa la munazi`a lahu fi amrihi

translation.en: nor there is any challenge to His commands.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ فِي خَلْقِهِ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi la sharika lahu fi khalqihi

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has no counsel to meddle with His operation of creation
nor there is anything similar to Him in His greatness.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلْفَاشِي فِي ٱلْخَلْقِ امْرُهُ وَحَمْدُهُ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alfashi fi alkhalqi amruhu wa hamduhu

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Whose commandments and praise are active in the creation,
His glory is evident through His kindness,
His distinct overflowing generosity is freely available,
His unlimited bestowals do not exhaust,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَزِيدُهُ كَثْرَةُ ٱلْعَطَاءِ إِلاَّ جُوداً وَكَرَماً
segments.transliteration: wa la taziduhu kathratu al`ata'i illa judan wa karaman

translation.en: and Whose opulent bestowals increase Him nothing but magnanimity and generosity.
Verily He is Mighty, Abundantly Giver.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اسْالُكَ قَلِيلاً مِنْ كَثِيرٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka qalilan min kathirin

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You for little from the much,
along with my great need for it
and Your needlessness for it is since eternity.
For me, it is so big
but for You, it is effortless and easy.
O Allah, as You pardon my sins,
overlook my mistakes,
take a lenient view of my disorderly conduct,
cover up my hideous actions,
and treat my numerous offenses with forbearance,

segments.arabic: عِنْدَ مَا كَانَ مِنْ خَطَإِي وَعَمْدِي

translation.en: which I have committed mistakenly and willfully—

segments.arabic: اطْمَعَنِي فِي انْ اسْالَكَ مَا لاَ اسْتَوْجِبُهُ مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: atma`ani fi an as'alaka ma la astawjibuhu minka

translation.en: all that tempted me to ask for that which I do not deserve from You,
that is You may grant me part of Your mercy,
show me part of Your all-powerfulness,
and show me signals of Your response to me.
So, I am now supplicating You with security
and beseeching You with entertainment
neither afraid nor fearful,

segments.arabic: مُدِلاًّ عَلَيْكَ فِيمَا قَصَدْتُ فِيهِ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: mudillan `alayka fi ma qasadtu fihi ilayka

translation.en: insisting on You in that which I face to You.
But when Your response delayed, I, out of my ignorance, would blame You

segments.arabic: وَلَعَلَّ ٱلَّذِي ابْطَاعَنِّي هُوَ خَيْرٌ لِي
segments.transliteration: wa la`alla alladhi abta'a `anni huwa khayrun li

translation.en: although perhaps slowing down may be a blessing in disguise,
because You alone know the consequences of all matters.
So, I have never seen such a noble Master

segments.arabic: اصْبَرَ عَلَىٰ عَبْدٍ لَئِيمٍ مِنْكَ عَلَيَّ

translation.en: more accommodating to such a dissatisfied servant than You are to me.

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ إِنَّكَ تَدْعُونِي فَاوَلِّي عَنْكَ

translation.en: O Lord! You give an invitation but I turn down,
You become familiar with me but I do not care for You,

segments.transliteration: wa tatawaddadu ilayya fala aqbalu minka

translation.en: and You show affection to me but I do not correspond to You,
as if You are overreaching me!

segments.arabic: فَلَمْ يَمْنَعْكَ ذٰلِكَ مِنَ ٱلرَّحْمَةِ لِي
segments.transliteration: falam yamna`ka dhalika min alrrahmati li

translation.en: Yet, all that have not stopped You from having mercy upon me,
doing favors to me,
and blessing me out of Your magnanimity and generosity.
So, (please) have mercy on Your ignorant servant
and bestow upon him with the favors of Your beneficence.
Verily, You are All-magnanimous and All-generous.
All praise be to Allah: the Lord of the sovereignty,
Who allows arks to flow [on seas],
Who controls the winds,
Who causes the day to break,
Who administers the authority,
and Who is the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ عَلَىٰ حِلْمِهِ بَعْدَ عِلْمِهِ

translation.en: All praise be to Allah for His indulgence although He has full acquaintance with all things.

segments.arabic: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ عَلَىٰ عَفْوِهِ بَعْدَ قُدْرَتِهِ

translation.en: All praise be to Allah for His amnesty although He has full power over all things.

segments.arabic: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ عَلَىٰ طُولِ انَاتِهِ فِي غَضَبِهِ
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi `ala tuli anatihi fi ghadabihi

translation.en: All praise be to Allah for the respite that He allows in spite of provocation.
He is able to do whatever He wills.
All praise be to Allah, the Creator of all created beings,
Who makes sustenance freely available,
Who starts the day,
Who is the Owner of glory, might,
favors and bounties;
and Who is so far away that none can ever see Him
and, in the same time, He is so nigh that He is fully aware of even the whispering secrets.
Blessed and Exalted be He.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لَيْسَ لَهُ مُنَازِعٌ يُعَادِلُهُ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi laysa lahu munazi`un yu`adiluhu

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has no equal to challenge Him,
nor is there an image comparable to Him,
nor is there a helper to assist Him.
He tames the powerful by His force,
and disgraced are the great ones before His Greatness.
So, He, through His power, fulfills that which He wills.

segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi yujibuni hina unadihi

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who gives answer to me whenever I call Him,

segments.arabic: وَيَسْتُرُ عَلَيَّ كُلَّ عَوْرَةٍ وَانَا اعْصِيهِ
segments.transliteration: wa yasturu `alayya kulla `awratin wa ana a`sihi

translation.en: covers up my shortcomings, yet I disobey Him,
and gives me the largest part of bounties, yet I do not show him gratitude.

segments.arabic: فَكَمْ مِنْ مَوْهِبَةٍ هَنِيئَةٍ قَدْ اعْطَانِي
segments.transliteration: fakam min mawhibatin hani'atin qad a`tani

translation.en: Many an auspicious favor had He given me,
many a terrible danger had He turned off,
and many a blossoming joy had He made available for me.
Therefore, I praise Him with thankfulness
and mention Him with exaltation.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يُهْتَكُ حِجَابُهُ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi la yuhtaku hijabuhu

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Whose screen cannot be penetrated,
Whose door is not blocked,
Whose beseecher is not rejected,
and one who hopes Him is not disappointed.
All praise be to Allah Who secures the frightened ones,
comes to the help of the upright ones,
promotes the cause of the weak ones,
annihilates the autocrats,

segments.transliteration: wa yuhliku mulukan wa yastakhlifu akharina

translation.en: destroys rulers, and appoints others instead.
All praise be to Allah; the Eradicator of the tyrants,
the Terminator of the unjust ones,
the Catcher of the fugitives,
the Punisher of the unjust ones,
the Aide of the aid-seekers,
the Settler of the needs of the beseechers,
and the support of the faithful believers.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي مِنْ خَشْيَتِهِ تَرْعُدُ ٱلسَّمَاءُ وَسُكَّانُهَا
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi min khashyatihi tar`udu alssama'u wa sukkanuha

translation.en: All praise be to Allah! In His awe-inspiring fear the heavens and its dwellers tremble and shiver,
the earth and its inhabitants shake and quiver,

segments.arabic: وَتَمُوجُ ٱلْبِحَارُ وَمَنْ يَسْبَحُ فِي غَمَرَاتِهَا
segments.transliteration: wa tamuju albiharu wa man yasbahu fi ghamaratiha

translation.en: and the oceans and all that which float and swim in their waters flow together in excitement and tumult.
All praise be to Allah Who has guided us to this.

segments.arabic: وَمَا كُنَّا لِنَهْتَدِيَ لَوْلاَ انْ هَدَانَا ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: wa ma kunna linahtadiya lawla an hadana allahu

translation.en: We could not truly have been led aright if Allah had not guided us.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي يَخْلُقُ وَلَمْ يُخْلَقْ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi yakhluqu wa lam yukhlaq

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who creates but He is not created,
gives subsistence but He needs no provisions,
feeds but He takes no nourishment,
causes the living to die,
and brings the dead to life,
but He is the Ever-living Who never dies.
In His hands is all the good
and He is able to do all things.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَرَسُولِكَ

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad; Your servant, Messenger,

segments.transliteration: wa aminika wa safiyyika wa habibika

translation.en: confidant, friend, beloved intimate,
the choicest of Your created beings,
the bearer of Your sacraments,
and the conveyor of Your messages,
with the most superior, the most exquisite, the most handsomer,

segments.transliteration: wa akmala wa azka wa anma

translation.en: the most perfect, the most upright, the most prospering,

segments.transliteration: wa atyaba wa athara wa asna

translation.en: the most pleasant, the most thoroughly purified, the most sublime,

segments.transliteration: wa akthara ma sallayta wa barakta

translation.en: the most and the best blessings, advantages,
mercies, affections,

segments.arabic: وَسَلَّمْتَ عَلَىٰ احَدٍ مِنْ عِبَادِكَ وَانْبِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa sallamta `ala ahadin min `ibadika wa anbiya'ika

translation.en: and salutations that You have ever bestowed upon anyone of Your servants, Prophets,
Messengers, choicest people,
and those honored by You from among Your created beings.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَلِيٍّ امِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to `Ali; the Commander of the Believers,
the successor of the Messenger of the Lord of the worlds,
Your servant, Your beloved representative, the brother of Your Messenger,
Your decisive argument over the mankind,
Your most important sign,
and the great news (from You).
(Please do) send blessings to the truthful and pure Lady,
Fatimah; the Doyenne of the women of the world.
(Please do) send blessings to the sons of ‘the mercy to the worlds’
and the two leaders of true guidance;
al-Hasan and al-Husayn,
the two Chiefs of the dwellers of Paradise.
(Please do) send blessings to the leaders of the Muslims;
`Ali bin al-Husayn,
Muhammad bin `Ali,
Ja`far bin Muhammad,
Musa bin Ja`far,
`Ali bin Musa,
Muhammad bin `Ali,
`Ali bin Muhammad,
al-Hasan bin `Ali,
and the successor, the guide, and the rightly guided:
(Those Imams are) Your decisive arguments over Your servants
and Your trustworthy confidants in Your lands
with blessings that are numerous and non-stop.
O Allah, (please do) send blessings to the custodian of Your commandments,
the vigilant guardian, the reliable patron,
and the awaited establisher of justice.
And (please) surround him with Your favorite angels
and assist him with the Holy Spirit.
O Lord of the worlds!
O Allah, (please) choose him to be the caller to Your Book
and the establisher of Your religion;
make him succeed in the earth
as You caused those who were before him to succeed,

segments.arabic: مَكِّنْ لَهُ دِينَهُ ٱلَّذِي ٱرْتَضَيْتَهُ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: makkin lahu dinahu alladhi irtadaytahu lahu

translation.en: establish for him his faith which You have approved for him,
and give him in exchange safety after the fear.
He serves You. He ascribes nothing as partner to You.
O Allah, (please) grant him power, make him the source of power,
grant him support, make him the means of Your victory,
help him with a mighty help,
make him prevail over all with easiness,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ لَهُ مِنْ لَدُنْكَ سُلْطَاناً نَصِيراً
segments.transliteration: waj`al lahu min ladunka sultanan nasiran

translation.en: and delegate him Your controlling authority.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ اظْهِرْ بِهِ دِينَكَ وَسُنَّةَ نَبِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma azhir bihi dinaka wa sunnata nabiyyika

translation.en: O Allah, (please) make prevalent Your religion and the norms of Your Prophet through him

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ لاَ يَسْتَخْفِيَ بِشَيْءٍ مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ
segments.transliteration: hatta la yastakhfiya bishay'in min alhaqqi

translation.en: so that he will not have to hide any item of truth
for fear of any of the creatures.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَرْغَبُ إِلَيْكَ فِي دَوْلَةٍ كَرِيمَةٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna narghabu ilayka fi dawlatin karimatin

translation.en: O Allah, we ardently desire that You confer upon us a respectful government
through which You may give might to Islam and its followers,

segments.transliteration: wa tudhillu biha alnnifaqa wa ahlahu

translation.en: humiliate hypocrisy and its people,

segments.arabic: وَتَجْعَلُنَا فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلدُّعَاةِ إِلَىٰ طَاعَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa taj`aluna fiha min alddu`ati ila ta`atika

translation.en: and include us among those who invite people to the obedience to You and
and lead them to Your approved path.

segments.transliteration: wa tarzuquna biha karamata alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: Give us the good of this world and the world to come.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ مَا عَرَّفْتَنَا مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ فَحَمِّلْنَاهُ

translation.en: O Allah, let us bear out that which You make known to us as the truth
and let us attain that which we fall short to do.
O Allah, through him, set in order our disorder,
gather and unite our flock,
stitch together our ripped open separation,
increase our few numbers,
lift us up from our degradation,
grant wealth to the needy among us,
pull us out from our debts,
set up our poverty,
fill the gap of confusion among us,
make easy all difficulties we may face,
refine our substance and style,
release us from captivity,
make successful our applications,
fulfill Your promises to us,
give answer to our prayers,
respond to our requests,

segments.arabic: وَبَلِّغْنَا بِهِ مِنَ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ آمَالَنَا
segments.transliteration: wa ballighna bihi min alddunya wal-akhirati amalana

translation.en: make us attain our hopes in this world as well as the world to come,
and grant us beyond our wishes.
O Most Favorable of all those whom may be besought
and Most magnanimous of all those who may grant requests!
Through him, heal our breasts,
remove the rage of our hearts,

segments.arabic: وَٱهْدِنَا بِهِ لِمَا ٱخْتُلِفَ فِيهِ مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ بِإِذْنِكَ
segments.transliteration: wahdina bihi lima ukhtulifa fihi min alhaqqi bi'idhnika

translation.en: and in the event of dispute in the matter of truth, show us the right path.

segments.arabic: إِنَّكَ تَهْدِي مَنْ تَشَاءُ إِلَىٰ صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ
segments.transliteration: innaka tahdi man tasha'u ila siratin mustaqimin

translation.en: Verily, You guide whosoever You will to the Right Path.
Grant us victory over Your and our enemy.
O God of Truth, respond to us!
O Allah, we complain to You
about the departure of our Prophet, Your blessings be on him and on his Household,
the absence of our leader,
the big numbers of our enemies,
the few number of us,
widespread disorder,
and vicissitudes of time against us.
So, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and his Household

segments.arabic: وَاعِنَّا عَلَىٰ ذٰلِكَ بِفَتْحٍ مِنْكَ تُعَجِّلُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa a`inna `ala dhalika bifathin minka tu`ajjiluhu

translation.en: and help us overcome all that through victory from You that You expedite,
through relieving us from our injuries,
through Your help that You confirm,
through bringing in the rule of justice and fair-play,
through mercy that You expand over us,
and through good health that You cover us with,
in the name of Your mercy, O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

text.en: Imam `Ali Amir al-Mu'minin (`a) said, “The Messenger of Allah (`a) taught me this supplication and ordered me to say it under all circumstances—sorrow and joy.

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful
All praise is due to Allah.
There is no god but He,
the True, Manifest King.
He is the Administrator without any minister
and without consultation with any of his slaves.
He is the First Who cannot be described.
He is Eternal after the annihilation of all creatures.
He is the greatest Cherisher,
the Light of the heavens and the earth
and their Creator and Maker out of nothing.
He created both of them and separated them with a proper separation;
the heavens hence became stable in obedience to His command
and the earths became fixed on the surface of the water with their pegs.

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ عَلاَ رَبُّنَا فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ ٱلْعُلَىٰ

translation.en: Then, our Lord subdued the high heavens,
the All-beneficent, ruled from the Throne.

segments.transliteration: lahu ma fi alssamawati wa ma fi al-ardi

translation.en: Everything that is in the heavens and in the earth,

segments.transliteration: wa ma baynahuma wa ma tahta alththara

translation.en: and in between them and what is below the earth belongs to Him.
So, I bear witness that You are verily Allah;
there is none to elevate what You may lower,
none to lower what You may elevate,
no one to exalt him whom You leave in disgrace,
no one to bring into disgrace him whom You exalt,
no one to prevent him upon whom You bestow Your favor,
and no one to bestow anything which You may withhold.

segments.transliteration: wa anta allahu la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: You are Allah, there is no god but You;

segments.arabic: كُنْتَ إِذْ لَمْ تَكُنْ سَمَاءٌ مَبْنِيَّةً
segments.transliteration: kunta idh lam takun sama'un mabniyyatun

translation.en: You existed when there was neither stable sky,
nor broad earth,
nor brilliant sun,
nor dark night,
nor bright day
nor vast ocean,
nor stable mountain,
nor revolving planet,
nor luminous moon,
nor blowing wind,
nor raining cloud,
nor flashing lightning,
nor praising thunder,
nor breathing soul,
nor flying bird,
nor blazing fire,
nor flowing water.
You existed before the existence of all things,
You created everything,
had power over everything,
and originated everything.
You enriched some and reduced others to poverty,
caused some to die and brought others to life,
and made some laugh and others weep.
Verily, You rule from the Throne.
Blessed and Exalted be You, O Allah.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ اللّٰهُ الَّذِى لَاإِلٰهَ إِلّا أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: anta allahu alladhi la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: You are Allah save Whom there is no god;
the Creator and Supporter.
Your Decree is overpowering,
Your Knowledge is operative,
Your strategy is wonderful,
Your promise is fulfilled,
Your saying is true,
Your judgment is fair,
Your words are right guidance,
Your Revelation is light,
Your mercy is all-inclusive,
Your forgiveness is superb,
Your grace is excessive,
Your gift is most abundant,
Your cord is strong,
Your ability is ever ready,
Your protégé is supported,
Your prowess is strong,
and Your stratagem is entrapping.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ يَا رَبِّ مَوْضِعُ كُلِّ شَكْوىٰ
segments.transliteration: anta ya rabbi mawdi`u kulli shakwa

translation.en: You, O my Lord, are the target of all complaints,
the present in all gatherings,
the witness of all confidential talks,
the ultimate goal of all requests,
the expeller of all sorrows,
the affluence of every needy,
the stronghold for every refugee,
the security of every fearful,
the shield of the weak,
the treasure for the indigent,
the destroyer of grief,
and the helper of the righteous.

segments.arabic: ذٰلِكَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّنَا لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: dhalika allahu rabbuna la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: Such is Allah, our Lord. There is no god but He.

segments.arabic: تَكْفِي مِنْ عِبَادِكَ مَنْ تَوَكَّلَ عَلَيْكَ

translation.en: You satisfy such of Your slaves as trust in You.

segments.arabic: وَأَنتَ جَارُ مَنْ لاَذَ بِكَ وَتَضَرَّعَ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa anta jaru man ladha bika wa tadarra`a ilayka

translation.en: You are the protector of him who has recourse to You and implore You,
the haven of him who seeks Your haven,
the supporter of him who looks up to You support,
the forgiver of sins of him who begs Your forgiveness,
the Compeller of the tyrants,
the Most Grand of the grand,
the Most Great of the great,
the Master of masters,
the Lord of lords,
the Succor of the grieved,
the Reliever of the aggrieved,
the Responder to the calls of the distressed,
the most hearing of the hearers,
the most-seeing of all observers,
the justest of all judges,
the quickest in reckoning,
the most merciful of all the merciful,
the best of all forgivers,
the satisfier of the needs of the faithful,
and the succorer of the righteous.

segments.transliteration: anta allahu la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: You are Allah, there is no god but You,
the Lord of the worlds.
You are the Creator and I am a creature,

segments.transliteration: wa anta almaliku wa ana almamluku

translation.en: You are the Master and I am a servant,

segments.transliteration: wa anta alrrabbu wa ana al`abdu

translation.en: You are the Lord and I am a slave,

segments.transliteration: wa anta alrraziqu wa ana almarzuqu

translation.en: You are the Provider while I am provided with sustenance,

segments.transliteration: wa anta almu`ti wa ana alssa'ilu

translation.en: You are the Giver while I am a beggar,

segments.transliteration: wa anta aljawadu wa ana albakhilu

translation.en: You are the Generous while I am a miser,

segments.transliteration: wa anta alqawiyyu wa ana aldda`ifu

translation.en: You are the Mighty while I am weak,

segments.transliteration: wa anta al`azizu wa ana aldhdhalilu

translation.en: You are the Noble while I am humble,

segments.transliteration: wa anta alghaniyyu wa ana alfaqiru

translation.en: You are the Independent while I am needy,

segments.transliteration: wa anta alssayyidu wa ana al`abdu

translation.en: You are the Master while I am slave,

segments.transliteration: wa anta alghafiru wa ana almusi'u

translation.en: You are the Forgiver of sins while I am sinful,

segments.transliteration: wa anta al`alimu wa ana aljahilu

translation.en: You are the Omniscient while I am ignorant,

segments.transliteration: wa anta alhalimu wa ana al`ajulu

translation.en: You are the forbearing while I am hasty,

segments.transliteration: wa anta alrrahmanu wa ana almarhumu

translation.en: You are the All-Merciful and I lack mercy,

segments.transliteration: wa anta almu`afi wa ana almubtala

translation.en: You are the Healer but I am involved in suffering,

segments.transliteration: wa anta almujibu wa ana almudtarru

translation.en: and You are the Responder and I am the distressed.

segments.arabic: وَ أَنَا أَشْهَدُ بِأَنَّكَ أَنْتَ اللّٰهُ
segments.transliteration: wa ana ash-hadu bi'annaka anta allahu

translation.en: I bear witness that You are verily Allah,
there is no god but You,
You bestow favors upon Your slaves before they beseech them.
I bear witness that You are verily Allah,
the One, the Peerless, the Unique, the Independent, the Single,
and to You is the return.

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّى اللّٰهُ عَلىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ الطَّيِّبِينَ الطَّاهِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu `ala muhammadin wa ahli baytihi alttayyibina alttahirina

translation.en: May the blessings of Allah be upon Muhammad and his Household, the immaculate and pure.
Forgive my sins,
keep my faults concealed,

segments.arabic: وَٱفْتَحْ لِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً وَرِزْقاً وَاسِعاً
segments.transliteration: waftah li min ladunka rahmatan wa rizqan wasi`an

translation.en: and extend to me Your special and bounteous sustenance.
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!
All praise be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.transliteration: wa hasbuna allahu wa ni`ma alwakilu

translation.en: Allah is the Sufficient to us and excellent Protector is He.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi al`aliyyi al`azimi

translation.en: There is neither might nor power but with Allah, the All-high, the All-great.

text.en: استحباب الدعاء به في أول شهر رمضان ، وأما الدعاء به في خصوص ليالي القدر

المذكور في كتابي البلد الأمين والمصباح للكفعمي ، وهو مروي عَن السجاد ، عَن أبيه ، عَن جدّه ، عَن النبيّ صلى الله عليه وعليهم أجمعين ، وقد هبط به جبرئيل على النبي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله وهو في بعض غزواته وعليه جوشن ثقيل آلمه ، فقال : يا محمد ، ربك يقرئك السلام ، ويقول لك : اخلع هذا الجوشن ، واقرأ هذا الدعاء ، فهو أمان لك ولاُمتك ، ثم أطال في ذكر فضله بما لا يسعه المقام. ومن جملة فضلها ان من كتبه على كفنه استحى الله أن يعذّبه بالنّار ، ومن دعا به بنيّة خالصة في أول شهر رمضان رزقه الله تعالى ليلة القدر وخلق له سبعين الف ملك يسبحون الله ويقدسونه وجعل ثوابهم له. ومن دعا به في شهر رمضان ثلاث مرات حرم الله تعالى جسده على النّار ، وأوجب له الجَّنة ، ووكل الله تعالى به ملكين يحفظانه من المعاصي ، وكان في أمان الله طول حياته ، وفي آخر الخبر أنه قال الحسين عليه‌السلام : أوصاني أبي عليٌ بن أبي طالب عليه‌السلام بحفظ هذا الدعاء وتعظيمه ، وأن أكتبه على كفنه ، وأن أعلمه أهلي وأحثهم عليه ، وهو ألف اسم وفيه الاسم الأَعْظَمِ.

segments.arabic: (1) اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَ يَا اللَّهُ

translation.en: O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name: O Allah,
O Most Merciful, O Most Compassionate,
O Most Generous, O Self-Subsisting,
O Greatest, O Eternal,

segments.arabic: يَا عَلِيمُ يَا حَلِيمُ يَا حَكِيمُ

translation.en: O All-Knowing, O Forbearing, O Wise.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Master of Masters,
O Acceptor of prayers,
O Elevator of rank,
O Guardian of good deeds,
O Forgiver of evil deeds,
O Granter of requests,
O Acceptor of repentance,
O Hearer of voices,
O Knower of attributes,
O Repeller of calamities.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Best of forgivers,
O Best of deciders,
O Best of helpers,
O Best of rulers,
O Best of providers,
O Best of inheritors
O Best of praisers,
O Best of rememberers,
O Best of Dischargers,
O Best of benefactors.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, to Whom is all glory and virtue,
O He, to Whom is all might and perfection,
O He, to Whom is all dominion and sublimity,
O He, Who is great above all,
O He, Who creates heavy clouds,
O He, Who is the most powerful,
O He, Who is quick to reckon,
O He, Who metes out the severest punishment,
O He, with Whom is the excellent reward,
O He, with Whom is the Original Book.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, Verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Charitable One, O Benefactor,
O Judge, O Proof,
O Sovereign, O Approver,

segments.arabic: يَا غُفْرَانُ يَا سُبْحَانَُ یَا مُسْتَعَانُ
segments.transliteration: ya ghuf-ranu ya sub-hanu ya mus-ta`aa

translation.en: O Fver, O Elevated One, O Helper,
O Holder of blessings and manifestation.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

segments.arabic: (6) يَا مَن تَوَاضَعَ كُلُّ شَيٍْء لِّعَظَمَتِهِ

translation.en: O He before Whose greatness everything bows,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنِ اسْتَسلَمَ كُلُّ شَيٍْء لِّقُدْرَتِهِ

translation.en: O He before Whose power everything submits,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن ذَلَّ كُلُّ شَيٍْء لِّعِزَّتِهِ

translation.en: O He before Whose might overshadows everything,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَضَعَ كُلُّ شَيٍْء لِّهَيْبَتِهِ

translation.en: O He before Whose awesomeness everything is humbled,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ انْقَادَ كُلُّ شَيٍْء مِّنْ خَشْيَتِهِ

translation.en: O He before Whose fearsomeness everything yields,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن تَشَقَّقَتِ الْجِبَالُ مِن مَّخَافَتِهِ

translation.en: O He before Whose terribleness mountains shake,
O He before Whose command the heavens are raised,
O He through Whose permission in the earths are secured,
O He Whose glory the thunder proclaims,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يَعْتَدِي عَلَى أَهْلِ مَمْلَكَتِهِ

translation.en: O He Who is never cruel to his subjects.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Forgiver of sins,
O Dispeller of tribulations,
O Aim of hopes,
O Giver of abundant gifts,
O Bestower of bounties,
O Provider of creatures,
O Judge of destinies,
O Hearer of complaints,
O Resurrector of creatures,
O Freer of captives.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, to Whom is due all praise and adoration,
O He, Who holds all pride and eminence,
O He, Who holds all honour and rank,
O He, Who makes promises and honours them,
O He, Who pardons and is content,
O He, Who holds all abundance and provides,
O He, Who holds decision and judgement,
O He, Who is glorious and eternal,
O He, Who is liberal and munificent,
O He, Who holds all blessings and bounties,

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Preventer of misfortune, O Repeller of calamities.
O Elevator of rank, O Fashioner,
O Benefiter O Hearer,
O Aggregator, O Intercessor,
O Magnanimous, O Increaser.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Fashioner of every fashioned thing,
O Creator of every created thing,
O Provider for every needy thing,
O Sovereign over all subjects,
O Dispeller of every hardship,
O Comforter of every griever,
O Merciful to every sufferer,
O Helper of everything forsaken,
O Concealer of every blemished thing,
O Shelter for every exile.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Provider in my hardship,
O Source of Hope in my misfortune,
O Companion in my isolation,
O Fellow Traveller in my journey,
O Friend in my ease,
O Rescuer from my trials,
O Guide in my perplexity,
O Resource in my neediness,
O Shelter in my helplessness,
O Deliverer from my fears.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Knower of the unseen,
O Forgiver of sins,
O Concealer of defects,
O Expeller of pain,
O Transformer of the hearts
O Physician of the hearts,
O Illuminator of the hearts,
O Intimate of the hearts,
O Dispeller of anxiety,
O Liberator from grief.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Glorious, O Virtuous,
O Protector, O Patron,
O Guide, O Guarantor,
O Bestower of Wealth, O Bestower of blessings,
O Bestower of strength, O Acceptor of repentance.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Guide of the waylaid,
O Rescuer of those who appeal,
O Helper of those who call,
O Aider of those who call,
O Shelter of the fearful,
O Succourer of the faithful,
O Merciful to the indigent,
O Refuge for the disobedient,
O Forgiver of the sinner,
O Responder to the supplicant

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Master of liberality and beneficence,
O Most gracious and obliging,
O Master of peace and security,
O Most holy and above all defects,
O Master of wisdom and manifestation,
O Master of mercy and satisfaction,
O Master of argument and proof,
O Master of grandeur and sovereignty,
O Master of kindness and succour,
O Master of pardon and forgiveness.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

segments.arabic: (16) يَّا مَنْ هُوَ رَبُّ كُلِّ شَيٍْء
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa rab-bu kul-li shay

translation.en: O He, Who is the Lord over all things,

segments.arabic: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ إِلَهُ كُلِّ شَيٍْء
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa ilhu kul-li shay

translation.en: O He, Who is the Allah of all things,

segments.arabic: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ خَاِلقُ كُلِّ شَيٍْء
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa khaliqu kul-li shay

translation.en: O He, Who is the Creator of all things,

segments.arabic: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ صَانِعُ كُلِّ شَيٍْء
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa saniu' kul-li shay

translation.en: O He. Who is the Fashioner of all things,

segments.arabic: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ قَبْلَ كُلِّ شَيٍْء
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa qab-la kul-li shay

translation.en: O He, Who is the Preceder of all things,

segments.arabic: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ بَعْدَ كُلِّ شَيٍْء
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa ba`a-da kul-li shay

translation.en: O He, Who is the Successor of all things,

segments.arabic: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فَوْقَ كُلِّ شَيٍْء
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa faw-qa kul-li shay

translation.en: O He, Who is above all things,

segments.arabic: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ عَاِلمٌ بِكُلِّ شَيٍْء

translation.en: O He, Who knows all things,

segments.arabic: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ قَادِرٌ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيٍْء
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa qadirun `ala kul-li shay

translation.en: O He, Who is Powerful over all things,

segments.arabic: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ يَبْقَى وَيَفْنَى كُلُّ شَيٍْء
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa yab-qa wa yaf-na kul-lu shay

translation.en: O He, Who is the Sustainer and Extinguisher of all things,

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Securer of safety, O Protector,
O Bestower of being, O Bestower of knowledge,
O Manifester, O Facilitator,
O Provider of place, O Adorner,
O Proclaimer, O Distributor.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

segments.arabic: (18) يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي مُلْكِهِ مُقِيمٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa fe mul-kihi muqem

translation.en: O Everlasting in His Kingdom,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي سُلْطَانِهِ قَدِيمٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa fe sul-tanihi qadem

translation.en: O Eternal in His sovereignty,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي جَلاَلِهِ عَظِيمٌ

translation.en: O Greatest in His grandeur,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ عَلَى عِبَادِهِ رَحِيمٌ

translation.en: O Most Merciful to His servants,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بِكُلِّ شَيٍْء عَلِيمٌ

translation.en: O Knower of everything,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنْ عَصَاهُ حَلِيمٌ

translation.en: O Forbearing to him who disobeys Him,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَن رَّجَاهُ كَرِيمٌ

translation.en: O Magnanimous to him who places his hope in Him,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي صُنْعِهِ حَكِيمٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa fe sun-i`ihi hakem

translation.en: O He Who is Wise over what He has fashioned,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي حِكْمَتِهِ لَطِيفٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa fe hik-matihi latef

translation.en: O He Who is Subtle in his Wisdom,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي لُطْفِهِ قَدِيمٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa fe lut-fihi qadem

translation.en: O He Who is Eternal in His Kindness.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

segments.arabic: (19) يَا مَن لا يُرْجَى إِلاَّ فَضْلُهُ

translation.en: O He, from Whom no hope is entertained save by His Grace ,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يُسْأَلُ إِلاَّ عَفْوُهُ

translation.en: O He, from Whom nothing is begged save His Pardon,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يُنْظَرُ إِلاَّ بِرُّهُ

translation.en: O He, of Whom nothing is seen save His Goodness,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يُخَافُ إِلاَّ عَدْلُهُ

translation.en: O He, from Whom nothing is feared save His Justice,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يَدُومُ إِلاَّ مُلْكُهُ

translation.en: O He, Whose sovereignty alone of eternal,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا سُلْطَانَ إِلاَّ سُلْطَانُهُ

translation.en: O He, Who alone has true majesty,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن وَّسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيٍْء رَّحْمَتُهُ

translation.en: O He, Whose blessings extend to all,
O He, Whose Wrath is surpassed by His Mercy,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ أَحَاطَ بِكُلِّ شَيٍْء عِلْمُهُ
segments.transliteration: ya man ahata bikul-li shay-in i`il-muhu

translation.en: O He, Whose knowledge encompasses everything,
O He, Who is without equal,

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Remover of anxiety,
O Expeller of sorrow,
O Forgiver of sins,
O Acceptor of repentance,
O Creator of creatures,
O Truthful in promises,
O Fulfiller of promises,
O Knower of secrets,
O Splitter of seed,
O Provider for creatures.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O High, O Perfect
O Independent, O Rich,
O Kind, O Agreeable
O Purifier, O Eternal,
O Mighty, O Friend.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Who reveals virtue,
O He, Who conceals vice,
O He Who does not call to severe account for sins,
O He, Who does not disclose the disgrace of his servants,
O He, Who is the best forgiver,
O He, Who overlooks errancy,
O He, Whose forgiveness extends over all.
O He, Whose Hands are stretched forth in mercy,
O He, Who knows all secrets,
O He, to Whom all complaints are directed.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Master of countless blessings,
O Master of limitless mercy,
O Master surpassing all obligation,
O Master of perfect wisdom,
O Master of infinite might,
O Master of the decisive argument,
O Master of the manifest miracle,
O Master of perpetual prestige,
O Master of great strength,
O Master of unsurpassable glory

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Originator of the heavens,
O Maker of darkness,
O Merciful to those who weep,
O He Who oversees slips and errors,
O Concealer of defects,
O Reviver of the dead,
O Revealer of signs,
O Increaser of virtue,
O Who rubs out vices,
O He Who calls to account.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Fashioner, O Preordainer,
O Planner, O Purifier,
O Illuminator, O Facilitator,
O Giver of glad tidings, O Warner,
O Giver of precedence, O Postponer.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Lord of the Sanctuary,
O Lord of the holy month,
O Lord of the Holy City,
O Lord of the Rukn and the Maqam,
O Lord of the Mashair of Mecca,
O Lord of the Holy Mosque in Mecca,
O Lord of what is lawful and what is proscribed,
O Lord of light and darkness,
O Lord of salutation and peace,
O Lord of strength among creatures.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Highest of all authorities,
O Most Just of all the just,
O Most Trustworthy of all the trustworthy,
O Purest of the pure,
O Best of creators,
O Quickest Reckoner,
O Best of listeners,
O Most vigilant of invigilators,
O Best of intercessors,
O Most honourable of all.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

segments.arabic: (28) يَا عِمَادَ مَن لا عِمَادَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Supporter of the unsupported,

segments.arabic: يَا سَنَدَ مَن لا سَنَدَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Helper of the helpless,

segments.arabic: يَا ذُخْرَ مَن لا ذُخْرَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Protector of the unprotected,

segments.arabic: يَا حِرْزَ مَن لا حِرْزَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Shield for the defenseless,

segments.arabic: يَا غِيَاثَ مَن لا غِيَاثَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Hearer of the unheard appeal,

segments.arabic: يَا فَخْرَ مَن لا فَخْرَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Pride of those without pride,

segments.arabic: يَا عِزَّ مَن لا عِزَّ لَهُ

translation.en: O Honour of the honourless,

segments.arabic: يَا مُعِينَ مَن لا مُعِينَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Giver of Aid to the unaided,

segments.arabic: يَا أَنِيسَ مَن لا أَنِيسَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Friend of the forsaken,

segments.arabic: يَا أَمَانَ مَن لا أَمَانَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Shelter of the shelterless.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Protector, O Persistent,
O Eternal, O Merciful,
O Accorder of peace,
O Omniscient, O Distributor,
O Preventer, O Opener.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Protector of he who seeks His protection,
O Merciful to he who requests His mercy,
O Forgiver of the implore His forgiveness,
O Helper of he who asks for His help,
O Protector of he who seeks His protection,
O Magnanimous to he who seeks His magnanimity,
O Guide for he who seeks His guidance,
O Giver of Aid to he who seeks His aid,
O Helper of he who appeals to Him,
O Rescuer of he who appeals to Him,

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Powerful Who is never overpowered,
O Benign Who is invisible,
O Self-Subsistent Who never sleeps,
O Eternal Who never perishes,
O Ever-living Who never dies,
O Monarch Whose rule is endless,
O Eternal Who is imperishable,
O Omniscient Who never forgets,
O Independent Who needs no sustenance,
O Mighty Who never weakens.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Unique, O One,
O Present, O Praiser,
O Exalted, O Guide,
O Resurrector, O Heir,
O Harmful to the unjust, O Beneficial to the just.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Grandest of all the grand,
O Most Magnanimous of all the magnanimous,
O Most Merciful of all the merciful,
O Most Knowledgeable of all knowers,
O Most Wise of all the wise,
O Most Ancient of all the ancient,
O Most Great of all the great,
O Most Benign of all the benign,
O Most Magnificent of all the magnificent,
O Most Mighty of all the mighty.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Most Magnanimous in overlooking sins,
O Greatest Benefactor,
O Most Bounteous in goodness,
O Eternal in grace,
O Eternal in subtlety,
O Creator of subtlety,
O Remover of pain,
O Healer of injury,
O Master of dominion,
O True Judge.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

segments.arabic: (35) يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عَهْدِهِ وَفِيٌّ

translation.en: O He Who fulfils His promise,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي وَفَائِهِ قَوِيٌّ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa fe wafa-ihi qawe

translation.en: O He Who is Strong in His fulfillment,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي قُوَّتِهِ عَلِيٌّ

translation.en: O He Who is great in His might,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عُلُوُّهِ قَرِيبٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa fe u'lu-wuhi qareb

translation.en: O He Who is near everyone in spite of His greatness,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي قُرْبِهِ لَطِيفٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa fe qur-bihi latef

translation.en: O He Who is benign in His weariness,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي لُطْفِهِ شَرِيفٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa fe lut-fihi sharef

translation.en: O He Who is noble in His benignity,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي شَرَفِهِ عَزِيزٌ

translation.en: O He Who is powerful in His nobility,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عِزِّهِ عَظِيمٌ

translation.en: O He Who is great in His power,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عَظَمَتِهِ مَجِيدٌ

translation.en: O He Who is exalted in His greatness,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي مَجْدِهِ حَمِيدٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa fe maj-dihi hamed

translation.en: O He Who is praiseworthy in his exaltation.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Sufficient, O Restorer of health,
O Faithful, O Forgiver
O Guide, O Summoner,
O Judge, O Agreeable,
O High, O Eternal

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

segments.arabic: (37) يَا مَن كُلُّ شَيٍْء خَاضِعٌ لَّهُ

translation.en: O He before Whom everything bows,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن كُلُّ شَيٍْء خَاشِعٌ لَّهُ

translation.en: O He before Whom everything is humbled,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ كُلُّ شَيٍْء كَائِنٌ لَّهُ

translation.en: O He for Whom everything exists,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن كُلُّ شَيٍْء مَّوْجُودٌ بِهِ

translation.en: O He to Whom everything owes its existence,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن كُلُّ شَيٍْء مُّنِيبٌ إِلَيْهِ

translation.en: O He to Whom everything returns,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن كُلُّ شَيٍْء خَائِفٌ مِّنْهُ

translation.en: O He of Whom everything is afraid,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن كُلُّ شَيٍْء قَائِمٌ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: ya man kul-lu shay-in qa-imum bih

translation.en: O One to Whom everything owes its stability,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن كُلُّ شَيٍْء صَائِرٌ إِلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: ya man kul-lu shay-in sa-irun ilayh

translation.en: O He towards Whom everything retreats,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ كُلُّ شَيٍْء يُّسَبِّحُ بِحَمْدِهِ

translation.en: O He Whom everything glorifies with praise,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن كُلُّ شَيٍْء هَاِلكٌ إِلاَّ وَجْهَهُ
segments.transliteration: ya man kul-lu shay-in halikun illa waj-hah

translation.en: O He besides Whom everything is perishable.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

segments.arabic: (38) يَا مَن لا مَفَرَّ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِ

translation.en: O He-there is no retreat but towards Him,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا مَفْزَعَ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِ

translation.en: O He-there is no place of protection except with Him,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا مَقْصَدَ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِ

translation.en: O He—there is no right path except that which leads to Him,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا مَنجَى مِنْهُ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: ya mal-la manja minhu illa ilayhi

translation.en: O He-there is no shelter against Him but with Him,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يُرْغَبُ إِلاَّ إلَيهِ

translation.en: O He-there is no inclination towards anyone except Him,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا حَوْلَ وَلا قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: ya mal-la haw-la wa-la qu-wata illa bih

translation.en: O He-there is no strength and vigour but from Him,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يُسْتَعَانُ إِلاَّ بِهِ

translation.en: O He-none is invoked for help but He.

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يُتَوَكَّلُ إِلاَّ عَلَيْهِ

translation.en: O He-trust is not reposed in anyone but He,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يُرْجَى إِلاَّ هُوَ

translation.en: O He-hope is not entertained from anyone except from He,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يُعْبَدُ إِلاَّ هُوَ

translation.en: O He-none is worshipped except He

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Best of those who are feared,
O Best of those who are liked,
O Best of those who are sought,
O Best of those who are entreated,
O Best of those who are longed for,
O Best of those who are remembered,
O Best of those to whom thanks are offered,
O Best of those who are loved,
O Best of those who are called on,
O Best of those who are held in affection.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O Forgiver, O Concealer [of defects]

segments.arabic: يَا قَادِرُ يَا قَاهِرُ يَا فَاطِرُ
segments.transliteration: ya qadiru ya qa-hiru ya fatir

translation.en: O Mighty, O Supreme, O Creator,
O Shatterer, O Joiner,

segments.arabic: يَا ذَاكِرُ يَا نَاظِرُ يَا نَاصِرُ
segments.transliteration: ya dhakiru ya naziru ya nasir

translation.en: O Rememberer, O Seeing, O Helper.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He Who created and perfected,
O He Who made everything to measure and guided,
O He Who removes misfortunes,
O He Who overhears secrets,
O He Who rescues the drowning,
O He Who saves the distressed,
O He Who restores the sick to health,
O He who makes [His slaves] laugh and weep,
O He Who causes to dies and calls to life,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَلَقَ الزَّوْجَيْنِ الذَّكَرَ وَالأُنْثَى

translation.en: O He Who has created pairs of male and female.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

segments.arabic: (42) يَا مَن فِي الْبَرِّ وَالْبَحْرِ سَبِيلُهُ

translation.en: O He Whose course is on land and in water,
O He Whose signs are in the universe,
O He in Whose signs are undeniable proofs,
O He Whose; might is exhibited in causing death,
O He Whose lesson is in graves,
O He Whose kingdom will be on the Day of Judgement,
O He in Whose reckoning of deeds is His dread,
O He in Whose balance is His order,
O He Whose paradise is the place of His good reward,
O He Whose hell is the place of chastisement.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He-the frightened flee to Him,
O He-sinners take shelter with Him,
O He-the repentant return to Him,
O He-the pious incline towards Him,
O He-the confounded seek shelter in Him,
O He-the desirous have affliction for Him,
O He-lovers are proud of Him,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن فِي عَفْوِهِ يَطْمَعُ الْخَاطِئُونَ

translation.en: O He-transgressors have agreed for His forgiveness,
O He-those who are sure in faith receive consolation from Him,
O He-those who trust Him rely on Him.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O Friend, O physician,
O Near, O Supervisor,
O Reckoner to account, O Awful,
O Rewarder, O Acceptor,
O Aware, O All-Seeing.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Nearest of all,
O Friendliest of all the friends,
O Possessor Of greater insight than all others,
O Most Aware of all
O Noblest of all the nobles,
O Most Exalted of all the exalted,
O Mightiest of all mighty,
O Most Independent of all,
O Most Generous of all,
O Kindest of all those who are kind

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Dominant who is not overpowered,
O Designer who is not made.
O Creator who is not created,
O Master and not the slave,
O All-Dominant who is not dominated,
O Exalter and the Exalted,
O Protector who needs no protection,
O Helper who needs no help,
O Witness who is not absent,
O Near who is not distant.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Light of lights,
O Illuminator of light,
O Creator of light
O Planner of light,
O Estimator of light,
O Light of all lights,
O Light that precedes in existence every light,
O Light that will survive all lights,
O Light that is above every light,
O Light like of which there is no light.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He Whose gift is noble,
O He Whose action is subtle,
O He Whose kindness is persistent,
O He Whose beneficence is eternal,
O He Whose word is right,
O He Whose promise is true,
O He Whose forgiveness is a grace,
O He Whose chastisement is justice,
O He Whose remembrance is sweet,
O He Whose grace is universal.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O Facilitator, O Separator,
O Alterer, O Humiliating of the proud,
O Degrader, O Benefactor,
O Munificent, O Giver of respite,
O Grantor of respite, O Virtuous,

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He Who sees but is not seen,
O He Who creates and is not created,
O He Who guides and is not guided,
O He Who receives to life and is not brought to life,
O He Who questions and is not questioned,
O He Who feeds and does not eat,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن يُّجِيرُ وَلا يُجَارُ عَلَيْهِ

translation.en: O He Who gives protection and is in no need of protection,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن يَّقْضِي وَلا يُقْضَى عَلَيْهِ

translation.en: O He Who judges and against Whom no judgement is passed,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن يَّحْكُمُ وَلا يُحْكَمُ عَلَيْهِ

translation.en: O He Who commands but is not commanded:

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لَّمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ
segments.transliteration: ya mal-lam yalidu wa lam yulad

translation.en: O He Who begets not, nor is He begotten,
And there is none like unto Him.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Best reckoner,
O Best physician,
O Best guardian,
O Best near one,
O Best responder,
O Best friend,
O Best surety,
O Best protector,
O Best master,
O Best helper.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Joy of saints,
O Desire of friends.
O Friend of seekers,
O Friend of penitents,
O Provider of sustenance to the poor,
O Hope of sinners,
O Coolness of worshippers' eyes,
O Remover Of sufferers' pain,
O Dispeller of the sorrows of the sorrowful,
O Allah of the first and the last generation.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O our Lord, O our Allah,
O our Chief, O our Master,
O our Helper, O our Protector,
O our Guide, O our Aider,
O our Friend, O our Physician.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Lord of the prophets and the virtuous,
O Lord of the righteous and chosen one,
O Lord of paradise and hell,
O Lord of the small and the great,
O Lord of grains and fruits,
O Lord of canals and trees,
O Lord of forest and desert,
O Lord of lands and seas,
O Lord of night and day,
O Lord of the manifest and the hidden.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

segments.arabic: (55) يَا مَن نَّفَذَ فِي كُلِّ شَيٍْء أَمْرُهُ
segments.transliteration: ya man-nafadha fe kul-li shay-in am-ruh

translation.en: O He, Whose command operates in everything,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لَّحِقَ بِكُلِّ شَيٍْء عِلْمُهُ

translation.en: O He, Whose knowledge encompasses everything,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ بَلَغَتْ إِلَى كُلِّ شَيٍْء قُدْرَتُهُ
segments.transliteration: ya mam balaghat ila kul-li shay-in qud-ratuh

translation.en: O He, Whose control extends to everything,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لَا تُحْصِى الْعِبَادُ نِعَمَهُ

translation.en: O He, Whose bounties cannot be counted by His slaves,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا تَبْلُغُ الْخَلائِقُ شُكْرَهُ

translation.en: O He, Whom His creatures cannot adequately thank,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا تُدْرِكُ الأَفْهَامُ جَلاَلَهُ

translation.en: O He, Whose grandeur cannot be comprehended by the intellect,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا تَنَالُ الأَوْهَامُ كُنْهَهُ

translation.en: O He, Whose reality cannot be acquired by the imagination,
O He, Whose garb is majesty and greatness,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لَا تَرُدُّ الْعِبَادُ قَضَاءَهُ

translation.en: O He, Whose judgement cannot be reversed by His slave,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا مُلْكَ إِلا مُلْكُهُ

translation.en: O He, Whose alone is the kingdom and no one else'

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا عَطَاءَ إِلا عَطَاؤُهُ

translation.en: O He, Whose alone is the gift and none else's,

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, for Whom are noblest examples,
O He, for Whom are high attributes,
O He, Who is the Master of the beginning and the end,
O He, Who is the Master of the abode of paradise,
O He, for Whom are great signs,
O He, for Whom are beautiful names,
O He, for Whom is order and judgement,
O He, Who rules over the atmosphere and the expanse,
O He, Whose is the Lordship of the highest heaven and the earth,
O He, Who is the Master of the high heavens.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O Pardoner, O Forgiver,
O Patient, O Greatest appreciator
O Kind, O Sympathetic,
O Besought, O Friend,
O Most Glorified, O Most Holy.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Whose greatness is in the heavens,
O He, Whose signs are on the earth,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن فِي كُلِّ شَيٍْء دَلائِلُهُ
segments.transliteration: ya man fe kul-li shay-in dala-iluh

translation.en: O He, Whose proofs are manifest in everything,
O He, Whose wonders are in the seas,
O He, Whose treasures are in the mountains,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن يَّبْدَأُ الْخَلْقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُ

translation.en: O He, Who originated Creation which then returns to Him,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ إِلَيْهِ يَرْجِعُ الأَمْرُ كُلُّهُ

translation.en: O He, towards Whom is the return of every matter,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ أَظْهَرَ فِي كُلِّ شَيٍْء لُّطْفَهُ
segments.transliteration: ya man azhara fe kul-li shayil-lut-fah

translation.en: O, Whose Kindness is evident in everything,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ أَحْسَنَ كُلَّ شَيٍْء خَلَقَهُ
segments.transliteration: ya man ah-sana kul-la shay-in khal-qah

translation.en: O He, Who makes best everything which He has created,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن تَصَرَّفَ فِي الْخَلائِقِ قُدْرَتُهُ

translation.en: O He, Whose authority is wielded over all creatures.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

segments.arabic: (59) يَا حَبِيبَ مَن لا حَبِيبَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Friend of he who has no friend,

segments.arabic: يَا طَبِيبَ مَن لا طَبِيبَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Physician of he who has no physician,

segments.arabic: يَا مُجِيبَ مَن لا مُجِيبَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Responder to he who has no responder,

segments.arabic: يَا شَفِيقَ مَن لا شَفِيقَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Affectionate One to he whom none hold in affection,

segments.arabic: يَا رَفِيقَ مَن لا رَفِيقَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Friend of he who has no friend,

segments.arabic: يَا مُغِيثَ مَن لا مُغِيثَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Helper of he who has no help,

segments.arabic: يَا دَلِيلَ مَن لا دَلِيلَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Guide of he who has no guide,

segments.arabic: يَا أَنِيسَ مَن لا أَنِيسَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Associate of the forlorn,

segments.arabic: يَا رَاحِمَ مَن لا رَاحِمَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Merciful One towards he on whom no one has mercy,

segments.arabic: يَا صَاحِبَ مَن لا صَاحِبَ لَهُ

translation.en: O Companion of he who has no companion.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Sufficer for those who seek sufficiency,
O Guide for those who seek guidance,
O Protector for those who seek protection,
O Granter for concession to those who seek concession,
O Healer for those who seek cure,
O Just One for those who seek justice,
O Bestower of wealth for those who seek wealth,
O Fulfiller of promises for those who seek fulfillment,
O Granter of strength for those who seek strength,
O Aider of those who seek aid.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah , verily I entreat You in Your name:
O Creator, O Provider of sustenance,
O Creator of speech, O Truthful,
O Splitter, O Separator,
O Breaker, O Combiner,
O Foremost, O Most High.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Who changes night and day,
O He, Who has created darkness and light,
O He, Who has bestowed shade and heat,
O He, Who has brought into subjection the sun and the moon,
O He, Who has ordained virtue and vice,
O He, Who has created death and life,
O He, Who has made the body and the soul,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لَّمْ يَتِّخِذْ صَاحِبَةً وَّلا وَلَداً

translation.en: O He, Who has neither taken a wife nor begotten any child,

segments.arabic: يَّا مَن لَّيْسَ لَهُ شَرِيكٌ فِي الْمُلْكِ

translation.en: O He, Who has no partner in His sovereignty,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لَّمْ يَكُن لَّهُ وَلِيٌّ مِّنَ الذُّلِّ

translation.en: O He, Who has no friend among the disgraced.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Who knows the desire of the desirous,
O He, Who knows the conscience of the silent,
O He, who hears the cries of the weak,
O He, Who sees the lamentation of the frightened,
O He, Who satisfies the needs of the petitioner,
O He, Who accepts the excuse of the repentant,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يُصْلِحُ عَمَلَ الْمُفْسِدِينَ

translation.en: O He, Who does not correct the actions of the mischievous,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يُضِيعُ أَجْرَ الْمُحْسِنِينَ

translation.en: O He, Who does not waste the good reward of the virtuous,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يَبْعُدُ عَن قُلُوبِ الْعَارِفِينَ

translation.en: O He, Who is not absent from the mind of the saint,
O the most Magnanimous of all those who show magnanimity.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Eternal Living,
O Hearer of prayers,
O Liberal Bestower
O Forgiver of sins,
O Creator of the sky,
O Best tester of trials,
O Most Praiseworthy,
O Eternally Great,
O Greatest fulfiller of promises,
O Best Recompenser.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O Best concealer of defects, O Best forgiver,
O Most dominant, O Supreme,
O Most patient, O Most virtuous,
O Most exalted, O Best opener,
O Blower of winds, O Bestower of Happiness.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Who created me and perfected me,
O He, Who provided me with sustenance and nurtured me,
O He, Who provided food for me and quenched my thirst,
O He, Who brought me near Him and brought me most nigh,
O He, Who protected me and kept me in safety,
O He, Who saved and guarded me,
O He, Who honoured me and enriched me,
O He, Who helped and guided me,
O He, Who befriended me and sheltered me,
O He, Who causes me to die and revivifies me.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Who maintains truth by His words,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن يَّقْبَلُ التَّوْبَةَ عَنْ عِبَادِهِ

translation.en: O He, Who accepts repentance from His slaves,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن يَّحُولُ بَيْنَ الْمَرْءِ وَقَلْبِهِ

translation.en: O He, Who stands between man and his heart,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا تَنْفَعُ الشَّفَاعَةُ إِلا بِإِذْنِهِ

translation.en: O He, without Whose permission intercession has no benefit,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَنْ سَبِيلِهِ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa a`a-lamu biman dhal-la `an sabelih

translation.en: O He, Who knows well who is astray from His path,
O He, Whose order no one can reverse,
O He, Whose judgement no one can revoke,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنِ انْقَادَ كُلُّ شَيٍْء لأَمْرِهِ

translation.en: O He, Whose order is obeyed by everything,
O He, in Whose Right Hand the heavens shall be rolled up,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن يُّرْسِلُ الرِّيَاحَ بُشْريً بَيْنَ يَدَيْ رَحْمَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: ya may-yur-silur-riyaha bush-ram bayna yaday rah-matih

translation.en: O He, Who has made earth a cradle,

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Who sends forth the winds bearing good tiding before His mercy.
O He, Who has made the mountains pegs,
O He, Who has made the sun a lamp,
O He, Who has made the moon a light,
O He, Who has made the night a covering,
O He, Who has made the day for seeking livelihood,
O He, Who has made sleep a rest,
O He, Who has made the sky a vault,
O He, Who has created things in pairs,
O He, Who has made hell an ambush, barking for sinners.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O All-hearer, O Mediator,
O Sublime, O Invincible,
O Swift, O Originator,
O Great, O Omnipotent,
O Knowing, O Supporter.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Everliving, preceding every living being,
O Everliving, succeeding every living being,

segments.arabic: يَا حَيُّ الَّذِي لَيْسَ كَمِثْلِهِ حَيٌّ

translation.en: O Everliving, like unto Whom there is none,

segments.arabic: يَا حَيُّ الَّذِي لا يُشَارِكُهُ حَيٌّ

translation.en: O Everliving, Who has no living partner,

segments.arabic: يَا حَيُّ الَّذِي لا يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى حَيٍّ
segments.transliteration: ya hay-yul-ladhe la yah-taju ila hay

translation.en: O Everliving, Who is not dependent on any living being,

segments.arabic: يَا حَيُّ الَّذِي يُمِيتُ كُلَّ حَيٍّ

translation.en: O Everliving, Who causes every living being to die,

segments.arabic: يَا حَيُّ الَّذِي يَرْزُقُ كُلَّ حَيٍّ

translation.en: O Everliving, Who provides sustenance to every living being,

segments.arabic: يَا حَيّاً لَّمْ يَرِثِ الْحَيَاةَ مِنْ حَيٍّ

translation.en: O Everliving, Who has not inherited life from any living being,
O Everliving, Who quickens the dead,

segments.arabic: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ، لا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةً وَّلا نَوْمٌ
segments.transliteration: ya hay-yu ya qay-yumu la ta-khudhuhu sinatuw-wa-la naw-m

translation.en: O Everliving, O Self-Subsistent, Slumber seizeth Him not, nor sleep.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

segments.arabic: (71) يَا مَن لَّهُ ذِكْرٌ لا يُنْسَى

translation.en: O He, Whose remembrance is not forgotten,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لَّهُ نُورٌ لا يُطْفَى

translation.en: O He, Whose light is not extinguished

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لَّهُ نِعْمٌ لا تُعَدُّ

translation.en: O He, Whose bounties are countless,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لَّهُ مُلْكٌ لا يَزُولُ

translation.en: O He, Whose grandeur is perpetual,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لَّهُ ثَنَاءٌ لا يُحْصَى

translation.en: O He, Whose praise does not admit of alteration,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لَّهُ جَلاَلٌ لا يُكَيَّفُ

translation.en: O He, Whose glory is not framed,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لَّهُ كَمَالٌ لا يُدْرَكُ

translation.en: O He, Whose perfection cannot be comprehended,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لَّهُ قَضَاءٌ لا يُرَدُّ

translation.en: O He, Whose order is not rejected,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لَّهُ صِفَاتٌ لا تُبَدَّلُ،

translation.en: O He, Whose attributes do not change,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لَّهُ نُعُوتٌ لا تُغَيَّرُ

translation.en: O He, Whose attributes do not alter,

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Lord of all the worlds,
O Master of the Day of Judgement,
O Ultimate Goal of the seeker,
O Refuge of the seeker of shelter,
O Overtaker of the fugitive,
O He Who loves the patient,
O He, Who loves the repentant,
O He, Who loves the pure,
O He, Who loves the virtuous
O He, Who knows best the guided,

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Affectionate, O Companion,
O Protector, O Encompasser,
O Provider of sustenance, O Aider of seekers of aid,
O Honourer, O Humiliating,
O Creator, O He Who causes to return.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

segments.arabic: (74) يَا مَنْ هُوَ أَحَدٌ بِلاَ ضِدٍّ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa ahadum bila dhid-d

translation.en: O He, Who is single and without opposite,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فَرْدٌ بِلاَ نِدٍّ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa far-dum bila nid-d

translation.en: O He, Who is Unique, O He, Who is Peerless,
O He, Who is Independent and without any defect,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ وِتْرٌ بِلاَ كَيْفٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa wit-rum bila kayf

translation.en: O He, Who is without changing state,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ قَاضٍ بِلاَ حَيْفٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa qadhim bila hayf

translation.en: O He, Who judges without injustice,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ رَبٌّ بِلاَ وَزِيرٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa rab-bum bila wazer

translation.en: O He, Who is the Lord Cherisher,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ عَزِيزٌ بِلاَ ذُلٍّ

translation.en: O He, Who is Mighty without disgrace,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ غَنِيٌّ بِلاَ فَقْرٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa ghane-yum bila faq-r

translation.en: O He, Who is Independent without any need,
