segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مَلِكٌ بِلاَ عَزْلٍ

translation.en: O He, Who is the King without any censure,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مَوْصُوفٌ بِلاَ شَبِيهٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa maw-sufum bila shabeh

translation.en: O He, Whose attributes are matchless.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Whose remembrance is an honour for those who remember Him,
O He, Whose gratitude is success for the grateful,
O He, Whose praise is the pride of the praiser,
O He, the obedience to Whom is salvation for the obedient
O He, Whose door is open to the seeker,
O He, the path leading to Whom is clear for the repentant,
O He, Whose signs are proofs for the observers,
O He, Whose Book is advice to the pious,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن رِّزْقُهُ عُمُومٌ لِّلطَّائِعِينَ وَالْعَاصِينَ

translation.en: O He, Whose provision, is love the obedient and disobedient alike,

segments.arabic: يَا مْن رَّحْمَتُهُ قَرِيبٌ مِّنَ الْمُحْسِنِينَ

translation.en: O He, Whose mercy is close to the virtuous.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Whose name is glorious,
O He, Whose honour is exalted,
O He-there is no deity except Him,
O He-great is His praise,
O He, Whose names are sacred,
O He, Whose existence is eternal,
O He, Whose glory is His ornament,
O He, Whose greatness is His covering,
O He, Whose favours are countless,
O He, Whose bounties cannot be enumerated.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Helper, O Trustworthy,
O Manifest, O Powerful,
O Firm, O True Guide,
O Praiseworthy, O Glorious,
O Strong, O Witness

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Lord of the Glorious Throne,
O He, Whose words are right.
O Master of great deeds,
O He, Whose punishment is severe
O Master of promise and threat,
O He, Who is guardian and the most praised one,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فَعَّالٌ لِّمَا يُرِيدُ

translation.en: O He, Who is the mighty doer of whatever He wills,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ قْرِيبٌ غَيْرُ بَعِيدٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa q-rebun ghayru bae'ed

translation.en: O He, Who is near and not far,

segments.arabic: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيٍْء شَهِيدٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa `ala kul-li shay-in shahed

translation.en: O He, Who is Witness to everything,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ لَيْسَ بِظَلاَّمٍ لِّلْعَبِيدِ

translation.en: O He, Who is not the least cruel to his slaves,

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

segments.arabic: (79) يَا مَن لا شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَلاوَزَيرَ
segments.transliteration: ya mal-la shareka lahu wa-la wazayir

translation.en: O He, Who has no partner and no adviser,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا شَبِيهَ لَهُ وَلا نَظِيرَ
segments.transliteration: ya mal-la shabeha lahu wa-la nazer

translation.en: O He, Who has no equal and no match,
O Creator of the sun and the bright moon,
O Enricher of the poverty stricken,
O Provider of sustenance to small children,
O Merciful to the very aged ones,
O Joiner of broken bones,
O Protector of the frightened shelter seekers,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بِعِبَادِهِ خَبَيِرٌ بَصِيرٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa bi-i`ibadihi khabayirum baser

translation.en: O He , Who is All-Aware and All-Seeing of his slaves,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيٍْء قَدِيرٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa `ala kul-li shay-in qader

translation.en: O He, Who is Powerful over everything.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Master of generosity and the Bestower of the bounties,
O Gracious and Magnanimous,
O Creator of the Tablet and the Pen,
O Creator of ants and men,
O Inflictor of punishment and retaliator,
O Inspirer of Arabs and non-Arabs,
O Expeller of pain and grief,
O He, Who knows the secrets and the mysteries,
O Lord of the Kaaba and the Sacred Precinct,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَلَقَ الأَشْيَاءَ مِنَ الْعَدَمِ

translation.en: O He, Who has created everything out of nothingness,

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Doer, O Creator
O Acceptor, O Perfect,
O Gracious, O Separator
O Just, O Dominant,
O Seeker, O Generous

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Who graciously bestows His bounties on us,
O He, Who honours us with His charity,
O He, Who rewards us out of His beneficing,
O He, Who makes us respectable with His might,
O He, Who predestines with His wisdom,
O He, Who judges with His planning,
O He, Who decrees with His knowledge,
O He, Who is forbearing with His forbearance,
O He, Who is near us in spite of His exaltation,
O He, Who is exalted despite His nearness.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Who creates whatever He wishes,
O He, Who does whatever He wishes,
O He, Who guides whomever He wishes,
O He, Who leaves astray whomever He wishes,
O He, Who punishes whomever He wishes,
O He, Who forgives whomever He wishes,
O He, Who honors whomever He wishes,
O He, Who dishonors whomever He wishes,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن يُّصَوِّرُ فِي الأَرْحَامِ مَا يَشَاءُ

translation.en: O He, Who fashions in the womb as He wishes,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن يَّخْتَصُّ بِرَحْمَتِهِ مَن يَّشَاءُ

translation.en: O He, Who chooses for His mercy whoever He wishes.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

segments.arabic: (84) يَا مَن لَّمْ يَتَّخِذْ صَاحِبَةً وَّلاوَلَداً

translation.en: O He, Who has neither wife nor child,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن جَعَلَ لِكُلِّ شَيٍْء قَدْراً
segments.transliteration: ya man ja`ala likul-li shay-in qad-ra

translation.en: O He, Who creates everything in a fixed measure,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يُشْرِكُ فِي حُكْمِهِ أَحَداً
segments.transliteration: ya mal-la yush-riku fe huk-mehi ahada

translation.en: O He, Who has no partner in His rule,
O He, Who appointed angels as messengers,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن جَعَلَ فِي السَّمَاءِ بُرُوجاً

translation.en: O He, Who made constellations in the heaven,
O He, Who made the earth a place of abode,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَلَقَ مِنَ الْمَاءِ بَشَراً

translation.en: O He, Who created man from water,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن جَعَلَ لِكُلِّ شَيٍْء أَمَداً
segments.transliteration: ya man ja`ala likul-li shay-in amada

translation.en: O He, Who fixed a period for everything,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ أَحَاطَ بِكُلِّ شَيٍْء عِلْماً
segments.transliteration: ya man ahata bikul-li shay-in i`il-ma

translation.en: O He, Whose knowledge encompasses everything,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ أَحْصَى كُلَّ شَيٍْء عَدَداً

translation.en: O He, Who knows the number and quantity of everything.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O First, O Last,
O Manifest, O Hidden,
O Virtuous, O Right,
O He, O Unique,
O Independent, O Eternal

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Best recognized of all the recognized,
O Best of all to be worshipped,
O Greatest of those to whom thanks are due,
O Most remembered of all who are remembered,
O Most praiseworthy of all those who are praised,
O Eternal Existent who is sought,
O Highest of those who are praised,
O Greatest of the purposes which are striven for,
O Most liberal giver who is requested,
O Noblest Friend who is known.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Friend of those who weep,
O Refuge of those who trust in Him,
O Guide of the misguided,
O Master of the faithful,
O Friend of worshippers,
O Shelter of the sorrowful,
O Redeemer of the truthful,
O Mightiest of all,
O the most Knowledgeable of all beings.
O Allah of the entire Creation,

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Who is high and dominant,
O He, Who is masterful and powerful,
O He, Who is hidden and aware,
O He, Who is worshipped and who appreciates,
O He, Who is disobeyed and yet forgives,
O He, Whom thought cannot encompass,
O He, Whom eyes cannot see,

segments.arabic: يَّا مَن لا يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ أثَرٌ

translation.en: O He, from Whom nothing is concealed,
O Provider of Sustenance to mankind,
O He, Who ordained all destinies.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Protector, O Maker,
O Creator, O All-generous,
O Revealer, O Victorious,
O Disclosers, O Guarantor,
O Commander, O Prohibiter.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

segments.arabic: (90) يَا مَن لا يَعْلَمُ الْغَيْبَ إِلاَّ هُوَ

translation.en: O He, besides Whom no one knows the secrets,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يَصْرِفُ السُّوءَ إِلاَّ هُوَ

translation.en: O He, besides Whom no one drives away calamities,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يَخْلُقُ الْخَلْقَ إِلاَّ هُوَ

translation.en: O He, besides Whom no one creates,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يَغْفِرُ الذَّنْبَ إِلاَّ هُوَ

translation.en: O He, besides Whom no one forgives sins,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يُتِمُّ النِّعْمَةَ إِلاَّ هُوَ

translation.en: O He, besides Whom no one perfects the bounties,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يُقَلِّبُ الْقُلُوبَ إِلاَّ هُوَ

translation.en: O He, besides Whom no one transforms hearts,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يُدَبِّرُ الأَمْرَ إِلاَّ هُو

translation.en: O He, besides Whom no one manages affairs,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يُنَزِّلُ الْغَيْثَ إِلاَّ هُوَ

translation.en: O He, besides Whom no one holds the reins,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يَبْسُطُ الرِّزْقَ إِلاَّ هُوَ

translation.en: O He, besides Whom no one increases sustenance,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يُحْيِي الْمَوْتَى إِلاَّ هُوَ

translation.en: O He, besides Whom no one revives the dead.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Helper of the weak,
O Companion of the strangers,
O Helper of [His] friends,
O Overpowerer of the enemies,
O Elevator of the sky,
O Genial to the chosen ones,
O Friend of the pious,
O Treasure of the indigent,
O Lord of the rich,
O Most benign of all.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He Who is self-sufficient from everything,
O He Who is established over everything,
O He, nothing is like unto Him,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يَزِيدُ فِي مُلْكِهِ شَيْءٌ
segments.transliteration: ya mal-la yazedu fe mul-kihi shay

translation.en: O He, nothing extends His Kingdom,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ شَيْءٌ

translation.en: O He from Whom nothing is hidden,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يَنقُصُ مِنْ خَزَائِنِهِ شَيْءٌ
segments.transliteration: ya mal-la yanqusu min khaza-inihi shay

translation.en: O He, nothing decreases His treasure,
O He, nothing is like unto Him,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يَعْزُبُ عَنْ عِلْمِهِ شَيْءٌ

translation.en: O He, Whose Knowledge encompasses everything,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ خَبِيرٌ بِكُلِّ شَيٍْء
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa kha-berum bikul-li shay

translation.en: O He, Who is All-Aware,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن وَّسِعَتْ رَحْمَتُهُ كُلَّ شَيٍْء

translation.en: O He, Whose mercy extends to everything.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Generous, O Provider,
O Bestower of bounties, O Bestower of gifts,
O Enricher, O Giver of Shelter
O Destroyer, O Quickener,
O Satisfier, O Who grants salvation,

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O First and the Last,
O Lord of everything and its Master,
O Lord Cherisher of everything and its Fashioner
O Creator of everything and its Maker,
O Controller of everything and its Extender,
O Origin of everything and its Return,
O Originator of everything and its estimator,
O Creator of everything and its destroyer,
O Quickener of everything and Maker of its death,
O Author of everything and its inheritor.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Best Rememberer and Remembered,
O Best Appreciator and Appreciated,
O Best Praiser and Praised,
O Best Witness and Witnessed,
O Best Inviter and Invited,
O Best Responder and Responded,
O Best Comforter and Counselor,
O Best Friend and Companion,
O Most Desired and Sought,
O Most Affectionate and Loved.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

segments.arabic: (96) يَا مَنْ هُوَ لِمَن دَعَاهُ مُجِيبٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa liman da`aahu mujeb

translation.en: O Allah, the Answerer to him who calls Him,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ لِمَنْ أَطَاعَهُ حَبِيبٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa liman ata`ahu habeb

translation.en: O Friend of him who obeys Him,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ إِلَى مَنْ أَحَبَّهُ قَرِيبٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa ila man ahab-bahu qareb

translation.en: O He, Who is close to him who loves Him,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنِ اسْتَحْفَظَهُ رَقِيبٌ

translation.en: O Protector of one who seeks protection,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَن رَّجَاهُ كَرِيمٌ

translation.en: O Allah Who is Generous to him who is hopeful of Him,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنْ عَصَاهُ حَلِيمٌ

translation.en: O Allah, Who is Forbearing to one who disobeys Him,

segments.arabic: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عَظَمَتِهِ رَحِيمٌ

translation.en: O Allah, Who is Merciful in spite of His Grandeur,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي حِكْمَتِهِ عَظِيمٌ

translation.en: O Allah, Who is Great in His Wisdom,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي إِحْسَانِهِ قَدِيمٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa fe ih-sanihi qadem

translation.en: O Allah, Who is Eternal in his Benevolence,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنْ أَرَادَهُ عَلِيمٌ

translation.en: O Allah, Who is Aware of one who seeks Him.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O Primal Cause, O Creator of desire,

segments.arabic: يَا مُقَلِّبُ يَا مُعَقِّبُ يَا مُرَتِّبُ
segments.transliteration: ya muqal-libu ya mua'q-qibu ya murat-tib

translation.en: O Changer, O Inflictor, O Organizer,

segments.arabic: يَا مُخَوِّفُ يَا مُحَذِّرُ يَا مُذَكِّرُ
segments.transliteration: ya mukhaw-wifu ya muhadh-dhiru ya mudhak-kir

translation.en: O Awful, O Saver, O Reminder,
O Subjector, O Displacer.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He Whose Knowledge is eternal,
O He Whose Promise is true,
O He Whose Benignity is manifest,
O He Whose Command is overruling,
O He Whose Book is clear and final,
O He Whose Judgement is inevitable,
O He Whose Qur'an is glorious,
O He Whose Rule is eternal,
O He Whose Favour is common to all,
O He Whose Throne is great.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

segments.arabic: (99) يَا مَن لا يَشْغَلُهُ سَمْعٌ عَن سَمْعٍ

translation.en: O He-listening to one individual does not prevent Him from listening to others simultaneously,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يَمْنَعُهُ فِعْلٌ عَن فِعْلٍ

translation.en: O He-doing one thing does not prevent Him from doing other things simultaneously,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يُلْهِيهِ قَوْلٌ عَن قَوْلٍ

translation.en: O He-the speech of one person does not make Him needless of the simultaneous speech of others,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يُغَلِّطُهُ سُؤَالٌ عَن سُؤَالٍ

translation.en: O He-one request does not make Him forgetful of other requests,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يَحْجُبُهُ شَيْءٌ عَن شَيٍْء

translation.en: O He-the sight of one thing does not prevent him from seeing other things simultaneously,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يُبْرِمُهُ إِلْحَاحُ الْمُلِحِّينَ

translation.en: O He-the plaintive cries of those who weep and lament do not bother Him,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ غَايَةُ مُرَادِ الْمُرِيدِينَ

translation.en: O He Who is the ultimate Aim of the efforts of saints,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مُنتَهَى هِمَمِ الْعَارِفِينَ

translation.en: O He Who is the Goal of Gnostics,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مُنتَهَى طَلَبِ الطَّاِلبِينَ

translation.en: O He Who is the Goal of seekers,

segments.arabic: يَا مَن لا يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ ذَرَّةً فِي الْعَالَمِينَ

translation.en: O He from Whom not a single particle in the worlds is hidden.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Forbearing Who does not make haste,
O Generous Who is never a miser,
O True Who never breaks the promise
O Munificent Who never regrets,
O Dominant Who is never overpowered,
O Great Who is indescribable
O Just Who is never oppressive,
O Bounteous Who is never rapacious,
O Great Who does not become small,
O Protector Who does not neglect.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

text.en:
This du'a is narrated on the authority of Imam Musa al-Kazim, peace he upon him, and it is said that it is a very effective supplication, having all the merits of al Jawshan al Kabir." Sayyid ibn Tawus in his book Muhaj al dawat have narrated that Imam Kazim (a.s.) used to recite this dua when he knew that the Abbaside caliph was planning to kill him"
Following copy is quoted from al-Balad al-Amin.

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
1.O my God, many an enemy
unsheathed the sword of his hostility against me,
honed his dagger's edge against me,
sharpened the heads of his weapons against me,
mixed for me his deadly poisons,
leveled at me his hitting arrow,
kept a sleepless eye on me,
and decided secretly to target harm to me
and to make me taste the deadly poison of his bitterness.

segments.arabic: فَنَظَرْتَ  إِلَىٰ ضَعْفِي عَنِ ٱحْتِمَاِل ٱلْفَوَاِدحِ

translation.en: [Amid all that] You considered that I am too weak to bear hardships,

segments.arabic: وَعَجْزِي عَنِ ٱلإِنتِصَارِ مِمَّن قَصَدَنِي بِمُحَارَبَتِهِ

translation.en: I am too short to have aid against him who aimed at attacking me,

segments.arabic: وَوَحْدَتِي فِي كَثِيرٍ مِمَّنْ نَاوَانِي وَ أَرْصَدَ لِي
segments.transliteration: wa wahdati fi kathirin mimman nawani wa arsada li

translation.en: and You perceived my loneliness to confront many of those who incurred my hostility and laid in wait for me,

segments.arabic: فِيمَا لَمْ أُعْمِلْ فِكْرِي فِي ٱلإِرْصَادِ لَهُم بِمِثْلِهِ
segments.transliteration: fima lam u`mil fikri fi al-irsadi lahum bimithlihi

translation.en: while I have not been ready to give any thought to sitting in ambush and retaliating.
So, You came to stand by me with Your might,
made me strong through Your support,
notched his sharpness against me,

segments.transliteration: wa khadhaltahu ba`da jam`i `adidihi wa hashdihi

translation.en: disappointed him although he concentrated all his troops and crowds,
You gave me the upper hand over him,

segments.arabic: وَوَجَّهْتَ مَا سَدَّدَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ مَكَائِدِهِ إِلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: wa wajjahta ma saddada ilayya min maka'idihi ilayhi

translation.en: directed toward him the same traps that he had laid for me,
and caused him to be engaged with his own traps.
Thus, he could not quench his thirst,
did not assuage the fury of his anger,
bit his thumb [out of his malice toward me],

segments.transliteration: wa adbara muwalliyan qad akhfaqat sarayahu

translation.en: and turned his back fleeing after his pennons had failed.
So, all praise be to You, O Lord;
You are invulnerably Omnipotent
and prudently Forbearing.
Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and include me with those who are thankful for Your bounties
and those who permanently mention Your graces.
2.O my God, many a tyrannical oppressor
made me the target of his oppressive trickeries,
set the traps of his hunting for me,
continuously spied on me,

segments.transliteration: wa adba'a ilayya idba'a alssabu`i litaridatihi

translation.en: and waylaid me like a beast waylaying its prey
in waiting for seizing the best opportunity [to catch me],
While he was showing me happy mien flatteringly
and displaying an uncheerful face.
So, when You saw ill intention of his inner self

segments.arabic: وَقُبْحَ مَا ٱنطَوَىٰ عَلَيْهِ لِشَرِيكِهِ فِي مِلَّتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa qubha ma intawa `alayhi lisharikihi fi millatihi

translation.en: and the ugliness of his determination against his partner in religion,

segments.transliteration: wa asbaha mujliban li fi baghyihi

translation.en: and he became resolute in tyranny against me,
You threw him down headlong
and demolished his structure from its foundation.
So, You knocked him down while he was in loftiness,
made him fall in the bottomless depth of his hole,

segments.transliteration: wa ja`alta khaddahu tabaqan liturabi rijlihi

translation.en: caused his face to be a cover of his foot’s dust,

segments.transliteration: wa shaghaltahu fi badanihi wa rizqihi

translation.en: caused him to be engaged with his body and his earnings,
hurled him with his own stone,
suffocated him with his own rope,
slaughtered him with his own arrowhead,
overturned him to his nose,
turned his plot to his own neck,
lassoed him with his remorse,
and stretched him with is regret.
So, he became lowly and dwindled after his arrogance,
was crushed after his haughtiness;
humble and captured in the lasso of his trap

segments.arabic: ٱلَّتِي كَانَ يُؤَمِّلُ أَنْ يَرَانِي فِيهَا يَوْمَ سَطْوَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: allati kana yu'ammilu an yarani fiha yawma satwatihi

translation.en: in which he expected to see me in the days of his influence.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ كِدْتُ يَا رَبِّ لَوْلاَ رَحْمَتُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa qad kidtu ya rabbi lawla rahmatuka

translation.en: In fact, O my Lord, I was—had it not been for Your mercy—

segments.arabic: أَنْ يَحِلَّ بِي مَا حَلَّ بِسَاحَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: an yahulla bi ma halla bisahatihi

translation.en: about to encounter the same as he had encountered.
So, all praise be to You, O Lord;
You are invulnerably Omnipotent
and prudently Forbearing.
Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and include me with those who are thankful for Your bounties
and those who permanently mention Your graces.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي وَكَمْ مِنْ حَاسِدٍ شَرِقَ بِحَسْرَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa kam min hasidin shariqa bihasratihi

translation.en: 3.O my God, many an envier choked with his regret
and an enemy became grieved out of his fury,
smit me with his sharp tongue,
pricked me with the inner corner of his eye,
made me the object of his intentions,

segments.transliteration: wa qalladani khilalan lam tazal fihi

translation.en: and gird me with dispositions that are still his.
Therefore, I called upon You, O my Lord, seeking Your shelter,
having full confidence in the immediateness of Your response,

segments.arabic: مُتَوَكِّلاً عَلَىٰ مَا لَمْ أَزَلْ أَتَعَرَّفُهُ

translation.en: trusting in that which I am still receiving from You;
namely, the excellence of Your defense of me,

segments.arabic: عَالِماً أَنَّهُ لاَ يُضْطَهَدُ مَنْ آوَىٰ إِلَىٰ ظِلِّ كَنَفِكَ
segments.transliteration: `aliman annahu la yudtahadu man awa ila zilli kanafika

translation.en: having full knowledge that whoever harbors under the shade of Your protection will never be persecuted,

segments.arabic: وَلَن تَقْرَعَ ٱلْحَوَادِثُ مَنْ لَجَا إِلَىٰ مَعْقِلِ ٱلاِنْتِصَارِ بِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa lan taqra`a alhawadithu man laja'a ila ma`qili al-intisari bika

translation.en: and whoever takes refuge in the fortress of the seeking of Your support will never be exposed to the strikes of misfortunes.
So, You safeguarded me from his prowess with Your omnipotence.
So, all praise be to You, O Lord;
You are invulnerably Omnipotent
and prudently Forbearing.
Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and include me with those who are thankful for Your bounties
and those who permanently mention Your graces.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي وَكَمْ مِنْ سَحَائِبِ مَكْرُوهٍ جَلَّيْتَهَا
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa kam min saha'ibi makruhin jallaytaha

translation.en: 4.O my God, many clouds of misfortune You have dispersed,
much rain of bliss You have poured,
many streams of conferral You have made flow,
many springs of troubles You have effaced,
many launches of mercy You have spread,
many armors of wellbeing You have adorned [us with],
many overwhelming calamities You have removed,
and many continual events of goodness You have decided.
They would never render You impotent when You determined them to happen,

segments.transliteration: wa lam tamtani` minka idh aradtaha

translation.en: and could never stop responding to You when You wanted them to be.
So, all praise be to You, O Lord;
You are invulnerably Omnipotent
and prudently Forbearing.
Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and include me with those who are thankful for Your bounties
and those who permanently mention Your graces.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي وَكَمْ مِنْ ظَنٍّ حَسَنٍ حَقَّقْتَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa kam min zannin hasanin haqqaqta

translation.en: 5.O my God, many an excellent hope You have achieved,
many breaking poverty You have set,
many gross neediness You have shunted,
many destructive blows You have revived (me from them),
and many hardships You have relieved (me of them).
You cannot be questioned concerning that which You do
and they shall be questioned.
That which You spend never decreases You.
When You have been besought, You gave;
and although You have not been besought, You took the initiative to give.
When the door of Your favoring was knocked, You have not withheld.
You have insisted on nothing but favoring and bestowal

segments.arabic: وَ إِلاَّ تَطَوُّلاً يَا رَبِّ وَإِحْسَاناً
segments.transliteration: wa abayta illa tatawwulan ya rabbi wa ihsanan

translation.en: and You, O my Lord, have also insisted on giving generously and beneficently.
But as for me, I insisted on nothing but violation of Your prohibitions,
daring to commit acts of disobedience to You,
transgressing Your limits,
passing over Your threats,
and obeying Your and my enemy.

segments.arabic: لَمْ يَمْنَعْكَ يَا إِلٰهِي وَنَاصِرِي إِخْلاَلِي بِٱلشُّكْرِ
segments.transliteration: lam yamna`ka ya ilahi wa nasiri ikhlali bilshshukri

translation.en: My failure to be thankful to You has not made You, O my God and Helper,
stop perfecting Your favors on me.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَجَزَنِي ذٰلِكَ عَنِ ٱرْتِكَابِ مَسَاخِطِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la hajazani dhalika `an irtikabi masakhitika

translation.en: Likewise, this has not prevented me from committing sins that You dislike.
6.O my God, this is the situation of a humble servant [of You],
who professes Your Oneness,

segments.arabic: وَأَقَرَّ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِهِ بِٱلتَّقْصِيرِ فِي أَداءِ حَقِّكَ
segments.transliteration: wa aqarra `ala nafsihi bilttaqsiri fi ada'i haqqika

translation.en: confesses of his failure to carry out his duty towards You,
and testifies to Your ample favoring on him,
Your excellent habits in treating him,
and Your bestowal of graces upon him.

segments.arabic: فَهَبْ لِي يَا إِلٰهِي وَسَيِّدِي مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
segments.transliteration: fahab li ya ilahi wa sayyidi min fadlika

translation.en: So, my God and Master, confer upon me an amount of Your benevolence
that I can use as a path taking me to Your mercy,

segments.arabic: وَأَتَّخِذُهُ سُلَّماً أَعْرُجُ فِيهِ إِلَىٰ مَرْضَاتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa attakhidhuhu sullaman a`ruju fih ila mardatika

translation.en: as a ladder by which I ascend to Your satisfaction,
and I can be secured from Your wrath
in the name of Your might and supremacy
and in the name of Your Prophet, Muhammad,
may Your blessings be upon him and his Household.
So, all praise be to You, O Lord;
You are invulnerably Omnipotent
and prudently Forbearing.
Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and include me with those who are thankful for Your bounties
and those who permanently mention Your graces.
7.My God, many a servant [of You]

segments.transliteration: amsa wa asbaha fi karbi almawti

translation.en: is in eves and morns suffering the agony of death,
and the rattles of death,

segments.arabic: وَٱلنَّظَرِ إِلىٰ مَا تَقْشَعِرُّ مِنْهُ ٱلْجُلُودُ
segments.transliteration: walnnazari ila ma taqsha`irru minhu aljuludu

translation.en: experiencing that which shudders the skins
and horrifies the hearts;

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا فِي عَافِيَةٍ مِنْ ذٰلِكَ كُلِّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ana fi `afiyatin min dhalika kullihi

translation.en: but I am safe from all that.
So, all praise be to You, O Lord;
You are invulnerably Omnipotent
and prudently Forbearing.
Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and include me with those who are thankful for Your bounties
and those who permanently mention Your graces.
8.My God, many a servant [of You]
is in eves and morns ailing and feeling pain
with moans and wails,
and is rolling over and over with anguish;
neither finding any way of escaping it

segments.transliteration: wa la yusighu ta`aman wa la sharaban

translation.en: nor is he finding the taste of any food or drink;

segments.transliteration: wa ana fi sihhatin mina albadani

translation.en: while I am enjoying body health
and safe living.
All that [wellbeing] is from You.
So, all praise be to You, O Lord;
You are invulnerably Omnipotent
and prudently Forbearing.
Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and include me with those who are thankful for Your bounties
and those who permanently mention Your graces.
9.O my God, many a servant [of You]
is in eves and morns fearful, frightened,
terrified, scared,
fugitive, runaway,
hiding in a tight burrow
or in an ordinary den;
while the entire spacious earth has become too narrow to secure him a place.
He thus cannot devise any plan

segments.transliteration: wa la manja wa la mawan

translation.en: or find any shelter or retreat.

segments.transliteration: wa ana fi amnin wa tuma'ninatin wa `afiyatin

translation.en: While I am living in security, tranquility, and good health;
all of which is from You.
So, all praise be to You, O Lord;
You are invulnerably Omnipotent
and prudently Forbearing.
Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and include me with those who are thankful for Your bounties
and those who permanently mention Your graces.
O my God and Master,
many a servant [of You]
is in eves and morns enchained
and shackled in iron shackles
in the hands of his enemies whom show him no mercy;
[and he is] separated from his family members and children
and detached from his friends and country;

segments.arabic: يَتَوَقَّعُ كُلَّ سَاعَةٍ بِأَيِّ قَتْلَةٍ يُقْتَلُ
segments.transliteration: yatawaqqa`u kulla sa`atin bi-ayyi qitlatin yuqtalu

translation.en: each hour, he wonders what kind of killing he will be killed
and what kind of mutilation he will be mutilated.

segments.arabic: وَ أَنَا فِي عَافِيَةٍ مِنْ ذٰلِكَ كُلِّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ana fi `afiyatin min dhalika kullihi

translation.en: But I am safe from all this.
So, all praise be to You, O Lord;
You are invulnerably Omnipotent
and prudently Forbearing.
Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and include me with those who are thankful for Your bounties
and those who permanently mention Your graces.
10.My God, many a servant [of You]
is in eves and morns contending in war,
conducting the fighting by himself,

segments.arabic: قَدْ غَشِيَتْهُ الْأَعْداءُ مِنْ كُلِّ جَانِبٍ
segments.transliteration: qad ghashiyat-hu al-a`da'u min kulli janibin

translation.en: and is surrounded by enemies from all sides
with swords, spears, and instruments of wars.
He is trembling inside iron [i.e. his armor],
and trying desperately to do everything possible.
He cannot find any further means
and cannot find any escape.
He is seriously experiencing wounds
or is totally covered with his blood
[struggling] under the toes of the hooves and under feet;
he desires a drink of water

segments.transliteration: aw nazratan ila ahlihi wa waladihi

translation.en: or a look at his folk and children
but he cannot get it.

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا فِي عَافِيَةٍ مِنْ ذٰلِكَ كُلِّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ana fi `afiyatin min dhalika kullihi

translation.en: While I am safe from all that.
So, all praise be to You, O Lord;
You are invulnerably Omnipotent
and prudently Forbearing.
Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and include me with those who are thankful for Your bounties
and those who permanently mention Your graces.
My God, many a servant [of You]

segments.arabic: أَمْسَىٰ وَ أَصْبَحَ فِي ظُلُمَاتِ ٱلْبِحَارِ
segments.transliteration: amsa wa asbaha fi zulumati albihari

translation.en: is in eves and morns living in the darkness of seas,
in the storms of winds,
and in horrors and billows;
anticipating drowning and perdition;
he does not have any means in his power;
or is afflicted with a thunderbolt,
demolition, burning,
or choking, swallowing of the earth,
deformation, or striking.

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا فِي عَافِيَةٍ مِنْ ذٰلِكَ كُلِّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ana fi `afiyatin min dhalika kullihi

translation.en: While I am safe from all that.
So, all praise be to You, O Lord;
You are invulnerably Omnipotent
and prudently Forbearing.
Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and include me with those who are thankful for Your bounties
and those who permanently mention Your graces.
My God, many a servant [of You]
is in eves and morns on journeys,
far away from his family members and sons,
bewildered in deserts,
wandering with beasts, wild animals, and pests,
alone and forlorn;
he can find no way out
nor can he follow any right path;
or is suffering cold, hot weather,
hunger, nudity,
or other sorts of tribulations
of which I am free;
and I am released from all that.
So, all praise be to You, O Lord;
You are invulnerably Omnipotent
and prudently Forbearing.
Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and include me with those who are thankful for Your bounties
and those who permanently mention Your graces.
My God, Master, and Lord,
many a servant [of You]
is in eves and morns poor, needy,
naked, deprived,
abortive, abandoned,
hungry, and thirsty;
expecting someone to bestow a favor upon him;
or many a slave—who enjoys a high standing with You
or who is superior in prominence than I am in Your view
and more worshipping for You than I am—
is chained and subdued;

segments.arabic: قَدْ حُمِّلَ ثِقْلاً مِنْ تَعَبِ ٱلْعَنَاءِ
segments.transliteration: qad hummila thiqlan min ta`abi al`ana'i

translation.en: he has been overloaded with the exhaustion of pains,
the hardship of slavery,
the encumbrance of serfdom,
and the burden of imposition;
or is encountering a hard tribulation

segments.arabic: لاَ قِبَلَ لَهُ بِهِ إِلاَّ بِمَنِّكَ عَلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: la qibala lahu bihi illa bimannika `alayhi

translation.en: that he cannot stand except by a favor that You bestow upon him;
while I am served, turning in bliss,
relieved from that, honored,
and released from what that one suffers.
So, all praise be to You, O Lord;
You are invulnerably Omnipotent
and prudently Forbearing.
Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and include me with those who are thankful for Your bounties
and those who permanently mention Your graces.
My God and Master,

segments.transliteration: wa kam min `abdin amsa wa asbaha

translation.en: many a servant [of You] is in eves and morns
ailing, ill,
sick, and seriously unwell;
[laid] on the bed of ailment and dressed with it;
he turns right and left [unrestfully]

segments.arabic: لاَ يَعْرِفُ شَيْئاً مِنْ لَذَّةِ ٱلطَّعَامِ
segments.transliteration: la ya`rifu shay'an min ladhdhati altta`ami

translation.en: and cannot find the good taste of food
or the good taste of drink;
he looks at himself with grief

segments.arabic: لاَ يَسْتَطِيعُ لَهَا ضَرّاً وَلاَ نَفْعاً
segments.transliteration: la yastati`u laha darran wa la naf`an

translation.en: because he cannot make any harm or benefit to himself.

segments.transliteration: wa ana khilwun min dhalika kullihi

translation.en: While I am free from all that
on account of Your magnanimity and generosity.
So, there is no god save You. All glory be to You;
You are invulnerably Omnipotent
and prudently Forbearing.
Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and include me with the worshippers of You,
those who are thankful for Your bounties,
and those who permanently mention Your graces;
and have mercy upon me, by Your mercy;
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy.
My Lord and Master,

segments.transliteration: wa kam min `abdin amsa wa asbaha

translation.en: many a servant [of You] is in eves and morns

segments.transliteration: wa qad dana yawmuhu min hatfihi

translation.en: receiving the day of his death;

segments.arabic: وَأَحَدْقَ بِهِ مَلَكُ ٱلْمَوْتِ فِي أَعْوَانِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ahdaqa bihi malaku almawti fi a`wanihi

translation.en: and the Angel of Death and his assistants are gazing at him;
he is thus suffering the agonies and pains of death.
His eyes are turning right and left,

segments.arabic: يَنظُرُ إِلَىٰ أَحِبَّائِهِ وَ أَوِدَّائِهِ وَ أَخِلاَّئِهِ
segments.transliteration: yanzuru ila ahibba'ihi wa awidda'ihi wa akhilla'ihi

translation.en: looking at his dear, beloved, and intimate friends;
he is restrained from ability to talk
and withheld from speaking.
He looks at himself with grief

segments.arabic: لاَ يَسْتَطِيعُ لَهَا ضَرّاً وَلاَ نَفْعاً
segments.transliteration: la yastati`u laha darran wa la naf`an

translation.en: because he cannot make any harm or benefit to himself;

segments.transliteration: wa ana khilwun min dhalika kullihi

translation.en: but I am free from all that
on account of Your magnanimity and generosity.
So, there is no god save You. All glory be to You;
You are invulnerably Omnipotent
and prudently Forbearing.
Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and include me with those who are thankful for Your bounties
and those who permanently mention Your graces;
and have mercy upon me, by Your mercy.
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!
My God, Lord, and Master,

segments.transliteration: wa kam min `abdin amsa wa asbaha

translation.en: many a servant [of You] is in eves and morns
in the straits of jails and prisons

segments.transliteration: wa kurabiha wa dhulliha wa hadidiha

translation.en: and in their agonies, humiliation, and iron;
controlled by their keepers and guards;

segments.arabic: فَلاَ يَدْرِي أَيُّ حَالٍ يُفْعَلُ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: fala yadri ayyu halin yuf`alu bihi

translation.en: so, he has no idea what will be done to him
and which punishment will be set upon him.

segments.transliteration: fa huwa fi durrin mina al`ayshi

translation.en: He is suffering harsh living
and barely sufficient manner of living.
He looks at himself with grief

segments.arabic: لاَ يَسْتَطِيعُ لَهَا ضَرّاً وَلاَ نَفْعاً
segments.transliteration: la yastati`u laha darran wa la naf`an

translation.en: because he cannot make any harm or benefit to himself;

segments.transliteration: wa ana khilwun min dhalika kullihi

translation.en: but I am free from all that
on account of Your magnanimity and generosity.
So, there is no god save You. All glory be to You;
You are invulnerably Omnipotent
and prudently Forbearing.
Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and include me with the worshippers of You,
those who are thankful for Your bounties,
and those who permanently mention Your graces;
and have mercy upon me, by Your mercy,
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy.
My God, Lord, and Master,

segments.transliteration: wa kam min `abdin amsa wa asbaha

translation.en: many a servant [of You] is in eves and morns
permanently suffering under the vicissitudes of time,
surrounded by hardships,

segments.transliteration: wa faraqa awidda'ahu wa ahibba'ahu wa akhilla'ahu

translation.en: departing his dear, beloved, and intimate friends,
receiving the evenings while he is imprisoned, humiliated, and lowly,
in the hands of the unbelievers and the enemies
who dominate him from the right and the left;
he has been locked up in cellars
and overloaded with iron (shackles);

segments.arabic: لاَ يَرَىٰ شَيْئاً مِنْ ضِيَاءِ ٱلدُّنيَا
segments.transliteration: la yara shay'an min diya'i alddunya

translation.en: he cannot see any of the light of the world
nor any of its rest;
he looks at himself with grief

segments.arabic: لاَ يَسْتَطِيعُ لَهَا ضَرّاًوَ لاَ نَفْعاً
segments.transliteration: la yastati`u laha darran wa la naf`an

translation.en: because he cannot make any harm or benefit to himself;

segments.transliteration: wa ana khilwun min dhalika kullihi

translation.en: but I am free from all that
on account of Your magnanimity and generosity.
So, there is no god save You. All glory be to You;
You are invulnerably Omnipotent
and prudently Forbearing.
Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and include me with the worshippers of You,
those who are thankful for Your bounties,
and those who permanently mention Your graces;
and have mercy upon me, by Your mercy,
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy.
and by Your might; O All-generous.
I will insistently ask for that which is with You,
persist on You,
and extend my hand towards You,
although it has committed offenses against You.
O my Lord, whose protection should I seek
and whose refuge should I take?
None can stand for me save You.
Will You reject me while You are my one and only confidence
and upon You alone do I rely?

segments.arabic: أَسْالُكَ بِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي وَضَعْتَهُ عَلىٰ ٱلسَّمَاءِ فَٱسْتَقَلَّتْ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka bismika alladhi wada`tahu `ala alssama'i fastaqallat

translation.en: I thus beseech You in the name of Your Name that when You put it on the heavens, they raised,
when You put it on the earth, it settled down,
when You put it on the mountains, they became firm,
when You put it on the night, it darkled,
and when You put it on the daylight, it lit up,

segments.arabic: أَن تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: [I beseech You] to bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa an taqdiya li hawa'iji kullaha

translation.en: satisfy all my wants,
forgive all my sins,
the trivial and the significant,
and expand my sustenance

segments.arabic: مَا تُبَلِّغُنِي بِهِ شَرَفَ ٱلدُّنيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: ma tuballighuni bihi sharafa alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: to the scope that I can attain the honor of this world and the Hereafter.
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!
My Master, Your help do I seek;

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَعِنِّي
segments.transliteration: fasalli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin wa a`inni

translation.en: so, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and help me!
Your protection do I seek; so, (please) protect me.
Through my obedience to You, (please) suffice me from obedience to Your servants.
Through my entreaty to You; (please) suffice me from beseeching Your creatures.

segments.arabic: وَٱنقُلْنِي مِنْ ذُلِّ ٱلْفَقْرِ إِلَىٰ عِزِّ ٱلْغِنَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wanqulni min dhulli alfaqri ila `izzi alghina

translation.en: Transfer me from the humiliation of poverty to the honor of richness

segments.arabic: وَمِن ذُلِّ ٱلْمَعَاصِي إِلَىٰ عِزِّ ٱلطَّاعَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa min dhulli alma`asi ila `izzi altta`ati

translation.en: and from the humiliation of acts of disobedience to You to the honor of obedience to You.

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ فَضَّلْتَنِي عَلَىٰ كَثِيرٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ

translation.en: You have really given me preference over many of Your creatures
out of Your magnanimity and generosity,
although I do not deserve it.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي فَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَلَىٰ ذَلَك كُلِّهِ

translation.en: My God, all praise be to You for all that.
(Please) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and include me with those who are thankful for Your bounties

segments.arabic: وَلآِلاَئِكَ مِنَ ٱلذَّاكِرِينَ [وَارْحَمْنِي، يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ]

translation.en: and those who permanently mention Your graces.

text.en: You should then prostrate yourself and say the following:

translation.en: My lowly face is humbly prostrating
before Your All-majestic and Almighty Face.
My rotten, mortal face is prostrating
before Your Everlasting, Eternal Face.
My poor face is prostrating
before Your All-dependent and All-great Face.

segments.transliteration: sajada wajhi wa sam`i wa basari

translation.en: Prostrating are my face, my hearing, my sight,

segments.transliteration: wa lahmi wa dami wa jildi

translation.en: my flesh, my blood, my skin,

segments.transliteration: wa `azmi wa ma aqallat al-ardu minni

translation.en: my bones, and whatever part of me that is carried by the earth
before Allah, the Lord of the Worlds.
O Allah, return upon my ignorance with Your indulgence,
upon my neediness with Your self-sufficiency,
upon my humiliation with Your Almightiness and Authority,
upon my powerlessness with Your omnipotence,
upon my fearfulness with Your security,

segments.transliteration: wa `ala dhunubi wa khatayaya bi`afwika wa rahmatika

translation.en: and upon my sins and offenses with Your pardon and mercy.
O All-beneficent! O All-merciful!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إنِي أَدْرَأُ بِكَ فِي نَحْرِ…
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni adra'u bika fi nahri…

translation.en: O Allah, I seek You to protect me against…

text.en: Now, you may mention the name of your enemy.

translation.en: I seek Your protection against his evils;
so, (please) save me from him just as You have saved Your Prophets,
Your intimate servants among Your creatures,
and Your righteous servants
against the tyrants amongst Your creatures,
and the oppressors amongst Your enemies
and against the evil of all Your creatures.
[I ask You] in the name of Your mercy; O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!
Verily, You have power over all things.

segments.transliteration: wa hasbuna allahu wa ni`ma alwakilu

translation.en: Sufficient unto us is Allah; He is the best protector.

text.en: In ‘Misbah al-Mutahajjid’, it has been narrated on the authority of Abu-Hamzah al-Thumali that Imam `Ali ibn al-husayn Zayn al-`abidin (peace be upon him) used to offer prayers the whole nights of Ramadan. At the last hour of the Month of Ramadan nights, he used to say the following supplication:

translation.en: O Allah, do not discipline me by means of Your punishment

segments.transliteration: wa la tamkur bi fi hilatika

translation.en: and do not subject me to Your planned strategy.

segments.arabic: مِنْ أَيْنَ لِيَ ٱلْخَيْرُ يَا رَبِّ
segments.transliteration: min ayna liya alkhayru ya rabbi

translation.en: How can I attain welfare, O Lord,
while it is not found elsewhere save with You?
How can I find redemption
while it cannot be attained save through You?

segments.arabic: لاَ ٱلَّذِي أَحْسَنَ ٱسْتَغْنَىٰ عَنْ عَوْنِكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: la alladhi ahsana istaghna `an `awnika wa rahmatika

translation.en: Neither he who has done righteous deeds can dispense with Your aid and mercy

segments.transliteration: wa la alladhi asa'a wa ijtara'a `alayka wa lam yurdika

translation.en: nor can he who did evildoings, dare to challenge you,
and did not arrive at Your pleasure find an exit out of Your power.

text.en: Repeat this phrase as many times as possible in one breath:

translation.en: O Lord…

text.en: Then continue...

translation.en: Through You have I known You.
You showed me the way to You
and invited me to come towards You.

segments.arabic: وَلَوْلا أَنْتَ لَمْ أَدْرِ مَا أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: wa lawla anta lam adri ma anta

translation.en: Had it been not for You, I would have never known who You are.
All praise be to Allah alone Who gives answer to me whenever I pray Him

segments.transliteration: wa in kuntu bati'an hina yad`uni

translation.en: although I am slow whenever He invites me.
All praise be to Allah alone Who gives me whenever I ask Him

segments.transliteration: wa in kuntu bakhilan hina yastaqriduni

translation.en: although I become close-fisted when He asks me.

segments.arabic: وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي أُنَادِيهِ كُلَّمَا شِئْتُ لِحَاجَتِي
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi alladhi unadihi kullama shi'tu lihajati

translation.en: All praise be to Allah alone Whom I call whenever I need something

segments.arabic: وَأَخْلُو بِهِ حَيْثُ شِئْتُ لِسِرِّي بِغَيْرِ شَفِيعٍ
segments.transliteration: wa akhlu bihi haythu shi'tu lisirri bighayri shafi`in

translation.en: and Whom I secretly converse whenever I want without need for an intercessor;
He thus grants my need.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ أَدْعُو غَيْرَهُ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi la ad`u ghayrahu

translation.en: All praise be to Allah alone other than Whom I never pray,

segments.arabic: وَلَوْ دَعَوْتُ غَيْرَهُ لَمْ يَسْتَجِبْ لِي دُعَائِي
segments.transliteration: wa law da`awtu ghayrahu lam yastajib li du`a'i

translation.en: and even if I pray anyone else, he shall never be able to respond to my prayer.

segments.arabic: وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ أَرْجُو غَيْرَهُ
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi alladhi la arju ghayrahu

translation.en: All praise be to Allah alone for other than Whom I do not hope,

segments.transliteration: wa law rajawtu ghayrahu la'akhlafa raja'i

translation.en: and even if I hope for anyone else, he shall certainly disappoint me.

segments.arabic: وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي وَكَلَنِي إِلَيْهِ فَأَكْرَمَنِي
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi alladhi wakalani ilayhi fa akramani

translation.en: All praise be to Allah alone Who has accepted me to depend upon Him and, thus, bestowed favors upon me.

segments.transliteration: wa lam yakilni ila alnnasi fayuhinuni

translation.en: He has not left me to people who will thus definitely humiliate me.
All praise be to Allah alone Who has sought my friendship
while He can dispense with me.
All praise be to Allah alone Who showed Himself gentle and considerate towards me
as if I have not sinned.
Accordingly, my Lord is the only One Whom I should thank
and He is the worthiest of being thanked by me.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَجِدُ سُبُلَ ٱلْمَطَالِبِ إِلَيْكَ مُشْرَعَةً
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ajidu subula almatalibi ilayka mushra`atan

translation.en: O Allah, I find the courses to asking from You wide open,
the springs to hoping for You overflowing,
seeking the help of Your favors reachable for them who have hopefully looked forward to You,

segments.transliteration: wa abwaba alddu`a'i ilayka lilssarikhina maftuhatan

translation.en: and the doors of praying You vulnerable for them who cry to You.

segments.transliteration: wa a`lamu annaka lilrrajina bimawdi`i ijabatin

translation.en: I know for sure that You give favorable reply to the petitioners
and relentlessly succor the aggrieved;

segments.transliteration: wa anna fi allahfi ila judika

translation.en: and to long for Your beneficence
and to accept Your will and judgment
are well compensations for that which the close-fisted misers deny
and alternative to that which is possessed by the stingy.

segments.transliteration: wa anna alrrahila ilayka qaribu almasafati

translation.en: He who travels towards You will easily reach his destination.
You do not conceal Yourself against Your creatures
unless their evildoings stand between them and You.
I am thus turning to You carrying my appeals
and directing towards You carrying my needs.
I have sought the help of You alone
and begging You through my prayer
although I do not deserve to be observed by You
or to be pardoned by You.
Rather, I have full confidence in Your generosity,
I have relied upon the truthfulness of Your promise,
I have sought shelter with my faith in Your Oneness
and my certitude in the fact -which you know-
that I have no Lord other than You
and there is no god save You
alone, without having any partner.

segments.transliteration: allahumma anta alqa'ilu wa qawluka haqqun

translation.en: O Allah, It is You Who have said, and Your sayings are always true
and Your promise is always valid:
“Ask Allah of His bounty.

segments.arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ عَلِيماً“

translation.en: Verily Allah is ever Merciful to you.”

segments.transliteration: wa laysa min sifatika ya sayyidi

translation.en: It is not Your habit, O my Chief,

segments.transliteration: an ta'mura bissu'ali wa tamna`a al`atiyyata

translation.en: that You instruct us to implore You and then You stop giving us,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ ٱلْمَنَّانُ بِٱلْعَطِيَّاتِ عَلَىٰ أَهْلِ مَمْلَكَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa anta almannanu bil`atiyyati `ala ahli mamlakatika

translation.en: while You are the All-benefactor Who confers upon the people of Your Kingdom with (innumerable) donations
and You are the All-generous Who meets them with the kindness of Your compassion.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي رَبَّيْتَنِي فِي نِعَمِكَ وَإِحْسَانِكَ صَغِيراً
segments.transliteration: ilahi rabbaytani fi ni`amika wa ihsanika saghiran

translation.en: O my God, You brought me up amid Your bounties and favors when I was little
and You have mentioned me when I have grown up.

segments.arabic: فَيَا مَنْ رَبَّانِي فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا بِإِحْسَانِهِ
segments.transliteration: faya man rabbani fi alddunya bi'ihsanihi

translation.en: So, O He Who brought me up in this world with His bounties,
favors, and graces,

segments.arabic: وَأَشَارَ لِي فِي ٱلآخِرَةِ إِلَىٰ عَفْوِهِ وَكَرَمِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ashara li fi al-akhirati ila `afwihi wa karamihi

translation.en: and, in the Hereafter, will have referred to me with His amnesty and generosity!
My acquaintance with You, O my Lord, is the path taking me to You
and my love for You is the intermediary between You and me.

segments.transliteration: wa ana wathiqun min dalili bidalalatika

translation.en: I am sure of the path to which You have lead me

segments.transliteration: wa sakinun min shafi`i ila shafa`atika

translation.en: and I rely upon my intermediary’s success before You.

segments.arabic: أَدْعُوكَ يَا سَيِّدِي بِلِسَانٍ قَدْ أَخْرَسَهُ ذَنْبُهُ
segments.transliteration: ad`uka ya sayyidi bilisanin qad akhrasahu dhanbuhu

translation.en: I pray You, O my Chief, with a tongue muted by its sins.

segments.arabic: رَبِّ أُنَاجِيكَ بِقَلْبٍ قَدْ أَوْبَقَهُ جُرْمُهُ
segments.transliteration: rabbi unajika biqalbin qad awbaqahu jurmuhu

translation.en: O Lord! I confidentially speak to You with a heart degraded by its offenses.
I pray You, O Lord, with terror, desire,
hope, and fear.
Whenever I think of my sins, O my Master, I panic,
but when I think of Your generosity, I feel desirous (for Your pardon).
Therefore, if You forgive me, You are already the best of those who show mercy,
and If You punish me, You are then not wronging me.

segments.arabic: حُجَّتِي يَا اللَّهُ فِي جُرْأَتِي عَلَىٰ مَسْأَلَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: hujjati ya allahu fi jur'ati `ala mas'alatika

translation.en: Yet, it is Your munificence and Your generosity, O Allah, that gave me the courage to pray You,

segments.arabic: مَعَ إِتْيَانِي مَا تَكْرَهُ جُودُكَ وَكَرَمُكَ
segments.transliteration: ma`a ityani ma takrahu juduka wa karamuka

translation.en: despite that I have committed things that You dislike.

segments.arabic: وَعُدَّتِي فِي شِدَّتِي مَعَ قِلَّةِ حَيَائِي رَأْفَتُكَ وَرَحْمَتُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa `uddati fi shiddati ma`a qillati haya'i ra'fatuka wa rahmatuka

translation.en: It is Your kindness and mercy that I use as my means during misfortunes inflicting me despite my shamelessness.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ رَجَوْتُ أَنْ لاَ تَخِيبَ بَيْنَ ذَيْنِ وَذَيْنِ مُنْيَتِي
segments.transliteration: wa qad rajawtu an la takhiba bayna dhayni wa dhayni munyati

translation.en: I thus hope that my expectation will not be disappointed amid these two matters.
So, make my hopes become real
and answer my prayers.
O Greatest Besought One that has been ever besought,
and the Most Favorable Hoped One!

segments.arabic: عَظُمَ يَا سَيِّدِي أَمَلِي وَسَاءَ عَمَلِي

translation.en: My expectation, O my Chief, has been great but my deed has been bad.
So, grant me Your pardon as much as my expectation,
and do not punish me for the worst of my deed.

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ كَرَمَكَ يَجِلُّ عَنْ مُجَازَاةِ ٱلْمُذْنِبِينَ

translation.en: Verily, Your generosity is too great to be compared to the penalty of the guilty,
and Your tolerance is too immense to be compared to the punishment of the negligent.
I, O my Chief, am seeking refuge with Your benevolence,
fleeing from You towards You,

segments.arabic: مُتَنَجِّزٌ مَا وَعَدْتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّفْحِ عَمَّنْ أَحْسَنَ بِكَ ظَنّاً
segments.transliteration: mutanajjizun ma wa`adta min alssafhi `amman ahsana bika zannan

translation.en: hoping for the amnesty that You have promised to confer upon one who keeps good idea about You.

segments.arabic: وَمَا أَنَا يَا رَبِّ وَمَا خَطَرِي
segments.transliteration: wa ma ana ya rabbi wa ma khatari

translation.en: What am I? O Lord! What importance do I have?
Do me a favor out of Your benevolence
and be charitable to me by means of pardoning me.
O my Lord! Cover me with Your protective covering
and overlook reproaching me out of the generosity of Your Face.

segments.arabic: فَلَوِ ٱطَّلَعَ ٱلْيَوْمَ عَلَىٰ ذَنْبِي غَيْرُكَ مَا فَعَلْتُهُ
segments.transliteration: falaw ittala`a alyawma `ala dhanbi ghayruka ma fa`altuhu

translation.en: In fact, if anyone other than You has watched me while committing these sins, I may not commit them.

segments.transliteration: wa law khiftu ta`jila al`uqubati lajtanabtuhu

translation.en: Had I anticipated immediateness of punishment, I might have avoided doing them.
Yet, this does not mean that You are the least important of those who watch over me
or You are the least weighty of those who observe me.

segments.arabic: بَلْ لأَنَّكَ يَا رَبِّ خَيْرُ ٱلسَّاتِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: bal li'annaka ya rabbi khayru alssatirina

translation.en: Rather, this is because You, O my Lord, are the best of those who cover up (one’s defects),
the wisest of those who judge,
the most generous of those who act generously,
the concealer of defects,
the Forgiver of sins,
and the Knower of the unseen.
You conceal the defects out of Your liberality
and put off punishment because of Your forbearance.

segments.arabic: فَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَلَىٰ حِلْمِكَ بَعْدَ عِلْمِكَ

translation.en: Hence, all praise be to You, for You act tolerably although You have full knowledge
and for Your pardon even though You have the absolute authority.

segments.arabic: وَيَحْمِلُنِي وَيُجَرِّئُنِي عَلَىٰ مَعْصِيَتِكَ حِلْمُكَ عَنِّي
segments.transliteration: wa yahmiluni wa yujarri'uni `ala ma`siyatika hilmuka `anni

translation.en: It is Your forbearance with me that gives me latitude and makes me dare to break Your laws.

segments.arabic: وَيَدْعُونِي إِلَىٰ قِلَّةِ ٱلْحَيَاءِ سِتْرُكَ عَلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: wa yad`uni ila qillati alhaya'i sitruka `alayya

translation.en: It is Your concealing my faults that makes me act shamelessly before You.

segments.arabic: وَيُسْرِعُنِي إِلَىٰ ٱلتَوَثُّبِ عَلَىٰ مَحَارِمِكَ مَعْرِفَتِي بِسَعَةِ رَحْمَتِكَ وَعَظِيمِ عَفْوِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa yusri`uni ila alttawaththubi `ala maharimika ma`rifati bias`ati rahmatika wa `azimi `afwika

translation.en: It is my acquaintance with the broadness of Your mercy and the magnitude of Your pardon that make me hurry to violate that which You have deemed forbidden.
O Indulgent! O Compassionate!
O Ever-living! O Self-subsistent!
O Forgiver of sins!
O Accepter of repentance!
O Owner of matchless bounties!
O He who has been doing favors since eternity!
Where is Your magnificent concealment (of one’s faults)?
Where is Your irreversible pardon?
Where is Your abrupt relief?
Where is Your immediate aid?
Where is Your boundless mercy?
Where is Your overflowing gifts?
Where are Your pleasant endowments?
Where are Your beautiful benefits?
Where is Your outstanding grace?
Where are Your giant bounties?
Where are Your eternal favors?
Where is Your generous liberality? O Generous Giver!

segments.transliteration: bihi wa bimuhammadin wa ali muhammadin fastanqidhni

translation.en: In Your name and in the name of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad, save me!
In the name of Your mercy, deliver me!
O All-benevolent!
O All-beneficent!
O All-gracious! O All-compassionate!

segments.arabic: لَسْتُ أَتَّكِلُ فِي ٱلنَّجَاةِ مِنْ عِقَابِكَ عَلَىٰ أَعْمَالِنَا
segments.transliteration: lastu attakilu fi alnnajati min `iqabika `ala a`malina

translation.en: In my salvation from Your punishment, I do not rely upon my deeds;
rather, I depend on Your liberal generosity to us,

segments.transliteration: li'annaka ahlu alttaqwa wa ahlu almaghfirati

translation.en: because You are verily the Lord of righteousness and the Lord of forgiveness.
You take the initiative in doing good out of Your graciousness
and overlook the sins out of Your generosity.
We thus do not know which of Your graces we should thank:

segments.arabic: أَجَمِيلَ مَا تَنْشُرُ أَمْ قَبِيحَ مَا تَسْتُرُ
segments.transliteration: ajamila ma tanshuru am qabiha ma tasturu

translation.en: should it be the handsome elegance that you spread over us, or our offensive deeds that you conceal?
Or should it be the fabulous favor that You grant and present,

segments.arabic: أَمْ كَثِيرَ مَا مِنْهُ نَجَّيْتَ وَعَافَيْتَ
segments.transliteration: am kathira ma minhu najjayta wa `afayta

translation.en: or the numerous misfortunes from which You have saved and relieved?
O Beloved of those who endear themselves to Him!

segments.arabic: وَيَا قُرَّةَ عَيْنِ مَنْ لاَذَ بِكَ وَٱنْقَطَعَ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ya qurrata `ayni man ladha bika wa inqata`a ilayka

translation.en: O delight of the eyes of those who resort to Him and communicate Him incessantly!
You are the All-benevolent and we are the malevolent.

segments.arabic: فَتَجَاوَزْ يَا رَبِّ عَنْ قَبِيحِ مَا عِنْدَنَا بِجَمِيلِ مَا عِنْدَكَ
segments.transliteration: fatajawaz ya rabbi `an qabihi ma `indana bijamili ma `indaka

translation.en: So, overlook, O Lord, the offensive that we hold by means of the good that You hold.

segments.arabic: وَأَيُّ جَهْلٍ يَا رَبِّ لاَ يَسَعُهُ جُودُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ayyu jahlin ya rabbi la yasa`uhu juduka

translation.en: There is not definitely any foolishness that can be uncovered by Your liberality.

segments.arabic: أَوْ أَيُّ زَمَانٍ أَطْوَلُ مِنْ أَنَاتِكَ
segments.transliteration: aw ayyu zamanin atwalu min anatika

translation.en: There is no period that may be longer than Your tolerance.

segments.arabic: وَمَا قَدْرُ أَعْمَالِنَا فِي جَنْبِ نِعَمِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ma qadaru a`malina fi janbi ni`amika

translation.en: What value remains for our deeds if compared to Your favors?

segments.arabic: وَكَيْفَ نَسْتَكْثِرُ أَعْمَالاً نُقَابِلُ بِهَا كَرَمَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa kayfa nastakthiru a`malan nuqabilu biha karamaka

translation.en: How can we ever deem much any deeds if compared to Your generosity?

segments.arabic: بَلْ كَيْفَ يَضِيقُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْمُذْنِبِينَ مَا وَسِعَهُمْ مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: bal kayfa yadiqu `ala almudhnibina ma wasi`ahum min rahmatika

translation.en: Moreover, how may Your broad mercy be narrow for the guilty?
O Extensive Forgiver!
O He Who extends both hands with mercy!
By Your Majesty I swear, O my Lord,

segments.arabic: لَوْ نَهَرْتَنِي مَا بَرِحْتُ مِنْ بَابِكَ
segments.transliteration: law nahartani ma barihtu min babika

translation.en: even if you chide me, I shall never leave Your Door
and I shall never stop flattering You!

segments.arabic: لِمَا ٱنْتَهَىٰ إِلَيَّ مِنَ ٱلْمَعْرِفَةِ بِجُودِكَ وَكَرَمِكَ
segments.transliteration: lima intaha ilayya min alma`rifati bijudika wa karamika

translation.en: This is because I have full acquaintance with Your (indescribable) generosity and bounty.
Verily, You do whatever You will.

segments.arabic: تُعَذِّبُ مَنْ تَشَاءُ بِمَا تَشَاءُ كَيْفَ تَشَاءُ
segments.transliteration: tu`adhdhibu man tasha'u bima tasha'u kayfa tasha'u

translation.en: You punish whomsoever You want however You want by whatever means You want.

segments.arabic: وَتَرْحَمُ مَنْ تَشَاءُ بِمَا تشَاءُ كَيْفَ تَشَاءُ
segments.transliteration: wa tarhamu man tasha'u bima tasha'u kayfa tasha'u

translation.en: You have mercy upon whomsoever You want however You want by whatever means You want.
None is supposed to interrogate You for whatever You do,
non can ever contend with You about Your authority,
none can ever have a share in that which You hold,
none can ever object to Your decisions,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَعْتَرِضُ عَلَيْكَ أَحَدٌ فِي تَدْبِيرِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la ya`taridu `alayka ahadun fi tadbirika

translation.en: and none can ever protest against that which You administer.
To You alone are creation and determination.
Blessed be Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ هٰذَا مَقَامُ مَنْ لاَذَ بِكَ
segments.transliteration: ya rabbi hadha maqamu man ladha bika

translation.en: O my Lord, this is the manner of one who seeks Your shelter,
resorts to Your liberality,
and has been accustomed to be included with Your benevolence and graciousness.

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ ٱلْجَوَادُ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَضِيقُ عَفْوُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa anta aljawadu alladhi la yadiqu `afwuka

translation.en: You are certainly the All-munificent Whose amnesty never shrinks,
Whose favor never reduces,
and Whose mercy never diminishes.

segments.transliteration: wa qad tawaththaqna minka bilssafhi alqadimi

translation.en: We have full confidence in You on account of Your eternal habit of pardons,
boundless kindness, and limitless mercy.

segments.arabic: أَفَتُرَاكَ يَا رَبِّ تُخْلِفُ ظُنُونَنَا أَوْ تُخَيِّبُ آمَالَنَا
segments.transliteration: afaturaka ya rabbi tukhlifu zununana aw tukhayyibu amalana

translation.en: Is it ever expectable, O Lord, that You may disappoint us or may act on the contrary of our expectations?

segments.arabic: كَلاَّ يَا كَرِيمُ فَلَيْسَ هٰذَا ظَنُّنَا بِكَ
segments.transliteration: kalla ya karimu falaysa hadha zannuna bika

translation.en: No, never. O Compassionate! This is neither our idea about You
nor our desire from You!

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ إِنَّ لَنَا فِيكَ أَمَلاً طَوِيلاً كَثِيراً
segments.transliteration: ya rabbi inna lana fika amalan tawilan kathiran

translation.en: O my Lord, verily we have hope, big and large, in You.
Verily, we have great expectation in You.

segments.arabic: عَصَيْنَاكَ وَنَحْنُ نَرْجُو أَنْ تَسْتُرَ عَلَيْنَا

translation.en: Albeit that we have disobeyed You, we still hope that You will cover our faults.

segments.arabic: وَدَعَوْنَاكَ وَنَحْنُ نَرْجُو أَنْ تَسْتَجِيبَ لَنَا
segments.transliteration: wa da`awnaka wa nahnu narju an tastajiba lana

translation.en: We have prayed You hoping that You will respond to us.
So, give success to our hopes, O our Lord!
We now know for sure what we deserve in exchange of our deeds.

segments.arabic: وَلكِنْ عِلْمُكَ فِينَا وَعِلْمُنَا بِأَنَّكَ لاَ تَصْرِفُنَا عَنْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa lakin `ilmuka fina wa `ilmuna bi'annaka la tasrifuna `anka

translation.en: Yet, Your knowledge about us and our knowledge that You shall never let us down
have urged us to desire for You

segments.transliteration: wa in kunna ghayra mustawjibina lirahmatika

translation.en: even if we do not deserve Your mercy.

segments.arabic: فَأَنْتَ أَهْلٌ أَنْ تَجُودَ عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَىٰ ٱلْمُذْنِبِينَ بِفَضْلِ سَعَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: fa'anta ahlun an tajuda `alayna wa `ala almudhnibina bifadli sa`atika

translation.en: However, You are the worthiest of conferring upon us and upon the guilty with the grace of Your broad benevolence.
So, confer upon us with that of which You are worthy

segments.arabic: وَجُدْ عَلَيْنَا فَإِنَّا مُحْتَاجُونَ إِلَىٰ نَيْلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa jud `alayna fa'inna muhtajuna ila naylika

translation.en: and act generously towards us, for we are in need for Your conferral.
O Oft-Forgiving, in Your light have we found the right path,
due to Your favor have we dispensed with the others,
and Your grace have we experienced in morns and eves.
Our sins are before You;

segments.transliteration: nastaghfiruka alllahumma minha wa natubu ilayka

translation.en: we beseech You, O Allah, to forgive them and we repent before You.

segments.transliteration: tatahabbabu ilayna bilnni`ami wa nu`ariduka bildhdhunubi

translation.en: Whilst You show affection to us through Your graces, we take ourselves away from You through our sins.
You good descend upon us
while our evildoing ascends to You.

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَزَلْ وَلاَ يَزَالُ مَلَكٌ كَرِيمٌ يَأْتِيكَ عَنَّا بِعَمَلٍ قَبِيحٍ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yazal wa la yazalu malakun karimun ya'tika `anna bi`amalin qabihin

translation.en: Albeit that a noble angel always carries to You our offensive deeds,

segments.arabic: فَلاَ يَمْنَعُكَ ذٰلِكَ مِنْ أَنْ تَحُوطَنَا بِنِعَمِكَ
segments.transliteration: fala yamna`unka dhalika min an tahutana bini`amika

translation.en: this has never made you stop encompassing us with Your graces
and conferring upon us your elegances.
Glory be to You! How Forbearing, Magnificent,
and Generous You are at all times!
Sacred be Your Names.
Grand be Your praise.
Munificent be Your deeds and acts.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ إِلٰهِي أَوْسَعُ فَضْلاً وَأَعْظَمُ حِلْماً
segments.transliteration: anta ilahi awsa`u fadlan wa a`zamu hilman

translation.en: You, O my God, are too expansive in graciousness and too great in forbearance

segments.transliteration: min an tuqayisani bifi`li wa khati'ati

translation.en: to punish me for my evildoings and sins.
(Here I am asking for) Amnesty! Amnesty! Amnesty!
O my Lord! O my Lord! O my Lord!
O Allah, cause us to be engaged with mentioning You,
save us from Your wrath,
deliver us from Your torture,
grant us Your donations,
confer upon us with Your grace,
and provide us the opportunity to go on pilgrimage to Your House
and to visit the tomb of Your Prophet,
may Your blessings, mercy,

segments.arabic: وَمَغْفِرَتُكَ وَرِضْوَانُكَ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰ أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa maghfiratuka wa ridwanuka `alayhi wa `ala ahli baytihi

translation.en: forgiveness, and pleasure be upon him and his Household.
Verily, You are nigh and ready to answer.
Bless us with acting upon the obedience to You,

segments.transliteration: wa tawaffana `ala millatika wa sunnati nabiyyika

translation.en: and receive us following the rule of You and Your Prophet,
blessings of Allah be on him and on his Household.
O Allah, forgive me and my parents,
and have mercy on them as they cared for me when I was little.
Reward them generously for their good deeds
and forgive their sins.
O Allah, forgive the faithful men and women,
be they alive or dead,

segments.transliteration: wa tabi` baynana wa baynahum bilkhayrati

translation.en: and join us together in bliss and happiness.
O Allah, forgive our living and dead persons,
our present and absent ones,
our male and female ones,
our infants and adults,
and our free ones and slaves.
Liars are those who ascribe rivals to Allah;
they have wandered far astray
and they will have suffered a manifest loss.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
seal my life with decency,

segments.arabic: وَٱكْفِنِي مَا أَهَمَّنِي مِنْ أَمْرِ دُنْيَايَ وَآخِرَتِي
segments.transliteration: wa ikfini ma ahammani min amri dunyaya wa akhirati

translation.en: help me overcome all that which aggrieves me in this world as well as the Hereafter,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُسَلِّطْ عَلَيَّ مَنْ لاَ يَرْحَمُنِي
segments.transliteration: wa la tusallit `alayya man la yarhamuni

translation.en: do not let him who does not have mercy upon me prevail on me,
always keep on me an everlasting, protective covering,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَسْلُبْنِي صَالِحَ مَا أَنْعَمْتَ بِهِ عَلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: wa la taslubni saliha ma an`amta bihi `alayya

translation.en: do not divest me of the well-mannered graces that You have conferred upon me,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي مِنْ فَضْلِكَ رِزْقاً وَاسِعاً حَلاَلاً طَيِّباً
segments.transliteration: warzuqni min fadlika rizqan wasi`an halalan tayyiban

translation.en: and provide me, out of Your grace, with lawfully gotten, delightful sustenance.
O Allah, keep me under Your alert surveillance,
protect me with Your support,
take care of me with Your comprehensive care,
grant me opportunity to go on pilgrimage to Your Holy House

segments.arabic: فِي عَامِنَا هٰذَا وَفِي كُلِّ عَامٍ

translation.en: in this year as well as all coming years,

segments.arabic: وَزِيَارَةَ قَبْرِ نَبِيِّكَ وَٱلأَئِمَّةِ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلامُ
segments.transliteration: wa ziyarata qabri nabiyyika wal-a'immati `alayhim alssalamu

translation.en: grant me to go on pilgrimage to the tombs of Your Prophet and the Imams, peace be upon them,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُخْلِنِي يَا رَبِّ مِنْ تِلْكَ ٱلْمَشَاهِدِ ٱلشَّرِيفَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa la tukhlini ya rabbi min tilka almashahidi alshsharifati

translation.en: and do not deprive me, O Lord, of such honorable scenes
and noble situations.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ تُبْ عَلَيَّ حَتَّىٰ لاَ أَعْصِيَكَ

translation.en: O Allah, accept my repentance so that I will not disobey you ever again,

segments.transliteration: wa alhimni alkhayra wa al`amala bihi

translation.en: inspire me with goodness, good-doing,

segments.transliteration: wa khashyataka billayli wa alnnahari ma abqaytani

translation.en: and fear of You all over day and night as long as You keep me alive.
O Lord of the worlds!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي كُلَّمَا قُلْتُ قَدْ تَهَيَّأْتُ وَتَعَبَّأْتُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni kullama qultu qad tahayya'tu wa ta`abba'tu

translation.en: O Allah, each time I decide to prepare and ready myself

segments.transliteration: wa qumtu lilssalati bayna yadayka wa najaytuka

translation.en: for offering prayers before You and conversing confidentially with You,

segments.arabic: أَلْقَيْتَ عَلَيَّ نُعَاساً إِذَا أَنَا صَلَّيْتُ

translation.en: You throw on me slumber whenever I stand for prayer;

segments.transliteration: wa salabtani munajataka idha ana najaytu

translation.en: thus, You deprive me of conversing with You confidentially whenever I try so.

segments.arabic: مَالِي كُلَّمَا قُلْتُ قَدْ صَلُحَتْ سَرِيرَتِي
segments.transliteration: mali kullama qultu qad saluhat sarirati

translation.en: What is the wrong with me? Whenever I feel that my inner self has become decent

segments.transliteration: wa qaruba min majalisi alttawwabina majlisi

translation.en: and that my session has become similar to the sessions of those who turn much to You,

segments.arabic: عَرَضَتْ لِي بَلِيَّةٌ أَزَالَتْ قَدَمِي وَحَالَتْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ خِدْمَتِكَ
