segments.transliteration: `aradat li baliyyatun azalat qadami wa halat bayni wa bayna khidmatika

translation.en: a misfortune would inflict me, causing my feet to be shaken, and standing against my showing servitude to You.
O my Master, perhaps You have pushed me away from Your door
and You have dismissed me from Your service!

segments.arabic: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ رَأَيْتَنِي مُسْتَخِفّاً بِحَقِّكَ فَأَقْصَيْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: aw la`allaka ra'aytani mustakhiffan bihaqqika fa'aqsaytani

translation.en: Or, perhaps, You have noticed that I belittled the duties that You have made incumbent upon me, and You thus set me aside!

segments.arabic: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ رَأَيْتَنِي مُعْرِضاً عَنْكَ فَقَلَيْتَنِي

translation.en: Or, perhaps, You have seen me turning away from You and thus You have turned away from me!

segments.arabic: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ وَجَدْتَنِي فِي مَقَامِ ٱلْكَاذِبِينَ فَرَفَضْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: aw la`allaka wajadtani fi maqami alkadhibina farafadtani

translation.en: Or, perhaps, You have found me in the manner of the liars and thus You have rejected me!

segments.arabic: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ رَأَيْتَنِي غَيْرَ شَاكِرٍ لِنَعْمَائِكَ فَحَرَمْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: aw la`allaka ra'aytani ghayra shakirin lina`ma'ika faharamtani

translation.en: Or, perhaps, You have observed me showing no gratitude for Your graces and thus You have deprived me of them!

segments.arabic: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ فَقَدْتَنِي مِنْ مَجَالِسِ ٱلْعُلَمَاءِ فَخَذَلْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: aw la`allaka faqadtani min majalisi al`ulama'i fakhadhaltani

translation.en: Or, perhaps, You have not found me in the meetings of the scholars and thus You have let me down!

segments.arabic: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ رَأَيْتَنِي فِي ٱلْغَافِلِينَ فَمِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ آيَسْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: aw la`allaka ra'aytani filghafilina famin rahmatika ayastani

translation.en: Or, perhaps, You have seen me among the inattentive ones and thus You have made me despair of Your mercy!

segments.arabic: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ رَأَيْتَنِي آلِفَ مَجَالِسِ ٱلْبَطَّالِينَ فَبَيْنِي وَبَيْنَهُمْ خَلَّيْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: aw la`allaka ra'aytani alafu majalisa albattalina fabayni wa baynahum khallaytani

translation.en: Or, perhaps, You have found me fond of the sessions of the wrongdoers and thus You have referred me to them!

segments.arabic: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ لَمْ تُحِبَّ أَنْ تَسْمَعَ دُعَائِي فَبَاعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: aw la`allaka lam tuhibba an tasma`a du`a'i faba`adtani

translation.en: Or, perhaps, You have not willed to hear my prayers and thus You have kept me away from You!

segments.transliteration: aw la`allaka bijurmi wa jarirati kafaytani

translation.en: Or, perhaps, You have punished me for my offenses and sins!

segments.arabic: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ بِقِلَّةِ حَيَائِي مِنْكَ جَازَيْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: aw la`allaka biqillati haya'i minka jazaytani

translation.en: Or, perhaps, You have penalized me for my shamelessness!

segments.arabic: فَإِنْ عَفَوْتَ يَا رَبِّ فَطَالَمَا عَفَوْتَ عَنِ ٱلْمُذْنِبِينَ قَبْلِي
segments.transliteration: fa'in `afawta ya rabbi fatalama `afawta `an almudhnibina qabli

translation.en: If You forgive me, O Lord, then You have occasionally forgiven the sinners like me,

segments.arabic: لأَنَّ كَرَمَكَ أَيْ رَبِّ يَجِلُّ عَنْ مُكَافَاةِ ٱلْمُقَصِّرِينَ
segments.transliteration: li'anna karamaka ay rabbi yajillu `an mukafati almuqassirina

translation.en: because Your compassion, O my Lord, is too great to be compared to the punishment of the negligent.

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا عَائِذٌ بِفَضْلِكَ هَارِبٌ مِنْكَ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ana `a'idhun bifadlika haribun minka ilayka

translation.en: I am now seeking refuge with Your generosity and fleeing for You to You,

segments.arabic: مُتَنَجِّزٌ مَا وَعَدْتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّفْحِ عَمَّنْ أَحْسَنَ بِكَ ظَنّاً
segments.transliteration: mutanajjizun ma wa`adta min alssafhi `amman ahsana bika zannan

translation.en: hoping for the promise that You have taken as regards pardoning those who have good idea about You.
O my God, You are too expansive in favor

segments.arabic: وَأَعْظَمُ حِلْماً مِنْ أَنْ تُقَايِسَنِي بِعَمَلِي
segments.transliteration: wa a`zamu hilman min an tuqayisani bi`amali

translation.en: and too great in forbearance to punish me for my deed
or to chastise me for my sin.

segments.arabic: وَمَا أَنَا يَا سَيِّدِي وَمَا خَطَرِي
segments.transliteration: wa ma ana ya sayyidi wa ma khatari

translation.en: What am I? O Master! What is my weight?
Excuse me out of Your favor, O my Master,
act to me charitably our of Your pardon,
cover me with Your covering,
and let off chiding me out of the liberality of Your Face.
O my Master! I am the little that You have brought up,
I am the ignorant that You have taught,
I am the straying that You have guided,
I am the humble that You have given rise,
I am the afraid that You have given security,
I am the hungry that You have satiated,
I am the thirsty that You have watered,
I am the naked that You have dressed,
I am the poor that You have given affluence,
I am the weak that You have strengthened,
I am the lowly that You have given might,
I am the ill that You have cured,
I am the beggar that You have donated,
I am the sinner that You have covered,
I am the guilty that You have excused,
I am the valueless that You have evaluated,
I am the helpless that You have backed,
and I am the expelled that You have boarded.

segments.arabic: أَنَا يَا رَبِّ ٱلَّذِي لَمْ أَسْتَحْيِكَ فِي ٱلْخَلاَءِ
segments.transliteration: ana ya rabbi alladhi lam astahyika fi alkhala'i

translation.en: I am, O my Lord, the one who has not felt ashamed of You in secrets
and the one who has not considered Your watching over him in the public.
I am the committer of the grave transgressions,
I am the one who challenged his Master,
I am the one who disobeyed the All-great of the heavens,

segments.arabic: أَنَا ٱلَّذِي أَعْطَيْتُ عَلَىٰ مَعَاصِي ٱلْجَلِيلِ ٱلرِّشَىٰ
segments.transliteration: ana alladhi a`taytu `ala ma`asi aljalili alrrisha

translation.en: I am the one who has given bribes violating the laws of the All-lofty Lord,

segments.arabic: أَنَا ٱلَّذِي حِينَ بُشِّرْتُ بِهَا خَرَجْتُ إِلَيْهَا أَسْعَىٰ
segments.transliteration: ana alladhi hina bushshirtu biha kharajtu ilayha as`a

translation.en: I am the one who has been delighted for committing such sins,
I am the one who, although You have respited, has not cared,
I am the one whom, although You have covered him, has not felt ashamed,
who committed so many acts of disobedience that he has violated (all terms),
and who, although You have disregarded, has not minded.
So, out of Your forbearance have You given me respite.

segments.transliteration: wa bisitrika satartani hatta ka'annaka aghfaltani

translation.en: You have concealed (my faults) with Your untouchable concealment as if You have been unaware of my acts.

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ عُقُوبَاتِ ٱلْمَعَاصِي جَنَّبْتَنِي حَتَّىٰ كَأَنَّكَ ٱسْتَحْيَيْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: wa min `uqubati alma`asi jannabtani hatta ka'annaka istahyaytani

translation.en: You have not applied to me the punishments of committing acts of disobedience (to You) as if You are ashamed to face me.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي لَمْ أَعْصِكَ حِينَ عَصَيْتُكَ وَأَنَا بِرُبُوبِيَّتِكَ جَاحِدٌ
segments.transliteration: ilahi lam a`sika hina `asaytuka wa ana birububiyyatika jahidun

translation.en: O my God, as I disobeyed You, I have never denied Your Lordship,
have never belittled Your ordains,
have never wished for exposing myself to Your chastisement,
and have never disparaged Your threat.

segments.arabic: لَكِنْ خَطِيئَةٌ عَرَضَتْ وَسَوَّلَتْ لِي نَفْسِي
segments.transliteration: lakin khati'atun `aradat wa sawwalat li nafsi

translation.en: Nevertheless, sins showed themselves desirable before me, my self commended to me,
my whim overwhelmed me,
my impudence helped me accordingly,
and I have been deceived by Your covering that You have laid on me.
So, I have exerted efforts in violating Your orders and disobeying You.
Now, who can ever save me from Your chastisement?

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ أَيْدِي ٱلْخُصَمَاءِ غَداً مَنْ يُخَلِّصُنِي
segments.transliteration: wa min aydi alkhusama'i ghadan man yukhallisuni

translation.en: Tomorrow, who can save me from the hands of my rivals?

segments.arabic: وَبِحَبْلِ مَنْ أَتَّصِلُ إِنْ أَنْتَ قَطَعْتَ حَبْلَكَ عَنِّي
segments.transliteration: wa bihabli man attasilu in anta qata`ta hablaka `anni

translation.en: Whose rope will I catch if You cut off the rope between You and me?

segments.arabic: فَوَاسَوْأَتَا عَلَىٰ مَا أَحْصَىٰ كِتَابُكَ مِنْ عَمَلِي
segments.transliteration: fa wa saw'ata `ala ma ahsa kitabuka min `amaliya alladhi

translation.en: Shame on me for my evildoings that Your Book has recorded.

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي لَوْلاَ مَا أَرْجُو مِنْ كَرَمِكَ وَسَعَةِ رَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: lawla ma arju min karamika wa sa`ati rahmatika

translation.en: Had it not been for Your generosity, the breadth of Your mercy,

segments.arabic: وَنَهْيِكَ إِيَّايَ عَنِ ٱلَّذِي لْقُنُوطِ لَقَنَطْتُ عِنْدَمَا أَتَذَكَّرُهَا
segments.transliteration: wa nahyika iyyaya `an alqunuti laqanattu `indama atadhakkaruha

translation.en: and Your warning me against being desperate—the matters that I hopefully depend on, I would have despaired whenever I remember my sins.
O Greatest Besought Who has been ever besought!
O Most Favorable Hoped!
O Allah! I beseech You in the name of the liability of Islam,
I rely upon You in the name of the sanctity of the Qur’an,
in the name of my love for the Prophet; the Ummi (inhabitant of Mecca),
the Qurayshite, the Hashemite,
the Arab, the Tuhamite,
the Meccan, and the Madanite,
I hope for proximity to You.
So, do not disturb my familiarity with faith

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَجْعَلْ ثَوَابِي ثَوَابَ مَنْ عَبَدَ سِوَاكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la taj`al thawabi thawaba man `abada siwaka

translation.en: and do not make my reward the same as reward given to those who serve one other than You.

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ قَوْماً آمَنُوٱ بِأَلْسِنَتِهِمْ لِيَحْقِنُوٱ بِهِ دِمَاءَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: fa'inna qawman amanu bi'alsinatihim liyahqinu bihi dima'ahum

translation.en: Certainly, some people outwardly declared the faith so that they could prevent their blood from being shed.
However, they attained their goals.

segments.arabic: وَإِنَّا آمَنَّا بِكَ بِأَلْسِنَتِنَا وَقُلُوبِنَا لِتَعْفُوَ عَنَّا
segments.transliteration: wa'inna amanna bika bi'alsinatina wa qulubina lita`fuwa `anna

translation.en: We have believed in You by heart and tongue so that You may excuse us.
Hence, make us attain our goals,
make firm our hope for You in our hearts,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا
segments.transliteration: wa la tuzigh qulubana ba`da idh hadaytana

translation.en: make not our hearts to deviate after You have guided us aright,

segments.transliteration: wa hab lana min ladunka rahmatan

translation.en: and grant us from You mercy.
Surely, You are the most liberal Giver.

segments.arabic: فَوَعِزَّتِكَ لَوِ ٱنْتَهَرْتَنِي مَا بَرِحْتُ مِنْ بَابِكَ
segments.transliteration: fawa`izzatika law intahartani ma barihtu min babika

translation.en: By Your Majesty I swear, O my Lord, even if You chide me, I shall never leave Your Door
and I shall never stop flattering You.

segments.arabic: لِمَا أُلْهِمَ قَلْبِي مِنَ ٱلْمَعْرِفَةِ بِكَرَمِكَ وَسَعَةِ رَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: lima ulhima qalbi min alma`rifati bikaramika wa sa`ati rahmatika

translation.en: This is because I have full acquaintance with Your (indescribable) generosity and bounty.

segments.arabic: إِلَىٰ مَنْ يَذْهَبُ ٱلْعَبْدُ إِلاَّ إِلَىٰ مَوْلاهُ
segments.transliteration: ila man yadhhabu al`abdul illa ila mawlahu

translation.en: To whom may a servant go save to his Lord?

segments.arabic: وَإِلَىٰ مَنْ يَلْتَجِئُ ٱلْمَخْلُوقُ إِلاَّ إِلَىٰ خَالِقِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ila man yaltaji'u almakhluqu illa ila khaliqihi

translation.en: To whom may a mortal resort save to his Creator?
O my God, even if You tie me with chains,

segments.transliteration: wa mana`tani saybaka min bayni al-ashhadi

translation.en: deprive me of the stream of Your bounties in the presence of people,
divulge all my scandalous acts before the eyes of all Your servants,
order me to Hell,

segments.transliteration: wa hulta bayni wa bayna al-abrari

translation.en: and prevent me from communicating the Pious ones,
(in spite of all that) I will never stop hoping for You,
I will never stop expecting Your pardon,

segments.transliteration: wa la kharaja hubbuka min qalbi

translation.en: and Your love will never exit my heart.
I never forget Your graces that I enjoy
and Your having concealed my defects in the worldly abode.

segments.arabic: سَيِّدِي أَخْرِجْ حُبَّ ٱلدُّنْيَا مِنْ قَلْبِي
segments.transliteration: sayyidi akhrij hubba alddunya min qalbi

translation.en: O my Master, (please) expel love for the world out of my heart,

segments.transliteration: wa ijma` bayni wa bayna almustafa wa alihi

translation.en: join me with the Divinely-chosen Prophet and his Household,

segments.transliteration: khiyaratika min khalqika wa khatami alnnabiyyina

translation.en: the choicest of Your creatures and the seal of the Prophets:

segments.arabic: مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰ آلِهِ

translation.en: Muhammad, blessings of Allah be on him and on his Household.
Move me to the rank of repentance with You,

segments.arabic: وَأَعِنِّي بِٱلْبُكَاءِ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي فَقَدْ أَفْنَيْتُ عُمْرِي
segments.transliteration: wa a`inni bilbuka'i `ala nafsi faqad afnaytu `umuri

translation.en: help me weep for myself after I have come upon the last of my age,

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ نَزَلْتُ مَنْزِلَةَ ٱلآيِسِينَ مِنْ خَيْرِي
segments.transliteration: wa qad nazaltu manzilata al-ayisina min khayri

translation.en: being in the manner of those who despair of any self-decency.
Who is then worse than I am

segments.arabic: إِنْ أَنَا نُقِلْتُ عَلَىٰ مِثْلِ حَالِي
segments.transliteration: in ana nuqiltu `ala mithli hali ila qabrin

translation.en: when I, such being my case, will be taken to a grave
that I have neither paved for my long stay

segments.transliteration: wa lam afrishhu bil`amali alssalihi lidaj`ati

translation.en: nor furnished with righteous deed for my extended abode.
Why should I not weep

segments.arabic: وَلاَ أَدْرِي إِلَىٰ مَا يَكُونُ مَصِيرِي
segments.transliteration: wa la adri ila ma yakunu masiri

translation.en: while I do not know what my destiny will be?
And while I notice that my self is cheating me,
my days are deceiving me,

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ خَفَقَتْ عِنْدَ رَأْسِي أَجْنِحَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ
segments.transliteration: wa qad khafaqat `inda ra'si ajnihatu almawti

translation.en: and the wings of death are fluttering over my head.
So, why should I not weep?
I weep for my soul’s departing my body.
I weep for the darkness of my grave.
I weep for the narrowness of my vault.

segments.transliteration: abki lisu'ali munkarin wa nakirin iyyaya

translation.en: I weep for Munkar and Nakir (the two angels interrogating in graves) being interrogating me.

segments.arabic: أَبْكِي لِخُرُوجِي مِنْ قَبْرِي عُرْيَاناً ذَلِيلاً

translation.en: I weep for my coming out of my grave (on the Resurrection Day) naked, humiliated,
carrying my burdens on my back,

segments.arabic: أَنْظُرُ مَرَّةً عَنْ يَمِينِي وَأُخْرَىٰ عَنْ شِمَالِي
segments.transliteration: anzuru marratan `an yamini wa ukhra `an shimali

translation.en: distributing my sights to my right and my left.

segments.arabic: إِذِ ٱلْخَلائِقُ فِي شَأْنٍ غَيْرِ شَأْنِي
segments.transliteration: idh alkhala'iqu fi sha'nin ghayri sha'ni

translation.en: Behold! The creatures will each be engaged with matters other than mine.

segments.transliteration: likulli imri'in minhum yawma'idhin sha'nun yughnihi

translation.en: Every man that day will have concern enough to make him heedless of others.
Many faces on that day shall be bright, laughing, joyous.

segments.arabic: وَوُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ عَلَيْهَا غَبَرَةٌ تَرْهَقُهَا قَتَرَةٌ“ وَذِلَّةٌ
segments.transliteration: wa wujuhun yawma'idhin `alayha ghabaratun tarhaquha qataratun wa dhillatun

translation.en: And many faces on that day, on them shall be dust. Darkness, and humiliation shall cover them.
O my Master, on You I depend and rely.
In You I put my hope and faith.
To Your mercy I hang.
You direct Your mercy towards whomsoever You like
and You guide, out of Your honoring, whomsoever You will.

segments.arabic: فَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَلَىٰ مَا نَقَّيْتَ مِنَ ٱلشِّرْكِ قَلْبِي
segments.transliteration: falaka alhamdu `ala ma naqqayta min alshshirki qalbi

translation.en: So, all praise be to You for You have purified my heart from polytheism.
All praise be to You for You have made my tongue express utterly.
How can I praise You properly while my tongue is too short to do so?

segments.arabic: أَمْ بِغَايَةِ جُهْدِي فِي عَمَلِي أُرْضِيكَ

translation.en: How can I please You while the extent of my efforts is too short to do so?

segments.arabic: وَمَا قَدْرُ لِسَانِي يَا رَبِّ فِي جَنْبِ شُكْرِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ma qadru lisani ya rabbi fi janbi shukrika

translation.en: What extent can my tongue reach if compared to the limitless extent of thanking You?

segments.arabic: وَمَا قَدْرُ عَمَلِي فِي جَنْبِ نِعَمِكَ وَإِحْسَانِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ma qadru `amali fi janbi ni`amika wa ihsanika

translation.en: What amount can my efforts reach if compared to the limitless amount of Your graces and favors?
O my God! It is certainly Your benevolence that has given me hope.
It is my thanks to You that have granted approval for my deeds.
O my Master, for You do I desire,
You do I fear,
and to You do I look forward.
It is my hope that has driven me towards You.
To You, O my One and Only God, do I direct my determination.
Towards what You have in possession are my desires directed.

segments.transliteration: wa laka khalisu raja'i wa khawfi

translation.en: For You is the ultimate of my hope and fear.
With You have I become familiar.
To You have I submitted my hand.
To the rope of obedience to You have I extended my fears.
O my Master, only through mentioning You have my heart lived.
Only through my confidential conversations with You have I cooled the pains of my fear.

segments.arabic: فَيَا مَوْلايَ وَيَا مُؤَمَّلِي وَيَا مُنْتَهَىٰ سُؤْلِي
segments.transliteration: faya mawlaya wa ya mu'ammali wa ya muntaha su'li

translation.en: So, O my Master! O my Trusty Patron! O Ultimate Hope!

segments.arabic: فَرِّقْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ ذَنْبِيَ ٱلْمَانِعِ لِي مِنْ لُزُومِ طَاعَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: farriq bayni wa bayna dhanbiya almani`i li min luzumi ta`atika

translation.en: Separate me from my transgressions which prevent me from adhering to the obedience to You.
I only pray You on account of my eternal faith in You
and my desire for Your mercy and kindness

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي أَوْجَبْتَهُ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِكَ مِنَ ٱلرَّأْفَةِ وَٱلرَّحْمَةِ
segments.transliteration: alladhi awjabtahu `ala nafsika min alrra'fati walrrahmati

translation.en: that You have made incumbent upon Yourself.

segments.arabic: فَٱلأَمْرُ لَكَ وَحْدَكَ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَكَ
segments.transliteration: fal-amru laka wahdaka la sharika laka

translation.en: So, the whole affair is Yours alone. There is no partner with You at all.
All the creatures are dependent upon You and are in Your grip.
All things are submissive to You.
Blessed be You, O Lord of the worlds.
O my God, have mercy on me when my argument is proven nil,
when my tongue can no longer find any answer,
and when my mind scatters as soon as You start interrogating me.

segments.arabic: فَيَا عَظِيمَ رَجَائِي لاَ تُخَيِّبْنِي إِذَا ٱشْتَدَّتْ فَاقَتِي
segments.transliteration: faya `azima raja'i la tukhayyibni idha ishtaddat faqati

translation.en: So, O my great hope, do not forsake me when my need terribly increases,
do not reject me on account of my ignorance,
and do not stop conferring upon me on account of my lack of patience.
Grant me for I am poor.
Have mercy upon me for I am weak.
O my Master, on You do I rely and lean.
You are my hope, and in You do I have faith.
To Your mercy do I attach myself.
In Your courtyard do I dwell.
On account of Your benevolence do I declare my request.

segments.transliteration: wa bikaramika ay rabbi astaftihu du`a'i

translation.en: With Your generosity, O my Lord, do I begin my prayers.
With You do I desire for meeting my needs.
Through Your wealth do I settle my poverty.
Under the shade of Your pardon do I stand.

segments.transliteration: wa ila judika wa karamika arfa`u basari

translation.en: Towards Your benevolence and generosity do I raise my sight.
I persistently look for Your favors;

segments.arabic: فَلاَ تُحْرِقْنِي بِٱلنَّارِ وَأَنْتَ مَوْضِعُ أَمَلِي
segments.transliteration: fala tuhriqni bilnnari wa anta mawdi`u amali

translation.en: so, do not let the flames of the Fire consume me while You are my ultimate hope,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُسْكِنِّي ٱلْهَاوِيَةَ فَإِنَّكَ قُرَّةُ عَيْنِي
segments.transliteration: wa la tuskinni alhawiyata fa'innaka qurratu `ayni

translation.en: and do not embed me in the deep black abyss while You are the delight of my eyes.

segments.arabic: يَا سَيِّدِي لاَ تُكَذِّبْ ظَنِّي بِإِحْسَانِكَ وَمَعْرُوفِكَ
segments.transliteration: ya sayyidi la tukadhdhib zanni bi'ihsanika wa ma`rufika

translation.en: O my Master, do not thwart my idea about Your grace and favors,
for in You I trust.
Do not deprive me of Your rewards,
for You best know my poverty.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ كَانَ قَدْ دَنَا أَجَلِي وَلَمْ يُقَرِّبْنِي مِنْكَ عَمَلِي
segments.transliteration: ilahi in kana qad dana ajali wa lam yuqarribni minka `amali

translation.en: O my God, if my death is drawing near while my deeds have not yet drawn me near You,

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ جَعَلْتُ ٱلإِعْتِرَافَ إِلَيْكَ بِذَنْبِي وَسَائِلَ عِلَلِي
segments.transliteration: faqad ja`altu ali`tirafa ilayka bidhanbi wasa'ila `ilali

translation.en: then let my confession of having committed sins be my means of justification.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ عَفَوْتَ فَمَنْ أَوْلَىٰ مِنْكَ بِٱلْعَفْوِ
segments.transliteration: ilahi in `afawta faman awla minka bil`afwi

translation.en: O my God, if You forgive, then who is worthier than You in forgiveness?

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ عَذَّبْتَ فَمَنْ أَعْدَلُ مِنْكَ فِي ٱلْحُكْمِ
segments.transliteration: wa in `adhdhabta faman a`dalu minka fi allhukmi

translation.en: And if You punish, then who is fairer than You in judgment?
Have mercy on my misery in this world,
on my grief at the time of death,
on my loneliness in the grave,
on my lonesomeness in the underground hole,

segments.arabic: وَإِذَا نُشِرْتُ لِلْحِسَابِ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ ذُلَّ مَوْقِفِي
segments.transliteration: wa idha nushirtu lilhisabi bayna yadayka dhulla mawqifi

translation.en: and on my humiliating situation when I shall be resurrected for account before You.

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِي مَا خَفِيَ عَلَىٰ ٱلآدَمِيِّينَ مِنْ عَمَلِي
segments.transliteration: waghfir li ma khafiya `ala al-adamiyyina min `amali

translation.en: Forgive my deeds that have been concealed from the other human beings,

segments.transliteration: wa adim li ma bihi satartani

translation.en: make permanent for me that on account of which You have covered my faults,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْحَمْنِي صَرِيعاً عَلَىٰ ٱلْفِرَاشِ تُقَلِّبُنِي أَيْدِي أَحِبَّتِي
segments.transliteration: warhamni sari`an `ala alfirashi tuqallibuni aydi ahibbati

translation.en: have mercy on me when I am thrown on the death bed turned over at the hands of my dear ones,

segments.arabic: وَتَفَضَّلْ عَلَيَّ مَمْدُوداً عَلَىٰ ٱلْمُغْتَسَلِ يُقَلِّبُنِي صَالِحُ جِيرَتِي
segments.transliteration: wa tafaddal `alayya mamdudan `ala almughtasali yuqallibuni salihu jirati

translation.en: do a favor to me when I am laid on the table of the dead bathroom turned over at the hands of my righteous neighbors,

segments.arabic: وَتَحَنَّنْ عَلَيَّ مَحْمُولاً قَدْ تَنَاوَلَ ٱلأَقْرِبَاءُ أَطْرَافَ جِنَازَتِي
segments.transliteration: wa tahannan `alayya mahmulan qad tanawala al-aqriba'u atrafa janazati

translation.en: act kindly towards me when I am carried while my relatives hold the edges of my coffin,

segments.arabic: وَجُدْ عَلَيَّ مَنْقُولاً قَدْ نَزَلْتُ بِكَ وَحِيداً فِي حُفْرَتِي
segments.transliteration: wa jud `alayya manqulan qad nazaltu bika wahidan fi hufrati

translation.en: be generous with me when I am carried, alone, to my hole,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْحَمْ فِي ذٰلِكَ ٱلْبَيْتِ ٱلْجَدِيدِ غُرْبَتِي حَتَّىٰ لاَ أَسْتَأْنِسَ بِغَيْرِكَ
segments.transliteration: warham fi dhalika albayti aljadidi ghurbati hatta la asta'nisa bighayrika

translation.en: have mercy on my loneliness in that (new) dwelling so that I will not feel at ease with anyone other than You.

segments.arabic: يَا سَيِّدِي إِنْ وَكَلْتَنِي إِلَىٰ نَفْسِي هَلَكْتُ
segments.transliteration: ya sayyidi in wakaltani ila nafsi halaktu

translation.en: O my Master, if You leave me for myself, I will certainly perish.

segments.arabic: سَيِّدِي فَبِمَنْ أَسْتَغِيثُ إِنْ لَمْ تُقِلْنِي عَثْرَتِي
segments.transliteration: sayyidi fabiman astaghithu in lam tuqilni `athrati

translation.en: O my Master, to whom will I resort if You do not overlook my slips?

segments.arabic: فَإِلَىٰ مَنْ أَفْزَعُ إِنْ فَقَدْتُ عِنَايَتَكَ فِي ضَجْعَتِي
segments.transliteration: fa'ila man afza`u in faqadtu `inayataka fi daj`ati

translation.en: To whom will I run for help if I miss Your care for me in my stay (in grave)?

segments.arabic: وَإِلَىٰ مَنْ أَلْتَجِئُ إِنْ لَمْ تُنَفِّسْ كُرْبَتِي
segments.transliteration: wa'ila man altaji'u in lam tunaffis kurbati

translation.en: To whom will I refer if You do not relieve my grief?
O my Master! Who will be with me?

segments.transliteration: wa man yarhamuni in lam tarhamni

translation.en: Who will have mercy on me if You do not?

segments.arabic: وَفَضْلَ مَنْ أُؤَمِّلُ إِنْ عَدِمْتُ فَضْلَكَ يَوْمَ فَاقَتِي
segments.transliteration: wa fadla man u'ammilu in `adimtu fadlaka yawma faqati

translation.en: Whose favor will I expect if I miss Your favors on the day of my neediness?

segments.arabic: وَإِلَىٰ مَنِ ٱلْفِرَارُ مِنَ ٱلذُّنُوبِ إِذَا ٱنْقَضَىٰ أَجَلِي
segments.transliteration: wa'ila man alfararu min aldhdhunubi idha inqada ajali

translation.en: To whom will I flee from my sins when my deadline comes?

segments.transliteration: sayyidi la tu`adhdhibni wa ana arjuka

translation.en: O my Master, do not punish me while I please You hopefully.
O my God, (please do) give success to my expectations
and dispel my fear.

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ كَثْرَةَ ذُنُوبِي لاَ أَرْجُو فِيهَا إِلاَّ عَفْوَكَ
segments.transliteration: fa'inna kathrata dhunubi la arju fiha illa `afwaka

translation.en: As for my numerous sins, I hope for nothing other than Your pardon.

segments.arabic: سَيِّدِي أَنَا أَسْأَلُكَ مَا لاَ أَسْتَحِقُّ
segments.transliteration: sayyidi ana as'aluka ma la astahiqqu

translation.en: O my Master, I am asking You for things that I do not deserve

segments.transliteration: wa anta ahlu alttaqwa wa ahlu almaghfirati

translation.en: and You are verily the worthiest of being feared and the worthiest of forgiving.

segments.arabic: فَٱغْفِرْ لِي وَأَلْبِسْنِي مِنْ نَظَرِكَ ثَوْباً يُغَطِّي عَلَيَّ ٱلتَّبِعَاتِ
segments.transliteration: faghfir li wa albisni min nazarika thawban yughatti `alayya alttabi`ati

translation.en: So, forgive me and dress me, out of Your relief, a garment covering all my defects,

segments.transliteration: wa taghfiruha li wa la utalabu biha

translation.en: and forgive them for me so that I will not be responsible for them.
Verily, You are the Lord of eternal favoring,
great pardon,
and liberal exoneration.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي أَنْتَ ٱلَّذِي تُفِيضُ سَيْبَكَ عَلَىٰ مَنْ لاَ يَسْأَلُكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi anta alladhi tufidu saybaka `ala man la yas'aluka

translation.en: O my God, You make Your flowing graces reach those who never pray You
and those who deny Your Lordship.

segments.arabic: فَكَيْفَ سَيِّدِي بِمَنْ سَأَلَكَ وَأَيْقَنَ أَنَّ ٱلْخَلْقَ لَكَ وَٱلأَمْرَ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: fakayfa sayyidi biman sa'alaka wa ayqana anna alkhalqa laka wal-amra ilayka

translation.en: So, O my Master, what should You do to those who pray You and believe undoubtedly that You manage all creation and all affairs!

segments.transliteration: tabarakta wa ta`alayta ya rabba al`alamina

translation.en: Blessed by You and Exalted be You, O Lord of the worlds!

segments.arabic: سَيِّدِي عَبْدُكَ بِبَابِكَ أَقَامَتْهُ ٱلْخَصَاصَةُ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: sayyidi `abduka bibabika aqamat-hu alkhasasatu bayna yadayka

translation.en: O my Master, I, Your servant, am standing at Your door owing to neediness,
am knocking at it suppliantly.
So, do not turn Your generous Face away from me.

segments.arabic: وَٱقْبَلْ مِنِّي مَا أَقُولُ فَقَدْ دَعَوْتُ بِهٰذَا ٱلدُّعَاءِ
segments.transliteration: waqbal minni ma aqulu faqad da`awtu bihadha alddu`a'i

translation.en: Accept that which I utter, for I have prayed using this supplication,

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا أَرْجُو أَنْ لاَ تَرُدَّنِي مَعْرِفَةً مِنِّي بِرَأْفَتِكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ana arju an la taruddani ma`rifatan minni bira'fatika wa rahmatika

translation.en: hoping that You will not reject me since I have full awareness of Your kindness and mercifulness.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي أَنْتَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يُحْفِيكَ سَائِلٌ
segments.transliteration: ilahi anta alladhi la yuhfika sa'ilun

translation.en: O my God, it is You Whom is never disturbed by any suppliant
and Whose kingdom is never decreased owing to donations.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ كَمَا تَقُولُ وَفَوْقَ مَا نَقُولُ
segments.transliteration: anta kama taqulu wa fawqa ma naqulu

translation.en: You are as exactly as You describe Yourself and is above all that which we say.
O Allah, I beseech You for comely patience,
immediate relief,
truthful wording,
and splendid reward.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ يَا رَبِّ مِنَ ٱلْخَيْرِ كُلِّهِ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka ya rabbi min alkhayri kullihi

translation.en: I pray You, O Lord, for all goodness,

segments.arabic: مَا عَلِمْتُ مِنْهُ وَمَا لَمْ أَعْلَمْ
segments.transliteration: ma `alimtu minhu wa ma lam a`lam

translation.en: be it known by me or unknown.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ ٱللَّهُمَّ مِنْ خَيْرِ مَا سَأَلَكَ مِنْهُ عِبَادُكَ ٱلصَّالِحُونَ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka allahumma min khayri ma sa'alaka minhu `ibaduka alssalihuna

translation.en: I pray You, O Allah, for the goodness that Your righteous servants have besought from You.
O All-excellent One that is asked!
O most benevolent of those who may give!

segments.transliteration: a`tini su'li fi nafsi wa ahli

translation.en: (Please do) respond to my request as regards myself, my family,
my parents, my children,

segments.transliteration: wa ahli huzanati wa ikhwani fika

translation.en: my comrades, and my brothers-in-faith.
Bless my living,
manifest my integrity,
set aright all my affairs,
and include me with those whom You decide to live long,
whose deeds are righteous,
those for whom You have perfected Your favors, those with whom You are pleased,

segments.arabic: وَأَحْيَيْتَهُ حَيَاةً طَيِّبَةً فِي أَدْوَمِ ٱلسُّرُورِ
segments.transliteration: wa ahyaytahu hayatan tayyibatan fi adwami alssururi

translation.en: and those whom You have granted comfortable life with permanent pleasure,

segments.transliteration: wa asbaghi alkaramati wa atammi al`ayshi

translation.en: reputable honor, and perfect contentment.
Verily, You do whatever You will,

segments.transliteration: wa la yaf`alu ma yasha'u ghayruka

translation.en: while none else can ever do what one wills.
O Allah, give me exclusively the grace of private mention of You,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَجْعَلْ شَيْئاً مِمَّا أَتَقَرَّبُ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la taj`al shay'an mimma ataqarrabu bihi

translation.en: do not let any of the things by which I seek Your nearness

segments.transliteration: fi ana'i allayli wa atrafi alnnahari

translation.en: in the hours of the night and the ends of the days
take the form of ostentation, showing off,

segments.transliteration: wa la asharan wa la bataran

translation.en: pretension, or insolence.
Include me with the humble ones.
O Allah, grant me affluent means of livelihood,
security in my homeland,

segments.arabic: وَقُرَّةَ ٱلْعَيْنِ فِي ٱلأَهْلِ وَٱلْمَالِ وَٱلْوَلَدِ
segments.transliteration: wa qurrata al`ayni fi al-ahli walmali walwaladi

translation.en: delight in my family, property, and children,
permanence of Your graces,
healthy body,
strong physique,
and sound faith.
Dedicate my affairs to the obedience to You and to Your Messenger,

segments.arabic: مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰ آلِهِ أَبَداً مَا ٱسْتَعْمَرْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: muhammadin salla allahu `alayhi wa `ala alihi abadan ma ista`martani

translation.en: Muhammad—Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Household—as long as You give me life.

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْنِي مِنْ أَوْفَرِ عِبَادِكَ عِنْدَكَ نَصِيباً

translation.en: Make me one of the most rewarded servants of You

segments.arabic: فِي كُلِّ خَيْرٍ أَنْزَلْتَهُ وَتُنْزِلُهُ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
segments.transliteration: fi kulli khayrin anzaltahu wa tunziluhu fi shahri ramadana

translation.en: in each and every item of goodness that You have descended and You will descend during the month of Ramadan
and at the Destiny Night

segments.arabic: وَمَا أَنْتَ مُنْزِلُهُ فِي كُلِّ سَنَةٍ مِنْ رَحْمَةٍ تَنْشُرُهَا
segments.transliteration: wa ma anta munziluhu fi kulli sanatin min rahmatin tunshiruha

translation.en: as well as all that which You decide to descend throughout the year, including mercy that You spread,
good health with which You adorn,
misfortune that You repel,
good deeds that You admit,
and evildoings that You excuse.

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي حَجَّ بَيْتِكَ ٱلْحَرَامِ فِي عَامِنَا هٰذَا وَفِي كُلِّ عَامٍ
segments.transliteration: warzuqni hajja baytika alharami fi `amina hadha wa fi kulli `amin

translation.en: Bestow upon me with pilgrimage to Your Holy House in this year plus all years,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي رِزْقاً وَاسِعاً مِنْ فَضْلِكَ ٱلْوَاسِعِ
segments.transliteration: warzuqni rizqan wasi`an min fadlika alwasi`i

translation.en: grant me prosperous sustenance out of Your limitless bounty,
dismiss, O my Master, all evils from me,

segments.arabic: وَٱقْضِ عَنِّي ٱلدَّيْنَ وَٱلظًُّلاَمَاتِ حَتَّىٰ لاَ أَتَأَذَّىٰ بِشَيْءٍ مِنْهُ
segments.transliteration: waqdi `anni alddayna walzzulamati hatta la ata'adhadha bishay'in minhu

translation.en: help me settle my debts as well as my evildoings so that I will be saved from their liabilities,

segments.arabic: وَخُذْ عَنِّي بِأَسْمَاعِ وَأَبْصَارِ أَعْدَائِي وَحُسَّادِي وَٱلْبَاغِينَ عَلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: wa khudh `anni bi'asma`i wa'absari a`da'i wa hussadi walbaghina `alayya

translation.en: save me from the hearings and sights of my enemies, those who envy me, and those who intend to oppress me,
back me against them,
give delight to my eye and joy to my heart,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ لِي مِنْ هَمِّي وَكَرْبِي فَرَجاً وَمَخْرَجاً
segments.transliteration: waj`al li min hammi wa karbi farajan wa makhrajan

translation.en: grant me relief and exit against my grief and misery,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ مَنْ أَرَادَنِي بِسُوءٍ مِنْ جَمِيعِ خَلْقِكَ تَحْتَ قَدَمَيَّ
segments.transliteration: waj`al man aradani bisu'in min jami`i khalqika tahta qadamayya

translation.en: make all those who intend evil to me, among all Your creatures, be under my feet,
protect me against the evil of Satan,
the evil of the ruling authority,
and the consequences of my evildoings,
purify me from all my sins,
save me from Hellfire on account of Your pardon,
allow me to enter Paradise on account of Your mercy,

segments.transliteration: wa zawwijni min alhuri al`ini bifadlika

translation.en: marry me off the Paradisiacal women on account of Your grace,

segments.transliteration: wa alhiqni bi'awliya'aka alssalihina muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: and join me to Your righteous intimate servants—Muhammad and his Household,
the purified, the immaculate, and the pious.

segments.arabic: صَلَوَاتُكَ عَلَيْهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ أَجْسَادِهِمْ وَأَرْوَاحِهِمْ وَرَحْمَةُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
segments.transliteration: salawatuka `alayhim wa `ala ajsadihim wa arwahihim wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: May Your peace, mercy, and blessings be upon their bodies and souls.

segments.transliteration: ilahi wa sayyidi wa `izzatika wa jalalika

translation.en: O my God and my Master, I swear by Your Mighty and Your Glory,
if You will interrogate me for my sins, I will demand with Your pardon.

segments.transliteration: wa la'in talabtani bilu'mi la'utalibannaka bikaramika

translation.en: If You interrogate me for my meanness, I will demand with Your kindness.

segments.arabic: وَلَئِنْ أَدْخَلْتَنِي ٱلنَّارَ َلأُخْبِرَنَّ أَهْلَ ٱلنَّارِ بِحُبِّي لَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la'in adkhaltani alnnara la'ukhbiranna ahla alnnari bihubbi laka

translation.en: If You order me to Hellfire, I will tell all the inhabitants therein that I love You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي وَسَيِّدِي إِنْ كُنْتَ لاَ تَغْفِرُ إِلاَّ لأَوْلِيَائِكَ وَأَهْلِ طَاعَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa sayyidi in kunta la taghfiru illa li'awliya'ika wa ahli ta`atika

translation.en: O my God and Master, if you forgive only Your intimate servants and those who obey You,
to whom then will the sinful resort?

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ كُنْتَ لاَ تُكْرِمُ إِلاَّ أَهْلَ ٱلْوَفَاءِ بِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa in kunta la tukrimu illa ahla alwafa'i bika

translation.en: If You honor none but those who act loyally to You,
then whose shelter will the evildoers seek?

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ أَدْخَلْتَنِي ٱلنَّارَ فَفِي ذٰلِكَ سُرُورُ عَدُوِّكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi in adkhaltani alnnara fafi dhalika sururu `aduwwika

translation.en: O my God, if You decide to put me in Hellfire, this will definitely please Your enemies!

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ أَدْخَلْتَنِي ٱلْجَنَّةَ فَفِي ذٰلِكَ سُرُورُ نَبِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: wa in adkhaltani aljannata fafi dhalika sururu nabiyyika

translation.en: But if You decide Paradise for me, then this will certainly please Your Prophet!

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا وَٱللَّهِ أَعْلَمُ أَنَّ سُرُورَ نَبِيِّكَ أَحَبُّ إِلَيْكَ مِنْ سُرُورِ عَدُوِّكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ana wallahi a`lamu anna surura nabiyyika ahabbu ilayka min sururi `aduwwika

translation.en: And I—by Allah I swear it—know for sure that the pleasure of Your Prophet is more favorable for You than the pleasure of Your enemies.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَمْلأَ قَلْبِي حُبّاً لَكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka an tamla'a qalbi hubban laka

translation.en: O Allah, I pray You for filling my heart with love for You,
with fear of You,
with belief in Your Book,
with faith in You,
with dread from You,
and with eagerness to You.

segments.arabic: يَا ذَا ٱلْجَلالِ وَٱلإِكْرَامِ حَبِّبْ إِلَيَّ لِقَاءَكَ
segments.transliteration: ya dha aljalali wal-ikrami habbib ilayya liqa'aka

translation.en: O Lord of Glory and Honor, (please do) make me love meeting You,
(please do) love my meeting,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ لِي فِي لِقَائِكَ ٱلرَّاحَةَ وَٱلْفَرَجَ وَٱلْكَرَامَةَ
segments.transliteration: waj`al li fi liqa'ika alrrahata walfaraja walkaramata

translation.en: and make my meeting You entail comfort, relief, and honoring.
O Allah, join me with the righteous ones among the past generations,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْنِي مِنْ صَالِحِ مَنْ بَقِيَ وَخُذْ بِي سَبِيلَ ٱلصَّالِحِينَ
segments.transliteration: waj`alni min salihi man baqiya wa khudh bi sabila alssalihina

translation.en: include me with the righteous ones of this generation, guide me to the path of the righteous ones,

segments.arabic: وَأَعِنِّي عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي بِمَا تُعِينُ بِهِ ٱلصَّالِحِينَ عَلَىٰ أَنْفُسِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: wa a`inni `ala nafsi bima tu`inu bihi alssalihina `ala anfusihim

translation.en: help me against myself in just as You help the righteous ones control themselves,
seal my deed with the best of it,
decide Paradise as the reward of my deeds on account of Your mercy,
help me manage the good things that You have endowed upon me,

segments.arabic: وَثَبِّتْنِي يَا رَبِّ وَلاَ تَرُدَّنِي فِي سُوءٍ ٱسْتَنْقَذْتَنِي مِنْهُ
segments.transliteration: wa thabbitni ya rabbi wa la taruddani fi su'in istanqadhtani minhu

translation.en: make me firm, O Lord, and do not make me return to evildoing after You have saved me from it.
O Lord of the worlds!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ إِيـمَاناً لاَ أَجَلَ لَهُ دُونَ لِقَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka imanan la ajala lahu duna liqa'ika

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You for faith that does not stop until I meet You.
As long as You grant me lifetime, (please do) connect me to that faith,
and when You decide to grasp my soul, make me carry that faith with me.
When You resurrect me, make me carry it with me.

segments.arabic: وَأَبْرِئْ قَلْبِي مِنَ ٱلرِّيَاءِ وَٱلشَّكِّ وَٱلسُّمْعَةِ فِي دِينِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa abri' qalbi min alrriya'i walshshakki walssum`ati fi dinika

translation.en: Release my heart from showing off, suspicion, and pretension in the affairs of Your religion
so that my deed will be purely intended for Your sake.
O Allah, grant me discerning awareness in Your religion,
understanding of Your laws,
insight in Your knowledge,
two folds of Your mercy,
and piety that impedes me from disobeying You.
Make my face glitter on account of Your light,
make me desire for nothing but that which You hold,

segments.arabic: وَتَوَفَّنِي فِي سَبِيلِكَ وَعَلَىٰ مِلَّةِ رَسُولِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa tawaffani fi sabilika wa `ala millati rasulika

translation.en: and when I die, make me die following Your Path and carrying the principles of Your Prophet—
Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Household.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ ٱلْكَسَلِ وَٱلْفَشَلِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni a`udhu bika min alkasali walfashali

translation.en: O Allah, I seek Your protection against laziness, failure,
grief, cowardice, stinginess,
inattentiveness, brutality, poverty,
neediness, destitution,

segments.arabic: وَكُلِّ بَلِيَّةٍ وَٱلْفَوَاحِشِ مَا ظَهَرَ مِنْهَا وَمَا بَطَنَ
segments.transliteration: wa kulli baliyyatin walfawahishi ma zahara minha wa ma batana

translation.en: and against all misfortunes and all shameful deeds, whether open or secret.

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ نَفْسٍ لاَ تَقْنَعُ
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika min nafsin la taqna`u

translation.en: I seek Your protection against having unsatisfied self,
insatiate stomach,
fearless heart,
unanswered prayers,
and futile deed.

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ يَا رَبِّ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي وَدِينِي وَمَالِي
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika ya rabbi `ala nafsi wa dini wa mali

translation.en: I ask You, O Lord, to guard myself, my religion, my properties,

segments.arabic: وَعَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ مَا رَزَقْتَنِي مِنَ ٱلشَّيْطَانِ ٱلرَّجِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa `ala jami`i ma razaqtani min alshshaytani alrrajimi

translation.en: and all that which You have granted me against Satan the accursed.
Verily, You are the All-hearing, the All-knowing.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّهُ لاَ يُجِيرُنِي مِنْكَ أَحَدٌ
segments.transliteration: allahumma innahu la yujiruni minka ahadun

translation.en: O Allah, none can ever save me against You

segments.transliteration: wa la ajidu min dunika multahadan

translation.en: and I can never find any shelter against You.

segments.arabic: فَلاَ تَجْعَلْ نَفْسِي فِي شَيْءٍ مِنْ عَذَابِكَ
segments.transliteration: fala taj`al nafsi fi shay'in min `adhabika

translation.en: So, (please) do not make anything that brings about Your punishment control over me,
do not let me lead myself to perdition,
and do not make me deserve the painful chastisement.
O Allah, accept from me,
grant me reputation,
elevate my rank,
exonerate my offenses,
do not refer to me with my faults,
let the reward of my sessions,
my utterance,
and my prayer be Your pleasure and Paradise.

segments.arabic: وَأَعْطِنِي يَا رَبِّ جَمِيعَ مَا سَأَلْتُكَ وَزِدْنِي مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa a`tini ya rabbi jami`a ma sa'altuka wa zidni min fadlika

translation.en: Give me, O Lord, all that which I have asked for from You and grant me more favor,

segments.arabic: إِنِّي إِلَيْكَ رَاغِبٌ يَا رَبَّ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: inni ilayka raghibun ya rabba al`alamina

translation.en: for I seek none but You, O Lord of the worlds!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ أَنْزَلْتَ فِي كِتَابِكَ أَنْ نَعْفُوَ عَمَّنْ ظَلَمَنَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma innaka anzalta fi kitabika an na`fuwa `amman zalamana

translation.en: O Allah, You have ordered us in Your book that we should overlook those who wrong us.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ ظَلَمْنَا أَنْفُسَنَا فَٱعْفُ عَنَّا فَإِنَّكَ أَوْلَىٰ بِذٰلِكَ مِنَّا
segments.transliteration: wa qad zalamna anfusana fa`fu `anna fa'innaka awla bidhalika minna

translation.en: We have thus wronged ourselves; so, forgive us, for You are worthier of forgiveness than we are.

segments.arabic: وَأَمَرْتَنَا أَنْ لاَ نَرُدَّ سَائِلاً عَنْ أَبْوَابِنَا
segments.transliteration: wa amartana an la narudda sa'ilan `an abwabina

translation.en: You have ordered us not to reject any beggar being on our doors.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ جِئْتُكَ سَائِلاً فَلاَ تَرُدَّنِي إِلاَّ بِقَضَاءِ حَاجَتِي
segments.transliteration: wa qad ji'tuka sa'ilan fala taruddani illa biqada'i hajati

translation.en: Here I am begging You; so, do not reject me; rather, respond to my need.

segments.arabic: وَأَمَرْتَنَا بِٱلإِحْسَانِ إِلَىٰ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَانُنَا
segments.transliteration: wa amartana bil-ihsani ila ma malakat aymanuna

translation.en: You have ordered us to act nicely to those under our authorities.

segments.arabic: وَنَحْنُ أَرِقَّاؤُكَ فَأَعْتِقْ رِقَابَنَا مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ
segments.transliteration: wa nahnu ariqqa'uka fa'a`tiq riqabana min alnnari

translation.en: We are surely under Your authority; so, release us from Hellfire.
O my Shelter whenever I am aggrieved!
O my Aid whenever hardships hit me!
To You have I resorted.
With You have I sought refuge and haven.
To none save You shall I ever resort.

segments.transliteration: wa la atlubu alfaraja illa minka

translation.en: From none save You shall I ever seek for relief.
So, (please do) aid me and relieve my hardship.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَقْبَلُ ٱلْيَسِيرَ وَيَعْفُو عَنِ ٱلْكَثِيرِ
segments.transliteration: ya man yaqbalu alyasira wa ya`fu `an alkathira

translation.en: O He Who accepts the little (deed) and overlooks the much (wrong)!

segments.arabic: ٱقْبَلْ مِنِّيَ ٱلْيَسِيرَ وَٱعْفُ عَنِّيَ ٱلْكَثِيرَ

translation.en: Accept my little (deed) and overlook my much (wrong).
You are certainly the All-merciful, the All-forgiving.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ إِيـمَاناً تُبَاشِرُ بِهِ قَلْبِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka imanan tubashiru bihi qalbi

translation.en: O Allah, I pray You for faith that covers my heart

segments.arabic: وَيَقِيناً صَادِقاً حَتَّىٰ أَعْلَمَ أَنَّهُ لَنْ يُصِيبَنِي إِلاَّ مَا كَتَبْتَ لِي
segments.transliteration: wa yaqinan sadiqan hatta a`lama annahu lan yusibani illa ma katabta li

translation.en: and for honest conviction so that I will believe that nothing will inflict me save that about which You have already known.

segments.arabic: وَرَضِّنِي مِنَ ٱلْعَيْشِ بِمَا قَسَمْتَ لِي
segments.transliteration: wa raddini min al`ayshi bima qasamta li

translation.en: Make me be satisfied with my livelihood that You have decided for me.
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

text.en: Hadith Kisa
Tradition of the Cloak- recited regularly esp thu nights

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ala muhammadin wa ali muhammad

translation.en: O' Allāh send Your blessings on Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
In the Name of Allāh,the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: عَنْ فاطِمَةَ الزَّهْراءِ عَلَيْهَا اَلسلامُ بِنْتِ رَسُول ِاللّه صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ أَنَّها قالَتْ :

translation.en: Fatimatuz-Zahra, the daughter of the Prophet (s), peace be on them, is to have thus related ( an event ) :

segments.arabic: دَخَلَ عَلَيَّ أَبِي رَسُولُ اللّهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ فِي بَعْضِ الاْيَّامِ فَقالَ:
segments.transliteration: dakhala a'lay-ya abee rasoolul-laahi (S) fee baa'-z'il ay-yaami faqaala :

translation.en: My father, the Prophet (s) of Allah, came to my house one day and said to me:
Peace be on you, Fatimah
I replied : "And upon you be peace"

segments.arabic: قالَ: إِنِّي أَجِدُ فِي بَدَنِي ضُعْفاً
segments.transliteration: qaala : in-neee ajidu fee badanee z'ua'-faan'

translation.en: Then he said : "I feel weakness in my body"

segments.arabic: فَقُلْتُ لَهُ: أُعِيذُكَ بِاللّهِ يَا أَبَتاهُ مِنَ الضُّعْفِ
segments.transliteration: faqul-tu lahooo : ue'ed'uka bil-laahi yaa abataahoo manaz'-z'ua'fi

translation.en: I said : "May Allah protect you from weakness, father"

segments.arabic: فَقَالَ: ”يَا فَاطِمَةُ! ٱئْتِينِي بِٱلْكِسَاءِ ٱلْيَمَانِيِّ فَغَطِّينِي بِهِ.
segments.transliteration: faqaala : yaa faat'imatu ee-teenee bil-kasaaa-il-yamaanee faghat-teenee bihi

translation.en: He said : "Fatimah, please bring the Yemeni cloak and cover me with it"
So, I brought the Yemeni cloak and covered him with it.

segments.arabic: وَصرْتُ أَنْظُرُ إِلَيْهِ وَإِذا وَجْهُهُ يَتَلَأَلَؤُ
segments.transliteration: wa s'ur-tu anz'uru ilay-hee wa id'aa waj-hahoo yatal-lau

translation.en: Then, I looked at him and saw that his face was shining

segments.arabic: كَأَنَّهُ الْبَدْرُ فِي لَيْلَة تَمامِهِ وَكَمالِهِ
segments.transliteration: kaan-nahul-bad-ru fee lay-lati tamaamihee wa kamaalih

translation.en: like a full moon with its glory and splendor

segments.arabic: فَمَا كانَتْ إِلاّ ساعَةً وَإِذا بِوَلَدِيَ الْحَسَنِ عليه السلام قَدْ أَقْبَلَ
segments.transliteration: famaa kaanat il-laa saaa'taw-wa id'aa biwaladiyal-h'asani (alayhis-salaam) qad aq-bala

translation.en: After a while, my son Hasan came in

segments.transliteration: wa qaala : as-salaamu a'lay-ki yaaa um-maah

translation.en: and said : "Peace be on you, mother"

segments.arabic: فَقُلتُ: وَعَلَيْكَ السَّلامُ يَا قُرَّةَ عَيْنِي وَثَمَرَةَ فُؤَادِي
segments.transliteration: faqul-tu : wa a'lay-kas-salaamu yaa qur-rata a'y-nee wa thamarata fuaadee

translation.en: I replied : "And upon you be peace, O light of my eyes, and the delight of my heart"

segments.arabic: فَقَالَ: يَا أُمَّاهُ إِنِّي أَشَمُّ عِنْدَكِ رائِحَةً طَيِّبَةً
segments.transliteration: faqaala : yaa um-maahoo in-nee ashum-mu i'ndaki raaa-ih'atin tay-yibatin

translation.en: He then said : "O Mother! I smell a fragrance so sweet

segments.arabic: كَأَنَّها رائِحَةُ جَدِّي رَسُولِ اللّه صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ

translation.en: and so pure as that of my grandfather, the Prophet (s) of Allah"

segments.arabic: فَقُلْتُ: نَعَمْ إِنَّ جَدَّكَ تَحْتَ الْكِساءِ

translation.en: I replied : "Yes. Your grandfather is underneath the cloak"

segments.arabic: فَأَقْبَلَ الْحَسَنُ نَحْوَ الْكِساءِ وَقالَ: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا جَدَّاهُ يَا رَسُولَ اللّهِ
segments.transliteration: fa aq-balal-h'asanu nah'-wal-kisaaa-i wa qaala : as-salaamu a'lay-ka yaa jad-daahoo yaa rasoolal-laahi

translation.en: Hasan went near the cloak and said : "Peace be on you, my grandfather, the Prophet (s) of Allah;

segments.arabic: أَتَأْذَنُ لِي أَنْ أَدْخُلَ مَعَكَ تَحْتَ الْكِساءِ
segments.transliteration: ata-d'anu leee an ad-khula maa'ka tah'-tal-kisaaa

translation.en: May I enter the cloak with you?"

segments.arabic: فَقالَ: وَعَلَيْكَ السَّلامُ يَا وَلَدِي وَيَا صاحِبَ حَوْضِي
segments.transliteration: qaala : wa a'lay-kas-salaamu yaa waladee wa yaa s'aah'iba h'awz'ee

translation.en: He replied : "And upon you be peace, my son and the master of my fountain (Kauthar),
you are given the permission to enter"
So, Hasan entered the cloak with him

segments.arabic: فَمَا كانَتْ إِلاَّ ساعَةً وَإِذا بِوَلَدِيَ الْحُسَيْنِ قَدْ أَقْبَلَ وَقالَ
segments.transliteration: famaa kaanat il-laa saaa'taw-wa id'aa biwaladial-h'usay-ni qad aq-bala wa qaala :

translation.en: After a while, my Husain came in and said :
Peace be on you, mother

segments.arabic: فَقُلْتُ: وَعَلَيْكَ السَّلامُ يَا وَلَدِي وَيَا قُرَّةَ عَيْنِي وَثَمَرَةَ فُؤَادِي.
segments.transliteration: faqul-tu : wa a'lay-kas-salaamu yaa waladee wa yaa qur-rata a'y-nee wa thamarata fuaadee

translation.en: I replied : "And upon you be peace, O light of my eyes, and the delight of my heart"

segments.arabic: فَقَالَ لِي: يَا أُمَّاهُ إِنِّي أَشَمُّ عِنْدَكِ رائِحَةً طَيِّبَةً
segments.transliteration: faqaala lee : yaaa um-maahoo in-nee shummu i'ndaki raaa-ih'atin tay-yibatan

translation.en: He then said : "O Mother! I smell a fragrance so sweet

segments.arabic: كَأَنَّها رائِحَةُ جَدِّي رَسُولِ اللّهُ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ.

translation.en: and so pure as that of my grandfather, the Prophet (s) of Allah"

segments.arabic: فَقُلْتُ: نَعَمْ إِنَّ جَدَّكَ وَأَخاكَ تَحْتَ الْكِساءِ.
segments.transliteration: faqul-tu : naa'm in-na jad-daka wa akhaaka tah'-tal-kisaaa

translation.en: I replied : "Yes. Your grandfather and your brother are underneath the cloak"
Husain stepped towards the cloak

segments.arabic: وَقالَ: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا جَدَّاهُ السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَنِ اخْتارَهُ اللّهُ
segments.transliteration: wa qaala : as-salaamu a'lay-ka yaa jad-dahoos-salaamu a'lay-ka yaa manikh-taarahul-lahoo

translation.en: and said : "Peace be on you, my grandfather, the Chosen of Allah;

segments.arabic: أَتَأْذَنُ لِي أَنْ أَكُونَ مَعَكُما تَحْتَ الْكِساءِ
segments.transliteration: ata-d'anu leee an ad-khula maa'kumaa tah'-tal-kisaaa

translation.en: May I enter the cloak with you?"
He replied : "And upon you be peace, my son

segments.arabic: وَيَا شافِعَ أُمَّتِي قَدْ أَذِنْتُ لَكَ.
segments.transliteration: wa yaa shaafia'a um-matee qad ad'-intu lak

translation.en: and interceder of my followers, you are given the permission to enter"
So, Husain entered the cloak with them.

segments.arabic: فَأَ قْبَلَ عِنْدَ ذلِكَ أَبُو الْحَسَنِ عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي طالِبٍ
segments.transliteration: faaq-bala i'nda d'aalika abul-h'asani a'lee-yub-nu abee t'aalibiw-

translation.en: After a while, Abul Hasan, Ali bin Abi Talib came in

segments.arabic: وَقالَ: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ رَسُولِ اللّهِ.
segments.transliteration: wa qaala : as-salaamu a'lay-ki yaa binta rasoolil-laah

translation.en: and said : "Peace be on you, O daughter of the Prophet (s) of Allah"

segments.arabic: فَقُلْتُ: وَعَلَيْكَ السَّلامُ يَا أَبَا الْحَسَنِ وَيَا أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ.
segments.transliteration: faqul-tu wa a'lay-kas-salaamu yaa abal-h'asani wa yaaa ameeral-mumineen

translation.en: I replied : "And upon you be peace, O father of Hasan, and the Commander of the faithful"

segments.arabic: فَقالَ: يَا فاطِمَةُ إِنِّي أَشَمُّ عِنْدَكِ رائِحَةً طَيِّبَةً
segments.transliteration: faqaala yaa faat'imatu in-nee ashum-mu i'ndaki raaa-ih'atan tay-yibatan

translation.en: He then said : "O Fatima! I smell a fragrance so sweet and so pure

segments.arabic: كَأَنَّهَا رائِحَةُ أَخِي وَابْنِ عَمِّي رَسُولِ اللّه صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ.
segments.transliteration: kaan-nahaa raaa-ih'atu akhee wab-ni a'm-mee rasoolil-laah sallallahu alaihi wa alihi wasallam

translation.en: as that of my brother and my cousin, the Prophet (s) of Allah"

segments.arabic: فَقُلْتُ: نَعَمْ هَا هُوَ مَعَ وَلَدَيْكَ تَحْتَ الْكِساءِ
segments.transliteration: faqul-tu naa'm haa hooa maa' waladay-ka tah'-tal-kisaaa

translation.en: I replied: "Yes. He is underneath the cloak with your two sons"
So, Ali went near the cloak

segments.arabic: وَقالَ: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا رَسُولَ اللّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa qaala : assalaamu a'lay-ka yaa rasoolal-laahi

translation.en: and said : "Peace be on you, Prophet (s) of Allah;

segments.arabic: وأَتَأْذَنُ لِي أَنْ أَكُونَ مَعَكُمْ تَحْتَ الْكِساءِ
segments.transliteration: ata-d'anu leee an akoo-na maa'kum tah'-tal-kisaaa

translation.en: May I enter the cloak with you?"

segments.arabic: قالَ لَهُ: وَعَلَيْكَ السَّلامُ يَا أَخِي ويَا وَصِيِّي
segments.transliteration: qaala lahu : wa a'lay-kas-salaamu yaaa akhee wa yaa was'ee

translation.en: He replied : "And upon you be peace, my brother, my successor,

segments.arabic: وَخَلِيفَتِي وَصاحِبَ لِوَائِي قَدْ أَذِنْتُ لَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa khalee-fatee wa s'aah'iba liwaaa-ee qad ad'intu lak

translation.en: my successor, and my standard bearer, you are given the permission to enter"
So, Ali entered the cloak with them.
Then I stepped forward

segments.arabic: وَقُلْتُ: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَتاهُ يَا رَسُولَ اللّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa qul-tu : as-salaamu a'lay-ka yaaa abataah yaa rasoolal-laahi

translation.en: and said : "Peace be on you, my father, O Prophet (s) of Allah;

segments.arabic: أَتَأْذَنُ لِي أَنْ أَكُونَ مَعَكُمْ تَحْتَ الْكِساءِ
segments.transliteration: ata-d'anu leee an akoo-na maa'kum tah'-tal-kisaaa

translation.en: May I enter the cloak with you?"

segments.arabic: قالَ: وَعَلَيْكِ السَّلامُ يَا بِنْتِي وَيَا بِضْعَتِي قَدْ أَذِنْتُ لَكِ
segments.transliteration: qaala : wa a'lay-kis-salaamu yaa bintee yaa baz'-atee qad ad'intu laki

translation.en: He replied : "And upon you be peace, my daughter, O part of myself; you are given the permission to enter"
So, I entered the cloak with them.

segments.arabic: فَلَمَّا اكْتَمَلْنا جَمِيعاً تَحْتَ الْكِساءِ أَخَذَ أَبِي رَسُولُ اللّه بِطَرَفَي الْكِساءِ
segments.transliteration: fal-lamak-tamal-naa jamee-a'n tah'-tal-kisaaa-i akhad'a abee rasoolul-laahi bitarafayil-kisaaa-i

translation.en: Getting together underneath the cloak, my father, the Prophet (s) of Allah, held the two ends of the cloak

segments.arabic: وَأَوْمَأَ بِيَدِهِ ٱلْيُمْـنٰى إِلَى السَّماءِ وَقالَ:
segments.transliteration: wa aw-maa biyadihil-yum-naa ilas-samaaa-i wa qaala :

translation.en: and raised his right hand towards the heavens and prayed :

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ إِنَّ هَؤُلاءِ أَهْلُ بَيْتِي وَخاصَّتِي وَحامَّتِي
segments.transliteration: al-laahum-ma in-na haa-ulaaa-i ah-lu bay-tee wa khaaas'-s'atee wa h'aaam-matee

translation.en: "O Allah, these are the people of my Household (Ahlul-Bayt). They are my confidants and my supporters.
Their flesh is my flesh and their blood is my blood.
Whoever hurts them, hurts me too.
Whoever displeases them, displeases me too.
I am at war with those who are at war with them.
I am at peace with those who are at peace with them.
I am the enemy of their enemies
and I am the friend of their friends.
They are from me and I am from them.

segments.transliteration: faj-a'l s'alawaatika wa barakaatika wa rah'-matika

translation.en: O Allah! Bestow Your Blessings, Benevolence,
Forgiveness and Your pleasure upon me and upon them.

segments.arabic: وَعَلَيْهِمْ وَأَذْهِبْ عَنْهُمُ الرِّجْسَ وَطَهِّرْهُمْ تَطْهِيراً.
segments.transliteration: wa a'lay-him wa ad'-hib a'n-humur-rij-sa wa tah-hiruhum tat-heera

translation.en: And keep them away from impurity (and flaws) and keep them thoroughly purified"
Then the Lord, Almighty Allah said :

segments.transliteration: yaa malaaa-ikatee wa yaa suk-kaana samaawaateee

translation.en: "O My angels! O Residents of My Heavens,

segments.arabic: إِنِّي مَا خَلَقْتُ سَماءً مَبْنِيَّةً وَلا أَرْضاً مَدْحِيَّةً وَلا قَمَراً مُنِيراً
segments.transliteration: in-nee maa khalaq-tu samaa-am-mab-nee-yataw-wa laa ar-z'am-mad-h'ee-yataw-wa laa qamaram-muneeraw-

translation.en: verily, I have not created the erected Sky, the stretched earth, the illuminated moon,

segments.arabic: وَلا شَمْساً مُضِيئَةً وَلا فَلَكاً يَدُورُ وَلا بَحْراً يَجْرِي وَلا فُلْكاً يَسْرِي
segments.transliteration: wa laa sham-sam-muz'eee-ataw-wa laa falakay-yadoo-ru wa laa bah'-ray-yaj-reee wa laa fulkal yasree

translation.en: the bright sun, the rotating planets, the flowing seas and the sailing ships,

segments.arabic: إِلاَّ فِي مَحَبَّةِ هَؤلاءِ الْخَمْسَةِ الَّذِينَ هُمْ تَحْتَ الْكِساءِ.
segments.transliteration: il-laa fee mah'ab-bati haa-ulaaa-il-kham-satil-lad'ee-na hum tah'-tal-kisaaa

translation.en: but for the love of these Five underneath the cloak"

segments.arabic: فَقالَ الاْمِينُ جَبْرائِيلُ: يَارَبِّ وَمَنْ تَحْتَ الْكِساءِ
segments.transliteration: faqaalal-ameenu jib-raaa-ee-lu : yaa rab-bi wa man tah'-tal-kisaaa

translation.en: Gabriel, the trusted angel, asked : "Who are under the cloak?"
The Almighty answered :

segments.arabic: هُمْ أَهْلُ بَيْتِ النُّبُوَّةِ وَمَعْدِنُ الرِّسالَةِ

translation.en: "They are the Household of the Prophet (s) and the assets of Prophet hood.

segments.transliteration: hum : faat'imatu wa aboohaa wa baa'-luhaa wa banoo-haa

translation.en: They are : Fatimah, her father, her husband and her two sons"

segments.arabic: فَقالَ جَبْرائِيلُ: يَارَبِّ أَتَأْذَنُ لِي أَنْ أَهْبِطَ إِلَى الاْرْضِ
segments.transliteration: faqaala jib-raaa-ee-lu : yaa rab-bi ata-d'anu leee an ah-bita ilal-ar-z'i

translation.en: Gabriel said : "O Lord, May I fly to earth
to be the sixth of them?"

segments.arabic: فَقالَ اللّهُ: نَعَمْ قَدْ أَذِنْتُ لَكَ.

translation.en: Allah replied: "Yes. You are given the permission"

segments.arabic: فَهَبَطَ الاْمِينُ جَبْرائِيلُ وَقالَ: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا رَسُولَ اللّهِ
segments.transliteration: fahabatalameenu jib-raaa-ee-lu wa qaala : as-salaamu a'lay-ka yaa rasoolal-laahil-

translation.en: Gabriel, the trusted, landed near them and said : "Peace be on you, O Prophet (s) of Allah.

segments.arabic: الْعَلِيُّ الأَعْلى يُقْرِئُكَ السَّلام َوَيَخُصُّكَ بِالتَّحِيَّةِ وَالإِكْرامِ
segments.transliteration: a'lee-yul-aa'-laa yuq-riukas-salaamu wa yakhus'-s'uka bil-tah'eey-yati wa lik-raam

translation.en: The All-Highest conveys His peace on you and His greetings

segments.transliteration: wa yaqoo-lu laka : wa iz'-zatee wa jalaalee

translation.en: and says: "By My Honor and Glory, O My angels! O Residents of My Heavens,
verily, I have not created the erected Sky,

segments.arabic: وَلا أَرْضاً مَدْحِيَّةً وَلا قَمَراً مُنِيراً وَلا شَمْساً مُضِيئَةً
segments.transliteration: wa laa ar-z'am-mad-h'ee-yataw-wa laa qamaram-muneeran wa laa sham-sam-muz'eeeataw-

translation.en: the stretched earth, the illuminated moon, the bright sun,

segments.arabic: وَلا فَلَكاً يَدُورُ وَلا بَحْراً يَجْرِي وَلا فُلْكاً يَسْرِي
segments.transliteration: wa laa falkal yadur wa laa bah'-ray-yaj-ree wa laa ful-kay-yas-reee

translation.en: the rotating planets, the flowing seas and the sailing ships,
but for your sake and love"

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ أَذِنَ لِي أَنْ أَدْخُلَ مَعَكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa qad ad'ina leee an ad-khula maa'kum

translation.en: and Allah has given me permission to enter the cloak with you.

segments.arabic: فَهَلْ تَأْذَنُ لِي يَا رَسُولَ اللّه

translation.en: May I join you, O Prophet (s) of Allah?"

segments.arabic: فَقالَ رَسُولُ اللّه: وَعَلَيْكَ السَّلامُ يَا أَمِينَ وَحْيِ اللّهِ
segments.transliteration: faqaala rasoolul-laahi : wa a'lay-kas-salaamu yaa amee-na wah'-yil-laahi

translation.en: The Prophet (s) replied : "And peace be on you, O trusted bearer of Allah's Revelations!
you are granted the permission"
So, Gabriel entered the cloak with us

segments.arabic: فَقالَ لأَبِي: إِنَّ اللّهَ قَدْ أَوْحَى إِلَيْكُمْ يَقُولُ:
segments.transliteration: faqaala li-abee : in-nal-laaha qad aw-h'aaa ilay-kum yaqoolu :

translation.en: and said to my father : Allah sends His Revelations to you;

segments.arabic: إِنَّمَا يُرِيدُ اللّهُ لِيُذْهِبَ عَنْكُمُ الرِّجْسَ

translation.en: "Verily Allah's desire is to keep you away from impurity (and flaws),
O People of Household (Ahlul-Bayt) and keep you thoroughly purified"

segments.arabic: فَقالَ عَلِيٌّ لأَبِي: يَا رَسُولَ اللّه أَخْبِرْنِي مَا لِجُلُوسِنا
segments.transliteration: faqaala a'lee-yul li-abee : yaa rasoolal-laahi akh-bir-nee maa lijuloosinaa

translation.en: Then Ali said to my father : "O Prophet (s) of Allah, tell me

segments.arabic: هذَا تَحْتَ الْكِساءِ مِنَ الْفَضْلِ عِنْدَ اللّهُ

translation.en: what significance has Allah given for getting together underneath this cloak ?"

segments.arabic: فَقالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ:

translation.en: The Prophet (s) replied :
"By Him who rightfully appointed me a Prophet (s)
and chose me a Messenger for the salvation of the mankind.

segments.arabic: مَا ذُكِرَ خَبَرُنا هذَا فِي مَحْفِلٍ مِنْ مَحافِلِ
segments.transliteration: maa d'ukira khabarunaa haad'aa fee mah'-falim-mim-mah'aafili

translation.en: whenever and wherever an assembly

segments.arabic: أَهْلِ الأَرْضِ وَفِيهِ جَمْعٌ مِنْ شِيعَتِنا وَمُحِّبِينا
segments.transliteration: ah-lil-ar-z'i wa fee-hi jam-u'm-min shee-a'tinaa wa muh'-ib-bee-naa

translation.en: of our followers and friends mention this event,
Allah will bestow on them His Blessings and Mercy;

segments.arabic: وَحَفَّتْ بِهِمُ الْمَلائِكَةُ وَاسْتَغْفَرَتْ لَهُمْ إِلى أَنْ يَتَفَرَّقُوا.
segments.transliteration: wa h'af-fat bihimu lamalaaa-ikah was-tagh-farat lahum ilaaa ay-yatafar-raqoo

translation.en: angels will encircle them asking Allah the remission of their sins until the assembly disperses

segments.arabic: فَقالَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ: إِذنْ وَاللّهِ فُزْنَا وَفازَ شِيعَتُنا وَرَبِّ الْكَعْبَةِ.
segments.transliteration: faqaala a'lee-yun a'lay-his-salaamu : id'aw-wal-laahi fuz-naa wa faaza shee-a'tunaa wa rab-bil-kaa'-bah

translation.en: So Ali said : Verily, by the Lord of Kabaa! we and our followers are the winners"""

segments.arabic: فَقالَ أَبِي رَسُولُ اللّهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ:
segments.transliteration: faqaala abee rasoolul-laahi s'al-lal-laaho a'lay-hi wa aaalihi:

translation.en: Then my father replied :

segments.arabic: يَا عَلِيُّ وَالَّذِي بَعَثَنِي بِالْحَقِّ نَبِيّاً
segments.transliteration: yaa a'lee-yu wal-lad'ee baa'thanee bil-h'aq-qi nabee-yaw

translation.en: "By Him who rightfully appointed me a Prophet
and chose me a Messenger for the salvation of the mankind,

segments.arabic: مَا ذُكِرَ خَبَرُنا هذَا فِي مَحْفِلٍ مِنْ مَحَافِلِ أَهْلِ الاْرْضِ
segments.transliteration: ma d'ukira khabarunaa haad'aa fee mah'-falim-mim-mah'aafili ah-lil ar-z'i

translation.en: whenever and wherever an assembly

segments.transliteration: wa fee-hi jam-u'm-min shee-a'tinaa wa muh'ib-bee-naa

translation.en: our followers and friends mentions this event,

segments.arabic: وَفِيهِمْ مَهْمُومٌ إِلاَّ وَفَرَّجَ اللّهُ هَمَّهُ
segments.transliteration: wa fee-him mah-moo-mun il-laa wa far-rajal-laaho ham-mahoo

translation.en: there shall remain none grieved but Allah will remove his grief,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ مَغْمُومٌ إِلاَّ وَكَشَفَ اللّهُ غَمَّهُ
segments.transliteration: walaa magh-moo-mun il-laa wa kashafal-laaho gham-mahoo

translation.en: there shall remain none distressed but Allah will dispel his distress,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ طالِبُ حاجَةٍ إِلاَّ وَقَضَى اللّهُ حاجَتَهُ.
segments.transliteration: wa laa t'aalibu h'aajatin il-laa wa qaz'al-laaho h'aajatah

translation.en: there shall remain none wish-seeker but Allah will grant his wish."

segments.arabic: فَقالَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ: إِذن وَاللّه فُزْنا وَسُعِدْنا وَكَذلِكَ شِيعَتُنا
segments.transliteration: faqaala a'lee-yun a'lay-his-salaamu id'aaw-wal-laahi fuz-naa wa sui'd-naa wa kad'aalika shee-atunaa

translation.en: `Ali, peace be upon him, said, "Then, we have won and attained pleasure. I swear it by Allah. So have our adherents;

segments.arabic: فازُوا وَسُعِدُوا فِي الدُّنْيا وَالاْخِرَةِ وَرَبِّ الْكَعْبَةِ.
segments.transliteration: faazoo wa sui'doo fid-dunyaa wal aaakhirati wa rab-bil-kaa'-bah

translation.en: they have won and attained pleasure in this world and in the Hereafter. I swear it by the Lord of the Ka`bah."

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ala muhammadin wa ali muhammad

translation.en: O' Allāh send Your blessings on Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

text.en: recited after Ziarat Ashura

In some books of supplication, this supplication is referred to as "Dua Alqamah" named after the companion of Imam Sadiq (peace be upon him), Alqamah. However, Shaykh Abbas Qummi quotes very clear traditions in Mafatih ul-Jinan that Imam Sadiq (peace be upon him) recited this dua in the presence of the companion Safwan, not Alqamah. Therefore, the correct name of this supplication is "Dua to be recited after Ziyarah 'Ashura" or "Dua Safwan".

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya allahu ya allahu

translation.en: O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!
O He Who responds to the prayer of the distressed!
O He Who relieves the agonies of the agonized!
O Aide of the callers for aid!
O Helper of those who cry for help!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ هُوَ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيَّ مِنْ حَبْلِ ٱلْوَرِيدِ
segments.transliteration: wa ya man huwa aqrabu ilayya min habli alwaridi

translation.en: O He Who is nearer to me than my life-vein!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ يَحُولُ بَيْنَ ٱلْمَرْءِ وَقَلْبِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ya man yahulu bayna almar'i wa qalbihi

translation.en: O He Who intervenes between man and his heart!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ هُوَ بِٱلْمَنْظَرِ ٱلأَعْلَىٰ وَبِٱلأُفُقِ ٱلْمُبِينِ
segments.transliteration: wa ya man huwa bilmanzari al-a`la wa bil'ufuqi almubini

translation.en: O He Who is in the Highest Position and in the Clear Horizon!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ هُوَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱسْتَوَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa ya man huwa alrrahmanu alrrahimu `ala al`arshi istawa

translation.en: O He Who is all-beneficent and all-merciful and is established on the Throne!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ يَعْلَمُ خَائِنَةَ ٱلأَعْيُنِ وَمَا تُخْفِي ٱلصُّدُورُ
segments.transliteration: wa ya man ya`lamu kha'inata al-a`yuni wa ma tukhfi alssuduru

translation.en: O He Who knows the stealthy looks and that which the breasts conceal!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ لاَ يَخْفَىٰ عَلَيْهِ خَافِيَةٌ
segments.transliteration: wa ya man la yakhfa `alayhi khafiyatun

translation.en: O He from Whom no secret can remain hidden!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاَ تَشْتَبِهُ عَلَيْهِ ٱلأَصْوَاتُ

translation.en: O He Whom is not confused by the many voices (that pray Him)!

segments.transliteration: wa ya man la tughallituhu alhajatu

translation.en: O He Whom is not confounded by the many requests (that are raised to Him)!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ لاَ يُبْرِمُهُ إِلْحَاحُ ٱلْمُلِحِّينَ
segments.transliteration: wa ya man la yubrimuhu ilhahu almulihhina

translation.en: O He Who is not annoyed by the insistence of those who entreat Him persistently!
O He Who overtakes every attempt of escape!
O Reunifier of every scattering thing!

segments.transliteration: wa ya bari'a alnnufusi ba`da almawti

translation.en: O Re-originator of the souls after death!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ كُلِّ يَوْمٍ فِي شَأْنٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa kulla yawmin fi sha'nin

translation.en: O He Who is in a state every moment!
O Grantor of requests!
O Reliever of agonies!
O Conferrer of demands!
O Bestower of desires!
O Savior from sufferings!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَكْفِي مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man yakfi min kulli shay'in

translation.en: O He Who can save from all things

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَكْفِي مِنْهُ شَيْءٌ فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: wa la yakfi minhu shay'un fi alssamawati wal-ardi

translation.en: and nothing in the heavens or in the earth can save from Him!
I beseech You in the name of Muhammad the seal of the Prophets,
`Ali the commander of the faithful,
Fatimah the daughter of Your Prophet,
al-Hasan, and al-Husayn,

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي بِهِمْ أَتَوَجَّهُ إِلَيْكَ فِي مَقَامِي هٰذَا
segments.transliteration: fa'inni bihim atawajjahu ilayka fi maqami hadha

translation.en: for I turn my face towards You in their names at this very situation of mine,
I make them my means to You,
I seek their intercession for me with You,

segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqihim as'aluka wa uqsimu wa a`zimu `alayka

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of Your duty towards them, I adjure You, and I beg You earnestly,
in the name of the status that they enjoy with You,
the value that they enjoy in Your sight,
in the name of the thing by which You have preferred them over all the other beings,
in the name of Your Name that You have placed with them
and given them exclusively other than all the other beings,
and through which You have distinguished them

segments.transliteration: wa abanta fadlahum min fadli al`alamina

translation.en: and demonstrated their distinctive precedence over all the other beings so uniquely

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ فَاقَ فَضْلُهُمْ فَضْلَ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ جَمِيعاً
segments.transliteration: hatta faqa fadluhum fadla al`alamina jami`an

translation.en: that their preference has exceeded all the distinctive features of all the other beings;

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: I beseech You (in the name of all that) to send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
to relieve me from my distress,
grief, and agony,
to make up for me all my distressing affairs,
to help me settle my debts,
to safeguard me against poverty,
to safeguard me against scarcity,
to make me dispense with begging from the created beings,

segments.transliteration: wa takfiyani hamma man akhafu hammahu

translation.en: to spare me from the distress of what I anticipate to distress me,
the difficulty of what I anticipate to be difficult for me,
the toughness of what I anticipate to be hard for me (to deal with),
the evil of what I anticipate to be evil,
the conspiracy of whom I anticipate to plot conspiracy (against me),
the tyranny of whom I anticipate to treat me tyrannically,
the injustice of whom I anticipate to be unjust to me
the domination of whom I anticipate to dominate me,
the trickery of whom I anticipate to trick me,
and the authority of whom I anticipate to seize me,
and to ward off from me the trickeries of the deceivers
and the cunning of the devious.
O Allah, stand for me against him who intends evil for me,
intrigue against him who intends to conspire against me,
turn away from me his trickeries, cunning,
influence, and evil desires,

segments.arabic: وَٱمْنَعْهُ عَنِّي كَيْفَ شِئْتَ وَأَنَّىٰ شِئْتَ
segments.transliteration: wamna`hu `anni kayfa shi'ta wa anna shi'ta

translation.en: and prevent him against me in any way You choose and at any time You choose.
O Allah, (please) preoccupy him against me
by means of poverty that You never cut down,
ordeals that You never recover,
neediness that You never stop,
ailment that You never heal,
humility that You never change into dignity,
and destitution that You never cut down.
O Allah, (please) strike him with humility in the center of his eyes,
interleave poverty to his own house,
place ailment and disease in his body

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ تَشْغَلَهُ عَنِّي بِشُغْلٍ شَاغِلٍ لاَ فَرَاغَ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: hatta tashghalahu `anni bishughlin shaghilin la faragha lahu

translation.en: so that You will preoccupy him with an engrossing, relentless preoccupation,

segments.transliteration: wa ansihi dhikri kama ansaytahu dhikraka

translation.en: make him fail to remember me in the same was as he has failed to remember You,
divert from me his hearing, sight,
tongue, hand,
leg, heart,
and all of his organs,

segments.arabic: وَأَدْخِلْ عَلَيْهِ فِي جَمِيعِ ذٰلِكَ ٱلسُّقْمَ
segments.transliteration: wa adkhil `alayhi fi jami`i dhalika alssuqma

translation.en: place in him sickness in all these (organs),

segments.arabic: وَلا تَشْفِهِ حَتَّىٰ تَجْعَلَ ذٰلِكَ لَهُ شُغْلاً شَاغِلاً بِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la tashfihi hatta taj`ala dhalika lahu shughlan shaghilan bihi

translation.en: and do not heal him so that all these (sicknesses) will preoccupy him relentlessly
from me and from mentioning me.

segments.arabic: وَٱكْفِنِي يَا كَافِي مَا لاَ يَكْفِي سِوَاكَ
segments.transliteration: wakfini ya kafi ma la yakfi siwaka

translation.en: And spare me, O Savior, from all that which cannot be spared by anyone other than You,
for You are verily the Savior; and there is no savior other than You,
You are verily the Reliever, and there is no reliever other than You,
You are verily the Succorer, and there is no succorer other than You,
and You are verily the Shelterer, and there is no shelterer other than You.
Disappointed is he whose shelterer is other than You,
whose recourse to anywhere other than You,
whose resort is anywhere other than You,
whose way out is anywhere other than You,
whose haven is anywhere other than You,
and whose savior from any created being is anyone other than You.
You are verily my trust, my hope,
my resort, my way out,
my haven, and my savior.
With You do I commence
and through You do I seek success.
In the name of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: atawajjahu ilayka wa atawassalu wa atashaffa`u

translation.en: do I turn my face towards You, seek means to You, and seek intercession to You.

segments.arabic: فَأَسْأَلُكَ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: fa'as'aluka ya allahu ya allahu ya allahu

translation.en: So, I beseech You, O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!
Yours is all praise and Yours is all thanks.

segments.transliteration: wa ilayka almushtaka wa anta almusta`anu

translation.en: To You is my complaint and You are the Besought for help.

segments.arabic: فَأَسْأَلُكَ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: fa'as'aluka ya allahu ya allahu ya allahu

translation.en: So, I beseech You, O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!
In the name of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: to send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تَكْشِفَ عَنِّي غَمِّي وَهَمِّي وَكَرْبِي
segments.transliteration: wa an takshifa `anni ghammi wa hammi wa karbi

translation.en: and to relieve my distress, grief, and agony
in this situation of mine

segments.arabic: كَمَا كَشَفْتَ عَنْ نَبِيِّكَ هَمَّهُ وَغَمَّهُ وَكَرْبَهُ
segments.transliteration: kama kashafta `an nabiyyika hammahu wa ghammahu wa karbahu

translation.en: in the same way as You have relieved the distress, grief, and agony of Your Prophet
and saved him from the horrors of his enemy.
So, (please) relieve me in the same way as You did to him,
dispel my worries in the same way as You did to him,
save me in the same way as You did to him,

segments.arabic: وَٱصْرِفْ عَنِّي هَوْلَ مَا أَخَافُ هَوْلَهُ

translation.en: drive away from me the horror of what I anticipate to horrify me,
the encumbrance of what I anticipate to overburden me,
and the distress of what I anticipate to distress me

segments.arabic: بِلا مَؤُونَةٍ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي مِنْ ذٰلِكَ

translation.en: without making me suffer any encumbrance due to all that.
And make me leave having all my requests granted
and having all my distresses relieved,
