including the affairs of this world and the Hereafter.
O Commander of the Faithful!
O Abu-`Abdullah!
Peace of Allah be upon you both from me forever

segments.transliteration: ma baqitu wa baqiya allaylu walnnaharu

translation.en: as long as I am existent and as long as there are day and night.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ جَعَلَهُ ٱللَّهُ آخِرَ ٱلْعَهْدِ مِنْ زِيَارَتِكُمَا
segments.transliteration: wa la ja`alahu allahu akhira al`ahdi min ziyaratikuma

translation.en: May Allah not decide this time of my visit to you both to be the last.

segments.transliteration: wa la farraqa allahu bayni wa baynakuma

translation.en: May Allah never separate me from you both.

segments.transliteration: allahumma ahyini hayata muhammadin wa dhurriyyatihi

translation.en: O Allah, (please) make me live the same lifestyle that Muhammad and his offspring lived,
make me die on the same faith on which they died,
receive my soul while I am following their religion,
include me with their group,

segments.transliteration: wa la tufarriq bayni wa baynahum

translation.en: and never separate me from them
not for even a winking of any eye
in this world and in the Hereafter.
O Commander of the Faithful!
O Abu-`Abdullah!
I have come to you both to visit you,

segments.transliteration: wa mutawassilan ila allahi rabbi wa rabbikuma

translation.en: making both of you to be my means to Allah your and my Lord,
turning my face to Him in your names,

segments.arabic: وَمُسْتَشْفِعاً بِكُمَا إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ تَعَالَىٰ فِي حَاجَتِي هٰذِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa mustashfi`an bikuma ila allahi ta`ala fi hajati hadhihi

translation.en: and seeking your intercession for me with Allah All-exalted to grant me this request of mine;
so, intercede for me,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ لَكُمَا عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمَقَامَ ٱلْمَحْمُودَ

translation.en: since you both enjoy with Allah a praiseworthy position,
an admissible status,
a lofty standing, and a means (of nearness to Him).
I will now leave you both,
expecting my request to be granted,

segments.transliteration: wa qada'iha wa najahiha min allahi

translation.en: settled, and made successful by Allah

segments.arabic: بِشَفَاعَتِكُمَا لِي إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ فِي ذٰلِكَ
segments.transliteration: bishafa`atikuma li ila allahi fi dhalika

translation.en: on account of your intercession for me with Allah in that;
so, do not let me down

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَكونُ مُنْقَلَبِي مُنْقَلَباً خَائِباً خَاسِراً
segments.transliteration: wa la yakunu munqalabi munqalaban kha'iban khasiran

translation.en: and do not make me leave with disappointment and loss;
rather, make me leave with achievement,
prosperity, success, and response (of my prayers)
by having all my requests granted.
And (please) intercede for me with Allah recurrently.
I now leave on ‘whatever is willed by Allah shall come to pass’

segments.arabic: وَلا حَوْلَ وَلا قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi

translation.en: and ‘there is neither might nor power except with Allah’,
relegating all my affairs to Allah,
referring all my power to Allah,
depending upon Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa aqulu hasbiya allahu wa kafa

translation.en: and repeating, ‘Allah is only sufficient to me,’
and ‘May Allah respond to him who prays Him.’
Other than Allah
and other than you all, O my masters, I have nothing to put my hope in.
Only that which my Lord wills shall come to pass,

segments.transliteration: wa ma lam yasha' lam yakun

translation.en: and whatever He does not will shall never be.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi

translation.en: There is neither might nor power except with Allah.
I entrust you both with Allah.

segments.arabic: وَلا جَعَلَهُ ٱللَّهُ آخِرَ ٱلْعَهْدِ مِنِّي إِلَيْكُمَا
segments.transliteration: wa la ja`alahu allahu akhira al`ahdi minni ilaykuma

translation.en: May Allah never decide this time of my visit to you both to be the last.

segments.arabic: إِنْصَرَفْتُ يَا سَيِّدِي يَا أَمِيرَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَمَوْلاَي
segments.transliteration: insaraftu ya sayyidi ya amira almu'minina wa mawlaya

translation.en: May I now leave, O my master, O Commander of the faithful

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ يَا سَيِّدِي
segments.transliteration: wa anta ya aba `abdillahi ya sayyidi

translation.en: and you O Abu-`Abdullah, O my master.
My greetings to you both are as continuous
as night and day.
May my greetings reach you both (all the time)
and my salutation never be screened from reaching you both,
Allah willing.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُهُ بِحَقِّكُمَا أَنْ يَشَاءَ ذٰلِكَ وَيَفْعَلَ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluhu bihaqqikuma an yasha'a dhalika wa yaf`ala

translation.en: I also beseech Him in your names to determine and do that,
for He is verily the owner of praise and the owner of glory.
I am now leaving you both, O my masters,
repenting to and praising Allah,
and thanking Him and hoping Him to respond to me;
I neither despair nor lose hope,
and I intend to come back, return, revisit you both,

segments.arabic: غَيْرَ رَاغِبٍ عَنْكُمَا وَلاَ عَنْ زِيَارَتِكُمَا

translation.en: while I have never desired to leave you or to abandon visiting you;

segments.arabic: بَلْ رَاجِعٌ عَائِدٌ إِنْ شَاءَ ٱللَّهُ

translation.en: rather, I shall return and come back, if Allah wills.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi

translation.en: There is neither might nor power except with Allah.

segments.arabic: يَا سَادَتِي رَغِبْتُ إِلَيْكُمَا وَإِلَىٰ زِيَارَتِكُمَا
segments.transliteration: ya sadati raghibtu ilaykuma wa ila ziyaratikuma

translation.en: O my masters, I do desire for both of you and for visiting you

segments.arabic: بَعْدَ أَنْ زَهِدَ فِيكُمَا وَفِي زِيَارَتِكُمَا أَهْلُ ٱلدُّنْيَا
segments.transliteration: ba`da an zahida fikuma wa fi ziyaratikuma ahlu alddunya

translation.en: although the people of this world (may) abandon you both or abandon visiting you.

segments.arabic: فَلاَ خَيَّبَنِيَ ٱللَّهُ مِمَّا رَجَوْتُ وَمَا أَمَّلْتُ فِي زِيَارَتِكُمَا
segments.transliteration: fala khayyabaniya allahu mimma rajawtu wa ma ammaltu fi ziyaratikuma

translation.en: May Allah never make me fail to attain what I have hoped and desired in visiting you both.
Verily, He is All-nigh, All-responding.

text.en: Munajaat 2 of Imam Ali (as)-Amir-ul-Momineen From Sahifa Alawia .

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ يَا ذَاَ ٱلْجُودِ وَٱلْمَجْدِ وَٱلْعُلَىٰ
segments.transliteration: laka alhamdu ya dhaljudi walmajdi wal`ula

translation.en: To You be all praise; O Lord of magnanimity, glory, and elevation!

segments.transliteration: tabarakta tu`ti man tasha'u wa tamna`u

translation.en: Blessed be You; You favor or ban whomever You wish.

segments.transliteration: ilahi wa khallaqi wa hirzi wa maw'ili

translation.en: O my God, my Creator, my Shelter, and my Refuge!
To You do I resort in hardships and in joys.

segments.transliteration: ilahi la'in jallat wa jammat khati'ati

translation.en: O my God, even if my sin is too grave and too big,

segments.arabic: فَعَفْوُكَ عَنْ ذَنْبِي أَجَلُّ وَ أَوْسَعُ

translation.en: Your pardoning my sin is still greater and vaster.
O my God, because I have allowed my soul to do whatever it liked,

segments.arabic: فَهَا أَنَا فِي رَوْضِ ٱلنَّدَامَةِ أَرْتَعُ
segments.transliteration: faha ana fi rawdi alnnadamati arta`u

translation.en: here I am now turning over and over on the land of remorse.

segments.transliteration: ilahi tara hali wa faqri wa faqati

translation.en: O my God, You can see my manner, my neediness, and my poverty,
so can You hear my inaudible prayers to You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي فَلاَ تَقْطَعْ رَجَائِي وَلاَ تُزِغْ
segments.transliteration: ilahi fala taqta` raja'i wa la tuzigh

translation.en: O my God, then (please) do not disappoint me and do not cause

segments.arabic: فُؤَُادِي فَلِي فِي سَيْبِ جُودِكَ مَطْمَعُ
segments.transliteration: fu'adi fali fi saybi judika matma`u

translation.en: my heart to turn away, for I long for Your vast magnanimity.
O my God, if You disappoint me or throw me out,

segments.arabic: فَمَنْ ذَاَ ٱلَّذِي أَرْجُو وَمَنْ ذَا أُشَفِّعُ
segments.transliteration: faman dhalladhi arju wa man dha ushaffi`u

translation.en: then for whom will I hope and whose intercession will I seek before You?
O my God, please redeem me from Your torture,
for I am imprisoned, humble, and to You do I submit.
O my God, delight me by helping me submit my argument,

segments.arabic: إِذَا كَانَ لِي فِي ٱلْقَبْر ِمَثْوَىً وَمَضْجَعُ
segments.transliteration: idha kana li fi alqabri mathwan wa madja`u

translation.en: when I shall be lodged in my grave.
O my God, if You chastise me for one thousand years,
the rope of my hope for You shall nonetheless be cut off.
O my God, please make me taste the flavor of Your pardon on that Day

segments.arabic: لاَ بَنُونَ وَلاَ مَالٌ هُنَالِكَ يَنْفَعُ
segments.transliteration: banuna wa la malun hunalika yanfa`u

translation.en: when neither one’s sons nor property shall promote.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي لَئِنْ لَمْ تَرْعَنِي كُنْتُ ضَائِعاً
segments.transliteration: ilahi la'in lam tar`ani kuntu da'i`an

translation.en: O my God, if You do not guard me, I shall certainly be lost,

segments.transliteration: wa in kunta tar`ani falastu udayya`u

translation.en: but if You guard me, I shall never be lost.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِذَا لَمْ تَعْفُ عَنْ غَيْرِ مُحْسِنٍ
segments.transliteration: ilahi idha lam ta`fu `an ghayri muhsinin

translation.en: O my God, if You forgive none but the doer of good deeds,
then who shall care for the wrongdoers who plunge in their fancies?

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي لَئِنْ فَرَّطْتُ فِي طَلَبِ ٱلتُّقَىٰ
segments.transliteration: ilahi la'in farrattu fi talabi alttuqa

translation.en: O my God, if I have been negligent in the seeking of piety,

segments.arabic: فَهَا انَا إِثْرَ ٱلْعَفْوِ أقْفُو وَ أَتْبَعُ
segments.transliteration: faha ana ithra al`afwi aqfu wa atba`u

translation.en: here I am now tracking the traces of Your pardon.
O my God, if I have been wrong out of ignorance,

segments.arabic: رَجَوْتُكَ حَتَّىٰ قِيلَ مَا هُوَ يَجْزَعُ
segments.transliteration: rajawtuka hatta qila ma huwa yajza`u

translation.en: I have begged You so much that it was said that I would never feel tired.
O my God, although my sins have been higher than mountains,

segments.arabic: وَصَفْحُكَ عَنْ ذَنْبِي أَجَلُّ وَ أَرْفَعُ
segments.transliteration: wa safhuka `an dhanbi ajallu wa arfa`u

translation.en: Your pardon is still higher and more elevated.
O my God, as I remember Your power, my agonies are abated,

segments.transliteration: wa dhikru alkhataya al`ayna minni yudammi`u

translation.en: and as I remember my sins, my eyes shed tears.
O my God, please overlook my slips and erase my wrongdoing,
for I confess of them fearfully and hopefully.

segments.transliteration: ilahi anilni minka rawhan wa rahatan

translation.en: O my God, grant me rest and relax from You,
for I knock no door save the doors of Your favor.
O my God, if You expel me or insult me,

segments.arabic: فَمَا حِيلَتِي يَا رَبِّ أَمْ كَيْفَ أَصْنَعُ
segments.transliteration: fama hilati ya rabbu am kayfa asna`u

translation.en: which method shall I then take and what shall I do?

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي حَلِيفُ ٱلْحُبِّ فِي ٱللَّيْلِ سَاهِرٌ
segments.transliteration: ilahi halifu alhubbi fi allayli sahirun

translation.en: O my God, the true lover (of You) is staying up at night,
calling at You and praying to You, while the unmindful is asleep!

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي وَهٰذَا ٱلْخَلْقُ مَا بَيْنَ نَائِمٍ
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa hadha alkhalqu ma bayna na'imin

translation.en: O my God, these beings are either sleeping
or vigilant at night, beseeching You.
Yet, all are hoping for Your rewards, wishing

segments.transliteration: lirahmatika al`uzma wa fi alkhuldi yatma`u

translation.en: for Your Grandest Mercy, and desiring for Eternity.
O my God, my hope for You makes me feel safe,
but the vice of my wrongdoings is reproaching me.
O my God, if you pardon me, then You shall have saved me;
otherwise, I will be the prey of my offensive sins.
O my God, (I beseech You) in the name of Muhammad, the Hashemite

segments.transliteration: wa hurmati atharin humu laka khudda`u

translation.en: and in the name of the sanctity of those Pure Ones who always submit to You.
O my God, (I beseech You) in the name of the Chosen Prophet, his cousin,

segments.transliteration: wa hurmati abrarin humu laka khushsha`u

translation.en: and the sanctity of the Pious Ones who are fearful of You.
O my God, guide me to keep following the religion of Ahmad
with full submission, piety, obedience, and surrender to You.

segments.transliteration: wa la tahrimanni ya ilahi wa sayyidi

translation.en: Please, deprive me not, O my God and Master,
of his (i.e. Muhammad) great intercession, for he is the true interceder.
Please, send blessings to them as long as one believing in Your Oneness prays to You
and as long as pious people, kneeling down at Your door, implore You.

text.en: In the same book (al-Sahifah al-`Alawiyyah), there is another poetic whispered prayer beginning with ya sami`a alddu`a' (O Hearer of prayers). This is skipped it, because it contains difficult phrases,& to be brief.
THREE MAGNIFICENT Supplicatory WORDS
These words are reported to have been said by our master, Imam `Ali ibn Abi-Talib (`a) in the form of whispered prayer (munajat):

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي كَفَىٰ بِيَ عِزّاً أَنْ أَكُونَ لَكَ عَبْداً
segments.transliteration: ilahi kafa biya `izzan an akuna laka `abdan

translation.en: O my God, to be a servant of You is the ultimate of my honor

segments.arabic: وَكَفَىٰ بِيَ فَخْراً أَنْ تَكُونَ لِيَ رَبّاً
segments.transliteration: wa kafa biya fakhran an takuna li rabban

translation.en: and Your being my Lord is the ultimate of my pride.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ كَمَا أُحِبُّ فَٱجْعَلْنِي كَمَا تُحِبُّ
segments.transliteration: anta kama uhibbu faj`alni kama tuhibbu

translation.en: As You are as exactly as I love, please make me as exactly as You love.

text.en: Shaykh Kafami in al-balad al amin narrates from Muqatil ibn Sulayman dua by Imam Ali bin Husayn Zayn al abidin (as)

To get immediate acceptance of your supplication, , recite this dua'a 100 times, preferably on Thursday, after praying 2 rakat salat, and 15 durood (salawat) before and at the end of this dua'a, and beseech the almighty Allah to fulfill your legitimate desires, wants and needs.

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي كَيْفَ أَدْعُوكَ وَ أَنَا أَنَا وَ كَيْفَ أَقْطَعُ رَجَائِي مِنْكَ وَ أَنْتَ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: elaahi kayfa ad'ooka wa anaa anaa wa kayfa aqta-o’ rajaaee minka wa anta anta

translation.en: My God how can I call on You (for help) for I am me (a sinful servant)?How can I cut off hope from You for You are You (the merciful lord)?

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي إِذَا لَمْ أَسْأَلْكَ فَتُعْطِيَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي أَسْأَلُهُ فَيُعْطِينِي
segments.transliteration: elaahi iz lam as-aloka fa-too-teenee faman zal-lazee as-alohu fayo’teenee

translation.en: My God (even) when I did not beseech You, You gave me. So who is he who gives if I beseech him?

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي إِذَا لَمْ أَدْعُكَ (أَدْعُوكَ) فَتَسْتَجِيبَ لِي فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي أَدْعُوهُ فَيَسْتَجِيبُ لِي
segments.transliteration: elaahi iz lam ad-oo’ka fa-tastajeebo lee faman zal lazee ad-oo’ho fa yastajeebo lee

translation.en: My God (even) when I did not call out, You fulfilled my desire. So who is he who satisfies if I call him?

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي إِذَا لَمْ أَتَضَرَّعْ إِلَيْكَ فَتَرْحَمَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي أَتَضَرَّعُ إِلَيْهِ فَيَرْحَمُنِي
segments.transliteration: elaahi iz lam atazarra’ elayka fa tarhamoni faman zal lazee atazarra-o’ elayhe fa yarhamonee

translation.en: My God (even) when I did not humbly solicit, You took pity on me. So who is he who shows mercy i'll solicit him?

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي فَكَمَا فَلَقْتَ الْبَحْرَ لِمُوسَى عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ وَ نَجَّيْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: elaahi fakamaa falaqtal bahra le moosaa a’layhis salaamo wa najjaytahu

translation.en: My God I beseech You that just as You parted asunder the sea for Musa (peace be on him) to save him,

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ
segments.transliteration: as-aloka an tosalle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin

translation.en: send blessings on Muhammad and on the children of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تُنَجِّيَنِي مِمَّا أَنَا فِيهِ وَ تُفَرِّجَ عَنِّي فَرَجاً عَاجِلاً غَيْرَ آجِلٍ
segments.transliteration: wa an tonajjeyanee mimmaa anaa feehe wa tafarreja a’nnee farajan a’aajelan ghaira aajelin

translation.en: and come to my rescue, and deliver me (from these troubles), and disperse (afflictions), and do it quickly, without delay,

segments.arabic: بِفَضْلِكَ وَ رَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: be fazleka wa be rahmateka yaa arhamar raahemeen.

translation.en: through Your kindness, through Your mercy, O the most merciful.

text.en: Significance of this Dua

It is a small but very compact dua'a. The reciter asks for every thing he needs in this world, and will be in need of on the day of judgment. All pious religious scholars recite this dua'a at the time of tawaf of Ka-bah. The power of this dua'a is that you can have your complete needs in one dua'a :

translation.en: O Allah, in the name of your most special attributes,

segments.arabic: وَ بِعِزِّ جَلَالِكَ وَ بِاَعْظَمِ اَسْمَآئِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa bi eezi jalalika, wa bi adhamati asmaika,

translation.en: in the name of the dignity of your exalted majesty, in the name of the greatness of your names,

segments.arabic: وَ بِعِصْمَةِ اَنْبِيَآئِكَ وَ بِنُوْرِ اَوْلِيَآئِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa bi ismati an biyaika, wa bi noori auliyaika,

translation.en: in the name of the purity of your prophets, in the name of the light of your chosen representatives,

segments.arabic: وَ بِدَمِ شُهْدَآئِكَ وَ بِمِدَادِ عُلَمَآئِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa bi d'ami shuhadaika, wa bi midadi ulamaika,

translation.en: in the name of the blood shed by the martyrs in your cause, in the name of the ink used by the scholars of your purpose and plan,

segments.arabic: وَ بِدُعَآءِ صُلَحَآئِكَ وَ بِمُنَاجَاتِ فُقَرَآئِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa bi dua'ai sulahaika, wa bi munajati fukaraika,

translation.en: in the name of the prayers of the righteous and in the name of the invocations made by your servants leaving in resignation and asceticism,
We beseech you for continuous addition in knowledge,
freedom from sickness in the body,

segments.arabic: وَ طُوْلاً فِيْ الْعُمْرِ فِيْ طَاعَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa tulan fil umr fi ta'atika,

translation.en: long duration of life spent in your obedience
abundance in the means of livelihood,
divine guidance to turn repentant unto you, before death,

segments.arabic: وَ رَاحَةً عِنْدَ الْمَوْتِ وَ مَغْفِرَةً بَعْدَ الْمَوْتِ
segments.transliteration: wa rahatan indal maut, wa maghfiratan ba'adal maut,

translation.en: freedom from pain at the time of death, protection after death,
light in the grave,

segments.arabic: الْقَبْرِ وَ نَجَاةً مِّنَ النَّارِ وَ دُخْوْلًا فِيْ الْجَنَّةِ
segments.transliteration: wa najatan mina naari, wa dukhulan fil janati,

translation.en: escape from the hell, entry into the paradise

segments.arabic: وَ عَافِيَةً مِنْ كُلِّ بَلَآءِ الدُّنْيَا وَعَذَابِ الْآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa afiyatan min kuli balaai dunya, wa adhabil akhirati,

translation.en: and safety from all the evils of the world and from the chastisement in the hereafter,

segments.arabic: بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ الطَّيِّبِيْنَ الطَّاهِرِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: bihaki muhamadin wa ahli batihi tayibina tahiriynal ma'asumina.

translation.en: in the name and for the sake of Muhammad and his pure, purified and infallible progeny.

text.en: Virtues
The virtue of the duaHere the Holy Prophet (SAW) said to Gabriel: What is the virtue of these words? Gabriel said: Far away! Far away! It is something impossible, for if the angels of seven heavens
The virtue of the dua

Here the Holy Prophet (SAW) said to Gabriel: What is the virtue of these words? Gabriel said: Far away! Far away! It is something impossible, for if the angels of seven heavens and seven earths gather

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ اَظْهَرَ الْجَمِيْلَ وَ سَتَرَ الْقَبِيْحَ،
segments.transliteration: ya man adh'haral jameel wa sataral qabeeh

translation.en: O You who reveal beauty and conceal ugly things!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَمْ يُؤَاخِذْ بِالْجَرِيْرَۃِ وَ لَمْ يَـهْـتِـکِ السِّتْرَ،
segments.transliteration: ya man lam yu'aakhidh bil jareerati wa lam yahtikis sitr

translation.en: O You who do not take a wrongdoer to task and do not tear the veil!

segments.arabic: يَا عَظِيْمَ الْعَفْوِ، يَا حَسَنَ التَّجَاوُزِ،

translation.en: O You who are Great Forgiver! O You who have the great forbearance!

segments.arabic: يَا وَاسِعَ الْمَغْـفِـرَۃِ، يَا بَاسِطَ الْيَدَيْنِ بِالرَّحْمَۃِ،
segments.transliteration: ya waasi'al maghfirati, ya baasital yadayni bir rahmah

translation.en: O You who have pardon abounding! O You who have opened Your hands for mercy!

segments.arabic: يَا صَاحِبَ کُـلِّ نَجْويٰ، وَيَا مُنْتَهٰي کُلِّ شَکْويٰ،
segments.transliteration: ya saahiba kulli najwaa, ya muntaha kulli shakwaa

translation.en: O Hearer of all whisperings! O You to whom all complaints are made!

segments.arabic: يَا کَرِيْمَ الصَّفْحِ، يَا عَظِيْمَ الْمَـنِّ، يَا مُبْتَدِئًا بِالنِّعَـمِ قَبْلَ اسْـتِحْقَـاقِـهَا،
segments.transliteration: ya kareemas safhi, ya 'adheemal manni ya mubtadi'an bin ni'ami qablas tihqaaqihaa

translation.en: O Noble face! O Possessor of great favor! O You who give blessings to Your servants when they do not deserve it!

segments.arabic: يَا سَـيِّـدَنَـا، يَا رَبَّـنَا، يَا مَوْلاَنَا، يَا غَايَۃَ رَغْـبَـتـِنَا،
segments.transliteration: ya sayyidanaa, ya rabbanaa, ya maulaanaa ya ghaayata raghbatinaa

translation.en: O our Master! O our Lord! O our Guardian! O the Goal of our desires!

segments.arabic: اَسْـاَلُـکَ يَا اَللّٰهُ و اَنْ لاَ تُـشَـوِّهُ خَـلْـقِـي بِالـنَّـارِ۔
segments.transliteration: as'aluka ya Allahu an laa tushawwih khalqee bin naar

translation.en: I beseech You O God! not to make my being ugly with Fire.

segments.arabic: اَسْئَلُكَ بِحَقِّ هٰذِهِ الْاَسْمَاءِ، وَ بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ الطَّاهِرِيْنَ عَلَيْهِمُ السَّلاَمُ، اِلاَّ مَا كَشَفْتَ كَرْبِىْ، وَ نَفَّسْتَ هَمِّىْ، وَ فَرَّجْتَ عَنِىْ، وَ اَصْلَحْتَ حَالِيْ.

text.en: Significance/Background of this Dua

DUA AL-SAYF AL-SAGHIR The Supplication of the Minor Sword.( FROM MAFATIH)Also called Du`a' al-Qamus (The Supplicatory prayer of the Ocean),Shaykh Mirza al-Nuri—may Allah honor his tomb—has mentioned this prayer in his book entitled al-Sahifah al-`Alawiyyah II, adding, "This supplication has been explained by the master scholars of talismans and spiritual sciences with strange words referring to marvelous effects ensuing from reciting it."

translation.en: In the Name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful

segments.arabic: رَبِّ أَدْخِلْنِي فِي لُجَّةِ بَحْرِ أَحَدِيَّتِكَ
segments.transliteration: rabbi adkhilni fi lujjati bahri ahadiyyatika

translation.en: O my Lord, include me with the profundity of the ocean of Your Oneness
and in the enormity of the sea of Your singleness.

segments.transliteration: wa qawwini biquwwati satwati sultani fardaniyyatika

translation.en: Strengthen me with the strength of the influence of the authority of Your Uniqueness

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ أَخْرُجَ إِلَىٰ فَضَاءِ سَعَةِ رَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: hatta akhruja ila fada'i saʿati rahmatika

translation.en: so that when I come out to the space of the breadth of Your mercy,

segments.arabic: وَفِي وَجْهِي لَمَعَاتُ بَرْقِ ٱلْقُرْبِ مِنْ آثَارِ حِمَايَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa fi wajhi lamaʿatu barqi alqurbi min athari himayatika

translation.en: my face will have the twinkles of the shining of the nearness to the traces of Your protection,
being venerable out of Your venerability,
mighty out of Your care (for me),
esteemed, and honored
out of Your instruction and purity.
Dress me with the garments of dignity and tolerability,

segments.transliteration: wa sahhil li manahija alwuslati walwusuli

translation.en: make easy for me to attain the courses of communication and attainment (to You),
adorn me with the crown of decorum and solemnity,

segments.transliteration: wa allif bayni wa bayna ahibba'ika

translation.en: and put affection between your beloved ones and me

segments.transliteration: fi dari alddunya wa dari alqarari

translation.en: in this worldly abode as well as the Abode of Enduring Settlement.

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي مِنْ نُورِ ٱسْمِكَ هَيْبَةً وَسَطْوَةً
segments.transliteration: warzuqni min nuri ismika haybatan wa satwatan

translation.en: Out of the illumination of Your Name, confer upon me with honor and authority
due to which all hearts and souls will submit to me,
and all selves and ghosts will succumb to me.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ ذَلَّتْ لَهُ رِقَابُ ٱلْجَبَابِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: ya man dhallat lahu riqabu aljababirati

translation.en: O He to Whom all the tyrants surrender,
and before Whom all the kings submit!

segments.arabic: لاَ مَلْجَأَ وَلاَ مَنْجَىٰ مِنْكَ إِلاَّ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: la malja'a wa la manjan minka illa ilayka

translation.en: There in neither shelter nor refuge (to protect) against You save to You,
there is no help save through You,
and there is no reliance save upon You.
Repel against me the trickeries of the envious ones
and the murk of the evils of the stubborn ones.
Have mercy upon me under the pavilion of Your Throne;
O most Generous of all those who show generosity!
Aid my appearance to attain Your pleasure

segments.arabic: وَنَوِّرْ قَلْبِي وَسِرِّي بِٱلاِطِّلاَعِ عَلَىٰ مَنَاهِجِ مَسَاعِيكَ
segments.transliteration: wa nawwir qalbi wa sirri bil-ittilaʿi ʿala manahiji masaʿika

translation.en: and illuminate my heart and inner self by making me acquainted with the courses to acting for Your sake.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي كَيْفَ أَصْدُرُ عَنْ بَابِكَ بِخَيْبَةٍ مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi kayfa asduru ʿan babika bikhaybatin minka

translation.en: O my God, how does it come that I leave Your Door with disappointment

segments.transliteration: wa qad waradtuhu ʿala thiqatin bika

translation.en: after I had come to it with full faith in You?
How is it possible that You drive me to despair of Your endowment
after You have instructed me to pray to You?
Here I am coming to You
seeking shelter with You.
Keep me far away from my enemies
just as You have kept my enemies far away from one another.
Take their sights away from me
through the Light of Your Holiness
and the Grandeur of Your Glory.
You are verily Allah
Who confers with the splendid honoring graces
upon those who secretly pray to You out of Your tremendous mercy.
O Ever-living, O Self-subsisting,
O Lord of Glory and Honor!

segments.arabic: وَصَّلىٰ اللَّهُ عَلَىٰ سَيِّدِنَا وَنَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّد
segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu ʿala sayyidina wa nabiyyina muhammadin

translation.en: May Allah send blessings to our master and Prophet, Muhammad,
and upon all of his Household—the purified and immaculate.

text.en: This form of supplication can be recited after visiting all the Holy Imams (peace be upon them). Sayyid Ibn Tawus, in his book of Misbah al-Zair, has mentioned this supplicatory prayer to be said directly after Ziyarah Aimmatul Momineen in particular.

translation.en: O Allah, I am visiting this Imam
confessing his Imamate
and believing in the obligation of the obedience to him;
therefore, I have betaken myself to his shrine in spite of all of my sins, defects,
the perils of my wrongdoings,
my numerous misdeeds and faults,
and whatsoever You know about me;
taking shelter in Your amnesty,
seeking refuge of Your forbearance,
hoping for Your mercy,
resorting to Your asylum,
seeking the protection of Your compassion,
seeking the intercession of Your vicegerent and the son
Your choicest servant and the son of Your choicest servants,
Your trustee and the son of Your trustees,
and Your representative and the son of Your representatives,

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ جَعَلْتَهُمُ ٱلْوَسِيلَةَ إِلَىٰ رَحْمَتِكَ وَرِضْوَانِكَ
segments.transliteration: alladhina ja`altahum alwasilata ila rahmatika wa ridwanika

translation.en: whom You have made the means to approach Your mercy and pleasure
and the channels to Your compassion and forgiveness.
O Allah, my first need from You

segments.arabic: أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي مَا سَلَفَ مِنْ ذُنُوبِي عَلَىٰ كَثْرَتِهَا
segments.transliteration: an taghfira li ma salafa min dhunubi `ala kathratiha

translation.en: is that I implore You to forgive all of my previous sins although they are numerous,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تَعْصِمَنِي فِيمَا بَقِيَ مِنْ عُمْرِي
segments.transliteration: wa an ta`simani fima baqiya min `umri

translation.en: to protect me (against sinning) in my coming lifetime,
to purify my religion from whatsoever stains,
disgraces, or degrades it,
to save it from suspect, doubt,
corruption, and blasphemy,
to make me stand firm on the obedience to You,
to Your Messenger,
and to his Progeny the pure and happy,
may Your blessings be upon them

segments.transliteration: wa rahmatuka wa salamuka wa barakatuka

translation.en: as well as Your mercy, peace, and favors,
to make me live as long as You grant me life on the obedience to them,
to make me die, when You decide so, on the obedience to them,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ لاَ تَمْحُوَ مِنْ قَلْبِي مَوَدَّتَهُمْ وَمَحَبَّتَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa an la tamhuwa min qalbi mawaddatahum wa mahabbatahum

translation.en: and not to erase from my heart my love and affection for them,
my aversion to their enemies,
my companionship of their adherents, and my acting piously towards them.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ يَا رَبِّ أَنْ تَقْبَلَ ذٰلِكَ مِنِّي
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka ya rabbi an taqbala dhalika minni

translation.en: I also beseech You, O my Lord, to accept all that from me,
to endear my worshipping You to myself,
to endue me with perseverance in worship,
to make me active in it,

segments.transliteration: wa tubaghghida ilayya ma`asiyaka wa maharimaka

translation.en: to make me loathe acts of disobedience to You and acts that You deemed forbidden,
to take me away from these acts,
to save me against negligence of my prayers,
belittling them,
and slackening in their performance,

segments.arabic: وَتُوَفِّقَنِي لِتَأْدِيَتِهَا كَمَا فَرَضْتَ وَأَمَرْتَ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa tuwaffiqani lita'diyatiha kama faradta wa amarta bihi

translation.en: to lead me to perform them as perfect as You have made incumbent upon me and as You have commanded
according to the traditions of Your Messenger,
may Your blessings be upon him and his Household
as well as Your mercy and favors,
with submission and reverence,
to expand my breast for defraying the poor-rate,
giving alms,
giving charity,
and doing favors to the adherents of the Household of Muhammad,
peace be upon them, and for consoling them.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَتَوَفَّانِي إِلاَّ بَعْدَ أَنْ تَرْزُقَنِي حِجَّ بَيْتِكَ ٱلْحَرَامِ
segments.transliteration: wa la tatawaffani illa ba`da an tarzuqani hajja baytika alharami

translation.en: Do not take me up (i.e. cause me to die) before You bestow upon me with the favor of going on pilgrimage to Your Sacred House
and to the tomb of Your Prophet
and the tombs of the Imams, peace be upon them.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ يَا رَبِّ تَوْبَةً نَصُوحاً تَرْضَاهَا
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka ya rabbi tawbatan nasuhan tardaha

translation.en: I also beseech You, O Lord, to grant me a sincere repentance that You accept,
an intention that You praise,
and righteous deed that You admit,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي وَتَرْحَمَنِي إِذَا تَوَفَّيْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: wa an taghfira li wa tarhamani idha tawaffaytani

translation.en: to forgive me and have mercy upon me when You take me up,
to make easy for me the agonies of death,

segments.transliteration: wa tahshurani fi zumrati muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: to include me with the group of Muhammad and his Household,
peace of Allah be upon him and them,
to allow me to enter Paradise out of Your mercy,

segments.transliteration: wa taj`ala dam`i ghaziran fi ta`atika

translation.en: to make me shed heavy tears as obeisance to You,
to make my tears always run down in acts that draw me near You,
to make my heart sympathetic towards Your intimate servants,
to save me in this worldly life
from handicaps, epidemics,
incurable diseases,
chronic illnesses,
and all sorts of misfortunes and catastrophes.
[I also beseech You to] cause my heart to turn away from the forbidden (acts and things),
make me hate acts of disobedience to You,
make me love the legally gotten sustenance
open its doors before me,
make firm my intention and my deeds on it,
extend my lifetime,
and close the doors of adversaries before me.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَسْلُبَنِي مَا مَنَنْتَ بِهِ عَلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: wa la taslubani ma mananta bihi `alayya

translation.en: (Please) do not deprive me of whatsoever You have favored upon me,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَسْتَرِدَّ شَيْئًا مِمَّا أَحْسَنْتَ بِهِ إِلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: wa la tastaridda shay'an mimma ahsanta bihi ilayya

translation.en: do not take back from me the graces that You have granted me,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَنْزِعَ مِنِّي ٱلنِّعَمَ ٱلَّتِي أَنْعَمْتَ بِهَا عَلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: wa la tanzi` minniya alnni`ama allati an`amta biha `alayya

translation.en: do not strip me of the elegances that You have conferred upon me;
[rather, please] increase that which You have authorized me to possess,
expand it many folds for me,
and provide me with fortune that is very much,
spacious, agreeable,
joyful, growing, and satisfactory,
and with dignity that is everlasting and sufficient,
and with prestige that is outgoing and overwhelming,
and with bounty that is flowing and broad.
Through all that, (please) make me dispense with the humiliating appeals
and unreachable sources,
save me from them with good health

segments.transliteration: fi dini wa nafsi wa waladi

translation.en: as regards my religion, self, sons,
and whatsoever You have given and granted me,
preserve for me my properties
and whatsoever You have put under my disposal,
watch me against the hands of the tyrants,
take me back to my homeland (safely),

segments.arabic: وَتُبَلِّغَنِي نِهَايَةَ أَمَلِي فِي دُنْيَايَ وَآخِرَتِي
segments.transliteration: wa tuballighani nihayata amali fi dunyaya wa akhirati

translation.en: confer upon me the utmost of my hope in my worldly life and the Hereafter,

segments.arabic: وَتَجْعَلَ عَاقِبَةَ أَمْرِي مَحْمُودَةً حَسَنَةً سَلِيمَةً
segments.transliteration: wa taj`ala `aqibata amri mahmudatan hasanatan salimatan

translation.en: make the consequence of my conducts praiseworthy, good, and sound,
make me broadminded,
well-off,
and well-mannered,
[and take me] away from miserliness, stinginess.
hypocrisy, fabrication,
slander, and perjury.

segments.arabic: وَتُرْسِخَ فِي قَلْبِي مَحَبَّةَ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَشِيعَتِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: wa tursikha fi qalbi mahabbata muhammadin wa ali muhammadin wa shi`atihim

translation.en: [Please] make firm in my heart the love for Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and their adherents (Shi`ah).

segments.arabic: وَتَحْرُسَنِي يَا رَبِّ فِي نَفْسِي وَأَهْلِي
segments.transliteration: wa tahrusani ya rabbi fi nafsi wa ahli

translation.en: O Lord, guard me, my family,
my properties, my sons,
those who are under my custody, my brothers,
those whom I love, and my offspring
in the name of Your mercy and Magnanimity.
O Allah, these are my needs from You.

segments.transliteration: wa qad istakthartuha lilu'mi wa shuhhi

translation.en: Out of my meanness and avarice, I have considered these needs great,
while in Your view the are insignificantly small
and they are easy and effortless for You.

segments.transliteration: fa'as'aluka bijahi muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: I thus beseech You in the name of the standing of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
peace be upon him and them, in Your view,
in the name of Your duty towards You,
in the name of what You have made incumbent upon Yourself towards them,
in the name of Your other Prophets and Messengers,
in the name of Your choicest ones and intimate servants
whom You have selected over others for worshipping You,
and in the name of Your Grand, Substantial Name,
(I beseech You by all these) to grant me all of my requests,
to relieve me through settling them for me,

segments.transliteration: wa lam tukhayyib amali wa raja'i

translation.en: and not to disappoint nor let me down.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَشَفِّعْ صَاحِبَ هٰذَا ٱلْقَبْرِ فِيَّ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa shaffi` sahiba hadha alqabri fiyya

translation.en: O Allah, (please) accept the one in this tomb as my interceder before You.

segments.arabic: يَا سَيِّدِي يَا وَلِيَّ ٱللَّهِ يَا أَمِينَ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: ya sayyidi ya waliyya allahi ya amina allahi

translation.en: O my Master! O Allah’s vicegerent! O Allah’s trustee!

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَشْفَعَ لِي إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka an tashfa`a li ila allahi `azza wa jalla

translation.en: I beseech you to intercede for me before Allah the Almighty and All-majestic
so that He may approve of and grant me all of my requests
in the name of Your Immaculate fathers
and in the name of Your well-selected sons.

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ لَكَ عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ تَقَدَّسَتْ أَسْمَاؤُهُ

translation.en: Verily, you enjoy in the view of Allah, sacred be His Names,
an honorable standing,
a lofty rank,
and a spacious regard.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ لَوْ عَرَفْتُ مَنْ هُوَ أَوْجَهُ عِنْدَكَ

translation.en: O Allah, had I known a person more acceptable in Your view
than this Imam

segments.transliteration: wa min aba'ihi wa abna'ihi alttahirina

translation.en: and his immaculate fathers and sons,
peace and blessings be upon them,
I would have chosen them to be my interceders (before You)

segments.transliteration: wa qaddamtuhum amama hajati wa talibati hadhihi

translation.en: and I would have introduced them as means by whom I would put before You my needs and requests.
Therefore, (please) hear from me,
respond to me,
and do to me that which You alone are worthy to do.
O most merciful of all those who show mercy.
O Allah, as regards the needs that my requests have not included,
the things that I am too powerless to do,
and the things that I am not too clever to mention,

segments.transliteration: min salihi dini wa dunyaya wa akhirati

translation.en: among the things that prosper my religion, worldly life, and next life;
(please) confer upon me with these,
protect me, guard me,
bestow upon me (with Your favors), and forgive me.

segments.transliteration: wa man aradani bisu'in aw makruhin

translation.en: As for any one who intends evil or wickedness to me,
such as a rebellious devil,
a tyrant ruler,
a dissident miscreant,
a rival in a worldly affair,
one who envies me for a grace,
an unjust individual, or a despot;
then (please) make their hands too short to catch me,
take away their plots against me,
preoccupy them against me with their own affairs,
save me from their evils
and the evils of their followers and devils,

segments.arabic: وَأَجِرْنِي مِنْ كُلِّ مَا يَضُرُّنِي وَيُجْحِفُ بِي
segments.transliteration: wa ajirni min kulli ma yadurruni wa yujhifu bi

translation.en: stand by me against whatsoever may harm and do injustice to me,
and (please) grant me the entire goodness

segments.transliteration: mimma a`lamu wa mimma la a`lamu

translation.en: whether I know or I do not.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and forgive me, my parents,
my brothers, my sisters,
my (paternal) uncles, my (paternal) aunts,
my (maternal) uncles, my (maternal) aunts,
my forefathers, my foremothers,
their descendants, their offspring,
my spouse(s), my offspring,
my relatives, my friends,
my neighbors, my brothers-in-faith
from the people of the east and the west (of the earth),
all those whom I love
among the believing men and women,
be they alive or dead,
all those who have ever taught me an item of decency,
and those who have received from me an item of knowledge.
O Allah, make all these have a share in my best supplications to You

segments.transliteration: wa ziyarati limashhadi hujjatika wa waliyyika

translation.en: and in my (ritual) pilgrimages to the shrine of Your Argument and Your vicegerent;
make me have a share in the best of their supplications,
in the name of Your mercy, O most merciful of all those who show mercy.
Convey their greetings to Your vicegerent.

segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alayka wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah's mercy and blessings be upon you.

segments.arabic: يَا سَيِّدِي يَا مَوْلاَيَ، يَا فُلان بن فُلان

translation.en: O my master, O my leader; O…

text.en: You should here mention the name of the Imam you are visiting.

translation.en: may Allah bless you,
your soul, and your body;
you are my means to approach Allah
and my way towards Him;

segments.transliteration: wa li haqqu muwalati wa ta'mili

translation.en: and I enjoy the right of my loyalty to you and the right of my putting my entire hope in you;

segments.arabic: فَكُنْ شَفِيعِي إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ
segments.transliteration: fakun shafi`i ila allahi `azza wa jalla

translation.en: therefore, be my interceder before Allah the Almighty and All-majestic
so that He shall regard my story (that I have just told)
and so that He shall decide success to be the result of all of my requests in this situation of mine

segments.transliteration: bima sa'altuhu kullihi birahmatihi wa qudratihi

translation.en: that I have besought from Him, out of His mercy and omnipotence.
O Allah, (please) bestow upon me a perfect intellectuality,
a sagacious reason,
an everlasting might,
a pure heart,
a very much deed,
and excellent manners;
decide all these to be for my good,
but do not make them stand against me;
in the name of Your mercy, O most merciful of all those who show mercy.

text.en: Dua Sadd Subhan - 13 14 & 15th Rajab / Shaban

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ الْعَظِيمِ وَ بِحَمْدِهِ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ اِلٰهُ مَّا اَقْدَرَهُ
segments.transliteration: subhaanallaahil a'zeeme wa be hamdehi. subhaanahu min elaahim maa-a'kdarahu

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, the Supreme! Praise be to He! Glory be to He in (His) Divinity! How omnipotent He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ قَدِيرٍ مَّا اَعْظَمَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ عَظِيمٍ مَّا اَجَلَّهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ جَلِيلٍ مَّا اَمْجَدَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min qadeerim ma-akhzamahu wa subhaanahu min a'zeemin maa-ajallahu wa subhaanau min jaleelim maa amjadahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) omnipotence! How powerful He is! Glory be to He in (His) power! How mighty He is! Glory be to He in (His) might! How eminent He is

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ مَّاجِدٍ مَّا اَرَءَفَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ رَءُوْفٍ مَّا اَعَزَّهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min maajedim maa ar-afahu wa subhaanahu min ra-oofim maa a-a'zzahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) eminence! How compassionate He is! Glory be to He in (His) compassion! How powerful He is

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ عَزِيزٍ مَّا اَکْبَرَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ کَبِيرٍ مَّا اَقْدَمَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min a'zeezim maa akbarahu wa subhaanahu min kabeerim maa-aqdamahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) power! How majestic He is! Glory be to He in (his) majesty! How eternal He is

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ قَدِيمٍ مَّا اَعْلَاهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ عَلِيٍّ مَّا اَسْنَاهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min qadeemin maa-a-a'lahu wa subhaanahu min a'liyyim maa asnaahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) eternity! How high He is! Glory be to He in (His) highness! How sublime He is

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ سَنِیٍّ مَّا اَبْهاهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ بَهُیٍّ مَّا اَنوَرَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min saniyyim maa abhaahu wa subhaanahu min bahihim maa anwarahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) sublimity! How beautiful! He is! Glory be to He in (His) beauty! How resplendent He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ مُّنِيرٍ مَّا اَظْهَرَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ ظَاهُرٍ مَّا اَخْفَاهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min maneerim maa mazharahu wa subhaanahu min zaaherim maa akhfaahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) splendour! How manifest He is! Glory be to He in (His) manifestation! How secret He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ خَفِیٍّ مَّا اَعْلَمَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ عَلِيمٍ مَّا اَخْبَرَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min khafiyim maa a-a'lamahu wa subhaanahu min a'limim maa akhbarahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) secrecy! How intelligent He is! Glory be to He in (His) intelligence! How aware He is!!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ خَبِيرٍ مَّا اَکْرَمَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ کَرِيمٍ مَّا اَلْطَفَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min khabeerim maa akramahu wa subhaanahu min kareemim maa altafahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) awareness! How generous He is! Glory be to He in (His) generosity! How kind He is

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ لَطِيفٍ مَّا اَبْصَرَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ بَصِيرٍ مَّا اَسْمَعَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min lateefim maa absarahu wa subhaanahu min baseerim maa asma-a'hu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) kindness! How sagacious He is! Glory be to He in (His) sagaciousness! How attentive He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ سَمِيْعٍ مَّا اَحْفَظَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ حَفِيْظٍ مَّا اَمْلَاءَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min samee-i'm maa ahfazahu wa subhaanahu min hafeezim maa amlaahu

translation.en: Glory be to be in (His) attendancy! How watchful He is! Glory be to He in (His) watchfulness! How persuasive He is

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ مَّلِيِّ مَّا اَوْفَاهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ وَفِیٍّ مَّا اَغْنَاهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min maliyyim maa awfaahu wa subhaanahu min wafiyyim maa aghnaahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) persuasion! How complete He is! Glory be to He in (His) completeness! How sufficient He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ غَنِیٍّ مَّا اَعْطَاهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ مُعْطٍ مَّا اَوْسَعَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min ghaniyyim maa a-a'taahu wa subhaanahu min mo'tim maa awsa-a'hu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) sufficiency! How liberal He is! Glory be to He in (His) liberality! How bountiful He is

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَه مِنْ وَاسِعٍ مَّا اَجْوَدَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ جَوَادٍ مَّا اَفْضَلَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min waase-i'm maa ajwadahu wa subhaanahu min jawaadim maa afzalahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) bountifulness! How plenteous He is! Glory be to He in (His) plenteousness! How superb He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ مُفْضِلٍ مَّا اَنْعَمَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ مُنْعِمٍ مَّا اَسْيَدَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min mofazzelim maa an-a'mahu wa subhaanahu min mun-a' mimmaa asyadahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) superbness! How charitable He is! Glory be to He in (His) charitableness! How masterful He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ سَيِّدٍ مَّا اَرْحَمَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ رَحِيمٍ مَّا اَشَدَّهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min sayyedim maa arhamahu wa subhaanahu min raheemim maa ashaddohu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) masterdom! How Merciful He is! Glory be to He in (His) mercifulness! How resoulute He is

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ شَدِيدٍ مَّا اَقْوَاهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ قَوِیٍّ مَّا اَحْمَدَهُ،
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min shadeedim maa a'kwaahu wa subhaanahu min qawiyyim maa ahmadahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) resoluteness! How strong He is! Glory be to He in (His) strength! How praiseworthy He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ حَمِيْدٍ مَّا اَحْكَمَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ حَکِيمٍ مَّا اَبطَشَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min hameedim maa ahkamahu wa subhaanahu min hakeemim maa abtashahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) praiseworthiness, How wise He is! Glory be to He in (His) wisdom! How confident He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ بَاطِشٍ مَّا اَقْوَمَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ قَیُّوْمٍ مَّا اَدْوَمَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min baateshim maa a'kwamahu wa subhaanahu min qayyoomim maa adwamahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) confidence! How durable He is! Glory be to He in (His) durability! How everlasting He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ دَآئِمٍ مَّا اَبْقَاهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ بَاقٍ مَّا اَفْرَدَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min daaa-emim maa abqaahu wa subhaanahu min baaqim maa afradahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) everlastingness! How perpetual He is! Glory be to He in (His) perpetuality! How unique He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ فَرْدٍ مَّا اَوْحَدَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ وَاحِدٍ مَّا اَصْمَدَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min fardim maa aw-hadahu wa subhaanahu min waahedim maa asmadahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) uniqueness! How singular He is! Glory be to He in (His) singularity! How independent He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ صَمَدٍ مَّا اَمْلَكَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ مَّالِکٍ مَّا اَوْلَاهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min samadim maa amlakahu wa subhaanahu min malekim maa awlaahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) independence! How sovereign He is! Glory be to He in (His) sovereignty! How authoritative He is

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ وَلِیٍّ مَّا اَعْظَمَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ عَظِيمٍ مَّا اَکْمَلَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min waliyyim maa a-a'zamahu wa subhaanahu min a'zeemim maa akmalahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) authority! How great He is! Glory be to He in (His) greatness! How perfect He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ کَامِلٍ مَّا اَتَمَّهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ تَامٍّ مَّا اَعْجَبَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min kaamelim maa atammahu wa subhaanahu min taaam-mim maa a'j-abahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) perfectness! How thorough He is! Glory be to He in (his) thoroughness! How marvellous He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ عَجِيبٍ مَّا اَفْخَرَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ فَاخِرٍ مَّا اَبْعَدَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min a'jeebim maa afkharahu wa subhaanahu min faakherim maa ab-a'dahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) marvelousness! How proud He is! Glory be to hew in (His) pride! How remote He is

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ بَعِيدٍ مَّا اَقْرَبَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ قَرِيبٍ مَّا اَمْنَعَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min ba-e'edim maa aqrabahu wa subhaanahu min kareebim maa amna-ahu

translation.en: Glory be to He is remoteness! How near He is! Glory be to He in (His) nearness! How inaccessible He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ مَّانعٍ مَّا اَغْلَبَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ غَالِبٍ مَّا اَعْفَاهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min maaa-ne-i'm maa aghlabahu wa subhaanahu min ghaalebim maa a-a'faahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) inaccessibility! How victorious He is! Glory be to (His) victoriousness! How tolerant He is

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ عَفُوٍّ مَّا اَحْسَنَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ مُحْسِنٍ مَّا اَجْمَلَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min afuwwim maa ahsanahu wa subhaanahu min mohsenim maa ajmalahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) toleration! How indulgent He is! Glory be to He in (His) indulgence! How adorable He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ جَمِيلٍ مَّا اَقْبَلَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ قَابِلٍ مَّا اَشْکَرَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min mujmelim maa aqbalahu wa subhaanahu min qaabelim maa ashkarahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) adorableness! How obliging He is! Glory be to He in (His) obligingness! How thankworthy He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ شَکُوْرٍ مَّا اَغْفَرَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ غَافِرٍ مَّا اَصْبَرَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min shakoorim maa aghfarahu wa subhaanahu min ghafoorim maa asbarahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in His thank worthiness! How Oft-forgiving He is! Glory be to He in (His) oft-forgiveness! How patient He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ صَبُوْرٍ مَّا اَجْبَرَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ جَبَّارٍ مَّا اَدْيَنَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min saboorim maa ajbarahu wa subhaanahu min jabbarin maa adyanahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) patience! How effective He is! Glory be to He in (His) effectiveness! How judicious He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ دَيَانٍ مَّا اَقْضَاهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ قَاضٍ مَّا اَمْضَاهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min dayyaanim maa a'kzaahu wa subhaanahu min kaazim maa amzaahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) judiciousness! How decisive He is! Glory be to He in (His) decisiveness! How alert He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ مَّاضٍ مَّا اَنْفَذَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ نَافِذٍ مَّا اَحْلَمَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min maazim maa anfazahu wa subhaanahu min naafezim maa ahlamahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) alertness! How executive He is! Glory be to He in (His) execution! How gentle He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ حَلِيمٍ مَّا اَخْلَقَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ خَالِقٍ مَّا اَرْزَقَہ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min haleemim maa akhlaqahu wa subhaanahu min khaalekim maa arzaqahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) gentleness! How refined He is! Glory be to He in (His) refinement! How sustaining He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ رَازِقٍ مَّا اَقْهُرَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ قَاهُرٍ مَّا اَنْشَاَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min raazekim maa aqharahu wa subhaanahu min qaaherim maa anshaahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) sustainment! How forceful He is! Glory be to He in (His) forcibleness! How creative He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ مُنْشِيْءٍ مَّا اَمْلَكَهُ وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ مَالِکٍ مَّا اَوْلَاهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min munshe-im maa amlakahu wa subhaanahu min maalekim maa awlaahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) creativeness! How kingly He is! Glory be to He in (His) kingdom! How lordly He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ وَّالٍ مَّا اَرْفَعَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ رَّفِيعٍ مَّا اَشْرَفَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min waalim maa ar-fa-a'hu wa subhaanahu min rafee-i'm maa ashrafahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) lordliness! How lofty He is! Glory be to He in (His) loftiness! How dominant He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ شَرِيفٍ مَّا اَبْسَطَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ بَاسِطٍ مَّا اَقْبَضَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min shareefim maa absatahu wa subhaanahu min baasetim maa a'kbazahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) dominancy! How extensive He is! Glory be to He in (His) extensiveness! How appropriative He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ قَابِضٍ مَّا اَبْدَاهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ بَادٍ مَّا اَقْدَسَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min qaabezim maa ab-daahu wa subhaanahu min baadim maa a'kdasahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) appropriativenes! How originative He is! Glory be to He in (His) origination! How holy He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ قُدُّوْسٍ مَّا اَطْهُرَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ طَاهُرٍ مَّا اَزْكَاهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min quddoosim maa atharahu wa subhaanahu min taaherim maa azkaahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) holiness! How pure He is! Glory be to He in (His) purity! How pious He is

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ زَكِيٍّ مَّا اَهدَاهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ هَادٍ مَّا اَصْدَقَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min zakiyyim maa ahdaahu wa subhaanahu min haadim maa asdakahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) piety! How guiding He is! Glory be to He in (His) guidance! How truthful He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ صَادِقٍ مَّا اَعْوَدَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ عَوَّادٍ مَّا اَفْطَرَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min saadekim maa a-a'wadahu wa subhaanahu min awwaadim maa aftarahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) truthfulness! How timeless He is! Glory be to He in (His) timelessness! How inventive He is!!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ فَاطِرٍ مَّا اَرْعَاهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ رَّاعٍ مَّا اَعْوَنَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min faaterim maa ar-a'ahu wa subhaanahu min raa-i'm maa a-a'wanahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) inventiveness! How protecting He is! Glory be to He in (His) protectorship! How supporting He!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ مُعِينٍ مَّا اَوْهَبَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ وَّهَابٍ مَّا اَتْوَبَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min mo-e'enim maa awhabahu wa subhaanahu min wahhaabim maa atwabahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) supportment! How benevolent He is! Glory be to He in (His) benevolence! How accommodative He is

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ تَوَّابٍ مَّا اَسْخَاهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ سَخِیٍّ مَّا اَنْصَرَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min tawwaabim maa askhaahu wa subhaanahu min sakhiyyim maa ansarahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) accommodativeness! How munificent He is! Glory be to He in (His) munificence! How helpful He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ نَّصِيرٍ مَّا اَسْلَمَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ سَلَامٍ مَّا اَشْفَاهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min naseerim maa aslamahu wa subhaanahu min salaamim maa ashfaahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) helpfulness! How peaceable He is! Glory be to He in (His) peaceableness! How able He as a healer!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ شَافٍ مَّا اَنْجَاهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ مُّنْجٍ مَّا اَبَرَّهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min shaafim maa anjaahu wa subhaanahu min munjim maa abarrahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) ability to heal! How able He is as a deliver! Glory be to He in (His) ability to deliver! How innocent He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ بَارٍّ مَّا اَطْلَبَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ طَالِبٍ مَّا اَدْرَکَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min baarrim maa atlabahu wa subhaanahu min taalebim maa adrakahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) innocence! How demanding He is! Glory be to He in (His) demand! How perceptive He is!!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ مُّدْرِکٍ مَّا اَرْشَدَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ رَّشِيدٍ مَّا اَعْطَفَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min mudrekim maa arshadahu wa subhaanahu min rasheedim maa a-a'tafahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) perceptiveness! How reasonable He is! Glory be to He in (His) reasonableness! How affectionate He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ مُّتَعَطِّفٍ مَّا اَعْدَلَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ عَدْلٍ مَّا اَتْقَنَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min mota-a'ttefim maa a-a'dalahu wa subhaanahu min a'dlim maa atqanahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) affectionateness! How prudent He is! Glory be to He in (His) prudence! How perfect He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ مُتَّقِنٍ مَّا اَحْکَمَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ حَکِيمٍ مَّا اَکْفَلَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min mutqonim maa ahkamahu wa subhaanahu min hakeemim maaa-akfalahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) perfection! How wise He is! Glory be to He in (His) wisdom! How able He is to stand security!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ کَفِيلٍ مَّا اَشْهُدَهُ، وَ سُبْحَانَهُ مِنْ شَهُيدٍ مَّا اَحْمَدَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu min kafeelim maaa ash-hadahu wa subhaanahu min shaheedim maaa ahmadahu

translation.en: Glory be to He in (His) ability to stand security! How able He is! Glory be to He to give witness! How most praiseworthy He is!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ هُوَ اللهُ الْعَظِيمُ وَ بِحَمْدِه وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ وَ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ وَ اللهُ اَکْبَرُ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanahu howallaahul a'zeemo wa be hamdehi wal hamdo lillaahe wa laa elaaha illal laaho wal laaho akbar,

translation.en: Glory be to He! He is Allah the Supreme and (all) praise be to Him.And (all) praise be to Allah. There is no god except Allah, and Allah is Great and for Allah is Praise.

segments.arabic: وَ لَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّةَ اِلَّا بِاللهِ الْعَلِّی الْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa lillaahil hamdo wa laa hawla wa laa quwwata illaa billaahil a'liyyil a'zeem,

translation.en: There is no power, and no might, except (with) Allah, the Highest High.

segments.arabic: دَافِعُ کُلِّ بَلِيَّةٍ وَ هُوَ حَسْبِي وَ نِعْمَ الْوَکِيلُ
segments.transliteration: daafe-a' kulle baliyyatin wa howa hasbee wa ne-a'mal wakeel

translation.en: Disperser of all calamities. Sufficient is He, and the Best Supporter.

text.en: Dua Noor.
Dua Noor Kabir
Noor Saghir

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الرَّ حْمٰـنِ الرَّ حِيمِ

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, The Most Beneficent, The Most Merciful
O Allah, O Light of the Lights!
verily You illuminated Your Light through the light, and the light
is in the light of Your Light, O Light!
O Allah, O All-Mighty!
verily You expressed Your Might through the might, and the might
is in the might of Your Might, O all Mighty!
O Allah, O Majestic!
verily You showed Your Majesty through the glory,
and the glory is in the glory of Your Majesty,
O Majestic!
O Allah, O All-Bestower!
verily You bestowed through the favour, and the favour
is in the favour of Your Bestowing, O All-Bestower!
O Allah, O Greatest!
verily You showed Your Greatness through the greatness, and the greatness
is in the greatness of Your Greatness, O Greatest!
O Allah, O All knowing!
verily You spread Your Knowledge through the knowledge, and the knowledge
is in the knowledge of Your Knowledge, O All Knowing!
O Allah, O Most Holy!
verily You expressed Your Holiness through the holiness, and the holiness
is in the holiness of Your Holiness, O Most Holy!
O Allah, O Most Beautiful!
verily You expressed Your Beauty through the beautifulness, and the beautifulness
is in the beautifulness of Your Beauty, O Most Beautiful!
O Allah, O Source of Peace!
verily You spread Your Peace through the peacefulness,
and the peacefulness is in the peacefulness of Your Peace,
O Source of Peace!
O Allah, O Most Patient!
verily You expressed Your Patience through the patience, and the patience
is in the patience of Your Forbearance, O Most Patient!
O Allah, O Ever-King!
verily You possessed Your authority through the sovereignty, and the sovereignty

segments.arabic: فِيْ مَلَكُوْتِ مَلَكُوْ تِـكَ يَا مَلِيْكُ

translation.en: is in the sovereignty of Your Authority, O Ever-King!
O Allah, O Lord!
verily You expressed Your Lordship through the lordship,
and the lordship is in the lordship
of Your Lordship, O Lord!
O Allah, O Benefactor!
verily You benefacted through the favour, and the favour
is in the favour of Your Benefaction, O Benefactor!
O Allah, O Most Wise!
verily You showed Your Wisdom through the wisdom, and the wisdom
is in the wisdom of Your Wisdom, O Most Wise!
O Allah, O All-Praiseworthy!
verily You expressed Your Praiseworthiness through the praise, and the praise
is in the praise of Your Praisewothiness, O All-Praiseworthy!
O Allah, O The One!
verily You expressed Your unity through the oneness,
and the oneness is in the oneness
of Your unity, O The One!
O Allah, O Unique!
verily You showed Your Uniqueness through the uniqueness,
and the uniqueness is in the uniqueness
of Your Uniqueness, O Unique!
O Allah, O All-Forbearing!
verily You expressed Your forbearance through the forbearing, and the forbearing
is in the forbearing of Your Forbearance, O All-Forbearing!
O Allah, O All-Capable!
verily You expressed Your Capability through the capacity, and the capacity
is in the capacity of Your Capability, O All-Capable!
O Allah, O Eternal!
verily You existed eternally through the eternity, and the eternity
is in the eternity of Your Eternal existence, O Eternal!
O Allah, O Witness!
verily You Witnessed through the testimony, and the testimony
is in the testimony of Your Testimony, O Witness!
O Allah, O Nearest!
verily You showed Your Nearness through the proximity, and the proximity
is in the proximity of Your Nearness, O Nearest!
O Allah, O Helper!
verily You Helped through the support, and the support
is in the support of Your Help, O Helper!
O Allah, O Concealer!
verily You Concealed through the concealing, and the concealing
is in the concealing of Your Concealing, O Concealer!
O Allah, O All-Dominator!
verily You Dominated through the dominance, and the dominance
is in the dominance of Your Domination, O All-Dominator!
O Allah, O Best Provider!
verily You Provided through the providence, and the providence
is in the providence of Your Providing, O Best Provider!
O Allah, O Creator!
verily You created through the creating, and the creating
is in the creating of Your Creation, O Creator!
O Allah, O ultimate Revealer!
verily You revealed through the revelation, and the revelation
is in the revelation of Your Revealing, O ultimate Revealer!
O Allah, O greatest Elevator!
verily You Elevated through the uplifting, and the uplifting
is in the uplifting of Your Elevation, O greatest Elevator!
O Allah, O Best Guardian!
verily You guarded through the guardiance, and the guardiance
is in the guardiance of Your Guardianship, O Best Guardian!
O Allah, O Gracious!
Verily You bestowed Your Grace through the grace, and the grace
is in the grace of Your Grace, O Gracious!
O Allah, O Communicator!
verily You communicated through the communication, and the communication
is in the communication of Your communication, O Communicator!
O Allah, O Executor!
verily You executed through the action, and the action
is in the action of Your Execution, O Executor!
O Allah, O Imposer!
verily You Imposed through the obligation, and the obligation
is under the obligation of Your Imposition, O Imposer!
O Allah, O All-Forgiving!
verily You Forgave through the pardon, and the pardon
is in the pardon of Your forgiveness, O All-Forgiving!
O Allah, O All-Compelling!
verily You Compelled through the might,
and the might is in the might
of Your Might, O All-Compelling!
O Allah, O All-Hearing!
verily You heard through the hearing, and the hearing
is in the hearing of Your awareness, O All-Hearing!
O Allah, O Greatest!
verily You showed Your Greatness through the greatness,
and the greatness is in the greatness
of Your Greatness, O Greatest!
O Allah, O Most Generous!
verily You Bestowed Your Generosity through the generosity, and the generosity

segments.arabic: فِيْ كَرَمِ كَرَمِكَ يَا كَرِ يْمُ

translation.en: is in the generosity of Your Generosity, O Most Generous!
O Allah, O Most Merciful!
verily You bestowed Your Mercy through the mercy, and the mercy
is in the mercy of Your Mercifulness, O Most Merciful!
O Allah, O All-Glorious!
verily You showed Your Glory through the glory, and the glory
is in the glory of Your Glory, O All-Glorious!
O Allah, O Responder!

segments.transliteration: ya allaho, ya rah-mano, ya rahimo,

translation.en: O Lord! O Most Beneficent! O Most Merciful!
O Ever living! O Forbearing One!
O Mighty! O Light of the lights!
O there is no God save Him.
On Him I rely,
and He is the Lord of the great throne.
All praise is for Allah, The All-Bestower.
Glory be to The Glorious, Glory be to The Most Patient,
Glory be to The All Seeing, Glory be to The Preventer,
Glory be to The Self Subsisting, Glory be to The Source of All Goodness,
Glory be to The Pardoner, Glory be to The (very) First,
Glory be to The Honourer, Glory be to The Evident,
Glory be to The Healer, Glory be to The Sufficient,
Glory be to The Source of Peace,  Glory be to The Giver of Tranquility,
Glory be to The Protector, Glory be to The Fashioner,
Glory be to The Helper, Glory be to The One,
Glory be to The Sole One, Glory be to The Unique,
Glory be to The Most Merciful, Glory be to The Delayer,
Glory be to The Expeditor, Glory be to The Chastiser,
Glory be to The Light, Glory be to The Guide,
Glory be to The Determiner Of Destiny. Glory be to The Majestic,
Glory be to The Glorious, Glory be to The All-Watchful,
Glory be to Allah, and all praise be to Allah,

segments.arabic: وَلآ اِلٰهَ إلاَّ اللهُ وَاللهُ اَكْبَرُ

translation.en: and there is no God save Allah, and Allah is the Greatest.
and there is neither strength nor any power
except with Allah, the Most High, the Greatest.
Glory be to the One who wills, through (His) power
And He knows what He desires through His Might
Glory be to Allah and praise be to him
Glory be to the possessor of the great throne
And the possessor of the awe, the power,
the greatness and the might
Glory be to The King who is approached
Glory be to The King who exists

text.en: sub-haanal malekil ma'a-booday,

translation.en: Glory be to The Ever-Living, the All Wise
Glory be to Allah, on Whom I rely, the Ever-living,
the one who does not die,
The Most Glorious, The Most Holy
The Lord of the angels and the spirit

segments.arabic: لآ اِلٰهَ إِلَّااللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَـرِيْكَ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: la-ilaha illal-laho vahdahoo la-sharika lahoo va-

translation.en: There is no God except Allah, He alone, who has no partner
To Him belongs the kingdom, and to Him is all praise,
and He has power over all things

segments.transliteration: ya allaho ya rahmano ya rahimo

translation.en: O Allah! O the Most beneficent! O the Most Merciful!
O Ever-Living! O Self-Subsisting!
O Lord of Majesty and Generosity!
O Light of the heavens and the earth!

segments.arabic: يَا لَا اِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْتُ
segments.transliteration: ya la-ilaha illa anta alaika tawakkalto va-

translation.en: O there is no Allah but You, on You I rely!
You are the Lord of the great throne

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِيْ بِحُـرْمَةِ هٰذِهِ ا ْلأَسْـمَآءِ

translation.en: Oh Allah, forgive me by the sanctity of these Names
And avert from me the harm and the tribulations,
and the worries and the griefs and all the calamities

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ أَوْلَادِيْ وَ اٰبَآئِيْ وَ أُمَّهَاتِيْ وَ أَقْرِبَآئِيْ

translation.en: And from my children, and my fathers and my mothers, and my relatives

segments.arabic: وَعَشِـيْرَتِيْ فَاِنَّ عَلَيْكَ فِيْ جَمِيْعِ ا ْلأُمُوْرِ اعْتِمَادِيْ
segments.transliteration: va-ashirati fa-inna alaika fe jamee’il omooray i’atemaadi.

translation.en: And my tribe, so for sure I have depended on you in all my affairs
Blessings and peace be upon the best of His creations,
Muhammed and all his progeny.
By Your Mercy, O the Most Merciful of those who show mercy.

text.en:
It is reported in Muhaj al Dawat by sayyid bin Tawus that lady Fatimah Zahra ( sa) taught this dua'a to Salman.
The Holy Prophet had given this dua'a to his daughter with instruction that whoso recites it daily,
in the morning and evening, remains safe from fever.

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ النُّوْرِ بِسْمِ اللهِ نُوْرِ النُّوْرِ

translation.en: in the name of Allah, the light,

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ نُورٌ عَلٰى نُوْرٍ بِسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِيْ هُوَ مُدَبِّرُ الْاُمُوْرِ

translation.en: in the name of Allah, the light, the light,in the name of Allah, who is He who manages all affairs,

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِيْ خَلَقَ النُّوْرَ مِنَ النُّوْرِ

translation.en: In the. name of Allah who created light from light.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ خَلَقَ النُّوْرَ مِنَ النُّوْرِ وَ اَنْزَلَ النُّوْرَ عَلَى الطُّوْرِ فِيْ كِتَابٍ مَسْطُوْرٍ. فِيْ رَقٍّ مَنْشُوْرٍ بِقَدَرٍ مَقْدُوْرٍ عَلٰى نَبِيٍّ مَحْبُوْرٍ

translation.en: Praise be to Allah who created light from light, and sent down light on the mountain (Tur), in between the inscribed book, in the parchment unrolled, by a means well-determined, on the (Holy) Prophet, the giver of glad tidings.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ هُوَ بِالْعِزِّ مَذْكُوْرٌ وَ بِالْفَخْرِ مَشْهُوْرٌ وَ عَلَى السَّرَّاءِ وَ الضَّرَّاءِ مَشْكُوْرٌ

translation.en: Praise be to Allah; it is He who is remembered with the highest of the high attributes, who is known to be the most glorious.In joy and happiness, in sand distress, He (alone) is thankfully praised.

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلٰى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ الطَّاهِرِيْنَ

translation.en: Blessings of Allah be on our master, Muhammad, and on his pure children.

text.en: It has been reported from Imam Sadiq (peace be upon him) who narrated that the Holy Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) said that Almighty Allah will forgive one who says this prayer at the `Arafah Night or Thursday nights:

translation.en: O Allah Who witnesses all secrets of hearts,
Who is the object of all complaints,
Who knows all hidden things,
and Who is the aim of all needs!
O He Who instigates favoring on the Servants!
O He Who is All-generous in pardoning!
O He Who is All-excellent in overlooking!
O All-magnanimous!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لا يُوَارِي مِنْهُ لَيْلٌ دَاجٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yuwari minhu laylun dajin<

translation.en: O He Who cannot be concealed by the covering darkness of night,
the roaring clamor of oceans,
the skies along with their constellations,
or the thunderous murk.
O He with Whom the entire murk is light,
I beseech You in the name of the brightness of Your Noble Face

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي تَجَلَّيْتَ بِهِ لِلْجَبَلِ فَجَعَلْتَهُ دَكّاً
segments.transliteration: alladhi tajallayta bihi liljabali faja`altahu dakkan<

translation.en: through which You manifested Your glory to the mountain; so, You made it crumble
and (Prophet) Moses fell down in a swoon,

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي رَفَعْتَ بِهِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ بِلاَ عَمَدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi rafa`ta bihi alssamawati bila`amadin<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which You raised the heavens without any pillars

segments.arabic: وَسَطَحْتَ بِهِ ٱلارْضَ عَلَىٰ وَجْهِ مَاءٍ جَمَدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa satahta bihi al-arda `ala wajhi ma'in jamadin<

translation.en: and by which You flattened the earth on the surface of solid water,
in the name of Your Name—the concealed, the stored,
the scribed, and the pure,
which You answer any one who beseeches You in its name
and grant any one who asks You his request,
in the name of Your Name; the Praised, Holy, and Demonstrative,

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي هُوَ نُورٌ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ نُورٍ

translation.en: which is light over the entire light,
which is light made of light,
and from which all lights take their brightness;
if it reaches the earth, it will be rent asunder,
if it reaches the heavens, they will be opened,
and if it reaches the throne, it will quiver;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي تَرْتَعِدُ مِنْهُ فَرَائِصُ مَلائِكَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi tarta`idu minhu fara'isu mala'ikatika<

translation.en: and in the name of Your Name from the fear of which the muscles of Your angels tremble.

segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bihaqqi jabra'ila wa mika'ila wa israfila<

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of [Archangels] Gabriel, Michael, and Seraph,
in the name of Muhammad, the Divinely-chosen Prophet,
peace be upon him, his Household,

segments.transliteration: wa `ala jami`i al-anbiya'i wa jami`i almala'ikati<

translation.en: and all prophets and angels;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱلاِﹾسْمِ ٱلَّذِي مَشَىٰ بِهِ ٱلْخِضْرُ عَلَىٰ قُلَلِ ٱلْمَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa bilismi alladhi masha bihi alkhidru `ala qulali alma'i<

translation.en: in the name of the Name through which al-Khadir could walk on waters

segments.arabic: كَمَا مَشَىٰ بِهِ عَلَىٰ جَدَدِ ٱلارْضِ

translation.en: just as he used to walk on lands;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي فَلَقْتَ بِهِ ٱلبَحْرَ لِمُوسَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi falaqta bihi albahra limusa<

translation.en: in the name of You Name through which You caused the sea to cleave asunder for Moses,
You drowned Pharaoh and his people,

segments.arabic: وَانْجَيْتَ بِهِ مُوسَىٰ بْنَ عِمْرَانَ وَمَنْ مَعَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa anjayta bihi musa bna `imrana wa man ma`ahu<

translation.en: and saved Moses, the son of `Imran, and those who accompanied him;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي دَعَاكَ بِهِ مُوسَىٰ بْنُ عِمْرَانَ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi da`aka bihi musa bnu `imrana<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which Moses, the son of `Imran, besought You
from the right slope of the Mount;

segments.arabic: فَٱسْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ وَالْقَيْتَ عَلَيْهِ مَحَبَّةً مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: fastajabta lahu wa alqayta `alayhi mahabbatan minka<

translation.en: so, You responded to him and cast down upon him love from You;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي بِهِ احْيَا عِيسَىٰ بْنُ مَرْيَمَ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi bihi ahya `isa bnu maryama almawta<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which Jesus, the son of Mary, brought life to the dead,
could speak while he was a child in the cradle,
and healed the blind and the leprous by Your permission;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي دَعَاكَ بِهِ حَمَلَةُ عَرْشِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi da`aka bihi hamalatu `arshika<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which the bearers of Your Throne besought You

segments.transliteration: wa jabra'ilu wa mika'ilu wa israfilu<

translation.en: and so did Gabriel, Michael, Seraph,

segments.arabic: وَحَبِيبُكَ مُحَمَّدٌ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa habibuka muhammadun salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi<

translation.en: Muhammad Your most beloved one (peace be upon him and upon his Household)
Your favorite angels,
Your messaged Prophets,

segments.arabic: وَعِبَادُكَ ٱلصَّالِحُونَ مِنْ اهْلِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلارَضِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa `ibaduka alssalihuna min ahli alssamawati wal-aradina<

translation.en: and Your righteous servants from among the inhabitants of the heavens and the layers of the earth;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي دَعَاكَ بِهِ ذُو ٱلنُّونِ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi da`aka bihi dhu alnnuni<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which Dhu’l-Nun (Prophet Jonah) besought You

segments.arabic: إِذْ ذَهَبَ مُغَاضِباً فَظَنَّ انْ لَنْ تَقْدِرَ عَلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: idh dhahaba mughadiban fazanna an lan taqdira `alayhi<
