translation.en: when he departed in wrath: he imagined that You had no power over him,

segments.arabic: فَنَادَىٰ فِي ٱلظُّلُمَاتِ انْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ انْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ
segments.transliteration: fanada fi alzzulumati an la ilaha illa anta subhanaka<

translation.en: but he cried through the depths of darkness, “There is no god but You. Glory be to You.
I was indeed one of those who are wrong!”

segments.transliteration: fastajabta lahu wa najjaytahu min alghammi<

translation.en: So, You responded to him and delivered him from the grief
and thus do You deliver the believers;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ ٱلَّذِي دَعَاكَ بِهِ دَاوُودُ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika al`azimi alladhi da`aka bihi dawudu<

translation.en: in the name of Your Great Name by which David besought You

segments.arabic: وَخَرَّ لَكَ سَاجِداً فَغَفَرْتَ لَهُ ذَنْبَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa kharra laka sajidan faghafarta lahu dhanbahu<

translation.en: and as he fell down prostrating himself to You, You rectified it for him;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي دَعَتْكَ بِهِ آسِيَةُ ٱمْرَاةُ فِرْعَوْنَ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi da`atka bihi asiyatu imra'atu fir`awna<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which ªsiyah, the wife of Pharaoh, besought You,

segments.arabic: إِذْ قَالَتْ: ”رَبِّ ٱبْنِ لِي عِنْدَكَ بَيْتاً فِي ٱلْجَنَّةِ
segments.transliteration: idh qalat rabbi ibni li `indaka baytan fi aljannati<

translation.en: saying, “My Lord! Build for me a house with You in Paradise,
deliver me from Pharaoh and his doing,
and deliver me from the unjust people.”
So, You responded to her prayer;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي دَعَاكَ بِهِ ايُّوبُ إِذْ حَلَّ بِهِ ٱلْبَلاَءُ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi da`aka bihi ayyubu idh halla bihi albala'u<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which (Prophet) Job besought You after misfortune had befallen him;

segments.transliteration: fa`afaytahu wa ataytahu ahlahu wa mithlahum ma`ahum<

translation.en: so, You healed him and gave him his family and the like of them with them:
a mercy from You and a reminder to the worshippers;

segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi da`aka bihi ya`qubu<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which (Prophet) Jacob besought You;

segments.arabic: فَرَدَدْتَ عَلَيْهِ بَصَرَهُ وَقُرَّةَ عَيْنِهِ يُوسُفَ وَجَمَعْتَ شَمْلَهُ
segments.transliteration: faradadta `alayhi basarahu wa qurrata `aynihi yusufa wa jama`ta shamlahu<

translation.en: so, You returned to him his sight and the delight of his heart, Joseph, and You reunified him.

segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi da`aka bihi sulaymanu<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which (Prophet) Solomon besought You;

segments.arabic: فَوَهَبْتَ لَهُ مُلْكاً لاَ يَنْبَغِي لاحَدٍ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ
segments.transliteration: fawahabta lahu mulkan la yanbaghi li'ahadin min ba`dihi<

translation.en: So, You gifted him kingdom that none else should never gain,
for You are verily the Granter of bounties;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي سَخَّرْتَ بِهِ ٱلْبُرَاقَ لِمُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi sakhkharta bihi alburaqa limuhammadin<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which You subdued the Buraq to Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi wa sallama<

translation.en: peace and blessings be upon him and his Household,

segments.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ تَعَالَىٰ: ”سُبْحَانَ ٱلَّذِي اسْرَىٰ بِعَبْدِهِ لَيْلاً
segments.transliteration: idh qala ta`ala subhana alladhi asra bi`abdihi laylan<

translation.en: as Almighty Allah says, “Glory be to Him Who made His servant to go on a night

segments.arabic: مِنَ ٱلْمَسْجِدِ ٱلْحَرَامِ إِلَىٰ ٱلْمَسْجِدِ ٱلاقْصَىٰ“
segments.transliteration: min almasjidi alharami ila almasjidi al-aqsa<

translation.en: from the Sacred Mosque to the remote mosque.”

segments.arabic: وَقَوْلُهُ: ”سُبْحَانَ ٱلَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هٰذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa qawluhu subhana alladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinina<

translation.en: He also says, “Glory be to Him Who made this subservient to us and we were not able to do it.
Surely, to our Lord we must return;”

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي تَنَزَّلَ بِهِ جَبْرَائِيلُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi tanazzala bihi jabra'ilu `alamuhammadin<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which (Archangel) Gabriel used to ascend to Muhammad,
peace be upon him and his Household;

segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi da`aka bihi adamu<

translation.en: and in the name of Your Name by which Adam besought You;

segments.transliteration: faghafarta lahu dhanbahu wa askantahu jannataka<

translation.en: so, You rectified him and allowed him to dwell in Your Paradise.
I beseech You in the name of the Great Qur'an,
in the name of Muhammad, the Seal of the Prophets,
in the name of Abraham,
in the name of Your Judgment on the Day of the Administration of Justice,
in the name of the Scales when they shall be set up,
the Scrolls when they shall be laid open,

segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqi alqalami wa ma jara<

translation.en: the Pen and whatever has been decided,
and the Tablet and whatever it has recorded;

segments.arabic: وَبِحَقِّ ٱلاِﹾسْمِ ٱلَّذِي كَتَبْتَهُ عَلَىٰ سُرَادِقِ ٱلْعَرْشِ
segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqi alismi alladhi katabtahu `ala suradiqi al`arshi<

translation.en: in the name of the Name that You had inscribed on the pavilion of the Divine Throne
two thousand years before You created the beings, the world,
the sun, and the moon.

segments.arabic: وَاشْهَدُ انْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu an la ilaha illa allahu<

translation.en: I bear witness that there is no god save Allah,
alone without having any partner,
and that Muhammad is his servant and messenger.

segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bismika almakhzuni fi khaza'inika<

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of Your Name that is hoarded in Your stores,

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي ٱسْتَاثَرْتَ بِهِ فِي عِلْمِ ٱلْغَيْبِ عِنْدَكَ

translation.en: You have kept in the knowledge of the Unseen with You

segments.arabic: لَمْ يَظْهَرْ عَلَيْهِ احَدٌ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ

translation.en: and it has not been shown to any of Your creatures,
be him a favorite angel,
a missioned Prophet,
or a chosen servant.

segments.arabic: وَاسْالُكَ بِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي شَقَقْتَ بِهِ ٱلْبِحَارَ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bismika alladhi shaqaqta bihi albihara<

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of Your Name by which You rent asunder the oceans,
the mountains rose,
and night and day follow each other,

segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqi alssab`i almathani walqur'ani al`azimi<

translation.en: in the name of the seven of the oft-repeated verses and the Grand Qur'an,
in the name of the noble, recording angels,

segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqi ta-ha wa ya-sin wa kaf-ha-ya-`ayn-sad<

translation.en: in the name of Ta-Ha, Ya-Sin, Kaf-Ha-Ya-`Ayn-Sad,
Ha-Mim-`Ayn-Sin-Qaf,
and in the name of the Torah of Moses,
the Gospel of Jesus,
the Psalms of David,
the Furqan (Criterion) of Muhammad,
peace be upon him, his Household,

segments.transliteration: wa `ala jami`i alrrusuli wa bahiyyan sharahiyyan<

translation.en: and all the messengers and bahiyya sharahiyya.([1])

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اسْالُكَ بِحَقِّ تِلْكَ ٱلْمُنَاجَاةِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bihaqqi tilka almunajati<

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You in the name of this confidential talk

segments.arabic: ٱلَّتِي كَانَتْ بَيْنَكَ وَبَيْنَ مُوسَىٰ بْنِ عِمْرَانَ
segments.transliteration: allati kanat baynaka wa bayna musa bni `imrana<

translation.en: which took place between You and Moses, the son of `Imran,
on the Mount Tur Sayna',

segments.arabic: وَاسْالُكَ بِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي عَلَّمْتَهُ مَلَكَ ٱلْمَوْتِ لِقَبْضِ ٱلارْوَاحِ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bismika alladhi `allamtahu malaka almawti liqabdi al-arwahi<

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of Your Name which You taught the Angel of Death so that he would be able to grasp the souls,

segments.arabic: وَاسْالُكَ بِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي كُتِبَ عَلَىٰ وَرَقِ ٱلزَّيْتُونِ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bismika alladhi kutiba `ala waraqi alzzaytuni<

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of Your Name which was written on the leaves of olive-trees;
so, fires subdued to these leaves

segments.transliteration: faqulta ya naru kuni bardan wa salaman<

translation.en: after You said, “O fire! Be a comfort and peace,”

segments.arabic: وَاسْالُكَ بِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي كَتَبْتَهُ عَلَىٰ سُرَادِقِ ٱلْمَجْدِ وَٱلْكَرَامَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bismika alladhi katabtahu `ala suradiqi almajdi walkaramati<

translation.en: and I beseech You in the name of Your Name that You wrote on the canopies of Glory and Dignity.
O He Who cannot be annoyed by any beseecher
He Who cannot be influenced by any reward (that He presents)!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ بِهِ يُسْتَغَاثُ وَإِلَيْهِ يُلْجَا
segments.transliteration: ya man bihi yustaghathu wa ilayhi yulja'u<

translation.en: O He Whose refuge is taken and to Whom resort is made!
I beseech You in the name of the Seats of Honor belonging to Your Throne,
the utmost of mercy in Your Book,
Your All-great Name,
Your All-high majesty,
and Your most high, perfect Words.

segments.transliteration: allahumma rabba alrriyahi wa ma dharat<

translation.en: O Allah, Lord of winds and whatever they scatter far,
Lord of the sky and whatever it covers,
the Lord of the earth and whatever it carries,
the Lord of the devils and whomever they mislead,
and the Lord of the oceans and wherever they flow.

segments.arabic: وَبِحَقِّ كُلِّ حَقٍّ هُوَ عَلَيْكَ حَقٌّ
segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqi kulli haqqin huwa `alayka haqqun<

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of everything that enjoys a right with You,
in the name of the favorite angels,
the angels managing the spirits, the cherubim,

segments.arabic: وَٱلْمُسَبِّحِينَ لَكَ بِٱللَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ لاَ يَفْتُرُونَ
segments.transliteration: walmusabbihina laka billayli walnnahari la yafturuna<

translation.en: and the angels praising You night and day without showing sluggishness,
in the name of Abraham, Your intimate friend,

segments.arabic: وَبِحَقِّ كُلِّ وَلِيٍّ يُنَادِيكَ بَيْنَ ٱلصَّفَا وَٱلْمَرْوَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqi kulli waliyyin yunadika bayna alssafawalmarwati<

translation.en: and in the name of each and every saint who calls You between Safa and Marwah
and You respond to his/her prayer.

segments.arabic: يَا مُجِيبُ اسْالُكَ بِحَقِّ هٰذِهِ ٱلاسْمَاءِ وَبِهٰذِهِ ٱلدَّعَوَاتِ
segments.transliteration: ya mujibu as'aluka bihaqqi hadhihi al-asma'i wa bihadhihi aldda`awati<

translation.en: O Responsive Lord! I beseech You in the name of all these names and all these prayers

segments.arabic: انْ تَغْفِرَ لَنَا مَا قَدَّمْنَا وَمَا اخَّرْنَا
segments.transliteration: an taghfira lana ma qaddamna wa ma akhkharna<

translation.en: to forgive us all our past and coming sins,

segments.transliteration: wa ma asrarna wa ma a`lanna<

translation.en: including the secret and the open,

segments.transliteration: wa ma abdayna wa ma akhfayna<

translation.en: the hidden and the public,

segments.transliteration: wa ma anta a`lamu bihi minna<

translation.en: and those whom You know better than we do.
Verily, You have power over all things.
[Respond] in the name of Your mercy, O most Merciful of all those who show mercy.
O He Who guards all strangers!
O He Who brings entertainment to all lonely ones!
O He Who is the power of all the weak!
O He Who is the support of all the persecuted!
O He Who bestows upon all the deprived!
O He Who brings entertainment to all the lonesome!
O He Who is the company of all those on journeys!
O He Who is the pillar of all the present!

segments.transliteration: ya ghafira kulli dhanbin wa khati'atin<

translation.en: O He Who forgives all sins and offenses!
O He Who is the aid of all those begging aid!
O He Who is the relief of all those pleading for relief!
O He Who relieves the calamity of those inflicted with calamities!
O He Who alleviate the distress of the distressed ones!
O He Who is the Originator of the heavens and the layers of the earth!
O He Who is the utmost hope of the seekers!
O He Who responds to the prayers of the troubled!
O He Who is the most Merciful of all those who show mercy!
O Lord of the worlds!
O Master of the Judgment Day!
O most Magnanimous of all those who act magnanimously!
O most Generous of all those who act generously!
O most Hearing of all those who can hear!
O most Seeing of all those who can see!
O most Powerful of all those who have power!

segments.arabic: ٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تُغَيِّرُ ٱلنِّعَمَ
segments.transliteration: ighfir liya aldhdhunuba allati tughayyiru alnni`ama<

translation.en: (Please) forgive my sins that change the bounties

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تُورِثُ ٱلنَّدَمَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati turithu alnnadama<

translation.en: And forgive me my sins that bring about remorse,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تُورِثُ ٱلسَّقَمَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati turithu alssaqama<

translation.en: forgive me my sins that result in ailment,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تَهْتِكُ ٱلْعِصَمَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati tahtiku al`isama<

translation.en: forgive me my sins that tear safeguards,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تَرُدُّ ٱلدُّعَاءَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati taruddu alddu`a'a<

translation.en: forgive me my sins that repel prayers,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تَحْبِسُ قَطْرَ ٱلسَّمَاءِ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati tahbisu qatra alssama'i<

translation.en: forgive me my sins that withhold the drops of the sky,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تُعَجِّلُ ٱلْفَنَاءَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati tu`ajjilu alfana'a<

translation.en: forgive me my sins that hasten extinction,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تَجْلِبُ ٱلشَّقَاءَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati tajlibu alshshaqa'a<

translation.en: forgive me my sins that beget misery,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تُظْلِمُ ٱلْهَوَاءَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati tuzlimu alhawa'a<

translation.en: forgive me my sins that darken the atmospheres,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تَكْشِفُ ٱلْغِطَاءَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati takshifu alghita'a<

translation.en: forgive me my sins that disclose the coverings,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي لاَ يَغْفِرُهَا غَيْرُكَ يَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati la yaghfiruhaghayruka ya allahu<

translation.en: forgive me my sins that none can forgive save You, O Allah,

segments.arabic: وَٱحْمِلْ عَنِّي كُلَّ تَبِعَةٍ لاحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wahmil `anni kulla tabi`atin li'ahadin min khalqika<

translation.en: bear from me every offensive that I have made against any of Your creatures,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ لِي مِنْ امْرِي فَرَجاً وَمَخْرَجاً وَيُسْراً
segments.transliteration: waj`al li min amri farajan wa makhrajan wa yusran<

translation.en: make all my affairs reach at relief, exit, and easiness,
make Your tranquility ascend on my chest,

segments.arabic: وَرَجَاءَكَ فِي قَلْبِي حَتَّىٰ لاَ ارْجُوَ غَيْرَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa raja'aka fi qalbi hatta la arjuwa ghayraka<

translation.en: and make hope in You ascend on my heart so that I shall never hope for anyone save You.
O Allah, (please) safeguard me, heal me in all my situations,
be my companion at nights and days,

segments.transliteration: wa min bayni yadayya wa min khalfi<

translation.en: be ahead of me, behind me,
from my right side, from my left side,

segments.transliteration: wa min fawqi wa min tahti<

translation.en: from above me, and from beneath me,
make easy all the ways for me,
make excellent facilitation for me,
do not disappoint me in hardships,
guide me, O Best of all guides,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَكِلْنِي إِلَىٰ نَفْسِي فِي ٱلامُورِ
segments.transliteration: wa la takilni ila nafsi fi al-umuri<

translation.en: do not leave me alone in all my affairs,
make me receive all pleasures,
and make me return to my family with prosperity, success,
and gladness in the present and in the future.
Verily, You have power over all things.
(Please) bestow upon me with Your favors,
expand for me the most favorable of Your sustenance,
apply me to the obedience to You,
redeem me from Your chastisement and Fire,

segments.arabic: وَٱقْلِبْنِي إِذَا تَوَفَّيْتَنِي إِلَىٰ جَنَّتِكَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: waqlibni idha tawaffaytani ila jannatika birahmatika<

translation.en: and when You grasp my soul, lead me to Your Paradise, by Your mercy.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ زَوَالِ نِعْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni a`udhu bika min zawali ni`matika<

translation.en: O Allah, I seek Your protection against confiscation of Your graces,
against alternation of Your conferral of wellbeing on me,
against the befalling of Your punishment,
and against the ensuing of Your chastisement.

segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika min jahdi albala'i<

translation.en: I seek Your protection against arduous hardships,
against coming about of misery,
against evil end results,
against my enemies’ gloating over my grief,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرِّ مَا يَنْزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharri ma yanzilu min alssama'i<

translation.en: against the evil of everything that ascends from the heavens,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرِّ مَا فِي ٱلْكِتَابِ ٱلْمُنْزَلِ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharri ma fi alkitabi almunzali<

translation.en: and against the evils mentioned in the Revealed Book.
O Allah, (please) do not include me with the evil ones,
do not include me with the people of Hellfire,
do not deprive me of the companionship of the upright people,
grant me a pleasant lifetime,

segments.transliteration: wa tawaffani wafatan tayyibatan tulhiquni bil-abrari<

translation.en: decide for me a kind of death due to which You will join me to the Pious Ones,
and confer upon me with the companionship of the Prophets

segments.arabic: فِي مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِنْدَ مَلِيكٍ مُقْتَدِرٍ

translation.en: in the seat of honesty with the All-powerful King.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَلَىٰ حُسْنِ بَلاَئِكَ وَصُنْعِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma laka alhamdu `ala husni bala'ika wa sun`ika<

translation.en: O Allah, all praise be to You for Your pleasant trials and deeds to us.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَلَىٰ ٱلإِسْلاَمِ وَٱتِّبَاعِ ٱلسُّنَّةِ
segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu `ala al-islami wattiba`i alssunnati<

translation.en: All praise be to You for my being Muslim and for my following the Prophet’s traditions.
O my Lord, as You have guided them (i.e. the pious)
and taught them Your Book, (please) guide us and teach us.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَلَىٰ حُسْنِ بَلاَئِكَ وَصُنْعِكَ عِنْدِي خَاصَّةً
segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu `ala husni bala'ika wa sun`ika `indi khassatan<

translation.en: All praise be to You for Your pleasant trials and deeds to me in private,
as You created me, gifted me an excellent form,
taught me, gifted me excellent erudition,
guided me, and gifted me excellent guidance.

segments.arabic: فَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَلَىٰ إِنْعَامِكَ عَلَيَّ قَدِيماً وَحَدِيثاً
segments.transliteration: falaka alhamdu `ala in`amika `alayya qadiman wa hadithan<

translation.en: So, all praise be to You for Your favors that You conferred upon me in the past and in the present.

segments.arabic: فَكَمْ مِنْ كَرْبٍ يَا سَيِّدِي قَدْ فَرَّجْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: fakam min karbin ya sayyidi qad farrajtahu<

translation.en: Too many are the agonies that You, my Master, relieved.

segments.arabic: وَكَمْ مِنْ غَمٍّ يَا سَيِّدِي قَدْ نَفَّسْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa kam min ghammin ya sayyidi qad naffastahu<

translation.en: Too many are the distresses that You, my Master, eased.

segments.arabic: وَكَمْ مِنْ هَمٍّ يَا سَيِّدِي قَدْ كَشَفْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa kam min hammin ya sayyidi qad kashaftahu<

translation.en: Too many are the sufferings that You, my Master, alleviated.

segments.arabic: وَكَمْ مِنْ بَلاَءٍ يَا سَيِّدِي قَدْ صَرَفْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa kam min bala'in ya sayyidi qad saraftahu<

translation.en: Too many are the hardships from which You, my Master, saved me.

segments.arabic: وَكَمْ مِنْ عَيْبٍ يَا سَيِّدِي قَدْ سَتَرْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa kam min `aybin ya sayyidi qad satartahu<

translation.en: Too many are the defects that You, my Master, covered.
So, all praise be to You for all conditions,
in every place and time,
every circumstance and situation,

segments.transliteration: wa `ala hadhihi alhali wa kulli halin<

translation.en: and for the current condition and all conditions.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْنِي مِنْ افْضَلِ عِبَادِكَ نَصِيباً

translation.en: O Allah, (please) shower upon me the best share of every good thing

segments.arabic: فِي هٰذَا ٱلْيَوْمِ مِنْ خَيْرٍ تَقْسِمُهُ
segments.transliteration: fi hadha alyawmi min khayrin taqsimuhu<

translation.en: that You decide for Your servants on this day,
such as harm that You decide to hold off,
evil that You decide to ward off,
ordeal that You decide to deter,
grace that You decide to grant,
item of mercy that You decide to distribute,
and item of wellbeing that You decide to cover up (on one of Your servants),
for You verily have power over all things,
in Your hands lie the hoards of the heavens and the earth,
You are verily the One, the All-generous, and the Best Bestower,
You are the One Whose beseechers are not rejected,
and You are the One Who never disappoint those who put hope in Him,
the One Who is never influenced by the rewards that He bestows upon anyone,
and the One Whose possessions never run out;
rather, You always increase in quantity, excellent gift,
conferrals, and magnanimity.

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي مِنْ خَزَائِنِكَ ٱلَّتِي لاَ تَفْنَىٰ
segments.transliteration: warzuqni min khaza'inika allati la tafna<

translation.en: (Please) bestow upon me from Your hoards that never come to an end
and from Your expansive mercy.
Your conferral shall never be confined
and You have power over all things;
in the name of Your mercy; O most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

text.en: Shaykh al-Tusi, Sayyid Ibn Tawus, al-Kaf`ami, and Sayyid Ibn Baqi have recorded that it is recommended to say the following prayer on Fridays and at Friday nights and on the day and night of `Arafat (the ninth of Dhu’l-Hijjah).The supplication below is as quoted from Shaykh al-Tusi’s book of al-Misbah:

translation.en: O Allah, One may call up, prepare,
ready oneself, and stand prepared
for purpose of coming to a creature
in the hope of gaining his aid
and asking for his gift and present.
As for myself, to You—O my Lord—I make my preparations and readiness
hoping for Your pardon
and asking for Your gift and present.
So, (please) do not disappoint my entreaty.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاَ يَخِيبُ عَلَيْهِ سَائِلٌ

translation.en: O He Who never disappoints His beseechers
and Whose prizes never decrease His ample-giving!

segments.arabic: فَإنّي لَمْ آتِكَ ثِقَةً بِعَمَلٍ صَالِحٍ عَمِلْتُهُ
segments.transliteration: fa'inni lam atika thiqatan bi`amalin salihin `amiltuhu

translation.en: I have not come to You with confidence of a righteous deed that I have done
nor have I had any hope in a grant of any creature.

segments.arabic: اتَيْتُكَ مُقِرّاً عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي بِٱلإسَاءَةِ وَٱلظُّلْمِ

translation.en: Rather, I have come to You professing myself to be evildoer and transgressor

segments.arabic: مُعْتَرِفاً بِانْ لاَ حُجَّةَ لِي وَلاَ عُذْرَ
segments.transliteration: mu`tarifan bi-an la hujjata li wa la `udhra

translation.en: and confessing that I lack any pretext or excuse.
I have come to You hoping for Your great pardon
due to which You have pardoned the wrongdoers.

segments.arabic: فَلَمْ يَمْنَعْكَ طُولُ عُكُوفِهِمْ عَلِي عَظِيمِ ٱلْجُرْمِ

translation.en: Hence, their long-lasting retirement to their grave offenses has not prevented You
from turning to them with mercy.
O He Whose mercy is huge
and Whose pardon is great;

segments.arabic: يَا عَظيـمُ يَا عَظيـمُ يَا عَظيـمُ

translation.en: O All-great, O All-great, O All-great;
nothing can repel Your rage except Your forbearance

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يُنْجِي مِنْ سَخَطِكَ إِلاَّ ٱلتَّضَرُّعُ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la yunji min sakhatika illa alttadarru`u ilayka

translation.en: and nothing can save from Your wrath except imploring earnestly to You.
So, my God, (please) grant me a relief

segments.arabic: بِٱلْقُدْرَةِ ٱلَّتِي تُحْيِي بِهَا مَيْتَ ٱلْبِلاَدِ
segments.transliteration: bilqudrati allati tuhyi biha mayta albiladi

translation.en: in the name of the power through which You restore to life the derelict lands,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُهْلِكْنِي غَمّاً حَتَّىٰ تَسْتَجِيبَ لِي
segments.transliteration: wa la tuhlikni ghamman hatta tastajiba li

translation.en: and do not cause me to perish out of grief until You respond to me
and show me signs of Your response to my prayers.

segments.arabic: وَاذِقْنِي طَعْمَ ٱلْعَافِيَةِ إلَىٰ مُنَتَهَىٰ اجَلِي
segments.transliteration: wa adhiqni ta`ma al`afiyati ila muntaha ajali

translation.en: (please) Make me taste the flavor of wellbeing up to the end of my lifetime,
do not make my enemies gloat over me,
do not give them a hand over me,
and do not make them control over me.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنْ وَضَعْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا ٱلَّذِي يَرْفَعُنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma in wada`tani faman dha alladhi yarfa`uni

translation.en: O Allah, If You humiliate me, who can then exalt me?

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ رَفَعْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا ٱلَّذِي يَضَعُنِي
segments.transliteration: wa in rafa`tani faman dha alladhi yada`uni

translation.en: And if You exalt me, who can then humiliate me?

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ اهْلَكْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا ٱلَّذِي يَعْرِضُ لَكَ فِي عَبْدِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa in ahlaktani faman dha alladhi ya`ridu laka fi `abdika

translation.en: If You annihilate me, who can then interfere before You concerning the affair of me—Your slave
or who can intercede to ask You about it?

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ عَلِمْتُ انَّهُ لَيْسَ فِي حُكْمِكَ ظُلْمٌ
segments.transliteration: wa qad `alimtu annahu laysa fi hukmika zulmun

translation.en: I have already known for sure that Your decrees are devoid of injustice
and Your punishment does not count on immediateness.

segments.transliteration: wa innama ya`jalu man yakhafu alfawta

translation.en: Verily, immediateness is the work of him who fears lest he may miss,

segments.transliteration: wa innama yahtaju ila alzzulmi aldda`ifu

translation.en: and only do the weak need injustice.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ تَعَالَيْتَ يَا إِلٰهِي عَنْ ذٰلِكَ  عُلُوّاً كَبِيراً
segments.transliteration: wa qad ta`alayta ya ilahi `an dhalika `uluwwan kabiran

translation.en: As for You, O my God, You are too exalted to be so—Exalted and Great You are beyond all measure!
O Allah, I take refuge in You; so, (please) have protection upon me!
I call for Your safekeeping; so, (please) keep me under Your security!
I appeal for Your sustenance; so, (please) provide me with sustenance!
I put trust in You; so, (please) keep me under Your supervision!
I call for Your aid against my enemy; so, (please) grant me support!
I seek Your assistance; so, (please) assist me!

segments.transliteration: wa astaghfiruka ya ilahi faghfir li

translation.en: I ask for Your forgiveness; so, (please) forgive me.
So, respond! Respond! Respond!

text.en: 6.Recite the following 10 tasbeehaat a thousand times:

translation.en: Glory be to Him Whose Throne is in the heavens.
Glory be to Him Whose dominion is on the earth.
Glory be to Him Whose decree is in the graves.
Glory be to Him Whose ways are in oceans.
Glory be to Him Whose authority is (clearly shown) in Hellfire.
Glory be to Him Whose mercy is in Paradise.
Glory be to Him Whose justice is on the Resurrection Day.
Glory be to Him Who raised the skies.
Glory be to Him Who expanded the earth.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱلَّذِي لَا مَلْجَأَ وَلَا مَنْجَا مِنْهُ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: subhana alladhi la malja'a wa la manja minhu illa ilayhi

translation.en: Glory be to Him save Whom there is no shelter and no salvation.

text.en: Dua Asharaat
Recited on Friday afternoons & Arafa Day
The Supplication of the Tens; some paragraphs of the supplication are repeated ten times each.version from Shaykh al-Tusi’s Misbah al-Mutahajjid.
It is advisable to say this supplication each morning and evening. Yet, its best time is Friday afternoon.

translation.en: In the Name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
All Glory be to Allah,
all praise be to Allah,
there is no god save Allah,
Allah is the Greatest,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi al`aliyyi al`azimi

translation.en: there is neither power nor might save with Allah, the Most High, the All-magnificent.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ آنَاءَ ٱللَّيْلِ وَأَطْرافِ ٱلنَّهَارِ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi ana'a allayli wa atrafa alnnahari

translation.en: Glory be to Allah in hours of the night and at the two ends of the day.
Glory be to Allah in the morning and the evening hours.
Glory be to Allah in the early hours of night and morning.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ حِينَ تُمْسُونَ وَحِينَ تُصْبِحُونَ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi hina tumsuna wa hina tusbihuna

translation.en: Glory be to Allah when you enter the night and when you enter the morning.

segments.arabic: وَلَهُ ٱلْحَمْدُ فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: wa lahu alhamdu fi alssamawati wal-ardi

translation.en: Unto Him be praise in the heavens, the earth,
at the sun's decline, and in the noonday.
He brings forth the living from the dead,
brings forth the dead from the living,
revives the earth after its death,
and even so will you be brought forth.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ ٱلْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ

translation.en: Glorified be Your Lord, the Lord of Majesty, from that which they attribute (to Him).
Peace be upon the Messengers.
All praise be to Allah, the Lord of the Worlds.
Glory be to the Lord of Kingdom and Realm.
Glory be to the Lord of Majesty and Magnificence.
Glory be to the Lord of Greatness and Magnitude;
the True Sovereign, the Guardian, and the Holy.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمَلِكِ ٱلْحَيِّ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَمُوتُ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi almaliki alhayyi alladhi la yamutu

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, the Sovereign, the Ever-living Who never dies.
Glory be to Allah, the Ever-living, the Holy.
Glory be to the Self-Existent, the Eternal.
Glory be to the Eternal, the Self-Existent.
Glory be to my Lord, the Most Great.
Glory be to my Lord, the Most High.
Glory be to the Ever-living, the Self-Existent.
Glory be to the Exalted, the Most High.
Glory be to Him, and Exalted be Him.
Glorified (is He), Holy (is He),
Our Lord, and the Lord of the angels and the Spirit.
Glory be to the Eternal Who never forgets.
Glory be to the All-knowing Who does not need teaching.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura

translation.en: Glory be to the Creator of all seen and unseen beings.
Glory be to Him Who comprehends all visions,
but visions cannot comprehend Him,
and He is the Knower of subtleties, the Aware.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَصْبَحْتُ مِنْكَ فِي نِعْمَةٍ وَخَيْرٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni asbahtu minka fi ni`matin wa khayrin

translation.en: O Allah, I begin my day covered with grace and favor from You
as well as blessing and good health.
So, (please) bless Muhammad and his Household,
make perfect Your grace and favor for me
as well as Your blessings and good health,
through redemption from Hellfire,
grant me thanksgiving to You, enjoyment of wellbeing from You,

segments.transliteration: wa fadlaka wa karamataka abadan ma abqaytani

translation.en: Your grace, and Your honor permanently so long as You decide to keep me alive.
O Allah, only by Your Light have I been guided,
only by Your grace have I been opulent,
and only by Your grace have I lived in eves and morns.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أُشْهِدُكَ وَكَفَىٰ بِكَ شَهِيداً
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ush-hiduka wa kafa bika shahidan

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You to witness for me, and You are surely sufficient as a witness,

segments.transliteration: wa ush-hidu mala'ikataka wa anbiya'aka wa rusulaka

translation.en: and I also choose as witnesses Your angels, Prophets, Messengers,

segments.transliteration: wa hamalata `arshika wa sukkana samawatika wa ardika

translation.en: the bearers of Your Throne, the inhabitants of Your heavens and earth,
and all Your creatures,

segments.arabic: بِأَنَّكَ أَنْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: bi'annaka anta allahu la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: that You are Allah, there is no god save You,
One and Only Lord, having no partner,

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّداً صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ عَبْدُكَ وَرَسُولُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa anna muhammadan salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi `abduka wa rasuluka

translation.en: and that Muhammad, peace be upon him and his Household, is Your servant and Messenger,

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّكَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْ ءٍ قَدِيرٌ

translation.en: and that You have power over all things;

segments.transliteration: tuhyi wa tumitu wa tumitu wa tuhyi

translation.en: You grant life and cause to die and You cause to die and grant life;
and I witness that Paradise is true,
Hellfire is true,
Resurrection is true,
the Hour is coming, there is no doubt about it,

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَبْعَثُ مَنْ فِي ٱلْقُبُورِ
segments.transliteration: wa anna allaha yab`athu man fi alquburi

translation.en: and Allah shall raise up those who are in graves.

segments.arabic: وَأَشْهَدُ انَّ عَلِيَّ بْنَ أَبِي طَالِبٍ أَمِيرُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ حَقّاً حَقّاً
segments.transliteration: wa ash-hadu anna `aliyya bna abi talibin amiru almu'minina haqqan haqqan

translation.en: I also witness that `Ali the son of Abu-Talib is truly the commander of the faithful, indeed,

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّ ٱلأَئِمَّةَ مِنْ وُلْدِهِ هُمُ ٱلأَئِمَّةُ ٱلْهُدَاةُ ٱلْمَهْدِيُّونَ
segments.transliteration: wa anna al-a'immata min wuldihi hum al-a'immatu alhudatu almahdiyyuna

translation.en: the Imams from his offspring are the guides, leaders, and well-guided,
neither straying off nor misleading,
and they are Your chosen representatives,
Your triumphant party,

segments.transliteration: wa sifwatuka wa khiyaratuka min khalqika

translation.en: Your choice, the most favorable of all Your creatures,
the superior ones whom You have selected for Your religion,
decided on from among Your beings,
chosen from among Your servants,
and made Claims against all beings.

segments.arabic: صَلَوَاتُكَ عَلَيْهِمْ وَٱلسَّلاَمُ وَرَحْمَةُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
segments.transliteration: salawatuka `alayhim wa alssalamu wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: May Your consent, peace, mercy, and blessings be upon them.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ٱكْتُبْ لِي هٰذِهِ ٱلشَّهَادَةَ عِنْدَكَ

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) certify this witness for me with You

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ تُلَقِّنَنِيهَا يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ وَأَنْتَ عَنِّي رَاضٍ
segments.transliteration: hatta tulaqqinaniha yawma alqiyamati wa anta `anni radin

translation.en: so that You shall give it back to me on the Resurrection Day while You are pleased with me.
Verily, You have power over all that which You will.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ حَمْداً يَصْعَدُ أَوَّلُهُ وَلاَ يَنْفَدُ آخِرُهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma laka alhamdu hamdan yas`adu awwaluhu wa la yanfadu akhiruhu

translation.en: O Allah, to You be praise the first of which ascends while its end is infinite.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ حَمْداً تَضَعُ لَكَ ٱلسَّمَاءُ كَنَفَيْهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma laka alhamdu hamdan tada`u laka alssama'u kanafayha

translation.en: O Allah, to You be praise due to which the heavens humbles itself to You

segments.transliteration: wa tusabbihu laka al-ardu wa man `alayha

translation.en: and the earth as well as all those on it glorify You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ حَمْداً سَرْمَداً أَبَداً
segments.transliteration: allahumma laka alhamdu hamdan sarmadan abadan

translation.en: O Allah, to You be praise—eternal, endless,

segments.transliteration: la inqita`a lahu wa la nafada

translation.en: having neither cessation nor exhaustion,

segments.transliteration: wa laka yanbaghi wa ilayka yantahi

translation.en: fitting You, and being dedicated to You,
about me, on (Your favors to) me, with me,

segments.transliteration: wa ma`i wa qabli wa ba`di

translation.en: along with me, before me, after me,

segments.transliteration: wa amami wa fawqi wa tahti

translation.en: in front of me, over me, beneath me,

segments.arabic: وَإِذَا مِتُّ وَبَقِيتُ فَرْداً وَحِيداً ثُمَّ فَنِيتُ
segments.transliteration: wa idha mittu wa baqitu fardan wahidan thumma fanitu

translation.en: when I die, remain totally alone, and will be then terminated.

segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu idha nushirtu wa bu`ithtu

translation.en: To You be all praise when I shall be resurrected and raised up (from grave).

segments.transliteration: ya mawlaya allahumma wa laka alhamdu

translation.en: O my Lord, O Allah, to You be all praise

segments.transliteration: wa laka alshshukru bijami`i mahamidika kulliha

translation.en: and all thanks in all forms of praising You
for all Your favors

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ يَنْتَهِيَ ٱلْحَمْدُ إِلَىٰ مَا تُحِبُّ رَبَّنَا وَتَرْضَىٰ
segments.transliteration: hatta yantahiya alhamdu ila ma tuhibbu rabbana wa tarda

translation.en: until (this) praise achieves the pleasure and satisfaction of You, O our Lord.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ أَكْلَةٍ وَشَرْبَةٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma laka alhamdu `ala kulli aklatin wa sharbatin

translation.en: O Allah, to You be all praise for each and every food, drink,
power, grip,

segments.transliteration: wa bastatin wa fi kulli mawdi`i sha`ratin

translation.en: extension, and for each place of a single hair.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ حَمْداً خَالِداً مَعَ خُلُودِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma laka alhamdu hamdan khalidan ma`a khuludika

translation.en: O Allah, to You be all praise that is as eternal as You are.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ حَمْداً لاَ مُنْتَهَىٰ لَهُ دُونَ عِلْمِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu hamdan la muntaha lahu duna `ilmika

translation.en: To You be all praise that never ends save Your knowledge (about it).

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ حَمْداً لاَ أَمَدَ لَهُ دُونَ مَشِيَّتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu hamdan la amada lahu duna mashi'atika

translation.en: To You be all praise that has no limit save when You will.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ حَمْداً لاَ أَجْرَ لِقَائِلِهِ إِلاَّ رِضَاكَ
segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu hamdan la ajra liqa'ilihi illa ridaka

translation.en: To You be all praise the one and only reward of its sayer is nothing save Your pleasure.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَلَىٰ حِلْمِكَ بَعْدَ عِلْمِكَ

translation.en: To You be all praise for You act forbearingly though You know.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَلَىٰ عَفْوِكَ بَعْدَ قُدْرَتِكَ

translation.en: To You be all praise for You pardon though You have power (not to do).
To You be all praise and You are the source of praise.
To You be all praise and You are the inheritor of praise.
To You be all praise and You are the fashioner of praise.
To You be all praise and You are the utmost of praise.
To You be all praise and You are the author of praise.
To You be all praise and You are the object of praise.
To You be all praise and You are the lord of praise.
To You be all praise and You are the ultimate objective of praise.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ صَادِقَ ٱلْوَعْدِ وَفِيَّ ٱلْعَهْدِ
segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu sadiqa alwa`di wafiyya al`ahdi

translation.en: To You be all praise and You are truthful in promise, fulfiller of pledge,
mighty in power, and subsistingly glorious.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ رَفِيعَ ٱلدَّرَجَاتِ مُجِيبَ ٱلدَّعَوَاتِ
segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu rafi`a alddarajati mujiba aldda`awati

translation.en: To You be all praise and You are the highest in ranks, the responsive to prayers,

segments.arabic: مُنَزِّلَ ٱلآيَاتِ مِنْ فَوْقِ سَبْعِ سَمَاوَاتٍ
segments.transliteration: munazzila al-ayati min fawqi sab`i samawatin

translation.en: the descender of sings (or Verses) from above seven skies,
the grantor of outstanding blessings,
the bringer forth of light from utter darkness,

segments.arabic: وَمُخْرِجَ مَنْ فِي ٱلظُّلُمَاتِ إِلَىٰ ٱلنُّورِ
segments.transliteration: wa mukhrija man fi alzzulumati ila alnnuri

translation.en: the bringer forth of those who are in darkness to light,
the changer of evil deeds into good deeds,
and the maker of good deeds raise to high ranks.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ غَافِرَ ٱلذَّنْبِ وَقَابِلَ ٱلتَّوْبِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma laka alhamdu ghafira aldhdhanbi wa qabila alttawbi

translation.en: O Allah, to You be all praise and You are the Forgiver of the faults, the Acceptor of repentance,
severe to punish, and Lord of bounty.

segments.arabic: لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ إِلَيْكَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta ilayka almasiru

translation.en: There is no god save You; to You shall be the return.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ فِي ٱللَّيْلِ إِذَا يَغْشَىٰ
segments.transliteration: allahumma laka alhamdu fi allayli idha yaghsha

translation.en: O Allah, to You be all praise in the night when it draws a veil.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ فِي ٱلنَّهَارِ إِذَا تَجَلَّىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu fi alnnahari idha tajalla

translation.en: To You be all praise in the day when it shines in brightness.

segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu fi al-akhirati wal-ula

translation.en: To You be all praise in the Hereafter and the former life.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَدَدَ كُلِّ نَجْمٍ وَمَلَكٍ فِي ٱلسَّمَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu `adada kulli najmin wa malakin fi alssama'i

translation.en: To You be all praise as many as the numbers of all stars and angels in the heavens.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَدَدَ ٱلثَّرَىٰ وَٱلْحَصَىٰ وَٱلنَّوَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu `adada alththara walhasa walnnawa

translation.en: To You be all praise as much as dust and as many as pebbles and seeds.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَدَدَ مَا فِي جَوِّ ٱلسَّمَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu `adada ma fi jawwi alssama'i

translation.en: To You be all praise as many as all that which is in the air.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَدَدَ مَا فِي جَوْفِ ٱلأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu `adada ma fi jawfi al-ardi

translation.en: To You be all praise as many as all that which is in the interior of the earth.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَدَدَ أَوْزَانِ مِيَاهِ ٱلْبِحَارِ
segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu `adada awzani miyahi albihari

translation.en: To You be all praise as much as the weight of sea water.
To You be all praise as many as leaves of trees.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَدَدَ مَا عَلَىٰ وَجْهِ ٱلأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu `adada ma `ala wajhi al-ardi

translation.en: To You be all praise as many as all that which exists on the earth surface.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَدَدَ مَا أَحْصَىٰ كِتَابُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu `adada ma ahsa kitabuka

translation.en: To You be all praise as much as that which has been counted by Your Book.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَدَدَ مَا أَحَاطَ بِهِ عِلْمُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu `adada ma ahata bihi `ilmuka

translation.en: To You be all praise as much as all that which is comprehended by Your Knowledge.
To You be all praise as many as the numbers of men, jinn,
pests, birds, animals, and beasts—
praise that is abundant, pleasant,

segments.arabic: مُبَارَكاً فِيهِ كَمَا تُحِبُّ رَبَّنَا وَتَرْضَىٰ
segments.transliteration: mubarakan fihi kama tuhibbu rabbana wa tarda

translation.en: and as blessed as You, our Lord, please and gratify

segments.arabic: وَكَمَا يَنْبَغِي لِكَرَمِ وَجْهِكَ وَعِزِّ جَلاَلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa kama yanbaghi likarami wajhika wa `izzi jalalika

translation.en: so much so that it befits the majesty of Your Face and the dignity of Your splendor.

text.en: Then, repeat the following statements ten times :

segments.arabic: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ ٱلْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ ٱلْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ ٱللَّطِيفُ ٱلْخَبِيرُ
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa allahu wahdahu la sharika lahu lahu almulku wa lahu alhamdu wa huwa allatifu alkhabiru

translation.en: There is no god save Allah; One and Only and having no partner. To Him is the Kingdom and to Him is (all) praise. He is the Knower of subtleties, the Aware.

text.en: say ten times:

segments.arabic: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ ٱلْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ ٱلْحَمْدُ يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ وَيُمِيتُ وَيُحْيِي وَهُوَحَيٌّ لَا يَمُوتُ بِيَدِهِ ٱلْخَيْرُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa allahu wahdahu la sharika lahu lahu almulku wa lahu alhamdu yuhyi wa yumitu wa yumitu wa yuhyi wa huwa hayyun la yamutu biyadihi alkhayru wa huwa `ala kulli shay'in qadirun

translation.en: There is no god save Allah; One and Only and having no partner. To Him is the Kingdom and to Him is (all) praise. He gives life and causes to die and causes to die and gives life, while He is ever-living and never dies. In His Hand is the entire goodness and He has power over all things.

text.en: say ten times:

segments.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِي لا إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ ٱلْحَيُّ ٱلْقَيُّومُ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْه
segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha alladhi la ilaha illa huwa alhayyu alqayyumu wa atubu ilayhi

translation.en: I pray the forgiveness of Allah; there is no god save Him, the Ever-living, the Self-subsistent, and I repent to Him.

text.en: say ten times:

translation.en: O Allah, O Allah!

text.en: say ten times:

translation.en: O All-beneficent, O All-beneficent!

text.en: say ten times:

translation.en: O All-merciful, O All-merciful!

text.en: say ten times:

translation.en: O Fashioner of the heavens and the earth!

text.en: say ten times:

translation.en: O Lord of Majesty and Dignity!

text.en: say ten times:

translation.en: O All-compassionate! O Grantor (of graces)!

text.en: say ten times:

translation.en: O Ever-living! O Self-Subsistent!

text.en: say ten times:

segments.arabic: يَا حَيُّ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ انْتَ
segments.transliteration: ya hayyu la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: O Ever-living! There is no god save You!

text.en: say ten times:

segments.arabic: يَا ٱللَّهُ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ انْتَ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: O Allah! O He save Whom there is no god!

text.en: say ten times:

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

text.en: say ten times:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.

text.en: say ten times:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ٱفْعَلْ بِي مَا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma if`al bi ma anta ahluhu

translation.en: O Allah, do to me that which You are worthy to do.

text.en: say ten times:

translation.en: (please do) Respond, respond.

text.en: and ten times: <ref=1:112>Surah Al-Ikhlas</ref>
You should then say the following:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ٱصْنَعْ بِي مَا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma isna` bi ma anta ahluhu

translation.en: O Allah, do with me that which You are worthy to do

segments.arabic: وَلَا تَصْنَعْ بِي مَا أَنَا أَهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa la tasna` bi ma ana ahluhu

translation.en: but do not do to me that which I deserve,

segments.transliteration: fa'innaka ahlu alttaqwa wa ahlu almaghfirati

translation.en: for You are worthy to be feared and worthy to forgive,
while I am the one of sins and faults.
So, have mercy upon me, O my Lord,
and You are the most merciful of all those who show mercy.

text.en: Then repeat the following ten times:

segments.arabic: لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi

translation.en: There is neither power nor might save with Allah.

segments.arabic: تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَيِّ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَمُوتُ

translation.en: I trust in the Ever-living (Lord) Who never dies.

segments.arabic: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لَمْ يَتَّخِذْ وَلَداً
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi alladhi lm yattakhidh waladan

translation.en: All praise be to Allah, Who begets no son,

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ شَرِيكٌ فِي ٱلْمُلْكِ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu sharikun fi almulki

translation.en: and has no partner in His dominion

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ وَلِيٌّ مِنَ ٱلذُّلِّ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu waliyyun mina aldhdhulli

translation.en: nor needs He any to protect Him from humiliation:
yea, magnify Him for His greatness and glory!

text.en: Dua Man Taaba TahiyaRecited on thursday nights & Arafa Night/Day.

Shaykh al-Tusi, Sayyid Ibn Tawus, al-Kaf`ami, and Sayyid Ibn Baqi have recorded that it is recommended to say the following prayer onFridays and at Friday nightsand on theday and night of `Arafat (the ninth of Dhu'l-Hijjah).The supplication below is as quoted from Shaykh al-Tusi's book of al-Misbah:

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
O Allah, One may call up, prepare,
ready oneself, and stand prepared
for purpose of coming to a creature
in the hope of gaining his aid
and asking for his gift and present.
As for myself, to You—O my Lord—I make my preparations and readiness
hoping for Your pardon
and asking for Your gift and present.
So, (please) do not disappoint my entreaty.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاَ يَخِيبُ عَلَيْهِ سَائِلٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yakhibu ʿalayhi sa'ilun

translation.en: O He Who never disappoints His beseechers
and Whose prizes never decrease His ample-giving!

segments.arabic: فَإنّي لَمْ آتِكَ ثِقَةً بِعَمَلٍ صَالِحٍ عَمِلْتُهُ
segments.transliteration: fa'inni lam atika thiqatan biʿamalin salihin ʿamiltuhu

translation.en: I have not come to You with confidence of a righteous deed that I have done
nor have I had any hope in a grant of any creature.

segments.arabic: اتَيْتُكَ مُقِرّاً عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي بِٱلإسَاءَةِ وَٱلظُّلْمِ
segments.transliteration: ataytuka muqirran ʿala nafsi bil-isa'ati walzzulmi

translation.en: Rather, I have come to You professing myself to be evildoer and transgressor

segments.arabic: مُعْتَرِفاً بِانْ لاَ حُجَّةَ لِي وَلاَ عُذْرَ
segments.transliteration: muʿtarifan bi-an la hujjata li wa la ʿudhra

translation.en: and confessing that I lack any pretext or excuse.
I have come to You hoping for Your great pardon
due to which You have pardoned the wrongdoers.

segments.arabic: فَلَمْ يَمْنَعْكَ طُولُ عُكُوفِهِمْ عَلِي عَظِيمِ ٱلْجُرْمِ
segments.transliteration: falam yamnaʿka tulu ʿukufihim ʿala ʿazimi aljurmi

translation.en: Hence, their long-lasting retirement to their grave offenses has not prevented You
from turning to them with mercy.
O He Whose mercy is huge
and Whose pardon is great;

segments.arabic: يَا عَظيـمُ يَا عَظيـمُ يَا عَظيـمُ
segments.transliteration: ya ʿazimu ya ʿazimu ya ʿazimu

translation.en: O All-great, O All-great, O All-great;
nothing can repel Your rage except Your forbearance

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يُنْجِي مِنْ سَخَطِكَ إِلاَّ ٱلتَّضَرُّعُ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la yunji min sakhatika illa alttadarruʿu ilayka

translation.en: and nothing can save from Your wrath except imploring earnestly to You.
So, my God, (please) grant me a relief

segments.arabic: بِٱلْقُدْرَةِ ٱلَّتِي تُحْيِي بِهَا مَيْتَ ٱلْبِلاَدِ
segments.transliteration: bilqudrati allati tuhyi biha mayta albiladi

translation.en: in the name of the power through which You restore to life the derelict lands,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُهْلِكْنِي غَمّاً حَتَّىٰ تَسْتَجِيبَ لِي
segments.transliteration: wa la tuhlikni ghamman hatta tastajiba li

translation.en: and do not cause me to perish out of grief until You respond to me
and show me signs of Your response to my prayers.

segments.arabic: وَاذِقْنِي طَعْمَ ٱلْعَافِيَةِ إلَىٰ مُنَتَهَىٰ اجَلِي
segments.transliteration: wa adhiqni taʿma alʿafiyati ila muntaha ajali

translation.en: (please) Make me taste the flavor of wellbeing up to the end of my lifetime,
do not make my enemies gloat over me,
do not give them a hand over me,
and do not make them control over me.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنْ وَضَعْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا ٱلَّذِي يَرْفَعُنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma in wadaʿtani faman dha alladhi yarfaʿuni

translation.en: O Allah, If You humiliate me, who can then exalt me?

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ رَفَعْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا ٱلَّذِي يَضَعُنِي
segments.transliteration: wa in rafaʿtani faman dha alladhi yadaʿuni

translation.en: And if You exalt me, who can then humiliate me?

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ اهْلَكْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا ٱلَّذِي يَعْرِضُ لَكَ فِي عَبْدِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa in ahlaktani faman dha alladhi yaʿridu laka fi ʿabdika

translation.en: If You annihilate me, who can then interfere before You concerning the affair of me—Your slave
or who can intercede to ask You about it?

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ عَلِمْتُ انَّهُ لَيْسَ فِي حُكْمِكَ ظُلْمٌ
segments.transliteration: wa qad ʿalimtu annahu laysa fi hukmika zulmun

translation.en: I have already known for sure that Your decrees are devoid of injustice
and Your punishment does not count on immediateness.

segments.transliteration: wa innama yaʿjalu man yakhafu alfawta

translation.en: Verily, immediateness is the work of him who fears lest he may miss,

segments.transliteration: wa innama yahtaju ila alzzulmi alddaʿifu

translation.en: and only do the weak need injustice.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ تَعَالَيْتَ يَا إِلٰهِي عَنْ ذٰلِكَ عُلُوّاً كَبِيراً
segments.transliteration: wa qad taʿalayta ya ilahi ʿan dhalika ʿuluwwan kabiran

translation.en: As for You, O my God, You are too exalted to be so—Exalted and Great You are beyond all measure!
O Allah, I take refuge in You; so, (please) have protection upon me!
I call for Your safekeeping; so, (please) keep me under Your security!
I appeal for Your sustenance; so, (please) provide me with sustenance!
I put trust in You; so, (please) keep me under Your supervision!
I call for Your aid against my enemy; so, (please) grant me support!
I seek Your assistance; so, (please) assist me!

segments.transliteration: wa astaghfiruka ya ilahi faghfir li

translation.en: I ask for Your forgiveness; so, (please) forgive me.
So, respond! Respond! Respond!

text.en: Supplication of the Grieved.This dua is usually recited after Salaatul Witr (the last unit of the Tahajjud Prayer).

translation.en: In the name of Allah, The Beneficent, the Merciful

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ‘alaa muhammadin wa ali muhammad

translation.en: O Allah bless Muhammad and his family

segments.arabic: اُنَاجِیْکَ یَا مَوْجُوْدًا فِیْ کُلِّ مَکَانٍ
segments.transliteration: unaajika ya mawjoodan fi kulli makaan

translation.en: I whisper unto You O One Who is present in every place

segments.arabic: لَعَلَّکَ تَسْمَعُ نِدَآئِیْ فَقَدْ عَظُمَ جُرْمِیْ وَ قَلَّ حَیَآئِیْ
segments.transliteration: la’allaka tasma’oo nidaaee faqad ‘adhuma jurmi wa qalla hayaaee

translation.en: So that you may hear my call for surely my sin is excessive and my shame is less

segments.arabic: مَوْلَایَ یَا مَوْلَایَ أَیَّ الْأَھْوَالِ أَتَذَکَّرُ
segments.transliteration: mawlaya ya mawlaya ayyal ahwali atadhakkar

translation.en: My Master, O my Master which of the terrifying states shall I remember

segments.arabic: وَ أَیَّهَا أَنْسٰی وَ لَوْ لَمْ یَکُنْ إِلاَّ الْمَوْتُ لَکَفٰی
segments.transliteration: wa ayyahaa ansaa wa law lam yakun illal maawtu lakafaa

translation.en: and which of them shall I forget for if there was nothing except death it would be enough

segments.arabic: کَیْفَ وَمَا بَعْدَ الْمَوْتِ أَعْظَمُ وَ أَدْهَی
segments.transliteration: kayfaa wa maa b’adal mawti a‘adhamoo wa ad-haa

translation.en: then what about after death greater and much worse?

segments.arabic: مَولاَیَ یَا مَوْلاَیَ حَتّٰی مَتٰی وَ إِلٰي مَتٰي أَقُوْلُ
segments.transliteration: mawlaya ya mawlaya hatta mata wa ilaa mata aqulu

translation.en: My master O my Master up to when and till when will I say,

segments.arabic: لَکَ الْعُتْبٰی مَرَّةً بَعْدَ أُخْرٰی ثُمَّ لاَ تَجِدُ عِنْدِیْ صِدْقًا وَ لاَ وَفَآءً
segments.transliteration: lakal ‘utbaa marratan b’ada ukhraa thumma laa tajidu ‘indee sidqan wa laa wafaa-an

translation.en: I am to blame, again and again, but then You do not find any truth or loyalty in me?

segments.transliteration: fa yaa ghawthaa-hu thumma wa ghaw'thaahu bika

translation.en: I call for help and I call for help,

segments.arabic: یَا اَللّٰهُ مِنْ هَویً قَدْ غَلَبَنِیْ وَ مِنْ عَدُوٍّ قَدِ اسْتَکْلَبَ عَلَیَّ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu min hawaa qad ghalabanee wa min ‘aduwwin qad-istaklaba ‘alayya

translation.en: O Allah from desires which have overpowered me and from the enemy which has pounced on me

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ دُنْیَا قَدْ تَزَیَّنَتْ لِیْ وَ مِنْ نَفْسٍ أَمَّارَةٍ بِالسُّوٓءِ إِلاَّ مَا رَحِمَ رَبِّیْ
segments.transliteration: wa min dunyaa qad-tazayyanat lee wa min nafsin ammaaratin bis-suui illa ma rahima rabbee

translation.en: and from the world which attracts me and from the soul that leads towards evil except that on which my Lord has mercy (12:53)

segments.arabic: مَوْلاَیَ یَا مَوْلاَیَ إِنْ کُنْتَ رَحِمْتَ مِثْلِی فَارْحَمْنِیْ
segments.transliteration: mawlaya ya mawlaya in kunta rahimta mithlee farhamnee

translation.en: My master O my master if You have had mercy on the likes of me then have mercy on me

segments.arabic: وَ إِنْ کُنْتَ قَبِلْتَ مِثْلِیْ فَاقْبَلْنِیْ

translation.en: and if You have accepted from the likes of me then accept from me

segments.arabic: یَا قابِلَ السَّحَرَةِ اقْبَلْنِیْ یَا مَنْ لَمْ أَزَلْ أَتَعَرَّفُ مِنْهُ الْحُسْنٰی
segments.transliteration: ya qabilas-saharati iqbalnee ya man lam azal at’arrafu min hul husna

translation.en: O One Who accepts the early morning prayer accept me, O One who, I still know only good from Him

segments.arabic: یَا مَنْ یُغَذِّیْنِي بِالنِّعَمِ صَبَاحًا وَ مَسَآءً اِرْحَمْنِیْ یَوْمَ اٰتِیْکَ فَرْدًا شَاخِصًا اِلَیْکَ
segments.transliteration: ya man yughadh-dhinee bin-n’eami sabaahan wa masaa-an irhamnee yawma aateeka fardan shakhisan ilayka

translation.en: O One who nourishes me with blessings morning and evening have mercy on me when I come to You alone,

segments.arabic: بَصَرِیْ مُقَلَّدًا عَمَلِیْ قَدْ تَبَرَّءَ جَمِیْعُ الْخَلْقِ مِنِّیْ
segments.transliteration: basari muqaliddan ‘amali qad ta barra-a jamee'ul khalqi minni

translation.en: my glance fixed on You my actions carried on my neck When all of creation will withdraw away from me

segments.arabic: نَعَمْ وَ أَبِیْ وَ أُمِّیْ وَ مَنْ کَانَ لَهُ کَدِّي وَ سَعْیِي
segments.transliteration: na'am wa abi wa ummi wa man kana lahoo kaddee wa sa’ayi

translation.en: yes, even my father and mother and those for whom I worked and struggled

segments.transliteration: fa in -am tarhamni fa man yarhamuni

translation.en: then if You will not have mercy on me who will have mercy on me

segments.arabic: وَ مَنْ یُوْنِسُ فِیْ الْقَبْرِ وَحْشَتِي وَ مَنْ یُنْطِقُ لِسَانِي إِذَا خَلَوْتُ بِعَمَلِي
segments.transliteration: wa man yunisu fil qabri wahshati wa man yuntiqoo lisanee idha khalawtu bi ‘amali

translation.en: who will give me solace from the loneliness of the grave and who will make me speak when I am alone with my deeds

segments.arabic: وَ سَاءَلْتَنِي عَمَّا أَنْتَ أَعْلَمُ بِهِ مِنِّي
segments.transliteration: wa saa-altanee ‘amma anta a’alamu bihi minni

translation.en: and when You will ask me about what You know better than me?

segments.arabic: فَإِنْ قُلْتُ نَعَمْ فَأَیْنَ الْمَحْرَبُ مِنْ عَدْلِکَ
segments.transliteration: fa-in qultu na’am fa aynal mahraboo min ‘adlik

translation.en: Then if I say yes (to my sins) where will be the escape from Your Justice?

segments.arabic: وَ إِنْ قُلْتُ لَمْ أَفْعَلْ قُلْتَ اَلَمْ أَکُنِ الشَّاهِدَ عَلَیْکَ
segments.transliteration: wa in qulta lam af’al qulta alam akunish-shahida ‘alayka

translation.en: And if I say I did not commit it You will say was I not a witness over you?

segments.arabic: فَعَفْوُکَ عَفْوُکَ یَا مَوْلاَیَ قَبْلَ سَرَابِیْلِ الْقَطِرَانِ
segments.transliteration: fa ‘awfuka ‘awfuka ya mawlaaya qabla saraabeelil qatiraan

translation.en: So (I beseech) Your Forgiveness Your Pardon O my master before the wearing of the clothes of Hell

segments.arabic: عَفْوُکَ عَفْوُکَ یَا مَوْلاَیَ قَبْلَ جَهَنَّمَ وَ النِّیْرَانِ
segments.transliteration: fa ‘awfuka ‘awfuka ya mawlaaya qabla jahannama wan-neeraan

translation.en: Your Forgiveness Your Pardon O my Master before the Hell and the Fire

segments.arabic: عَفْوُکَ عَفْوُکَ یَا مَوْلاَیَ قَبْلَ أَنْ تُغَلَّ الْأَیْدِیْ إِلٰی الْأَعْنَاقِ
segments.transliteration: fa ‘awfuka ‘awfuka ya mawlaaya qabla an tughallal aydee ilal a’anaaq

translation.en: Your Forgiveness Your Forgiveness O my Master before the hands are tied to the necks

segments.arabic: یَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِیْنَ وَ خَیْرَ الْغَافِرِیْنَ.

translation.en: O the most Merciful and the best of Forgivers

text.en: Significance of this Dua

Seventh Tradition: According to a validly reported tradition, when Imam al-Sadiq (`a) came to Iraq, some people came to him and asked, "We have already known that the clay of Imam al-Husayn's tomb is remedy for all maladies. Is it also security against all feared matters?"The Imam (`a) answered, "Yes, it is. Whoever would like this clay to secure him against all fears, may hold a rosary made of that clay in his hand and repeat the following supplicatory prayer three times:
Grave dust use

segments.arabic: اصْبَحْتُ ٱللَّهُمَّ مُعْتَصِماً بِذِمَامِكَ وَجِوَارِكَ ٱلْمَنِيعِ
segments.transliteration: asbahtu allahumma muʿtasiman bidhimamika wa jiwarika almaniʿi

translation.en: O Allah, I have begun this morning([1]) seeking refuge with Your invulnerable security and vicinity

segments.transliteration: alladhi la yutawalu wa la yuhawalu

translation.en: that is neither touched nor caught

segments.transliteration: min sharri kulli ghashimin wa tariqin

translation.en: against the evil of all oppressive and domineering ones

segments.arabic: مِنْ سَائِرِ مَنْ خَلَقْتَ وَمَا خَلَقْتَ
segments.transliteration: min sa'iri man khalaqta wa ma khalaqta

translation.en: among all Your animate and inanimate creatures
both the silent and the speaking,
being in protection against all terrifying things,
being in the complete and immunizing garb,

segments.transliteration: wa hiya wala'u ahli bayti nabiyyika

translation.en: which is my loyalty to the Household of Your Prophet

segments.transliteration: muhammadin salla allahu ʿlayhi wa alihi

translation.en: Muhammad, may Allah bless him and his Household,

segments.arabic: مُحْتَجِزاً مِنْ كُلِّ قَاصِدٍ لِي إِلَىٰ اذِيَّةٍ
segments.transliteration: muhtajizan min kulli qasidin li ila adhiyyatin

translation.en: veiling myself against all those who intend harm to me
behind an impervious wall,
which is my sincerity in the profession of their (Divinely commissioned) right (of leadership)
and my adherence to the Rope of all of them,

segments.transliteration: muqinan anna alhaqqa lahum wa maʿahum

translation.en: and bearing with certainty that the truth is theirs, with them,

segments.transliteration: wa minhum wa fihim wa bihim

translation.en: from them, in them, and amid them.
I thus accede to those whom they accept,
provoke the animosity of those whom they antagonize,
and depart those whom they depart.
So, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and his Household
and, O Allah, protect me, in the names of them,

segments.arabic: مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ مَا اتَّقيهِ يَا عَظِيمُ
segments.transliteration: min sharri kulli ma attaqihi ya ʿazimu

translation.en: against the evil of all that which I fear, O All-great.

segments.arabic: حَجَـزْتُ ٱلاعَادِيَ عَنِّي بِبَدِيعِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلارْضِ
segments.transliteration: hajaztu al-aʿadiya ʿanni bibadiʿi alssamawati wal-ardi

translation.en: I am restraining the enemies against me through the Originator of the heavens and the earth:

segments.transliteration: inna jaʿalna min bayni aydihim saddan

translation.en: "And We have set a bar before them
and a bar behind them,
and (thus) have covered them so that they see not."

segments.arabic: الَّلهُمَّ انِّي اسْالُكَ بِحَقِّ هٰذِهِ ٱلتُّربَةِ ٱلْمُبَارَكَةِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bihaqqi hadhihi altturbati almubarakati

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You in the name of this blessed dust,
in the name of its owner,

segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqi jaddihi wa bihaqqi abihi

translation.en: in the name of his grandfather, in the name of his father,

segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqi ummihi wa bihaqqi akhihi

translation.en: in the name of his mother, in the name of his brother,
and in the name of his immaculate sons
to make it curative of every malady,
security against every fear,
and safeguard against every evil.
O Allah, (please) render this to be liberal sustenance,
advantageous knowledge,

segments.transliteration: wa shifa'an min kulli da'in wa suqmin

translation.en: and curative from all maladies and diseases.

text.en: Signifcance of this Dua

This is a valuable and virtuous supplication narrated from Imam Mahdi (A.S.) and should be recited at times of great sufferings and hardships; this supplication has been named as the 'Supplication of Abaraat'.
Background

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ إِنّي أَسْأَلُكَ يا راحِمَ الْعَبَراتِ، وَيا كاشِفَ الزَّفَراتِ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma innī as'aluka yā rāḥima l-'abarāt, wa yā kāshifa z-zafarāt,

translation.en: O Allāh, I ask You, O Merciful to tears, and O Remover of sighs,

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ الَّذي تَقْشَعُ سَحابَ الْمِحَنِ، وَقَدْ أَمْسَتْ ثِقالاً،
segments.transliteration: Anta l-ladhī taqsha'u saḥāba l-miḥan, wa qad amsat thiqālā,

translation.en: You are the One Who dispels the clouds of tribulations, when they have become heavy,

segments.arabic: وَتَجْلُو ضَبابَ الْفِتَنِ، وَقَدْ سَحَبَتْ أَذْيالاً،
segments.transliteration: wa tajlū ḍabāba l-fitan, wa qad saḥabat adhyālā,

translation.en: and clears the fog of seditions, when they have dragged their tails (spread widely),

segments.arabic: وَتَجْعَلُ زَرْعَها هَشيماً، وَبُنْيانَها هَديماً، وَعِظامَها رَميماً،
segments.transliteration: wa taj'alu zar'ahā hashīman, wa bunyānahā hadīman, wa 'iẓāmahā ramīman,

translation.en: and makes its crops (of tribulation) straw, its structures ruins, and its bones decayed,

segments.transliteration: wa taruddu l-maghlūba ghāliban, wa l-maṭlūba ṭāliban,

translation.en: and returns the vanquished as a victor, and the pursued as a pursuer,

segments.transliteration: wa l-maqhūra qāhiran, wa l-maqdūra 'alayhi qādiran.

translation.en: and the oppressed as an oppressor, and the overpowered as powerful.

segments.arabic: فَكَمْ مِنْ عَبْدٍ ناداكَ رَبِّ إِنّي مَغْلُوبٌ فَانْتَصِرْ،
segments.transliteration: Fakam min 'abdin nādāka rabbi innī maghlūbun fa-ntaṣir,

translation.en: How many a servant called upon You: My Lord, I am vanquished, so grant victory,

segments.arabic: فَفَتَحْتَ لَهُ مِنْ نَصْرِكَ أَبْوابَ السَّماءِ بِماءٍ مُنْهَمِرٍ،
segments.transliteration: fa-fataḥta lahu min naṣrika abwāba s-samā'i bi-mā'in munhamir,

translation.en: so You opened for him, from Your victory, the gates of the heaven with pouring water,

segments.arabic: وَفَجَّرْتَ لَهُ مِنْ عَوْنِكَ عُيُوناً، فَالْتَقَى الْماءُ عَلى أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ،
segments.transliteration: wa fajja'rta lahu min 'awnika 'uyūnan, fa-ltaqā l-mā'u 'alā amrin qad qudir,

translation.en: and You caused springs to gush forth for him from Your aid, so the water met for an affair already decreed,

segments.arabic: وَحَمَلْتَهُ مِنْ كِفايَتِكَ عَلى ذاتِ أَلْواحٍ وَدُسُرٍ.
segments.transliteration: wa ḥamaltahu min kifāyatika 'alā dhāti alwāḥin wa dusur.

translation.en: and You carried him, out of Your sufficiency, upon that of planks and nails (the Ark).

segments.arabic: رَبِّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: Rabbi ṣalli 'alā Muḥammadin wa āli Muḥammad,

translation.en: My Lord, bless Muḥammad and the family of Muḥammad,

segments.arabic: وَافْتَحْ لي مِنْ نَصْرِكَ أَبْوابَ السَّماءِ بِماءٍ مُنْهَمِرٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa-ftaḥ lī min naṣrika abwāba s-samā'i bi-mā'in munhamir,

translation.en: and open for me, from Your victory, the gates of the heaven with pouring water,

segments.arabic: وَفَجِّرْ لي مِنْ عَوْنِكَ عُيُوناً لِيَلْتَقِيَ ماءُ فَرَجي عَلى أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ،
segments.transliteration: wa fajji'r lī min 'awnika 'uyūnan li-yaltaqiya mā'u farajī 'alā amrin qad qudir,

translation.en: and cause springs to gush forth for me from Your aid so the water of my relief may meet for an affair already decreed,

segments.arabic: وَاحْمِلْني يا رَبِّ مِنْ كِفايَتِكَ عَلى ذاتِ أَلْواحٍ وَدُسُرٍ.
segments.transliteration: wa-ḥmilnī yā rabbi min kifāyatika 'alā dhāti alwāḥin wa dusur.

translation.en: and carry me, O Lord, out of Your sufficiency, upon that of planks and nails.

segments.arabic: يا مَنْ إِذا وَلَجَ الْعَبْدُ في لَيْلٍ مِنْ حَيْرَتِهِ يَهيمُ،
segments.transliteration: Yā man idhā walaja l-'abdu fī laylin min ḥīratihi yahīm,

translation.en: O You, when the servant enters a night of his confusion, wandering,

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَجِدْ لَهُ صَريخاً يَصْرُخُهُ مِنْ وَلِيٍّ وَلا حَميمٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa lam yajid lahu ṣarīkhan yaṣrukhuhu min waliyyin wa lā ḥamīm,

translation.en: and finds no helper to call upon, neither a guardian nor a close friend,

segments.arabic: وَجَدَ يا رَبِّ مِنْ مَعُونَتِكَ صَريخاً مُغيثاً،
segments.transliteration: wajada yā rabbi min ma'ūnatika ṣarīkhan mughīthan,

translation.en: he finds, O Lord, from Your aid, a helper who provides relief,

segments.arabic: وَوَلِيّاً يَطْلُبُهُ حَثيثاً، يُنْجيهِ مِنْ ضيقِ أَمْرِهِ وَحَرَجِهِ،
segments.transliteration: wa waliyyan yaṭlubuhu ḥathīthan, yunjīhi min ḍīqi amrihi wa ḥarajihi,

translation.en: and a guardian seeking him quickly, rescuing him from the narrowness and difficulty of his situation,
and revealing to him the signs of his relief.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ فَيا مَنْ قُدْرَتُهُ قاهِرَةٌ، وَآياتُهُ باهِرَةٌ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma fa-yā man qudratuhu qāhirah, wa āyātuhu bāhirah,

translation.en: O Allāh, O You Whose power is overwhelming, and Whose signs are dazzling,
and Whose retaliations are crushing to every tyrant,

segments.arabic: دامِغَةٌ لِكُلِّ كَفُورٍ خَتَّارٍ، صَلِّ يا رَبِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: dāmighatun li-kulli kafūrin khattār, ṣalli yā rabbi 'alā Muḥammadin wa āli Muḥammad,

translation.en: smashing to every ungrateful deceiver, O Lord, bless Muḥammad and the family of Muḥammad,

segments.arabic: وَانْظُرْ إِلَيَّ يا رَبِّ نَظْرَةً مِنْ نَظَراتِكَ رَحيمَةً،
segments.transliteration: wa-nẓur ilayya yā rabbi naẓratan min naẓarātika raḥīmah,

translation.en: and look upon me, O Lord, with a glance from Your merciful glances,

segments.arabic: تَجْلي بِها عَنّي ظُلْمَةً عاكِفَةً مُقيمَةً مِنْ عاهَةٍ

translation.en: by which You clear away from me an abiding, persistent darkness of an affliction,

segments.arabic: جَفَّتْ مِنْهَا الضُّروُعُ، وَتَلِفَتْ مِنْهَا الزُّرُوعُ،
segments.transliteration: jaffat minhā ḍ-ḍurū', wa talifat minhā z-zurū',

translation.en: from which udders have dried up, and crops have perished,

segments.arabic: وَانْهَمَلَتْ مِنْ أَجْلِهَا الدُّمُوعُ، وَاشْتَمَلَ لَها عَلَى الْقُلُوبِ الْيَأْسُ،
segments.transliteration: wa-nhamalat min ajlihā d-dumū', wa-shtamala lahā 'alā l-qulūbi l-ya's,

translation.en: and because of which tears have streamed, and despair has enveloped the hearts,
and for which breaths have collapsed.

segments.arabic: إِلهي فَحِفْظاً حِفْظاً لِغَرائِسَ غَرْسُها بِيَدِ الرَّحْمانِ،
segments.transliteration: Ilāhī fa-ḥifẓan ḥifẓan li-gharā'isa gharsuhā bi-yadi r-raḥmān,

translation.en: My God, so (I beg for) protection, protection for the saplings whose planting is by the hand of the Most Merciful,

segments.arabic: وَشُرْبُها مِنْ ماءِ الْحَيَوانِ، وَنَجاتُها بِدُخُولِ الْجِنانِ،
segments.transliteration: wa shurbuhā min mā'i l-ḥayawān, wa najātuhā bi-dukhūli l-jinān,

translation.en: and whose drink is from the water of life, and whose salvation is by entering the Gardens,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تَكُونَ بِيَدِ الشَّيْطانِ تُحَزُّ، وَبِفَأْسِهِ تُقْطَعُ وَتُجَزُّ.
segments.transliteration: an takūna bi-yadi sh-shayṭāni tuḥazz, wa bi-fa'sihi tuqṭa'u wa tujazz.

translation.en: (from) being cut by the hand of Satan, and chopped and lopped by his axe.

segments.arabic: إِلهي فَمَنْ أَوْلى مِنْكَ بِأَنْ يَكُونَ عَنْ حَريمِكَ دافِعاً،
segments.transliteration: Ilāhī fa-man awlā minka bi-an yakūna 'an ḥarīmika dāfi'an,

translation.en: My God, who is worthier than You to be a defender of Your sanctuary,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ أَجْدَرُ مِنْكَ بِأَنْ يَكُونَ عَنْ حِماكَ حارِساً وَمانِعاً.
segments.transliteration: wa man ajdaru minka bi-an yakūna 'an ḥimāka ḥārisan wa māni'an.

translation.en: and who is more deserving than You to be a guardian and preventer of Your protection?

segments.arabic: إِلهي إِنَّ الْأَمْرَ قَدْ هالَ فَهَوِّنْهُ، وَخَشُنَ فَأَلِنْهُ،
segments.transliteration: Ilāhī inna l-amra qad hāla fa-hawwinh, wa khashuna fa-alin'h,

translation.en: My God, the matter has terrified, so make it easy, and it has become rough, so soften it,

segments.arabic: وَ إِنَّ الْقُلُوبَ كاعَتْ فَطَمِّنْها، وَالنُّفُوسَ ارْتاعَتْ فَسَكِّنْها.
segments.transliteration: wa inna l-qulūba kā'at fa-ṭamminhā, wa n-nufūsa rtā'at fa-sakkinhā.

translation.en: and the hearts have become weak, so reassure them, and the souls have been terrified, so calm them.
My God, my God, recover feet that have slipped,

segments.transliteration: wa afkāran fī mahāmati l-ḥīrati ḍallat,

translation.en: and thoughts that have strayed in the wilderness of confusion,

segments.arabic: بِأَنْ رَأَتْ جَبْرَكَ عَلى كَسيرِها، وَ إِطْلاقَكَ لِأَسيرِها،
segments.transliteration: bi-an ra'at jabraka 'alā kasīrihā, wa iṭlāqaka li-asīrihā,

translation.en: by them seeing Your mending of its brokenness, and Your release of its captive,

segments.arabic: وَ إِجارَتَكَ لِمُسْتَجيرِها أَجْحَفَ الضُّرُّ بِالْمَضْرُورِ،
segments.transliteration: wa ijārataka li-mustajīrihā ajḥafa ḍ-ḍurru bi-l-maḍrūr,

translation.en: and Your granting of protection to its seeker of refuge, for the harm has been severe upon the afflicted,

segments.transliteration: wa labba dā'īhi bi-l-wayli wa th-thubūr.

translation.en: and his caller has responded with woe and destruction.

segments.arabic: فَهَلْ يَحْسُنُ مِنْ عَدْلِكَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْ تَدَعَهُ فَريسَةَ الْبَلاءِ وَهُوَ لَكَ راجٍ،
segments.transliteration: Fa-hal yaḥsunu min 'adlika yā mawlāya an tada'ahu farīsata l-balā'i wa huwa laka rāj,

translation.en: Does it befit Your justice, O my Master, that You leave him a prey to tribulation while he is hopeful in You,

segments.arabic: أَمْ هَلْ يَجْمُلُ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ أَنْ يَخُوضَ لُجَّةَ الْغَمَّاءِ وَهُوَ إِلَيْكَ لاجٍ.
segments.transliteration: am hal yajmulu min faḍlika an yakhūḍa lujjati l-ghammā'i wa huwa ilayka lāj.

translation.en: or does it befit Your favor that he plunges into the deep sea of grief while he is seeking refuge with You?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ لَئِنْ كُنْتُ لَا أَشُقُّ عَلَى نَفْسِي فِي التُّقَى،
segments.transliteration: Mawlāya la-in kuntu lā ashuqqu 'alā nafsī fī t-tuqā,

translation.en: My Master, if I do not exert myself in piety,

segments.arabic: وَلَا أَبْلُغُ فِي حَمْلِ أَعْبَاءِ الطَّاعَةِ مَبْلَغَ الرِّضَى،
segments.transliteration: wa lā ablughu fī ḥamli a'bā'i ṭ-ṭā'ati mablagha r-riḍā,

translation.en: nor reach the level of satisfaction in bearing the burdens of obedience,

segments.arabic: وَلَا أَنْتَظِمُ فِي سِلْكِ قَوْمٍ رَفَضُوا الدُّنْيَا
segments.transliteration: wa lā antaẓimu fī silki qawmin rafaḍū d-dunyā,

translation.en: nor join the ranks of a people who rejected the world,

segments.arabic: فَهُمْ خُمْصُ الْبُطُونِ مِنَ الطَّوَى، ذُبْلُ الشِّفَاهِ مِنَ الظَّمَاءِ،
segments.transliteration: fa-hum khumṣu l-buṭūni mina ṭ-ṭawā, dhublu sh-shifāhi mina ẓ-ẓamā',

translation.en: so their bellies are empty from hunger, their lips withered from thirst,
and their eyes dim from weeping,

segments.arabic: بَلْ أَتَيْتُكَ بِضَعْفٍ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ، وَظَهْرٍ ثَقِيلٍ بِالْخَطَايَا وَالزَّلَلِ،
segments.transliteration: bal ataytuka bi-ḍa'fin mina l-'amal, wa ẓahrin thaqīlin bi-l-khaṭāyā wa z-zalal,

translation.en: but rather I came to You with weak deeds, and a back heavy with sins and errors,

segments.arabic: وَنَفْسٍ لِلرَّاحَةِ مُعْتَادَةٍ، وَلِدَوَاعِي الشَّهْوَةِ مُنْقَادَةٍ.
segments.transliteration: wa nafsin li-r-rāḥati mu'tādah, wa li-dawā'ī sh-shahwati munqādah.

translation.en: and a soul accustomed to comfort, and compliant to the calls of desire.

segments.arabic: أَمَا يَكْفِينِي يَا رَبِّ وَسِيلَةً إِلَيْكَ،
segments.transliteration: A-mā yakfīnī yā rabbi wasīlatan ilayka,

translation.en: Does it not suffice me, O Lord, as a means to You,

segments.arabic: وَذَرِيعَةً لَدَيْكَ، أَنَّنِي لِأَوْلِيَاءِ دِينِكَ مُوَالٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa dharī'atan ladayk, a-nnanī li-awliyā'i dīnika muwālin,

translation.en: and an intercession before You, that I am loyal to the friends of Your religion,

segments.arabic: وَفِي مَحَبَّتِهِمْ مُغَالٍ، وَلِجِلْبَابِ الْبَلَاءِ فِيهِمْ لَابِسٌ،
segments.transliteration: wa fī maḥabbatihim mughālin, wa li-jilbābi l-balā'i fīhim lābis,

translation.en: and excessive in their love, and wearing the garment of affliction for their sake,

segments.transliteration: wa li-kitābi taḥammuli l-'anā'i bihim dāris?

translation.en: and studying the script of enduring hardship because of them?

segments.arabic: أَمَا يَكْفِينِي أَنْ أَرُوحَ فِيهِمْ مَظْلُوماً، وَأَغْدُوَ مَكْظُوماً،
segments.transliteration: A-mā yakfīnī an arūḥa fīhim maẓlūman, wa aghdū makẓūman,
