translation.en: Does it not suffice me that I leave among them as one wronged, and return choked with grief,

segments.arabic: وَأَقْضِيَ بَعْدَ هُمُومٍ هُمُوماً، وَبَعْدَ وُجُومٍ وُجُوماً،
segments.transliteration: wa aqḍiya ba'da humūmin humūman, wa ba'da wujūmin wujūman,

translation.en: and spend after worries, (more) worries, and after silent grief, (more) silent grief?

segments.arabic: أَمَا عِنْدَكَ يَا مَوْلَايَ بِهَذِهِ حُرْمَةٌ لَا تُضَيَّعُ،
segments.transliteration: A-mā 'indaka yā mawlāya bi-hādhīhi ḥurmatun lā tuḍayya',

translation.en: Is there not with You, O my Master, by this, a sanctity that is not neglected,

segments.arabic: وَذِمَّةٌ بِأَدْنَاهَا تُقْتَنَعُ، فَلِمَ لَا تَمْنَعُنِي يَا رَبِّ وَهَا أَنَا ذَا غَرِيقٌ،
segments.transliteration: wa dhimmatun bi-adnāhā tuqtana', fa-li-ma lā tamna'unī yā rabbi wa hā anā dhā gharīq,

translation.en: and a covenant that is satisfied with its least? So why do You not prevent (save) me, O Lord, while here I am drowning,

segments.arabic: وَتَدَعُنِي هَكَذَا وَأَنَا بِنَارِ عَدُوِّكَ حَرِيقٌ.
segments.transliteration: wa tada'unī hākadhā wa anā bi-nāri 'aduwwika ḥarīq?

translation.en: and leave me thus while I am burning in the fire of Your enemy?
My Master, do You make Your friends as prey for Your enemies,

segments.arabic: وَلِمَكْرِهِمْ مَصَائِدَ، وَتُقَلِّدُهُمْ مِنْ خَسْفِهِمْ قَلَائِدَ،
segments.transliteration: wa li-makrihim maṣā'id, wa tuqalliduhum min khasfihim qalā'id,

translation.en: and snares for their deceit, and place around them necklaces of their humiliation,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ مَالِكُ نُفُوسِهِمْ، أَنْ لَوْ قَبَضْتَهَا جَمَدُوا،
segments.transliteration: wa anta māliku nufūsihim, an law qabaḍtahā jamadū,

translation.en: while You are the Owner of their souls, that if You seized them they would freeze,

segments.arabic: وَفِي قَبْضَتِكَ مَوَادُّ أَنْفَاسِهِمْ، أَنْ لَوْ قَطَعْتَهَا خَمَدُوا،
segments.transliteration: wa fī qabḍatika mawāddu anfāsihim, an law qaṭa'tahā khamadū,

translation.en: and in Your grasp are the means of their breaths, that if You cut them off they would be extinguished?

segments.arabic: فَمَا يَمْنَعُكَ يَا رَبِّ أَنْ تَكُفَّ بَأْسَهُمْ،
segments.transliteration: Fa-mā yamna'uka yā rabbi an takuffa ba'sahum,

translation.en: So what prevents You, O Lord, from restraining their might,
and taking away from them the cloak of Your protection,

segments.arabic: وَتُعَرِّيَهُمْ مِنْ سَلَامَةٍ بِهَا فِي أَرْضِكَ يَسْرَحُونَ،
segments.transliteration: wa tu'arrīyahum min salāmatin bi-hā fī arḍika yasraḥūn,

translation.en: and stripping them of the safety with which they roam freely in Your land,

segments.arabic: وَفِي مَيْدَانِ الْبَغْيِ عَلَى عِبَادِكَ يَمْرَحُونَ.

translation.en: and they revel in the field of transgression against Your servants?

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma ṣalli 'alā Muḥammadin wa āli Muḥammad,

translation.en: O Allāh, bless Muḥammad and the family of Muḥammad,

segments.transliteration: wa adriknī wa lammā yudriknī l-gharaq,

translation.en: and reach me before drowning overtakes me,

segments.transliteration: wa tadāraknī wa lammā ghayyaba shamsiya sh-shafaq,

translation.en: and retrieve me before twilight hides my sun.

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي كَمْ مِنْ خَائِفٍ الْتَجَأَ إِلَى سُلْطَانٍ
segments.transliteration: Ilāhī kam min khā'ifin iltaja'a ilā sulṭān,

translation.en: My God, how many a fearful one sought refuge with a ruler,
and returned from him protected with security and safety,

segments.arabic: أَفَأَقْصُدُ يَا رَبِّ أَعْظَمَ مِنْ سُلْطَانِكَ سُلْطَاناً،
segments.transliteration: a-fa-aqṣudu yā rabbi a'ẓama min sulṭānika sulṭānan,

translation.en: Do I then seek, O Lord, a ruler greater than Your rulership,
or a kindness broader than Your kindness,
or a power greater than Your capability,
or a victory more noble than Your victory?

segments.arabic: مَا عُذْرِي يَا إِلَهِي إِذَا حَرَمْتَ مِنْ حُسْنِ الْكَرَامَةِ نَائِلَكَ،
segments.transliteration: Mā 'udhrī yā ilāhī idhā ḥaramtu min ḥusni l-karāmati nā'ilak,

translation.en: What is my excuse, O my God, if I am deprived of Your bounty of noble generosity,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ الَّذِي لَا تُخَيِّبُ آمِلَكَ وَلَا تَرُدُّ سَائِلَكَ.
segments.transliteration: wa anta l-ladhī lā tukhayyibu āmilak, wa lā taruddu sā'ilak.

translation.en: while You are the One Who does not disappoint Your hopeful one and does not reject Your beggar?

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي إِلَهِي أَيْنَ أَيْنَ كِفَايَتُكَ الَّتِي هِيَ نُصْرَةُ الْمُسْتَضْعَفِينَ مِنَ الْأَنَامِ،
segments.transliteration: Ilāhī ilāhī ayna ayna kifāyatuka l-latī hiya nuṣratu l-mustaḍ'afīna mina l-anām,

translation.en: My God, my God, where, where is Your sufficiency which is the help of the oppressed among mankind,

segments.arabic: وَأَيْنَ أَيْنَ عِنَايَتُكَ الَّتِي هِيَ جُنَّةُ الْمُسْتَهْدَفِينَ بِجَوْرِ الْأَيَّامِ،
segments.transliteration: wa ayna ayna 'ināyatuka l-latī hiya junnatu l-mustahdafīna bi-jawri l-ayyām,

translation.en: and where, where is Your care which is the shield of those targeted by the injustice of the days?

segments.arabic: إِلَيَّ إِلَيَّ بِهَا يَا رَبِّ نَجِّنِي مِنَ الْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ،
segments.transliteration: Ilayya ilayya bi-hā yā rabbi najjinī mina l-qawmi ẓ-ẓālimīn,

translation.en: Towards me, towards me with it! O Lord, save me from the wrongdoing people,

segments.arabic: إِنِّي مَسَّنِيَ الضُّرُّ وَأَنْتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ.
segments.transliteration: innī massaniya ḍ-ḍurru wa anta arḥamu r-rāḥimīn.

translation.en: Indeed, affliction has touched me, and You are the Most Merciful of the merciful.

segments.arabic: مَوْلَايَ تَرَى تَحَيُّرِي فِي أَمْرِي، وَتَقَلُّبِي فِي ضُرِّي،
segments.transliteration: Mawlāya tarā taḥayyuṛī fī amrī, wa taqallubī fī ḍurrī,

translation.en: My Master, You see my confusion in my affair, and my turning over in my distress,

segments.arabic: وَانْطِوَايَ عَلَى حُرْقَةِ قَلْبِي، وَحَرَارَةِ صَدْرِي،
segments.transliteration: wa nṭiwāya 'alā ḥurqati qalbī, wa ḥarārati ṣadrī,

translation.en: and my concealing of the burning of my heart, and the heat of my chest,

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ يَا رَبِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: fa-ṣalli yā rabbi 'alā Muḥammadin wa āli Muḥammad,

translation.en: so bless, O Lord, Muḥammad and the family of Muḥammad,

segments.arabic: وَجُدْ لِي يَا رَبِّ بِمَا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ فَرَجاً وَمَخْرَجاً،
segments.transliteration: wa jud lī yā rabbi bi-mā anta ahluhu farajan wa makhrajan,

translation.en: and be generous to me, O Lord, with what You are worthy of: relief and a way out,

segments.arabic: وَيَسِّرْ لِي يَا رَبِّ نَحْوَ الْبُشْرَى مَنْهَجاً.
segments.transliteration: wa yassir lī yā rabbi naḥwa l-bushrā manhajan.

translation.en: and facilitate for me, O Lord, a path towards good tidings.

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ يَا رَبِّ مَنْ يَنْصِبُ لِيَ الْحِبَالَةَ
segments.transliteration: Wa j'al yā rabbi man yanṣibu liya l-ḥibālah,

translation.en: And make, O Lord, the one who sets the trap for me,
to strike me down with it, felled by what he plotted,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ يَحْفِرُ لِيَ الْبِئْرَ لِيُوقِعَنِي فِيهَا
segments.transliteration: wa man yaḥfiru liya l-bi'ra li-yūqi'anī fīhā,

translation.en: and the one who digs the pit for me to make me fall into it,

segments.arabic: وَاقِعاً فِيمَا حَفَرَ، وَاصْرِفِ اللَّهُمَّ عَنِّي مِنْ شَرِّهِ
segments.transliteration: wāqi'an fī-mā ḥafar, wa-ṣrifi llāhumma 'annī min sharrih,

translation.en: fallen into what he dug, and turn away, O Allāh, from me his evil,

segments.transliteration: wa makrihi wa fasādihi wa ḍurrih,

translation.en: and his deceit, his corruption, and his harm,
what You turn away from the God-fearing people,

segments.arabic: وَعَمَّنْ قَادَ نَفْسَهُ لِدِينِ الدَّيَّانِ، وَمُنَادٍ يُنَادِي لِلْإِيمَانِ.
segments.transliteration: wa 'amman qāda nafsahu li-dīni d-dayyān, wa munādin yunādī li-l-īmān.

translation.en: and from one who guided his soul to the religion of the Judge, and a caller who calls to faith.
My God, Your servant, Your servant! Answer his plea,
Your weak one, Your weak one! Relieve his distress,

segments.arabic: فَقَدِ انْقَطَعَ بِهِ كُلُّ حَبْلٍ إِلَّا حَبْلَكَ،
segments.transliteration: fa-qadi nqaṭa'a bihi kullu ḥablin illā ḥablak,

translation.en: for every rope has been cut off for him except Your rope,

segments.arabic: وَتَقَلَّبَ عَنْهُ كُلُّ ظِلٍّ إِلَّا ظِلَّكَ.
segments.transliteration: wa taqallaba 'anhu kullu ẓillin illā ẓillak.

translation.en: and every shade has turned away from him except Your shade.

segments.arabic: مَوْلَايَ دَعْوَتِي هَذِهِ إِنْ رَدَدْتَهَا أَيْنَ تُصَادِفُ مَوْضِعَ الْإِجَابَةِ،
segments.transliteration: Mawlāya da'watī hādhihi in radadtahā ayna tuṣādifu mawḍi'a l-ijābah,

translation.en: My Master, this plea of mine, if You reject it, where will it find the place of acceptance,

segments.arabic: وَمَخْيَلَتِي هَذِهِ إِنْ كَذَّبْتَهَا أَيْنَ تُلَاقِي مَوْضِعَ الْإِعَانَةِ،
segments.transliteration: wa makhīlatī hādhihi in kadhdhabtahā ayna tulāqī mawḍi'a l-i'ānah,

translation.en: and this hope of mine, if You belie it, where will it meet the place of aid,

segments.arabic: فَلَا تَرُدَّ عَنْ بَابِكَ مَنْ لَا يَعْلَمُ غَيْرَهُ بَاباً،
segments.transliteration: fa-lā tarudda 'an bābika man lā ya'lamu ghayrahu bābā,

translation.en: so do not turn away from Your door one who knows no door but it,

segments.arabic: وَلَا تَمْنَعُ دُونَ جَنَابِكَ مَنْ لَا يَعْلَمُ سِوَاهُ جَنَاباً.
segments.transliteration: wa lā tamna'u dūna janābika man lā ya'lamu siwāhu janābā.

translation.en: and do not prevent from Your sanctuary one who knows no sanctuary other than it.

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي إِنَّ وَجْهاً إِلَيْكَ فِي رَغْبَتِهِ تَوَجَّهَ خَلِيقٌ بِأَنْ تُجِيبَهُ،
segments.transliteration: Ilāhī inna wajhan ilayka fī raghbatihi tawajjaha khalīqun bi-an tujībahu,

translation.en: My God, a face that has turned to You in its desire is worthy that You answer it,

segments.arabic: وَإِنَّ جَبِيناً لَكَ بِابْتِهَالِهِ سَجَدَ حَقِيقٌ أَنْ يَبْلُغَ مَا قَصَدَ،
segments.transliteration: wa inna jabīnan laka bi-btihālihi sajada ḥaqīqun an yablugha mā qaṣad,

translation.en: and a forehead that prostrated to You in its supplication is deserving of reaching what it sought,

segments.arabic: وَإِنَّ خَدّاً لَدَيْكَ بِمَسْئَلَتِهِ تَعَفَّرَ جَدِيرٌ أَنْ يَفُوزَ بِمُرَادِهِ وَيَظْفَرَ.
segments.transliteration: wa inna khaddan ladayka bi-mas'alatihi ta'affara jadīrun an yafūza bi-murādihi wa yaẓfar.

translation.en: and a cheek that has smeared itself with dust before You in its request is deserving of attaining its wish and succeeding.

segments.arabic: وَهَا أَنَا ذَا يَا إِلَهِي قَدْ تَرَى تَعْفِيرَ خَدِّي،
segments.transliteration: Wa hā anā dhā yā ilāhī qad tarā ta'fīra khaddī,

translation.en: And here I am, O my God, You certainly see the smearing of my cheek,

segments.transliteration: wa jtihādī fī mas'alatika wa jiddī,

translation.en: and my effort and earnestness in my request to You,

segments.arabic: فَتَلَقَّ يَا رَبِّ رَغَبَاتِي بِرَحْمَتِكَ قَبُولاً،
segments.transliteration: fa-talaqqa yā rabbi raghabātī bi-raḥmatika qabūlā,

translation.en: so receive, O Lord, my desires with Your mercy as acceptance,

segments.transliteration: wa sahhil ilā ṭalibātī bi-ra'fatika wuṣūlā,

translation.en: and make easy to my requests, with Your compassion, attainment,

segments.arabic: وَذَلِّلْ قُطُوفَ ثَمَرَةِ إِجَابَتِكَ لِي تَذْلِيلاً.
segments.transliteration: wa dhallil quṭūfa thammarati ijābatika lī tadhīlā.

translation.en: and make the bunches of the fruit of Your answer submissive for me, submission.

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي فَإِذَا قَامَ ذُو حَاجَةٍ بِحَاجَتِهِ شَفِيعاً،
segments.transliteration: Ilāhī fa-idhā qāma dhū ḥājatin bi-ḥājatihi shafī'ā,

translation.en: My God, if a person in need stands with his need as an intercessor,

segments.arabic: فَوَجَدْتَهُ مُمْتَنِعَ النَّجَاحِ سَهْلَ الْقِيَادِ مُطِيعاً،
segments.transliteration: fa-wajadtahu mumtani'a n-najāḥi sahla l-qiyādi muṭī'ā,

translation.en: and you found success difficult to attain, (but) easily led and obedient,
then I intercede to You by Your nobility,

segments.arabic: وَالصَّفْوَةِ مِنْ أَنَامِكَ الَّذِينَ أَنْشَأْتَ لَهُمْ مَا تُظِلُّ وَتُقِلُّ،
segments.transliteration: wa ṣ-ṣafwati min anāmika l-ladhīna ansha'ta lahum mā tuẓillu wa tuqill,

translation.en: and by the elite of Your creatures for whom You originated what overshadows and what carries,

segments.transliteration: wa bara'ta mā yadiqqu wa yajill.

translation.en: and You created what is small and what is great.

segments.arabic: أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ بِأَوَّلِ مَنْ تَوَّجْتَهُ تَاجَ الْجَلَالَةِ،
segments.transliteration: Atqarrabu ilayka bi-awwali man tawwaqtahu tāja l-jalālah,

translation.en: I draw near to You by the first one You crowned with the crown of majesty,

segments.arabic: وَأَحْلَلْتَهُ مِنَ الْفِطْرَةِ الرُّوحَانِيَّةِ مَحَلَّ السُّلالَةِ،
segments.transliteration: wa aḥlaltahu mina l-fiṭrati r-rūḥāniyyati maḥalla s-sulālah,

translation.en: and whom You placed, from the spiritual creation, in the position of the essence,

segments.arabic: حُجَّتِكَ فِي خَلْقِكَ، وَأَمِينِكَ عَلَى عِبَادِكَ،

translation.en: Your proof among Your creation, and Your trustee over Your servants,

segments.arabic: مُحَمَّدٍ رَسُولِكَ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ.
segments.transliteration: Muḥammadin rasūlik ṣallā llāhu 'alayhi wa ālih.

translation.en: Muḥammad Your Messenger, may God bless him and his family.

segments.arabic: وَبِمَنْ جَعَلْتَهُ لِنُورِهِ مَغْرِباً، وَعَنْ مَكْنُونِ سِرِّهِ مُعْرِباً،
segments.transliteration: Wa bi-man ja'altahu li-nūrihi maghribā, wa 'an maknūni sirrihi mu'ribā,

translation.en: And by the one You made a setting-place for his light, and an expression for his hidden secret,
the Master of the successors and the leader of the pious,

segments.transliteration: ya'sūbi d-dīn, wa qā'idi l-ghurri l-muḥajjalīn,

translation.en: the chief of the religion, and the leader of the bright-faced and luminous-limbed,

segments.arabic: وَأَبِي الْأَئِمَّةِ الرَّاشِدِينَ عَلِيٍّ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ.
segments.transliteration: wa abī l-a'immati r-rāshidīn 'Aliyyin amīri l-mu'minīn 'alayhi s-salām.

translation.en: and the father of the rightly-guided Imams, 'Alī, the Commander of the Faithful, peace be upon him.

segments.arabic: وَأَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ بِخِيَرَةِ الْأَخْيَارِ، وَأُمِّ الْأَنْوَارِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa ataqarrabu ilayka bi-khīrati l-akhyār, wa ummi l-anwār,

translation.en: And I draw near to You by the choice of the chosen ones, and the mother of the lights,

segments.arabic: الْإِنْسِيَّةِ الْحَوْرَاءِ، الْبَتُولِ الْعَذْرَاءِ، فَاطِمَةَ الزَّهْرَاءِ،
segments.transliteration: al-insiyyati l-ḥawrā', al-batūli l-'adhrā', Fāṭimata z-zahrā',

translation.en: the human Hūri, the Batūl, Fāṭimah al-Zahrā',

segments.arabic: وَبِقُرَّتَيْ عَيْنِ الرَّسُولِ، وَثَمَرَتَيْ فُؤَادِ الْبَتُولِ،
segments.transliteration: wa bi-qurratay 'ayni r-rasūl, wa thammaratay fu'ādi l-batūl,

translation.en: and by the two joys of the Messenger's eyes, and the two fruits of the Batūl's heart,

segments.arabic: السَّيِّدَيْنِ الْإِمَامَيْنِ أَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ الْحَسَنِ وَأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْحُسَيْنِ،
segments.transliteration: as-sayyidayni l-imāmayni abī Muḥammadin al-Ḥasani wa abī 'Abdillāhi l-Ḥusayn,

translation.en: the two Masters, the two Imams, Abū Muḥammad al-Ḥasan and Abū 'Abdillāh al-Ḥusayn,

segments.transliteration: wa bi-s-sajjādi zayni l-'ibād, dhī th-thafanāt,

translation.en: and by the oft-prostrating, the adornment of the worshippers, the possessor of calluses,
the monk of the Arabs, 'Alī ibn al-Ḥusayn.

segments.transliteration: Wa bi-l-imāmi l-'ālim, wa s-sayyidi l-ḥākim,

translation.en: And by the knowledgeable Imam, and the governing Master,
the shining star, and the dazzling moon,
my Master Muḥammad ibn 'Alī al-Bāqir.
And by the truthful Imam, the clarifier of difficulties,

segments.arabic: مُظْهِرِ الْحَقَائِقِ، الْمُفْحِمِ بِحُجَّتِهِ كُلَّ نَاطِقٍ،
segments.transliteration: muẓhiri l-ḥaqā'iq, al-mufḥimi bi-ḥujjatihi kulla nāṭiq,

translation.en: the manifestor of truths, the one who silences every speaker with his proof,

segments.arabic: مُخْرِسِ أَلْسِنَةِ أَهْلِ الْجِدَالِ، مَسَاكِنِ الشَّقَاشِقِ،
segments.transliteration: mukhrisi alsinati ahli l-jidāl, masākini sh-shaqāshiq,

translation.en: the one who mutes the tongues of the people of dispute, the calmer of eloquent speakers,
my Master Ja'far ibn Muḥammad aṣ-Ṣādiq.

segments.transliteration: Wa bi-l-imāmi t-taqiyy wa l-mukhliṣi ṣ-ṣafiyy,

translation.en: And by the pious Imam, and the sincere, pure one,

segments.arabic: وَالنُّورِ الْأَحْمَدِيِّ، النُّورِ الْأَنْوَرِ، وَالضِّيَاءِ الْأَزْهَرِ،
segments.transliteration: wa n-nūri l-aḥmadiyy, an-nūri l-anwar, wa ḍ-ḍiyā'i l-azhar,

translation.en: and the Aḥmadī light, the most luminous light, and the most radiant glow,
my Master Mūsā ibn Ja'far.

segments.transliteration: Wa bi-l-imāmi l-murtaḍā, wa s-sayfi l-muntaḍā,

translation.en: And by the favored Imam, and the drawn sword,

segments.arabic: وَالرَّاضِي بِالْقَضَا، مَوْلَايَ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُوسَى الرِّضَا.
segments.transliteration: wa r-rāḍī bi-l-qaḍā, Mawlāya 'Aliyyi bni Mūsā r-Riḍā.

translation.en: and the one contented with the divine decree, my Master 'Alī ibn Mūsā ar-Riḍā.

segments.transliteration: Wa bi-l-imāmi l-amjad, wa l-bābi l-aqṣad,

translation.en: And by the most glorious Imam, and the most direct gate,

segments.transliteration: wa ṭ-ṭarīqi l-arshad, wa l-'ālimi l-mu'ayyad,

translation.en: and the most guided path, and the supported scholar,

segments.arabic: يَنْبُوعِ الْحِكَمِ، وَمِصْبَاحِ الظُّلَمِ، سَيِّدِ الْعَرَبِ وَالْعَجَمِ،
segments.transliteration: yanbū'i l-ḥikam, wa miṣbāḥi ẓ-ẓulam, sayyidi l-'arabi wa l-'ajam,

translation.en: the spring of wisdom, and the lamp of darkness, the master of the Arabs and non-Arabs,

segments.arabic: الْهَادِي إِلَى الرَّشَادِ، وَالْمُوَفَّقِ بِالتَّأْيِيدِ وَالسَّدَادِ،
segments.transliteration: al-hādī ilā r-rashād, wa l-muwaffaqi bi-t-ta'yīdi wa s-sadād,

translation.en: the guide to the right path, and the one granted success with support and correctness,
my Master Muḥammad ibn 'Alī al-Jawād.

segments.arabic: وَبِالْإِمَامِ مِنْحَةِ الْجَبَّارِ، وَوَالِدِ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْأَطْهَارِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa bi-l-imāmi minḥati l-jabbār, wa wālidi l-a'immati l-aṭhār,

translation.en: And by the Imam, the gift of the Almighty, and the father of the pure Imams,

segments.arabic: عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْمَوْلُودِ بِالْعَسْكَرِ، الَّذِي حَذَّرَ بِمَوَاعِظِهِ وَأَنْذَرَ.
segments.transliteration: 'Aliyyi bni Muḥammadin al-mawlūdi bi-l-'Askar, al-ladhī ḥadhdhara bi-mawā'iẓihi wa anḍhar.

translation.en: 'Alī ibn Muḥammad, born in al-'Askar, the one who warned and cautioned with his sermons.

segments.arabic: وَبِالْإِمَامِ الْمُنَزَّهِ عَنِ الْمَآثِمِ، الْمُطَهَّرِ مِنَ الْمَظَالِمِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa bi-l-imāmi l-munazzahi 'ani l-ma'āthim, al-muṭahhari mina l-maẓālim,

translation.en: And by the Imam purified from sins, the one cleansed from injustices,

segments.arabic: الْحِبْرِ الْعَالِمِ، رَبِيعِ الْأَنَامِ، وَبَدْرِ الظَّلَامِ،
segments.transliteration: al-ḥibri l-'ālim, rabī'i l-anām, wa badri ẓ-ẓalām,

translation.en: the learned scholar, the spring of mankind, and the full moon of darkness,
the pious, pure, immaculate, and righteous,

segments.arabic: مَوْلَايَ أَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الْعَسْكَرِيِّ.
segments.transliteration: Mawlāya Abī Muḥammadin al-Ḥasani bni 'Aliyyi l-'Askarī.

translation.en: my Master Abū Muḥammad al-Ḥasan ibn 'Alī al-'Askarī.
And I draw near to You by the protector, the knowing one,
whom You made to be over the treasures of the earth (Yūsuf - analogy),

segments.arabic: وَالْأَبِ الرَّحِيمِ الَّذِي مَلَّكْتَهُ أَزِمَّةَ الْبَسْطِ وَالْقَبْضِ،
segments.transliteration: wa l-abi r-raḥīmi l-ladhī mallaktahu azimmata l-basṭi wa l-qabḍ,

translation.en: and the merciful father whom You made master of the reins of expansion and contraction,

segments.arabic: صَاحِبِ النَّقِيبَةِ الْمَيْمُونَةِ، وَقَاصِفِ الشَّجَرَةِ الْمَلْعُونَةِ،
segments.transliteration: ṣāḥibi n-naqībati l-maymūnah, wa qāṣifi sh-shajarati l-mal'ūnah,

translation.en: the owner of the blessed sign, and the destroyer of the cursed tree (of tyranny),

segments.arabic: مُكَلِّمِ النَّاسِ فِي الْمَهْدِ، وَالدَّالِّ عَلَى مِنْهَاجِ الرُّشْدِ.
segments.transliteration: mukallimi n-nāsi fī l-mahd, wa d-dālli 'alā minhāji r-rushd.

translation.en: the one who spoke to people in the cradle, and the pointer to the path of guidance.

segments.arabic: الْغَائِبِ عَنِ الْأَبْصَارِ، الْحَاضِرِ فِي الْأَمْصَارِ،

translation.en: The one absent from sights, the one present in the cities,

segments.arabic: الْغَائِبِ عَنِ الْعُيُونِ، الْحَاضِرِ فِي الْأَفْكَارِ،

translation.en: the one absent from the eyes, the one present in the thoughts,
the remainder of the chosen ones, the inheritor of Dhū l-Fiqār (the sword of 'Alī),

segments.arabic: الَّذِي يَظْهَرُ فِي بَيْتِ اللَّهِ ذِي الْأَسْتَارِ،
segments.transliteration: al-ladhī yaẓharu fī bayti llāhi dhī l-astār,

translation.en: who will appear in the House of God, the one with curtains,
the knowledgeable, the purified, Muḥammad ibn al-Ḥasan,

segments.arabic: عَلَيْهِمْ أَفْضَلُ التَّحِيَّاتِ وَأَعْظَمُ الْبَرَكَاتِ، وَأَتَمُّ الصَّلَوَاتِ.
segments.transliteration: 'alayhim afḍalu t-taḥiyyāti wa a'ẓamu l-barakāt, wa atammu ṣ-ṣalawāt.

translation.en: upon them be the best of greetings, the greatest blessings, and the most complete prayers.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ فَهَؤُلَاءِ مَعَاقِلِي إِلَيْكَ فِي طَلِبَاتِي وَوَسَائِلِي،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma fa-ha'ulā'i ma'āqilī ilayka fī ṭalibātī wa wasā'ilī,

translation.en: O Allāh, these are my refuges to You in my requests and my means,

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَيْهِمْ صَلَاةً لَا يَعْرِفُ سِوَاكَ مَقَادِيرَهَا،
segments.transliteration: fa-ṣalli 'alayhim ṣalātan lā ya'rifu siwāka maqādīrahā,

translation.en: so bless them with a blessing whose measure none but You knows,

segments.arabic: وَلَا يَبْلُغُ كَثِيرُ هِمَمِ الْخَلَائِقِ صَغِيرَهَا،
segments.transliteration: wa lā yablughu kathīru himami l-khalā'iq ṣaghīrahā,

translation.en: and whose smallest part the abundance of creatures' aspirations cannot reach,

segments.arabic: وَكُنْ لِي بِهِمْ عِنْدَ أَحْسَنِ ظَنِّي،
segments.transliteration: wa kun lī bihim 'inda aḥsani ẓannī,

translation.en: and be for me, by their sake, according to my best expectation,

segments.transliteration: wa ḥaqqiq lī bi-maqādīrika tahyi'ata t-tamannī.

translation.en: and realize for me, through Your decrees, the preparation of my wish.

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي لَا رُكْنَ لِي أَشَدُّ مِنْكَ، فَآوِي إِلَى رُكْنٍ شَدِيدٍ،
segments.transliteration: Ilāhī lā rukna lī ashaddu minka, fa-āwī ilā ruknin shadīd,

translation.en: My God, I have no stronger pillar than You, so that I might take refuge in a firm pillar,

segments.arabic: وَلَا قَوْلَ لِي أَسَدُّ مِنْ دُعَائِكَ، فَأَسْتَظْهِرُكَ بِقَوْلٍ سَدِيدٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa lā qawla lī asaddu min du'ā'ik, fa-astaẓhiruka bi-qawlin sadīd,

translation.en: and I have no word more certain than Your call, so that I might seek support from You with an accurate word,

segments.arabic: وَلَا شَفِيعَ لِي إِلَيْكَ أَوْجَهُ مِنْ هَؤُلَاءِ،
segments.transliteration: wa lā shafī'a lī ilayka awjahu min ha'ulā',

translation.en: and I have no intercessor to You more eminent than these,

segments.arabic: فَآتِيكَ بِشَفِيعٍ وَدِيدٍ، وَقَدْ أَوَيْتُ إِلَيْكَ،
segments.transliteration: fa-ātīka bi-shafī'in wadīd, wa qad awaytu ilayk,

translation.en: so that I might come to You with a beloved intercessor, and I have taken refuge with You,
and I have relied on You in the fulfillment of my needs,

segments.arabic: وَدَعَوْتُكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَ، فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَ،
segments.transliteration: wa da'awtuka kamā amart, fa-stajib lī kamā wa'adt,

translation.en: and I have called upon You as You commanded, so answer me as You promised,

segments.arabic: فَهَلْ بَقِيَ يَا رَبِّ غَيْرَ أَنْ تُجِيبَ وَتَرْحَمَ مِنِّي الْبُكَاءَ وَالنَّحِيبَ.
segments.transliteration: fa-hal baqiya yā rabbi ghayra an tujība wa tarḥama minnī l-bukā'a wa n-naḥīb.

translation.en: So, O Lord, is there anything left except that You answer and have mercy on my weeping and wailing?

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلَهَ سِوَاهُ، يَا مَنْ يُجِيبُ الْمُضْطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ،
segments.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha siwāh, yā man yujību l-muḍṭarra idhā da'āh,

translation.en: O You besides Whom there is no god, O You Who answers the distressed when he calls upon Him,

segments.arabic: يَا كَاشِفَ ضُرِّ أَيُّوبَ، يَا رَاحِمَ عَبْرَةِ يَعْقُوبَ،
segments.transliteration: yā kāshifa ḍurri Ayyūb, yā rāḥima 'abrati Ya'qūb,

translation.en: O Remover of Ayyūb's distress, O Merciful to Ya'qūb's tears,

segments.arabic: إِغْفِرْ لِي وَارْحَمْنِي، وَانْصُرْنِي عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ،
segments.transliteration: ighfir lī wa rḥamnī, wa nṣurnī 'alā l-qawmi l-kāfirīn,

translation.en: forgive me and have mercy on me, and grant me victory over the disbelieving people,

segments.transliteration: wa ftaḥ lī wa anta khayru l-fātiḥīn.

translation.en: and grant me success, for You are the best of those who grant success.

segments.arabic: وَالْطُفْ بِي يَا رَبِّ وَبِجَمِيعِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa lṭuf bī yā rabbi wa bi-jamī'i l-mu'minīna wa l-mu'mināt,

translation.en: And be gentle with me, O Lord, and with all the believing men and women,

segments.arabic: يَا ذَا الْقُوَّةِ الْمَتِينِ، بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ،
segments.transliteration: yā dhā l-quwwati l-matīn, bi-raḥmatika yā arḥama r-rāḥimīn,

translation.en: O Possessor of firm strength, by Your mercy, O Most Merciful of the merciful,

segments.arabic: وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ، وَصَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ النَّبِيِّ وَآلِهِ الطَّاهِرِينَ.
segments.transliteration: wa l-ḥamdu li-llāhi rabbi l-'ālamīn, wa ṣallā llāhu 'alā sayyidinā Muḥammadin an-nabiyyi wa ālihi ṭ-ṭāhirīn.

translation.en: and praise be to God, Lord of the worlds, and may God bless our Master Muḥammad the Prophet and his pure family.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ إِنّي أَسْأَلُكَ يا راحِمَ الْعَبَراتِ ، وَيا كاشِفَ الزَّفَراتِ ، أَنْتَ الَّذي تَقْشَعُ سَحابَ الْمِحَنِ ، وَقَدْ أَمْسَتْ ثِقالاً ، وَتَجْلُو ضَبابَ الْفِتَنِ ، وَقَدْ سَحَبَتْ أَذْيالاً ، وَتَجْعَلُ زَرْعَها هَشيماً ، وَبُنْيانَها هَديماً ، وَعِظامَها رَميماً ، وَتَرُدُّ الْمَغْلُوبَ غالِباً ، وَالْمَطْلُوبَ طالِباً ، وَالْمَقْهُورَ قاهِراً ، وَالْمَقْدُورَ عَلَيْهِ قادِراً .

translation.en: O' Allah, I beseech You, O' He who showers Mercy upon the teardrops, O' He who ends the sorrows of hearts, You are the One who scatters the clouds of sorrows and grief while they become extremely heavy, and you set aside the clouds of temptations while they stretch over the land, and make their group dry and breakable, and demolish its pillars, and disintegrate its bones, and help the dominated ones dominate, and the demanded one as the demander, and the suppressed one as the dominant, and the overpowered one as the Powerful.

segments.arabic: فَكَمْ مِنْ عَبْدٍ ناداكَ رَبِّ إِنّي مَغْلُوبٌ فَانْتَصِرْ ، فَفَتَحْتَ لَهُ مِنْ نَصْرِكَأَبْوابَ السَّماءِ بِماءٍ مُنْهَمِرٍ ، وَفَجَّرْتَ لَهُ مِنْ عَوْنِكَ عُيُوناً ، فَالْتَقَى الْماءُ عَلى أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ ، وَحَمَلْتَهُ مِنْ كِفايَتِكَ عَلى ذاتِ أَلْواحٍ وَدُسُرٍ ،

رَبِّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ، وَافْتَحْ لي مِنْ نَصْرِكَ أَبْوابَ السَّماءِ بِماءٍ مُنْهَمِرٍ ، وَفَجِّرْ لي مِنْ عَوْنِكَ عُيُوناً لِيَلْتَقِيَ ماءُ فَرَجي عَلى أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ ، وَاحْمِلْني يا رَبِّ مِنْ كِفايَتِكَ عَلى ذاتِ أَلْواحٍ وَدُسُرٍ .

translation.en: O' Lord! Bless Mohammad and his holy Progeny, and open the doors of Heaven from Your Help with showering water, and split open from Your support the springs so that the water of relief and peace meets what it has been destined for, and carry me, O' My Lord, with Your Sufficiency, over the object having boards and nails (ships).

segments.arabic: يا مَنْ إِذا وَلَجَ الْعَبْدُ في لَيْلٍ مِنْ حَيْرَتِهِ يَهيمُ ، وَلَمْ يَجِدْ لَهُ صَريخاً يَصْرُخُهُ مِنْ وَلِيٍّ وَلا حَميمٍ، وَجَدَ يا رَبِّ مِنْ مَعُونَتِكَ صَريخاً مُغيثاً، وَوَلِيّاً يَطْلُبُهُ حَثيثاً ، يُنْجيهِ مِنْ ضيقِ أَمْرِهِ وَحَرَجِهِ ، وَيُظْهِرُ لَهُ أَعْلامَ فَرَجِهِ .

translation.en: O' He when his servant becomes confused with astonishment upon the arrival of night, and when he doesn't find a supporter amongst his friend and relatives, O' My Lord, he finds a supporter with Your Help, and a Guardian who helps him quickly, delivering him from the narrowness and entanglements of his affair, and makes the signs of his relief apparent for him.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ فَيا مَنْ قُدْرَتُهُ قاهِرَةٌ، وَآياتُهُ باهِرَةٌ، وَنَقِماتُهُ قاصِمَةٌ لِكُلِّ جَبَّارٍ ، دامِغَةٌ لِكُلِّ كَفُورٍ خَتَّارٍ ، صَلِّ يا رَبِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ، وَانْظُرْ إِلَيَّ يا رَبِّ نَظْرَةً مِنْ نَظَراتِكَ رَحيمَةً ، تَجْلي بِها عَنّي ظُلْمَةً عاكِفَةً مُقيمَةً مِنْ عاهَةٍ جَفَّتْ مِنْهَا الضُّروُعُ ، وَتَلِفَتْ مِنْهَا الزُّرُوعُ ، وَانْهَمَلَتْ مِنْ أَجْلِهَا الدُّمُوعُ ، وَاشْتَمَلَ لَها عَلَى الْقُلُوبِ الْيَأْسُ ، وَخَرَّتْ بِسَبَبِهَا الْأَنْفاسُ .

translation.en: O' Allah! O' He whose Power is Dominant, and Whose Signs are evident, and whose vengeance will destroys all the tyrants, and remove all the deceiving infidels, bless Mohammad and his holy Progeny, and supervise me, O' My Lord, with a gaze of Your Merciful supervision, so that it sets aside the permanent and eternal darkness that had enveloped me, from the calamities which result in the dryness of the chests, and the destructions of cultivations, and result in bloodshed, and the overcoming of heart by hopelessness and distress, and due to which the heartbeats halt.

segments.arabic: إِلهي فَحِفْظاً حِفْظاً لِغَرائِسَ غَرْسُها بِيَدِ الرَّحْمانِ ، وَشُرْبُها مِنْ ماءِ الْحَيَوانِ ، وَنَجاتُها بِدُخُولِ الْجِنانِ ، أَنْ تَكُونَ بِيَدِ الشَّيْطانِ تُحَزُّ ، وَبِفَأْسِهِ تُقْطَعُ وَتُجَزُّ .

translation.en: O' Lord! Protect the trees which have been placed by the divine hands, and have been watered with the reviving water, and which will be delivered by entering heaven, protect it from being demolished by the hands of Satan, and being cut down into pieces by his axe.

segments.arabic: إِلهي فَمَنْ أَوْلى مِنْكَ بِأَنْ يَكُونَ عَنْ حَريمِكَ دافِعاً ، وَمَنْ أَجْدَرُ مِنْكَ بِأَنْ يَكُونَ عَنْ حِماكَ حارِساً وَمانِعاً .

translation.en: O' Lord, who is worthier than You for defending Your Sanctity? And who is more suitable than You to undertake the responsibility of guarding his near and dear ones.

segments.arabic: إِلهي إِنَّ الْأَمْرَ قَدْ هالَ فَهَوِّنْهُ ، وَخَشُنَ فَأَلِنْهُ ، وَ إِنَّ الْقُلُوبَ كاعَتْ فَطَمِّنْها ، وَالنُّفُوسَ ارْتاعَتْ فَسَكِّنْها .

translation.en: O' Allah! The Affair has become difficult, so make it easy; and it has become rigid, thus make it soft; the hearts have become weak and shivering, thus give them confidence; the breaths have become fearful and frightened, thus make them relaxed;

segments.arabic: إِلهي إِلهي تَدارَكْ أَقْداماً زَلَّتْ ، وَأَفْكاراً في مَهامَةِ الْحَيْرَةِ ضَلَّتْ ، بِأَنْ رَأَتْ جَبْرَكَ عَلى كَسيرِها ، وَ إِطْلاقَكَ لِأَسيرِها ، وَ إِجارَتَكَ لِمُسْتَجيرِها أَجْحَفَ الضُّرُّ بِالْمَضْرُورِ ، وَلَبَّى داعيهِ بِالْوَيْلِ وَالثُّبُورِ .

translation.en: O' My Lord! O' My Lord! Help the trembling feet, and help the wandering and lost thoughts, until they witness that You have compensated their defeat; and that You have released their slaves, and have provided shelter to their refugees; as helplessness has harmed the distressed more than his capability, and has responded to its invocator with moaning and wails.

segments.arabic: فَهَلْ يَحْسُنُ مِنْ عَدْلِكَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْ تَدَعَهُ فَريسَةَ الْبَلاءِ وَهُوَ لَكَ راجٍ ، أَمْ هَلْ يَجْمُلُ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ أَنْ يَخُوضَ لُجَّةَ الْغَمَّاءِ وَهُوَ إِلَيْكَ لاجٍ .

translation.en: O' my Master! Is it appropriate for Your Justice to entangle in difficulties those who have hope in You? Or is it appropriate for Your Grace to drown in sorrows and distress those who seek shelter in You?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ لَئِنْ كُنْتُ لا أَشُقُّ عَلى نَفْسي فِي التُّقى ، وَلا أَبْلُغُ في حَمْلِ أَعْباءِ الطَّاعَةِ مَبْلَغَ الرِّضى ، وَلا أَنْتَظِمُ في سِلْكِ قَوْمٍ رَفَضُوا الدُّنْيا فَهُمْ خُمْصُ الْبُطُونِ مِنَ الطَّوى ، ذُبْلُ الشِّفاهِ مِنَ الظَّماءِ ، وَعُمْشُ الْعُيُونِ مِنَ الْبُكاءِ ، بَلْ أَتَيْتُكَ بِضَعْفٍ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ ، وَظَهْرٍ ثَقيلٍ بِالْخَطايا وَالزَّلَلِ ، وَنَفْسٍ لِلرَّاحَةِ مُعْتادَةٍ ، وَلِدَواعِي الشَّهْوَةِ مُنْقادَةٍ .

translation.en: O' My Master! Although I haven't suffered hardships for observing Piety, and haven't obeyed you the way it would satisfy You, and haven't joined the group which has released the world and resultantly their stomachs are facing hunger for You, and their lips have dried, and their eyes have swollen with weeping; in fact I came to You with weakness of deeds and religion, and my back has heaved from the burden of sins and mistakes, and I have habituated my soul with ease and relaxation, and I have submitted to my forces of lust.

segments.arabic: أَما يَكْفيني يا رَبِّ وَسيلَةً إِلَيكَ ، وَذَريعَةً لَدَيْكَ ، أَ نَّني لِأَوْلِياءِ دينِكَ مُوالٍ ، وَفي مَحَبَّتِهِمْ مُغالٍ ، وَلِجِلْبابِ الْبَلاءِ فيهِمْ لابِسٌ ، وَلِكِتابِ تَحَمُّلِ الْعَناءِ بِهِمْ دارِسٌ .

translation.en: O' Lord! Is it not sufficient for me as a means towards You that I befriend You Friends, and that I am highly devoted to them, and have worn the attire of difficulties for them, and have studied the book of enduring hardships for them.

segments.arabic: أَما يَكْفيني أَنْ أَرُوحَ فيهِمْ مَظْلُوماً، وَأَغْدُوَ مَكْظُوماً، وَأَقْضِيَ بَعْدَ هُمُومٍ هُمُوماً ، وَبَعْدَ وُجُومٍ وُجُوماً ، أَما عِنْدَكَ

translation.en: Is it not sufficient for me that I have been oppressed for them, and have remained silent, and that I am continuously bearing sorrows and entanglements? And have muted myself out of extreme fear?

segments.arabic: يا مَوْلايَ بِهذِهِ حُرْمَةٌ لاتُضَيَّعُ، وَذِمَّةٌ بِأَدْناها تُقْتَنَعُ ، فَلِمَ لاتَمْنَعُني

translation.en: O' My Master! Would all these things not create a sanctity for me which cannot be destroyed? Or would it not give me a right which would deliver me with its littleness?

segments.arabic: يا رَبِّ وَها أَنَا ذا غَريقٌ ، وَتَدَعُني هكَذا وَأَنَا بِنارِ عَدُوِّكَ حَريقٌ .

translation.en: O' Master! Why don't You protect me when You can see me drowning? And why don't You protect me while You can witness that I am entangled by the fire that Your enemy has lit up?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ أَتَجْعَلُ أَوْلِياءَكَ لِأَعْداءِكَ طَرائِدَ ، وَلِمَكْرِهِمْ مَصائِدَ ، وَتُقَلِّدُهُمْ مِنْ خَسْفِهِمْ قَلائِدَ ، وَأَنْتَ مالِكُ نُفُوسِهِمْ ، أَنْ لَوْ قَبَضْتَها جَمَدُوا ، وَفي قَبْضَتِكَ مَوادُّ أَنْفاسِهِمْ ، أَنْ لَوْ قَطَعْتَها خَمَدُوا ، فَما يَمْنَعُكَ

translation.en: O My Master! Will You throw Your Friends before Your Enemies? And let them be deceived by their schemes? Will you let them be enslaved with their humiliation and disgrace? While all the souls are in Your hands; such that if You take their souls, they will freeze; their source of breathing is also in Your hands, such that if You stop it, they will die; then what stops You,

segments.arabic: يا رَبِّ أَنْ تَكُفَّ بَأْسَهُمْ ، وَتَنْزِعَ عَنْهُمْ مِنْ حِفْظِكَ لِباسَهُمْ ، وَتُعَرّيهِمْ مِنْ سَلامَةٍ بِها في أَرْضِكَ يَسْرَحُونَ ، وَفي مَيْدانِ الْبَغْيِ عَلى عِبادِكَ يَمْرَحُونَ .

translation.en: O' Lord, from ending their mischief, and uncovering them from the cover of Your guardianship, and take away the good-health through which they wander on Your Earth, the same good-health that makes them stand arrogantly against Your Servants in the fields of oppression.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ، وَأَدْرِكْني وَلَمَّا يُدْرِكْنِي الْغَرَقُ ، وَتَدارَكْني وَلَمَّا غَيَّبَ شَمْسِيَ الشَّفَقُ ،

translation.en: O' Allah! Bless Mohammad and his holy Progeny, and help me before I drown, and hold me before my life's sun disappears in the horizon.

segments.arabic: إِلهي كَمْ مِنْ خائِفٍ إِلْتَجَئَ إِلى سُلْطانٍ فَآبَ عَنْهُ مَحْفُوظاً بِأَمْنٍ وَأَمانٍ ، أَفَأَقْصُدُ

translation.en: O' Allah! How many frightened men have sought shelter in the kings and received protection and safety from them;

segments.arabic: يا رَبِّ أَعْظَمَ مِنْ سُلْطانِكَ سُلْطاناً ، أَمْ أَوْسَعَ مِنْ إِحْسانِكَ إِحْساناً ، أَمْ أَكْبَرَ مِنِ اقْتِدارِكَ اقْتِداراً ، أَمْ أَكْرَمَ مِنِ انْتِصارِكَ انْتِصاراً ، ما عُذْري 	يا إِلهي إِذا حَرَمْتَ مِنْ حُسْنِ الْكَرامَةِ نائِلَكَ ، وَأَنْتَ الَّذي لاتُخَيِّبُ آمِلَكَ وَلاتَرُدُّ سائِلَكَ .

translation.en: O' Lord! Is there a King with a greater Dominion than You so that I turn towards him? Or whose favors are more extensive than You? Or whose reign is greater than Your rein? Or Whose support is more kind than Your support? What excuse would I have if You deprive someone who has come near You from Your Beneficence and kind behavior? While You are the one who never makes the hopeful hopeless, and You never reject the request of a requester.

segments.arabic: إِلهي إِلهي أَيْنَ أَيْنَ كِفايَتُكَ الَّتي هِيَ نُصْرَةُ الْمُسْتَضْعَفينَ مِنَ الْأَنامِ ، وَأَيْنَ أَيْنَ عِنايَتُكَ الَّتي هِيَ جُنَّةُ الْمُسْتَهْدَفينَ بِجَوْرِ الْأَيَّامِ ، إِلَيَّ إِلَيَّ بِها

translation.en: O' Lord! O' Lord! Where is Your Sufficiency which becomes the support of the weak against the people, and where is Your blessings which itself is the shield for those who are targeted by the oppressions of life? Give it to me, give it to me,

segments.arabic: ا رَبِّ نَجِّني مِنَ الْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمينَ، إِنّي مَسَّنِيَ الضُّرُّ وَأَنْتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمينَ .

translation.en: O' Lord, deliver me from the nation of oppressors, indeed I am distressed and You are the Most Merciful of all the Merciful.

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ تَرى تَحَيُّري في أَمْري ، وَتَقَلُّبي في ضُرّي ، وَانْطِوايَ عَلى حُرْقَةِ قَلْبي ، وَحَرارَةِ صَدْري ، فَصَلِّ يا رَبِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ، وَجُدْ لي يا رَبِّ بِما أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ فَرَجاً وَمَخْرَجاً ، وَيَسِّرْ لي يا رَبِّ نَحْوَ الْبُشْرى مَنْهَجاً .

translation.en: O' Master! You witness my astonishment in my affair, and my struggling in entanglements, and You can witness my heart burning in flames, and the heat of my chest; thus bless Mohammad and his holy Progeny, and bestow upon me, O' Lord, with such relief and exit that You are worthy of; and open a luminous way, O' Lord, before our glowing faces;

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ يا رَبِّ مَنْ يَنْصِبُ لِيَ الْحِبالَةَ لِيَصْرَعَني بِها صَريعَ ما مَكَرَ ، وَمَنْ يَحْفِرُ لِيَ الْبِئْرَ لِيُوقِعَني فيها واقِعاً فيما حَفَرَ ، وَاصْرِفِ

translation.en: O' Lord! Whoever plans a trap against me so that I fall in it with his schemes, make him fall in his own trap, and whoever digs a well to trap me into falling in it, make him fall in his own well, and keep me away,

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ عَنّي مِنْ شَرِّهِ وَمَكْرِهِ وَفَسادِهِ وَضُرِّهِ ، ما تَصْرِفُهُ عَنِ الْقَوْمِ الْمُتَّقينَ ، وَعَمَّنْ قادَ نَفْسَهُ لِدينِ الدَّيَّانِ ، وَمُنادٍ يُنادي لِلْإيمانِ .

translation.en: O' Lord, from his evil and his plots and his corruption and his harm, like You keep them away from the nation of god-fearing men, and from those who have submitted themselves completely to their religion only, and to the invocator who invites towards faith.

segments.arabic: إِلهي عَبْدُكَ عَبْدُكَ أَجِبْ دَعْوَتَهُ ، ضَعيفُكَ ضَعيفُكَ فَرِّجْ غُمَّتَهُ ، فَقَدِ انْقَطَعَ بِهِ كُلُّ حَبْلٍ إِلّا حَبْلَكَ ، وَتَقَلَّبَ عَنْهُ كُلُّ ظِلٍّ إِلّا ظِلَّكَ .

translation.en: O' Lord! Your Servant, Your Servant, answer his supplication; Your weak, Your weak, relieve his sorrows; verily all his connections have broken except his connection with You, all shadows have moved away from him except Your shadow of Mercy.

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ دَعْوَتي هذِهِ إِنْ رَدَدْتَها أَيْنَ تُصادِفُ مَوْضِعَ الْإِجابَةِ ، وَمَخْيَلَتي هذِهِ إِنْ كَذَّبْتَها أَيْنَ تُلاقي مَوْضِعَ الْإِعانَةِ ، فَلاتَرُدَّ عَنْ بابِكَ مَنْ لايَعْلَمُ غَيْرَهُ باباً ، وَلاتَمْنَعُ دُونَ جَنابِكَ مَنْ لايَعْلَمُ سِواهُ جَناباً .

translation.en: O' Master! If you reject our supplication, then where will our supplications be answered? If our optimism towards You is rendered false, then where will we seek help from? Do not reject from Your door someone who doesn't know of any other door, and do not deprive from Your Courtyard those who don't know of any other courtyard.

segments.arabic: إِلهي إِنَّ وَجْهاً إِلَيْكَ في رَغْبَتِهِ تَوَجَّهَ خَليقٌ بِأَنْ تُجيبَهُ ، وَإِنَّ جَبيناً لَكَ بِابْتِهالِهِ سَجَدَ حَقيقٌ أَنْ يَبْلُغَ ما قَصَدَ ، وَ إِنَّ خَدّاً لَدَيْكَ بِمَسْئَلَتِهِ تَعَفَّرَ جَديرٌ أَنْ يَفُوزَ بِمُرادِهِ وَيَظْفَرَ .

translation.en: "O Lord! The face that has turned towards You with desire is worthy of receiving a position response, and the forehead that has prostrated before You with humility is worthy of reaching his goal, and the cheek that is rubbed on the ground before Your Threshold is worthy of attaining its motive and success;

segments.arabic: وَها أَنَا ذا يا إِلهي قَدْ تَرى تَعْفيرَ خَدّي وَاجْتِهادي في مَسْئَلَتِكَ وَجِدّي ، فَتَلَقَّ يا رَبِّ رَغَباتي بِرَحْمَتِكَ قَبُولاً ، وَسَهِّلْ إِلى طَلِباتي بِرَأْفَتِكَ وُصُولاً، وَذَلِّلْ قُطُوفَ ثَمَرَةِ إِجابَتِكَ لي تَذْليلاً .

translation.en: O' Lord! Here I am before You with my cheek rubbing the ground struggling for achieving my demand from You; O' Lord! Accept from me that which I desire with Your Mercy, and help me reach my demand with Your exclusive benevolence and grace, and make me eat the fruit of Your acceptance.

segments.arabic: إِلهي فَإِذا قامَ ذُو حاجَةٍ بِحاجَتِهِ شَفيعاً ، فَوَجَدْتَهُ مُمْتَنِعَ النَّجاحِ سَهْلَ الْقِيادِ مُطيعاً ، فَإِنّي أَسْتَشْفِعُ إِلَيْكَ بِكَرامَتِكَ ، وَالصَّفْوَةِ مِنْ أَنامِكَ الَّذينَ أَنْشأْتَ لَهُمْ ما تُظِلُّ وَتُقِلُّ ، وَبَرَأْتَ ما يَدُقُّ وَيَجِلُّ .

translation.en: O' Lord! When a needy introduces an intercessor for his demand, and You find him in such a state that his prosperity is prevented and he will easily become obedient; I have also taken Your Generosity and Kindness, and the chosen ones from Your Creations as my intercessors, those for whose sake You have created all that casts shadow and all the big and small things.

segments.arabic: أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ بِأَوَّلِ مَنْ تَوَّجْتَهُ تاجَ الْجَلالَةِ ، وَأَحْلَلْتَهُ مِنَ الْفِطْرَةِ الرُّوحانِيَّةِ مَحَلَّ السُّلالَةِ ، حُجَّتِكَ في خَلْقِكَ ، وَأَمينِكَ عَلى عِبادِكَ ، مُحَمَّدٍ رَسُولِكَ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ .

translation.en: I seek Your nearness by means of the first person whom You have crowned with the crown of glory, and have adorned him with a spiritual nature, who is Your apparent Proof among Your creations, and Your trusted one upon Your servants, Your Prophet, Mohammad (peace be upon him and his Progeny),

segments.arabic: وَبِمَنْ جَعَلْتَهُ لِنُورِهِ مَغْرِباً ، وَعَنْ مَكْنُونِ سِرِّهِ مُعْرِباً ، سَيِّدِ الْأَوْصِياءِ وَ إِمامِ الْأَتْقِياءِ ، يَعْسُوبِ الدّينِ ، وَقائِدِ الْغُرِّ الْمُحَجَّلينَ ، وَأَبِي الْأَئِمَّةِ الرَّاشِدينَ عَلِيٍّ أَميرِالْمُؤْمِنينَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ .

translation.en: and I have chosen such a person as my intercessor who is the bearer of Prophet's Light, and who presented the hidden secret of his holiness in the most eloquent way, the Chief of all the successors and the Imam of the Pious, the ruler of the religion, the leader of the bright-faced men, and the father of all the noble Imams, Ali bin Abi Talib, the Commander of the Faithful, peace be upon him.

segments.arabic: وَأَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ بِخِيَرَةِ الْأَخْيارِ ، وَاُمِّ الْأَنْوارِ ، اَلْإِنْسِيَّةِ الْحَوْراءِ ، اَلْبَتُولِ الْعَذْراءِ ، فاطِمَةَ الزَّهْراءِ ، وَبِقُرَّتَيْ عَيْنِ الرَّسُولِ ، وَثَمَرَتَيْ فُؤادِ الْبَتُولِ ، اَلسَّيِّدَيْنِ الْإِمامَيْنِ أَبي مُحَمَّدٍ الْحَسَنِ وَأَبي عَبْدِاللَّهِ الْحُسَيْنِ ، وَبِالسَّجَّادِ زَيْنِ الْعِبادِ ، ذِي الثَّفَناتِ ، راهِبِ الْعَرَبِ ، عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ .

وَبِالْإِمامِ الْعالِمِ ، وَالسَّيِّدِ الْحاكِمِ ، اَلنَّجْمِ الزَّاهِرِ ، وَالْقَمَرِ الْباهِرِ مَوْلايَ مُحَمَّدِ ابْنِ عَلِيٍّ الْباقِرِ ، وَبِالْإِمامِ الصَّادِقِ ، مُبَيِّنِ الْمُشْكِلاتِ ، مُظْهِرِ الْحَقائِقِ ، اَلْمُفْحِمِ بِحُجَّتِهِ كُلَّ ناطِقٍ ، مُخْرِسِ أَلْسِنَةِ أَهْلِ الْجِدالِ ، مَساكِنِ الشَّقاشِقِ مَوْلايَ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الصَّادِقِ .

translation.en:
and through the Imam of the world, the Sayyid, the Ruler, the apparent star, the evident moon, my Master, Mohammad bin Ali al-Baqir, 
 and through Imam as-Sadiq, the solver of all the difficult problems, the revealer of realities, the one who has made all the speakers silent with his proof and argument, and has muted the tongues of the debaters, the dweller of the best positions, my Master, Jafar bin Mohammad as-Sadiq,

segments.arabic: وَبِالْإِمامِ التَّقِيِّ وَالْمُخْلِصِ الصَّفِيِّ ، وَالنُّورِ الْأَحْمَدِيِّ ، اَلنُّورِ الْأَنْوَرِ ، وَالضِّياءِ الْأَزْهَرِ مَوْلايَ مُوسَى بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ ، وَبِالْإِمامِ الْمُرتَضى ، وَالسَّيْفِ الْمُنْتَضى ، وَالرَّاضي بِالقَضا مَوْلايَ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُوسَى الرِّضا .

translation.en:
and through Imam at-Taqi, the pious and chosen one, the Light of Ahmad, the Light of all the Lights, the luminescent sunlight, my Master, Musa bin Ja'far, 
 and through the Imam, the chosen one, the withdrawn sword, the content with the divine order, my Master, Ali bin Musa ar-Reza,

segments.arabic: وَبِالْإِمامِ الْأَمْجَدِ ، وَالْبابِ الْأَقْصَدِ ، وَالطَّريقِ الْأَرْشَدِ ، وَالْعالِمِ الْمُؤَيَّدِ ، يَنْبُوعِ الْحِكَمِ ، وَمِصْباحِ الظُّلَمِ ، سَيِّدِ الْعَرَبِ وَالْعَجَمِ ، اَلْهادي إِلىَ الرَّشادِ ، وَالْمُوَفَّقِ بِالتَّأْييدِ وَالسِّدادِ مَوْلايَ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الْجَوادِ .

translation.en: and through the great Imam, the intended divine door, the path of progress, the guided knower, the spring of wisdom, the lamp in darkness, the master of Arab and non-Arab, the guide towards welfare, the successful one with support and rightness, my Master, Mohammad bin Ali al-Jawad,

segments.arabic: وَبِالْإِمامِ مِنْحَةِ الْجَبَّارِ ، وَوالِدِ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْأَطْهارِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْمَوْلُودِ بِالْعَسْكَرِ ، اَلَّذي حَذَّرَ بِمَواعِظِهِ وأَنْذَرَ ،

translation.en: and through the Imam, the divine gift, the father of noble Imams, Ali bin Mohammad, born in the enemy's army camp, who warned people with his sermons and advices,

segments.arabic: وَبِالْإِمامِ الْمُنَزَّهِ عَنِ الْمَآثِمِ ، اَلْمُطَهَّرِ مِنَ الْمَظالِمِ ، اَلْحِبْرِ الْعالِمِ ، رَبيعِ الْأَنامِ ، وَبَدْرِ الظَّلامِ ، اَلتَّقِيِّ النَّقِيِّ الطَّاهِرِ الزَّكِيِّ ، مَوْلايَ أَبي مُحَمَّدٍ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الْعَسْكَرِيِّ .

translation.en: and through the Imam, the glorified one from all sins, the purified one from the oppressions, the expert scholar, the spring of people's heart, the laminating full moon, the pious, the purified, the clean, the intellectual, my Master, Abi Mohammad, al-Hasan bin Ali al-Askari;

segments.arabic:
وَأَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ بِالْحَفيظِ الْعَليمِ الَّذي جَعَلْتَهُ عَلى خَزائِنِ الْأَرْضِ ، وَالْأَبِ الرَّحيمِ الَّذي مَلَّكْتَهُ أَزِمَّةَ الْبَسْطِ وَالْقَبْضِ ، صاحِبِ النَّقيبَةِ الْمَيْمُونَةِ ، وَقاصِفِ الشَّجَرَةِ الْمَلْعُونَةِ ، مُكَلِّمِ النَّاسِ فِي الْمَهْدِ ، وَالدَّالِّ عَلى مِنْهاجِ الرُّشْدِ .
 اَلْغائِبِ عَنِ الْأَبْصارِ ، اَلْحاضِرِ فِي الْأَمْصارِ ، اَلْغائِبِ عَنِ الْعُيُونِ ، اَلْحاضِرِ فِي الْأَفْكارِ ، بَقِيَّةِ الْأَخْيارِ ، اَلْوارِثِ لِذِي الْفِقارِ ، الَّذي يَظْهَرُ في بَيْتِ اللَّهِ ذِي الْأَسْتارِ ، اَلْعالِمِ الْمُطَهَّرِ ، مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحَسَنِ عَلَيْهِمْ أَفْضَلُ التَّحِيَّاتِ وَأَعْظَمُ الْبَرَكاتِ ، وَأَتَمُّ الصَّلَواتِ .

translation.en: and I seek You nearness through the protector and the knower, whom You have made the treasurer of all the earth's treasures, the merciful father in whose hands lies the control of all the relief and narrowness, the Owner of Leadership and noble kingdom, the one who will uproot the cursed tree, who spoke to the people in his cradle, the leader towards the bright paths of excellence, who is concealed from the sights, who is present in the cities, but hidden from the eyes, and present in the thoughts, the remnant of the chosen ones, the inheritor of Zulfiqar, the one who will appear in the curtained 'house of Allah', the knower, the purified, Mohammad bin al-Hasan, may the best of greetings, absolute peace and greatest blessings be upon them.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ فَهؤُلاءِ مَعاقِلي إِلَيْكَ في طَلِباتي وَوَسائِلي ، فَصَلِّ عَلَيْهِمْ صَلوةً لايَعْرِفُ سِواكَ مَقاديرَها ، وَلايَبْلُغُ كَثيرُ هِمَمِ الْخَلائِقِ صَغيرَها ، وَكُنْ لي بِهِمْ عِنْدَ أَحْسَنِ ظَنّي ، وَحَقِّقْ لي بِمَقاديرِكَ تَهْيِئَةَ التَّمَنّي .

translation.en: O' Allah, these noblemen are my shelters and means for presenting my requests in Your Threshold, bless them with a blessing whose quantity is not known to anyone except You, and the best of people's effort cannot reach the least of its extent, fulfill my noblest of thoughts by their means, and fulfill my desires.

segments.arabic: إِلهي لا رُكْنَ لي أَشَدُّ مِنْكَ ، فَآوي إِلى رُكْنٍ شَديدٍ ، وَلا قَوْلَ لي أَسَدُّ مِنْ دُعائِكَ ، فَأَسْتَظْهِرُكَ بِقَوْلٍ سَديدٍ ، وَلا شَفيعَ لي إِلَيْكَ أَوْجَهُ مِنْ هؤُلاءِ فَآتيكَ بِشَفيعٍ وَديدٍ ، وَقَدْ أَوَيْتُ إِلَيْكَ ، وَعَوَّلْتُ في قَضاءِ حَوائِجي عَلَيْكَ ، وَدَعَوْتُكَ كَما أَمَرْتَ ، فَاسْتَجِبْ لي كَما وَعَدْتَ ، فَهَلْ بَقِيَ يا رَبِّ غَيْرَ أَنْ تُجيبَ وَتَرْحَمَ مِنِّي الْبُكاءَ وَالنَّحيبَ .

translation.en: O' Lord! No pillar is stronger than You for me, thus I seek shelter in this strong base, and no speech is more noble and firm than invocating You, thus I seek you with the best speech, and there are no intercessors for me who are better than them (Mohammad and his Progeny), thus I come to you through a desirable means; I have sought shelter in You, and have relied upon You for the fulfillment of my demands, and have called You the way You commanded me, then accept me as You have Promised.

segments.arabic: يا مَنْ لا إِلهَ سِواهُ ، يا مَنْ يُجيبُ الْمُضْطَرَّ إِذا دَعاهُ ، يا كاشِفَ ضُرِّ أَيُّوبَ ، يا راحِمَ عَبْرَةِ يَعْقُوبَ ، إِغْفِرْ لي وَارْحَمْني ، وَانْصُرْني عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكافِرينَ ، وَافْتَحْ لي وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الْفاتِحينَ .

translation.en: O' Lord! Does anything remain except responding to my desires and having mercy upon my weeping and moaning? O' He except whom there is no God, O' He who answers the distressed when he calls Him, O' Reliever of Jacob's Ayyoob's sorrow, O' He who had mercy upon Yaqoob's tears, forgive me and have mercy upon me, help me against the nation of oppressors, and make me victorious as You are the best victory-giver, and be kind to me,

segments.arabic: وَالْطُفْ بي يا رَبِّ وَبِجَميعِ الْمُؤْمِنينَ وَالْمُؤْمِناتِ ، يا ذَا الْقُوَّةِ الْمَتينِ ، بِرَحْمَتِكَ يا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمينَ ، وَالْحَمْدُ للَّهِ رَبِّ الْعالَمينَ ، وَصَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلى سَيِّدِنا مُحَمَّدٍ النَّبِيِّ وَآلِهِ الطَّاهِرينَ .
segments.transliteration: O’ Lord, and to all the faithful men and women, O’ Possessor of great Power, through Your Mercy, O’ the Most Merciful of all the Merciful, and Praise be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds. May Allah bless our Master, Mohammad, the Prophet, and his purified Progeny. [2]

translation.en:
THE INCIDENT OF THE SUPPLICATION OF ABARAAT

At the end of his book 'Minhaj us Salah', Allama Hilli (R.A.) writes about the supplication of Abaraat:

 This is a famous supplication that has been narrated from Imam Sadiq (A.S.). Sayyid Razi ud Deen Mohammad bin Mohammad bin Mohammad al-Aavi (R.A.) narrates a famous incident regarding this supplication, which is mentioned by one of the scholars in the footnotes of this supplication: Fakhrud Deen Mohammad bin Sheikh Jamal ud Deen narrates from his honorable father, who narrates from his grandfather Yusuf, who was a jurisprudent, who narrates form the same Razi ud Deen that he said: He was captured for a long period of time in the prison of one of the commanders of Sultan Jarmaghoon, and was living in extreme sufferings and hardships. Then one night, he witnessed the successor of Holy Prophet (P.B.U.H.), i.e. Imam Mahdi (A.S.), in his dream and requested before him with tears: O' my Master! Intercede in the Holy Threshold of Allah for my deliverance from the hands of this tyrant.His holiness said: Recite the supplication of Abaraat.

 He asked: What is the supplication of Abaraat?He said: It is there in your book 'Misbah'.I asked: O' my Master! It is not written in my book 'Misbah'.He said: Have a look in the book, you will find it.He woke up from his sleep and offered the Morning Prayer. Then he opened his book 'Misbah' and found that between the pages of the book, a page has been placed on which the supplication of Abaraat has been written; he recited the supplication forty times.The Commander had two wives. One of them was intelligent and had a nice perspective about the affairs, and this wife herself was reliable in the eyes of the commander.The Commander went to her on her day. She told him: Have you captured one of the sons of Imam Ali (A.S.) in your prison?He asked: Why do you ask such a question?She said: I saw a man whose face illuminated like the sunlight, he caught my neck with two fingers and said: I see that your husband has imprisoned one of my sons, and makes him suffer for food and water?I asked: Who are you, O' my Master?He said: I am Ali bin Abi Talib (A.S.). Tell your husband that if he doesn't release my son, I will surely ruin his house.This dream had an immense effect on the ruler, he said: I am unaware of this case; then he called for his representatives and asked: Have you imprisoned anyone?They said: That Alavi old man whose imprisonment you had ordered.He said: Release him and give him a horse for a ride and also guide him through the way so that he returns to his house. (End of the incident)Ali bin Taoos (R.A.) writes at the end of his book 'Muhaj ud Da'waat': One among those incidents is the astonishing incident narrated to me by my dear friend, Mohammad bin Mohammad bin Qazi al-Aavi (May Allah exceed his good fortune and give him the best fate).The incident was as follows: An accident occurred in his life, as a result of which he found this supplication written on a few papers and placed in his book (whereas he hadn't placed those papers in his book). He copied from those pages and after rewriting, he lost the original copy.In the continuation, he wrote this supplication and mentioned that there is another manuscript narrated from a different way, whose text differs from this manuscript.[1][1] Jannatul Ma'wa : p. 221

text.en: Significance of this Dua

This is a valuable and virtuous supplication narrated from Imam Mahdi (ajtfs) and should be recited at times of great sufferings and hardships; this supplication has been named as the 'Supplication of Alavi Misri'.
Background

segments.arabic: رَبِّ مَنْ ذَا الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ فَلَمْ تُجِبْهُ، وَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِيْ سَاَلَكَ فَلَمْ  تُعْطِهِ، وَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِيْ نَاجَاكَ فَخَيَّبْتَهُ، اَوْ تَقَرَّبَ اِلَيْكَ فَاَبْعَدْتَهُ

translation.en: O' my God! Who has ever call upon You and You did not answered him? Who has ever requested from You and You did not give him? Who has call upon You and he was disappointed? Who has come near You and You distance him?

segments.arabic: وَرَبِّ هٰذَا فِرْعَوْنُ ذُوْا الْاَوْتَادِ، مَعَ عِنَادِهِ وَكُفْرِهِ وَعُتُوِّهِ وَاِذْعَانِهِ  الرُّبُوْبِيَّةَ لِنَفْسِهِ، وَعِلْمِكَ بِاَنَّهُ لَايَتُوْبُ، وَلَايَرْجِعُ وَلَايَئُوْبُ، وَلَايُؤْمِنُ وَلَايَخْشَعُ، اِسْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ دُعَاۤءَهُ، وَاَعْطَيْتَهُ سُؤْلَهُ، كَرَمًا مِنْكَ وَجُوْدًا، وَقِلَّةَ مِقْدَارٍ لِمَا سَاَلَكَ عِنْدَكَ، مَعَ عِظَمِهِ عِنْدَهُ، اَخْذًا بِحُجَّتِكَ عَلَيْهِ، وَتَاْكِيْدًا لَهَا حِيْنَ فَجَرَ وَكَفَرَ، وَاسْتَطَالَ  عَلٰى قَوْمِهِ وَتَجَبَّرَ، وَبِكُفْرِهِ عَلَيْهِمُ افْتَخَرَ، وَبِظُلْمِهِ لِنَفْسِهِ تَكَبَّرَ، وَبِحِلْمِكَ عَنْهُ اسْتَكْبَرَ، فَكَتَبَ وَحَكَمَ عَلٰى نَفْسِهِ جُرْاَةً مِنْهُ، اَنَّجَزَاۤءَ مِثْلِهِ اَنْ يُغْرَقَ فِي الْبَحْرِ، فَجَزَيْتَهُ بِمَا حَكَمَ بِهِ عَلٰى نَفْسِهِ

translation.en: O' my God! This  is pharaoh, he of the tent peg with his stubbornness, disbelieving, arrogance and claiming himself to be God, with Your knowledge that he will not repent and will not come back of his thought, he did not believe nor did he fear You; You have accepted his prayers and grant his request, this is just a gift and favour from You, it is very little at Your Sight what he has requested even though it is much in his sight, he has taking that from You as a proof against himself and an emphasis on him when he disbelieve and act sinfully, he last long with his people in arrogance and proud of his disbelieve on them and become arrogant for oppressing himself and with Your tolerance towards him he continue his arrogance, he wrote and judge against himself, that the reward of his type is to be drawn in the sea, and his reward is his judgment against himself.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَنَا عَبْدُكَ، اِبْنُ عَبْدِكَ وَابْنُ اَمَتِكَ، مُعْتَرِفٌ لَكَ  بِالْعُبُوْدِيَّةِ، مُقِرٌّ بِاَنَّكَ اَنْتَ اللهُ خَالِقِيْ، لَاۤ اِلٰهَ لِيْ غَيْرُكَ، وَلَا رَبَّ لِيْ سِوَاكَ، مُوْقِنٌ بِاَنَّكَ اَنْتَ اللهُ رَبِّيْ، وَاِلَيْكَ مَرَدِّيْ  وَاِيَابِيْ، عَالِمٌ بِاَنَّكَ عَلٰى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْرٌ، تَفْعَلُ مَا تَشَاۤءُ وَتَحْكُمُ  مَا تُرِيْدُ، لَا مُعَقِّبَ لِحُكْمِكَ، وَلَا رَآدَّ لِقَضَاۤءِكَ، وَاَنَّكَ الْاَوَّلُ  وَالْاٰخِرُ وَالظَّاهِرُ وَالْبَاطِنُ، لَمْ تَكُنْ مِنْ شَيْءٍ، وَلَمْ تَبِنْ عَنْ  شَيْءٍ، كُنْتَ قَبْلَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ، وَاَنْتَ الْكَاۤئِنُ بَعْدَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ، وَالْمُكَوِّنُ  لِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ، خَلَقْتَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ بِتَقْدِيْرٍ، وَاَنْتَ السَّمِيْعُ الْبَصِيْرُ

translation.en: O' Allah! I am Your servant, the son of Your servant, the son of Your slave, confessing that You worth worshiping and admitting that You are God my Creator, there is no any other god except You, I possess no other God except You, with certainty that You are Allah my God, my traces and returning unto You, acknowledging that You possess power over all thing.

segments.arabic: وَاَشْهَدُ اَنَّكَ كَذٰلِكَ كُنْتَ وَتَكُوْنُ، وَاَنْتَ حَيٌّ قَيُّوْمٌ، لَاتَاْخُذُكَ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ، وَلَا تُوْصَفُ بِالْاَوْهَامِ، وَلَا تُدْرَكُ  بِالْحَوَآسِّ، وَلَاتُقَاسُ بِالْمِقْيَاسِ، وَلَاتُشَبَّهُ بِالنَّاسِ، وَاَنَّ الْخَلْقَ  كُلَّهُمْ عَبِيْدُكَ وَاِمَاۤؤُكَ، اَنْتَ الرَّبُّ وَنَحْنُ الْمَرْبُوْبُوْنَ، وَاَنْتَ  الْخَالِقُ وَنَحْنُ الْمَخْلُوْقُوْنَ، وَاَنْتَ الرَّازِقُ وَنَحْنُ الْمَرْزُوْقُوْنَ

translation.en: I bear witness that You are like that and You will be like that, You are Eternal and Everlasting, slumber seize You not neither sleeping, You are not defined with illusions and senses did not perceive You, You are not measured with measurement, You did not resemble any mankind, and all creatures are You slaves and servants, You are the Lord and we are Your reared and You are the creator and we are the creatures, You are the Provider and we are the needier.

segments.arabic: فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ يَا اِلٰهِيْ، اِذْ خَلَقْتَنِيْ بَشَرًا سَوِيًّا، وَجَعَلْتَنِيْ غَنِيًّا مَكْفِيًّا، بَعْدَ مَا كُنْتُ طِفْلًا صَبِيًّا، تَقُوْتُنِيْ مِنَ الثَّدْيِ لَبَنًا مَرِيْئًا، وَغَذَّيْتَنِيْ غَذَاۤءً طَيِّبًا هَنِيْئًا، وَجَعَلْتَنِيْ ذَكَرًا مِثَالًا سَوِيًّا

translation.en: O' my Lord all praises are due to You, when You created me as a sound human being and made me sufficient and wealthy after I was an infant and nourished me with milk from the breast and feed me with delighted and pure food and made me a sound man.

segments.arabic: فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ حَمْدًا اِنْ عُدَّ لَمْ يُحْصَ، وَاِنْ وُضِعَ لَمْ يَتَّسِعْ لَهُ  شَيْءٌ، حَمْدًا يَفُوْقُ عَلٰى جَمِيْعِ حَمْدِ الْحَامِدِيْنَ، وَيَعْلُوْ عَلٰى حَمْدِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ، وَيَفْخُمُ وَيَعْظُمُ عَلٰى ذٰلِكَ كُلِّهِ، وَكُلَّمَا حَمِدَ اللهَ شَيْءٌ

translation.en: All the uncountable praise are due to You, the praise no any container can contains it, praise that is above the praise of all praise and above every thing that is praised, the praise that is greater and mightier than that and more than every thing that praise God.

segments.arabic: وَالْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ كَمَا يُحِبُّ اللهُ اَنْ يُحْمَدَ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ عَدَدَ مَا خَلَقَ، وَزِنَةَ مَا خَلَقَ، وَزِنَةَ اَجَلِّ مَا خَلَقَ، وَبِوَزْنِ اَخَفِّ مَا خَلَقَ، وَبِعَدَدِ اَصْغَرِ مَا خَلَقَ

translation.en: All praises are due to God as He love to be praised, praise be to God equivalent to the whole creations and the weight of all creations and equivalent to the mightiest creation and the lighter creations and equivalent to the smallest creations.

segments.arabic: وَالْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ حَتَّى يَرْضِىْ رَبُّنَا وَبَعْدَ الرِّضَا، وَاَسْئَلُهُ اَنْ يُصَلِّيَ  عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ يَغْفِرَ لِيْ ذَنْبِيْ، وَاَنْ يَحْمَدَ لِيْ  اَمْرِيْ، وَيَتُوْبَ عَلَيَّ اِنَّهُ هُوَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيْمُ

translation.en: Praise be to Allah till our Lord is pleased and after His pleasure, I requested Him to send blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad and to forgive my sins and to extol my issues and pardon me, verily He is All-Forgiving and All-Merciful.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاِنِّيْ اَنَا اَدْعُوْكَ وَاَسْاَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ  صَفْوَتُكَ اَبُوْنَا اٰدَمُ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ، وَهُوَ مُسِيْءٌ ظَالِمٌ حِيْنَ اَصَابَ  الْخَطِيْئَةَ، فَغَفَرْتَ لَهُ خَطِيْئَتَهُ، وَتُبْتَ عَلَيْهِ، وَاسْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ  دَعْوَتَهُ، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهُ قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ، اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ  مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِيْ خَطِيْئَتِيْ وَتَرْضِىْ عَنِّيْ، فَاِنْ لَمْ تَرْضَ  عَنِّيْ فَاعْفُ عَنِّيْ، فَاِنِّيْ مُسِيْءٌ ظَالِمٌ خَاطِئٌ عَاصٍ، وَقَدْ يَعْفُوْ السَّيِّدُ عَنْ عَبْدِهِ، وَلَيْسَ بِرَاضٍ عَنْهُ، وَاَنْ تُرْضِيَ عَنِّيْ خَلْقَكَ، وَتُمِيْطَ عَنِّيْ حَقَّكَ

translation.en: O' my Lord, I requested and call upon You with Your name upon which our father Adam called you (Your choice peace be upon him) when he is guilty for his mistake, then You forgive his mistake and pardon him and accept his call, You are closer to him, O' The Nearer, send Your blessing to Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad, forgive my short comings and be pleased with me, if You are not pleased with me and pardon me even though I am guilty, a sinner, an oppressor and having short comings, a master may forgive his servant even though he is not pleased with him then be pleased with me as Your creature and to drag Your right from  me.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْئَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ اِدْرِيْسُ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ، فَجَعَلْتَهُ صِدِّيْقًا نَبِيًّا، وَرَفَعْتَهُ مَكَانًا عَلِيًّا، وَاسْتَجَبْتَ دُعَاۤءَهُ، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهُ قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ، اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تَجْعَلَ مَابِيْ اِلٰى جَنَّتِكَ، وَمَحَلِّيْ فِيْ رَحْمَتِكَ، وَتُسْكِنَنِيْ  فِيْهَا بِعَفْوِكَ، وَتُزَوِّجَنِيْ مِنْ حُوْرِهَا، بِقُدْرَتِكَ يَا قَدِيْرُ

translation.en: O' my Lord! I requested from You with the name upon which Idris called on You peace be on him and You made him a Prophet and a trust worthy one and You elevated him to an exalted rank and accept his call, O' Allah! You are closer to him O' The Nearer, send Your blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad and make my recourse to be Your Paradise and Your mercy to be my abode and house me in Your pardon and married me with its beautiful ladies with Your Strength, O' the Mighty.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْئَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ نُوْحٌ، اِذْ نَادٰى رَبَّهُ «اَنِّيْ مَغْلُوْبٌ فَانْتَصِرْ

translation.en: O' my Lord, I requested from You with Your name upon which Nuh called when he said:"I am vanquished; do thou soccour me! Then we opened the gates of Heaven unto water torrential and made the Earth to gush with fountains, and waters met for a matter decreed"[1]

And You rescued him from a well- planked vessels well-caulked, then You accepted his call and You are closer to him O' The Nearer, then send Your blessing upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad and rescued me from the oppression of those who wanted to oppress me and prevent me from the problem of those who wanted to be unfair with me and suffice me from the evils of the despotic rulers, strong enemy, hidden powers, stubborn giants, all insurgent devils, strong human beings and the deceits of all the conspiracies.

segments.arabic: وَفَجَّرْنَا الْاَرْضَ عُيُوْنًا فَالْتَقَى الْمَاۤءُ عَلٰى اَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ» وَنَجَّيْتَهُ عَلٰى ذَاتِ اَلْوَاحٍ وَدُسُرٍ، فَاسْتَجَبْتَ دُعَاۤءَهُ وَكُنْتَ مِنْهُ  قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ، اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ  تُنْجِيَنِيْ مِنْ ظُلْمِ مَنْ يُرِيْدُ ظُلْمِيْ، وَتَكُفَّ عَنِّيْ بَاْسَ مَنْ يُرِيْدُ هَضْمِيْ، وَتَكْفِيَنِيْ شَرَّ كُلِّ سُلْطَانٍ جَاۤئِرٍ، وَعَدُوٍّ قَاهِرٍ، وَمُسْتَخِفَّ  قَادِرٍ، وَجَبَّارٍ عَنِيْدٍ، وَكُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ مَرِيْدٍ، وَاِنْسِيٍّ شَدِيْدٍ، وَكَيْدِكُلِّ مَكِيْدٍ، يَا حَلِيْمُ يَا وَدُوْدُ

translation.en: O' The Tolerant, O' The Affectionate.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْئَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ عَبْدُكَ وَنَبِيُّكَ صَالِحٌ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ فَنَجَّيْتَهُ مِنَ الْخَسْفِ، وَاَعْلَيْتَهُ عَلٰى عَدُوِّهِ، وَاسْتَجَبْتَ دُعَاۤءَهُ، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهُ  قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ، اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تُخَلِّصَنِيْ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا يُرِيْدُنِيْ اَعْدَاۤئِيْ  بِهِ، وَسَعٰى بِيْ حُسَّادِيْ، وَتَكْفِيَنِيْهِمْ بِكِفَايَتِكَ، وَتَتَوَلَّانِيْ  بِوِلَايَتِكَ، وَتَهْدِيَ  قَلْبِيْ بِهُدَاكَ، وَتُؤَيِّدَنِيْ بِتَقْوَاكَ، وَتُبَصِّرَنِيْ (وَتَنْصُرَنِيْ) بِمَا فِيْهِ رِضَاكَ، وَتُغْنِيَنِيْ بِغِنَاكَ يَا حَلِيْمُ

translation.en: O' my Lord! I requested from You by Your name upon which Your servant and Your Prophet called, Salih peace be upon him and You rescued him from humiliation and grant him upper hand against his enemy and accept his call, though You are closer to him O' The Nearer, send Your blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad and secure me from the evils my enemy intended for me and the struggle of my envious ones, suffice me from them with Your sufficiency and lead me with Your Guardianship and guide my heart with Your guidance and support me with faith in You and enlighten me to what consist Your pleasure and enrich me with Your richness, O' The Tolerant.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْاَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ عَبْدُكَ وَنَبِيُّكَ وَخَلِيْلُكَ  اِبْرَاهِيْمُ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ، حِيْنَ اَرَادَ نُمْرُوْدُ اِلْقَاۤئَهُ فِيْ النَّارِ، فَجَعَلْتَ  لَهُ النَّارَ بَرْدًا وَسَلَامًا، وَاسْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ دُعَاۤءَهُ، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهُ قَرِيْبًا يَاقَرِيْبُ، اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تُبَرِّدَ عَنِّيْ حَرَّ نَارِكَ، وَتُطْفِئَ عَنِّيْ لَهِيْبَهَا، وَتَكْفِيَنِيْ حَرَّهَا، وَتَجْعَلَ نَاۤئِرَةَ اَعْدَاۤئِيْ فِيْ شِعَارِهِمْ وَدِثَارِهِمْ، وَتَرُدَّ كَيْدَهُمْ فِيْ نُحْوُرِهِمْ، وَتُبَارِكَ لِيْ فِيْمَا اَعْطَيْتَنِيْهِ، كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلٰى اٰلِهِ، اِنَّكَ  اَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ الْحَمِيْدُ المَّجِيْدُ

translation.en: O' my God! I requested from You by Your name upon which Ibrahim called, Your servant, Your Prophet and Your intimate friend peace be on him, when Namrud wanted to throw him in to the flame, thus You made the flame cold and safety for him and You answered his call though You are closer to him O' The Nearer, then send Your blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad and make Your Hell fire cold for me and quench its flame for me and suffice me from its hotness and put the flame of my enemies in their slogan and garments and return all their plans to their throat and bless what You have bestowed on me as You have blessed Prophet Ibrahim and his family, verily You are The Provider, The Extoller and The Glorious.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْئَلُكَ بِالْاِسْمِ الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ اِسْمَاعِيْلُ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ، فَجَعَلْتَهُ نَبِيًّا وَرَسُوْلًا، وَجَعَلْتَ لَهُ حَرَمَكَ مَنْسَكًا وَمَسْكَنًا وَمَاْوًى، وَاسْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ دُعَاۤءَهُ، وَنَجَّيْتَهُ مِنَ الذَّبْحِ، وَقَرَّبْتَهُ رَحْمَةً مِنْكَ، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهُ قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ، اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ  مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تَفْسَحَ لِيْ فِيْ قَبْرِيْ، وَتَحُطَّ عَنِّيْ وِزْرِيْ، وَتَشُدَّلِيْ اَزْرِيْ، وَتَغْفِرَ لِيْ ذَنْبِيْ، وَتَرْزُقَنِيْ التَّوْبَةَ بِحَطِّ السَّيِّئَاتِ، وَتَضَاعُفِ الْحَسَنَاتِ، وَكَشْفِ الْبَلِيَّاتِ، وَرِبْحِ التِّجَارَاتِ، وَدَفْعِ  مَعَرَّةِ السِّعَايَاتِ، اِنَّكَ مُجِيْبُ الدَّعَوَاتِ، وَمُنْزِلُ الْبَرَكَاتِ، وَقَاضِى الْحَاجَاتِ، وَمُعْطِىْ الْخَيْرَاتِ، وَجَبَّارُ السَّمَاوَاتِ

translation.en: O' my Lord! I requested from You by Your name upon which Ismail called peace be on him and You made him a Prophet and a Messenger and made Your Sacred house to him a place of ceremony and place of living and You accepted his call by rescuing him from sacrifice[2] and due to Your Mercy You made him closer to You, though You are closer to him O' The Nearer, then send Your blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad and widen my tomb and bring down my burden and tighten my cover, forgive my sins and grant me repentance by over looking all my evil deeds and to double my good deeds and unveil all my tribulations and to obtain profit in my transactions and protect me from all humiliations, indeed You answer all calls, O' He who Descends all blessing, He who grants all needs, The Giver of all benefactions, He who obliges the Heavens.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْئَلُكَ بِمَا سَاَلَكَ بِهِ ابْنُ خَلِيْلِكَ اِسْمَاعِيْلُ عَلَيْهِ  السَّلَامُ، اَلَّذِيْ نَجَّيْتَهُ مِنَ الذَّبْحِ، وَفَدَيْتَهُ بِذِبْحٍ عَظيْمٍ، وَقَلَّبْتَ  لَهُ الْمِشْقَصَ حِيْنَ (حَتَّى) نَاجَاكَ مُوْقِنًا بِذَبْحِهِ، رَاضِيًا بِاَمْرِ وَالِدِهِ، فَاسْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ دُعَاۤءَهُ، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهُ قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ، اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تُنْجِيَنِيْ مِنْ كُلِّ سُوْءٍ وَبَلِيَّةٍ، وَتَصْرِفَ  عَنِّيْ كُلَّ ظُلْمَةٍ وَخِيْمَةٍ، وَتَكْفِيَنِيْ مَا اَهَمَّنِيْ مِنْ اُمُوْرِ دُنْيَايَ  وَاٰخِرَتِيْ، وَمَا اُحَاذِرُهُ وَاَخْشَاهُ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ خَلْقِكَ اَجْمَعِيْنَ، بِحَقِّ  اٰلِ يٰسٓ

translation.en: O' my Lord! I requested from You what Ismail has requested from You, the son of your intimate friend peace be on him, whom You have rescued from sacrifice and ransom him with greater sacrifice and You change the face of the knife when he sincerely call upon You for his sacrifice and he is  pleased with the command from his father and answer his call and You are then closer to him, O' The Nearer, thus You send Your blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad and rescued me from all evils and afflictions and distract all evils from me and suffice me in all my interest in this world and the world Hereafter and suffice me from all that I fear of and the evils of Your creatures for the sake of A'ali Yaseen.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْاَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ لُوْطٌ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ، فَنَجَّيْتَهُ وَاَهْلَهُ مِنَ الْخَسْفِ وَالْهَدْمِ وَالْمَثُلَاتِ وَالشِّدَّةِ وَالْجُهْدِ، وَاَخْرَجْتَهُ وَاَهْلَهُ مِنَ الْكَرْبِ الْعَظِيْمِ، وَاسْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ دُعَاۤءَهُ، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهُ قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ، اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تَاْذَنَ لِيْ بِجَمِيْعِ مَا شُتِّتَ مِنْ شَمْلِيْ، وَتُقِرَّ عَيْنِيْ بِوَلَدِيْ  وَاَهْلِيْ وَمَالِيْ، وَتُصْلِحَ لِيْ اُمُوْرِيْ، وَتُبَارِكَ لِيْ فِيْ جَمِيْعِ  اَحْوَالِيْ، وَتُبَلِّغَنِيْ فِيْ نَفْسِيْ اٰمَالِيْ، وَاَنْ تُجِيْرَنِيْ مِنَ النَّارِ، وَتَكْفِيَنِيْ شَرَّ الْاَشْرَارِ بِالْمُصْطَفَيْنَ الْاَخْيَارِ، اَلْاَئِمَّةِ الْاَبْرَارِ، وَنُوْرِ الْاَنْوَارِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِهِ الطَّيِّبِيْنَ الطَّاهِرِيْنَ الْاَخْيَارِ، اَلْاَئِمَّةِ الْمَهْدِيِّيْنَ، وَالصَّفْوَةِ الْمُنْتَجَبِيْنَ صَلَوَاتُ اللهِ عَلَيْهِمْ اَجْمَعِيْنَ، وَتَرْزُقَنِيْ مُجَالَسَتَهُمْ، وَتَمُنَّ عَلَيَّ بِمُرَافَقَتِهِمْ، وَتُوَفِّقَ لِيْ  صُحْبَتَهُمْ، مَعَ اَنْبِيَاۤئِكَ الْمُرْسَلِيْنَ، وَمَلَاۤئِكَتِكَ الْمُقَرَّبِيْنَ، وَعِبَادِكَ الصَّالِحِيْنَ، وَاَهْلِ طَاعَتِكَ اَجْمَعِيْنَ، وَحَمَلَةِ عَرْشِكَ  وَالْكَرُّوْبِيِّيْنَ

translation.en: O' my Lord! I requested from You by Your name upon which Lut called peace be on him and You rescued him and his people from collapse, demolition and difficulties and bring him and his people out of tremendous agony and You answer his call, though You are closer to him, O' The Nearer, send Your blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad and to permit me to gather my cloak that has been scattered and to be delighted with my descendants, family and my properties and reform all my issues, bless all my situations, made me reach all my hope, save me from the Hell fire and suffice me from the evils of the evil doers for the sake of the Your good chosen ones, the pious Imams, the light of the illuminations, Mohammad and his pure and cleansed holy family, the guided leaders, the choosing ones, may Allah's blessings be upon them all, and grant me their association and bestowed their companionship on me, grant me their friendship together with You Prophets, the Messengers, and the Angels that are near to You, Your good servants including all Your obedient servants to You and the holders of Your Throne and the high level Angels.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْاَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِيْ سَاَلَكَ بِهِ يَعْقُوْبُ، وَقَدْ كُفَّ بَصَرُهُ، وَشُتِّتَ شَمْلُهُ (جَمْعُهُ)، وَفُقِدَ قُرَّةُ عَيْنِهِ ابْنُهُ، فَاسْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ دُعَاۤءَهُ، وَجَمَعْتَ شَمْلَهُ، وَاَقْرَرْتَ عَيْنَهُ، وَكَشَفْتَ ضُرَّهُ، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهُ قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ، اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تَاْذَنَ لِيْ بِجَمِيْعِ مَا تَبَدَّدَ مِنْ اَمْرِيْ، وَتُقِرَّ عَيْنِيْ بِوَلَدِيْ  وَاَهْلِيْ وَمَالِيْ، وَتُصْلِحَ شَاْنِيْ كُلَّهُ، وَتُبَارِكَ لِيْ فِيْ جَمِيْعِ  اَحْوَالِيْ، وَتُبَلِّغَنِيْ فِيْ نَفْسِيْ اٰمَالِيْ، وَتُصْلِحَ لِيْ اَفْعَالِيْ، وَتَمُنَّ  عَلَيَّ يَا كَرِيْمُ، يَا ذَا الْمَعَالِيْ بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ

translation.en: O' my Lord! I requested from You by the name upon which Ya'qub call You when he lost his sight and his cloak scattered and lost his delighted son, You then answerhis call by gathering his cloak and delighting his eye and unveil his troubles though You are closer to him, O' the Nearer, send Your blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad and permit the gathering of all my issues that has been scattered and made me delighting with my son, my family and my wealth and reform all my matters and bless all my situations and let me attain all my hope and redress all my actions and bestowed goods on me, O' The Generous, O' The Exalted one with Your mercy, O' the Most Merciful of the merciful.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْئَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ عَبْدُكَ وَنَبِيُّكَ يُوْسُفُ  عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ فَاسْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ، وَنَجَّيْتَهُ مِنْ غَيَابَتِ الْجُبِّ، وَكَشَفْتَ  ضُرَّهُ، وَكَفَيْتَهُ كَيْدَ اِخْوَتِهِ، وَجَعَلْتَهُ بَعْدَ الْعُبُوْدِيَّةِ مَلِكًا، وَاسْتَجَبْتَ دُعَاۤءَهُ، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهُ قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ، اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تَدْفَعَ عَنِّيْ كَيْدَ كُلِّ كَاۤئِدٍ، وَشَرَّ كُلِّ  حَاسِدٍ، اِنَّكَ عَلٰى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْرٌ

translation.en: O' my Lord! I requested from You by Your name upon which was called by Your servant and Prophet, Yusuf peace be on him and You accepted his call and rescued him from the darkness of the well an save him out of  his sufferings  and suffice him from his brother's plot and made him king after his slavery and You answer his prayers, though You are closer to him, O' The Nearer, send Your blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad and protect me from the plots of the plotters and the evils of the envious ones, indeed You possess power over all thing,

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْئَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ عَبْدُكَ وَنَبِيُّكَ مُوْسَى بْنُ عِمْرَانَ اِذْ قُلْتَ تَبَارَكْتَ وَتَعَالَيْتَ «وَنَادَيْنَاهُ مِنْ جَانِبِ الطُّوْرِ الْاَيْمَنِ وَقَرَّبْنَاهُ نَجِيًّا»، وَضَرَبْتَ لَهُ طَرِيْقًا فِي الْبَحْرِ يَبَسًا، وَنَجَّيْتَهُ وَمَنْ مَعَهُ مِنْ بَنِيْ اِسْرَاۤئِيْلَ، وَاَغْرَقْتَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَهَامَانَ  وَجُنُوْدَهُمَا، وَاسْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ دُعَاۤءَهُ، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهُ قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ، اَسْئَلُكَ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تُعِيْذَنِيْ مِنْ شَرِّخَلْقِكَ، وَتُقَرِّبَنِيْ مِنْ عَفْوِكَ، وَتَنْشُرَ عَلَيَّ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ مَا تُغْنِيْنِيْ  بِهِ عَنْ جَمِيْعِ خَلْقِكَ، وَيَكُوْنُ لِيْ بَلَاغًا اَنَالُ بِهِ مَغْفِرَتَكَ  وَرِضْوَانَكَ، يَا وَلِيِّيْ وَوَلِيَّ الْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ

translation.en: O' my Lord! I requested from You by your name upon which was called by Your servant and Prophet, Musa son of Imraan when You The Bless and The Exalted one said:

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْاَلُكَ بِالْاِسْمِ الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ عَبْدُكَ وَنَبِيُّكَ دَاوُوْدُ، فَاسْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ دُعَاۤءَهُ، وَسَخَّرْتَ لَهُ الْجِبَالَ، يُسَبِّحْنَ مَعَهُ بِالْعَشِيِّ  وَالْاِبْكَارِ، وَالطَّيْرَ مَحْشُوْرَةٌ كُلٌّ لَهُ اَوَّابٌ، وَشَدَدْتَ مُلْكَهُ، وَاٰتَيْتَهُ الْحِكْمَةَ وَفَصْلَ الْخِطَابِ، وَاَلَنْتَ لَهُ الْحَدِيْدَ، وَعَلَّمْتَهُ  صَنْعَةَ لَبُوْسٍ لَهُمْ، وَغَفَرْتَ ذَنْبَهُ، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهُ قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ

translation.en: O' my Lord! I requested from You by Your name upon which was called by Your servant and Prophet, Daud and You answered his call and make the mountains subservient to him and glorify Allah with him both day and night and all the resurrected birds seeking repentant for him, and make his reign strong and gave him wisdom and explanation of words and soften the iron for him and taught him how to make dresses from  (it) iron, and forgive him of his sins, though You are closer to him, O' The Nearer.

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تُسَخِّرَ لِيْ  جَمِيْعَ اُمُوْرِيْ، وَتُسَهِّلَ لِيْ تَقْدِيْرِيْ، وَتَرْزُقَنِيْ مَغْفِرَتَكَ  وَعِبَادَتَكَ، وَتَدْفَعَ عَنِّيْ ظُلْمَ الظَّالِمِيْنَ، وَكَيْدَ الْكَاۤئِدِيْنَ، وَمَكْرَ الْمَاكِرِيْنَ، وَسَطَوَاتِ الْفَرَاعِنَةِ الْجَبَّارِيْنَ، وَحَسَدَ الْحَاسِدِيْنَ، يَااَمَانَ الْخَاۤئِفِيْنَ، وَجَارَ الْمُسْتَجِيْرِيْنَ، وَثِقَةَ الْوَاثِقِيْنَ، وَذَرِيْعَةَ الْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ، وَرَجَاۤءَ الْمُتَوَكِّلِيْنَ، وَمُعْتَمَدَ الصَّالِحِيْنَ، يَاۤ اَرْحَمَ  الرَّاحِمِيْنَ

translation.en: I seek from You to send Your blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad and make all my issues subservient to me and make all my prospects easy for me, and grant me Your service and forgiveness, and protect me from evils of the oppressors and plots of the plotters and deceits of the deceivers and from the arrogant of Pharaohs, and the envy of the envious ones, O' He who safeguard the scared ones, O' He who neighboured the refugees, the reliance to those who has covenant with Him, the means of the believers, the hope for the reliant on Him, the trust worthy of the good servants, O' the Most Merciful of the merciful.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْاَلُكَ اللّٰهُمَّ بِالْاِسْمِ الَّذِيْ سَئَلَكَ بِهِ عَبْدُكَ وَنَبِيُّكَ  سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ دَاوُوْدَ عَلَيْهِمَا السَّلَامُ، اِذْ قَالَ «رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِيْ وَهَبْ  لِيْ مُلْكًا لَايَنْبَغِيْ لِاَحَدٍ مِنْ بَعْدِيْ اِنَّكَ اَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ»، فَاسْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ دُعَاۤءَهُ، وَاَطَعْتَ لَهُ الْخَلْقَ، وَحَمَلْتَهُ عَلَى الرِّيْحِ، وَعَلَّمْتَهُ مَنْطِقَ الطَّيْرِ، وَسَخَّرْتَ لَهُ الشَّيَاطِيْنَ مِنْ كُلِّ بَنَّاءٍ وَغَوَّاصٍ، وَاٰخَرِيْنَ مُقَرَّنِيْنَ فِي الْاَصْفَادِ، هٰذَا عَطَاۤؤُكَ لَا عَطَاۤءُ غَيْرِكَ، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهُ قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ

translation.en: O' my Lord! I requested from You, O' Allah by Your name upon which Your servant and Prophet called, Suleiman son of Daud peace be on them, when he said:
