segments.arabic: اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تَهْدِيَ لِيْ قَلْبِيْ، وَتَجْمَعَ لِيْ لُبِّيْ، وَتَكْفِيَنِيْ هَمِّيْ، وَتُؤْمِنَ خَوْفِيْ، وَتَفُكَّ  اَسْرِيْ، وَتَشُدَّ اَزْرِيْ، وَتُمْهِلَنِيْ وَتُنَفِّسَنِيْ، وَتَسْتَجِيْبَ دُعَائِيْ، وَتَسْمَعَ نِدَاۤئِيْ، وَلَاتَجْعَلَ فِي النَّارِ مَاْوَايَ، وَلَا الدُّنْيَا اَكْبَرَ هَمِّيْ، وَاَنْ تُوَسِّعَ عَلَىَّ رِزْقِيْ، وَتُحَسِّنَ خُلْقِيْ، وَتُعْتِقَ رَقَبَتِيْ  مِنَ النَّارِ، فَاِنَّكَ سَيِّدِيْ وَمَوْلَايَ وَمُؤَمَّلِيْ

translation.en: Send Your blessing to Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad and guide my heart and gathered my intellect, and suffice my interest, and tranquil my fear, and release my captivity, and tighten my cloak, grant me respite and relief, answer my call and give listening ears to my calls, and don't make my abode to be Hell fire, and don't make this world to be my main goal, widen my sustenance and embellish my morals and free my neck from Hell fire, indeed You are my Lord, my master and my expectation.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْاَلُكَ اللّٰهُمَّ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ اَيُّوْبُ، لَمَّا حَلِّ  بِهِ الْبَلَاۤءُ بَعْدَ الصِّحَّةِ، وَنَزَلَ السَّقَمُ مِنْهُ مَنْزِلَ الْعَافِيَةِ، وَالضِّيْقُ  بَعْدَ السَّعَةِ وَالْقُدْرَةِ، فَكَشَفْتَ ضُرَّهُ، وَرَدَدْتَ عَلَيْهِ اَهْلَهُ، وَمِثْلَهُمْ مَعَهُمْ، حِيْنَ نَادَاكَ، دَاعِيًا لَكَ، رَاغِبًا اِلَيْكَ، رَاجِيًا لِفَضْلِكَ، شَاكِيًا اِلَيْكَ رَبِّ «اِنّي مَسَّنِيَ الضُّرُّ وَاَنْتَ اَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ» فَاسْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ دُعَاۤءَهُ، وَكَشَفْتَ ضُرَّهُ، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهُ  قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ

translation.en: O' my Lord! I requested from You by Your name upon which Prophet Ayub called when he was in trouble after gaining back his health and illness has fell out of him, and narrowness after wideness and strength, then You ward off his difficulties, and You return his family to him and their likes with them, after he has call upon You, supplicating to You, desirous unto You, hopping for Your favour and complaining to You, O' my Lord

segments.arabic: اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تَكْشِفَ ضُرِّيْ، وَتُعَافِيَنِيْ فِيْ نَفْسِيْ وَاَهْلِيْ وَمَالِيْ وَوَلَدِيْ وَاِخْوَانِيْ فِيْكَ، عَافِيَةً بَاقِيَةً شَافِيَةً كَافِيَةً، وَافِرَةً هَادِيَةً نَامِيَةً، مُسْتَغْنِيَةً عَنِ  الْاَطِبَّاۤءِ وَالْاَدْوِيَةِ، وَتَجْعَلَهَا شِعَارِيْ وَدِثَارِيْ، وَتُمَتِّعَنِيْ  بِسَمْعِيْ وَبَصَرِيْ، وَتَجْعَلَهُمَا الْوَارِثَيْنِ مِنِّيْ، اِنَّكَ عَلٰى كُلِّ شَيْ ءٍ قَدِيْرٌ

translation.en: O' The Nearer, send Your blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad and unveil all my difficulties and protect me, my family, my wealth, my descendants and my brothers with good health such sound health that they will not be in need of doctors and medications and make them my slogans and garment, and make me to enjoy my sense of hearing and seeing and make both of them my inheritor, indeed You possess power over all thing.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْئَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ يُوْنُسُ بْنُ مَتَّى فِيْ  بَطْنِ الْحُوْتِ حِيْنَ نَادَاكَ فِيْ ظُلُمَاتٍ ثَلَاثٍ «اَنْ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ اِنّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِيْنَ» وَاَنْتَ اَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ، فَاسْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ دُعَاۤءَهُ، وَاَنْبَتَّ عَلَيْهِ شَجَرَةً مِنْ يَقْطِيْنٍ، وَاَرْسَلْتَهُ  اِلٰى مِاَةِ اَلْفٍ اَوْ يَزِيْدُوْنَ، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهُ قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ، اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تَسْتَجِيْبَ دُعَاۤئِيْ، وَتُدَارِكَنِيْ  بِعَفْوِكَ، فَقَدْ غَرِقْتُ فِيْ بَحْرِ الظُّلْمِ لِنَفْسِيْ، وَرَكِبَتْنِيْ مَظَالِمُ  كَثِيْرَةٌ لِخَلْقِكَ عَلَيَّ، صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاسْتُرْنِيْ  مِنْهُمْ، وَاَعْتِقْنِيْ مِنَ النَّارِ، وَاجْعَلْنِيْ مِنْ عُتَقَاۤءِكَ وَطُلَقَاۤئِكَ مِنَ  النَّارِ، فِيْ مَقَامِيْ هٰذَا، بِمَنِّكَ يَا مَنَّانُ

translation.en: O' my Lord! I requested from You by Your name upon which was called by Yunus son of Matta when he was inside the whale and call upon You inside the three darkness

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْئَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ عَبْدُكَ وَنَبِيُّكَ عِيْسَى  بْنُ مَرْيَمَ عَلَيْهِمَا السَّلَامُ اِذْ اَيَّدْتَهُ بِرُوْحِ الْقُدُسِ، وَاَنْطَقْتَهُ  فِي الْمَهْدِ، فَاَحْيِىْ بِهِ الْمَوْتِىْ، وَاَبْرَاَ بِهِ الْاَكْمَهَ وَالْاَبْرَصَ بِاِذْنِكَ، وَخَلَقَ مِنَ الطَّيْنِ كَهَيْئَةِ الطَّيْرِ فَصَارَ طَائِرًا بِاِذْنِكَ، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهُ  قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ، اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تُفَرِّغَنِيْ لِمَا خُلِقْتُ لَهُ، وَلَاتَشْغَلَنِيْ بِمَا قَدْ تَكَلَّفْتَهُ لِيْ، وَتَجْعَلَنِيْ مِنْ عُبَّادِكَ وَزُهَّادِكَ فِي الدُّنْيَا، وَمِمَّنْ خَلَقْتَهُ لِلْعَافِيَةِ، وَهَنَّاْتَهُ بِهَا مَعَ كَرَامَتِكَ يَا كَرِيْمُ يَا عَلِيُّ يَا عَظِيْمُ

translation.en: O' my Lord! I requested from You by Your name upon which was called by Your servant and Prophet, Isa son of Marry peace be on them, when You supported him with the holy spirit, and made him to talk while he was in a stage of cradle, and make him to give life to death, and cure a blind and a leper with Your permission, though You are closer to him, O' The Nearer, send Your blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad, evacuates me from what you have created for him, and don't engage me with what You have commissioned him to do for me, and make me among Your ascetics and those that rendered service to You in this world and among those You have created for good health wise and felicitated with Your favour, O' The Glorious, The Exalted and The Mighty.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْاَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ اٰصَفُ بْنُ بَرْخِيَا عَلٰى عَرْشِ مَلِكَةِ سَبَا، فَكَانَ اَقَلَّ مِنْ لَحْظَةِ الطَّرْفِ، حَتَّى كَانَ  مُصَوَّرًا بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ، فَلَمَّا رَاَتْهُ «قِيْلَ اَهٰكَذَا عَرْشُكِ قَالَتْ كَاَنَّهُ  هُوَ» فَاسْتَجَبْتَ دُعَاۤءَهُ، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهُ قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ، اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ  عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَتُكَفِّرَ عَنِّيْ سَيِّئَاتِيْ، وَتَقْبَلَ مِنِّيْ حَسَنَاتِيْ، وَتَقْبَلَ تَوْبَتِيْ، وَتَتُوْبَ عَلَيَّ، وَتُغْنِيَ  فَقْرِيْ، وَتَجْبُرَ كَسْرِيْ، وَتُحْيِيَ فُؤَادِيْ بِذِكْرِكَ، وَتُحْيِيَنِيْ فِيْ عَافِيَةٍ، وَتُمِيْتَنِيْ  فِيْ عَافِيَةٍ

translation.en: O' my Lord! I requested from You by Your name upon which was called by Aasif son of Barkhiya on the throne of Saba Queen with less than a twinkling of an eye, till it became like a photograph before him, when the Queen saw it,{It was said, is thy throne like this? She said it seems the same}[7]

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْاَلُكَ بِالْاِسْمِ الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ عَبْدُكَ وَنَبِيُّكَ زَكَرِيَّا عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ حِيْنَ سَئَلَكَ، دَاعِيًا لَكَ، رَاغِبًا اِلَيْكَ، رَاجِيًا لِفَضْلِكَ، فَقَامَ فِي الْمِحْرَابِ يُنَادِيْ نِدَاۤءً خَفِيًّا، فَقَالَ رَبِّ «هَبْ  لِيْ مِنْ لَدُنْكَ وَلِيًّا

translation.en: O' my Lord! I requested from You by Your name upon which was called by Your servant and Your Prophet, Zakariya, when he requested and call upon You, putting his hope in You and hopping for Your favour, he then stood up at his praying place calling You silently and said:

segments.arabic: يَرِثُنِيْ وَيَرِثُ مِنْ اٰلِ يَعْقُوْبَ وَاجْعَلْهُ رَبِّ  رَضِيًّا» فَوَهَبْتَ لَهُ يَحْيٰى، وَاسْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ دُعَاۤءَهُ، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهُ قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ، اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تُبْقِيَ لِيْ اَوْلَادِيْ، وَاَنْ تُمَتِّعَنِيْ بِهِمْ، وَتَجْعَلَنِيْ وَاِيَّاهُمْ مُؤْمِنِيْنَ لَكَ، رَاغِبِيْنَ فِيْ ثَوَابِكَ، خَاۤئِفِيْنَ مِنْ عِقَابِكَ، رَاجِيْنَ لِمَا عِنْدَكَ، اٰيِسِيْنَ مِمَّا عِنْدَ غَيْرِكَ حَتَّى تُحْيِيَنَا حَيٰوةً طَيِّبَةً، وَتُمِيْتَنَا مِيْتَةً طَيِّبَةً، اِنَّكَ فَعَّالٌ لِمَا تُرِيْدُ

translation.en: O' my Lord, {Give me, from Thee, a kinsman, who shall be my inheritor and inheritor of the House of Jacob; and make him, my Lord; well-pleasing}[8]

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْاَلُكَ بِالْاِسْمِ الَّذِيْ سَئَلَتْكَ بِهِ امْرَاَةُ فِرْعَوْنَ، «اِذْقَالَتْ رَبِّ ابْنِ لِيْ عِنْدَكَ بَيْتًا فِي الْجَنَّةِ وَنَجِّنِيْ مِنْ فِرْعَوْنَ  وَعَمَلِهِ وَنَجِّنِيْ مِنَ الْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمينَ»، فَاسْتَجَبْتَ لَهَا دُعَاۤئَهَا، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهَا قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ، اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تُقِرَّ عَيْنِيْ بِالنَّظَرِ اِلٰى جَنَّتِكَ، وَوَجْهِكَ الْكَرِيْمِ وَاَوْلِيَاۤئِكَ، وَتُفَرِّجَنِيْ بِمُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِهِ، وَتُؤْنِسَنِيْ بِهِ وَبِاٰلِهِ، وَبِمُصَاحَبَتِهِمْ  وَمُرَافَقَتِهِمْ، وَتُمَكِّنَ لِيْ فِيْهَا، وَتُنْجِيَنِيْ مِنَ النَّارِ، وَمَا اُعِدَّ لِاَهْلِهَا مِنَ السَّلَاسِلِ وَالْاَغْلَالِ، وَالشَّدَاۤئِدِ وَالْاَنْكَالِ، وَاَنْوَاعِ  الْعَذَابِ، بِعَفْوِكَ يَا كَرِيْمُ

translation.en: O' my Lord! I requested from You by the name upon which was called by Pharaoh's wife,

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْاَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِيْ دَعَتْكَ بِهِ عَبْدَتُكَ وَصِدِّيْقَتُكَ  مَرْيَمُ الْبَتُوْلُ وَاُمُّ الْمَسِيْحِ الرَّسُوْلِ عَلَيْهِمَا السَّلَامُ، اِذْ قُلْتَ «وَمَرْيَمَ ابْنَتَ عِمْرَانَ الَّتِيْ اَحْصَنَتْ فَرْجَهَا فَنَفَخْنَا فِيْهِ مِنْ رُوْحِنَا وَصَدَّقَتْ بِكَلِمَاتِ رَبِّهَا وَكُتُبِهِ وَكَانَتْ مِنَ الْقَانِتِيْنَ» فَاسْتَجَبْتَ لَهَا دُعَاۤئَهَا، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهَا قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ، اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ  عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تُحْصِنَنِيْ بِحِصْنِكَ الْحَصِيْنِ، وَتَحْجُبَنِيْ بِحِجَابِكَ الْمَنِيْعِ، وَتُحْرِزَنِيْ بِحِرْزِكَ الْوَثِيْقِ، وَتَكْفِيَنِيْ بِكِفَايَتِكَ الْكَافِيَةِ، مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ طَاغٍ، وَظُلْمِ كُلِّ بَاغٍ، وَمَكْرِ كُلِّ مَاكِرٍ، وَغَدْرِ كُلِّ غَادِرٍ، وَسِحْرِ كُلِّ سَاحِرٍ، وَجَوْرِ كُلِّ  سُلْطَانٍ جَاۤئِرٍ، بِمَنْعِكَ يَا مَنِيْعُ

translation.en: O' my Lord! I requested from You by Your name upon which was called by Your servant and the righteous one, Maryam the virgin and mother of Jesus the Prophet, peace be on them, when You said:

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَسْاَلُكَ بِالْاِسْمِ الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ عَبْدُكَ وَنَبِيُّكَ، وَصَفِيُّكَ  وَخِيَرَتُكَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ، وَاَمِيْنُكَ عَلٰى وَحْيِكَ، وَبَعِيْثُكَ اِلٰى بَرِيَّتِكَ، وَرَسُوْلُكَ اِلٰى خَلْقِكَ مُحَمَّدٌ خَاصَّتُكَ وَخَالِصَتُكَ، صَلَّى اللهُ  عَلَيْهِ وَاٰلِهِ وَسَلَّمَ، فَاسْتَجَبْتَ دُعَاۤءَهُ، وَاَيَّدْتَهُ بِجُنُوْدٍ لَمْ يَرَوْهَا، وَجَعَلْتَ كَلِمَتَكَ الْعُلْيَا، وَكَلِمَةَ الَّذِيْنَ كَفَرُوْا السُّفْلٰى، وَكُنْتَ مِنْهُ  قَرِيْبًا يَا قَرِيْبُ

translation.en: O' my Lord! I requested from You by Your name upon which was called by Your servant, Your Prophet, Your sincere friend, the best among Your creatures, the trustee to Your revelation, Your delegate to Your creations and Your Messenger to Your creations, Muhammad Your exclusive and sincere one, peace and blessing be upon him and upon his holy family, and You answered his supplications and supported him with the unseen soldiers and make Your word exalted and the words of the unbelievers as inferior, though You are closer to him, O' The Nearer.

segments.arabic: اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، صَلَوٰةً زَاكِيَةً طَيِّبَةً، نَامِيَةً بَاقِيَةً مُبَارَكَةً، كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلٰى اَبِيْهِمْ اِبْرَاهِيْمَ وَاٰلِ اِبْرَاهِيْمَ، وَبَارِكْ عَلَيْهِمْ كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ، وَسَلِّمْ عَلَيْهِمْ كَمَا سَلَّمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ، وَزِدْهُمْ فَوْقَ ذٰلِكَ كُلِّهِ زِيَادَةً مِنْ عِنْدِكَ، وَاخْلُطْنِيْ بِهِمْ، وَاجْعَلْنِيْ مِنْهُمْ، وَاحْشُرْنِيْ مَعَهُمْ، وَفِيْ  زُمْرَتِهِمْ حَتَّى تَسْقِيَنِيْ مِنْ حَوْضِهِمْ، وَتُدْخِلَنِيْ فِيْ جُمْلَتِهِمْ، وَتَجْمَعَنِيْ وَاِيَّاهُمْ، وَتُقِرَّ عَيْنِيْ بِهِمْ، وَتُعْطِيَنِيْ سُؤْلِيْ، وَتُبَلِّغَنِيْ اٰمَالِيْ فِيْ دِيْنِيْ وَدُنْيَايَ وَاٰخِرَتِيْ، وَمَحْيَايَ وَمَمَاتِيْ، وَتُبَلِّغَهُمْ  سَلَامِيْ، وَتَرُدَّ عَلَيَّ مِنْهُمُ السَّلَامَ وَعَلَيْهِمُ السَّلَامُ وَرَحْمَةُ اللهِ  وَبَرَكَاتُهُ

translation.en: Send Your blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad, pure delectable and everlasting blessing as You have blessed their father Ibrahim and the familyof Ibrahim, honour them as You have honour Ibrahim and his family, send peace on them as You have send peace upon Ibrahim and his family, make all this in abundant from Yourself, O' God mix me with them, let me with them, resurrect me with them and in their company until I was watered from their pound and entered me in to their combination and gather me and them together, delighting my face with them, and grant me my requisitions and let me attain my hope in my Religion, my world, the Hereafter, my life and my death.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَنْتَ الَّذِيْ تُنَادِيْ فِيْ اَنْصَافِ كُلِّ لَيْلَةٍ هَلْ مِنْ سَاۤئِلٍ  فَاُعْطِيَهُ، اَمْ هَلْ مِنْ دَاعٍ فَاُجِيْبَهُ، اَمْ هَلْ مِنْ مُسْتَغْفِرٍ فَاَغْفِرَ لَهُ، اَمْ هَلْ مِنْ رَاجٍ فَاُبَلِّغَهُ رَجَاهُ، اَمْ هَلْ مِنْ مُؤَمِّلٍ فَاُبَلِّغَهُ اَمَلَهُ، هَااَنَا سَاۤئِلُكَ بِفِنَاۤئِكَ، وَمِسْكِيْنُكَ بِبَابِكَ، وَضَعِيْفُكَ بِبَابِكَ، وَفَقِيْرُكَ بِبَابِكَ، وَمُؤَمِّلُكَ بِفِنَاۤئِكَ، اَسْاَلُكَ نَاۤئِلَكَ، وَاَرْجُوْ رَحْمَتَكَ، وَاُؤَمِّلُ عَفْوَكَ، وَاَلْتَمِسُ غُفْرَانَكَ، فَصَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O' my Lord! You call every midnight that is there any beggar so that You give him! Or is there any caller so that You answer his call! Or is there anyone seeking for forgiveness so that You forgives him! Or is there anyone expecting to give him his expectation! Or is there anybody hopping for something in order to fulfill his hope! Here I am seeking for Your courtyard, the needier at Your door, Your guest before Your door, the wretched one before Your door, hopping for Your courtyard, I seek for Your favour and hopping for Your blessing and Your pardon and appealing for Your forgiveness, then bless Muhammad and the holy family of Muhammad.

segments.arabic: وَاَعْطِنِيْ سُؤْلِيْ، وَبَلِّغْنِيْ اَمَلِيْ، وَاجْبُرْ فَقْرِيْ، وَارْحَمْ عِصْيَانِيْ، وَاعْفُ عَنْ ذُنُوْبِيْ، وَفُكَّ رَقَبَتِيْ مِنَ الْمَظَالِمِ لِعِبَادِكَ  رَكِبَتْنِيْ، وَقَوِّ ضَعْفِيْ، وَاَعِزَّ مَسْكَنَتِيْ، وَثَبِّتْ وَطْاَتِيْ، وَاغْفِرْ جُرْمِيْ، وَاَنْعِمْ بَالِيْ، وَاَكْثِرْ مِنَ الْحَلَالِ مَالِيْ، وَخِرْ لِيْ فِيْ  جَمِيْعِ اُمُوْرِيْ وَاَفْعَالِيْ، وَرَضِّنِيْ بِهَا، وَارْحَمْنِيْ وَوَالِدَيَّ وَمَا وَلَدَا مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ، وَالْمُسْلِمِيْنَ وَالْمُسْلِمَاتِ، اَلْاَحْيَاۤءِ مِنْهُمْ وَالْاَمْوَاتِ، اِنَّكَ سَمِيْعُ الدَّعَوَاتِ، وَاَلْهِمْنِيْ مِنْ  بِرِّهِمَا مَا اَسْتَحِقُّ بِهِ ثَوَابَكَ وَالْجَنَّةَ، وَتَقَبَّلْ حَسَنَاتِهِمَا، وَاغْفِرْ سَيِّئَاتِهِمَا، وَاجْزِهِمَا بِاَحْسَنِ مَا فَعَلَا بِيْ ثَوابَكَ وَالْجَنَّةَ

translation.en: O' God give me my requests and let me reach my ambition, splint mypoverty, favour me for my insubordination and pardon my sins, free my neck from the oppression of Your servant that mounted on me and strengthen me from my weakness, and fortify my wretchedness and make my treading very firm, forgive my crimes and tranquil my heart, increase my wealth through lawful means and make a choice for me in all my matters and actions and with such be pleased with me, O' God have mercy on me, my parents and my descendants and the believing men and women including the Muslim men and women, the living and the death among them, indeed You hear all calls; inspire in me Your reward and Paradise I entitle to for doing good to my both parents, accept their good deeds and forgive their wrong deeds, O' God! reward them with Paradise more than the kindness they have shown unto me.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَقَدْ عَلِمْتُ يَقِيْنًا اَنَّكَ لَاتَاْمُرُ بِالظُّلْمِ وَلَاتَرْضَاهُ، وَلَاتَمِيْلُ اِلَيْهِ وَلَاتَهْوَاهُ وَلَاتُحِبُّهُ وَلَاتَغْشَاهُ، وَتَعْلَمُ مَا فِيْهِ هٰؤُلَاۤءِ الْقَوْمُ مِنْ ظُلْمِ عِبَادِكَ وَبَغْيِهِمْ عَلَيْنَا، وَتَعَدِّيْهِمْ بِغَيْرِ حَقٍّ وَلَا مَعْرُوْفٍ، بَلْ ظُلْمًا وَعُدْوَانًا وَزُوْرًا وَبُهْتَانًا، فَاِنْ كُنْتَ جَعَلْتَ  لَهُمْ مُدَّةً لَابُدَّ مِنْ بُلُوْغِهَا، اَوْ كَتَبْتَ لَهُمْ اٰجَالًا يَنَالُوْنَهَا، فَقَدْ قُلْتَ وَقَوْلُكَ الْحَقُّ وَوَعْدُكَ الصِّدْقُ «يَمْحُوْ اللهُ مَا يَشَاۤءُ وَيُثْبِتُ  وَعِنْدَهُ اُمُّ الْكِتَابِ»

translation.en: O' my Lord! I am certainly aware that You did not ordered for oppression and You are not pleased with it, You did not incline towards it nor do You desire it and You did not love it, You are aware how those people are oppressive and tyrant to us and their transgressions not for their right, but just for oppression, aggression, untruthfully and falsity.

segments.arabic: فَاَنَا اَسْاَلُكَ بِكُلِّ مَا سَئَلَكَ بِهِ اَنْبِيَاۤءُكَ الْمُرْسَلُوْنَ وَرُسُلُكَ، وَاَسْئَلُكَ بِمَا سَئَلَكَ بِهِ عِبَادُكَ الصَّالِحُوْنَ، وَمَلَاۤئِكَتُكَ الْمُقَرَّبُوْنَ، اَنْ تَمْحُوَ مِنْ اُمِّ الْكِتَابِ ذٰلِكَ، وَتَكْتُبَ لَهُمُ الْاِضْمِحْلَالَ  وَالْمَحْقَ، حَتَّى تُقَرِّبَ اٰجَالَهُمْ، وَتَقْضِيَ مُدَّتَهُمْ، وَتُذْهِبَ اَيَّامَهُمْ، وَتُبَتِّرَ اَعْمَارَهُمْ، وَتُهْلِكَ فُجَّارَهُمْ، وَتُسَلِّطَ بَعْضَهُمْ  عَلٰى بَعْضٍ، حَتَّى لَاتُبْقِيَ مِنْهُمْ اَحَدًا، وَلَاتُنَجِّيَ مِنْهُمْ اَحَدًا، وَتُفَرِّقَ جُمُوْعَهُمْ، وَتَكِلَّ سِلَاحَهُمْ، وَتُبَدِّدَ شَمْلَهُمْ، وَتُقَطِّعَ  اٰجَالَهُمْ، وَتُقَصِّرَ اَعْمَارَهُمْ، وَتُزَلْزِلَ اَقْدَامَهُمْ، وَتُطَهِّرَ بِلَادَكَ  مِنْهُمْ، وَتُظْهِرَ عِبَادَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ، فَقَدْ غَيَّرُوْا سُنَّتَكَ، وَنَقَضُوْاعَهْدَكَ، وَهَتَكُوْا حَرِيْمَكَ، وَاَتَوْا عَلٰى مَا نَهَيْتَهُمْ عَنْهُ، وَعَتَوْاعُتُوًّا كَبِيْرًا كَبِيْرًا، وَضَلُّوْا ضَلَالًا بَعِيْدًا

translation.en: {God blots out, and He establishes what so ever He will; and with Him is the Essence of the Book}[11] I am requesting from You what has been requested from You by Your Prophets and Messengers, I also requested what Your good servants has requested from You, and Your nearby Angels to blots out from the Essence of the Book and write for the oppressors vanish and eradication, till their death come closer, and annihilate their time and go away with their days and curtail their years and destroy their indecent and empowered themselves against themselves until none of them is left behind, You should not rescued any of them and You should scattered their company and exhaust their weapons, scatter their unity and put an end to their life and shorten their years, convulse their feet and purify Your land from them and manifest the upper hand of your good servants over them, because they have changed Your customs and break Your covenant, they have unveiled Your Sanctuary and observed what You have forbade them and act arrogantly while they became astray.

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاْذَنْ لِجَمْعِهِمْ بِالشَّتَاتِ، وَلِحَيِّهِمْ بِالْمَمَاتِ، وَلِاَزْوَاجِهِمْ بِالنَّهَبَاتِ، وَخَلِّصْ عِبَادَكَ مِنْ ظُلْمِهِمْ، وَاقْبِضْ اَيْدِيَهُمْ عَنْ هَضْمِهِمْ، وَطَهِّرْ اَرْضَكَ مِنْهُمْ، وَاْذَنْ بِحَصَدِ نَبَاتِهِمْ، وَاسْتَيْصَالِ شَافَتِهِمْ، وَشَتَاتِ شَمْلِهِمْ، وَهَدْمِ بُنْيَانِهِمْ، يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْاِكْرَامِ

translation.en: Then send Your blessing to Muhammad and to the family of Muhammad, permit the scattering of their combination and cause death for their living ones, let their wives to be plundered and free Your servants from their oppressions, and uphold their hands from their aggression and purify Your land from them, permit the harvest of their vegetations and conveying of their roots, scatter their unity and destroy their buildings, O' The Magnificent, The Gracious.

segments.arabic: وَاَسْاَلُكَ يَا اِلٰهِيْ وَاِلٰهَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ، وَرَبِّيْ وَرَبَّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ، وَاَدْعُوْكَ بِمَا دَعَاكَ بِهِ عَبْدَاكَ وَرَسُوْلَاكَ، وَنَبِيَّاكَ وَصَفِيَّاكَ  مُوْسٰى وَهَارُوْنَ عَلَيْهِمَا السَّلَامُ، حِيْنَ قَالَا، دَاعِيَيْنِ لَكَ، رَاجِيَيْنِ لِفَضْلِكَ، «رَبَّنَا اِنَّكَ اٰتَيْتَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَمَلَاَهُ زِيْنَةً وَاَمْوَالًا فِي الْحَيٰوةِ الدُّنْيَا رَبَّنَا لِيُضِلُّوْا عَنْ سَبِيْلِكَ رَبَّنَا اطْمِسْ عَلٰى اَمْوَالِهِمْ وَاشْدُدْ عَلٰى قُلُوْبِهِمْ فَلَايُؤْمِنُوْا حَتَّى يَرَوُا الْعَذَابَ  الْاَلِيْمَ»، فَمَنَنْتَ وَاَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمَا بِالْاِجَابَةِ لَهُمَا اِلٰى اَنْ قَرَعْتَ  سَمْعَهُمَا بِاَمْرِكَ، فَقُلْتَ اللّٰهُمَّ رَبِّ «قَدْ اُجِيْبَتْ دَعْوَتُكُمَا فَاسْتَقِيْمَا وَلَاتَتَّبِعَانِّ سَبِيْلَ الَّذِيْنَ لَايَعْلَمُوْنَ»

translation.en: I requested from You, the Lord of all things, my God, The God of all things, I call upon You as You've been called by Your servants, Your Messengers, Your Prophets and Your sincere friends, Musa and Harun, pace be on them, when they were calling and longing for Your favour while they said:

segments.arabic: اَنْ تُصَلِّىَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تَطْمِسَ عَلٰى اَمْوَالِ  هٰؤُلاۤءِ الظَّلَمَةِ، وَاَنْ تَشْدُدَ عَلٰى قُلُوْبِهِمْ، وَاَنْ تَخْسِفَ بِهِمْ بَرَّكَ، وَاَنْ تُغْرِقَهُمْ فِيْ بَحْرِكَ، فَاِنَّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْاَرْضَ وَمَا فِيْهِمَا لَكَ، وَاَرِ الْخَلْقَ قُدْرَتَكَ فِيْهِمْ، وَبَطْشَتَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ، فَافْعَلْ ذٰلِكَ  بِهِمْ، وَعَجِّلْ لَهُمْ ذٰلِكَ

translation.en: So bless Muhammad and the holy  family of Muhammad and blots out the wealth of those oppressors and constrain their mind and humiliates them among Your creations and drown them in the ocean of Your wrath because the Heaven and the Earth and all its contents belongs to You, and show Your creations Your power and Your force over them, cause all these to them without delay.

segments.arabic: يَا خَيْرَ مَنْ سُئِلَ، وَخَيْرَ مَنْ دُعِيَ، وَخَيْرَ مَنْ تَذَلَّلَتْ لَهُ الْوُجُوْهُ، وَرُفِعَتْ اِلَيْهِ الْاَيْدِيْ، وَدُعِيَ بِالْاَلْسُنِ، وَشَخَصَتْ اِلَيْهِ  الْاَبْصَارُ، وَاَمَّتْ اِلَيْهِ الْقُلُوْبُ، وَنُقِلَتْ اِلَيْهِ الْاَقْدَامُ، وَتُحُوْكِمَ  اِلَيْهِ فِي الْاَعْمَالِ

translation.en: O' The best that was asked! O' The best that was called! O' the best to whom everyone showedhumbleness and all hands are raised to Him, He who was called by tongues and all sights eyed unto Him and all minds are directed to Him, all feet conveyed to Him and all actions shall be directed to him for judgment.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَنَا عَبْدُكَ اَسْاَلُكَ مِنْ اَسْمَاۤئِكَ بِاَبْهَاهَا، وَكُلُّ اَسْمَاۤئِكَ  بَهِيٌّ، بَلْ اَسْاَلُكَ بِاَسْمَاۤئِكَ كُلِّهَا، اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ  مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تُرْكِسَهُمْ عَلى اُمِّ رُؤُسِهِمْ فِيْ زُبْيَتِهِمْ، وَتُرْدِيَهُمْ فِيْ  مَهْوٰى حُفْرَتِهِمْ، وَارْمِهِمْ بِحَجَرِهِمْ، وَذَكِّهِمْ بِمَشَاقِصِهِمْ، وَاكْبُبْهُمْ عَلٰى مَنَاخِرِهِمْ، وَاخْنُقْهُمْ بِوَتَرِهِمْ، وَارْدُدْ كَيْدَهُمْ فِيْ  نُحُوْرِهِمْ، وَاَوْبِقْهُمْ بِنَدَامَتِهِمْ، حَتَّى يَسْتَخْذِلُوْا وَيَتَضَاۤءَلُوْا بَعْدَ نِخْوَتِهِمْ، وَيَنْقَمِعُوْا بَعْدَ اسْتِطَالَتِهِمْ، اَذِلَّاءَ مَاْسُوْرِيْنَ فِيْ رِبَقِ  حَبَاۤئِلِهِمْ، اَلَّتِيْ كَانُوْا يُؤَمِّلُوْنَ اَنْ يَرَوْنَا فِيْهَا، وَتُرِيَنَا قُدْرَتَكَ فِيْهِمْ، وَسُلْطَانَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ، وَتَاْخُذَهُمْ اَخْذَ الْقُرٰى وَهِيَ  ظَالِمَةٌ، اِنَّ اَخْذَكَ الْاَلِيْمُ الشَّدِيْدُ، وَتَاْخُذَهُمْ يَا رَبِّ اَخْذَ عَزِيْزٍ مُقْتَدِرٍ، فَاِنَّكَ عَزِيْزٌ مُقْتَدِرٌ، شَدِيْدُ الْعِقَابِ، شَدِيْدُ الْمِحَالِ

translation.en: O' my Lord, I am Your servant seeking from You through Your beautiful names, indeed all Your names are beautiful rather I am asking You with all Your names, to send Your blessing upon Muhammad and upon the family of Muhammad and to react upon the oppressor's elevated head and ruin them in their pits, and throw them with their stone, and slaughter them with their sword, and knuckle down their nostril and choke their oppression, and return their plots to their throats, and let them remain in their regret till they were forsaken and diminished after their arrogance and to be curb after their elongation with distress and captivation in the loops of their rope which they are hopping to see us in it.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَعَجِّلْ اِيْرَادَهُمْ عَذَابَكَ  الَّذِيْ اَعْدَدْتَهُ لِلظَّالِمِيْنَ مِنْ اَمْثَالِهِمْ، وَالطَّاغِيْنَ مِنْ نُظَرَاۤئِهِمْ، وَارْفَعْ حِلْمَكَ عَنْهُمْ، وَاحْلُلْ عَلَيْهِمْ غَضَبَكَ الَّذِيْ لَايَقُوْمُ لَهُ  شَيْءٌ، وَاْمُرْ فِيْ تَعْجِيْلِ ذٰلِكَ عَلَيْهِمْ بِاَمْرِكَ الَّذِيْ لَايُرَدُّ وَلَايُؤَخَّرُ، فَاِنَّكَ شَاهِدُ كُلِّ نَجْوٰى، وَعَالِمُ كُلِّ فَحْوٰى، وَلَاتَخْفٰى عَلَيْكَ مِنْ اَعْمَالِهِمْ خَافِيَةٌ، وَلَاتَذْهَبُ عَنْكَ مِنْ اَعْمَالِهِمْ خَاۤئِنَةٌ، وَاَنْتَ عَلَّامُ الْغُيُوْبِ، عَالِمٌ بِمَا فِي الضَّمَاۤئِرِ وَالْقُلُوْبِ

translation.en: O' Allah! Bless Muhammad and the holy family of Muhammad, and hasten Your punishment to their opposition, the punishment You have prepared for oppressors of their type, and the aggressors and their counterparts, and raise Your forbearance from them, allow Your wrath on them which is not withstand by anything, ordered all the punishment on them with Your command that is not rejected nor delayed, verily You witness all intimate discourse and aware of every content, nothing among their action is hidden to You and none of their actions shall go treacherously and You knows every thing  invisible, The Knower of all that is in the hearts and minds.

segments.arabic: وَاَسْاَلُكَ اللّٰهُمَّ وَاُنَادِيْكَ بِمَا نَادَاكَ بِهِ سَيِّدِيْ، وَسَئَلَكَ بِهِ  نُوْحٌ، اِذْ قُلْتَ تَبَارَكْتَ وَتَعَالَيْتَ «وَلَقَدْ نَادَانَا نُوْحٌ فَلَنِعْمَ  الْمُجِيْبُوْنَ»

translation.en: O' Allah, I requested and call upon You as my master called You, Prophet Nuh peace be on him as he requested from You, when You The Bless and The Exalted one said:

segments.arabic: اَجَلِ اللّٰهُمَّ يَا رَبِّ اَنْتَ نِعْمَ الْمُجِيْبُ، وَنِعْمَ الْمَدْعُوُّ، وَنِعْمَ  الْمَسْئُوْلُ، وَنِعْمَ الْمُعْطٰي، اَنْتَ الَّذِيْ لَاتُخَيِّبُ سَاۤئِلَكَ، وَلَاتَرُدُّ رَاجِيَكَ، وَلَاتَطْرُدُ الْمُلِحَّ عَنْ بَابِكَ، وَلَاتَرُدُّ دُعَاۤءَ سَاۤئِلِكَ، وَلَاتَمُلُّ دُعَاءَ مَنْ اَمَّلَكَ، وَلَاتَتَبَرَّمُ بِكَثْرَةِ حَوَاۤئِجِهِمْ اِلَيْكَ، وَلَابِقَضَاۤئِهَا لَهُمْ، فَاِنَّ قَضَاۤءَ حَوَاۤئِجِ جَمِيْعِ خَلْقِكَ اِلَيْكَ فِيْ اَسْرَعِ  لَحْظٍ مِنْ لَمْحِ الطَّرْفِ، وَاَخَفُّ عَلَيْكَ، وَاَهْوَنُ عِنْدَكَ مِنْ جَنَاحِ  بَعُوْضَةٍ

translation.en: {Noah called to Us, and how excellent were the answerers!} [14]

segments.arabic: وَحَاجَتِيْ يَا سَيِّدِيْ وَمَوْلَايَ، وَمُعْتَمَدِيْ وَرَجَاۤئِيْ، اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ  عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِيْ ذَنْبِيْ، فَقَدْ جِئْتُكَ ثَقِيْلَ  الظَّهْرِ بِعَظِيْمِ مَا بَارَزْتُكَ بِهِ مِنْ سَيِّئَاتِيْ، وَرَكِبَنِيْ مِنْ مَظَالِمِ  عِبَادِكَ مَا لَايَكْفِيْنِيْ، وَلَايُخَلِّصُنِيْ مِنْهَا غَيْرُكَ، وَلَايَقْدِرُ عَلَيْهِ، وَلَايَمْلِكُهُ سِوَاكَ

translation.en: My request, O' my chief, my master, my trustworthy, my hope, is to bless Muhammad and the holy family of Muhammad and forgive my sins; I have come to You with heavy and tremendous load for the sin I have committed against You and Your servant's oppressions has mounted on me and no one will set me free from it except You, no one has power over it and no one possess it beside You, O' my master, erase my abundant sin due to my less warning, rather due to the hardness of my heart and solidity of my eye, No! Rather with Your blessing that dominated all things, and I am among those things, then let Your blessing dominates me, O' the Beneficent, O' the Merciful, O' the Most Merciful of the merciful.

segments.arabic: فَامْحُ يَا سَيِّدِيْ كَثْرَةَ سَيِّئَاتِيْ بِيَسِيْرِ عَبَرَاتِيْ، بَلْ بِقَسَاوَةِ قَلْبِيْ، وَجُمُوْدِ عَيْنِيْ، لَا بَلْ بِرَحْمَتِكَ الَّتِيْ وَسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ، وَاَنَا شَيْءٌ، فَلْتَسَعْنِيْ رَحْمَتُكَ، يَا رَحْمَانُ يَا رَحِيْمُ، يَا اَرْحَمَ  الرَّاحِمِيْنَ

لَاتَمْتَحِنِّيْ فِيْ هٰذِهِ الدُّنْيَا بِشَيْءٍ مِنَ الْمِحَنِ، وَلَاتُسَلِّطْ عَلَيَّ  مَنْ لَايَرْحَمُنِيْ، وَلَاتُهْلِكْنِيْ بِذُنُوْبِيْ، وَعَجِّلْ خَلَاصِيْ مِنْ كُلِّ  مَكْرُوْهٍ، وَادْفَعْ عَنِّيْ كُلَّ ظُلْمٍ، وَلَاتَهْتِكْ سَتْرِيْ، وَلَاتَفْضَحْنِيْ  يَوْمَ جَمْعِكَ الْخَلَاۤئِقَ لِلْحِسَابِ، يَا جَزِيْلَ الْعَطَاۤءِ وَالثَّوَابِ

translation.en: O' God, don't examine me in this world with tribulations and don't empowered on me he who will not have mercy on me, and don't destroy me due to my sins and quickly free me from all adversity and protect me from all oppressions and don't humiliates my veil, don't expose my evil deeds the day You shall gather Your creatures for accountability, O' He whose gift and reward is in abundant.

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تُحْيِيَنِيْ  حَيٰوةَ السُّعَدَاۤءِ، وَتُمِيْتَنِيْ مِيْتَةَ الشُّهَدَاۤءِ، وَتَقْبَلَنِيْ قَبُوْلَ الْاَوِدَّاۤءِ، وَتَحْفَظَنِيْ فِيْ هٰذِهِ الدُّنْيَا الدَّنِيَّةِ، مِنْ شَرِّ سَلَاطِيْنِهَا وَفُجَّارِهَا، وَشِرَارِهَا وَمُحِبِّيْهَا، وَالْعَامِلِيْنَ لَهَا وَمَا فِيْهَا، وَقِنِيْ شَرَّ طُغَاتِهَا وَحُسَّادِهَا، وَبَاغِىْ الشِّرْكِ فِيْهَا

translation.en: I requested from You to bless Muhammad and the holy family of Muhammad and to let me live like the life of the fortunate ones and let me die like the death of the Martyrs, and accept me with anaffectionate acceptance,    and protect me in this abject world from the evils of its despotic rulers and aggressors, its evils, its lovers and those that serve it and its content and save me from the evil of its tyrant its envious ones and those that aspire for polytheism among them.

segments.arabic: حَتَّى تَكْفِيَنِيْ مَكْرَ الْمَكَرَةِ، وَتَفْقَاَ عَنِّيْ اَعْيُنَ الْكَفَرَةِ، وَتُفْحِمَ  عَنِّيْ اَلْسُنَ الْفَجَرَةِ، وَتَقْبِضَ لِيْ عَلٰى اَيْدِي الظَّلَمَةِ، وَتُوْهِنَ  عَنِّيْ كَيْدَهُمْ، وَتُمِيْتَهُمْ بِغَيْظِهِمْ، وَتَشْغَلَهُمْ بِاَسْمَاعِهِمْ وَاَبْصَارِهِمْ  وَاَفْئِدَتِهِمْ، وَتَجْعَلَنِيْ مِنْ ذٰلِكَ كُلِّهِ فِيْ اَمْنِكَ وَاَمَانِكَ، وَحِرْزِكَ  وَسُلْطَانِكَ، وَحِجَابِكَ وَكَنَفِكَ، وَعِيَاذِكَ وَجَارِكَ، وَمِنْ جَارِ السُّوْءِ وَجَلِيْسِ السُّوْءِ، اِنَّكَ عَلٰى كُلِّ شيْءٍ قَدِيْرٌ، «اِنَّ وَلِيِّيَ اللهُ  الَّذِيْ نَزَّلَ الْكِتَابَ وَهُوَ يَتَوَلَّى الصَّالِحِيْنَ»

translation.en: Till You suffice me from the deceits and tricks and scoop out from me the eyes of the unbeliever and dumbstruck from me the tongues of the sinful ones, and detain the hands of the oppressions from me  and weaken their plots on me and kill them with their wrath, occupy their hearing, sight and mind, in all that You let me be in Your sincerity, protection, sanctuary, sovereignty, cover, guard, refuge and Your nearby, protect me from my evil neighbours and associates, indeed You possess power over all things.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ بِكَ اَعُوْذُ، وَبِكَ اَلُوْذُ، وَلَكَ اَعْبُدُ، وَاِيَّاكَ اَرْجُوْ، وَبِكَ  اَسْتَعِيْنُ، وَبِكَ اَسْتَكْفِيْ، وَبِكَ اَسْتَغِيْثُ، وَبِكَ اَسْتَنْقِذُ، وَمِنْكَ  اَسْئَلُ، اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَلَاتَرُدَّنِيْ اِلَّا بِذَنْبٍ  مَغْفُوْرٍ، وَسَعْيٍ مَشْكُوْرٍ، وَتِجَارَةٍ لَنْ تَبُوْرَ، وَاَنْ تَفْعَلَ بِيْ مَا اَنْتَ اَهْلُهُ، وَلَاتَفْعَلَ بِي مَا اَنَا اَهْلُهُ، فَاِنَّكَ اَهْلُ التَّقْوٰى وَاَهْلُ  الْمَغْفِرَةِ، وَاَهْلُ الْفَضْلِ وَالرَّحْمَةِ

translation.en: O' Allah, with You I seek refuge, with You I delighted, it is You I worship, unto You I put my hope and from You I seek for help, with You I suffice, from You I seek for assistance, with You I seek for rescue and from You I requested for every thing, so send Your blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad and don't reject me except all my sins are forgiving and all my effort being appreciated and un wasted transaction, bestowed on me what is worthy of You and don't bestowed on me what is worthy of me, indeed You possess piety, forgiveness and You are the possessor of favour and mercy.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَقَدْ اَطَلْتُ دُعَائِيْ، وَاَكْثَرْتُ خِطَابِيْ، وَضِيْقُ صَدْرِيْ  حَدَانِيْ عَلٰى ذٰلِكَ كُلِّهِ، وَحَمَلَنِيْ عَلَيْهِ، عِلْمًا مِنِّيْ بِاَنَّهُ يُجْزِيْكَ  مِنْهُ قَدْرُ الْمِلْحِ فِي الْعَجِيْنِ، بَلْ يَكْفِيْكَ عَزْمُ اِرَادَةٍ وَاَنْ يَقُوْلَ الْعَبْدُ بِنِيَّةٍ صَادِقَةٍ وَلِسَانٍ صَادِقٍ يَا رَبِّ، فَتَكُوْنَ عِنْدَ ظَنَّ  عَبْدِكَ بِكَ، وَقَدْ نَاجَاكَ بِعَزْمِ الْاِرَادَةِ قَلْبِيْ، فَاَسْاَلُكَ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ  عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَاَنْ تُقْرِنَ دُعَاۤئِيْ بِالْاِجَابَةِ مِنْكَ، وَتُبَلِّغَنِيْ مَا اَمَّلْتُهُ فِيْكَ، مِنَّةً مِنْكَ وَطَوْلًا، وَقُوَّةً وَحَوْلًا، لَاتُقِيْمُنِيْ مِنْ مَقَامِيْ هٰذَا اِلَّا بِقَضَاۤءِ جَمِيْعِ مَا سَاَلْتُكَ، فَاِنَّهُ عَلَيْكَ  يَسِيْرٌ، وَخَطَرَهُ عِنْدِيْ جَلِيْلٌ كَثِيْرٌ، وَاَنْتَ عَلَيْهِ قَدِيْرٌ، يَا سَمِيْعُ يَابَصِيْرُ

translation.en: O' my God! From this my position, I seek Your refuge from Hell fire, who ran away from You and come back to You, from the sins You attacked, and deficiency You exposed, then bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad and glance at me with blessing sight that will make me succeed by entering into Your Paradise, sympathize with me such sympathy that will rescued me from Your punishment, indeed the Paradise and Hell fire are Your own and they are at Your possession, the keys and the padlocks are Yours and You possess that strength, and unto You every thing is easy and simple.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَهٰذَا مَقَامُ الْعَاۤئِذِ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ، وَالْهَارِبِ مِنْكَ اِلَيْكَ، مِنْ ذُنُوْبٍ تَهَجَّمَتْهُ، وَعُيُوْبٍ فَضَحَتْهُ، فَصَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ  مُحَمَّدٍ، وَانْظُرْ اِلَيَّ نَظْرَةً رَحِيْمَةً اَفُوْزُ بِهَا اِلٰى جَنَّتِكَ، وَاعْطِفْ  عَلَيَّ عَطْفَةً اَنْجُوْ بِهَا مِنْ عِقَابِكَ، فَاِنَّ الْجَنَّةَ وَالنَّارَ لَكَ وَبِيَدِكَ، وَمَفَاتِيْحَهُمَا وَمَغَالِيْقَهُمَا اِلَيْكَ، وَاَنْتَ عَلٰى ذٰلِكَ قَادِرٌ، وَهُوَ عَلَيْكَ هَيِّنٌ يَسِيْرٌ

translation.en: So do for me what I have requested from You, O' The Mighty and there is no strength nor power except with Allah, the Exalted, The Greatest.

segments.arabic: فَافْعَلْ بِيْ مَا سَاَلْتُكَ يَا قَدِيْرُ، وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ اِلَّا بِاللهِ  الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيْمِ، وَحَسْبُنَا اللهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيْلُ، نِعْمَ الْمَوْلٰى وَنِعْمَ  النَّصِيْرُ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِيْنَ، وَصَلَّى اللهُ عَلٰى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِهِ الطَّاهِرِينَ

translation.en: Allah suffice us the excellent trustee; How excellent master You are!   How excellent Helper You are! All praise are being to God, the Lord of the worlds and may Your Blessing be upon our master, Muhammad and his purified family.

segments.arabic: وَصَلِّ اللَّهُمَّ عَلى سَيِّدِ الْأَنْبِياءِ ، وَخَيْرِ الْأَوْلِياءِ ، وَأَفْضَلِ الْأَصْفِياءِ ، وَأَعْلَى الْأَزْكِياءِ ، وَأَكْمَلِ الْأَتْقِياءِ ، أَرْسَلَهُ بِالْحَقِّ بَشيراً وَنَذيراً ، وَداعِياً إِلَى اللَّهِ بِإِذْنِهِ ، وَسِراجاً مُنيراً ، مُحَمَّدٍ الْمُصْطَفى وَآلِهِ مَفاتيحِ أَسْرارِ الْعُلى ، وَمَصابيحِ أَنْوارِ التُّقى .

translation.en: O’ Allah, send mercy upon the Leader of Prophets, the best of Guardians, the superior one among all the chosen ones, the mightiest among all the purified ones, and the most complete of all the pious ones whom You have sent as a bringer of good tidings and a warner, and the inviter towards Allah, and an illuminating lamp, Mohammad the chosen one (peace be upon him), and his Holy Progeny, who are the keys of mighty secrets and the glowing lamps of piousness. And peace be upon one who follows the guidance, and send mercy upon all the prophets and messengers, and all Your obedient ones from the heaven and the earth, and send the best mercy and salutations exclusively on Mohammad (peace be upon him). O’ Allah, have mercy upon us amongst them, and forgive us with them, with Your mercy, O’ the most merciful one.

segments.arabic: وَالسَّلامُ عَلى مَنِ اتَّبَعَ الْهُدى ، وَصَلِّ عَلى جَميعِ الْأَنْبِياءِ وَالْمُرْسَلِينَ وَعَلى أَهْلِ طاعَتِكَ أَجْمَعينَ ، مِنْ أَهْلِ السَّماواتِ وَالْأَرَضينَ ، وَاخْصُصْ مُحَمَّداً بِأَفْضَلِ الصَّلاةِ وَالتَّسْليمِ . أَللَّهُمَّ ارْحَمْنا فيهِمْ ، وَاغْفِرْ لَنا مَعَهُمْ ، بِرَحْمَتِكَ يا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمينَ .

أَللَّهُمَّ بِكَ يَصُولُ الصَّائِلُ ، وَبِقُدْرَتِكَ يَطُولُ الطَّائِلُ ، وَلا حَوْلَ لِكُلِّ ذي حَوْلٍ إِلّا بِكَ ، وَلا قُوَّةَ يَمْتازُها ذُوالْقُوَّةِ إِلّا مِنْكَ ، بِصَفْوَتِكَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ ، وَخِيَرَتِكَ مِنْ بَرِيَّتِكَ ، مُحَمَّدٍ نَبِيِّكَ وَعِتْرَتِهِ وَسُلالَتِهِ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَيْهِمُ السَّلامُ ، صَلِّ عَلَيْهِمْ وَاكْفِني شَرَّ هذَا الْيَوْمِ وَضُرَّهُ ، وَارْزُقْني خَيْرَهُ وَيُمْنَهُ.

translation.en: O’ Allah, the bearer bears with Your support, and the dominator dominates with the help of Your power, and there is not movement or power for any living being without Your help, and there is no ability which makes an able excel but it comes from You, I recall You by the right of Your chosen one between the creations, the selected one amongst all your inventions, Mohammad, Your Prophet, and his Holy Progeny (peace be upon them). Send mercy upon them and suffice me from the evil of this day and its harms, and make the good and desirable of this day as my share, and bless me with the best safety in all the works and deeds that I perform, and bless me with love and attainment of my wishes and suffice me from the deceiving rebels, and from all the powerful men who intend to harm me, so that I shall remain in Your shelter and refuge, from all calamities and punishments; and change all the frightening things from my deeds into peaceful and safe ones, and make all the obstacles easy for me so that no preventer prevents me from what I have decided, and no undesirable incidents like the sorrows and difficulties of cities descend on me; indeed You are able for all things; and all the cases return towards You, O’ He who has nothing like unto Him, and He is the Hearing, the Seeing, and All praise is due to Allah, Lord of the worlds.[18]

segments.arabic: وَاقْضِ لي في مُتَصَرَّفاتي بِحُسْنِ الْعافِيَةِ ، وَبُلُوغِ الْمَحَبَّةِ ، وَالظَّفَرِ بِالْاُمْنِيَّةِ ، وَكِفايَةِ الطَّاغِيَةِ الْمُغْوِيَةِ ، وَكُلِّ ذي قُدْرَةٍ لي عَلى أَذِيَّةٍ ، حَتَّى أَكُونَ في جُنَّةٍ وَعِصْمَةٍ مِنْ كُلِّ بَلاءٍ وَنِقْمَةٍ.

وَأَبْدِلْني فيهِ مِنَ الْمَخاوِفِ أَمْناً ، وَمِنَ الْعَوائِقِ فيهِ يُسْراً ، حَتَّى لايَصُدَّني صادٌّ عَنِ الْمُرادِ ، وَلايَحِلَّ بي طارِقٌ مِنْ أَذَى الْبِلادِ ، إِنَّكَ عَلى كُلِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ قَديرٌ ، وَالْاُمُورُ إِلَيْكَ تَصيرُ ، يا مَنْ لَيْسَ كَمِثْلِهِ شَيْ‏ءٌ ، وَهُوَ السَّميعُ الْبَصيرُ ، وَالْحَمْدُ للَّهِِ رَبِّ الْعالَمينَ .
رَبِّ مَنْ ذَا الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ فَلَمْ تُجِبْهُ

translation.en: My Lord, who is there that called upon You and You did not answer him?

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِيْ سَأَلَكَ فَلَمْ تُعْطِهِ

translation.en: And who is there that asked You and You did not give to him?
And who is there that whispered to You and You disappointed him?
Or drew near to You and You cast him away?
And my Lord, this is Pharaoh, the lord of mighty stakes,
Despite his obstinacy, disbelief, and tyranny,
And his claiming lordship for himself,
Though You knew that he would not repent,
Nor return, nor turn back,
Nor believe, nor humble himself,
Yet You answered his supplication,
And You granted him his request out of Your generosity,
And bounty, though what he asked was insignificant,
With You, though it was great in his sight,
So that Your proof might stand against him,
And to confirm it when he transgressed and disbelieved,
And exalted himself over his people and became arrogant,
And boasted over them in his disbelief,
And grew proud through his injustice to himself,
And was arrogant because of Your forbearance toward him,
So he decreed and judged against himself,
Out of his own audacity, that the recompense of one like him
Should be to be drowned in the sea,
So You repaid him according to what he judged for himself.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاَنَا عَبْدُكَ، اِبْنُ عَبْدِكَ وَابْنُ اَمَتِكَ

translation.en: My God, I am Your servant, the son of Your servant and Your maidservant.

segments.arabic: مُعْتَرِفٌ لَكَ بِالْعُبُودِيَّةِ، مُقِرٌّ بِاَنَّكَ اَنْتَ اللهُ

translation.en: Acknowledging servitude to You, confessing that You alone are God.
My Creator, I have no god besides You.
And I have no Lord other than You.
Certain that You are Allah, my Lord,
And to You is my return and my coming back.

segments.arabic: عَالِمٌ بِاَنَّكَ عَلٰى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْرٌ

translation.en: Knowing that You have power over all things.

segments.arabic: تَفْعَلُ مَا تَشَاءُ وَتَحْكُمُ مَا تُرِيْدُ

translation.en: You do whatever You will and decree whatever You wish.
None can reverse Your command.
And none can repel Your decree.
And You are the First and the Last,
The Manifest and the Hidden.
You did not come from anything,
Nor did You separate from anything.
You were before everything,
And You remain after everything.
And the One who brings all things into being.
You created everything with precise measure.
And You are the All-Hearing, the All-Seeing.
And I bear witness that You were so and will always be so.
And You are the Ever-Living, the Self-Subsisting.
Neither drowsiness nor sleep overtakes You.
You cannot be described by imaginations.
Nor perceived by the senses.
Nor measured by any measure.
Nor likened to mankind.
And all creation are Your servants and bondmaids.
You are the Lord, and we are the ones nurtured.
You are the Creator, and we are the created.
You are the Provider, and we are the provided-for.

segments.arabic: فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ يَا إِلٰهِيْ إِذْ خَلَقْتَنِي بَشَرًا سَوِيًّا

translation.en: So all praise is Yours, my God, for You created me a sound human being.
And You made me free of need and well provided.
After I was a small infant child.
You nourished me from the breast with wholesome milk.
And You fed me with good and pleasant nourishment.
And You made me a male, well-formed and sound.

segments.arabic: فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ حَمْدًا إِنْ عُدَّ لَمْ يُحْصَ

translation.en: So Yours is praise, a praise that cannot be counted.

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ وُضِعَ لَمْ يَتَّسِعْ لَهُ شَيْءٌ

translation.en: And if placed, nothing could contain it.

segments.arabic: حَمْدًا يَفُوقُ عَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ حَمْدِ الْحَامِدِينَ

translation.en: A praise surpassing all praise of those who praise.
And rising above the praise of everything.
And it is greater and more majestic than all of that.
And whenever anything praises Allah,

segments.arabic: وَالْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ كَمَا يُحِبُّ أَنْ يُحْمَدَ

translation.en: All praise belongs to Allah as He loves to be praised.
All praise is to Allah, equal to the number of what He created.
And equal to the weight of what He created.
And equal to the weight of the greatest of what He created.
And by the weight of the lightest of what He created.
And by the number of the smallest of what He created.
All praise is to Allah until our Lord is pleased.
And after His pleasure.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُهُ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: And I ask Him to send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
And to forgive my sin.
And to set my affairs aright with praise.

segments.arabic: وَيَتُوبَ عَلَيَّ إِنَّهُ هُوَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيمُ

translation.en: And to turn to me in mercy; surely He is the Oft-Returning, the Merciful.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَاِنِّيْ اَنَا اَدْعُوكَ وَاَسْاَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ

translation.en: My God, I call upon You and ask You by Your Name,

segments.arabic: الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ صَفْوَتُكَ اَبُونَا اٰدَمُ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ

translation.en: By which Your chosen one, our father Adam, called upon You,

segments.arabic: وَهُوَ مُسِيْءٌ ظَالِمٌ حِيْنَ اَصَابَ الْخَطِيْئَةَ

translation.en: When he erred and wronged himself by committing the sin,
So You forgave him his sin,
And You turned toward him in mercy,
And You answered his supplication,
And You were near to him, O Near One.

segments.arabic: اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: That You send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,
And that You forgive my sin,
And be pleased with me.

segments.arabic: فَاِنْ لَمْ تَرْضَ عَنِّيْ فَاعْفُ عَنِّيْ

translation.en: And if You are not pleased with me, then pardon me,
For I am an offender, a wrongdoer, sinful and disobedient.
And a master may pardon his servant,
Even if he is not pleased with him.
And that You make Your creation pleased with me,
And remove from me what is due of Your right.

segments.arabic: وَاَسْاَلُكَ بِالِاسْمِ الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ نَبِيُّكَ إِدْرِيْسُ

translation.en: And I ask You by the Name with which Your prophet Idrīs called upon You,
When You raised him to a lofty station,
While You knew all that was from him,

segments.arabic: اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: That You send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,
And that You forgive my sin,
And that You conceal my faults from me.

segments.arabic: وَاَسْاَلُكَ بِالِاسْمِ الَّذِيْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ نَبِيُّكَ نُوْحٌ

translation.en: And I ask You by the Name with which Your prophet Nūḥ called upon You,

segments.arabic: حِيْنَ دَعَاكَ فِي قَوْمِهِ اَلْفَ سَنَةٍ اِلَّا خَمْسِيْنَ

translation.en: When he called upon You among his people for a thousand years minus fifty,
Yet his supplication only increased them in flight,
So You opened the gates of the sky with pouring water,
And caused the earth to burst forth with springs,

segments.arabic: فَالْتَقَى الْمَاءُ عَلٰى اَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ

translation.en: And the waters met upon a matter already decreed,
So You saved him, his family, and those with him,
And You made his descendants the ones who remained,

segments.arabic: اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: That You send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,
And that You forgive my sin,
And have mercy on me; surely You are the Most Merciful of the merciful.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِالِاسْمِ الَّذِي دَعَاكَ بِهِ نَبِيُّكَ إِبْرَاهِيمُ

translation.en: And I ask You by the Name with which Your prophet Abraham called upon You,

segments.arabic: حِينَ أُلْقِيَ فِي النَّارِ فَجَعَلْتَهَا عَلَيْهِ بَرْدًا وَسَلَامًا

translation.en: When he was cast into the fire and You made it cool and safe for him,
And You made him an imam for mankind,
And You granted him Isaac and Jacob,
And You placed prophethood and the Book in his descendants,
And You provided for him goodness in this world,
And surely in the Hereafter he is among the righteous,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: That You send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,
And that You forgive my sin,
And make me among his believing descendants,

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِالِاسْمِ الَّذِي دَعَاكَ بِهِ نَبِيُّكَ مُوسَى

translation.en: And I ask You by the Name with which Your prophet Moses called upon You,
When You spoke to him directly,

segments.arabic: وَفَلَقْتَ لَهُ الْبَحْرَ فَأَنْجَيْتَهُ وَمَنْ مَعَهُ

translation.en: And You split the sea for him and saved him and those with him,
And You drowned Pharaoh and all his troops,
And You gave him the Torah, containing guidance and light,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: That You send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,
And that You forgive my sin,
And deliver me from every distress and hardship.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِالِاسْمِ الَّذِي دَعَاكَ بِهِ نَبِيُّكَ عِيسَى

translation.en: And I ask You by the Name with which Your prophet Jesus called upon You,
When You created him without a father,
And You made his mother a sign for all worlds,
And You strengthened him with the Holy Spirit,
And he spoke to people in the cradle and in maturity,
And he gave life to the dead by Your permission,
And he cured the blind and the leper,
And You taught him the Book and wisdom,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: That You send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,
And that You forgive my sin,
And absolve me of all sins,

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِالِاسْمِ الَّذِي دَعَاكَ بِهِ نَبِيُّكَ دَاوُدُ

translation.en: And I ask You by the Name with which Your prophet David called upon You,
When You softened iron for him,
And taught him the making of armor,
And You gave him sovereignty and wisdom,
And decisive speech,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: That You send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,
And that You forgive my sin,
And strengthen me in obedience to You.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِالِاسْمِ الَّذِي دَعَاكَ بِهِ نَبِيُّكَ سُلَيْمَانُ

translation.en: And I ask You by the Name with which Your prophet Solomon called upon You,

segments.arabic: حِينَ وَهَبْتَ لَهُ مُلْكًا لَا يَنْبَغِي لِأَحَدٍ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ

translation.en: When You granted him a kingdom not befitting anyone after him,
And You subjected the wind and the jinn to him,
And the birds and the devils,
And You taught him the language of birds,
And You gave him wisdom and decisive judgment,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: That You send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,
And that You forgive my sin,

segments.arabic: وَتُسَخِّرَ لِي مَا فِي الدُّنْيَا بِطَاعَتِكَ

translation.en: And subject for me what is in the world through obedience to You,

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِالِاسْمِ الَّذِي دَعَاكَ بِهِ نَبِيُّكَ أَيُّوبُ

translation.en: And I ask You by the Name with which Your prophet Job called upon You,
When harm afflicted him and he remained patient,
And he did not despair nor complain,

segments.arabic: فَاسْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ فَكَشَفْتَ مَا بِهِ مِنْ ضُرٍّ

translation.en: So You answered him and removed the harm from him,
And You restored his family and the like of them with them,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: That You send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,
And that You forgive my sin,
And remove from me every harm and affliction.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِالِاسْمِ الَّذِي دَعَاكَ بِهِ نَبِيُّكَ يُوسُفُ

translation.en: And I ask You by the Name with which Your prophet Joseph called upon You,
When You brought him out of the well,
And You turned the plot of his brothers against themselves,
And You granted him sovereignty, judgment, and knowledge,
And You taught him the interpretation of dreams,
And You reunited him with his parents,
And You raised his parents upon the throne,
And they fell down prostrating before him,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: That You send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,
And that You forgive my sin,

segments.arabic: وَتَجْمَعَ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ أَحِبَّتِي عَلَى خَيْرٍ

translation.en: And reunite me with my loved ones upon goodness,

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِالِاسْمِ الَّذِي دَعَاكَ بِهِ نَبِيُّكَ يُونُسُ

translation.en: And I ask You by the Name with which Your prophet Jonah called upon You,
When he called upon You in the depths of darkness,

segments.arabic: أَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ

translation.en: That there is no god except You, glory be to You,
Indeed, I was among the wrongdoers,
So You answered him and saved him from distress,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: That You send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,
And that You forgive my sin,
And save me from every worry and distress.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ وَهٰذَا مَقَامُ الْعَاۤئِذِ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ، وَالْهَارِبِ مِنْكَ اِلَيْكَ، مِنْ ذُنُوْبٍ تَهَجَّمَتْهُ، وَعُيُوْبٍ فَضَحَتْهُ، فَصَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَانْظُرْ اِلَيَّ نَظْرَةً رَحِيْمَةً اَفُوْزُ بِهَا اِلٰى جَنَّتِكَ، وَاعْطِفْ عَلَيَّ عَطْفَةً اَنْجُوْ بِهَا مِنْ عِقَابِكَ، فَاِنَّ الْجَنَّةَ وَالنَّارَ لَكَ وَبِيَدِكَ، وَمَفَاتِيْحَهُمَا وَمَغَالِيْقَهُمَا اِلَيْكَ، وَاَنْتَ عَلٰى ذٰلِكَ قَادِرٌ، وَهُوَ عَلَيْكَ هَيِّنٌ يَسِيْرٌ

translation.en: O my God! This is the position of the one who seeks Your refuge from the Fire, and the one who flees from You to You, from sins that have assailed him and defects that have exposed him. So bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, and look at me with a merciful glance through which I may attain Your Paradise, and incline towards me with a kindness through which I may be saved from Your punishment. For indeed Paradise and Hell are Yours and in Your hand, and their keys and locks are Yours, and You have power over that, and it is easy and simple for You.

segments.arabic: فَافْعَلْ بِيْمَا سَاَلْتُكَ يَا قَدِيْرُ، وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ اِلَّا بِاللهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيْمِ، وَحَسْبُنَا اللهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيْلُ، نِعْمَ الْمَوْلٰى وَنِعْمَ النَّصِيْرُ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِيْنَ، وَصَلَّى اللهُ عَلٰى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِهِ الطَّاهِرِينَ

translation.en: So do for me what I have asked of You, O Mighty One! There is no power and no strength except with Allah, the Most High, the Most Great. Allah is sufficient for us and He is the best Disposer of affairs. How excellent a Master and how excellent a Helper! All praise belongs to Allah, Lord of the worlds. And may Allah bless our master Muhammad and his purified family.

text.en: 3 Dua FromNahjulbalghabyImam Ali(as).
3 Dua

translation.en: O My God! Thou art the most attached to Thy lovers
and the most ready to assist those who trust in Thee.
Thou seest them in their concealments,

segments.transliteration: knowest whatever is in their consciences,

translation.en: and art aware of the extent of their intelligence.
Consequently, their secrets are open to Thee
and their hearts are eager from Thee.

segments.transliteration: If loneliness makes them desolate, Thy remembrance gives them solace

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ صُبَّتْ عَلَيْهِمُ الْمَصَائِبُ لَجأُوا إِلَى الاْسْتِجَارَةِ بِكَ،
segments.transliteration: If distresses befall them, they beseech Thy protection,

translation.en: because they know that the reins of affairs are in Thy hands,
and that their movements depend upon Thy commands.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنْ فَهِهْتُ عَنْ مسْأَلَتِي، أَوْ عَمِيتُ عَنْ طِلْبَتِي،

translation.en: O My God! If I am unable to express my request or cannot see my needs,

segments.arabic: فَدُلَّنِي عَلَى مَصَالِحِي، وَخُذْ بِقَلْبِي إِلَى مَرَاشِدِي،

translation.en: then guide me towards my betterment and take my heart towards the correct goal,

segments.arabic: فَلَيْسَ ذَاكَ بِنُكْر مِنْ هِدَايَاتِكَ، وَلاَ بِبِدْع مِنْ كِفَايَاتِكَ.

translation.en: for this is not against (the mode of) Thy guidance nor anything new against Thy ways of support.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ احْمِلْنِي عَلَى عَفْوِكَ، وَلاَ تَحْمِلْنِي عَلَى عدْلِكَ.

translation.en: O My God! Deal with me through Thy forgiveness and do not deal with me according to Thy justice.
O My God! Preserve (the grace of) my face with easiness of life
and do not disgrace my countenance with destitution,
lest I may have to beg a livelihood from those who beg from Thee,

segments.arabic: وَأَسْتَعْطِفَ شِرَارَ خَلْقِكَ،وَأُبْتَلَى بِحَمْدِ مَنْ أَعْطَانِي،

translation.en: try to seek the favour of Thy evil creatures, engage myself in praising those who give to me,
and be tempted in abusing those who do not give to me,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ مِنْ وَرَاءِ ذلِكَ كُلِّهِ وَلِيُّ الاْعْطَاءِ والْمَنْعِ،

translation.en: although behind all these Thou art the master of giving and denying.
. . . Verily Thou over all things, art the All-powerful. (Qur'an, 66: 8)

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لله الَّذِي لَمْ يُصبِحْ بِي مَيِّتاً وَلاَ سَقِيماً،

translation.en: Praise be to Allah! Who made me such that I have not died nor am I sick,
nor have my veins been infected with disease,
nor have I been hauled up for my evil acts,
nor have I forsaken my religion,
nor do I disbelieve in my Lord,
nor do I feel strangeness with my faith,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ مُعَذَّباً بَعَذابِ الاْمَمِ مِنْ قَبْلِي.

translation.en: nor have I been punished with the punishment of peoples before me.
I am a slave in Thy possession,I have been guilty of excesses over myself.

segments.arabic: لَكَ الْحُجَّةُ عَلَيَّ وَلاَ حُجَّةَ لِي،

translation.en: Thou hast exhausted Thy pleas over me and I have no plea (before Thee).

segments.arabic: لاَ أَسْتَطِيعُ أَنْ آخُذَ إِلاَّ مَا أَعْطَيْتَنِي،

translation.en: I have no power to take except what Thou givest me,
and I cannot evade except what Thou savest me from.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أَفْتَقِرَ فِي غِنَاكَ،

translation.en: O My God! I seek Thy protection from becoming destitute despite Thy riches,
from being misguided despite Thy guidance,

segments.arabic: أَوْ أُضَامَ فِي سُلْطَانِكَ، أَوْ أُضْطَهَدَ وَالاْمْرُ لَكَ!

translation.en: from being molested in Thy realm and from being humiliated while authority rests with Thee.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ نَفْسِي أَوَّلَ كَرِيمَة تَنْتَزِعُهَا مِنْ كَرَائِمِي، وَأَوَّلَ وَدِيعَة تَرْتَجِعُهَا مِنْ وَدَائِعِ نِعَمِكَ عِنْدِي!

translation.en: O My God! Let my spirit be the first of those good objects that Thou takest from me and the first trust out of Thy favours held in trust with me.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمْ إِنَّا نَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ نَذْهَبَ عَنْ قَوْلِكَ،أَوْ نُفْتَتَنَ عَنْ دِينِكَ،

translation.en: O My God! We seek Thy protection from turning away from Thy command or revolting against Thy religion,

segments.arabic: أَوْ تَتَابَعَ بِنَا أَهْوَاؤُنَا دُونَ الْهُدَى الَّذِي جَاءَ مِنْ عِنْدِكَ!
segments.transliteration: or being led away by our desires instead of by guidance that comes from Thee.

translation.en: Nahjulbalagha page

text.en: Dua SabasabSahifa Mahdi(ajtfs).
Background

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.transliteration: Fa awjasa fee nafsihee kheefatan moosaa

translation.en: So then Moosa became nervous, a little anxious.

segments.arabic: قُلْنَا لاَ تَخَفْ اِنَّکَ اَنْتَ الْاَعْلٰي
segments.transliteration: qulnaa laa takhaf innaka antal aa' ' laa

translation.en: We (Allah) said 'worry not. You will positively have the Upper hand.

segments.arabic: وَ اَلْقِ مَا فِيْ يَمِيْنِکَ تَلْقَفْ مَا صَنَعُوْا اِنَّمَا صَنَعُوْا کَيْدُ سٰحِرٍ وَلاَ يُفْلِحُ السّٰحِرُ حَيْثُ اَتٰي
segments.transliteration: waa alqi maa fee yameenika talqaf maa s'ana-o'o innamaa s' ana-o'o kaydu saahir wa laa yuflih'ussah'iru haythu ataa

translation.en: (Staff): it will swallow up the Spellbinding artifice (ropes looking like Snakes) manipulated by a sorcerer who Shall not be successful, Whatever tricks he plays.

segments.arabic: فَاُلْقِيَ السَّحَرَۃُ سُجَّدًا قَالُوْآ اٰمَنَّا بِرَبِّ هٰرُوْنَ وَ مُوْسٰي
segments.transliteration: fa-ulqiyas sah'aratu sujjadan qaaloo aamannaa bi-rabbi Haroona wa Moosa

translation.en: Then the sorcerers put their foreheads on The ground and announced 'We believe In the Lord of Moosa and Haroon'
Thus They there were defeated and brought low.

segments.arabic: فَوَقَعَ الْحَقُّ وَ بَطَلَ مَا کَانُوا يَعْمَلُوْنَ
segments.transliteration: fa-waqa-a'l h'aqqu wa bat' ala maa kaanoo yaa'-maloon

translation.en: Thus the truth was established and that which they were doing was made vain

segments.arabic: فَاَوْحَيْنَآ اِلٰي مُوْسٰي اَنِ اضْرِبْ بِّعَصَاکَ الْبَحْرَ
segments.transliteration: fa-awh aynaa ilaa moosaa aniz'rib bi-a' s' aakal bah'ra

translation.en: Then We inspired Moosa Saying: 'Strike The sea with your staff'.

segments.arabic: فَاَنْفَلَقَ فَکَانَ کُلُّ فِرْقٍ کَالطَّودِ الْعَظِيْمِ
segments.transliteration: fan- falaqa fakaana kulli firqin kattawdil azeem

translation.en: Then it put apart (the sea) into two high mountains of water.

segments.arabic: عُذْتُ بِاللهِ رَبِّيْ وَ رَبِّ کُلِّ شَيْءٍ مِّنْ سِحْرِ کُلِّ سَاحِرٍ
segments.transliteration: u'd'tu billaahi rabbee wa rabbi kulli shay-im min sih'rin kulli saah'irin'w

translation.en: I have taken refuge with Allah, my Lord, And Lord of one and all magicians,

segments.arabic: وَّ غَدْرِ کُلِّ غَادِرٍ وَّ مَکْرِ کُلِّ مَاکِرٍ
segments.transliteration: wa ghadrikulli ghaadirin wa makrikulli maakirin'w

translation.en: The deceit of the treacherous, the trickery Of the swindlers,

segments.arabic: وَّ مِنْ شَرِّ کُلِّ سَآمَّۃٍ وَ هَآمَّۃٍ وَ لَآمَّۃٍ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharri kulli saaammatin'w wa haaammatin wa laammatin

translation.en: And from the harm of all the Poisonous animals, Vicious reptiles, Vicious reptiles, Vile disposition

segments.arabic: وَّ مِنْ شَرِّ کُلِّ ذِيْ شَرٍّ وَّ اسْتِکْلاَبِ کُلِّ ذِيْ صَوْلَۃٍ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharri kullid'ee sharrin'w wastiklaabi kullid'ee s'awlatin'w

translation.en: And from the evil of all wickedness, From the violent fury of the oppressors,

segments.arabic: وَّ غَلَبَۃِ کُلِّ عَدُوٍّ وَ شَمَاتَۃِ کُلِّ کَاشِحٍ
segments.transliteration: wa ghalabati kulli a'duwwin'w wa shamaatati kulli kaashih'in

translation.en: And the highhandedness of all Enemies, And the intrigue of the secret Plotters.
I repulsed their offensive assault in the name of Allah.
I took refuge with Allah from Their evil.
I asked for Allah's help against Them.
I cut off the neck of their false Pretensions by the Divine Wisdom.

segments.arabic: وَ تَحَصَّنْتُ بِقُوَّۃِ اللهِ مِنْ جُنُوْدِهِمْ

translation.en: I walled in inside the Divine Fortress to defend against their Soldiers.

segments.arabic: وَ دَفَعْتُهُمْ عَنِّيْ بِدِفَاعِ اللهِ الْقَاهِرِ وَ سُلْطَانِهِ الْبَاهِرِ وَ رَمَيْتُهُمْ بِسَهْمِ اللهِ الْقَاتِلِ وَ سَيْفِهِ الْقَاطِعِ اَخَذْتُهُمْ بِبَطْشِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: wa dafaa' tuhum a'nnee bi-difaa-i'llaahil qaahiri wa sult'aanihil baahiri wa ramaytuhum bisahmillaaahil qaatili wa sayfihil qaat'i-i' akhad'tuhum bi-bat'shillaahi

translation.en: I pushed them back by the Predominant thrust of Allah, The distinct Sovereign, I hit and killed them by the Deadly arrow and sharp sword Of Allah, I caught hold of them, With the superior might of Allah,
Dispersed them with the Permission of Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa farraqtuhum faf- reeqan bi-h' awlillaahi

translation.en: Threw them into chaos by the Divine decisive method
Pulled them to pieces with the Strength of Allah,
Scattered them to the wind, Divided and forsaken, with the Power of Allah.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّۃَ اِلاَّ بِاللهِ الْعَظِيْمِ
segments.transliteration: wa laa h' awla wa laa quwwati illaa billaahil a'z'eem.

translation.en: There is no power and no Might except Allah's the Greatest.
I defeated the dishonest trick Ster with the powerful army Of Allah.

segments.arabic: الْاَغْلَبِ وَ قَهَرْتُ مَنْ عَادَانِيْ بِسُلْطَانِ اللهِ الْاَکْبَرِ
segments.transliteration: aghlabi wa qahharta man a'adaanee bi-sult'aanil-laahil akabari

translation.en: I overcame the hostile enemy With the authority of Allah, The great.

segments.arabic: وَ دَمَّرْتُ مَنْ قَصَدَنِيْ بِحَوْلِ اللهِ الْاَعْظَمِ
segments.transliteration: wa dammartu man qas'adanee bi-h' awlil- laahil aa'- z'ami

translation.en: I destroyed him, who hatched Plots, with the infallible Strategy of the Almighty Allah.

segments.arabic: وَ تَبَرَّاْتُ مَنْ اَذَانِيْ بِاَخْذِ اللهِ الْاَسْرَعِ
segments.transliteration: wa tabarraa-tu man ad'aanee bi-akhad'illaahil asra-i'

translation.en: I broke the conspirator into Pieces with subtle policy of Allah, the Ever Alert.

segments.arabic: وَ دَفَعْتُ مَنِ اعْتَدٰي عَلَيَّ بِجَلاَلِ اللهِ الْاَمْنَعِ
segments.transliteration: wa dafaa' 'tu mania' 'tadaa a'layya bi 'jalaalillaahil amna' i'

translation.en: I pushed back the transgressor In the name of the Glory of Allah, the impregnable.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّۃَ وَلاَ مَنْعَۃَ وَلاَ عَوْنَ وَلاَ نَصْرَ
segments.transliteration: wa laa h' awla wa laa quwwata wa laa man-a'ta wa laa a'wna wa laa nas'ra

translation.en: There is no power, no might, no dignity, no victory, no help,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ اَيْدَ وَلاَ عِزَّۃَ اِلاَّ بِاللهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيْمِ
segments.transliteration: wa laa ayda wa laa i' zzata illaa billaahil a'liyyil a'z'eem.

translation.en: No support, no honour, except (with) Allah, the High, the Mighty.

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَّي اللهُ عَلٰي سَيِّدِنَا وَ نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَّ اٰلِهٖ الطَّاهِرِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: wa s'allallaahu a' laa sayyidinaa wa nabiyyinaa muh'ammadin'w wa aalihit' t' aahireen

translation.en: Allah's blessings be on our Master and prophet Muhammad, and on his pure Descendents.
have conquered the troops (of enemies) with the power Of Allah;

segments.arabic: قَذَفْتُ فِيْ قُلُوْبِهِمُ الرُّعْبَ بِاِذْنِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: qad'aftu fee quloobihimur rua'- ba bi-id'nillaahi

translation.en: I put terror in their hearts, By the support of Allah.

segments.arabic: سَلَطْتُّ عَلٰي اَفْئِدَتِهِمُ الرَّوْعَ بِعِزَّۃِ اللهِ

translation.en: I created fear in the pit of their Stomachs, in the name of Allah's honour.
They have been thrown into Chaos by me with the authority Of Allah.
They have been torn to pieces By me with the strength of Allah.
They have been destroyed and Ruined by me with the omnipotence of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَخَذْتُ اَسْمَاعَهُمْ وَ اَبْصَارَهُمْ وَ جَوَارِحَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: akhad'tu asmaa-a'hum wa abs'aarahum wa jawaarih' ahum

translation.en: I have taken away their power Of hearing and seeing; and destroyed The strength of their Limbs,

segments.arabic: وَ اَرْکَانَهُمْ بِبَطْشِ اللهِ الْقَوِيِّ الشَّدِيْدِ وَ شِدَّتِهٖ
segments.transliteration: wa arkaanahum bi-bat'shil laahil qawiyyish shadeedi wa shiddatihee

translation.en: and their confidence, With the superior unyielding Persevering and resolute power Of Allah.

segments.arabic: وَ دَفَعْتُهُمْ عَنَّا بِحَوْلِ اللهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيْمِ
segments.transliteration: wa dafaa' ' tuhum a'nnaa bi-h'awlillaahil a'liyyil a'z'eemi

translation.en: They have been driven away By me with the help of Divine Strategy of Allah, the High, The Great, and the All-powerful.

segments.arabic: وَ قُوَّتِهٖ وَ هَزَمْتُهُمْ وَ جُنُوْدَهُمْ وَ اَبْطَالَهُمْ وَ شُجْعَانَهُمْ وَ اَنْصَارَهُمْ اَعْوَانَهُمْ بِاَيْدِ اللهِ الْمَتِيْنِ وَ نَصْرِ اللهِ الْمُبِيْنِ
segments.transliteration: wa quwwatihee wa hazamtuhum wa junoodahum wa abt' aalahum wa shuj-a'a- nahum wa ans' aarahum wa aa'-waanahum bi-aydil- laahil mateeni wa nas'arillaahil mubeen

translation.en: They have been conquered, Worn down, disgraced, together With their soldiers, helpers, and Well- wishers by me with the Unfaltering aid, true and evident Help of Allah.

segments.arabic: مَهْزُوْمِيْنَ مَرْعُوْبِيْنَ خَآئِفِيْنَ خَآئِبِيْنَ مَخْسُوْئِيْنَ مَغْلُوْبِيْنَ مَکْسُوْرِيْنَ مَاسُوْرِيْنَ مَبْهُوْرِيْنَ مَکْهُوْرِيْنَ مَقْهُوْرِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: mahzoomeena mar-o'obeena khaaa-ifeena khaaa-ibeena makhsoo-eena maghloobeena maksooreena maasooreena mabhooreena mak-hooreena maqhooreena

translation.en: They are now overwhelmed, Over-awed, Frightened, Frustrated, Humiliated, Over-powered, Broken down Bound in chains, Out of breath, Tamed, Subdued.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ ادْفَعْهُمْ عَنَّا بِحَوْلِکَ وَ قُوَّتِکَ وَ بَطْشِکَ وَ سَطْوَتِکَ مُفَرَّقِيْنَ مُمَزَّقِيْنَ مَبْهُوْرِيْنَ مَکْهُوْرِيْنَ مَقْهُوْرِيْنَ مَدْحُوْرِيْنَ مَذْعُوْرِيْنَ صَاغِرِيْنَ خَاسِرِيْنَ مَخْذُوْلِيْنَ مَغْلُوْبِيْنَ مَبْهُوْتِيْنَ مَشْمُوْتِيْنَ مُتَبَدِّلِيْنَ تَائِهِيْنَ فِيْ ذَهَابِهِمْ عَامِهِيْنَ فِيْ اَيَابِهِمْ حَآئِرِيْنَ فِيْ مَاٰبِهِمْ صَآئِرِيْنَ فِيْ تَبَابِهِمْ مَشْغُوْلِيْنَ بَاَجْسَادِهِمْ مَکْلُوْمِيْنَ فِيْ اَبْدَانِهِمْ مَجْرُوْحِيْنَ فِيْ اٰرَائِهِمْ مَضْرُوْبِيْنَ بِرِقَابِهِمْ مَّمْنُوْعِيْنَ عَنْ سِهَامِهِمْ مَّرْدُوْعِيْنَ عَنْ مَرَامِهِمْ مَّجْبُو ْهِيْنَ فِيْ کَرَّتِهِمْ مَصْرُوْعِيْنَ عَنْ وَّجْهَتِهِمْ شَمَاتًا مِّنْ مُّتَوَجِّهِهِمْ شَتَاتًا عَنْ مُّجْتَمِعِهِمْ مَّطْبُوْعًا عَلٰي قُلُوْبِهِمْ مَخْتُوْمًا عَلٰي اَفْئِدَتِهِمْ مَّغْشِيًّا عَلٰي اَبْصَارِهِمْ مَعْقُوْدًا عَلٰي اَلْسِنَتِهِمْ مَّرْبُوْطًا عَلٰي اَحْلاَمِهِمْ وَ اَفْهَامِهِمْ مَّشْدُوْدًا عَلٰيٓ اَيْدِيْهِمْ وَ اَرْجُلِهِمْ مَّدْرُوْئًا بِکَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma dafaa'hum a'nnaa bi-h'awlika wa quwwatika wa bat' shika wa sat'watika mufarraqeena mumazzaqeena mabhooreena mak-hooreena maqhooreena madh'ppreena mad'-o'oreena s'aaghireena khaasireena makhd'ooleena maghloobeena mabhooteena mashmooteena mutabaddileena taa-iheena fee d'ahaabihim a'amiheena fee ayaabihim h'aaa-ireena fee maaabihim s'aaa-ireena fee tabaabihim mashghooleena bi-ajsaa- dihim makloomeena fee abdaanihim majrooh'eena fee aaraaa-ihim maz'roobeena bi-riqaabihim mamnoo-e'ena a'n shaamihim mardoo-e'ena a'n maraamihim majbooheena fee karratihim mas'roo-e'ena a'n wijhatihim shamaatam min mutawajjihhim shataatan a'n mujtami-i'him mat'boo-a'n a'laa quloobihim makhtooman alaa af-idatihim maghshiyyan a' laa abs' aarihim maa'-qoodan a'laa alsinatihim marboot'an a'laa ah'laamihim wa afhaamihim mashdoodan a'laa aydeehim wa arjulihim madroo-an bika

translation.en: O Allah keep them away From us by Thy wisdom and Might, power and authority; Disunited, Mutilated, Out of breath, Tamed, Subdued, Distressed, Frightened, Humbled, Wandering, Forsaken, Overpowered Bewildered, Disappointed, Obscured, Gone astray while taking flight, Confused in their intentions, Perplexed in their hideouts, Tied up to their destruction, Engrossed in their physical Pleasures, With wounded bodies, Deteriorated minds, Their expectations cut off, Their arms and ammunition Unusable, Disillusioned in their intentions, Exposed to disgrace in their Escape, Thrown on the ground upon Their faces, Confused in their thoughts, Their hearts sealed off, Their hearts sealed off Their moratorium put aside, Their perception dimmed, Tied up to sluggishness, Addicted to sensuous pleasures And (restricted) to their limited Understanding, Their help exposed to calamities, And their soldiers pushed back.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ فِيْ نُحُوْرِهِمْ مُسْتَعَأذَا بِکَ مِنْ شُرُوْرِهِمْ مُّسْتَغَاثًا بِکَ عَلَيْهِمْ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma fee nuh'oorihim musta-a'ad'an bika min shuroorihim musta-ghaathan bika a'layhim

translation.en: O Allah, keep safe from their Plan of action, Give help to ward off their Mischief,

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ فَخُذْهُمْ اَخْذَکَ السَّرِيْعَ وَ سَلِّطْ عَلَيْهِمْ بَأْسَکَ الْفَجِيْعَ مَدْفُوْعِيْنَ مَصْرُوْعِيْنَ مَذْرُوْعِيْنَ فِيْ اَنْفُسِهِمْ مَّسْحُوْرِيْنَ فِيْ اَبْشَارِهِمْ مَّکْبُوْبِيْنَ عَلٰي وُجُوْهِهِمْ وَ مَنَاخِرِهِمْ مَّخْنُوْقِيْنَ بِحِبَالِهِمْ وَ اَوْتَارِهِمْ مُّقَيَّدِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma fakhud'hum akhd'akas saree-a' wa sallit' a' layhim basakal fajee-a' madfoo-e'ena mas'roo-e' ena mas'roo-e'ena fee anfusihim mas-h'ooreena fee abshaarihim makboobeena a'laa wujoohihim wa manaa- khirihim makhnooqeena bi-h'ibaaa-ilahum wa awtaarihim muqayyadeena

translation.en: O Allah, keep safe from their Plan of action, Give help to ward off their Mischief, O Allah, apprehend them At once, be hard on Them and bring loss upon them As a punishment; Denied by everybody, thrown To the ground, Choked in breathing, Spell-bound in enjoyment, Thrown with the face on the Ground, suffocated Strangled in their own ropes and strings.

segments.arabic: بِالسَّلاَسِلِ مُکَبَّلِيْنَ بِالْاَغْلاَلِ مُقَرَّنِيْنَ فِيْ الْاَصْفَادِ مَطْرُوْقِيْنَ بِمَطَارِقِ الْبَلاَيَا مَصْعُوْقِيْنَ بِصَوَاعِقِ الْمَنَايَا مَقْطُوْعًا دَابِرُهُمْ مَّفْجُوْعًا غَابِرُهُمْ مَّسْلُوْبًا سَالِبُهُمْ مَغْلُوْبًا غَالِبُهُمْ يَا مَوْجُوْدًا عِنْدَ الشَّدَائِدِ اَمَّنْ يُّجِيْبُ الْمُضْطَرَّ اِذَا دَعَاهُ
segments.transliteration: bis-salaasili mukabbaleena bil-aghlaali muqarraneena fil-as'faadi mat'rooqeena bi-mat'aariqil balaayaa mas'-o'oqeena bi-mat'aariqil balaayaa maqt'oo-an dabiruhum mafjoo-a'n ghaabiruhum maslooban saalibuhum maghlooban ghaalibuhum yaa mawjoodan i'ndash shadaaa-idi amman'y yujeebul muz' t' arra id'aa da-a'ahu

translation.en: Bound in fetters, Kept tied up, Shackled in chains, Knocked down by disastrous Calamities, one after another Screaming in the agony of Trial, Cut off from roots, Abandoned to calamities and Loss, Deprived of their booty and Loot, Their supremacy vanquished O He who is always close by In misfortunes, Comes to help the needy when He makes a request.

segments.arabic: کَتَبَ اللهُ لَاَغْلِبَنَّ اَنَا وَ رُسُلِيْ

translation.en: Allah has pre-ordained, 'victory for Me and for My Messengers'
Verily Allah is strong and Mighty.

segments.arabic: اَلَآ اِنَّ حِزْبَ اللهِ هُمُ الْغَالِبُوْنَ اِنَّ وَلِيِّيَ اللهُ الَّذِيْ نَزَّلَ الْکِتَابَ
segments.transliteration: alaaa inna h'izbal- laahi humul ghaaliboon inna waliyyillaahul lad'ee nazzalal kitaaba

translation.en: Beware! Certainly only the Surely my protector is Allah, Who sent down the book, and Stands by the virtuous.

segments.arabic: وَ هُوَ يَتَوَلَّي الصَّالِحِيْنَ اِنَّا کَفَيْنَاکَ الْمُسْتَهْزِئِيْنَ فَاَيَّدْنَا الَّذِيْنَ اٰمَنُوْا عَلٰي عَدُوِّهِمْ فَاَصْبَحُوْا ظَاهِرِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: wa huwa yatawallas' s'aalih'eena innaa kafaynaakal mustahzi-eena fa-ayyadnal lad'eena aamanoo a'laa a'duwwihim fa-as'bah'oo z'aahireena

translation.en: Verily, I ( Allah ) am sufficient For you against the sham Defiers, So I helped the faithful against Their enemies, and truth came To light.

segments.arabic: لَآ اِلٰهَ اِلاَّ اللهُ وَحْدَهٗ اَنْجَزَ وَعْدَهٗ وَ نَصَرَ عَبْدَهٗ وَ اَعَزَّ جُنْدَهٗ وَ هَزَمَ الْاَحْزَابَ وَحْدَهٗ
segments.transliteration: laaa i laaha illaallaahu wah'dahoo an-jaza waa'-dahoowa nas'ara a'bdahoo wa a-a'zza jundahoo wa hazamal ah'zaaba wah'dahoo

translation.en: There is no god save Allah, The one and only, who fulfilled His promise, and helped His servant and backed up His Group; And Himself destroyed the Hordes of the (infidels).

segments.arabic: فَلَهٗ الْمُلْکُ وَ لَهٗ الْحَمْدُ اَلْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ رَبِّ الْعٰلَمِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: falahul mulku wa lahul h'amd al-h'amdu lillaahi rabbil a' alameen

translation.en: So, His is the Kingdom, and (all) praise is for Him (Only). (all) praise is (only) for Allah, The Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اَصْبَحْتُ فِيْ حِمَي اللهِ الَّذِيْ لاَ يُسْتَبَاحُ وَ فِيْ ذِمَّتِهِ الَّتِيْ لاَ تُخْفَرُ وَ فِيْ جَوَارِ اللهِ الَّذِيْ لاَ يُمْنَعُ وَ فِيْ عِزَّۃِ اللهِ الَّتِيْ لاَ تُسْتَذَلُّ وَ لاَ تُقْهَرُ وَ فِيْ حِزْبِهِ الَّذِيْ لاَ يُهْزَمُ وَ فِيْ جُنْدِهِ الَّذِيْ لَا يُغْلَبُ وَ فِيْ حَرِيْمِهِ الَّذِيْ لاُ يُسْتَبَاحُ
segments.transliteration: as'bah'tu fee h'imallaahil lad'ee laa yustabaah'u wa fee d'immatihil latee laa tukhfaru wa fee jawaarillaahil lad'ee laa yumna-u' wa fee i'zzatillaahil latee laa tustand'allu wa laa tuqharu wa fee h'id'bihil lad'ee laa yuhzamu wa fee jundihil lad'ee laa yughlabu wa fee h' areemihil lad'ee laa yustabaah'u

translation.en: From the very beginning I Have taken refuge, in the safest Sanctuary of Allah, Under His shelter, never left Unguarded, Under the protection of Allah, Never rendered inaccessible, In the unconquerable and unfailing might of Allah, With His servants who are Never humbled, With His fighting force, never Subdued, In His unassailable quarters.

segments.arabic: بِاللهِ اِفْتَتَحْتُ وَ بِاللهِ اسْتَنْجَحْتُ وَ تَعَزَّزْتُ وَ تَعَوَّقْتُ وَ انْتَصَرْتُ وَ بِعِزَّۃِ اللهِ قَوَيْتُ عَلٰيٓ اَعْدَآئِيْ
segments.transliteration: bil-laahif-tatah'tu wa bil-laahis tanjah'tu wata-a'zzaztu wa ta- a'wwaqtu wan-tas'artu wa bi-i'zzatillaahi qawytu a'laa aa'-daaa-ee

translation.en: In the name of Allah I began, And in the name of Allah I Came through, Became powerful, attacked and Won With the help of Allah's might I overthrow my enemies.

segments.arabic: بِجَلاَلِ اللهِ وَ کِبْرِيَآئِهٖ ظَهَرْتُ عَلَيْهِمْ وَ قَهَرْتُهُمْ بِحَوْلِ اللهِ وَ قُوَّتِهٖ
segments.transliteration: bi-jalaalillaahi wa kibriyaaa-ihee z' ahartu a'layhim wa qahartuhum bi-h'awlillaahi wa quwwatihee

translation.en: By the glory and greatness of Allah I defeat them, Subdue them with the wisdom And strength of Allah.

segments.arabic: وَ تَقَوَّيْتُ وَاحْتَرَسْتُ وَاسْتَعَنْتُ عَلَيْهِمْ بِاللهِ وَ فَوَّضْتُ اَمْرِيْٓ اِلَي اللهِ
segments.transliteration: wa taqawwaytu wah'tarastuwas-ta-a'ntu a'layhim billaahi wa fawwaz' tu amree ilallaahi

translation.en: I grow strong, remain on guard And step forth against them in The name of Allah, And commit my affairs to Allah.
Allah is sufficient for us, He is the best Protector.

segments.arabic: وَتَرٰهُمْ يَنْظُرُوْنَ اِلَيْکَ وَ هُمْ لاُ يُبْصِرُوْنَ
segments.transliteration: wa taraahum yanz'uroona ilayka wa hum laa yubs'iroona

translation.en: And you see them looking Towards you, but they do not See.

segments.arabic: صُمٌّ بُکْمٌ عَمْيٌ فَهُمْ لاَ يَرْجِعُوْنَ
segments.transliteration: s'ummun bukmun u'myun fahum laa yarji-o'ona

translation.en: Deaf, dumb and blind, And they will not return.

segments.arabic: اَتٰي اَمْرُ اللهِ عَلَتْ کَلِمَۃُ اللهِ وَ لاَحَتْ حُجَّۃُ اللهِ عَلٰي اَعْدَآئِ اللهِ الْفَاسِقِيْنَ وَ جُنُوْدِ اِبْلِيْسَ
segments.transliteration: ataa amrullaahi a'lat kalimatullaahi wa laa h'at h'ujjatul-laahi a'laa aa'-daa-il laahil faasiqeena wa junoodi ibleesa

translation.en: Command of Allah has come, Word of Allah has prevailed, The evident proof of Allah Has been made known to the Shameless enemies of Allah, The lackeys of Satan.

segments.arabic: اَجْمَعِيْنَ لَنْ يَّضُرُّوْکُمْ اِلَّآ اَذًي وَ اِنْ يُّقَاتِلُوْکُمْ يُوَلُّوْکُمُ الْاَدْبَارَ ثُمَّ لاَ يُنْصَرُوْنَ
segments.transliteration: ajma-e'ena lan'yaz'urroo kum illaa ad'an wa in'y yuqaatiloo kum yuwalloo kumul adbaara thumma laa yuns'aroon

translation.en: They cannot prevail against you But may injure you a little; And if they fight they will run Away; Having no help thereafter,

segments.arabic: ضُرِبَتْ عَلَيْهِمُ الذِّلَّۃُ وَ الْمَسْکَنَۃُ اَيْنَمَا ثُقِفُوْآ اُخِذُوْا وَ قُتِّلُوْا تَقْتِيْلاً
segments.transliteration: z'uribat a'layhimud' d'illatu wal maskanah aynamaa thuqifoo ukhid'oo wa quttiloo taqteelaa

translation.en: Inflicted with disgrace and Misery, Very sour when caught hold of, and always destroyed in Battles.

segments.arabic: لاَ يُقَاتِلُوْنَکُمْ جَمِيْعًا اِلاَّ فِيْ قُرًي مُّحَصَّنَۃٍ اَوْ مِنْ وَّرَآئِ جُدُرٍ بَاْسُهُمْ بَيْنَهُمْ شَدِيْدٌ
segments.transliteration: laa yuqaatiloonakum jamee-a'n illaa fee quram muh'as's'anatin awmin wa raaa-i judur baasuhum baynahum shadeedun

translation.en: They will not fight (in the Open battlefield) unless barricaded From all sides, and what Is out of sight is tightly Enclosed.
They fight fiercely among Themselves; You think they are united, But their minds are confused,
Because they are a people Without the power to reason

segments.arabic: تَحَصَّنْتُ مِنْهُمْ بِاَحْصَنِ الْحُصُوْنِ فَمَا اسْتَطَاعُوْآ اَنْ يَّظْهَرُوْهُ وَمَا اسْتَطَاعُوْا لَهٗ نَقْبًا
segments.transliteration: tah'as's'antu minhum bi-ah's'anil h'us'ooni famaas t'aa-o'o an'y yaz'haroohu wa mas tat'aa-o'o lahoo naqban

translation.en: I have kept myself safe from Them inside fully fortified Enclosure, Neither they can come in at Daytime nor break in at night.
I receive strong support.

segments.arabic: وَ الْتَجَأتُ اِلٰي کَهْفٍ مَّنِيْعٍ وَّ تَمَسَّکْتُ بِالْحَبْلِ الْمَتِيْنِ
segments.transliteration: wat tajaa-tu illa kah'fim manee-i'n wa tamassaktu bil h'ablil mateen

translation.en: I have entered the impregnable Sanctuary, And I cling and hold to the Steady rope.

segments.arabic: وَ تَدَرَّعْتُ بِدِرْعِ اللهِ الْحَصِيْنَۃِ وَ تَدَرَّقْتُ بِدَرْقَۃِ اَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ
segments.transliteration: wa qad raa'-tu bidir'i'l- laahil h' as'eenati wa tadarraqtu bidarqati ameeril moo-mineena a'layhis salaamu

translation.en: I protect myself with the Reliable strength of Allah, With the shield of Ameerul Momineen, peace be on him

segments.arabic: وَ تَعَوَّذْتُ بِعَوْذَتِهٖ وَ تَخَتَّمْتُ بِخَاتَمِ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ دَاؤٗدَ عَلَيْهِمَا السَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: wa ta-a'wwad'tu bi- a'wd'atihee wa takhattamtu bikhaatima sulaymaanibni daawuda a'layhimas saalaam

translation.en: And take refuge with his Security, And put the seal-ring of Sulayman, son of Dawood Peace be on them, on my Finger.
Wherever I go I find peace and Security,

segments.arabic: وَّ عَدُوِّيْ فِي الْاَهْوَالِ حَيْرَانٌ قَدْ حُفَّ بِالْمَهَانَۃِ
segments.transliteration: wa a'duwwee fil ahwaali hayraanun qadh'uffa bil mahaanati

translation.en: But my enemies are in disarray, Despised and ridiculed by one And all,

segments.arabic: وَ اُلْبِسَ بِالْذُّلِّ وَ الصِّغَارِ وَ قُمِّعَ بِالصِّفَادِ
segments.transliteration: wa ulbisa bid'd'ulli was's'ighaari wa qummi-a'bis's'ifaadi

translation.en: Wrapped in disgrace and Inferiority, Bound in chains.

segments.arabic: وَ ضَرَبْتُ عَلٰي نَفْسِيْ سُرَادِقَ الْحَيَاطَۃِ
segments.transliteration: wa z'arabtu a'laa nafsee suraadiqal h' ayaati ati

translation.en: I have set up protective Defence all around me,

segments.arabic: وَ اَدخَلْتُ عَلَيَّ هَيَا کِلَ الْهَيْبَۃِ

translation.en: I am inside majestic palaces,
Coronated with a dignified Crown,

segments.arabic: وَ تَقَلَّدْتُّ بِسَيْفِ الْعِزِّ الَّذِيْ لاَ يُفَلُّ
