segments.transliteration: wa taqalladtu bi-sayfil i'zzil lad'ee laa yufallu

translation.en: The mighty ever-sharp sword in My hand,

segments.arabic: وَ خَفِيْتُ عَنِ الْعُيُونِ وَ تَوَارَيْتُ عَنِ الظُّنُوْنِ
segments.transliteration: wa khafeetu a'nil u'yooni wa tawaaraytu a'niz' z'unoono

translation.en: Beyond the visual range of evil Eyes, Away from the dubious Surmises.

segments.arabic: وَ اَمِنْتُ عَلٰي رُوْحِيْ وَ سَلِمْتُ عَنْ اَعْدَآئِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa amintu a'laa rooh'ee wa salimtu a'n aa'-daaa-i-ee

translation.en: My soul is at peace, Free from the danger of Enemies,

segments.arabic: فَهُمْ لِيْ خَاضِعُوْنَ وَ عَنِّيْ خَآئِفُوْنَ وَ مِنِّيْ نَافِرُوْنَ
segments.transliteration: fahum lee khaaz' i-o'ona wa a'nnee khaaa-ifoona minnee naafiroona

translation.en: Who have been tamed: and Afraid of me, are running away.
As wild asses take to flight, Scared of a lion.

segments.arabic: مِنْ قَسْوَرَۃٍ قَصُرَتْ اَيْدِيْهِمْ عَنْ بُلُوْغِ
segments.transliteration: min qaswaratin qas'urat aydeehim a'n bulooghi

translation.en: They are helpless to carry out Intrigues, which they planned against me.

segments.arabic: مَا يُؤَمِّلُوْنَهٗ فِيَّ وَ صُمَّتْ اٰذَانُهُمْ عَنْ سَمَاعِ کَلاَمٍ
segments.transliteration: maa yooammiloonahoo fiyya wa s'ummat aad'aanuhum a'n simaa-i' kalaamin'y

translation.en: Their ears have turned deaf To hearing slanders about me,
Their eyes have been deprived of sight,
Their tongues are unable to Speak (ill) of me,
Their minds are unfit to Identify me,

segments.arabic: وَ تَخَوَّفَتْ وَ خَفَّتْ قُلُوْبُهُمْ مِنِّيْ
segments.transliteration: wa takhawwafat wa khaffat quloobuhum minnee

translation.en: their hearts take fright and Sink low before me.
Trembling they break off, Afraid of me,

segments.transliteration: wan-falla h' adduhum wan kasarat shawkatuhum

translation.en: Abandoning their aim, Their pomp and show ending In a fiasco,
Their determination is Crumbling, Their followers are deserting,
Their affairs are in a mess, Discord in their opinions,

segments.arabic: وَ ضَعَفَ جُنْدُ هُمْ وَانْهَزَمَ جَيْشُهُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa z' a-ufa junduhum wan hazama jayshuhum

translation.en: their helpers are weakened, Their army is vanquished,
As foretold those who return Back would be routed Altogether.

segments.arabic: وَ يُوَلُّوْنَ الدُّبُرَ بَلِ السَّاعَۃُ مَوْعِدُ هُمْ وَ السَّاعَۃُ اَدْهٰي وَ اَمَرُّ عَلَوْتُ عَلَيْهِمْ بِعُلُوِّ اللهِ الَّذِيْ کَانَ يَعْلُوْ بِهٖ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ صَاحِبُ الْحُرُوْبِ وَ مُنَکِّسُ الرَّايَاتِ وَ مُفَرِّقُ الْاَقْرَانِ
segments.transliteration: wa yuwalloonad dubura balis saa-a'tu maw-i'duhum was saa-'tu adhaa wa amarru a'lawtu a'layhim bi-u'luwwil- laahil lad'ee kaana yaa'-loobihee a'liyyun a'layhis salaamu s' aah'ibul h'uroobi wa munakissur raayaati wa mufarriqul aqraan

translation.en: Certainly this is the promised Hour, the hour of disaster, I break into pieces their Haughtiness by the sublime ness of Allah In the manner of Ali (peace be on him), the matchless warrior, who turned upside down antagonism, and pointed out suppositions and surmises.

segments.arabic: وَ تَعَوَّذْتُ مِنْهُمْ بِالْاَسْمَآئِ الْحُسْنٰي وَ کَلِمَاتِهِ الْعُلْيَا
segments.transliteration: wa ta-a'wwad'tu minhumbil asmaa-il h'usnaa wa kalimaati- hil u'lyaa

translation.en: I found favourable circumstances In the name of the Wonderful names and sublime verses of Allah.

segments.arabic: وَ ظَهَرْتُ عَلٰي اَعْدَآئِيْ بِبَاسٍ شَدِيْدٍ وَّ اَمْرٍ عَتِيْدٍ وَّ اَذْلَلْتُهُمْ وَ قَمَعْتُ رُئُوْسَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa z'ahartu a'laa aa'-daaa-ee bibaasin shadeedin'w wa amrin a'teedin wa ad'laltuhum wa qamaa'-tu ru-oosahum

translation.en: I beat my enemies black and Blue beyond repair, with Powerful blows, Their equipment is now in my Control, They are humbled, their ring- Leaders are exterminated.

segments.arabic: وَ وَ طِئْتُ رِقَابَهُمْ وَ ظَلَّتْ اَعْنَاقُهُمْ لِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa wat'i-tu riqaabahum waz'allat aa'-naaquhum lee

translation.en: Their guards and defenses lay In ruins, Their heads submissively hang In shame.

segments.arabic: حَاضِعَۃً قَدْ خَابَ مَنْ نَّاوَانِيْ وَهَلَکَ مَنْ عَادَانِيْ
segments.transliteration: khaa'i-e'ena qad-khaaba man naawaanee wa halaka man a' adaanee

translation.en: He who came after me has been waylaid, and he who Fought me has been liquidated.

segments.arabic: فَاَنَا الْمُ ؤْيَّدُ الْمَحْبُوْرُ الْمُظَفَّرُ الْمَنْصُوْرُ

translation.en: So I am victorious, happy, successful, triumphant.

segments.arabic: قَدْ لَزِمَتْنِيْ کَلِمَۃُ التَّقْوٰي وَاسْتَمْسَکْتُ بِالْعُرْوَۃِ الْوُثْقٰي وَاعْتَصَمْتُ بِالْحَبْلِ الْمَتِيْنِ
segments.transliteration: qad lazimatnee kalimatut taqwaa wastamsaktu bil-u'rwatil wuthqaa waa'-tas'amtu bilh'ab- lil mateeni

translation.en: Verily I faithfully adhere to Pious expression, and hold Fast the safest handle (Islam): The strong rope is in my grip.

segments.arabic: فَلَنْ يَّضُرَّنِيْ بَغْيُ الْبَاغِيْنَ وَلاَ کَيْدُ الْکَآئِدِيئنَ وَلاَ حَسَدُ الْحَاسِدِيْنَ اَبَدَ الْاٰبِدِيْنَ وَ دَهَرَ الدَّاهِرِيْنَط
segments.transliteration: falayn'y yaz' urranee baghyul baagheena wa laa kaydul kaaa-ideena wa laa h'asadul h'aasideena abadal aabideena wa dahard dahireen

translation.en: No more will the revolt of traitors, Deceit of imposters, or Ill-will of the greedy harm Me, till eternity.
Never shall any one deceive Me.
Never shall any one hurt me.
Never shall any one take me For granted.

segments.arabic: قُلْ اِنَّمَا اَدْعُوْ رَبِّيْ لاَ اُشْرِکُ بِهٖ اَحَدًا
segments.transliteration: qul innamaa ad-o'o rabbee laa ushriku bihee ah'adan

translation.en: Say: I call upon my Lord: and I do not associate any one with Him.

segments.arabic: يَا مُتَفَضِّلُ تَفَضَّلْ عَلَيَّ بِالْاَمْنِ عَلٰي رُوْحِي
segments.transliteration: yaa mutafaz'z'ilu tafaz'z'al a'layya bil amni a' laa ruh'ee

translation.en: O Bestower of bounties! Give Me peace of mind,
and protection against my enemies:

segments.arabic: وَ حُلْ بَيْنِيْ وَ بَيْنَهُمْ بِالْمَلَآئِکَۃِ الْغِلاَظِ الشِّدَادِ
segments.transliteration: wa h'ul baynee wa baynahum bil malaaa-ikatil ghilaaz'ish shidaadi

translation.en: and Appoint between me and them Exacting and active angels.

segments.arabic: وَ اَيِّدْنِيْ بِالْجُنُوْدِ الْکَثِيْرَۃِ وَ الْاَرْوَاحِ الْمُطِيْعَۃِ
segments.transliteration: wa ayyidnee bil junoodil katheerati wal arwaah'il mut'ee-a'ti

translation.en: Help me with a large army and Obedient assistants,
who could turn them away with penetrating superior means,
drive them away with death-dealing blows,
hit them with Sharp swords,
shoot at them burning fireballs,

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَرِيْقِ اللَّاهِبِ وَ الشُّوَاظِ الْمُحْرِقِ
segments.transliteration: wal h' areeqil laahibi washshuwaaz' il muh'riqi

translation.en: burn them with consuming heat, reduce them to ashes with blazing flames.

segments.arabic: وَ يُقْذَفُوْنَ مِنْ کُلِّ جَانِبٍ دُحُوْرًا
segments.transliteration: wa yuqd' afoona min kulli jaanibi duh'ooran

translation.en: Under attack from all sides,
in perpetual torment,

segments.arabic: اِلاَّ مَنْ خَطِفَ الْخَطْفَۃَ اِنِّيْ قَذَفْتُهُمْ
segments.transliteration: illaa man khat'ifal khat' fata innee qad'aftuhum

translation.en: except Him who is torn off by a wild beast (death)

segments.arabic: وَ رَجَزْتُهُمْ وَ دَهَرْتُهُمْ وَ غَلَبْتُهُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa rajaztuhum wa dahartuhum wa ghalabtuhum

translation.en: I attacked, challenged, came Upon, and overpowered Them,

segments.arabic: بِبِسْمِ اللهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيْمِ وَ طٰهٰ وَ يٰسٓ
segments.transliteration: bibismil- laahir-rah'maanir rah'eem wa t'aahaa wa yaaseeen

translation.en: with the help of 'Bismillaahir-Rah' maanir-Raheem', 'T'aahaa', 'Yaa Seeen',

segments.arabic: وَ الذَّارِيَاتِ وَ الطَّواسِيْنَ وَ التَّنْزِيْلَ

translation.en: 'D' aariyaat', 'T'uwaseen' 'Tanzeel',

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَوَامِيْمَ وَ کٓهٰيٰعٓصٓ وَ حٰمٓ عٓسٓقٓ وَ قٓ
segments.transliteration: wal h'awaameema wa kaaaf-haa-yaa-a'yyyn s'aaad wa h'aa-meeem-a'yyyn- seen-qaaaf wa qaaf

translation.en: 'H'awaameem' revelaton and wisdom, 'Kaaaf-Haa-Yaa-A'yyyn S'aaad' 'H'aa-Meeem: A'yyyn-Seeen-Qaaaf' 'Qaaf'

segments.arabic: وَ الْقُرْاٰنِ الْمَجِيْدِ وَ نٓ وَ الْقَلَمِ وَمَا يَسْطُرُوْنَ
segments.transliteration: wal qur-aanil majeed wa noon wal qalami wa maa yust'uroona

translation.en: of the Holy Quraan, 'Noon', 'the pen and 'what is written',
'stages of the stars':, 'T'oor',

segments.arabic: وَ کِتَابٍ مَّسْطُوْرٍ فِيْ رَقٍّ مَّنْشُوْرٍ
segments.transliteration: wa kitaabim mast'oorin fee raqqim manshoorin

translation.en: 'The written Book, spread in pages',
'The House in heaven above the Kaa'-bah',

segments.arabic: وَ السَّقْفِ الْمَرْفُوْعِ وَ الْبَحْرِ الْمَسْجُوْرِ
segments.transliteration: was saqfil marfoo-i' wal bah'ril masjoori

translation.en: 'The raised skies:' 'The swelling sea'.

segments.arabic: اِنْ عَذَابَ رَبَّکَ لَوَاقِعٌ مَّالَهٗ مِنْ دَافِعٍ
segments.transliteration: inna a'd' aaba rabbika lawaaqi-um maa laahoo min daafi-i'n

translation.en: Verily, the wrath of your Lord Will fall on, which no one Can put off.

segments.arabic: فَوَلَّوْا مُدْبِرِيْنَ وَ عَلٰي اَعْقَابِهِمْ نَاکِصِيْنَ وَ اَصْبَحُوْا فِيْ دِيَارِهِمْ جٰثِمِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: fawallaw mudbireena wa a'laa aa' 'qaabihim naakis'eena wa as'bah'oo fee diyaarihim jaathimeena

translation.en: So they went backwards, Showing their heels; Isolated, sat in their homes, Sleepy and gloomy.

segments.arabic: فَوَقَعَ الْحَقُّ وَ بَطَلَ مَا کَانُوْا يَعْمَلُوْنَ
segments.transliteration: fawaqa-a'l h'aqqu wa bat'ala maa kaanoo yaa'-maloona

translation.en: Truth won, And what they were doing had Been rendered useless.
Overpowered, overthrown, Humbled.
Spell of magic broken: there was total submission.
So Allah protected him (Moosa) from the evil tricks,

segments.arabic: وَ حَاقَ بِهِمْ مَّا کَانُوْا بِهٖ يَسْتَهْزِئُ وْنَ
segments.transliteration: wa h'aaqa bihim maa kaanoo bihee yastahzi-oona

translation.en: and put an end to their intentions, and to their comical ridicule,

segments.transliteration: wa h'aaqa bi-aali fir-a'wna sooo-il a'd'aabi

translation.en: and brought down severe punishment upon the people of pharaoh:
and the deceitful artifice was frustrated by the Divine wisdom.
Allah is the best planner.

segments.arabic: اَلَّذِيْنَ قَالَ لَهُمُ النَّاسُ اِنَّ النَّاسَ قَدْ جَمَعُوْا لَکُمْ
segments.transliteration: al-lad'eena qaala lahumun naasu innan naasa qad jama-o'o lakum

translation.en: Some people tried to scare a Group of ( faithful ) men by Telling them that an united Crowd was planning to hurt Them,
but their faith grew more Strong,

segments.arabic: وَّ قَالُوْا حَسْبُنَا اللهُ وَ نِعْمَ الْوَکِيْلُ
segments.transliteration: wa qaaloo h'asbunallaahu wa nia'-mal wakeel

translation.en: And they said 'Allah is Sufficient for us. He is the Best Protector'.
From Allah favours and Bounties came in for them,
And the evil touched them not,
Because they obediently Aspired for Allah's blessings.
Allah is the Possessor of Abundant favours.

segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee a-o'od'u bika min shuroorihim

translation.en: O Allah, I seek Thy protection Against their evil designs,
And Thou will nip in the bud Their opposition.

segments.arabic: وَ اَسْئَلُکَ مِنْ خَيْرِ مَا عِنْدَکَ يَا اَللهُ
segments.transliteration: wa as-a-luka min khayri maa i'ndaka yaa allaahu

translation.en: I ask for the good, which is With Thee, O Allah.

segments.arabic: فَسَيَکْفِيْکَهُمُ اللهُ وَ هُوَ السَّمِيْعُ الْعِلِيْمُ

translation.en: 'Verily soon you will find that Allah is sufficient for you. He is (the Best) Hearer, Knower.

segments.arabic: جِبْرَائِيْلُ عَنْ يَّمِيْنِيْ وَ مِيْکَآئِيْلُ عَنْ يَّسَآرِيْ
segments.transliteration: jibraa-eelu a'n yameenee wa meekaaa-eelu a'n yasaaa-ree

translation.en: 'Jibraa-eel is on my right hand, Meekaa-eel is on my left,

segments.arabic: وَ مُحَمَّدٌ صَلَّي اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ اٰلِهٖ اَمَامِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa muh'ammadun s'allallaahu a'layhi wa aalihee amaamee

translation.en: Muhammad (blessings of Allah Be on him and his descendents is in front,

segments.arabic: وَ اَمِيْرُ الْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ وَ رَآئِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa ameerul moo-mineena a'layhis salaamu waraaa-ee

translation.en: Ameerul Moomineen, peace be On him, is on my back,
and Allah, the High, stays continually near over me.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ جَعَلَ بَيْنَ الْبَحْرَيْنِ حَاجِزًا
segments.transliteration: yaa man ja-a'la baynal bah'rayni h'aajizan

translation.en: O He who put a barrier Between the two seas,
Draw a curtain between me And my enemies,

segments.arabic: فَلَنْ يَّصِلُوْا اِلَيَّ اَبَدًا بِشَيْئٍ يَّسُوْئُ نِيْ
segments.transliteration: falan yas'iloo ilayya abdan bishay-in yasoo-u nee

translation.en: So that no harm may reach Me.

segments.arabic: وَ بَيْنِيْ وَ بَيئنَهُمْ سِتْرُ اللهِ

translation.en: Between me and my enemies Allah is the shield.
Verily Allah's shield is the Safest.
Allah is sufficient to protect Me,
There is no one who can Protect me except Him.

segments.arabic: وَ اِذَا قَرَاْتَ الْقُرْاٰنَ جَعَلْنَا بِيْنَکَ وَ بَيْنَ الَّذِيْنَ لاَ يُؤْمِنُوْنَ بِالْاٰخِرَۃِ حِجَابًا مَّسْتُوْرًا
segments.transliteration: wa id'aa qaraa-tal qur-aana ja-a'lnaa baynaka wa baynal lad'eena laa yoo-minoona bil-aakhirati h'ijaabam mastooran

translation.en: 'When you recite the Holy Quran, We ( Allah) draw an invisible Curtain between you and those Who do not believe in the Hereafter,

segments.transliteration: wa ja-a'lnaa a' laa quloobihim akinnatan

translation.en: And make their minds senile,

segments.arabic: اَنْ يَّفْقَهُوْهُ وَ فِي اٰذَانِهِمْ وَقْرًا
segments.transliteration: an yafqahoohu wa fee aad'aanihim waqran

translation.en: And their ears deaf,

segments.arabic: وَ اِذَا ذَکَرْتَ رَبَّکَ فِي الْقُرْاٰنِ وَحْدَهٗ وَلَّوْا عَلٰٓي اَدْبَارِهِمْ نُفُوْرًا
segments.transliteration: wa id'aa d'akarta rabbaka fil qur-aani wah'dahoo wallaw a'laa adbaarihim nufooraa

translation.en: When you recite (in Quran) That Allah is one they turn Sour in aversion.

segments.arabic: اِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِيْٓ اَعْنَاقِهِمْ اَغْلٰلاً فَهِيَ اِلَي الْاَذْقَانِ فَهُمْ مُقْمَحُوْنَ
segments.transliteration: innaa ja-a'lnaa feee aa'-naa-qihim aghlaalan fahiya ilal ad'qaani fahum muqmah'oon

translation.en: Verily We have put on their Necks chains reaching unto the Chins, so that they are made Stiff-necked.

segments.arabic: وَ جَعَلْنَا مِنْ بَيْنِ اَيْدِيْهِمْ سَدًّا وَّ مِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ سَدًّا فَاَغْشَيْنَا هُمْ فَهُمْ لاَ يُبْصِرُوْنَ
segments.transliteration: wa ja-a'lnaa mim bayni aydeehim saddan'w wa min khalfihim saddan fa-aghshaynaa hum fahum laa yubs'iroon

translation.en: And We have set a bar before Them and a bar behind them, And (thus) have covered them So that they see not.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اضْرِبْ عَلَيَّ سُرَادِقَ حِفْظِکَ الَّذِيْ لاَ تَهْتِکُهُ الرِّيَاحُ وَلاَ تَخْرِقُهٗ الرِّمَاحُ
segments.transliteration: allaahummaz'-rib a'layya suraadiqa h'ifz'ikal lad'ee laa tahtikuhur riyaah'u wa laa takhriquhur rimaah'u

translation.en: 'O Allah, draw Thy protective Curtains around me, that cannot be disheveled by Blowing winds, Nor can be pierced by spears.

segments.arabic: وَقِ رُوْحِيْ بِرُوْحِ قَدْسِکَ الَّذِيْ مَنْ اَلْقَيْتَهٗ عَلَيْهِ اَصْبَحَ مُعَظَّمًا فِيْ عُيُوْنِ النَّاظِرِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: wa laa takhriquhur rimaah'u waqi rooh'ee bi-rooh'i qudsikal lad'ee man-al qaytahoo a'layhi as'bah'a mu-az'z'aman fee u'-yoonin naaz'ireena

translation.en: Through Thy Holy Spirit save My soul, for whoso comes Under its cover, is reverently Looked upto,

segments.arabic: وَ کَبِيْرًا فِيْ صُدُوْرِ الْخَلْقِ اَجْمَعِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: wa kabeeran fee s'udooril khalqi ajma-e'en

translation.en: And it creates awe and fear in the hearts of all the created Beings.

segments.arabic: وَ وَفِّقْ لِيْ بِاَسْمَآئِکَ الْحُسْنٰي وَ اَمْثَالِکَ الْعُلْيَا
segments.transliteration: wa waffiq lee bi-asmaaa-ikal h'usnaa wa amthaalikal u'lyaa

translation.en: Allow me to recite Thy Beautiful names, And remember Thy high Similitues.

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ صَلاَحِيْ فِيْ جَمِيْعِ مَا اُئَمِّلُهٗ مِنْ خَيْرِ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْاٰخِرَۃِ
segments.transliteration: waj-a'l s'alaah'ee fee jamee-i' maa u-ammiluhoo min khayrid dunyaa wal aakhirah

translation.en: Give me peace and goodness In that which I aspire for this Worldly life, and for the Hereafter.
Turn away the eyes of intense Starer,

segments.arabic: وَاصْرِفْ قُلُوْبَهُمْ مِّنْ شَرِّ مَا يُضْمِرُوْنَ اِلٰي خَيْرِ
segments.transliteration: was'rifquloobahum min sharri maa yuz'miroona ilaa khayri

translation.en: And substitute the hatred, Concealed in their hearts, with Goodwill,
Which no one can do (except Thee).
O Allah, Thou art my Sanctuary, Therefore, I take refuge with Thee.
Thou art my support, Therefore, I seek Thy protection.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ ذَلَّتْ لَهٗ رِقَابُ الْجَبَابِرَۃِ
segments.transliteration: yaa man d' allat lahoo riqaabul jibaabirati

translation.en: O He before Whom the Arrogant necks bow down,

segments.transliteration: wa khaz' a-a't lahoo aa'-naaqul firaa-i'nah

translation.en: and the heads of pharaohs Bent low in submission.

segments.arabic: اَجِرْنِيْ مِنْ خِزْيِکَ وَ مِنْ کَشْفِ سِتْرِکَ
segments.transliteration: ajirnee min khiz-yika wa min kashfi sitrika

translation.en: Make me steady and careful Not be put to shame, Not to leave Thy protective Shield,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ نِسْيَانِ ذِکْرِکَ وَ الْاِنْصِرَافِ عَنْ شُکْرِکَ
segments.transliteration: wa min nisyaani d'ikrika wal ins'iraafi a'n shukrik

translation.en: Not to forget Thy remembrance, Not to be ungrateful to Thee.

segments.arabic: اَنَا فِيْ کَنَفِکَ فِيْ لَيْلِيْ وَ نَهَارِيْ
segments.transliteration: anaa fee kanfika fee laylee wa nahaaree

translation.en: I remain under Thy protection, In darkness, or in daytime,
At home, or in journey.

segments.arabic: ذِکْرُکَ شِعَارِيْ وَ الثَّنَآئُ عَلَيْکَ دِثَارِيْ

translation.en: Thy remembrance is my habit, Thy glorification is my routine.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنَّ خَوْفِيْ اَصْبَحَ وَ اَمْسٰي مُسْتَجِيْرًا بِاَمَانِکَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma inna khawfee as'bah'a wa amsaa mustajeeran bi-amaanika

translation.en: O Allah, day in and day out My fear seeks Thy peaceful Sanctuary:

segments.arabic: فَاَجِرْنِيْ مِنْ خِزْيِکَ وَ مِنْ شَرِّ عِبَادِکَ
segments.transliteration: fa-ajirnee min khiz-yhika wa min sharri i'baadika

translation.en: So keep away Thy displeasure, And the hatred of Thy servants From me.
Surround me with Thy Protective shield,
And take me in under the Canvass of Thy favours.
Deliver my soul through Thy Generosity.

segments.arabic: وَاکْفِنِيْ مِنْ مَّ ؤُنَۃِ اِنْسَانِ سَوْئٍ

translation.en: Set me free from the necessity Of going to wicked men for Help.

segments.arabic: وَّ اَعُوْذُبِکَ مِنْ قَرِيْنِ سَوْئٍ وَّ سَاعَۃِ سَوْئٍ
segments.transliteration: wa-a-o'od'u bika min qareenin sooo-in wa saa-a'ti sooo-in

translation.en: I seek Thy support to avoid Corrupt companions, Ominous moments,

segments.arabic: وَ شَمَاتَۃِ الْاَعْدَآئِ وَ جَهْدِ الْبَلَآئِ
segments.transliteration: wa shamaatatil aa'-daaa-i wa jahdil balaaa-i

translation.en: Hostile enemies, Threatening calamities.

segments.arabic: وَ اَعُوْذُ بِکَ مِنْ طَوَارِقِ اللَّيْلِ وَ النَّهَارِ
segments.transliteration: wa a-o'od'u bika min t'awaariqil layli wan nahaari

translation.en: I take refuge with Thee from The ups and downs of day-to-day life,
Except those events which follow the safe and true track, On account of Thy mercy,
O the Most Merciful.

segments.arabic: وَّ صَلَّي اللهُ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ وَّ اٰلِهِ الطَّاهِرِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: wa s'allallaahu a'laa muh'ammadin'w wa aalihit't'aahireen

translation.en: Sent blessings on Mohammad and on his pure descendents.
Allah is sufficient for me, He is the Best Protector,
The Best Master, The Best Supporter.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيْمِوَ الضُّحٰي.وَ الَّيْلِ اِذَا سَجٰي.مَا وَدَّعَکَ رَبُّکَ وَمَا قَلٰي.وَلَلْاٰخِرَۃُ خَيْرٌ لَّکَ مِنَ الْاُوْلٰي.وَ لَسَوْفَ يُعْطِيْکَ رَبُّکَ فَتَرْضٰي.اَلَمْ يَجِدْکَ يَتِيْمًا فَاٰوٰي.وَ وَجَدَکَ ضَآلاًّ فَهَدٰي.وَ وَجَدَکَ عَآئِلاً فَاَغْنٰي.فَاَمَّا الْيَتِيْمَ فَلاَ تَقْهَرْ.وَاَمَّا السَّآئِلَ فَلاَ تَنْهَرْ.وَاَمَّا بِنِعْمَۃِ رَبِّکَ فَحَدِّثْ.
segments.transliteration: bismillaahir- rah'maanir-rah'eem waz'z'uh'aa wal layli id'aa sajaa maa wadda-a'ka rabbuka wa maa qalaa wa lal-aakhiratu khayrul laka minal oolaa wala-sawfa yua'-eeka rabbuka fatarz'aa alam yajidka yateeman' fa-aawaa wa wajadaka z'aaallan' fahadaa wa wajadaka a' aa-ilan' fa-aghnaa fa-aghnaa fa-ammal-yateema falaa taqhar wa ammassaaa-ila falaa tanhar wa ammaa bi-nia'-mati rabbika fah'addith allaahumma s'alli a'laa muh'ammadin'w wa aali muh'ammad.

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.'By the brightness of the day, and the night when it is quietest: Your Lord has not forsaken You, nor He is angry with you.Verily that which is to come Will be better for you than That which is past.Soon your Lord will give unto You so that you will be content.Did He not find you an Orphan and take care? Did He not find you wandering And show the (Right) Direction? Did He not find you a destitute And make independent? So oppress not an orphan: Turn not away the needy, But call out the favours and Bounties of your Lord.O Allah, send blessings on Muhammad and on the Progeny of Muhammad.

text.en: Significance of this Dua
Morn-Eve 13Resources

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ إِنّي أَصْبَحْتُ اُشْهِدُكَ وَكَفى بِكَ شَهِيداً
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee asbahto ush-hedoka wa kafaa beka shaheedan,

translation.en: O Allah! I have dawned while I hold You witness and You are sufficient for me as a Witness,

segments.transliteration: wa ush-hedo malaa-ekataka wa hamalata a’rsheka,

translation.en: and I hold as witnesses for me all the angels and the bearers of Your Throne

segments.transliteration: wa sukkaana sab-e’ samaawaateka wa arzeeka,

translation.en: and the dwellers of the Seven Heavens and Your Earths
and Your Prophets and Your Messengers
and the Successors of Your Prophets and Messengers

segments.transliteration: was saaleheena min e’baadeka, wa jamee-a’ khalqeka.

translation.en: and the noblemen from Your servants and all the creation.

segments.transliteration: fash-had lee - wa kafaa beka shaheedan –

translation.en: Thus bear witness for me and suffice me as a Witness

segments.arabic: أَنّي أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ أَنْتَ اللهُ لا إِلهَ إِلّا أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: annee ash-hado annaka antal laaho laa elaaha illaa antal

translation.en: that I bear witness that verily You are Allah, there is no God except You,
You alone are worshipped, and You don't have a partner,

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّداً صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ

translation.en: and that Mohammad (peace be upon him and his progeny)
is Your Servant and Messenger,

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّ كُلَّ مَعْبُودٍ مِمَّا دُونَ عَرْشِكَ إِلى قَرارِ أَرْضِكَ السَّابِعَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa anna kulla ma’boodin mimmaa doona a’rsheka elaa qaraare arzekas saa-be-a’tis

translation.en: and that all those who are worshipped between Your Throne and the surface of Your seven Earths,

segments.arabic: السُّفْلى باطِلٌ مُضْمَحِلٌّ ما خَلا وَجْهَكَ الْكَريمَ

translation.en: are all invalid and void except for Your Self.

segments.transliteration: hu a-a’zzo wa akramo, wa ajallo wa

translation.en: Indeed He is much glorious, mightier, and greater

segments.arabic: مِنْ أَنْ يَصِفَ الْواصِفُونَ كُنْهَ جَلالِهِ

translation.en: than what the describers describe as His True Glory

segments.arabic: أَوْ تَهْتَدِيَ الْقُلُوبُ إِلى كُنْهِ عَظَمَتِهِ

translation.en: or to which the hearts guide as His True Greatness

segments.arabic: يا مَنْ فاقَ مَدْحَ الْمادِحينَ فَخْرُ مَدْحِهِ

translation.en: O' He whose Praise is much more valuable than the exaltation of the exalters,
and His true appraisal has surpassed the description of the describers,

segments.arabic: وَجَلَّ عَنْ مَقالَةِ النَّاطِقينَ تَعْظيمُ شَأْنِهِ
segments.transliteration: a a’n maqaalatin naateqeena ta’zeemo sanehe

translation.en: and the Honour of His Magnificence is higher than the speech of the speakers,
bless Mohammad and his holy progeny,
and do with me what You are worthy of,
O' He who is Worthy of Piety and Forgiveness.

segments.arabic: لا إِلهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لا شَريكَ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: laa elaaha illal laaho wahdahu laa shareeka lahu,

translation.en: There is no God but Allah alone, He has no Partner,
Glorified is Allah and with His Praise,
I seek Forgiveness from Allah, and turn towards Him,

segments.arabic: ما شاءَ اللهُ وَلا قُوَّةَ إِلّا بِاللهِ
segments.transliteration: maa shaa-al laaho, wa laa quwwata illaa billaah,

translation.en: hatever He wishes takes place, there is no Power except Allah,

segments.transliteration: howal awwalo wal aakhero waz zaahero wal baateno,

translation.en: He is the First and the Apparent and the Hidden,
the Kingdom belongs to Him alone and all Praises are due to Him,

segments.transliteration: yohyee wa yomeeto wa yomeeto wa yohyee

translation.en: He gives life and death, and gives death and life,

segments.transliteration: wa howa hayyun laa yamooto, be-yadehil khayro

translation.en: He is the Living who never dies, in His hands is all Good,

segments.transliteration: wa howa a’laa kulle shay-in qadeer

translation.en: and He has Power over all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحانَ اللهِ وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ وَلا إِلهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَاللهُ أَكْبَرُ
segments.transliteration: subhaanal laahe wal hamdo lillaahe, wa laa elaaha illal laaho wal laaho akbaro

translation.en: "Glorious is Allah, and there is no God but Allah, and Allah is Great,
I seek forgiveness from Allah and return towards Him,

segments.arabic: ما شاءَ اللهُ لا حَوْلَ وَلا قُوَّةَ إِلّا بِاللهِ
segments.transliteration: maa shaa-al laaho, laa hawla wa laa quwwata illaa billaahil

translation.en: what Allah wishes happens, the is no movement and no power except by Allah,
the forbearing, the Generous, the Sublime, the Great,

segments.arabic: الرَّحْمنِ الرَّحيمِ الْمَلِكِ الْقُدُّوسِ الْحَقِّ الْمُبينِ
segments.transliteration: rahmaanir raheemil malekil quddoosil haqqil mobeene,

translation.en: the Beneficent, the Merciful, the Ruler, the Sanctified, the Truth, the Apparent,
this praise is as many as His creations and as much as the weight of His Throne
and the space of His Heavens and His Earths,

segments.arabic: وَعَدَدَ ما جَرى بِهِ قَلَمُهُ وَأَحْصاهُ كِتابُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa a’dada maa jaraa behi qalamohu wa ahsaaho ketaabohu,

translation.en: and as much as what has been written by His Pen, and What Has been embraced by His Book

segments.transliteration: wa medaada kalemaatehi wa rezaaho le-nafsehi.

translation.en: and as many as His words and as per His Satisfaction of Himself.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْمُبارَكينَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa ahle baytehil mobaarakeena,

translation.en: O' Allah! Send Your blessings upon Mohammad and his holy household,

segments.transliteration: wa salle a’laa jibra-eela wa meekaa-eela wa israafeela

translation.en: and bless Jibrael and Mika'eel and Israfeel,

segments.transliteration: wa hamalate a’rsheka ajma-e’ena, wal malaa-ekatil moqarrabeena.

translation.en: and all the bearers of Your Throne, and Your Archangels.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَيْهِمْ حَتَّى تُبَلِّغَهُمُ الرِّضا
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’layhim jamee-a’n hattaa toballeghohomur rezaa

translation.en: O' Allah, send Your blessings upon them until You deliver Your Satisfaction to them,

segments.arabic: وَتَزيدَهُمْ بَعْدَ الرِّضا مِمَّا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa tazeedahum ba’dar rezaa mimma anta ahlohu,

translation.en: and exceed them after Satisfaction with what You are Worthy of,
O' the Most Merciful of all the Merciful.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin,

translation.en: O' Allah! Bless Mohammad and his holy Progeny,

segments.transliteration: wa salle a’laa malakil mawte wa a-a’waanehi,

translation.en: and send your blessings upon the Angel of Death and his helpers,

segments.transliteration: wa salle a’laa rizwaana wa khazanatil jenaane,

translation.en: and bless Ridwaan and the treasurers of Your Heavens.

segments.transliteration: wa salle a’laa maalekin wa khazanatin neeraane,

translation.en: And bless Malik and the treasurers of Hell.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَيْهِمْ حَتَّى تُبَلِّغَهُمُ الرِّضا
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’layhim hattaa toballeghahomur rezaa,

translation.en: O' Allah! Bless them until You deliver Your Pleasure to them,

segments.arabic: وَتَزيدَهُمْ بَعْدَ الرِّضا مِمَّا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa tazeedahum ba’dar rezaa mimmaa anta ahlohu

translation.en: and exceed them after Your Satisfaction with what You are worthy of,
O' the Most Merciful of all the Merciful.

segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’lal hafazatil keraamil kaatebeena,

translation.en: O' Allah! Bless the Noble Angels who are writers,
and the honourable ambassadors,
and the protectors of Bani Adam,

segments.arabic: وَصَلِّ عَلى مَلائِكَةِ الْهَواءِ وَالسَّماواتِ الْعُلى
segments.transliteration: wa salle a’laa malaa-ekatil hawaa-e was-samawaatil-ula

translation.en: and bless the Angel of wind and the Highly Heavens,
and the angels of the lowly Earths,
and the Angels of the night and day,
and the Earth and the shores,
and the oceans and rivers,

segments.transliteration: wal baraaree wal falawaate wal qefaare,

translation.en: and the barren deserts and plains,

segments.transliteration: wa salle a’laa malaa-ekatekal lazeena aghnaytahum

translation.en: and bless Your Angels whom You have made needless
of food and drink by means of Your glorification
and exaltation and worship.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَيْهِمْ حَتَّى تُبَلِّغَهُمُ الرِّضا
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’layhim hattaa toballeghahomur rezaa,

translation.en: O' Allah, bless them until You deliver Your Satisfaction to them,

segments.arabic: وَتَزيدَهُمْ بَعْدَ الرِّضا مِمَّا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa tazeedahum ba’dar rezaa mimmaa anta ahlohu,

translation.en: and exceed them after Your Satisfaction with what You are Worthy of,
O' the Most Merciful of all Merciful.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin,

translation.en: O' Allah, bless Mohammad and his holy Progeny,

segments.arabic: وَصَلِّ عَلى أَبينا آدَمَ وَاُمِّنا حَوَّاءَ
segments.transliteration: wa salle a’laa abeenaa aadama wa ummenaa hawwaa-a

translation.en: and bless Our Father Adam, and our Mother Hawwa,

segments.transliteration: wa maa waladaa menan nabiyyeena was siddeeqeena

translation.en: and their sons amongst the Prophets and the truthful
and the witnesses and the noblemen.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَيْهِمْ حَتَّى تُبَلِّغَهُمُ الرِّضا
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’layhim hattaa toballeghahomur rezaa,

translation.en: O' Allah, bless them until You deliver Your Satisfaction to them,

segments.arabic: وَتَزيدَهُمْ بَعْدَ الرِّضا مِمَّا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa tazeedahum ba’dar rezaa mimmaa anta ahlohu,

translation.en: and exceed them after Your Satisfaction with what You are Worthy of,
O' the Most Merciful of all Merciful.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ الطَّيِّبينَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salla a’laa mohammadin wa ahle baytehit tayyebeenat taahereena,

translation.en: O' Allah! Bless Mohammad and his holy household,
and his chosen companions,

segments.arabic: وَعَلى أَزْواجِهِ الْمُطَهَّراتِ وَعَلى ذُرِّيَّةِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa a’laa azwaazehil motahharaate,wa a’laa zurriyyate mohammadin,

translation.en: and his purified wives, and the Progeny of Mohammad,

segments.transliteration: wa a’laa kulle nabiyyin bashshara be-mohammadin,

translation.en: and bless all those Prophets who gave the glad tidings of Mohammad,

segments.transliteration: wa a’laa kulle nabiyyin waladaa mohammadan (wa a’laa kullim ra-atin saalehatin kafalatmoh

translation.en: and those Prophets who were Mohammad's ancestors,

segments.arabic: وَعَلى كُلِّ مَنْ في صَلَواتِكَ عَلَيْهِ رِضىً لَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa a’laa kulle man fee salawaateka a’layhe rezan laka

translation.en: and bless all those blessing whom will result in Your Pleasure

segments.arabic: وَرِضىً لِنَبِيِّكَ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa rezan lenabiyyeka mohammadin sallal laaho a’layhe wa aalehi.

translation.en: and the Pleasure of Your Prophet, Mohammad (peace be upon him and his Progeny).

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَيْهِمْ حَتَّى تُبَلِّغَهُمُ الرِّضا
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’layhim hattaa toballeghahomur rezaa,

translation.en: O' Allah, bless them until You deliver Your Satisfaction to them,

segments.arabic: وَتَزيدَهُمْ بَعْدَ الرِّضا مِمَّا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa tazeedahum ba’dar rezaa mimmaa anta ahlohu,

translation.en: and exceed them after Your Satisfaction with what You are Worthy of,
O' the Most Merciful of all Merciful.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin,

translation.en: Bless Mohammad and his household,

segments.transliteration: wa baarik a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin,

translation.en: and shower Your grace upon Mohammad and his household,

segments.transliteration: war ham mohammadan wa aala mohammadin,

translation.en: and have mercy upon Mohammad and his household,

segments.transliteration: ka-afzale maa sallayta wa baarakta wa tarahhamta

translation.en: with the best of the blessings, graces and mercies You have sent

segments.arabic: عَلى إِبْراهيمَ وَآلِ إِبْراهيمَ إِنَّكَ حَميدٌ مَجيدٌ
segments.transliteration: a’laa ibraaheema wa aale ibraaheema innaka hameedun majeedun,

translation.en: upon Ibrahim and Ibrahim's Progeny, indeed You are the Praised and the Mighty.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ أَعْطِ مُحَمَّداً صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ الْوَسيلَةَ وَالْفَضْلَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma a-a’te mohammadan (sallal laaho a’layhe wa aalehi) al-waseelata wal fazla

translation.en: O' Allah! Bestow Mohammad and his Progeny with the means and the Grace,
and the Virtue and the Mighty Status,
and bestow on them until they are satisfied,

segments.arabic: وَزِدْهُ بَعْدَ الرِّضا مِمَّا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa zidho ba’dar rezaa mimmaa anta ahlohu,

translation.en: and exceed after satisfaction with what You are Worthy of,
O' the Most Merciful of all Merciful.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin

translation.en: O' Allah, send blessings upon Mohammad and his household
just as You have commanded us to send blessings upon him.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin

translation.en: O' Allah! Bless Mohammad and his household

segments.arabic: كَما يَنْبَغي لَنا أَنْ نُصَلِّيَ عَلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: kamaa yanbaghee lanaa an nosalleya a’layhe.

translation.en: just like it is appropriate for us to send blessings upon them.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin

translation.en: O' Allah! Bless Mohammad and his household
in the quantity of those who have sent blessings upon him.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin

translation.en: O' Allah! Bless Mohammad and his household
in the quantity of those who haven't sent blessings upon him.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin

translation.en: O' Allah! Bless Mohammad and his household

segments.arabic: بِعَدَدِ كُلِّ حَرْفٍ في صَلوةٍ صُلِّيَتْ عَلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: be-a’dade kulle harfin fee salaatin sulleyat a’layhe.

translation.en: as much as every letter in the blessings that have been sent upon them.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin

translation.en: O' Allah! Bless Mohammad and his household

segments.arabic: بِعَدَدِ مَنْ صَلَّى عَلَيْهِ وَمَنْ لَمْ يُصَلِّ عَلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: be-a’dade man salla a’layhe wa man lam yosalle a’layhe

translation.en: as much as those who have sent blessing upon them and those who haven't sent blessings upon them.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin

translation.en: O' Allah! Bless Mohammad and his household

segments.arabic: بِعَدَدِ كُلِّ شَعْرَةٍ وَلَفْظَةٍ وَلَحْظَةٍ وَنَفَسٍ
segments.transliteration: be-a’dade kulle sha’ratin wa lafzatin wa lahzatin wa nafsin

translation.en: in the quantity of every hair and word and moment and breath

segments.arabic: وَصِفَةٍ وَسُكُونٍ وَحَرَكَةٍ مِمَّنْ صَلَّى عَلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: wa sefatin, wa sokoonin wa harakatin mimman sallaa a’layhe

translation.en: and attribute and stoppage and movement of those who have sent blessings upon him,
and of those who haven't sent blessings upon him,
and in the quantity of their hours and their minutes,
and their stoppages and their movements,
and their truths and their promised places,
and their characters and their days,
and their months and their years,
and their hairs and their skins,

segments.arabic: وَبِعَدَدِ زِنَةِ ذَرِّ ما عَمِلُوا أَوْ يَعْمَلُونَ
segments.transliteration: wa be-a’dade zenate zarre maa a’meloo aw ya’maloona,

translation.en: and as much as the weight of the particles of their deeds they have performed, or they perform

segments.arabic: أَوْ بَلَغَهُمْ أَوْ رَأَوْا أَوْ ظَنُّوا أَوْ فَطِنُوا
segments.transliteration: aw balaghahum aw ra-aw aw zannoo aw fatenu

translation.en: or which has reached them, or which they have seen, or assumed, or became aware of with their cleverness,

segments.arabic: أَوْ كانَ مِنْهُمْ أَوْ يَكُونُ إِلى يَوْمِ الْقِيامَةِ
segments.transliteration: aw kaana minhum aw yakoono elaa yawmil qeyaamate,

translation.en: or which was enacted by them, or will be committed by them until the day of Resurrection,

segments.arabic: وَكَأَضْعافِ ذلِكَ أَضْعافاً مُضاعَفَةً إِلى يَوْمِ الْقِيامَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa ka-az-a’afe zaaleka az-a’afan mozaa-a’fatan elaa yawmil qeyaamate,

translation.en: rather several times more than the measurement of all the things that has been mentioned until the day of Resurrection,
O' the Most Merciful of all the Merciful.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin

translation.en: O' Allah! Bless Mohammad and his household

segments.arabic: بِعَدَدِ ما خَلَقْتَ وَما أَنْتَ خالِقُهُ
segments.transliteration: be-a’dade maa khalaqta wa maa anta khaaleqohu

translation.en: in the quantity of all that You have created, and all Your creations
until the Day of Resurrection, a blessing that will please his holiness.

segments.transliteration: allaahumma lakal hamdo was sanaa-o, wash shukro

translation.en: O' Allah, all Praises, Glorification and Gratification is for You

segments.transliteration: wal manno wal fazlo wat tawlo wal khayro

translation.en: and all the Favours and Grace, and beneficence and good

segments.transliteration: wal husnaa, wan ne’mato wal a’zamato, wal jabarooto

translation.en: and nobility and bounty, and greatness and Majesty,

segments.transliteration: wal mulko wal malakooto, wal qahro was sultaano

translation.en: and the apparent Kingdom and the hidden Kingdom, and the Subjugation and the Dominion,

segments.transliteration: wal fakhro, was soa-dado wal imtenaano, wal karamo

translation.en: and the Pride and Lordship, and favour and Kindness,

segments.transliteration: wal jalaalo wal ikraamo (wal jamaalo wal kamaalo)

translation.en: and the Glory and Generosity, and the Beauty and Excellence,

segments.transliteration: wal khayro wat tawheedo, wat tamjeedo wat tahmeedo,

translation.en: and the good, the Oneness, the Exaltation, the glorification,

segments.transliteration: wat tahleelo wat takbeero, wat taqdeeso

translation.en: the appraisal, the greatness, the sanctification,

segments.transliteration: war rahmato, wal maghferato wal kibreyaa-o wal a’zamato,

translation.en: the Beneficence and the Forgiveness and the Sublimity and the Virtue.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ما زَكى وَطابَ وَطَهُرَ مِنَ الثَّناءِ الطَّيِّبِ
segments.transliteration: wa laka maa zakaa wa taaba wa tahora menas sanaa-it tayyebe

translation.en: And for You alone is the purest, cleanest and holiest of all the noble exaltation,

segments.transliteration: wal madeehil faakhere, wal qawlil hasanil jameelil,

translation.en: and valuable appraisal, and the good and beautiful saying
whose speaker satisfies You

segments.arabic: وَتُرْضِيَ بِهِ قائِلَهُ وَهُوَ رِضىً لَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa turzee behi qaa-elahu, wa howa rezan laka.

translation.en: and who is satisfied from You, which results in Your Pleasure.
My Praise is connected to the Praise of the First appraisers,

segments.arabic: وَثَنائي بِثَناءِ أَوَّلِ الْمُثْنينَ عَلى رَبِّ الْعالَمينَ
segments.transliteration: wa sanaa-ee be-sanaa-e awwalil musneena a’laa rabbil a’alameena,

translation.en: and my exaltation to the first exalters of the Lord of the worlds,
all of it connected to each other,
and my acclamation is connected to the first acclaimers,
and my magnification is connected with the first magnifiers,

segments.arabic: وَقَوْلِيَ الْحَسَنُ الْجَميلُ بِقَوْلِ أَوَّلِ الْقائِلينَ
segments.transliteration: wa qawlil hasanul jameelo be-qawle awwalil qaa-eleenal

translation.en: and my beautiful saying with the first exquisite speakers,
the exalters of the Lord of the worlds,
each one of which is connected with one another,
from the beginning of time till the end.

segments.transliteration: wa be-a’dade zenate zarris samaawaate wal arazeena

translation.en: And as much as the weight of the particles of the heavens and the Earths,

segments.transliteration: war remaale wat telaale wal jebaale,

translation.en: the pebbles and the plateaus and the mountains,
and many as the gulps of seawater,
and as many as the raindrops,

segments.transliteration: wa waraqil ashjaare wa a’dadin nojoome,

translation.en: and as many as the leaves of trees, and as many as the stars,

segments.transliteration: wa a’dadis saraa, wal hasaa wan nawaa wal madare,

translation.en: and as many as the dust particles and the pebbles and the grains and the atoms,
and as much as the weight of all of them,

segments.transliteration: wa a’dade zenate zarris samaawaate wal arazeena,

translation.en: and the weight of the particles of the heavens and the earths,

segments.arabic: وَما فيهِنَّ وَما بَيْنَهُنَّ وَما تَحْتَهُنَّ
segments.transliteration: wa maa feehinna wa maa baynahunna, wa maa tahtahunna,

translation.en: and that which lies in them and between them and below them,

segments.arabic: وَما بَيْنَ ذلِكَ وَما فَوْقَهُنَّ إِلى يَوْمِ الْقِيامَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa maa bayna zaaleka wa maa fawqahunna elaa yawmil qeyaamate

translation.en: and between them and above them till the Day of Resurrection,

segments.arabic: مِنْ لَدُنِ الْعَرْشِ إِلى قَرارِ أَرْضِكَ السَّابِعَةِ السُّفْلى
segments.transliteration: min ladonil a’rshe elaa qaraare arzekas saa-be-a’tis suflaa.

translation.en: from the Divine Throne to Your lowly seven earths,
and as many as the letters of the words of their dwellers,
and as many as their times and their minutes
and their signs and their hours

segments.transliteration: wa ayyaamehim wa shohoorehim wa seneenehim,

translation.en: and their days, and their months and their years,
and their stoppages and their movements,
and their hairs and skins.

segments.arabic: وَعَدَدِ زِنَةِ ذَرِّ ما عَمِلُوا أَوْ يَعْمَلُونَ
segments.transliteration: wa be-a’dade zenate maa a’meloo aw ya’maloona,

translation.en: And as much as the weight of the particles of the deeds they have performed or are performing

segments.arabic: أَوْ بَلَغَهُمْ أَوْ رَأَوْا أَوْ ظَنُّوا أَو فَطِنُوا
segments.transliteration: aw balaghahum aw ra-aw aw zannoo, aw fatanoo,

translation.en: or which had reached them, or which they have witnessed or assumed or gained awareness with cleverness,

segments.arabic: أَوْ كانَ مِنْهُمْ أَوْ يَكُونُ إِلى يَوْمِ الْقِيامَةِ
segments.transliteration: aw kaana minhum aw yakoono zaaleka elaa yawmil qeyaamate.

translation.en: or was performed by them or will be performed till the Day of Resurrection,

segments.arabic: وَعَدَدِ زِنَةِ ذَرِّ ذلِكَ وَأَضْعافِ ذلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa be-a’dade zenate zaaleka, wa az-a’afe zaaleka,

translation.en: and as much as the weight of all of them and many more times their weight,

segments.transliteration: wa ka-az-a’afe zaaleka az-a’afan mozaa-a’fatan laa ya’lamohaa

translation.en: and several times all of them such that none except You

segments.arabic: وَلايُحْصيها غَيْرُكَ يا ذَا الْجَلالِ وَالْإِكْرامِ
segments.transliteration: wa laa yoh-seehaa ghayroka, yaa zal jalaale wal ikraame,

translation.en: shall be able to have knowledge of it and calculate it, O' Glorious and Dignified,

segments.transliteration: wa ahlo zaaleka anta wa mustahiqqohu

translation.en: You are worthy of it, and deserve it

segments.transliteration: wa mus-taw-jebohu minnee wa min jamee-e’ khalqeka

translation.en: and it is appropriate for Your Threshold, these praises are only for You, from me and all Your creations,
O' Creator of the Heavens and the Earth.
O' Allah! You are not the Lord whom we have called recently,

segments.arabic: وَلا مَعَكَ إِلهٌ فَيَشْرَكَكَ في رُبُوبِيَّتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa laa ma-a’ka elaahun fee roboobiyyateka,

translation.en: and there is no God alongside You who will share Your Divinity,

segments.arabic: وَلا مَعَكَ إِلهٌ أَعانَكَ عَلى خَلْقِنا
segments.transliteration: wa laa ma-a’ka elaahun a-a’anaka a’laa khalqenaa.

translation.en: and there is no God alongside You who has helped You in our creation,

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ رَبُّنا كَما تَقُولُ وَفَوْقَ ما يَقُولُ الْقائِلُونَ
segments.transliteration: anta rabbonaa kamaa naqoolo, wa fawqa maa yaqoolul qaa-eloona.

translation.en: You are our Lord just as You say and are Superior to all that the speakers say.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: as-aloka an tosalleya a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin,

translation.en: I beseech You to bless Mohammad and his holy household,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تُعْطِيَ مُحَمَّداً صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa an to’teya mohammadan sallal laaho a’layhe wa aalehi

translation.en: and to bestow Mohammad and his progeny

segments.arabic: أَفْضَلَ ما سَأَلَكَ وَأَفْضَلَ ما سُئِلْتَ
segments.transliteration: afzala maa sa-alaka, wa afzala maa so-ilta,

translation.en: with the best of what is asked from You, and the best of that which be asked from You

segments.arabic: وَأَفْضَلَ ما أَنْتَ مَسْؤُولٌ لَهُ إِلى يَوْمِ الْقِيامَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa afzala maa anta mas-oolun lahu elaa yawmil qeyaamate.

translation.en: and the best of what you are responsible for till the Day of Resurrection.

segments.arabic: اُعيذُ أَهْلَ بَيْتِ النَّبِيِّ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: o-e’ezo ahla bayte nabiyyee mohammadin sallal laaho a’layhe wa aalehi,

translation.en: I submit Prophet Mohammad's household (peace be upon him and his progeny)

segments.transliteration: wa nafsee wa deenee wa zurriyyatee wa maalee,

translation.en: and myself and my religion and my lineage and my wealth

segments.transliteration: wa waladee wa ahlee, wa qaraabaatee wa ahla baytee

translation.en: and my son and my family and my relatives and my household

segments.arabic: وَكُلَّ ذي رَحِمٍ لي دَخَلَ فِي الْإِسْلامِ
segments.transliteration: wa kulla zee rahemin lee dakhala fil islaame,

translation.en: and all those relatives who have entered Islam,
or will enter it till the Day of Resurrection,
and my family members and my dear ones,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ قَلَّدَني دُعاءً أَوْ أَسْدى إِلَيَّ يَداً
segments.transliteration: wa man qalladanee do-a’a-an, aw asdaa elayya yadan,

translation.en: and all those who have made me responsible for supplicating for them and have treated me with good behaviour,

segments.arabic: أَوْ رَدَّ عَنّي غَيْبَةً أَوْ قالَ فِيَّ خَيْراً
segments.transliteration: aw radda a’nnee ghaybatan, aw qaala fiyya khayran,

translation.en: or have refrained from backbiting me, or have said anything good about me,

segments.arabic: أَوِ اتَّخَذْتُ عِنْدَهُ يَداً أَوْ صَنيعَةً
segments.transliteration: awit takhazto i’ndahu yadan aw sanee-a’tan,

translation.en: or the ones from whom I have sought help or a work,

segments.arabic: وَجيراني وَ إِخْواني مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنينَ وَالْمُؤْمِناتِ
segments.transliteration: wa jeeraanee wa ikhwaanee menal moameneena wal moamenaat.

translation.en: and my neighbours and my brothers from the faithful men and women,

segments.arabic: بِاللهِ وَبِأَسْمائِهِ التَّامَّةِ الْعامَّةِ الشَّامِلَةِ الْكامِلَةِ الطَّاهِرَةِ الْفاضِلَةِ الْمُبارَكَةِ الْمُتَعالِيَةِ الزَّاكِيَةِ الشَّريفَةِ الْمَنيعَةِ الْكَريمَةِالْعَظيمَةِ الْمَخْزُونَةِ الْمَكْنُونَةِ
segments.transliteration: billaahe wa be-asmaa-ehit taammatil a’ammatish, shaamelatil, kaamelatit, taaheratil faazelatil mobaarakatil mota-a’aleyatiz, zaakeyatish shareefatil manee-a’til kareematil, a’zeematil makhzoonatil maknoonatil,

translation.en: with the help of Allah and His complete, general, overcoming, absolute, pure, gracious, holy, lofty, clean and pure, noble, preventing, kind, great, hidden and treasured Names.

segments.transliteration: latee laa yojaawezohunna barrun wa laa faajerun,

translation.en: which cannot be surpassed by the noble and the wicked,
and by the Ummul Kitaab (Suratul Hamd) and it's concluder,

segments.arabic: وَما بَيْنَهُما مِنْ سُورَةٍ شَريفَةٍ وَآيَةٍ مُحْكَمَةٍ وَشِفاءٍ وَرَحْمَةٍ وَعَوْذَةٍ وَبَرَكَةٍ
segments.transliteration: wa maa baynahomaa min sooratin shareefatin, wa aayatin mohkamatin, wa shefaa-in wa rahmatin, wa a’wzatin wa barakatin.

translation.en: and all those holy chapters, evident verses, cure and mercy, refuge and grace, which lie between the two;

segments.transliteration: wa abit-tawraate wal injeele, waz zaboore wal furqaane

translation.en: and by the Torah and the Gospel and the Pslams and the Furqaan
and the Books of Ibrahim and Moses,
and through all the books sent down by Allah,
and through all the Messenger sent by Allah,
and through all the Argument made by Allah,
and through all the Proofs made evident by Allah,
and through all the Light illuminated by Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa be-kulle aalaa-il laahe wa a’zamatehi.

translation.en: and through all the bounties of Allah and His Virtue.

segments.arabic: اُعيذُ وَأَسْتَعيذُ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ ذِي شَرٍّ
segments.transliteration: o-e’ezo, wa as-ta-e’ezo min sharre kulle zee sharrin,

translation.en: I seek refuge from the evil of all the evil people,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharre maa akhaafo wa ahzaro.

translation.en: and from the evil of what I fear and distance from,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرِّ ما رَبّي مِنْهُ أَكْبَرُ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharre maa rabbee minho akbaro,

translation.en: and from the evil of all that my Lord is greater than it,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharre fasaqatil arabe wal ajam

translation.en: and from the evil of the sinners of the Arabs and the non-Arabs,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharre fasaqatil jinne wal inse,

translation.en: and from the evil of the sinners from the Jinn and the Humans
and the Satans and the Kings,

segments.transliteration: wa ibleesa wa jonoodehi wa ash-yaa-e’hi wa atbaa-e’hi,

translation.en: and the Iblees and his army and his friends and followers,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرِّ ما فِي النُّورِ وَالظُّلْمَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharre maa fin noore waz zulmate,

translation.en: and from the evil of that which lies in the Light and the darkness,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرِّ ما دَهَمَ أَوْ هَجَمَ أَوْ أَلَمَّ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharre maa dahema aw hajama aw alamma.

translation.en: and from the evil of those happenings which attack and sadden the humans,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharre kulle ghammin wa hammin,

translation.en: and from the evil of all the sorrows and sadness

segments.transliteration: wa aafatin wa nadamin, wa naazelatin wa suqmin,

translation.en: and regrets and difficulties and diseases,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرِّ ما يَحْدُثُ فِي اللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهارِ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharre maa yahdoso fil layle wan nahaare,

translation.en: and from the evil of that which occurs in the night and the day,
and that which is destined,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharre maa fin naare

translation.en: and from the evil of that which lies in fire,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرِّ ما فِي الْأَرَضينَ وَالْأَقْطارِ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharre maa fil arze wal aqtaare

translation.en: and from the evil of that which lies in the Earths and the shores

segments.transliteration: wal falawaate wal qefaare, wal behaare wal anhaare.

translation.en: and the deserts and the barren lands and seas and rivers,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharril fussaaqe wal fujjaare, wal koh-haane,

translation.en: and from the evil of the lewd and the wrongdoers and the foretellers

segments.transliteration: was soh-haare, wal hussaade waz zo’-a’are, wal ash-raare,

translation.en: and the sorcerers and the jealous people and the spreaders of fear and the evildoers,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرِّ ما يَلِجُ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَما يَخْرُجُ مِنْها
segments.transliteration: wa min sharre maa yalejo fil arze wa maa yakhrojo minhaa

translation.en: and from the evil of all that goes inside the earth and which comes out of it,

segments.arabic: وَما يَنْزِلُ مِنَ السَّماءِ وَما يَعْرُجُ إِلَيْها
segments.transliteration: wa maa yanzelo menas samaa-e wa maa ya’rojo elayhaa,

translation.en: and which falls from the sky and which rises towards it,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharre kulle zee sharrin,

translation.en: and from the evil of all the evildoers,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ دابَّةٍ رَبّي آخِذٌ بِناصِيَتِها
segments.transliteration: wa min sharre kulle daabbatin rabbee aakhezun be-naaseyatehaa

translation.en: and from the evil of all the movers who will be caught by my Lord,
indeed my Lord is on the straight Path,
then if they turn away from it, say that Allah suffices me,

segments.arabic: لا إِلهَ إِلّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ
segments.transliteration: laa elaaha illaa howa a’layhe tawakkalto

translation.en: there is no God but He, I rely upon Him
and He is the Lord of the Vast Throne.

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ اللَّهُمَّ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْغَمِّ
segments.transliteration: wa a-o’ozo beka allaahumma menal hamme

translation.en: And I seek shelter in You, O' Allah, from the sorrow and grief

segments.transliteration: wal huzne wal a’jze wal kasale, wal jubne wal bukhle,

translation.en: and sadness, and from incapability and weariness, from fear and stinginess,

segments.transliteration: wa min zala-i’d dayne, wa ghalabatir rejaale,

translation.en: and from the difficulties of loans and dominance of men,
and from the deed which does not benefit,
and from the eye which does not weep,
and from the heart which is not humble,
and from the supplication which is not heard,
and from the advice which is not effective,
and from the companions who wouldn't be returned,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ إِجْماعٍ عَلى نُكْرٍ وَتَوَدُّدٍ عَلى خُسْرٍ
segments.transliteration: wa min ijmaa-i’n a’laa nukrin, wa tawaddodin a’laa khusrin,

translation.en: and from the consensus on wickedness and undesirability, and from the friendship of loss,
and from impure justice,

segments.arabic: وَمِمَّا اسْتَعاذَ مِنْهُ مَلائِكَتُكَ الْمُقَرَّبُونَ وَالْأَنْبِياءُ الْمُرْسَلُونَ وَالْأَئِمَّةُ الْمُطَهَّرُونَ وَالشُّهَداءُ وَالصَّالِحُونَ وَعِبادُكَ الْمُتَّقُونَ
segments.transliteration: wa mimmas ta-a’aza minho malaa-ekatul moqarraboona, wal ambeyaa-ul mursaloona, wal a-immatul motahharoona wash shohadaa-o was saalehoona, wa e’baadokal muttaqoona.

translation.en: and from all that Your dear Angels and the Prophets who are the Messenger, and the Purified Imams, and the Martyrs and the Noblemen, and Your Pious Servants seek shelter.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa as-alokal laahumma an tosalleya a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin,

translation.en: And I beseech You, O' Allah, to bless Mohammad and his household,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تُعْطِيَني مِنَ الْخَيْرِ ما سَأَلُوا
segments.transliteration: wa an to’teyanee menal khayre maa sa-aloo,

translation.en: and to grant me from the good which they ask You,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تُعيذَني مِنْ شَرِّ مَا اسْتَعاذُوا
segments.transliteration: wa an to-e’ezanee min sharre mas ta-a’azoo,

translation.en: and to protect me from the evil of that which they seek protection from,

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ اللَّهُمَّ مِنَ الْخَيْرِ كُلِّهِ عاجِلِهِ وآجِلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa as-alokal laahumma menal khayre kullehi, a’ajelehi

translation.en: and I ask You, O' Allah, from all the good with quickness and durability,

segments.arabic: ما عَلِمْتُ مِنْهُ وَما لَمْ أَعْلَمْ
segments.transliteration: wa aajelehi, maa a’limto minho wa maa lam a-a’lam.

translation.en: from that which I know about and that which I don't know,

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ رَبِّ مِنْ هَمَزاتِ الشَّياطينِ
segments.transliteration: wa a-o’ozo beka min hamazaatish shayaateene,

translation.en: and I seek refuge in You, O' My Lord, from the satanic temptations,

segments.transliteration: wa a-o’ozo beka rabbe an yahzoroon.

translation.en: and I seek shelter in You, O' my Lord, from being presented by them.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ عَلى أَهْلِ بَيْتِ النَّبِيِّ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: bismil laahe a’laa ahle baytin nabiyye mohammadin sallal laaho a’layhe wa aalehi.

translation.en: In seek help from the name of Allah for the household of Prophet Mohammad (peace be upon him and his progeny),

segments.transliteration: bismil laahe a’laa nafsee wa deenee,

translation.en: I seek help from the name of Allah for myself and for my religion.

segments.transliteration: bismil laahe a’laa ahlee wa maalee.

translation.en: I seek help from the name of Allah for my family and my wealth,

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ عَلى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ أَعْطاني رَبّي
segments.transliteration: bismillaahe a’laa kulle shay-in a-a’taanee rabbee.

translation.en: I seek help from the name of Allah for all that Allah has bestowed upon me,

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ عَلى أَحِبَّتي وَوَلَدي وَقَراباتي
segments.transliteration: bismil laahe a’laa ahibbatee wa wuldee wa qaraabaatee,

translation.en: I seek help from the name of Allah for my loved ones and my son and my relatives,

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ عَلى جيراني وَ إِخْواني
segments.transliteration: bismil laahe a’laa jeeraane wa ikhwaane

translation.en: I seek help from the name of Allah for my neighbours and my brothers,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ قَلَّدَني دُعاءً أَوِ اتَّخَذَ عِنْدي يَداً
segments.transliteration: wa man qalladanee do-a’a-an, awit takhaza i’ndee yadan

translation.en: and for those who obligated me to supplicate for them, and for those from whom I took help,

segments.arabic: أَوِ ابْتَدَءَ إِلَيَّ بِرّاً مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنينَ وَالْمُؤْمِناتِ
segments.transliteration: aw asdaa elayya birran, menal moameneena wal moamenaate,

translation.en: or those who began to do unprecedented good for me, from the male and female believers,

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ عَلى ما رَزَقَني رَبّي وَيَرْزُقُني
segments.transliteration: bismil laahe a’laa maa razaqanee rabbee wa yarzoqonee

translation.en: I seek help from the name of Allah for that which my Lord has bestowed upon me and bestows upon me,

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الَّذي لايَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلا فِي السَّماءِ
segments.transliteration: bismil laahil lazee laa yazurro ma-a’s mehi shay-un fil arze wa laa fis samaa-e

translation.en: I seek help from the name of Allah with which nothing can harm me on Earth and nor in the Sky,
and He is the Hearer and the Knower.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin

translation.en: O' Allah! Bless Mohammad and his household

segments.arabic: وَصِلْني بِجَميعِ ما سَأَلَكَ عِبادُكَ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ
segments.transliteration: wa silnee be-jamee-e’ maa sa-alaka e’baadokal moamenoona

translation.en: and favour upon me with all that is asked from You by Your faithful servants,
so that you grant them with bounties,

segments.arabic: وَاصْرِفْ عَنّي جَميعَ ما سَأَلَكَ عِبادُكَ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ
segments.transliteration: was rif a’nnee jamee-a’ maa sa-alaka e’baadokal moamenoona

translation.en: and keep me away from all that You have been asked by Your faithful believers,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تَصْرِفَهُ عَنْهُمْ مِنَ السُّوءِ وَالرَّدى
segments.transliteration: an tasrefahu a’nhum menas soo-e war radaa,

translation.en: so that you keep them away from bad and lowness,

segments.arabic: وَزِدْني مِنْ فَضْلِكَ ما أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ وَوَلِيُّهُ
segments.transliteration: wa zidnee min fazleka maa anta ahlohu wa waliyyohu,

translation.en: and exceed upon me from Your Grace that which is appropriate for You and You Guardian,
O' the Most Merciful of all the Merciful.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ الطَّيِّبينَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa ahle baytehit tayyebeena,

translation.en: O' Allah! Bless Mohammad and his holy Progeny,

segments.arabic: وَعَجِّلِ اللَّهُمَّ فَرَجَهُمْ وَفَرَجي وَفَرِّجْ عَنْ كُلِّ مَهْمُومٍ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنينَ وَالْمُؤْمِناتِ
segments.transliteration: wa a’jjil farajahum wa farajee wa farrij a’n kulle mahmoomin wa maghmoomin wa mad-yoonin menal moameneena wal moamenaat.

translation.en: and hasten, O' Allah, in their relief and my relief from all the sadness faced by the believing men and women.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin,

translation.en: O' Allah! Bless Mohammad and his household

segments.transliteration: war zuqnee nasrahum, wa ash-hidnee ayyamahum,

translation.en: and provide them support, and make me witness their days,

segments.arabic: وَاجْمَعْ بَيْني وَبَيْنَهُمْ فِي الدُّنْيا وَالْآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: waj ma’ baynee wa baynahum fid dunyaa wal akherate,

translation.en: and gather me with them in this world and the hereafter,

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ مِنْكَ عَلَيْهِمْ واقِيَةً حَتَّى لايُخْلَصَ إِلَيْهِمْ إِلّا بِسَبيلِ خَيْرٍ وَعَلَيَّ مَعَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: waj a’l minka a’layhim waaqeyatan hattaa laa yakhlosa elayhim illaa be-sabeele khayrin, wa a’laa man ma-a’hum,

translation.en: and place a protector from Your Threshold for them until nothing except goodness and nobility reaches them,

segments.transliteration: wa a’laa shee-a’tehim wa mohibbeehim, wa a’laa awleyaa-ehim,

translation.en: and also place such guardian for me and for their Shias and their devotees and their friends

segments.transliteration: wa a’laa jamee-i’l moameneena wal moamenaate

translation.en: and for the faithful people, men and women,
indeed You have Power over all things.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ وَبِاللهِ وَمِنَ اللهِ وَ إِلَى اللهِ
segments.transliteration: bismil laahe wa billaahe, wa menal laahe wa elal laahe,

translation.en: I seek help from the name of Allah and by Allah and from Allah and towards Allah,

segments.arabic: وَلا غالِبَ إِلّاَ اللهُ ، ما شاءَ اللهُ
segments.transliteration: wa laa ghaaleba illal laaho, maa shaa-al laaho,

translation.en: and there is no dominator except Allah, what Allah wills surely happens,

segments.arabic: لا قُوَّةَ إِلّا بِاللهِ حَسْبِيَ اللهُ تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللهِ
segments.transliteration: laa quwwata illaa billaahe, hasbeyal laaho, tawakkalto a’lal laahe,

translation.en: there is no Power except by Allah, Allah is sufficient for me, I rely upon Allah,

segments.arabic: وَاُفَوِّضُ أَمْري إِلَى اللهِ وَأَلْتَجِئُ إِلَى اللهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ofawwezo amree elal laahe wa altaje-o elal laahe,

translation.en: and I have submitted my affairs to Allah, and I seek refuge in Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa billaahe ohaawelo wa osaawelo, wa okaasero

translation.en: and by his help I seek Power and Dominance and Abundance

segments.transliteration: wa ofaakhero wa a-a’tazzo wa a-a’tasemo.

translation.en: and Pride and Dignity and Protection
I rely upon Allah and towards Him is my return,

segments.arabic: لا إِلهَ إِلّاَ اللهُ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ
segments.transliteration: laa elaaha illal laahul hayyul qayyoomo

translation.en: there is no God except Allah, the Ever-Living and Self-Subsistent,

segments.transliteration: a’dadas saraa wan nojoome, wal malaa-ekatis sofoofe,

translation.en: as many as the particles of dust and the stars,and the well-queued Angels,

segments.arabic: لا إِلهَ إِلّاَ اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لا شَريكَ لَهُ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظيمُ
segments.transliteration: laa elaaha illal laaho, wah-dahu laa shareeka lahul a’liyyul a’zeemo,

translation.en: there is no God except Allah, He is Alone, He has no partner, He is the Mighty and the Great,

segments.arabic: لا إِلهَ إِلّاَ اللهُ سُبْحانَكَ إِنّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمينَ
segments.transliteration: laa elaaha illal laaho subhaanaka innee kunto menaz zaalemeen.

translation.en: there is no God except Allah, You are Glorious, indeed I was among the transgressors.
"O' Allah! The Lord of the Great Light,
the Lord of the Elevated Throne,
the Lord of the swollen Ocean,
the Revealer of the Torah, the Gospel
and the Lord of the dark and the heat
the Revealer of the Psalms and the Great Qur'an
and the Lord of the Archangels,
the Prophets and the Messengers.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ إِلهُ مَنْ فِي السَّماءِ وَ إِلهُ مَنْ فِي الْأَرْضِ

translation.en: You are worshipped in the sky and You are the Lord of those who live on Earth,
there is no God in both of them except You,
and You are Dominant over the dwellers of the sky
and the Dominant over the dwellers of the Earth,
none except You is Dominant in both these places,
and You are the Creator of those in the Sky
and the Creator of those living on Earth,
there is no Creator in both these places except You,
and You are the Commander of the dwellers of Sky,

segments.arabic: وَحَكَمُ مَنْ فِي الْأَرْضِ لا حَكَمَ فيهِما غَيْرُكَ

translation.en: and the Commander of the Dwellers of the Earth, there is no Commander in both these places except You.
O' Allah, I beseech You in Your Noble Face,
and in the Light of Your Luminous Face, and Your Eternal Kingdom,

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذي أَشْرَقَتْ بِهِ السَّماواتُ وَالْأَرَضُونَ

translation.en: I beseech You in the Name of Your Name with which the heavens and the earth have lit up,

segments.arabic: وَبِاسْمِكَ الَّذي يَصْلُحُ بِهِ الْأَوَّلُونَ وَالْآخِرُونَ

translation.en: and in Your Name with which the past and the coming generations have become upright!

segments.arabic: يا حَيّاً قَبْلَ كُلِّ حَيٍّ وَيا حَيّاً بَعْدَ كُلِّ حَيٍّ

translation.en: O' He who has been always alive before the existence of all living things, O' He who shall be alive after the extinction of all living things,

segments.arabic: وَيا حَيّاً حينَ لا حَيَّ وَيا مُحْيِيَ الْمَوْتى

translation.en: O' He who revives the dead ones and causes the living ones to die!

segments.arabic: وَيا حَيُّ لا إِلهَ إِلّا أَنْتَ يا حَيُّ يا قَيُّومُ

translation.en: O' Ever-Living! There is no God save You, O' Ever-Living, O' Self-Subsistent.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: I beseech You to bless Mohammad and his household,
and to give me sustenance from where I reckon
and from where I do not reckon,
an extensive, Halal and healthy sustenance,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تُفَرِّجَ عَنِّي كُلَّ غَمٍّ وَهَمٍّ

translation.en: and to relieve me of all the sorrows and grieves,
and to grant me all that I hope for and desire,
indeed You have Power over all things.
In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

segments.arabic: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّوْمُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ اسْتَغِيْتُ فَاَغِثْنِيْ
segments.transliteration: yaa hayyo yaa qayyoomo be-rahmateka ataghnaito,

translation.en: O Living. O eternal, by your mercy, I seek your refuge (so give me refuge)

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَكِلْنِيْ اِلٰى نَفْسِيْ طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ اَبَدًا،
segments.transliteration: fa-aghisnee wa laa tiklnee elaa nafsee tarfata a’ynin abadan,

translation.en: and do not leave me to my self even for the blink of the eye, ever.
And reform all my conditions
on account of your mercy, o most merciful

text.en: Significance of this Dua

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْمَلِكِ الْقُدُّوسِ.

translation.en: ï¿½There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Master, the Most Sanctified.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَزِيزِ الْجَبّٰارِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Noble, the Most Powerful.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الرَّؤُفِ الرَّحِيمِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Compassionate, the Merciful.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْغَفُورِ الرَّحِيمِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Forgiving, the Merciful.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْكَرِيـمِ الْحَكِيمِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Noble, the Wise.ï¿½

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْقَوِّيِّ الْوَفِيِّ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Powerful, the Truthful (to His word).

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ اللَّطِيفِ الْخَبِـيرِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Gentle, the All-Knowing.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الصَّمَدِ الْمَعْبُودِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Self-Sufficient, the One Who is Worshipped.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْغَفُورِ الْوَدُودِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Forgiving, the Loving.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْوَكِيلِ الْكَفِيلِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Ultimate Truster, the Supporter.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الرَّقِيبِ الْحَفِيظِ.

translation.en: ï¿½There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Watcher, the Keeper.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الدَّائِمِ الْقٰائِمِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Perpetual, the Upright.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْمُحْيِّ الْمُمِيتِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah,

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْحَيِّ الْقَيُّومِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Living, the Self-Subsistent.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْخٰالِقِ الْبٰارِيِّ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Creator, the Maker

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيمِ.

translation.en: ï¿½There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Most High, the Incomparably Great.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْوٰاحِدِ الأَحَدِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the One, the Single.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْمُؤْمِنِ الْمُهَيْمِنِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Granter of Security, the Protector.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْحَسِيبِ الشَّهِيدِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Reckoner, the Witness.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْحَلِيمِ الْكَرِيـمِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Forbearing, the Generous.ï¿½

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الأَوَّلِ الْقَدِيـمِ.

translation.en: ï¿½There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the First, the Eternal.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الأَوَّلِ الآخِرِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the First, the Last.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الظّٰاهِرِ الْبٰاطِنِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Apparent, the Hidden. except for Allah,

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْكَبِيرِ الْمُتَعٰالِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Greatest, the Most High.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْقٰاضِيِّ الْحٰاجٰاتِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship Glory be to the One who Fulfills the Needs.ï¿½

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ.

translation.en: ï¿½There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Compassionate, the Merciful.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Lord of the Great Throne.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ رَبِّيَ الأَعْلَى.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to My Lord, the Most High.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْبُرْهٰانِ السُّلْطٰانِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Ultimate Proof, the King.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ السَّمِيعِ الْبَصِيـرِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Hearing, the All-Seeing.ï¿½

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْوٰاحِدِ الْقَهّٰارِ.

translation.en: ï¿½There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the One, the Subduer.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَلِيمِ الْحَكِيمِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Knowing, the Wise

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ السَّتّٰارِ الْغَفّٰارِ.

translation.en: . There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Coverer (of Sins), the Oft-Forgiving.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الرَّحْمٰنِ الدَّيّٰانِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Merciful, the Devout.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْكَبِيـرِ الأَكْبَرِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Greatest, the Great.ï¿½

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَلِيمِ العَّلاٰمِ.

translation.en: ï¿½There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Aware, the All-Knowing.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الشّٰافِي الْكٰافِي.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the One who Cures, the Sufficient.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَظِيمِ الْبٰاقِيِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Great, the Remaining.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الصَّمَدِ الأَحَدِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Eternally Besought, the One.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ رَبِّ الأَرْضِ وَ السَّمٰاءِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Lord of the Earth and the Heaven.ï¿½

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْخٰالِقِ الْمَخْلُوقِ.

translation.en: ï¿½There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Creator of the Created.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ مَنْ خَلَقَ اللَّيْلِ وَ النَّهٰارِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the One who has created the Night and the Day.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْخٰالِقِ الرَّزّٰاقِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Creator, the Continuous granter of Sustenance.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْفَتّٰاحِ الْعَلِيمِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Opener, the All-Knowing.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَزِيزِ الْغَنِيِّ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Noble, the All-Sufficient.ï¿½

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْغَفُورِ الشَّكُورِ.

translation.en: ï¿½There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Oft-Forgiver, the Oft-Appreciative.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَظِيمِ الْعَلِيمِ.
