translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Great, the Forbearing.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ ذِي الْمُلْكِ وَ الْمَلَكُوتِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Possessor of the Dominion and the Heavens.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ ذِي الْعِزَّةِ وَ الْعَظَمَةِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Possessor of Respect and Greatness.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ ذِي الْهَيْبَةِ وَ الْقُدْرَةِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Possessor of Grandeur and Power.ï¿½

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ ذِي الْكِــبِرِيٰاءِ وَ الْجَبَرُوتِ.

translation.en: ï¿½There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Possessor of Pride and Dignity.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ السَّتّٰارِ الْعَظِيمِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Coverer (of sins), the Great.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعٰالِمِ الْغَيبِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Knower of the Unseen.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْحَمِيدِ وَ الْمَجِيدِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Praised, the Exalted.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْحَكِيمِ الْقَدِيـمِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Wise, the Eternal.ï¿½

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْقٰادِرِ السَّتّٰارِ.

translation.en: ï¿½There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Powerful, the Coverer (of sins).

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ السَّمِيعِ الْعَلِيمِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْغَنِيِّ الْعَظِيمِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the all Sufficient, the Great.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَلاّٰمِ السَّلاٰمِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Knowing, the Peace.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْمَلِكِ النَّصِـيـرِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the King, the Helper.ï¿½

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْغَنِيِّ الرَّحْمٰنِ.

translation.en: ï¿½There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Sufficient, the Most Merciful.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْقَرِيبِ الْحَسَنٰاتِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the One whose Goodness is close at Hand.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْوَلِيِّ الْحَسَنٰاتِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Guardian of all Goodness.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الصَّبُورِ السَّتّٰارِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Oft-Patient, the Coverer (of sins).

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْخٰالِقِ النُّورِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Creator, the Divine Light.ï¿½

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْغَنِيِّ الْمُعْجِزِ.

translation.en: ï¿½There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Sufficient, the Miracle.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْفٰاضِلِ الشَّكُورِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Erudite, the Oft-Thanked.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْغَنِيِّ الْقَدِيـمِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Sufficient, the Eternal.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ ذِي الْجَلاٰلِ الْمُبِينِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Possessor of Manifest Grandeur.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْخٰالِصِ الْمُخْلِصِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Uncontaminated and One Who (spiritually) Purifies Others.ï¿½

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الصّٰادِقِ الْوَعْدِ.

translation.en: ï¿½There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the One who is Truthful to His Word.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْحَقِّ الْمُبِينِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Manifest Truth.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ ذِي الْقُوَّةِ الْمَتِينِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Possessor of Even-Powered Strength.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْقَوِيِّ الْعَزِيزِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Powerful, the Noble.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَلاّٰمِ الْغُيُوبِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Knowing of the Unseen.ï¿½

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْحَيِّ الَّذِي لاٰ يَمُوتُ.

translation.en: ï¿½There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Living Who shall Never Die.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ السَّتّٰارِ الْعُيُوبِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Coverer of Sins.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْمُسْتَعٰانِ الْغَفُورِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the One whose Help is Sought, the Forgiving.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ رَبِّ الْعٰالَمِيـنَ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Lord of the Entire Universe.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الرَّحْمٰنِ السَّتّٰارِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Most Merciful, the Coverer (of sins).ï¿½

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الرَّحِيمِ الْغَفّٰارِ.

translation.en: ï¿½There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Compassionate, the Forgiver.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَزِيزِ الْوَهّٰابِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Noble, the Granter of Desires.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْقٰادِرِ الْمُقْتَدِرِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Able, the Powerful.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ ذِي الْغُفْرٰانِ الْحَلِيمِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Possessor of Forgiveness and the Most Forbearing.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْمٰالِكِ الْمُلْكِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Ruler of the Kingdom.ï¿½

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْبٰارِءِ الْمُصَوِّرِ.

translation.en: ï¿½There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Evolver, the Fashioner. Th

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَزِيزِ الْجَبّٰارِ.

translation.en: ere is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Noble, the Haughty.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْجَبّٰارِ الْمُتَكَبِّرِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Haughty, the Proud.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ اللّٰهِ عَمّٰا يَصِفُونَ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to Allah for that which they ascribe to Him.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْقُدُّوسِ الْسُبُّوحِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Sacred, the Oft-Praised.ï¿½

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ رَبِّ الْمَلاٰئِكَةِ وَ الرُّوحِ.

translation.en: ï¿½There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Lord of the Angels and the Spirit.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ ذِي الأَلآَءِ وَ النَّعَمٰاءِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Possessor of Bounties and the Treasures.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْمَلِكِ الْمَقْصُودِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Ruler of the Purpose.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْحَنّٰانِ الْمَنّٰانِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Compassionate, the Benign.ï¿½

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ آدَمُ صَفِيُّ اللّٰهِ.

translation.en: ï¿½There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, ï¿½dam - the chosen of Allah.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ نُوحُ نَجِيُّ اللّٰهِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Nï¿½ï¿½ - the Saved of Allah.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ إِبْرٰاهِيمُ خَلِيلُ اللّٰهِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Ibrahï¿½m - the Friend of Allah.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ إِسْمٰائِيلُ ذَبِيحُ اللّٰهِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Isma~ï¿½l - the Sacrificed of Allah.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ مُوسى كَلِيمُ اللّٰهِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Mï¿½sa - the one who spoke to Allah.

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ دٰاوُدُ خَلِيفَةُ اللّٰهِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Dawï¿½d - the Successor of Allah (on His Earth).

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ عِيسى رُوحُ اللّٰهِ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, ~Isa - the Spirit of Allah

segments.arabic: لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ مُحَمَّدٰ رَسُولُ اللّٰهِ وَ صَلَّى اللّٰهُ عَلـى خَيْرِ خَلْقِهِ وَ نُوْرِ عَرْشِهِ أَفْضَلِ الأَنْبِيٰاءِ وَ الْمُرْسَلِينَ حَبِيبِنٰا وَ سَيِّدِنٰا وَ سَنَدِنٰا وَ شَفِيعِنٰا وَ مَوْلاٰنٰا مُحَمَّدٍ وَ عَلـى آلِهِ وَ أَصْحٰابِهِ الْمُنْتَجَبِينَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ يٰا أَرْحَمَ الرّٰاحِمِيـنَ.

translation.en: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Muammad is the Messenger of Allah and may the blessings of Allah be upon the best of His creations and the Light of His Divine Throne, the best of Prophets and those who were sent (to guide humanity), our beloved, our leader, our support, our intercessor and our master, Muammad and upon his family and his select, distinguished companions. May Your mercy be upon them all O the Most Merciful of the Merciful Ones.

text.en: Dua Amaanfor Protection.
Another dua

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان يوم " لا يستأخرون ساعة ولا يستقدمون ".

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection: on the day when they can neither delay (the event) by a single moment, nor can they hasten it (death).

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان عند سكرات الموت، وعند مفارقة الروح وعند معاينة الموت.

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : at the time of the parting of the soul from the body and in the presence of death.

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان عند هول المطلع وعند الوقوف بين يديك.

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : at the time of the narration (of our sins) and at the time of our tarrying in front of Thee.

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان عند هول القيامة وشدائدها.

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : from the dread of Doom and its severity.

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم يكون الناس كالفراش المبثوث ".

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : When mankind shall swarn like moths (resurrection of mankind).

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم تقوم الساعة ".
إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم يقوم الناس لرب العالمين "

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : On the day when mankind shall stand before Thee, Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم لا تملك نفس لنفس شيئا والأمر يومئذ لله "
إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم تبيض وجوه وتسود وجوه "

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : on the day when some faces will be bright and some faces will be black.

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم يفر المرء من أخيه وأمه وأبيه و صاحبته وبنيه لكل امرئ منهم يومئذ شأن يغنيه

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : When man will flee from his brother, and his mother and his father, and his wife, and his children; for everyone of them they shall be in such anxiety for his own self as will make him oblivious of all other things.

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم يقوم الروح والملائكة صفا لا يتكلمون إلا من أذن له الرحمن وقال صوابا "

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : on the day when the angles and the spirit shall stand to order, lined up, and none shall be able to speak, except those whom the All-merciful shall permit, and they shall say only what is proper.

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم ينظر المرء ما قدمت يداه ويقول الكافر يا ليتني كنت ترابا "

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : on the day when man shall see what his hands have sent before him, and the disbeliever shall say, "Would that I were dust."

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان " في يوم كان مقداره خمسين ألف سنة فاصبر صبرا جميلا "

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : on the day, the duration whereof is equal to fifty thousand years.

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم يود المجرم لو يفتدي من عذاب يومئذ ببنيه وصاحبته وأخيه ".

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : on the day when the sinner would wish that he could reason himself from the torment of that day by substituting for himself his son, or wife, or brother, or the kindred with whom he passed his life or all the inhabitants of the earth put together, and thus save himself, But no! Verily it is a flaming fire, and it will scorch the skin.

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم ترجف الراجفة تتبعها الرادفة قلوب يومئذ واجفة أبصارها خاشعة "

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : on the day when the earth quake will shake the earth, and its sequel (another earthquake) shall follow it. Hearts on that day shall palpitate, and eyes shall be down caste.

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم يرون الملائكة لا بشرى يومئذ للمجرمين ويقولون حجرا محجورا ".

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : on the day when the angels shall say : "There is no good news today for the sinners" And "Be gone, away with you"

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم يعض الظالم على يديه يقول يا ليتني اتخذت مع الرسول سبيلا يا ويلتي ليتني لم أتخذ فلانا خليلا "

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : on the day when the wrongdoer shall bite his own hands and say " Ah! Would that I had chosen a way of life with the prophet; also for me! Ah ! Would that I had not taken so and so for a friend.

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم يجعل الولدان شيبا السماء منفطر به كان وعده مفعولا "
إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم نقول لجهنم هل امتلأت وتقول هل من مزيد "
إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم لا يغني مولى عن مولى شيئا ولا هم ينصرون "

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : When man will flee from his brother, and his mother and his father, and his wife, and his children; for everyone of them they shall be in such anxiety for his own self as will make him oblivious of all other things.

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم تأتي كل نفس بما كسبت وهم لا يظلمون "
إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم لا تجزي نفس عن نفس شيئا ولا يقبل منها شفاعة ولا يؤخذ منها عدل ولا هم ينصرون "

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : on the day when neither wealth nor sons shall avail any man, except one who comes to God with a pure man, except one who comes to God with a pure heart by Thy mercy, O most Merciful of all.

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم تذهل كل مرضعة عما أرضعت وتضع كل ذات حمل حملها وترى الناس سكارى وما هم بسكارى ولكن عذاب الله شديد "

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : on the day when the angles and the spirit shall stand to order, lined up, and none shall be able to speak, except those whom the All-merciful shall permit, and they shall say only what is proper.

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم أزفت الآزفة ليس لها من دون الله كاشفة ".

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : on the day when man shall see what his hands have sent before him, and the disbeliever shall say, "Would that I were dust."

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم لا يجزي والد عن ولده ولا مولود هو جاز عن والده شيئا إن وعد الله حق "

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : on the day when the sinner would wish that he could reason himself from the torment of that day by substituting for himself his son, or wife, or brother, or the kindred with whom he passed his life or all the inhabitants of the earth put together, and thus save himself, But no! Verily it is a flaming fire, and it will scorch the skin.

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان " يوم لا ينفع مال ولا بنون إلا من أتى الله بقلب سليم

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : on the day when neither wealth nor sons shall avail any man, except one who comes to God with a pure man, except one who comes to God with a pure heart by Thy mercy, O most Merciful of all.

segments.arabic: إلهي، الأمان الأمان بحق محمد، وبحق الأنبياء والمرسلين، والأئمة الطاهرين، برحمتك يا أرحم الراحمين، وصلى الله على خير خلقه محمد وآله أجمعين، وسلم تسليما كثيرا كثيرا.

translation.en: My God, Thy protection, Thy protection : on the day, the duration whereof is equal to fifty thousand years.

segments.arabic: لا إله إلا الله الموجود في كل زمان

translation.en: There is no god except Allah, who is present at all times.

segments.arabic: لا إله إلا الله المعبود في كل مكان

translation.en: There is no god except Allah, who is worshipped in every place.

segments.arabic: لا إله إلا الله المعروف بالإحسان

translation.en: There is no god except Allah, who is known by His Kindness.

segments.arabic: لا إله إلا الله الأمان الأمان

translation.en: There is no god except ALLAH.

segments.transliteration: Thy protection, Thy protection, O Eternally Good,

translation.en: O Anciently Kind, O Guide of those who go astray.

segments.arabic: إياك نعبد وإياك نستعين يا غفور يا غفار برحمتك

translation.en: Thee (alone we worship, and Thee (alone) we ask fo help.O Forgiver, O All (forgiving).

segments.arabic: يا أرحم الراحمين وصل الله على محمد وآله أجمعين

translation.en: By Thy mercy, O Most Merciful of all;Bless Mohammed and his progeny, all of them.

segments.arabic: - قال رسول الله (ص) : من دعا بهذا الدعاء في كل صباح ومساء ، وكل الله تعالى به أربعا من الملائكة يحفظونه من بين يديه ، ومن خلفه وعن يمينه وشماله ، وكان في أمان الله (عز وجل) ، وأن حاولت الخلائق من الجن والإنس أن تضره ، ما تمكنت وهو هذا الدعاء :بِسْمِ اللهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيْمِ بِسْمِ اللهِ خَيْرِالْاَسْمَآءِ بِسْمِ اللهِ رَبِّ الْاَرْضِ وَالسَّمَآءِ بِسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهٖ سَمٌّ وَلَا دَاءٌ بِسْمِ اللهِ أَصْبَحْتُ وَعَلَي اللهِ تَوَکَّلْتُبِسْمِ اللهِ عَلٰي قَلْبِيْ وَنَفْسِيْ بِسْمِ اللهِ عَلٰي دِيْنِيْ وَعَقْلِيْ بِسْمِ اللهِ عَلٰي أَهْلِيْ وَمَالِيْبِسْمِ اللهِ عَلٰي مَا أَعْطَانِيْ رَبِّي بِسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِيْ لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهٖ شَيْءٌ فِي الْاَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَآءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيْعُ الْعَلِيْمُاَللهُ اَللهُ رَبِّيْ لَا أُشْرِکُ بِهٖ شَيْئًا،اَللهُ أَکْبَرُ اَللهُ أَکْبَرُ وَأَعَزُّ وَأَجَلُّ مِمَّا أَخافُ وَأَحْذَرُ عَزَّ جَارُکَ وَجَلَّ ثَنَاؤُکَ وَلَا إِلٰهَ غَيْرُکَاَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّيْ أَعُوْذُ بِکَ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِيْ وَمِنْ شَرِّ کُلِّ سُلْطَانٍ شَدِيْدٍ وَمِنْ شَرِّ کُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ مَرِيْدٍ وَمِنْ شَرِّ کُلِّ جَبَّارٍ عَنِيْدٍ وَمِنْ شَرِّ قَضَآءِ السُّوْ ءِ،وَمِنْ کُلِّ دَابَّةٍ أَنْتَ آخِذٌ بِنَاصِيَتِهَا،إِنَّکَ عَلٰي صِرَاطٍ مُّسْتَقِيْمٍ وَأَنْتَ عَلٰي کُلِّ شَيْءٍ حَفِيْظٌ إِنَّ وَلِيِّيَ اللهُ الَّذِيْ نَزَّلَ الْکِتابَ وَهُوَ يَتَوَلَّي الصَّالِحِيْنَ فَإِنْ تَوَلَّوْا فَقُلْ حَسْبِيَ اللهُ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَکَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيْمِ." بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم ، بسم الله خير الأسماء ، بسم الله رب الأرض والسماء ، بسم الله الذي لا يضر مع اسمه سم ولا داء ، بسم الله أصبحت وعلى الله توكلت ، بسم الله على قلبي ونفسي ، بسم الله على ديني وعقلي ، بسم الله على أهلي ومالي ، بسم الله على ما أعطاني ربي ، بسم الله الذي لا يضر مع اسمه شيء في الأرض ، ولا في السماء ، وهو السميع العليم ، الله الله ربي ، لا أشرك به شيئا ، الله أكبر الله أكبر ، وأعز وأجل مما أخاف وأحذر ، عز جارك وجل ثناؤك ، ولا إله غيرك ، اللهم إني أعوذ بك من شر نفسي ، ومن شر كل سلطان شديد ، ومن شر كل شيطان مريد ، ومن شر كل جبار عنيد ، ومن شر قضاء السوء ، ومن كل دابة أنت آخذ بناصيتها ، إنك على صراط مستقيم وأنت على كل شيء حفيظ إن وليي الله الذي نزل الكتاب ، وهو يتولى الصالحين ، فإن تولوا فقل حسبي الله ، لا إله إلا هو عليه توكلت ، وهو رب العرش العظيم . " {مفاتيح الجنان}

text.en: To be recited at the time of Dawn (Suhoor)
It is recommended to say the following supplication, which is considered the shortest supplications of the last hours of Ramadan nights. It is also mentioned in the book of Iqbal al-A`mal:

translation.en: O my Safe haven at grievances!
O my Aide at hardships!
To You do I turn,
Your help do I seek,
and with You do I take refuge.
I seek refuge with none save You

segments.transliteration: wa la atlubu alfaraja illa minka

translation.en: and I beseech none for relief save You.
So, (please) come to my help and free me from cares.
O He Who accepts even the least efforts
excuses the much wrongdoing!
(Please do) accept my little effort
excuse my much wrongdoing.
Verily, You are the Oft-forgiving, Merciful (Lord).

segments.arabic: اللِّهُمِّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ إِيـمَاناً تُبَاشِرُ بِهِ قَلْبِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka imanan tubashiru bihi qalbi

translation.en: O Allah, I ask for faith with which You may fill my heart

segments.arabic: وَيَقِيناً حَتَّىٰ أَعْلَمَ أَنِّهُ لَنْ يُصِيبَنِي إِلاَّ مَا كَتَبْتَ لِي
segments.transliteration: wa yaqinan hatta a`lama annahu lan yusibani illa ma katabta li

translation.en: and for certitude so that I shall always know that nothing will afflict me save what You have ordained for me.

segments.arabic: وَرَضِّنِي مِنَ ٱلْعَيْشِ بِمَا قَسَمْتَ لِي
segments.transliteration: wa raddini min al`ayshi bima qasamta li

translation.en: (Please) make me feel satisfied with the living that You decide for me.
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!
O my means at times of agonies!
O my companion at times of hardships!
O Source of my all bounties!
O my ultimate goal whenever I desire for something!
It is You Who is the concealer of my defects,
Who secures me at times of horror,
and Who overlooks my slips.
So, (please do) forgive my sin.
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

text.en: Dua of Nabi Idris
To be recited at the time of Dawn (Suhoor)
It is recommended to recite the Du`a' Idris (the Supplication of Idris), which has been mentioned by Shaykh al-Tusiy and Sayyid Ibn Tawus in the books of Misbah al-Mutahajjid or Iqbal al-A`mal.

translation.en: Glory be to You. There is no god save You.
O the Lord and the Inheritor of all things.
O the God of gods; whose majesty is elevated.

segments.arabic: يا اَللهُ المَحْمودُ في كُلِّ فِعالِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya allahu almahmudu fy kulli fi`alihi,

translation.en: O Allah, the Praised for all of His acts.
O the All-beneficent and the All-merciful of all things.

segments.arabic: يا حَيُّ حينَ لا حَيُّ في دَيْمومَةِ مُلكِهِ وَبَقائِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya hayyu hina la hayyu fy daymumati mulkihi wabaqa’ihi,

translation.en: O the Ever-living, when there was nothing existent, in the perpetuity of His kingdom and eternity.

segments.arabic: يا قَيُّومُ فَلا يَفوتُ شَيْءٌ مِنْ عِلْمِهِ وَلا يَؤودُهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya qayyumu fala yafutu shay‘un min `ilmihi wala yau´uduhu,

translation.en: O the Self-Subsisting; nothing can be missed by Your knowledge and nothing can ever tire Him.

segments.arabic: يا واحِدُ البَاقِي أوَّلَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَآخِرَهُ.
segments.transliteration: ya wahidu albaqiy awwala kulli shay‘in wakhirahu.

translation.en: O the One, the Everlasting, the First and the Last of all things.

segments.arabic: يا دائِمُ بِغَيْرِ فَناءٍ وَلا زَوالَ لِمُلْكِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya da’imu bighayri fana‘in wala zawala limulkihi,

translation.en: O the Perpetual without extinction, and His kingdom is never exposed to extermination.

segments.arabic: يا صَمَدُ في غَيْرِ شَبيهٍ وَلا شَيْءَ كَمِثْلِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya samadu fy ghayri shabihin wala shay‘a kamithlihi,

translation.en: O the Besought of all; without being any match to Him and there is nothing like Him.

segments.arabic: يا بارُّ فَلا شَيْءَ كُفْوُهُ وَلا مُدانِيَ لِوَصْفِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya barru fala shay‘a kuf’uhu walamudaniya liwasfihi,

translation.en: O the Upright; nothing can be His equal and nothing can even approach Him in attributes.

segments.arabic: يا كَبيرُ أنْتَ الَّذي لا تَهْتَدي القُلوبُ لِعَظَمَتِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya kabiru anta alladhy la tahtady alqulubu li`azamatihi,

translation.en: O the All-big; it is You Whose greatness cannot be hit by hearts.

segments.arabic: يا بارِئُ الْمُنْشَيْءَ بِلا مِثالٍ خَلا مِنْ غَيْرِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya bari’u almunshi‘u bila mithalin khalamin ghayrihi,

translation.en: O the Originator, the Maker, without having any equivalent.

segments.arabic: يا زاكي الطّاهِرُ مِنْ كُلِّ آفَةٍ بِقُدْسِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya zaky alttahiru min kulli afatin biqudsihi,

translation.en: O the Pure, the Safe from any defect due to His Holiness.

segments.arabic: يا كافي الْمُوسِعُ لِما خَلَقَ مِنْ عَطايا فَضْلِهِ.
segments.transliteration: ya kafy almuwsi`u lima khalaqa min `ataya fadlihi.

translation.en: O the Self-Sufficient, the Bestower upon His creatures with the gifts of His favors.

segments.arabic: يا نَقِيُّ مِنْ كُلِّ جَوْرٍ لَمْ يَرْضَهُ وَلَمْ يُخالِطْهُ فِعالَهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya naqiyyu min kulli jawrin lam yardahu walam yukhalithu fi`alahu,

translation.en: O the Pufiried against any injustice that He does not accept and that is not found in His deeds.

segments.arabic: يا حَنّانُ أنْتَ الَّذي وَسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ رَحْمَتُهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya hannanu anta alladhy wasi`at kulla shay‘in rahmatuhu,

translation.en: O the All-tender; it is You Whose mercy covers all things.

segments.arabic: يا مَنّانُ ذا الإحْسانِ قَدْ عَمَّ الخَلائِقَ مِنْهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya mannanu dha alihsani qad `amma alkhala’iqa minhu,

translation.en: O the All-favorer, the Lord of benevolence that He spreads over all the created beings.

segments.arabic: يا دَيّانَ العِبادِ فَكُلٌّ يَقومُ خاضِعاً لِرَهْبَتِهِ.
segments.transliteration: ya dayyana al`ibadi fakullun yaqumu khadi`an lirahbatihi.

translation.en: O the Master of the servants; everything stands in submission to the fear of Him.

segments.arabic: يا خالِقَ مَنْ في السَّمواتِ وَالأرَضينَ فَكُلٌّ إلَيْهِ مَعادُهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya khaliqa man fy alssamawati walaradina fakullun ilayhi ma`aduhu,

translation.en: O the Creator of all those in the heavens and the layers of the earth; everything shall be returned to Him.

segments.arabic: يا رَحْمانُ وَراحِمَ كُلِّ صَريخٍ وَمَكْروبٍ وَغِياثَهُ وَمَعاذَهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya rahmanu warahima kulli sarikhin wamakrubin waghiyathahu wama`adhahu,

translation.en: O the All-beneficent and the All-merciful to and the Aide and the Shelter of all seekers of aid and all aggrieved ones.

segments.arabic: يا بارُّ فَلا تَصِفُ الألْسُنُ كُنْهَ جَلالِ مُلْكِهِ وَعِزِّهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya barru fala tasifu alalsunu kunha jalali mulkihi wa`izzihi,

translation.en: O the Upright; no language can ever describe the reality of the majesty of His kingdom and might.

segments.arabic: وَيا مُبْدِئَ البَرايا لَمْ يَبْغِ في إنْشائِها أعْواناً مِنْ خَلقِهِ،
segments.transliteration: waya mubd’ia albaraya lam yabghi fy insha’iha a`wanan min khalqihi,

translation.en: O the Originator of all the creation; in Your creation, You did not need assistants from among Your creatures.

segments.arabic: يا عَلاَّمَ الغُيوبِ فلا يَؤوُدُهُ مِنْ شَيْءٍ حِفْظُهُ.
segments.transliteration: ya `allama alghuyubi fla yau´uduhu min shay‘in hifzuhu.

translation.en: O the Knower of all the unseen; the preservation of all things does not tire You.

segments.arabic: يا مُعيداً ما أفْناهُ إذا بَرَزَ الخَلائِقُ لِدَعْوَتِهِ مِنْ مَخافَتِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya mu`idan ma afnahu idha baraza alkhala’iqu lida`uatihi min makhafatihi,

translation.en: O He Who shall restore to life all that which He terminates when the creatures will be resurrected on account of His call out of fear of Him.

segments.arabic: يا حَليمُ ذا الأناةِ فَلا شَيْءَ يَعْدِلُهُ مِنْ خَلْقِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya halimu dha alanaati fala shay‘a ya`diluhu min khalqihi,

translation.en: O the Forbearing, the Lord of leniency; nothing of Your creatures can ever match You.

segments.arabic: يا مَحْمودَ الفِعالِ ذا الْمَنِّ عَلى جَميعِ خَلْقِهِ بِلُطْفِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya mahmuda alfi`ali dha almanni `alajami`i khalqihi bilutfihi,

translation.en: O He Whose deeds are praiseworthy, the Lord of favoring on all Your creatures out of Your kindness.

segments.arabic: يا عَزيزُ الْمَنِيعُ الْغالِبُ عَلى أمْرِهِ فَلا شَيْءَ يَعْدِلُهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya `azizu almani`u alghalibu `ala amrihi fala shay‘a ya`diluhu,

translation.en: O the Almighty, the Invulnerable, the Dominant over all affairs; nothing can ever be equivalent to You.

segments.arabic: يا قاهِرُ ذا الْبَطْشِ الشَّديدِ أنْتَ الَّذي لا يُطاقُ انْتِقامُهُ.
segments.transliteration: ya qahiru dha albatshi alshshadidi anta alladhy la yutaqu antiqamuhu.

translation.en: O the Overcomer, the owner of strong grip; it is You Whose punishment is intolerable.

segments.arabic: يا مُتَعالي القَريبُ في عُلُوِّ ارْتِفاعِ دُنُوِّهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya muta`aly alqaribu fy `uluwwi artifa`i dunuwwihi,

translation.en: O the All-exalted, the Nigh in the elevation of Your nearness;

segments.arabic: يا جَبّارُ الْمُذَلِّلَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ بِقَهْرِ عَزيزِ سُلْطانِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya jabbaru almudhallila kulli shay‘in biqahri `azizi sultanihi,

translation.en: O the All-powerful, the humiliating all things by the prevalence of His almighty authority;

segments.arabic: يا نورَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ أنْتَ الَّذي فَلَقَ الظُّلُماتِ نورُهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya nura kulli shay‘in anta alladhy falaqa alzzulumati nuruhu,

translation.en: O the Light of all things; it is You Whose light split the darkness.

segments.arabic: يا قُدّوسُ الطّاهِرُ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَلا شَيْءَ يَعْدِلُهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya quddusu alttahiru min kulli shay‘in walashay‘a ya`diluhu,

translation.en: O the Holy, the Wholesome against all things and nothing can ever be His counterpart.

segments.arabic: يا قَريبُ الْمُجيبُ الْمُتَداني دونَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قُرْبَهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya qaribu almujibu almutadany duna kulli shay‘in qurbahu,

translation.en: O the Nigh; the Responding; and the Approaching very close that He has becomes the nearest of all things.

segments.arabic: يا عالي الشّامِخُ في السَّماءِ فَوقَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ عُلُوُّ ارْتِفاعِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya `aly alshshamikhu fy alssama‘i fawqa kulli shay‘in `uluwwu artifa`ihi,

translation.en: O the Elevated; the Exalted in the heavens; whose highness has overtopped all things.

segments.arabic: يا بَديعَ البَدائِعِ وَمُعيدَها بَعْدَ فَنائِها بِقُدْرَتِهِ.
segments.transliteration: ya badi`a albada’i`i wamu`idaha ba`da fana’iha biqudratihi.

translation.en: O the Wonderful Maker of all wonderful things; and the Restorer of them by His power after they vanish;

segments.arabic: يا جَليلُ الْمُتَكَبِّرُ عَلى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ،

translation.en: O the Lofty; the All-great over all things.
Just are Your affairs, and truthful are Your promises.

segments.arabic: يا مَجيدُ فَلا يَبْلُغُ الأوْهامُ كُلَّ ثَنائِهِ وَمَجْدِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya majidu fala yablughu al-awhamu kulla thana’ihi wamajdihi,

translation.en: O the Glorious; even delusions cannot attain all Your praise and glory.
O the Noble in pardon and justice;

segments.arabic: أنْتَ الَّذي مَلأَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ عَدْلُهُ،

translation.en: It is You Whose justice has filled in everywhere.

segments.arabic: يا عَظِيمُ ذا الثَّناءِ الفاخِرِ وَالْعِزِّ وَالْكِبْرِياءِ فَلا يُذَلُّ عِزُّهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya `azimu dha alththana‘i alfakhiri wal`izzi walkibriya‘i fala yudhallu `izzuhu,

translation.en: O the Great; the Lord of excellent praise, might, and magnitude; hence, Your might is never humbled.

segments.arabic: يا عَجِيبُ لا تَنْطِقُ الألْسُنُ بِكُلِّ آلائِهِ وَثَنائِهِ.
segments.transliteration: ya `ajibu la tantiqu alalsunu bikulli ala’ihi wathana’ihi.

translation.en: O the All-excellent; languages cannot express all Your bounties and praise.

segments.arabic: أسْألُكَ يا مُعْتَمَدي عِنْدَ كُلِّ كُرْبَةٍ،

translation.en: I beseech You; O my Reliance at all griefs;
And my Aide at all hardships,

segments.arabic: بِهذِهِ الأسْماءِ أماناً مِنْ عُقوباتِ الدُّنْيا وَالآخِرَةِ،
segments.transliteration: bihdhihi alasma‘i amanan min `uqubati alddunia walakhirati,

translation.en: (I beseech You) by these names to grant me security against the punishments in this worldly life as well as the Next Life.

segments.arabic: وَأسْألُكَ أنْ تَصْرِفَ عَنّي بِهِنَّ كُلَّ سوءٍ وَمَخوفٍ وَمَحْذورٍ،
segments.transliteration: wasaluka an tasrifa `anny bihinna kulla su‘in wamakhufin wamahdhurin,

translation.en: And I beseech You to rebuff from me by these Names all things that are evil, feared, and jeopardized,

segments.arabic: وَتَصْرِفَ عَنّي أبْصارَ الظَّلَمَةِ الْمُريدينَ بِيَ السّوءَ الَّذي نَهَيْتَ عَنْهُ
segments.transliteration: watasrifa `anny absara alzzalamati almuridina biya alssu‘a alladhy nahayta `anhu

translation.en: And to rebuff from me the sights of the wrongdoers who intend evil to me—evil against which You have warned;

segments.arabic: وَأنْ تَصْرِفَ قُلوبَهُمْ مِنْ شَرِّ ما يُضْمِرونَ إلى خَيْرِ ما لا يَمْلِكونَ،
segments.transliteration: wan tasrifa qulubahum min sharri mayudmiruna ila khayri ma la yamlikuna,

translation.en: And to rebuff from me their hearts and change the evil that they conceal in themselves into the good that they do not have,
And none else has it save You, O the All-generous.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ لا تَكِلْني إلى نَفْسي فَأعْجَزُ عَنْها،
segments.transliteration: allahumma la takilny ila nafsy fa`jazu `anha,

translation.en: O Allah: (please) do not refer me to myself, because I will fail to manage it,
Or to the people, because they will reject me.
And do not disappoint me while I am pleasing You,
And do not torture me while I am praying You.
O Allah: I am praying You as You ordered me to do,
So, (please) answer me as You promised me to do.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ خَيْرَ عُمْري ما وَلِيَ أجَلي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`al khayra `umry ma waliya ajali.

translation.en: O Allah: (please) make the best of my lifetime be that which is near to my death.
O Allah: (please) do not change my body,
And do not stop adding to my shares (from Your favors)
And do not cause harm to my friend.
I seek Your protection against deadly diseases,
And against harsh poverty,
And against humiliation and bad company.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ سَلِّ قَلْبي عَنْ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ لا أتَزَوَّدُهُ إلَيْكَ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli qalby `an kulli shay‘in laatazawwaduhu ilayka,

translation.en: O Allah: (please) entertain my heart against all things that cannot act as my provision to You,
And that cannot avail me on the day when I will meet You,
Be it legal or illegal,

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ أعْطِني قُوَّةً عَلَيْهِ وَعِزّاً وَقَناعَةً وَمَقْتاً لَهُ وَرِضاكَ فِيهِ،
segments.transliteration: thumma a`tiny quwwatan `alayhi wa`izzan waqana`atan wamaqtan lahu waridaka fihi,

translation.en: And then (please) grant me power over it as well as mighty, contentment, revulsion of it, and Your satisfaction with it.
O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy;

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ لكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلى عَطاياكَ الْجَزيلَةِ،

translation.en: O Allah: all praise be to You for Your abundant gifts.
And all praise be to you for Your uninterrupted favors,

segments.arabic: الَّتي بِها دافَعْتَ عَنّي مَكارِهَ الأُمورِ،

translation.en: By which You have saved me from adverse matters,
And through which You have bestowed upon me with the donations of pleasure,
Although I persisted in carelessness,
And I kept some hardheartedness;

segments.arabic: فَلَمْ يَمْنَعْكَ ذلِكَ مِنْ فِعْلي أنْ عَفَوْتَ عَنّي،
segments.transliteration: falam yamna`ka dhlika min fi`ly an `afawta `anni,

translation.en: Nevertheless, all such deeds of mine did not stop You from pardoning me,
And covering that,

segments.arabic: وَسَوَّغْتَني ما في يَدي مِنْ نِعَمِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wasawwaghtany ma fy yady min ni`amika,

translation.en: And allowing me to dispose with Your bounties that are at my hand,
And continuing in doing good to me,

segments.arabic: وَصَفَحْتَ لي عَنْ قَبيحِ ما أفْضَيْتَ بِهِ إلَيْكَ،
segments.transliteration: wasafahta ly `an qabihi ma afdayta bihi ilayka,

translation.en: And overlooking the ill deeds of which I confessed to You,
And my violations of doing acts of disobedience to You.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ إنّي أسْألُكَ بِكُلِّ اسْمٍ هُوَ لَكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inny asaluka bikulli asmin huwa laka

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You by every Name that is Yours,

segments.arabic: يَحِقُّ عَلَيْكَ فيهِ إجابَةَ الدُّعاءِ إذا دُعيتَ بِهِ،
segments.transliteration: yahiqqu `alayka fihi ijabata alddu`a‘i idhadu`ita bihi,

translation.en: And due to which it becomes incumbent upon You to respond to those who pray You by it,
And I beseech You in the name of all those who enjoy a right with You

segments.arabic: وَبِحَقِّكَ عَلى جَمِيعِ مَنْ هُوَ دُونَكَ،

translation.en: And in the name of Your duties that are incumbent upon all those who are less than You are,

segments.arabic: أنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَرَسُولِكَ وَعَلى آلِهِ،
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin `abdika warasuwlika wa`ala alihi,

translation.en: (I beseech You) to send blessings upon Muhammad, Your servant and Your Messenger, and upon his Household;

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ أرادَني بِسوءٍ فَخُذْ بِسَمْعِهِ وَبَصَرِهِ
segments.transliteration: waman aradany bisu‘in fakhudh bisam`ihi wabasarihi

translation.en: And as for anyone who intends evil to me, (please) have control on his hearing and sight
And before him and behind him
And from his right side and from his left side,
And (please) prevent him from harming me through Your might and Your power.

segments.arabic: يا مَنْ لَيْسَ مَعَهُ رَبٌّ يُدْعى،
segments.transliteration: ya man laysa ma`ahu rabbun yud`a,

translation.en: O He with Whom there is no other lord to be prayed;

segments.arabic: وَيا مَنْ لَيْسَ فَوْقَهُ خالِقٌ يُخْشى،
segments.transliteration: waya man laysa fawqahu khaliqun yukhsha,

translation.en: O He above Whom there is no other creator to be feared;

segments.arabic: وَيا مَنْ لَيْسَ دونَهُ إلَهٌ يُتَّقى
segments.transliteration: waya man laysa dunahu ilahun yuttaqa

translation.en: O He other than Whom there is no god to be feared;

segments.arabic: وَيا مَنْ لَيْسَ لَهُ وَزيرٌ يُؤْتى،
segments.transliteration: waya man laysa lahu wazirun yuu´ta,

translation.en: O He Who has no assistant that may be seen first;

segments.arabic: وَيا مَنْ لَيْسَ لَهُ حاجِبٌ يُرْشى،
segments.transliteration: waya man laysa lahu hajibun yursha,

translation.en: O He Who has no janitor that may be bribed;

segments.arabic: وَيا مَنْ لَيْسَ لَهُ بَوّابٌ يُنادى،
segments.transliteration: waya man laysa lahu bawwabun yunada,

translation.en: O He Who has no doorkeeper that may be called;

segments.arabic: وَيا مَنْ لا يَزْدادُ عَلى كَثْرَةِ العَطاءِ إلاَّ كَرَماً وَجُوداً،
segments.transliteration: waya man la yazdadu `ala kathrati al`ata‘i illa karaman wajuwdan,

translation.en: O He Whose abundant gifting increases him nothing but more generosity and more magnanimity;

segments.arabic: وَعَلى تَتابُعِ الذُّنوبِ إلاَّ مَغْفِرَةً وَعَفْواً،

translation.en: And the flow of sinning (of His servants) increases him nothing but forgiveness and pardon.
(please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
And do to me that which befits You,

segments.arabic: وَلا تَفْعَلْ بي ما أنا أهْلُهُ،
segments.transliteration: wala taf`al by ma ana ahluhu,

translation.en: And do not do to me that which I deserve,
For You are the worthiest of being feared and the worthiest of forgiving.

text.en: Eight prayers to be said before Leaving Home from "BAQIYATUS SALEHAT"

First: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said: say the following words 3 times just before leaving. If he does, he will be kept under the custody of  Allah swt until He returns him to the place he has left:

translation.en: Allah is the Most Great.

text.en: Then, repeat the following statement three times:

translation.en: I leave (putting my trust) in Allah,
I return (putting my trust) in Allah,
and on Allah do I depend.

text.en: Then, say the following statement, yet one time only:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱفْتَحْ لِي فِي وَجْهِي هٰذَا بِخَيْرٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma iftah li fi wajhi hadha bikhayrin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) grant me easiness in the beginning of this affair of mine
seal it for me with easiness,

segments.arabic: وَقِنِي شَرَّ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ انْتَ آخِذٌ بِنَاصِيَتِهَا
segments.transliteration: wa qini sharra kulli dabbatin anta akhidun binasiyatiha

translation.en: and guard me against the evil of every living creature that You hold by its forelock.
Surely, my Lord is on the right path.

text.en: Second: Imam al-Sajjad (`a) is reported to have said: At the door of your house just before you leave it, you may say the following words:

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin) and in Allah (I trust).
I put my trust in Allah.

text.en: Third: Imam al-Baqir (`a) is reported to have said: Whoever says the following statement when he leaves his house, Almighty Allah will save him from whatever of his this-worldly and otherworldly affairs that concern him:

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin).
Sufficient to me is Allah.
I put my trust in Allah.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْالُكَ خَيْرَ امُورِي كُلِّهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka khayra umuri kulliha

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You for success in all of my affairs

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ خِزْيِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَعَذَابِ ٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika min khizyi alddunya wa `adhabi al-akhirati

translation.en: and I pray Your protection against disgrace in this world and chastisement in the Hereafter.

text.en: Fourth: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said: Whenever you leave your house, you are advised to say the following prayer:

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin).
In Allah I put my trust.

segments.arabic: لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi

translation.en: There is neither might nor power except with Allah.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اسْالُكَ خَيْرَ مَا خَرَجْتُ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka khayra ma kharajtu lahu

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You for success in what I am leaving to do

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَرَجْتُ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika min sharri ma kharajtu lahu

translation.en: and pray Your protection against failure in what I am leaving to do.
O Allah, (please) expand Your favors to me,
make perfect Your graces to me,
dedicate me to obedience to You,
make me desire for what You have in possession,

segments.transliteration: wa tawaffani `ala millatika wa millati rasulika

translation.en: and cause me to die carrying the principles You have instructed and the principles of Your Messenger,
may Allah bless him and his Household.

text.en: Fifth: Imam al-Rida (`a) is reported to have said: My father (`a) used to say the following words whenever he would leave his house: Image

translation.en: In the Name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
I am leaving by the might and power of Allah,
but not by my own might or power;

segments.arabic: بَلْ بِحَوْ لِكَ وَقُوَّتِكَ يَا رَبِّ
segments.transliteration: bal bihawlika wa quwwatika ya rabbi

translation.en: rather, by the might and power of You, O Lord,
seeking Your sustenance.
So, (please) provide me with it easily.

text.en: Sixth: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said, “Whoever repeats Surah al-Tawhid ten times before he leaves his house, will be kept under the safeguard and protection of Almighty Allah until he returns home.”

Seventh:Imam Abul Hassan Musa (`a) is reported to have said: When you intend to travel, you may stop at the door of your house and recite  Surah al-Fatiah (No. 1) in front of you as well as to your right and left sides. You may also recite Surah-Tawhid, Surah     al-Falaq (No. 113), and Sura al-Naas(No. 114). You may then say the following prayer

translation.en: O Allah, (please) safeguard me and safeguard whatever is with me,

segments.transliteration: wa sallimni wa sallim ma ma`iya

translation.en: keep me safe and keep safe whatever is with me,

segments.arabic: وَبَلِّغْنِي وَبَلِّغْ مَا مَعِيَ بَلاَغاً حَسَناً
segments.transliteration: wa ballighni wa balligh ma ma`iya balaghan hasanan

translation.en: and make me and whatever is with me reach my destination in a perfect way.

text.en: Eighth: Imam Musa al-Kazim (`a) is also reported to have said: Whenever you leave your house, whether going on a journey or going to a certain place in your city, you may say the following words:

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin),
in Allah do I believe,
and in Allah do I put my trust.
Only what Allah wills (shall come to pass).

segments.arabic: لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi

translation.en: There is neither might nor power except with Allah.

text.en: DUA'A 442 Imam Ali ibn abi Talib (as) advised the believers to say the following dua'a at the time of entering the house & then recite surah al Ikhlas inside the house.
ASSALAAMU A'LAYNAA MIN RABBINAA
Peace be on us from our Lord.
Guidance to the Best - Istekhara

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ خِيَرَتَكَ فِيمَا ٱسْتَخَرْتُكَ فِيهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna khiyarataka fima istakhartuka fihi

translation.en: O Allah, my prayer for guidance from You with regard to the matter about which I have asked You to guide me
does make all desires accessible, grant abundant gifts,

segments.transliteration: wa tughnimu almataliba wa tutayyibu almakasiba

translation.en: accept the requests, make easy the gains,
guide to the most excellent way,
drive to the most praiseworthy consequences,
and guard from the dreadful calamities.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اسْتَخِيرُكَ فِيمَا عَزَمَ رَايِي عَلَيْهِ

translation.en: O Allah, I pray You for guiding me to the best choice with regard to what I am determined to do
to which my reason has directed me.
O Allah, (please) smooth its progress to me,
make easy its difficulty,
save me from what concerns me,
repel from me what is terrible,
and, O Lord, change its bad consequences into good end results,
its dreadful parts into safety,
its unlikely gains into possible,
and its barrenness into fertility.
O Allah, release Your response to me,
make successful my appeal,
grant me my need,
cut off whatever hinders it,
and stop its misfortunes.
O Allah, give me the pennon of triumph,
the true guidance to the best of what I have asked You for,
the abundant gain of what I have prayed You for,
and the bestowals of favors in what I have hoped You for.
O Allah, attach all that to success,
adorn it exclusively with righteousness,

segments.transliteration: wa arini asbaba alkhiyarati fihi wadihatan

translation.en: make clear before my eyes the reasons for guiding me to this choice
and the factors of winning it,
tighten the grip around the throat of its difficulties,
and refresh its dying easiness.
O Allah, acquaint me with its confusable matters,
release its detained affairs,
and make firm its foundations
so that it will come carrying gains,
removing debts,
bringing about swift benefits,
and perpetuating its effect.
Verily, You always have more to give
and take the initiative to magnanimous conferrals.
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
O Allah, it is my hope for Your expansive mercy
that has motivated me to ask for accepting my true repentance,
and it is my hope for Your forbearance and leniency
that has encouraged me to beg Your security and pardon.
O my Lord, I have committed sins,
which are worthy of encountering Your punishment,
and [I have committed] wrongdoings, which have been observed by the eyes of eradication

segments.arabic: وَٱسْتَوْجَبْتُ بِهَا عَلَىٰ عَدْلِكَ الِيمَ ٱلْعَذَابِ

translation.en: and due to which, I deserve Your painful chastisement despite of Your justice,
and because I have committed these wrongdoings, I earn Your annihilating punishment.
I am thus afraid that these wrongdoings will obstruct You from responding to me
and will make You refuse to grant me my requests,
since they are violative enough to abolish my petition
and to cut off the factors of achieving my desires,

segments.arabic: مِنْ اجْلِ مَا قَدْ انْقَضَ ظَهْرِي مِنْ ثِقْلِهَا
segments.transliteration: min ajli maqad anqada zahri min thiqliha

translation.en: because their overburdens have pressed heavily upon my back
and their loads have been too heavy for me to burden.

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ تَرَاجَعْتُ رَبِّ إِلىٰ حِلْمِكَ عَنِ ٱلْخَاطِئِينَ

translation.en: But when I recalled Your forbearance, O my Lord, with the wrongdoers,
Your forgiveness to the sinful,
and Your mercy to the disobedient,
I, carrying my trust in You and relying on You, came towards You,
throwing myself in Your Presence,
complaining about my grief to You,

segments.arabic: سَائِلاًَ رَبِّ مَا لاَ اسْتَوْجِبُهُ مِنْ تَفْرِيجِ ٱلْهَمِّ
segments.transliteration: sa'ilan rabbi malaastawjibuhu min tafriji alhammi

translation.en: praying You, O my Lord, for what I do not deserve from You; that is relief from my distress,
and for what I do not earn from You; that is alleviation of my anguish,
declaring my true repentance before You, O my Lord,
and putting my trust in You, O my Master.
O Allah, s0 (please) bestow upon me with relief from You,
confer upon me with creating for me an easy way out,
lead me, out of Your clemency, to the straightest path,
make me, out of Your omnipotence, deviate from the crooked path,

segments.transliteration: wa khallisni min sijni alkarbi bi'iqalatika

translation.en: release me, out of Your acceptance of my true repentance, from the prison of ordeals,
set me free from my capture, out of Your mercy,
donate me with favors, out of Your pleasure,
give me generously, out of Your benevolence,
steady me, O my Lord, from my slip,
relieve me from my agony,
have mercy upon my sobbing,
do not make my prayer inaccessible,
and by accepting my repentance, (please) strengthen my back,
confirm my strength,
set aright all my affairs,
grant me long lifetime,

segments.transliteration: warhamni yawma hashri wa waqta nashri

translation.en: and have mercy upon me on the day of my resurrecting and the time of my restoring to life.
Verily, You are all-magnanimous, all-generous,
all-forgiving, and all-merciful.
And (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and his Household.
O Allah, I intend to travel;
so, choose for me the best in my journey,

segments.arabic: وَاوْضِحْ لِي فِيهِ سَبِيلَ ٱلرَّايِ وَفَهِّمْنِيهِ
segments.transliteration: wa awdih li fihi sabila alrra'yi wa fahhimnihi

translation.en: make clear before me and inspire to me the right understanding of the most accurate attitude,
release my determination by means of straightforwardness,
include me with safety during my journey,
furnish me with abundant fortune and honor,
and preserve me with the excellent safeguard and watching.
O Allah, send away from me the inconvenience of journeys,
make easy for me the difficulty of roughness,
unwrap before me the rug of covering the stations,

segments.transliteration: wa qarrib minni bu`da na'yi almanahili

translation.en: bring nearer to me the remote watering places,

segments.arabic: وَبَاعِدْ فِي ٱلْمَسِيرِ بَيْنَ خُطَىٰ ٱلرَّوَاحِلِ
segments.transliteration: wa ba`id fi almasiri bayna khutaalrrawahili

translation.en: and make spaces to be longer between the steps of our riding animals,
so that the remote distances will be nearby
and the rough roads will be smooth.

segments.arabic: وَلَقِّنِي ٱللَّهُمَّ فِي سَفَرِي نُجْحَ طَائِرِ ٱلْوَاقِيَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa laqqini allahumma fi safari nujha ta'iri alwaqiyati

translation.en: O Allah, make me find in this journey success over evil omens,
endue me with achievement of wellbeing,
safeguard against failure,
guidance to survive dangers,
incentives to gain adequacy,
and good opportunity to be protected against authorities.
O Allah, cause my journey to be a reason for winning marvelous security
and obtaining profits.

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلِ ٱللَّيْلَ عَلَيَّ سِتْراً مِنَ ٱلآفَاتِ

translation.en: Make night cover me against banes
and daytime defend me against perishing things.
Out of Your omnipotence, (please) hold back the robbers from reaching me
and, out of Your power, guard me against the beasts
so that safety will accompany me in my journey,
wellbeing will attend me,
good omen will be driven along with me,
easiness will embrace me,
difficulty will depart me,
triumph will agree with me,
and security will associate with me.
Verily, You are the Lord of bestowals, conferrals,
power, and might,
and You have power over all things
and You know and regard all of Your servants.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ارْسِلْ عَلَيَّ سِجَالَ رِزْقِكَ مِدْرَاراً

translation.en: O Allah, send forth on me the bails of Your sustenance in abundance,
make the clouds of Your favoring rain on me heavily,

segments.transliteration: wa adim ghaytha naylika ilayya sijalan

translation.en: keep continuous the drizzle of Your gifts to me plenteously,

segments.arabic: وَاسْبِلْ مَزِيدَ نِعَمِكَ عَلَىٰ خَلَّتِي إِسْبَالاًَ

translation.en: let the superfluity of Your graces to me fall on my neediness increasingly,
make me in ceaseless need for Your magnanimity,
make me dispense with those who are in want for what is possessed by You,

segments.transliteration: wa dawi da'a faqri bidawa'i fadlika

translation.en: medicate the malady of my poverty with the remedy of Your favors,
refresh my dead dearth with Your conferrals,
give as alms to my scarcity Your profuse gifts,
and give to my shortage Your generous grants.

segments.transliteration: wa sahhil rabbi sabila alrrizqi ilayya

translation.en: O my Lord, pave the way of sustenance towards me,
strengthen its foundations with me,
make the fountains of Your expansive mercy to gush out for me,

segments.arabic: وَفَجِّرْ انْهَارَ رَغَدِ ٱلْعَيْشِ قِبَلِي بِرَافَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa fajjir anhara raghadi al`ayshi qibali bira'fatika

translation.en: make the rivers of opulent living to flow before me, out of Your clemency,
cause the land of my poverty to be barren,
fertilize my barren harsh paucity,
hold off all obstacles against gaining my sustenance,
and cut off any relationship between destitution and me.

segments.arabic: وَٱرْمِنِي مِنْ سَعَةِ ٱلرِّزْقِ ٱللَّهُمَّ بِاخْصَبِ سِهَامِهِ
segments.transliteration: warmini min sa`ati alrrizqi allahumma bi-akhsabi sihamihi

translation.en: O Allah, target at me the most productive arrows of opulent sustenance

segments.arabic: وَٱحْبُنِي مِنْ رَغَدِ ٱلْعَيْشِ بِاكْثَرِ دَوَامِهِ
segments.transliteration: wahbuni min raghadi al`ayshi bi-akthari dawamihi

translation.en: and endow me with the most perpetual affluent living.

segments.arabic: وَٱكْسُنِي ٱللَّهُمَّ سَرَابِيلَ ٱلسَّعَةِ وَجَلاَبِيبَ ٱلدَّعَةِ
segments.transliteration: waksuni allahumma sarabila alssa`ati wa jalabiba aldda`ati

translation.en: O Allah, equip me with the shirts of opulence and garments of comfort,

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي يَا رَبِّ مُنْتَظِرٌ لإِنْعَامِكَ بِحَذْفِ ٱلمَضِيقِ
segments.transliteration: fa'inni ya rabbi muntazirun li'in`amika bihadhfi almadiqi

translation.en: for, O my Lord, I expect You to do me the favor of removing my distress,
to bestow upon me with the grace of cutting off the impediment,
to endue me with the errand of eliminating my impoverishment,
and to confer upon me with connecting my cord to Your generosity through facilitation of my affairs.

segments.arabic: وَامْطِرِ ٱللَّهُمَّ عَلَيَّ سَمَاءَ رِزْقِكَ بِسِجَالِ ٱلدِّيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa amtir allahumma `alayya sama'a rizqika bisijali alddimi

translation.en: O Allah, make the sky of Your sustenance shower me with large quantities of the water of Your heavy clouds,
make me too rich to need Your creatures through Your repetitive conferrals of favors,
throw deadly shots at the vulnerable spots of my financial deprivation,
carry the ridding of my misfortune on behalf of me
on the quickest riding animals,
and strike my distress, on behalf of me, with the exterminating sword.

segments.transliteration: wa athifni rabbi minka bisa`ati al-ifdali

translation.en: O my Lord, present me with expansive favoring,
supply me with ever-growing properties,
safeguard me against the distress of paucity,
grasp against me the evil of aridity,
extend before me the carpet of fruitfulness,
serve me with copious dosages of the water of Your sustenance,

segments.arabic: وَٱنْهَجْ لِي مِنْ عَمِيمِ بَذْلِكَ طُرُقاً

translation.en: pave before me many paths of Your massive abdications,
surprise me with wealth and money
through which You may refresh me from scarcity,
start my mornings with solvency,
and start my evenings with ability to meet my liabilities.
Verily, You are the Lord of great bestowal,
massive favoring,
and plentiful conferral,
and You are the All-magnanimous and All-generous.

text.en: Seeking Protection

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ مُلِمَّاتِ نَوَازِلِ ٱلْبَلاَءِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni a`udhu bika min mulimmati nawazili albala'i

translation.en: O Allah, I pray Your protection against the striking mishaps of tribulation
and the horrors of the unbearable adversities.
So, O my Lord, protect me against the blows of affliction,
veil me from the sways of ordeals,
save me from the surprising punishments,
and shelter me against the removal of blessings
and the slipping of steps.
O Allah, make me inside the fence of Your almightiness
and the barrier of Your haven
against unexpected overtaking of calamities
and against the swift sudden misfortunes.

segments.transliteration: allahumma rabbi wa arda albala'i fakhsifha

translation.en: O Allah; O my Lord, (please) cause the lands of ordeals to sink down,
cause the yards of crises to quake,
cast a shadow on the sun of misfortunes,
uproot the mountains of evil,
remove the vicissitudes of times,
and drive back the obstacles in all affairs.
(Please) take me to the ponds of safety,
carry me on the riding animals of honor,
make Your excuse of my slips to be my companion,
and include me with Your covering of my defects.
O my Lord, grant me liberally Your elegances,
Your removal of my tribulations,
and Your fending off of my adversities.
(Please) ward off from me the thoraxes of Your chastisement,
repel from me Your painful punishment,
safeguard me from the ups and downs of days,
rescue me from the evil end results of affairs,
guard me against all anticipated matters,
split the rock of tribulation in my affairs,
and paralyze its hand lest it reaches me as long as I am alive.
Verily, You are the All-glorious lord
Who originates, reproduces,
and does whatever He wants.

text.en: Accepting Repentance

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي قَصَدْتُ إِلَيْكَ بِإِخْلاَصِ تَوْبَةٍ نَصُوحٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni qasadtu ilayka bi'ikhlasi tawbatin nasuhin

translation.en: O Allah, I have come to You with the integrity of a sincere repentance,
the confirmation of a valid determination,
the prayer of a limpid heart,
and the declaration of a clear-cut statement.
So, O Allah, accept from me the sincere repentance of me,
the approaching of my swift turning to You,
and the deadly blows of my fear of Your punishment.

segments.transliteration: wa qabil rabbi tawbati bijazili alththawabi

translation.en: O my Lord, meet my repentance with abundant reward,
generous final return,
absolvement of castigation,
warding off penalty,
winning of returning to You,
and covering with screen [against sinning].

segments.arabic: وَٱمْحُ ٱللَّهُمَّ مَا ثَبَتَ مِنْ ذُنُوبِي

translation.en: O Allah, erase my fixed sins,
wash out all my defects by accepting my repentance,
and make my repentance to polish my heart,
to diagnose the insight of my mind,
to rinse my filth,
to purify my bodily impurity,
to set aright my inner self,
and to urge my insight to act upon it [i.e. my repentance] immediately.
O my Lord, admit my repentance,
because it emanates from my sincere intention
and from the most accurate and purest form of my perception.
It [i.e. my repentance] also involves perfect determination of my inner self,
an attempt to keep my soul pure,
my firmness to turn to You in repentance,
and my decision to run for obeying Your orders.

segments.arabic: وَٱجْلُ ٱللَّهُمَّ بِٱلتَّوْبَةِ عَنِّي ظُلْمَةَ ٱلإِصْرَارِ

translation.en: O Allah, by means of my repentance, (please) drive away the darkness of insistence on sinning from me,

segments.arabic: وَٱمْحُ بِهَا مَا قَدَّمْتُهُ مِنَ ٱلاوْزَارِ

translation.en: erase my burdensome sins that I have committed,
and dress me the clothing of piety
and the garments of true guidance,

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ خَلَعْتُ رِبْقَ ٱلْمَعَاصِي عَنْ جَلَدِي

translation.en: for I am determined to remove the rein of acts of disobedience to You from my neck
and to strip the shirt of sinning of my body,
holding fast to Your omnipotence, O my Lord,
seeking Your help against myself by Your almightiness,
entrusting with You my repentance from breaching my covenant with You by Your protection of me,
taking refuge in Your haven against that You may disappoint me,

segments.arabic: مُقَارِناً بِهِ لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِكَ
segments.transliteration: muqarinan bihi lahawla wa laquwwata illabika

translation.en: believing that there is neither might nor power except with You.
O Allah, (please) grant me success to go on Hajj pilgrimage,

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي ٱفْتَرَضْتَهُ عَلَىٰ مَنِ ٱسْتَطَاعَ إِلَيْهِ سَبِيلاًَ

translation.en: which You have imposed upon whoever is capable of going on it,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ لِي فِيهِ هَادِياً وَإِلَيْهِ دَلِيلاًَ
segments.transliteration: waj`al li fihi hadiyan wa ilayhi dalilan

translation.en: appoint for me in it a guide and a director to it,
make accessible for me the remote paths,
help me carry out its rituals,
prevent fire from consuming my b0dy due to my entering into the state of ritual consecration,

segments.transliteration: wa zid lilssafari quwwati wa jaladi

translation.en: and increase my power and my endurance on my hajj journey.
O my Lord, grant me the opportunity to present myself in Your Presence
and to hasten my steps to You
and grant me success in obtaining abundant gain.

segments.arabic: وَاصْدِرْنِي رَبِّ مِنْ مَوْقِفِ ٱلْحَجِّ ٱلاكْبَرِ
segments.transliteration: wa asdirni rabbi min mawqifi alhajji al-akbari

translation.en: My Lord, grant me opportunity to attach the situation of the grand hajj
to Muzdalifah, the holy monument,
deciding it to be a nearer step towards Your mercy
and a path towards Your Paradise.
Help me to stop at the situation of the Holy Monument
and the situation of the ritual consecration.
Prepare me to carry out the rituals,
to immolate the offertory camels,
causing their blood to gush forth and their throats to be cut off,
and make me shed the poured out blood (of these animals),
offer the slaughtered offertory animals,
cut off their throats as exactly as You have instructed,
and submit them as presents as exactly as You have prescribed.
O Allah, make me present myself at the Feast Prayer,
hoping for what You have promised to give,
fearful of what You have threatened Your punishment,
shaving or cutting short the hair of my head,
exerting all efforts to obey You painstakingly,
and throwing at the statues
seven pebbles after seven.
O Allah, make me to enter the court and the yard of Your house,
the place of Your security, Your Ka`bah,

segments.transliteration: wa masakinaka wa su'alika wa mahawijika

translation.en: and to give to the poor, the beggars, and the needy who ask from You.
O Allah, endue me generously with abundant reward
after my return and in my journey back.
O Allah, seal my performance of the rituals of hajj
and the termination of my cries with the statements of response to You
with acceptance from You
and with clemency that You show me.
O most merciful of all those who show mercy!

text.en: Removing Persecution - Kashf Zulm

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ ظُلْمَ عِبَادِكَ قَدْ تَمَكَّنَ فِي بِلاَدِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna zulma `ibadika qad tamakkana fi biladika

translation.en: O Allah, the persecutions against Your servant have become so prevalent in Your lands
that it has put an end to justice,
interrupted all ways,
eradicated the right,
thwarted truthfulness,
enshrouded charity,
demonstrated evil,
extinguished piety,
removed true guidance,
dislodged decency,
planted harm,
promoted corruption,
strengthened obstinacy,
spread out prejudice,
and exceeded all bounds.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ يَا رَبِّ لاَ يَكْشِفُ ذٰلِكَ إِلاَّ سُلْطَانُكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ya rabbi layakshifu dhalika illasultanuka

translation.en: O Allah! O my Lord, nothing can eliminate all that except Your authority
and nothing can deliver from it except Your obliging favors.
O Allah! O my Lord, (please) mutilate persecution,
demolish the mountains of oppression,
stagnate the business of evil,
grant victory to those who deter from it,
harvest the roots of the people of prejudice,
and attire them with shrinkage after escalation.
O Allah, afflict them with inaction immediately,
send down on them exemplary punishments,
and put to death the life of wickedness
so that the terrorized will be secured,
the terrified will calm down,
the hungry will become full,
the lost will be guarded,
the fugitive will find a place of settlement,
the escapee will return home,
the poor will be satisfied,
the refugee will be sheltered,
the old will be respected,
the infants will be shown mercy,
the wronged will be treated fairly,
the wrongdoers will be humiliated,
the distressed will be relieved,
the agonies will be driven away,
the populace will find rest,
discrepancy will be wiped out,
knowledge will be exalted,
peace will be prevalent,
dispersion will be amassed,
faith will be strengthened,
and the Qur'an will be practically recited.
Verily, You are the Master, the Munificent, and the Favorer.
O Allah, all praise be to You
for driving away the imminent misfortunes
and the wrapping harms,
for relieving from the calamitous hardships,
and for the succession of the profuse blessings.
All praise be to You for Your pleasant bestowals,
praiseworthy conferrals,
and great boons.
All praise be to You for Your very much benevolence,
torrential welfare,
and easy-to-do obligations
and for Your driving away the difficulties.
All praise be to You, O Lord,
for multiplying the little thanksgiving,
enduing with abundant rewards,
excusing the heavy burdens,
accepting the improper apologies,
lessening the exorbitant loads,
making easy the difficult situations,
and dispelling the horrible matters.
All praise be to You for Your dispelling the misfortunes,
Your granting abundant charity,
Your driving away the terrifying matters,
and Your facilitating the oppressive issues.
All praise be to You for the little mandates,
the much alleviation,
the strengthening of the feeble,
and the assisting of the distressed.
All praise be to You for Your long-term respite,
Your incessant favoring,
Your chasing off fruitlessness,
Your praiseworthy deeds,
and Your continuous donations.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَلَىٰ تَاخِيرِ مُعَاجَلَةِ ٱلْعِقَابِ

translation.en: All praise be to You for putting off the looming punishment,
shunning sudden chastisement,
paving the way back to You,
and sending down the rain of the clouds.
Verily, You are the All-tender, the All-donor.

segments.arabic: جَدِيرٌ مَنْ امَرْتَهُ بِٱلدُّعَاءِ انْ يَدْعُوَكَ
segments.transliteration: jadirun man amartahu bilddu`a'i an yad`waka

translation.en: He whom You have ordered to pray You is worthily required to pray You

segments.transliteration: wa man wa`adtahu bil-ijabati an yarjwaka

translation.en: and he whom You have promised to respond to his prayers is worthily required to hope for Your response.
O Allah, I have a request [that I need You to grant]
that I am too short to fulfill,
too powerless to do,
and too weak to attain.

segments.transliteration: wa sawwalat li nafsiya al-ammaratu bilssu'i

translation.en: My soul that is prone to evil

segments.arabic: وَعَدُوِّي ٱلْغَرُورُ ٱلَّذِي انَا مِنْهُ مَبْلُوٌّ

translation.en: and my deceiving archenemy from whom I am suffering
have beguiled me into shunning wishing for Your help in this request.
O Allah, so (please) grant my request the most blissful success,
direct it towards the path of prosperity,
expand my breast with hopeful petition for Your relief,

segments.transliteration: wa yassir fi asbabi alkhayri amri

translation.en: facilitate my affairs through the ways of welfare,

segments.arabic: وَصَوِّرْ إِلَيَّ ٱلْفَوْزَ بِبُلُوغِ مَا رَجَوْتُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa sawwir ilayya alfawza bibulughi marajawtuhu

translation.en: and establish for me triumph through making me attain what I have hoped for
and gain what I have wished for.

segments.transliteration: wa waffiqni allahumma fi qada'i hajati

translation.en: O Allah, (please) grant me access to the fulfillment of my requests
through attainment of my wish
and achievement of my desire.

segments.arabic: وَاعِذْنِي ٱللَّهُمَّ بِكَرَمِكَ مِنَ ٱلْخَيْبَةِ وَٱلْقُنُوطِ
segments.transliteration: wa a`idhni allahumma bikaramika min alkhaybati walqunuti

translation.en: O Allah, in the name of Your Nobility, (please) protect me against disappointment, despair,
despondency, and frustration.
O Allah, You are full of plentiful gifts,
You are true to Your words,
You have power over all things,
and You know and regard all of Your servants.

name: Imam Husayn(as) Dua taught to his son

text.en: Imam Al-Husayn(as) Dua taught to his son

On the 10th day of Muharram, known as the day of ‘Aashura, in the year 61 A.H. when Imam Abu ‘Abdillahil Hussein (as) came into the tent to bid farewell to his family members, he held the hand of his sick son, Ali ibn al-Hussein (as) and pressed it against his chest. He (as) then said,

“O son! I am teaching you a dua’ which you should remember. Angel Jibrael taught it to my grandfather the messenger of Allah who passed it to my mother Fatima. Whenever you have a special need or are faced with any calamity or crises, or are inflicted with any grief or hardship, then recite the following supplication”.

segments.arabic: بِحَقِّ يس وَ الْقُرْآنِ الْحَكِيمِ وَ بِحَقِّ طه وَ الْقُرْآنِ الْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: BIHAQQI YASEEN WAL QUR-AANIL ‘HAKEEM WA BIHAQQI TAA-HAA WAL QUR-AANIL ‘ADHEEM

translation.en: By the truth of Yaseen (a title of the Holy Prophet) and the Quran full of wisdom and for the sake of Taa-haa (another title of the Holy Prophet) and the great Quran.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَقْدِرُ عَلَى حَوَائِجِ السَّائِلِينَ

translation.en: O He Who is able to fulfill the desires of those ask.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَعْلَمُ مَا فِي الضَّمِيرِ

translation.en: O He Who knows what is in the heart.
O He Who banishes sorrow from the sorrowful.
O He Who dispels grief from those who grieve.

segments.arabic: يَا رَاحِمَ الشَّيْخِ الْكَبِيرِ يَا رَازِقَ الطِّفْلِ الصَّغِيرِ
segments.transliteration: YAA RAA-‘HIMA SHAYKHIL KABEER YAA RAAZIQAT TIFLIS-SAGHEER

translation.en: O He Who is merciful to old men. O He Who provides for infants.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى التَّفْسِيرِ

translation.en: O He Who needs not to be explained.

segments.arabic: صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ افْعَلْ بِي...
segments.transliteration: SALLI ‘ALAA MUHAMMADIN WA AALI MUHAMMADIN WAF-‘AL BEE …….(mention your wishes)

translation.en: Send blessings upon Muhammad and his progeny and fulfill for me[mention your wishes]

text.en: Ask your Hajaats after reading this Dua'. Insha'Allah your Duas' will be accepted May Allah swt fulfill all your legitimate wishes with the Wasila of this Dua'
Dua Marefat Imam Mahdi (ajtfs)
Method of Waiting & Praying for Imam Al Qaim (ajtfs)

Through a valid chain of authority, it has been narrated that Shaykh Abu-`Amr, the first Emissary (safir) of Imam al-Mahdi (`a) dictated the following supplicatory prayer to Abu-Muhammad ibn Hammam and ordered him to say it [frequently]. This supplication has been also recorded by Sayyid Ibn Tawus in his book of Jamal al-Usbu` following a number of other supplications to be said after the `Asr Prayers on Fridays.

translation.en: O Allah, make me recognize You,
because if You do not make me recognize You,
I will not recognize Your Messenger.
O Allah, make me recognize Your Messenger,
because if You do not make me recognize Your Messenger,
I will not recognize Your Argument.
O Allah, make me recognize Your Argument,
because if You do not make me recognize Your Argument,
I will stray off the path to my religion.
O Allah, do not make me die like the death of those who have not recognized Islam

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُزِغْ قَلْبِي بَعْدَ إذْ هَدَيْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: wa la tuzigh qalbi ba`da idh hadaytani

translation.en: and do not cause my heart to stray off after You have guided me.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَكَمَا هَدَيْتَنِي لِوِلاَيَةِ مَنْ فَرَضْتَ عَلَيَّ طَاعَتَهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fakama hadaytani liwilayati man faradta `alayya ta`atahu

translation.en: O Allah, just as You have guided me to the loyalty of those the obedience to whom You have made incumbent upon me,

segments.arabic: مِنْ وِلاَيَةِ وُلاَةِ امْرِكَ بَعْدَ رَسُولِكَ
segments.transliteration: min wilayati wulati amrika ba`da rasulika

translation.en: that is the loyalty to Your representatives after Your Messenger,
Your peace be upon him and his Household,
and thus I am loyal to Your representatives;

segments.transliteration: amira almu'minina wa alhasana wa alhusayna

translation.en: [namely,] the Commander of the Faithful, al-Hasan, al-Husayn,
`Ali, Muhammad, Ja`far,
Musa, `Ali, Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa `aliyyan wa alhasana wa alhujjata alqa'ima almahdiyya

translation.en: `Ali, al-Hasan, and the Argument—the Assumer and well-guided,
Your peace be upon them all,
so also, O Allah, make me steadfast on Your religion,
use me in the obedience to You,
make my heart lenient towards Your representative,
release me from that which You have used as tests for Your creatures,
and make me steadfast on the obedience to Your representative,
whom You have hidden from Your creatures
and he has thus disappeared from [the sights of] Your creatures by Your permission,
waiting for Your command [to reappear],
and You are the most Knowledgeable and none can instruct You

segments.arabic: بِٱلْوَقْتِ الَّذِي فِيهِ صَلاَحُ امْرِ وَلِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: bilwaqti alladhi fihi salahu amri waliyyika

translation.en: of the best time for Your representative to reappear,

segments.transliteration: fi al-idhni lahu bi izhari amrihi

translation.en: and when exactly You allow him to declare his affair
and to disclose his secret.
So, grant me patience to endure that

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ لاَ احِبَّ تَعْجِيلَ مَا اخَّرْتَ
segments.transliteration: hatta la uhibba ta`jila ma akhkharta

translation.en: so that I will not long for hastening that which You have delayed
or delaying that which You would hasten,
I will not disclose that which You have concealed,
I will not investigate that which You have covered,
I will not dispute with You about Your management,

segments.transliteration: wa la aqula lima wa kayfa

translation.en: and I will not ask, ‘why’, ‘how’

segments.arabic: وَمَا بَالُ وَلِيِّ ٱلامْرِ لاَ يَظْهَرُ
segments.transliteration: wa ma balu waliyyi al-amri la yazharu

translation.en: and ‘what for the Representative is not coming,

segments.transliteration: wa qad imtala'at al-ardu mina aljawri

translation.en: after the earth has been filled with injustice.
Instead, I will refer all my affairs to You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إنِّي اسْالُكَ انْ تُرِيَنِي وَلِيَّ ٱلامْرِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka an turiyani waliyya al-amri

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You to allow me to see the Representative,
apparent and prevalent,

segments.arabic: مَعَ عِلْمِي بِانَّ لَكَ ٱلسُّلْطَانَ وَٱلْقُدْرَةَ
segments.transliteration: ma`a `ilmi bi-anna laka alssultana wa alqudrata

translation.en: although I know for sure that all authority, power,
potency, argument,

segments.transliteration: wa almashi'ata wa lhawla wa alquwwata

translation.en: volition, might, and strength are Yours [alone].

segments.transliteration: faf`al dhalika bi wa bijami`i almu'minina

translation.en: So, do this to me and to all the believers

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ نَنْظُرَ إلَىٰ وَلِيِّكَ صَلَوَاتُكَ عَلَيْهِ

translation.en: so that we will be able to witness Your representative, Your peace be upon him,
while he is evident in claim,
