manifest in proof,
guiding from deviation,
and healing from ignorance.
O my Lord, make the looking at him eminent,
make firm his bases,
make us of those whose eyes are delighted by seeing him,
employ us to serve him,
make us die following his creed,
and include us with his group.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ اعِذْهُ مِنْ شَرِّ جَمِيعِ مَا خَلَقْتَ وَذَرَاْتَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma a`idhhu min sharri jami`i ma khalaqta wa dhara'ta

translation.en: O Allah, protect him against the evil of all that which You have created, made,

segments.transliteration: wa bara'ta wa ansha'ta wa sawwarta

translation.en: originated, fashioned, and formed.

segments.arabic: وَٱحْفَظْهُ مِنْ بَيْنِ يَدَيْهِ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ihfazhu min bayni yadayhi wa min khalfihi

translation.en: Safeguard him from his front and back,
his right and left sides,

segments.transliteration: wa min fawqihi wa min tahtihi

translation.en: and above and beneath him

segments.arabic: بِحِفْظِكَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَضِيعُ مَنْ حَفِظْتَهُ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: bihifzika alladhi la yadi`u man hafiztahu bihi

translation.en: with Your safeguarding that will never fail to save whomever is safeguarded with it,

segments.transliteration: wahfaz fihi rasulaka wa wasiyya rasulika

translation.en: and safeguard Your Messenger and Your Messenger’s Successor through safeguarding him,
peace be upon them.
O Allah, extend his lifetime,
increase the period of his life,

segments.transliteration: wa a`inhu `ala ma wallaytahu wa istar`aytahu

translation.en: help him undertake that which You have entrusted with him and put under his supervision,
and increase Your honor to him.
Verily, he is the guide, the well-guided,
the assumer (of the mission entrusted with him), the rightly guided,
the immaculate, the pious,
the pure, the refined,
the pleased, the satisfied,
the serene, the thankful, and the hard-working.
O Allah, do not deprive us of our strong faith
because of his long-lasting occultation
and disconnection between him and us.
Do not make us forget to mention him [constantly],
to expect him, to believe in him,
to enjoy strong faith in his advent,
to pray You for him, and to invoke Your blessings on him

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ لاَ يُقَنِّطَنَا طُولُ غَيْبَتِهِ مِنْ قِيَامِهِ
segments.transliteration: hatta la yuqannitana tulu ghaybatihi min qiyamihi

translation.en: so that his long-lasting occultation will never make us despair of his advent
and our faith in this will be
just like our faith in the advent of Your Messenger,
Your peace be upon him and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَمَا جَاءَ بِهِ مِنْ وَحْيِكَ وَتَنْزِيلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ma ja'a bihi min wahyika wa tanzilika

translation.en: and [just like our faith in] all that which has been conveyed by him to us through Your Revelation and Divine communication.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَقَوِّ قُلُوبَنَا عَلَىٰ ٱلإيـمَانِ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa qawwi qulubana `ala al-imani bihi

translation.en: O Allah, make our hearts believe in him unshakably

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ تَسْلُكَ بِنَا عَلَىٰ يَدِهِ مِنْهَاجَ ٱلْهُدَىٰ
segments.transliteration: hatta tasluka bina `ala yadihi minhaja alhuda

translation.en: so that You will lead us, at his hands, to the path of true guidance,
the greatest destination,
and the moderate way.
Grant us strength to obey him,
make us firm in supporting him,

segments.transliteration: wa ij`alna fi hizbihi wa a`wanihi

translation.en: and include us with his party, backers,
allies, and those satisfied with his deed.

segments.transliteration: wa la taslubna dhalika fi hayatina

translation.en: Do not deprive us of so during our lifetimes
nor at the hour of our death,
but (please) make us die while we carry this faith,
without doubt, breach of our covenant to him,

segments.transliteration: wa la murtabina wa la mukadhdhibina

translation.en: suspect, or belying him.
O Allah, hasten his Relief,
aid him with victory,
grant his supporters victory,
disappoint those who disappoint him,

segments.arabic: وَدَمْدِمْ عَلَىٰ مَنْ نَصَبَ لَهُ وَكَذَّبَ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa damdim `ala man nasaba lahu wa kadhdhaba bihi

translation.en: doom those who conspire against him and those who contradict him,
make manifest the truth through him,
obliterate injustice through him,

segments.arabic: وَٱسْتَنْقِذْ بِهِ عِبَادَكَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ مِنَ ٱلذُّلِّ
segments.transliteration: wa istanqidh bihi `ibadaka almu'minina mina aldhdhulli

translation.en: save Your faithful servants from humiliation through him,
refresh the lands through him,
kill the tyrannical chiefs of disbelief through him,
crush the heads of deviation through him,
debase the tyrants and disbelievers through him,
eradicate the hypocrites, the breachers,
and all the dissidents and the atheists
in the east and west of this earth,
on lands, in oceans,
in plains, and in mountains
so that You will not leave of them a single one on earth
and You will keep not even a single trace of them.
Clean Your lands from them,
heal the breasts of Your servants from them,

segments.arabic: وَجَدِّدْ بِهِ مَا ٱمْتَحَىٰ مِنْ دِينِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa jaddid bihi ma imtaha min dinika

translation.en: revive the signs of Your religion that were obliterated,

segments.arabic: وَاصْلِحْ بِهِ مَا بُدِّلَ مِنْ حُكْمِكَ وَغُيِّرَ مِنْ سُنَّتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa aslih bihi ma buddila min hukmika wa ghuyyira min sunnatika

translation.en: and rectify Your laws that were altered and Your instructions that were changed,

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ يَعُودَ دِينُكَ بِهِ وَعَلَىٰ يَدَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: hatta ya`uda dinuka bihi wa`ala yadayhi

translation.en: so that Your religion will be restored, through him and at his hands,
fresh, new, and sound

segments.arabic: لاَ عِوَجَ فِيهِ وَلاَ بِدْعَةَ مَعَهُ
segments.transliteration: la `iwaja fihi wa la bid`ata ma`ahu

translation.en: without any crookedness and without any heresy
so that You will extinguish the fires of the disbelievers through his justice.
He is verily Your servant on whom You have decided for Yourself,
accepted to support Your religion,
chosen on the basis of Your [eternal] knowledge,
preserved against sins,
freed from defects,
apprised of the unseen,
bestowed with Your grace,
purified from filth,
and refined from impurity.
So, O Allah, confer blessings upon him
and upon his forefathers the immaculate Imams
and upon his elite partisans,

segments.transliteration: wa ballighhum min amalihim ma ya'maluna

translation.en: make them attain the utmost of their hopes,
and accept this from us to be free
from any doubt, sedition,
ostentation, or showing off,
so that we will not seek through it anyone save You

segments.transliteration: wa la natluba bihi illa wajhaka

translation.en: and we will not aim for anything save Your Face.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إنَّا نَشْكُو إلَيْكَ فَقْدَ نَبِيِّنَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna nashku ilayka faqda nabiyyina

translation.en: O Allah, we complain to You about missing our Prophet,
occultation of our Master,
unbearable vicissitudes of days against us,
befalling of seditious matters,
alliance of our enemies [against us],
the big numbers of our enemies,
and the fewness of us.
O Allah, relieve us from all that
by means of a triumph that You may hasten,
a victory that You may fortify,
and a just leader that You allow to appear.
O God of the Truth, respond to us.
O Allah, we earnestly beseech You

segments.arabic: انْ تَاْذَنَ لِوَلِيِّكَ فِي إِظْهَارِ عَدْلِكَ فِي بِلاَدِكَ
segments.transliteration: an ta'dhana liwaliyyika fi izhari `adlika fi biladika

translation.en: to allow Your Representative to spread Your justice in Your lands
and to kill Your enemies in Your lands,

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ لاَ تَدَعَ لِلْجَوْرِ يَا رَبِّ دَعَامَةً إِلاَّ قَصَمْتَهَا
segments.transliteration: hatta la tada`a liljawri ya rabbi da`amatan illa qasamtaha

translation.en: so that You, O my Lord, will not leave any support [of injustice] but that You demolish it,
any remnant but that You terminate it,
any power but that You enfeeble it,
any probe but that You destroy it,
any sharp sword but that You notch it,
any weapon but that You deactivate it,
any pennon but that You turn it over,
any dominant one but that You kill him,
and any army but that You defeat it.
Throw them, O my Lord, with Your stamping stone,
strike them with Your cutting sword

segments.arabic: وَبَاْسِكَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ تَرُدُّهُ عَنِ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa ba'sika alladhi la tarudduhu `an alqawmi almujrimina

translation.en: and Your power that You do not ward off from the offensive people,
and torture Your enemies

segments.transliteration: wa a`da'a waliyyika wa a`da'a rasulika

translation.en: and the enemies of Your representative and the enemies of Your Messenger,
Your blessings be upon him and upon his Household,
at the hand of Your representative and the hands of Your faithful servants.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِكْفِ وَلِيَّكَ وَحُجَّتَكَ فِي ارْضِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ikfi waliyyaka wa hujjataka fi ardika

translation.en: O Allah, suffice Your representative and argument on Your lands
against the terror of his enemy,
deter the conspiracies of those who plot against him,
ward off those who plan against him,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ دَائِرَةَ السَّوْءِ عَلَىٰ مَنْ ارَادِ بِهِ سُوءاً
segments.transliteration: waj`al da'irata alssaw'i `ala man aradi bihi su'an

translation.en: make the disaster of evil to be upon those who intend ill to him,
stop their schemes against him,
make their hearts panic about him,
make their feet convulse,
grasp them gradually and suddenly,
intensify Your torment on them,
disgrace them among Your servants,
curse them in Your lands,
lodge them in the lowest class of Your fire,
encompass them with the most intense of Your punishment,
expose them to fire,
stuff the graves of their dead ones with fire,
and expose them to the heat of Your fire,
for they have ruined the prayers,
followed their lusts,
and misled Your servants.
Therefore, O Allah, revive the Qur'an through Your representative,

segments.arabic: وَارِنَا نُورَهُ سَرْمَداً لاَ لَيْلَ فِيهِ
segments.transliteration: wa arina nurahu sarmadan la layla fihi

translation.en: make us see his light to be never-ending without any night,
revive the dead hearts through him,
heal the furious breasts through him,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْمَعْ بِهِ ٱلاهْوَاءَ ٱلْمُخْتَلِفَةَ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَقِّ

translation.en: combine the divergent inclinations to the right through him,
and re-establish the broken-down provisions
and the neglected laws through him

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ لاَ يَبْقَىٰ حَقٌّ إِلاَّ ظَهَرَ
segments.transliteration: hatta la yabqa haqqun illa zahara

translation.en: so that no item of truth will be undisclosed
and no item of justice unthriven.
And make us, O my Lord, of his supporters,
of the strengtheners of his authority,
of those carrying out his orders,
of those satisfied with his deeds,
of those submissive to his judgments,

segments.arabic: وَمِمَّنْ لاَ حَاجَةَ بِهِ إلَىٰ ٱلتَّقِيَّةِ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa mimman la hajata bihi ila alttaqiyyati min khalqika

translation.en: and of those who do not need to practice dissimulation before Your creatures any more.

segments.arabic: انْتَ يَا رَبِّ ٱلَّذِي تَكْشِفُ ٱلضُّرَّ
segments.transliteration: anta ya rabbi alladhi takshifu alddurra

translation.en: It is You, O my Lord, Who relieve from harms,
respond to the depressed when they supplicate to You,
and save from grave agonies.
So, remove harm from Your representative

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْهُ خَلِيفَةً فِي ارْضِكَ كَمَا ضَمِنْتَ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: waj`alhu khalifatan fi ardika kama daminta lahu

translation.en: and make him a vicegerent on the earth as You have promised him to do.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَلاَ تَجْعَلْنِي مِنْ خُصَمَاءِ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa la taj`alni min khusama'i ali muhammadin `alayhimu alssalamu

translation.en: O Allah, do not include me with the rivals of Muhammad’s Household, peace be upon them,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَجْعَلْنِي مِنْ اعْدَاءِ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: wa la taj`alni min a`da'i ali muhammadin `alayhimu alssalamu

translation.en: do not include me with the enemies of Muhammad’s Household, peace be upon them,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَجْعَلْنِي مِنْ اهْلِ ٱلْحَنَقِ وَٱلْغَيْظِ عَلَىٰ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: wa la taj`alni min ahli alhanaqi walghayzi `ala ali muhammadin `alayhimu alssalamu

translation.en: and do not include me with those who bear spite and malice against Muhammad’s Household, peace be upon them.

segments.arabic: فَإنِّي اعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ ذٰلِكَ فَاعِذْنِي
segments.transliteration: fa'nni a`udhu bika min dhalika fa-a`idhni

translation.en: I do seek Your protection against making me so; therefore, protect me against it,
and I take refuge in You against so; therefore, save me against it.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
make me of the winners with You through them
in this worldly life and in the Hereafter,
and make me of those brought near to You.
Respond, O Lord of the worlds.

text.en: Short Version
Zurarah a companion of Imam Sadiq (as) asked “What is the best action during occultation?” Imam (as) replied Always recite the following supplication.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ عَرِّفْنِىْ نَفْسَك َ -   فَاِنَّكَ اِنْ لَّمْ تُعَرِّ فْنِىْ نَفْسَكَ لَمْ اَعْرِفْ رَسُوْلَكَ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma a'arifni nafsak. Fa innaka in lam to arrifni nafsaka lam a'rif nabiyeka.

translation.en: O Allah introduce Your self to me - For, if you do not introduce Your self to me, I will not recognize Your Prophet (saws).

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ عَرِّفْنِىْ رَسُوْلَكَ  -  فَاِنَّكَ اِنْ لَمْ تُعَرِّ فْنِىْ رَسُوْلَكَ لَمْ اَعْرِفْ حُجَّتَكَ
segments.transliteration: Allhumma a'rifni rasoolaka fa innaka in lam to a'rifni rasoolaka, lam a'rif hujjatak.

translation.en: O Allah make me recognize Your Prophet (saws) ,- because if I do not recognize Your Prophet (saws), I will not recognize Your Proof [Imam (as)].

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ عَرِّفْنِىْ حُجَّتَكَ  -  فَاِنَّكَ اِنْ لَّمْ تُعَرِّ فْنِىْ حُجَّتَكَ ضَلَلْتُ عَنْ دِيْنِىْ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma a'rrifni hujjatak fa innaka in lam to a'rifni hujjatak, zalal to an deeni.

translation.en: O Allah make me recognize Your Proof (Imam) - For, if  you do not make me recognize Your Proof , I will deviate from my religion

text.en: Dua Allumma Idfaa an waliyak
recited after Ziarat of Imam Mahdi(ajtfs)for repelling calamities from Imam
Supplication which was ordered by the eighth Imam Ali Ridha (peace be on him) to be recited during the days of occultation

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) defend Your vicegerent,
representative, decisive argument against Your creatures,
and mouthpiece who speaks on behalf of You
and speaks with Your wisdom,
Your eye that sees with Your permission,
Your witness on Your servants,
the magnanimous master, the striver (for the sake of Allah),
the seeker of Your shelter, and the full worshipper in Your measures.

segments.arabic: وَأَعِذْهُ مِنْ شَرِّ جَمِيعِ مَا خَلَقْتَ وَبَرَأْتَ
segments.transliteration: wa a`idhhu min sharri jami`i ma khalaqta wa bara'ta

translation.en: Keep him safe from the evils of all that which You created, originated,
established, and formed.

segments.arabic: وَٱحْفَظْهُ مِنْ بَيْنِ يَدَيْهِ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِ
segments.transliteration: wahfazhu min bayni yadayhi wa min khalfihi

translation.en: And protect him from the sides of his front, his back,
his right, his left,

segments.transliteration: wa min fawqihi wa min tahtihi

translation.en: above him, and beneath him,

segments.arabic: بِحِفْظِكَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَضِيعُ مَنْ حَفِظْتَهُ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: bihifzika alladhi la yadi`u man hafiztahu bihi

translation.en: with Your safety that preserves from any loss.
And safeguard through him Your Messenger and his fathers;
the Imams appointed by You and the pillars of Your religion.

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْهُ فِي وَدِيعَتِكَ ٱلَّتِي لاَ تَضِيعُ
segments.transliteration: waj`alhu fi wadi`atika allati la tadi`u

translation.en: And place him in Your deposit that is never lost,

segments.transliteration: wa fi jiwarika alladhi la yukhfaru

translation.en: in Your vicinity that is never violated,

segments.arabic: وَفِي مَنْعِكَ وَعِزِّكَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يُقْهَرُ
segments.transliteration: wa fi man`ika wa `izzika alladhi la yuqharu

translation.en: and in Your protection and almightiness that are never defeated.
And secure him by Your well-firmed security

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي لاَ يُخْذَلُ مَنْ آمَنْتَهُ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: alladhi la yukhdhalu man amantahu bihi

translation.en: that does not forsake whoever takes asylum in it.
And make him under Your protection

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي لاَ يُرَامُ مَنْ كَانَ فِيهِ
segments.transliteration: alladhi la yuramu man kana fihi

translation.en: that saves whoever is put under it from any harm.
Grant him Your insuperable victory,
aid him with Your overcoming troops,
strengthen him with Your strength,
put Your angels at his disposal,
support whoever supports him,
be the enemy of whoever opposes him,
dress him Your fortified armor,
and make the angels surround him totally.
O Allah, through him patch up the differences of opinion,
bring into order confusion,
eradicate oppression,
manifest justice,
adorn the earth by a lengthy life for him,
support him with victory,
grant him triumph by means of horror,
reinforce his supporters,
thwart his disappointers,
crush those who lay traps for him,
destroy those who cheat him,

segments.arabic: وَٱقْتُلْ بِهِ جَبَابِرَةَ ٱلْكُفْرِ وَعُمُدَهُ وَدَعَائِمَهُ
segments.transliteration: waqtul bihi jababirata al-kufr wa `umudahu wa da`a'imahu

translation.en: kill the tyrants, pillars, and supports of infidelity at his hands,

segments.arabic: وَٱقْصِمْ بِهِ رُؤُوسَ ٱلضَّلاَلَةِ وَشَارِعَةَ ٱلْبِدَعِ
segments.transliteration: waqsim bihi ru'usa alddalalati wa shari`ata albida`i

translation.en: uproot the heads of deviation, the innovators of heresies,

segments.transliteration: wa mumitata alssunnati wa muqawwiyata albatili

translation.en: the eradicators of the Prophetic traditions, and the backers of wrong,
humiliate the haughty tyrants,

segments.transliteration: wa abir bihi alkafirina wa jami`a almulhidina

translation.en: terminate the infidels and all atheists
wherever they are—in the east or the west of the earth
or in lands or oceans,
or in plains or on mountains,
until You will not leave a single one of them
and You will not leave a single trace of them.
O Allah, clear up Your lands from them,
heal your servants’ hearts from them,
consolidate the faithful believers through him,
revive the norms of the Messengers
and the obliterated rules of the Prophets,

segments.arabic: وَجَدِّدْ بِهِ مَا ٱمْتَحَىٰ مِنْ دِينِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa jaddid bihi ma imtaha min dinika

translation.en: and renew the signs of Your religion that were erased
and Your judgments that were distorted;

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ تُعِيدَ دِينَكَ بِهِ وَعَلَىٰ يَدَيْهِ جَدِيداً
segments.transliteration: hatta tu`ida dinaka bihi wa `ala yadayhi jadidan

translation.en: until you rekindle Your religion through him and at his hands
as well-defined, pure, and sound as it is;

segments.arabic: لاَ عِوَجَ فِيهِ وَلاَ بِدْعَةَ مَعَهُ
segments.transliteration: la `iwaja fihi wa la bid`ata ma`ahu

translation.en: free from loopholes and heresies,

segments.transliteration: wa hatta tunira bi`adlihi zulama aljawri

translation.en: and until You illumine the murk of unfairness by means of his justice,
extinguish the fires of atheism though him,
and elucidate the positions of truth
and the justice that will have been unknown.
He is verily Your servant whom You have saved for Yourself,
chosen for keeping the unseen matters of You,
protected against sins,
cleaned from any defect,
purified from filth,
and kept sound against dirt.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَإِنَّا نَشْهَدُ لَهُ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fa'inna nashhadu lahu yawma alqiyamati

translation.en: O Allah, we will verily testify to him on the Day of Resurrection
and on the day when the overwhelming event comes
that he did not commit any single sin,
nor did he practice any unlawful thing,
nor did he do any act of disobedience (to You),
nor did he miss any act of obedience (to You),
nor did he violate any inviolable thing,
nor did he distort any precept,
nor did he change any law.
And, moreover, he is verily the guiding, the rightly guided,
the pure, the pious,
the immaculate, the approved, and the bright.
O Allah, give him what he wishes regarding his own self
his family, his sons,
his offspring, his nation,
and all of his subjects
in such a way that makes him delighted
and pleased in himself,

segments.transliteration: wa tajma`u lahu mulka almamlakati kulliha

translation.en: and makes You put under his sphere of influence all kingdoms;
the near and the remote,
and the powerful and the weak

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ تُجْرِيَ حُكْمَهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ حُكْمٍ

translation.en: so that You will cause his rule to prevail over every rule
and his right (issue) to overcome the entire wrongness.
O Allah, lead us at his hands
to the course of guidance,
the greatest Path,
and the equitable way of life
to which those who had gone too far will come back (repentant)
and those who had fallen down will catch up.
And (please) encourage us to carry out acts of obedience to him,
make us stand firmly in following him,
endue us with the favor of adherence to him,
and include us with his group who achieve his commands,
act steadfastly towards him,
and seek Your pleasure by means of acting sincerely to him,

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ تَحْشُرَنَا يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ فِي أَنْصَارِهِ
segments.transliteration: hatta tahshurana yawma alqiyamati fi ansarihi

translation.en: so that You will gather us on the Resurrection Day with his supporters,
backers, and those who consolidate his authority.
O Allah, make us do all these things

segments.transliteration: khalisan min kulli shakkin wa shubhatin

translation.en: free from any doubt, confusion,
ostentation, and seeking of reputation
so that we will rely upon none save You

segments.transliteration: wa la natluba bihi illa wajhaka

translation.en: and seek none save Your sake
and that You will put us up in his vicinity
and place us with him in Paradise.

segments.transliteration: wa a`idhna min alssa'mati walkasali walfatrati

translation.en: And (please) protect us against weariness, laziness and lethargy
and include us with those whom You take up for backing Your religion
and for increasing the victory of Your vicegerent.
Do not put others in our places,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ ٱسْتِبْدَالَكَ بِنَا غَيْرَنَا عَلَيْكَ يَسِيرٌ

translation.en: because it is easy for You to put others in our places,
but it is extremely difficult for us if You do it.
O Allah, send blessings upon his representatives
and the leaders after him,
make them attain their wishes,
increase their lifetimes,
support their victory,

segments.arabic: وَتَمِّمْ لَهُمْ مَا أَسْنَدْتَ إِلَيْهِمْ مِنْ أَمْرِكَ لَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa tammim lahum ma asnadta ilayhim min amrika lahum

translation.en: make perfect for them Your orders that You bid them to carry out,
strengthen their pillars,
and make us their helpers
and supporters of Your religion.
They are the essence of Your Words,
the Treasurers of Your knowledge,
the pillars of the profession of Your Oneness,
the posts of Your religion,
the authorities of Your commands,
the choices over Your servants,
the well-chosen ones from among Your creatures,
the vicegerents of You, the offspring of Your vicegerents,
and the selected descendants of Your Prophet.
Peace be upon him and them.
Allah’s mercy and blessings, too, be upon them.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ كُنْ لِوَلِيّكَ الحُجّةِ ابْنِ الحَسَنِ

translation.en: O Allah, be, for Your representative, the Hujjat (proof), son of Al­Hassan,
Your blessings be on him and his forefathers,

segments.arabic: فِي هذِهِ السَّاعَةِ وَفي كُلّ سَاعَةٍ
segments.transliteration: fee haazehis saa-a'te wa fee kulle saa-a'tin

translation.en: in this hour and in every hour,
a guardian, a protector,
a leader, a helper,
a proof, and an eye.
until You make him live on the earth, in obedience (to You),
& Cause him to live in it for a long time

text.en: DUA GHAREEQ

We have been commanded to recite this Dua regularly. Shayikh Sadooq narrates from Abdullah bin Sinan who says that Imam Sadiq (a.s.) said,"After this a time of such doubt will befall you that you will be without the visible signs and a guiding Imam. And no one shall be able to achieve salvation from this except those who recite "Dua-e-Ghareeq."

The narrator asked what this Dua was? Imam (a.s.) replied, After repeating 'Muqallebal Quloob' the narrator added the word, 'Wal absaar' (and the vision). When Imam (a.s.) heard this, he said, "Indeed Allah is the Who changes the hearts and vision, but you recite the Dua as I have said." (Kamaluddin Vol. 2 Pg. 351)

segments.arabic: يَا اَللَّهُ يَا رَحْمٰنُ يَا رَحِيمُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya rahmanu ya rahimu

translation.en: O Allah! O All-beneficent! O All-merciful!
O Turner of hearts!
Keep firm my heart on your religion

text.en: Shaykh Abbas Qummi (r.a.), in his renowned compilation, 'Mafatihul Jinaan'. has reported this invocation on the authority of Shaykh Kafami from the latter's 'Misbahul Mutahajjid'. It is recommended that this supplication be recited after every obligatory Salat. Al-Kaf`ami, in al-Misbah, says “This is the prayer of Imam al-Mahdi(ajtfs)

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) grant us success to obey (You),
remoteness from disobedience (to You),
true intention,
and identification of sanctity.
(Please do) honor us with true guidance and straightforwardness,
dedicate our tongues to truth and wisdom,
fill our hearts with knowledge and learning,

segments.transliteration: wa tahhir butunana mina alharami walshshubhati

translation.en: purify our stomachs from illegally and suspiciously gotten food,
withhold our hands from oppression and larceny,
turn our sights away from licentiousness and treachery,
and block our hearings against vainness and backbiting,
confer upon our scholars with asceticism and advice,
upon the learners with hard work and desire (to learning),
upon the listeners with following and learning (lessons),
upon the Muslim patients with cure and comfort,
upon the dead Muslims with kindness and mercy,
upon our aged people with somberness and gentleness,
upon the youths with turning (to You) and repentance,
upon the women with shyness and chastity,
upon the rich with modesty and ample giving,
upon the poor with patience and satisfaction,
upon the warriors with triumph and supremacy,
upon the prisoners with release and comfort,
upon the rulers with justice and sympathy,

segments.transliteration: wa `ala alrra`iyyati bil-insafi wa husni alssirati

translation.en: and upon the subjects with impartiality and good behavior.

segments.arabic: وَبَارِكْ لِلْحُجَّاجِ وَالزُّوَّارِ فِي ٱلزَّادِ وَٱلنَّفَقَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa barik lilhujjaji walzzuwwari fi alzzadi walnnafaqati

translation.en: (Please do) bless the pilgrims to Mecca and the visitors (of the tombs of the saints) with provision and expenditure,

segments.arabic: وَٱقْضِ مَا اوْجَبْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ مِنَ ٱلْحَجِّ وَٱلْعُمْرَةِ
segments.transliteration: waqdi ma awjabta `alayhim min alhajj wal`umrati

translation.en: and help them settle the Hajj and `Umrah that You have made incumbent upon them,

segments.transliteration: bifadlika wa rahmatika ya arhama alrrahimina

translation.en: in the name of Your grace and mercy, O most merciful of all those who show mercy!

text.en: The Supplication of the Argument-person; i.e. Imam al-Mahdi (`a):
According to (the book of) Muhaj al-Da`awat, this is the prayer of the Argument of Allah (i.e. Imam al-Mahdi al-Hujjah).

translation.en: O my God, in the name of all those who have besought you

segments.arabic: وَبِحَقِّ مَنْ دَعَاكَ فِي ٱلْبَرِّ وَٱلْبَحْرِ
segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqi man da`aka fi albarri walbahri

translation.en: and in the name of all those who have prayed to you in lands and seas,
(please do) bless Muhammad and his Household,
bestow upon the poor among the believing men and women
with wealth and fortune,
upon the ailed believing men and women
with healing and health,
upon the living believing men and women
with kindness and generosity,
upon the dead believing men and women
with forgiveness and mercy,
and upon the emigrant believing men and women
with returning them home peacefully and successfully,
in the name of Muhammad and the members of his Household.

text.en: First: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said that Imam `Ali ibn al-Husayn Zayn al-`Abidin (`a) used to begin his day with the following statement

segments.arabic: أَبْتَدِئُ يَوْمِي هٰذَا بَيْنَ يَدَيْ نِسْيَانِي وَعَجَلَتِي
segments.transliteration: abtati'u yawmi hadha bayna yaday nisyani wa `ajalati

translation.en: I begin this day of mine before I should forget or hurry with:
‘In the Name of Allah’
and ‘Only what Allah wills (shall come to pass).’

text.en: Fourth: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said: My father (`a) used to begin his morning with the following prayer:

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin), in Allah (I put my trust),
to Allah (I resort),
in the way of Allah (I proceed),
and the principles of Allah’s Messenger,
may Allah bless him and his Household (I follow).
O Allah, (please) protect me with the protection of faith

segments.transliteration: min bayni yadayya wa min khalfi

translation.en: before me, behind me,
to my right side, to my left side,

segments.transliteration: wa min fawqi wa min tahti

translation.en: above me, beneath me,
and in front of me.
There is no god save You.

segments.arabic: لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: la hawla wala quwwata illa billahi

translation.en: There is neither might nor power except with Allah.
We beseech You for pardon and wellbeing
from all wicked matters and all evils
in this world and the Hereafter.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ عَذَابِ ٱلْقَبْرِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni a`udhu bika min `adhabi alqabri

translation.en: O Allah, I pray for Your protection against the chastisement in the grave,
the pressure of graves,
and the tightness of graves.

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ سَطَوَاتِ ٱللَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika min satawati allayli walnnahari

translation.en: I pray Your protection against the calamities in nights and days.
O Allah, Lord of the Sacred Monument,
the Sacred City,
the lawful, and the consecration,

segments.arabic: أَبْلِغْ مُحَمَّداً وَآلَ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِّيَ ٱلسَّلاَمَ
segments.transliteration: abligh muhammadan wa ala muhammadin `anni alssalama

translation.en: (please) convey peace to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad on behalf of me.
O Allah, I pray the protection of Your invulnerable armor
and I pray the protection of Your Wholeness
lest that You might cause me to die drowned, burned,
choked, beaten,
murdered, poisoned,
fallen in a well,
eaten by a beast,
sudden death,
or any violent death;
rather, cause me to die on my bed
obeying You and Your Messenger,
may Allah bless him and his Household,
following the truth unfailingly,

segments.arabic: أَوْ فِي ٱلصَّفِّ ٱلَّذِينَ نَعَتَّهُمْ فِي كِتَابِكَ
segments.transliteration: aw fi alssaffi alladhina na`attahum fi kitabika

translation.en: or to die in the ranks that You have described in Your Book
as a solid structure.
I pray for myself, my children,
and whatever my Lord has provided me
the protection of “Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of the dawn
from the evil of what He has created,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri ghasiqin idha waqaba

translation.en: from the evil of the utterly dark night when it comes,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri alnnaffathati fi al`uqadi

translation.en: from the evil of those who blow on knots,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri hasidin idha hasada

translation.en: and from the evil of the envious when he envies.”
I pray for myself, my children,
and whatever my Lord has provided me
the protection of “Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of men,
the King of men,
the god of men,
from the evil of the whisperings of the slinking (Satan)
who whispers into the hearts of men
from among the jinn and the men.”

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ عَدَدَ مَا خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ

translation.en: Praise be to Allah as many as what Allah has created.
Praise be to Allah as same as what He has created.
Praise be to Allah as full as what He has created.
Praise be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Praise be to Allah as weighty as His Throne.
Praise be to Allah as much as it pleases Him.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إلاَّ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْحَلِيمُ ٱلْكَرِيمُ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu alhalimu alkarimu

translation.en: There is no god save Allah the Forbearing and All-generous.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إلاَّ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْعَلِيُّ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu al`aliyu al`azimu

translation.en: There is no god save Allah the Most High and All-great.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلسَّمَوَاتِ وَٱلأَرَضِينَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi rabbi alssamawati wal-aradina wa ma baynahuma

translation.en: Glory be to Allah the Lord of the heavens, the layers of the earth, and whatsoever is between them
and the Lord of the great Throne.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ دَرَكِ ٱلشَّقَاءِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni a`udhu bika min daraki alshshqa'i

translation.en: O Allah, I pray Your protection against encounter of misery
and gloating of the enemies.

segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika min alfaqri walwaqri

translation.en: I pray Your protection against poverty and rupture.

segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika min su'i almanzari

translation.en: I pray Your protection against evil result
with regard to the wife, the property, and the children.

text.en: It is then recommended to repeat ten times the invocation of Almighty Allah’s blessings upon the Holy Prophet and his Household:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.

text.en: Sixth: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) advised the prayer "allahumma laka alhamdu" be said in mornings::

translation.en: O Allah, all praise be to You.
I praise You and seek Your help.
You are my Lord
and I am Your servant.
I begin this morning committing myself to my pledge and promise to You,
having faith in Your promise,
and fulfilling my covenant to You as much as I can.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi

translation.en: There is neither might nor power except with Allah,
One and Only and having no associate with Him.

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu anna muhammadan `abduhu wa rasuluhu

translation.en: I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and messenger.
I am in this morning following the nature of Islam,
the creed of sincerity,
the principles of Abraham,
and the faith of Muhammad,
blessings of Allah be upon them and upon their households.
Carrying this faith, I will live and die,
if Allah wills.
O Allah, (please) make me live as long as You determine me to live
and cause me to die when You will decide to make me die following this faith,
and resurrect me, when You will resurrect me following this faith.
By so, I only desire for Your pleasure and for following Your path.
To You do I resort
and with You do I entrust my affairs.
The Family of Muhammad are my leaders;
I have no other leaders than they are.
I follow them,
accede to them,
and pattern after their examples.
O Allah, (please) make them my leaders
in this world and in the Hereafter,
keep me loyalist to their loyalists
and enemy of their enemies
in this world and in the Hereafter,
and include me with the righteous ones,
along with my ancestors.

text.en: 4 .Eighth: Imam al-Baqir (`a) is reported to have advised following recitations at dawn:
Repeat the following litany ten times

translation.en: There is no god save Allah;
One and Only Lord and having no associate with Him.
To him is the kingdom and to Him is all praise.
He gives life and causes to die
while He is Ever-living and He never dies.
In His hand is the good
and He has power over all things.

text.en: ii.Then, repeat the invocation of blessings upon the Holy Prophet and his Household ten times:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.

text.en: iii.Then, repeat the glorification statement (tasbih) thirty-five times:

translation.en: All glory be to Allah.
iv.Then, repeat the statement of professing Almighty Allah being the one and only God (tahlil) thirty-five times:
There is no god save Allah.

text.en: v.Then, repeat thirty-five times:

translation.en: All praise be to Allah.

text.en: Whoever says all that at dawn, will not be included with the inadvertent ones on that day. Similarly, whoever says the same at night, will not be included with the inadvertent ones at that night.

Supplication of ilhaah from imam sadiq (a.s.) narrated from imam mahdi (a.s.) Abu Naeem Ansari says: I was living on rent in Mecca near the Rukn and a group of men from the tribe Muqassira were also present. Mahmoodi, Allaan e Kulayni, Abu Haysum Dinari and Abu Ja’far Ahwal Hamdani were present amongst them and totally there were about thirty men. I didn’t know of any other pure-hearted Shia from their group except Mohammad bin Qasim Alavi Aqeeqi.

It was the sixth day of Zil Hijjah, 293 Hijrah, when suddenly a young man who was busy in circumambulation wearing two clothes of Ahraam and holding his shoes in his hand, came towards us. His reverence was overwhelming and we stood up involuntarily; all of us stood up from their positions without any exception and greeted him with Salaam. Then he sat down and looked towards his right and left, then said:
Do you people know what Imam Sadiq (A.S.) used to say in the supplication of Il’haah?
We asked: What was it? He said: He used to say:

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ إِنّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذي بِهِ تَقُومُ السَّماءَ ، وَبِهِ تَقُومُ الْأَرْضَ، وَبِهِ تُفَرِّقُ بَيْنَ الْحَقِّ وَالْباطِلِ ، وَبِهِ تَجْمَعُ بَيْنَ الْمُتَفَرِّقِ ، وَبِهِ تُفَرِّقُ بَيْنَ الْمُجْتَمَعِ ، وَبِهِ أَحْصَيْتَ عَدَدَ الرِّمالِ ، وَزِنَةَ الْجِبالِ ، وَكَيْلَ الْبِحارِ ، أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَأَنْ تَجْعَلَ لي مِنْ أَمْري فَرَجاً وَمَخْرَجاً .
segments.transliteration: “O’ Allah! Indeed I beseech You in You name with which the sky is upright, and with which the earth is upright, and with which we differentiate between truth and evil, and with which we join the separated ones, and with which we segregate the joined ones, and with which we count the number of pebbles, and the weight of the mountains, and the measurement of the Oceans, to bless Mohammad and his holy Progeny, and to give me relief and a point of exit for my affair.[1]

translation.en: It is reported in the book ‘Al Junnatul Waqiya’ that Imam Mahdi (A.S.) said: Imam Sadiq (A.S.) used to recite this supplication every morning. [2]

text.en: [1] Kamal ud Deen: p. 470; Al Bihaar: 95/157; As Saheefatus Sadiqiyya: p. 363; Dalaaelul Imamah: p. 543 .
[2] Al Junnatul Waqiya: This book is associated with Mir Damad.
In mornings and evenings, you may repeat the following doxology twice:

translation.en: All praise be to the Lord of morning.
All praise be to the Cleaver of daybreak.

text.en: You may then say the following doxology:

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي أَذْهَبَ ٱللَّيْلَ بِقُدْرَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi adh-haba allayla biqudratihi

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has taken away the night by His power
and brought the day through His mercy.

text.en: Recite <ref=1:2:255-257>Ayat Al-Kursi</ref> , the <ref=1:59:21-24>last verses of Surah al-Hashr</ref> , <ref=1:37:1-10>ten verses of Surah al-Saffat</ref> , and the following holy verses and doxological statements following them:

translation.en: “Glory be to your Lord, the Lord of Honor, above what they describe.
And Peace be upon the messengers.
And all praise is due to Allah the Lord of the worlds.”

segments.transliteration: fasubhana allahi hina tumsuna wa hina tusbihuna

translation.en: “Therefore, glory be to Allah when you enter upon the time of the evening and when you enter upon the time of the morning;

segments.transliteration: wa lahu alhamdu fi alssamawati wal-ardi

translation.en: and to Him belongs praise in the heavens and the earth,
and at nightfall and when you are at midday.
He brings forth the living from the dead
and brings forth the dead from the living,
and gives life to the earth after its death,
and thus shall you be brought forth.”
Glorified and Sacred be You;
our Lord and the Lord of the angels and the Holy Spirit.
Your mercy has preceded Your wrath.
There is no god save You.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي فَٱغْفِرْ لِي
segments.transliteration: subhanaka inni zalamtu nafsi faghfir li

translation.en: Glory be to You. I have wronged myself; so, forgive me,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْحَمْنِي وَتُبْ عَلَيَّ إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ ٱلتَّوَّابُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
segments.transliteration: warhamni wa tub `alayya innaka anta alttawwabu alrrahimu

translation.en: have mercy upon me, and accept my repentance, for You are the Oft-Returning, the All-merciful.

text.en: Seventh:It is narrated in Kafi, through a chain of narrators, from Furaat Ibn al-Ahnaf, who narrates from Imam Sadeq (a.s.) that he (a.s.) said, You may neglect to do anything, but never neglect saying the following prayer in mornings and evenings

translation.en: O Allah, I implore for You forgiveness
in this morning
and on this day
for purpose of winning Your mercy.

segments.transliteration: wa abra'u ilayka min ahli la`natika

translation.en: I disavow in Your presence the people cursed by You.
O Allah, I disavow in Your presence
on this day
and in this morning

segments.arabic: مِمَّنْ نَحْنُ بَيْنَ ظَهْرَانيْهِمْ مِنَ ٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ
segments.transliteration: mimman nahnu bayna zahranihim min almushrikina

translation.en: the polytheists we live among them
and (disavow) what they are worshipping.
Truly, they were a people given to evil, a rebellious people.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْ مَا أَنْزَلْتَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَاءِ إِلَىٰ ٱلأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`al ma anzalta min alssama'i ila al-ardi

translation.en: O Allah, (please) cause what You have brought down from the heavens to the earth
in this morning
and on this day
to be blessing for Your saints
and punishment poured on Your enemies.
O Allah, (please) accede to those who are loyal to You
and feud with those who act hostilely towards You.
O Allah, (please) seal my affairs with security and faith
whenever the sun rises or sets.
O Allah, (please) forgive me and my parents
and have mercy upon them as they have cherished me in my childhood.
O Allah, (please) forgive the believing men and women
and the Muslim men and women,
both the alive and the dead.

segments.transliteration: allahumma innaka ta`lamu munqalabahum wa mathwahum

translation.en: O Allah, You do know their place of returning and their place of rest.
O Allah, (please) safeguard the leader of Muslims
with the protection of faith,
help him with powerful help,
grant him easy victory,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ لَهُ وَلَنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ سُلْطَاناً نَصِيراً
segments.transliteration: waj`al lahu wa lana min ladunka sultanan nasiran

translation.en: and grant him and us from Your presence a sustaining power.
O Allah, (please) curse so-and-so and so-and-so­
as well as the factions that have dissented from Your Messenger,
from the men of authority after Your Messenger,
from the leaders who came after him, and from their partisans.
I also beseech You from more favor,

segments.arabic: وَٱلإِقْرَارَ بِمَا جَاءَ بِهِ مِنْ عِنْدِكَ

translation.en: acknowledgement of what has come from You,
submission to Your decree,
and steadfastness in what You have ordered of.
I neither intend to find another alternative than it

segments.transliteration: wa la ashtari bihi thamanan qalilan

translation.en: nor do I take a mean price in exchange for it.
O Allah, (please) guide me among those whom You guide
and save me from the evil of what You have decided,
for You decree and no one can decree against Your decree
and no humiliation will ever afflict one whom You support.
Blessed by You and exalted by You.
Glory be to You, O Lord of the House.
Accept my prayer.

segments.arabic: وَمَا تَقَرَّبْتُ بِهِ إِلَيْكَ مِنْ خَيْرٍ
segments.transliteration: wa ma taqarrabtu bihi ilayka min khayrin

translation.en: As for whatever virtuous item through which I have sought nearness to You,
(please) double it for me many folds.
Grant us from Your Presence a great reward.
O my Lord, how excellent Your favors to me are!
How great Your donations to me are!
How lasting the wellbeing with which You have endued me is!
Too many times have You covered my faults!
So, all praise be to You, O my God;
such praise that is pleasant, blessed,
as full as the heavens,
as full as the earth,

segments.transliteration: wa mil'a ma sha'a rabbi wa radiya

translation.en: as full as what my Lord wills and pleases,
and as it fits the Face of my Lord,
the Lord of majesty and honoring.

text.en: Ninth: Muhammad ibn Fudayl has reported that he wrote a letter to Imam Muhammad al-Taqi (al-Jawad) (`a) asking him to teach him a supplicatory prayer. The Imam’s answer came: In mornings and evening, you may say the following statement:

translation.en: Allah, Allah, Allah is my lord,
the All-beneficent and All-merciful.
I do not admit any one as partner of Him.

text.en: You may then submit your requests.
The previous statement is thus an introductory to the beseeching for any request by the permission of Allah the All-exalted.
3 short Evening Duas
Second: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said: Whoever repeats the following three times in the evening, will be surrounded by one of the wings of Archangel Gabriel up to the next morning:

translation.en: I entrust with Allah the Most High, the All-high,
the All-majestic, and the All-great
my self and whatever concerns me.
I entrust my self with Allah
the feared, the dreaded,
and to Whose greatness all things submit.

segments.arabic: وعنه عليه‌السلام أيضاً قال : إذا أمسيت فقل :

translation.en: Third: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) advised to enter your evening with the following prayer:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِنْدَ إِقْبَالِ لَيْلِكَ

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You at the coming of Your night,
the departure of Your daytime,
the presence of the prayers to You,
and the voices of supplications to You

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ…
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin…

translation.en: to bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and t

text.en: You may now submit your requests.…
Tenth: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said to Dawud al-Raqqi: Do not miss repeating the following supplicatory prayer three times in mornings and three times in evenings:

translation.en: O Allah, (please) include me with Your invulnerable shield
with which You include whomever You want.

text.en: The Imam (`a) added: My father (`a) has said, “This is one of the divinely ordered supplicatory prayers.”
Before reciting Holy Quran
Dua before reciting the Holy Qur'an .It has been narrated that Imam Ja`far al-Sadiq (a.s) used to say the following supplication before he would start reciting the Holy Qur'an

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَشْهَدُ أَنَّ هَذَا كِتَابُكَ الْمُنْزَلُ مِنْ عِنْدِكَ عَلَى رَسُولِكَ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ashhadu ann hadha kitabuka almunzalu min `indika ala rasulika muhammadi bni `abdillahi salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi

translation.en: O Allah I testify that this is the Book revealed by Thee on Thy Messenger Muhammad bin Abdillah, blessings of Allah be on him and on his children;

segments.arabic: وَ كَلاَمُكَ النَّاطِقُ عَلَى لِسَانِ نَبِيِّكَ جَعَلْتَهُ هَادِياً مِنْكَ إِلَى خَلْقِكَ وَ حَبْلاً مُتَّصِلاً فِيمَا بَيْنَكَ وَ بَيْنَ عِبَادِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa kalamuka alnnatiqu `ala lisani nabiyyika ja`altahu hadiyan minka ila khalqika wa hablan muttsilan fima baynaka wa bayna `ibadika

translation.en: (these are) Thy Words, Thy Prophet gave tongue to, (whom) Thou appointed as a Guide for the people, and an uninterrupted closely connected link of protecting friendship between Thee and Thy servants.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي نَشَرْتُ عَهْدَكَ وَ كِتَابَكَ اللَّهُمَّ فَاجْعَلْ نَظَرِي فِيهِ عِبَادَةً وَ قِرَاءَتِي فِيهِ فِكْراً وَ فِكْرِي فِيهِ اعْتِبَاراً
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni nashartu `ahdaka wa kitabaka allahumma faj`al nazary fihi `ibadatan wa qira‘aty fihi fikran wa fikry fihi a`tibaran

translation.en: O Allah I make publicly known Thy testament and Thy Book. O Allah let me pay full attention to (this) adorable pious work; let me notice and take warning from (this)thoughtful reflection;<

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْنِي مِمَّنِ اتَّعَظَ بِبَيَانِ مَوَاعِظِكَ فِيهِ وَ اجْتَنَبَ مَعَاصِيَكَ
segments.transliteration: waj`alny mimmn att`aza bibayani mawa`izika fihi wajtanaba ma`asiyaka

translation.en: let me be one of them who exhort themselves from Thy plain warnings and preaching found in this Book, and keep from that which Thou has made unlawful.

segments.arabic: وَ لاَ تَطْبَعْ عِنْدَ قِرَاءَتِي عَلَى سَمْعِي وَ لاَ تَجْعَلْ عَلَى بَصَرِي غِشَاوَةً
segments.transliteration: wa la tatba` `inda qira‘aty `ala sam`i wa la taj`al `ala basary ghishawatan

translation.en: Do not seal my hearing and do not cover my eyes when I recite (it).

segments.arabic: وَ لاَ تَجْعَلْ قِرَاءَتِي قِرَاءَةً لاَ تَدَبُّرَ فِيهَا بَلِ اجْعَلْنِي أَتَدَبَّرُ آيَاتِهِ وَ أَحْكَامَهُ آخِذاً بِشَرَائِعِ دِينِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la taj`al qira‘aty qira‘atan la tadabbara fiha bali aj`alny atadabbru ayatihi wa ahkamahu Learning the laws of my religion

translation.en: Do not let me recite for the sake of recitation , paying no attention to its meaning, but let me contemplate over its signs and commands, to know and understand the modus operandi of Thy religion.

segments.arabic: وَ لاَ تَجْعَلْ نَظَرِي فِيهِ غَفْلَةً وَ لاَ قِرَاءَتِي هَذَراً إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الرَّءُوفُ الرَّحِيمُ
segments.transliteration: wa la taj`al nazary fihi ghaflatan wa la qira‘aty hadharan innaka anta alrra´ufu alrrahimu

translation.en: Do not let my concentration go slack, nor my recitation be like a delirious monologue. Verily Thou art full of pity, Merciful.

text.en: Dua after reciting the Holy Qur'an .Imam al-Sadiq (a.s) used to say the following supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي قَدْ قَرَأْتُ مَا قَضَيْتَ مِنْ كِتَابِكَ الَّذِي أَنْزَلْتَهُ عَلَى نَبِيِّكَ الصَّادِقِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ رَبَّنَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni qad qara’tu ma qadayta min kitabika alladhy anzaltahu `ala nabiyyIka alssadiqi salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi falaka alhamdu rabbana

translation.en: O Allah I have recited that which Thou commands from Thy Book Thou revealed to Thy truthful Prophet, blessings of Allah be on him and on his children. (All) praise be to our Lord.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي مِمَّنْ يُحِلُّ حَلاَلَهُ وَ يُحَرِّمُ حَرَامَهُ وَ يُؤْمِنُ بِمُحْكَمِهِ وَ مُتَشَابِهِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma aj`alny mimmn yuhillu halalahu wa yuharrimu haramahu wa yu´minu bimuhkamihi wa mutashabihihi

translation.en: O Allah let me be one of those who take to the lawful and keep from the unlawful, accept and show submissionto its clear as well as consimilar commands,

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْهُ لِي أُنْساً فِي قَبْرِي وَ أُنْساً فِي حَشْرِي
segments.transliteration: waj`alhu li ’unsan fi qabri wa ’unsan fi hashri

translation.en: let (this recitation) be my companion in my grave and at the time of Resurrection,

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْنِي مِمَّنْ تُرْقِيهِ (تُرَقِّيهِ) بِكُلِّ آيَةٍ قَرَأَهَا دَرَجَةً فِي أَعْلَى عِلِّيِّينَ آمِينَ رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: waj`alny mimman turaqqihi bikulli aiyatin qara-aha darajatan fi a`la `illiyyina amina rabba al`alamina

translation.en: and let me be one of those whom Thou shall raise and exalt, on account of this recitation, on the highest pedestal in the Paradise. Be it so O the Lord of the worlds.

text.en: Another Dua after reciting quran - following brief supplication that is reported by Shaykh al-Tusi from Imam `Ali Amer al-Mu'mineen (a.s):

translation.en: O Allah: (please) expand my breast through the Qur'an
And use my body for the Qur'an
And enlighten my sight by the Qur'an
And make my tongue eloquent by the Qur'an
And help me carry out its duty as long as You keep me alive,

segments.arabic: فَإِنّهُ لا حَوْلَ وَلا قُوّةَ إِلاَّ بِكَ.
segments.transliteration: fa’innahu la hawla wa la quwwata illa bika

translation.en: For there is neither power nor might save with You.

text.en: Then recite this

اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ إِخْباتَ المُخْبِتِينَ ، وَإِخْلاصَ المُوقِنِينَ ، وَمُرافَقَةَ الاَبْرارِ ، وَاسْتِحْقاقَ حَقائِقِ الاِيْمانِ ، وَالغَنِيمَةَ مِنْ كُلِّ بِرٍّ ، وَالسَّلامَةَ مِنْ كُلِّ إِثْمٍ ، وَوُجُوبَ رَحْمَتِكَ ، وَعَزائِمَ مَغْفِرَتِكَ ، وَالفَوْزَ بِالجَنَّةِ ، وَالنَّجاةَ مِنَ النّار
Mohammed Baqir Sabzwari in his book "Mafatih Najah" has narrated the incident of Ameerul Momineen concerning the Dua famous as "Istegfaar Moajize Asa"

Imam Husain (a.s.) said : one day I was sitting with my father when an Arab man came to meet him and said o commander of the faithful: I am a family man. I don't have means to raise them. O my Arab brother, why is it that you don't seek too much forgiveness that your condition becomes good. The Arab man said o commander of the faithfuls, I have done too much penance, but there is no change in my life. Then Imam recited to him the ayat of Surah-e-Nooh 10-12

segments.arabic: اسْتَغْفِرُوا رَبَّكُمْ إِنَّهُ كَانَ غَفَّارًا (10) يُرْسِلِ السَّمَاءَ عَلَيْكُم مِّدْرَارًا (11) وَيُمْدِدْكُم بِأَمْوَالٍ وَبَنِينَ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ جَنَّاتٍ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ أَنْهَارًا (12)

text.en: Ask forgiveness of your Lord, surely He is the most Forgiving. He will send down upon you the cloud, pouring down abundance of rain. And help you with wealth and sons, and make for you gardens, and make for you rivers.

Then Imam (a.s.) continued to say that I will give you an penance that you must recite before sleeping. If you recite every night before sleeping this penance than Allah will increase your sustenance.

Imam Husain (a.s.) says: Then my father wrote it down and while giving said again, whenever you go on the bed with the in tension of sleeping than read this penance in the state of crying. And if tears do not come than at least make a crying face.
Imam Husain (a.s.) says : One year later the Arab came back and said, "O Ameer-e-Momeneen you had said the truth. I have so many camels and cattle that now I don't have space to tie them."

Imam Ali (a.s.): I swear by the Allah who has made appointed the prophet, whosoever recites this penance and seeks forgiveness from Allah, he shall be forgiven and his legitimate desires will be fulfilled. And by the blessing of the penance he will be granted more children and wealth.

translation.en: In the Name of Allah the most beneficent & the most merciful

segments.arabic: (1) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْبٍ قَوِيَ عَلَيْهِ بَدَنِيْ بِعَافِيَتِكَ، اَوْ نَالَتْهُ قُدْرَتِيْ بِفَضْلِ نِعْمَتِكَ، اَوْ بَسَطْتُ اِلَيْهِ يَدِيْ بِسَابِغِ رِزْقِكَ، اَوِ اتَّكَلَتْ فِيْهِ عِنْدَ خَوْفِيْ مِنْهُ عَلٰي آنَاتِكَ، اَوِ احْتَجَبْتُ فِيْهِ مِنَ النَّاسِ بِسِتْرِكَ، اَوْ وَثِقْتُ مِنْ سَطْوَتِكَ عَلَيَّ فِيْهِ بِحِلْمِكَ، اَو عَوَّلْتُ فِيْهِ عَلٰى كَرَمِ عَفْوِكَ۔

translation.en: 1) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which I have committed while being in comfort and peace and from those sins which I have committed due to excess of bounties which you showered upon me and from those sins which I have committed due to increase in sustenance and from those sins which I should have been afraid of but I did not refrain from it since I was aware of your forbearance and from those sins which you did not expose to the people and from those sins which I have committed since I was sure that it would not be spread by you and from those sins concerning which I relied on your forgiveness۔

segments.arabic: (2) اَللّٰهُمَّ انِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْبٍ خُنْتُ فِيْهِ اَمَانَتِيْ، اَوْ بَخَّسْتُ بِفِعْلِهٖ نَفْسِيْ، اَوِ احْتَطَبْتُ بِهٖ عَلٰي بَدَنِيْ، اَوْ قَدَّمْتُ فِيْهِ لَذَّتِيْ، اَوْ آثَرْتُ فِيْهِ شَهْوَتِيْ، اَوْ سَعَيْتُ فِيْهِ لِغَيْرِيْ، اَوِ اسْتَغْوَيْتُ اِلَيْهِ مَنْ تَبِعَنِيْ، اَوْ كَايَدْتُ فِيْهِ مَنْ مَنَعَنِيْ، اَوْ قَهَرْتُ عَلَيْهِ مَنْ عَادَانِيْ، اَوْ غَلَبْتُ عَلَيْهِ بِفَضْلِ حِيْلَتِيْ، اَوْ اَحَلْتُ عَلَيْكَ مَوْلَايَ، فَلَمْ تَغْلِبْنِيْ عَلٰى فِعْلِيْ، اِذْ كُنْتَ كَارِهًا لِمَعْصِيَتِيْ فَحَلُمْتَ عَنِّىْ، لٰكِنْ سَبَقَ عِلْمُكَ فِيَّ بِفِعْلِىْ ذٰلِكَ، لَمْ تُدْخِلْنِيْ يَا رَبِّ فِيْهِ جَبْرًا، وَلَمْ تَحْمِلْنِيْ عَلَيْهِ قَهْرًا، وَلَمْ تَظْلِمْنِيْ فِيْهٍ شَيْئًا، فَاَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لَهٗ وَلِجَمِيْعِ ذُنُوْبِيْ۔

translation.en: 2) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins where in I have deceived my soul and from those sins in which I regarded myself low and from those sins due to which I was eligible for your punishment and from those sins in which my desires conquered my heart and from those sins in which I preferred the carnal desires of my heart۔ Woe be unto me Oh my Lord! I consider you weak but you did not prevent me (with force) from my (bad) deeds and inspite of being unhappy with my actions, you forbeared it where as you were already aware of my nature۔ Oh my Lord! You did not force me in my actions and in this way did not do injustice to me۔ I seek your forgiveness from this sins and from all types of sins۔

segments.arabic: (3) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْبٍ تُبْتُ اِلَيْكَ مِنْهُ، وَاَقْدَمْتُ عَلٰي فِعْلِهٖ فَاسْتَحْيَيْتُ مِنْكَ وَاَنَا عَلَيْهِ، وَ رَهِبْتُكَ وَاَنَا فِيْهِ تَعَاطَيْتُهٗ وَعُدْتُ اِلَيْهِ۔

translation.en: 3) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins whose forgiveness I have asked from you and from those sins upon which I hastened myself۔ Thus I am ashamed of you regarding those sins which I have committed while being afraid of your chastisement but continued and pursued it again۔

segments.arabic: (4) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ كَتَبْتَهٗ عَلَيَّ بِسَبَبِ خَيْرٍ اَرَدْتُ بِهٖ وَجْهَكَ فَخَالَطَنِيْ فِيْهِ سِوَاكَ، وَشَارَكَ فِعْلِيْ مَالَا يَخْلُصُ لَكَ، اَوْ وَجَبَ عَلَيَّ مَا اَرَدْتَ بِهٖ سِوَاكَ، وَكَثِيْرُ مِنْ فِعْلِيْ مَا يَكُوْنُ كَذٰلِكَ۔

translation.en: 4) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which you have written for me due to those good deeds which I determined to perform for your sake only but could not remain sincere in my intention and performed those deeds in which my intention was not purely for you but it was for others also and from those actions which made it necessary for me to change my intention other than you and most of my actions were similar to it۔

segments.arabic: (5) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْبٍ تَوَرَّكَ عَلَيَّ بِسَبَبِ عَهْدٍ عَاهَدْتُكَ عَلَيْهِ، اَوْ عَقْدٍ عَقَدْتُهٗ لَكَ، اَوْ ذِمَّةٍ وَاثَقْتُ بِهَا مِنْ اَجْلِكَ لِاَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ، ثُمَّ نَقَضْتُ ذٰلِكَ مِنْ غَيْرِ ضَرُوْرَةٍ لَزِمْتَنِيْ فِيْهِ، بَلِ اسْتَزَلَّنِيْ اِلَيْهِ عَنِ الْوَفَاءِ بِهِ الْاَشَرُ، وَمَنَعَنِيْ عَنْ رِعَايَتِهِ الْبَصَرُ۔

translation.en: 5) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins regarding which pledge had been taken from me by you that I would not commit them and from those promises which I had done to you and the covenant which I had with you (but could not fulfill it) and the responsibility of one of your servants which I made incumbent upon me for your sake (but could not discharge those duties) ۔Thereafter I violated (broke) my pledge without any excuse and my pride and egotism also kept me away from fulfilling it (my promise)۔

segments.arabic: (6) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ رَهِبْتُ فِيْهِ مِنْ عِبَادِكَ، وَخِفْتُ فِيْهِ غَيْرَكَ وَاسْتَحْيَيْتُ فِيْهِ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ ثُمَّ اَفْضَيْتَ بِهٖ فِعْلِيْ اِلَيْكَ۔

translation.en: 6) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins at the time of committing which I was afraid of your servants and other than you and was ashamed of your creatures but later continued it again( without fearing you)۔

segments.arabic: (7) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ اَقْدَمْتُ عَلَيْهِ وَاَنَا مُسْتَيْقِنٌ اَنَّكَ تُعَاقِبُ عَلَي ارْتِكَابِهٖ فَارْتَكَبْتُهٗ۔

translation.en: 7) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which I have committed after having certainty that you would rebuke me for it۔

segments.arabic: (8) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ قَدَّمْتُ فِيْهِ شَهْوَتِي عَلٰي طَاعَتِكَ وَ آثَرْتُ مَحَبَّتِيْ عَلٰي اَمْرِكَ، وَ اَرْضَيْتُ فِيْهِ نَفْسِيْ بٍسَخَطِكَ، وَقَدْ نَهَيْتَنِيْ عَنْهُ بِنَهْيِكَ، وَتَقَدَّمْتَ اِلَيَّ فِيْهِ بِاِعْذَارِكَ، وَاحْتَجَجْتَ عَلَيَّ فِيْهِ بِوَعِيْدِكَ۔

translation.en: 8) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins in which desires of my heart overcame your obedience and I preferred my likeliness to your orders۔ I preferred the satisfaction of my soul to your order and satiated my self with your anger where as you had already asked me to keep away from it and before I could commit those sins, you left no room for my justification (excuse) by warning me in advance of its impending (possible) chastisement۔

segments.arabic: (9) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْبٍ عَلِمْتُهٗ مِنْ نَفْسِيْ، اَوْ ذَهَلْتُهٗ اَوْ نَسَيْتُهٗ، اَوْ تَعَمَّدْتُهٗ اَوْ اَخْطَاتُهٗ، مِمَّا لَا اَشُكُّ اَنَّكَ سَائِلِيْ عَنْهُ، وَاَنَّ نَفْسِيْ مُرْتَهَنَةٌ بِهٖ لَدَيْكَ، وَاِنْ كُنْتُ قَدْ نَسِيْتُهٗ اَوْ غَفَلَتْ نَفْسِيْ عَنْهُ۔

translation.en: 9) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which I was aware of and from those sins which I was unaware of and from those sins which I committed by mistake and from those sins which I committed intentionally or unintentionally in spite of knowing that you would ask me regarding those sins and that I would be questioned by you۔

segments.arabic: (10) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ وَاجَهْتُكَ بِهٖ، وَقَدْ اَيْقَنْتُ اَنَّكَ تَرَانِيْ وَاَغْفَلْتُ اَنْ اَتُوْبَ اِلَيْكَ مِنْهُ، اَوْ نَسِيْتُ اَتُوْبَ اِلَيْكَ مِنْهُ، اَوْ نَسِيْتُ اَنْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لَهٗ۔

translation.en: 10) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins with regards to which I would be accounted for in front of you and regarding which I had certainty that you were watching me but I became negligent that I would be returning to you and concerning which I forgot to seek your repentance and your forgiveness۔

segments.arabic: (11) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ دَخَلْتُ فِيْهِ، وَاَحْسَنْتُ ظَنِّيْ بِكَ اَنْ لَّا تُعَذِّبْنِيْ عَلَيْهِ، وَاَنَّكَ تَكْفِيْنِيْ مِنْهُ۔

translation.en: 11) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins regarding which I hoped positively about you that you would not punish me for it and that you would save me from its punishment۔

segments.arabic: (12) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبِ نِاسْتَوْجَبْتُ بِهٖ مِنْكَ رَدَّ الدُّعَاءِ، وَحِرْمَانَ الْاِجَابَةِ، وَخَيْبَةَ الطَّمَعِ، وَالنْفِسَاخَ الرَّجَاءِ۔

translation.en: 12) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins due to which I was deprived of the blessing of praying and my requests were not granted and my prayers were not answered and due to which I became disappointed of my wishes (that my wishes would not be granted by you)۔

segments.arabic: (13) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ يُعَقِّبُ الْحَسْرَةَ، وَيُوْرِثُ النَّدَامَةَ وَيَحْبِسُ الرِّزْقَ، وَيَرُدُّ الدُّعَاءِ۔

translation.en: 13) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which became the cause of my regret and sorrow and which shortened my sustenance and because of which my prayers were not answered۔

segments.arabic: (14) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ يُوْرِثُ الْاَسْقَامَ، وَيُعَقِّبُ الضَّنَاءَ وَيُوْجِبُ النِّقَمَ، وَيَكُوْنُ آخِرُهٗ حَسْرَةً وَّنَدَامَةً۔

translation.en: 14) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which gave rise to my illness and disability and is the cause of my punishment and hardships (adversity) and which finally resulted in my regret and repentance۔

segments.arabic: (15 اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْبٍ مَدَحْتُهٗ بِلِسَانِيْ، اَوْ هَشَّتْ اِلَيْهِ نَفْسِيْ، اَوِ اكْتَسَبْتُهٗ بِيَدِيْ وَهُوَ عِنْدَكَ قَبِيْحٌ تُعَاقِبُ عَلٰي مِثْلِهٖ وَتَمْقُتْ مَنْ عَمِلَهٗ۔

translation.en: 15) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which I praised with my tongue and from those sins towards which my soul was attracted and from those sins which I committed though it was disliked by you and early,you had punished for those sins which were similar to it۔

segments.arabic: (16 اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ خَلَوْتُ بِهٖ فِي لَيْلٍ اَوْ نَهَارٍ، حَيْثُ لَا يَرَانِيْ اَحَدٌ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ، فَمِلْتُ فِيْهِ مِنْ تَرْكِهٖ بِخَوْفِكَ، اِلَى ارْتِكَابِهٖ بِحُسْنِ الظَّنِّ بِكَ، فَسَوَّلَتْ لِيْ نَفْسِيَ الْاِقْدَامَ عَلَيْهِ فَوَاقَعْتُهٗ، وَاَنَا عَارِفٌ بِمَعْصِيَتِيْ لَكَ فِيْهِ۔

translation.en: 16) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which I have committed in day and night in loneliness in such a way that no one could see me from your creatures۔ Thereafter I left it out of your fear but later I inclined towards it since I was optimistic regarding you that you would not punish me (for it)۔ In this way my soul was deceived and I disobeyed you though I was fully aware of it ۔

segments.arabic: (17 اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبِ نِاسْتَقْلَلْتُهٗ، اَوِ اسْتَصْغَرْتُهٗ، اَوِ اسْتَعْظَمْتُهٗ وَتَوَرَّطْتُ فِيْهِ۔

translation.en: 17) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which I took lightly and considered it small and from those sins in which I was involved though I was knowing how severe it was!۔

segments.arabic: (18) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ مَالَئْتُ فِيْهِ عَلٰي اَحَدٍ مِنْ بَرِيَّتِكَ، اَوْ زَيِّنَتُهٗ لِنَفْسِيْ اَوْ مَاتُ بِهٖ اِلٰي غَيْرِيْ، وَدَلَلْتُ عَلَيْهِ سِوَايَ، اَوْ اَصْرَرْتُ عَلَيْهِ بِعَمَدِيْ، اَوْ اَقَمْتُ عَلَيْهِ بِحِيْلَتِيْ۔

translation.en: 18) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins in which I helped one of your servants and from those sins which I beautify in front of my self and from those sins which I introduced to others or made others aware of it and from those sins which I continued after being fully aware of it۔

segments.arabic: (19) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبِ نِاسْتَعَنْتُ عَلَيْهِ بِحِيْلَتِيْ بِشَيْءٍ مِمَّا يُرَادُ بِهٖ وَجْهَكَ، اَوْ يُسْتَظْهَرُ بِمِثْلِهٖ عَلٰي طَاعَتِكَ، اَوْ يُتَقَرَّبُ بِمِثْلِهٖ اِلَيْكَ، وَوَارَيْتُ عَنِ النَّاسِ وَلَبَّسْتُ فِيْهِ، كَاَنِّيْ اَرِيْدُكَ بِحِيْلَتِيْ وَالْمُرَادُ بِهٖ مَعْصِيَتُكَ، وَالْهَوٰي فِيْهِ مُتَصَرِّفٌ عَلٰي غَيْرِ طَاعَتِكَ۔

translation.en: 19) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which I committed after creating some excuses for it and from those actions through which I disobeyed you and from those actions through which I sought your nearness but was not sincere in my actions۔ Apparently it appeared that my actions were only for your sake but in fact I was disobedient to you and my desires (wishes) in it were not according to your obedience۔

segments.arabic: (20) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ كَتَبْتَهٗ عَلَيَّ بِسَبَبِ عُجْبٍ، كَانَ بِنَفْسِيْ اَوْ رِيَاءٍ اَوْ سُمْعَةٍ، اَوْ خُيَلَاءَ اَوْ فَرَحٍ، اَوْ اَشَرٍ، اَوْ بَطَرٍ، اَوْ حِقْدٍ، اَوْ حَمِيَّةٍ، اَوْ غَضَبٍ، اَوْ رِضًي، اَوْ شُحٍّ، اَوْ بُخْلٍ، اَوْ ظُلْمٍ، اَوْ خِيَانَةٍ، اَوْ سِرْقَةٍ، اَوْ نَوْعٍ مِنْ اَنْوَاعِ مَا يُكْتَسَبُ بِمِثْلِهِ الذُّنُوْبُ وَيَكُوْنُ بِاجْتِرَاحِهِ الْعَطْبُ۔

translation.en: 20) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which you have written for me due to my egotism, ostentation, show off, ostentation in worship, pride, useless mirth (joy, happiness), envy, being rebellious in front of truth, thanklessness, jealousy, greediness, anger, miserliness, oppression, treachery, theft, lie, useless work, sports and play (games), and similarly other sins and the result of which was the cause of my destruction and annihilations۔

segments.arabic: (21) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ سَبَقَ فِي عِلْمِكَ اَنِّيْ فَاعِلُهٗ فَدَخَلْتُ فِيْهِ بِشَهْوَتِي، وَاجْتَرَحْتُهٗ بِاِرِادَتِي وَقَارَفْتُهٗ بِمَحَبَّتِيْ وَلَذَّتِيْ وَمَشِيَّتِيْ، وَشِئْتُهٗ اِذْ شِئْتَ اَنْ اَشَائَهٗ، وَاَرَدْتُهٗ اِذْ اَرَدْتَ اَنْ اُرِيْدَهٗ، فَعَمِلْتُهٗ اِذْ كَانَ فِيْ قَدِيْمِ تَقْدِيْرِكَ وَنَافِظِ عِلْمِكَ اَنِّيْ فَاعِلُهٗ، لَمْ تُدْخِلْنِيْ فِيْهِ جَبْرًا، وَلَمْ تَحْمِلْنِيْ عَلَيْهِ قَهْرًا، وَلَمْ تَظْلِمْنِيْ فِيْهِ شَيْئًا، فَاسْتَغْفِرُكَ لَهٗ وَلِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ جَرٰي بِهٖ عِلْمُكَ عَلَيَّ وَفِيَّ اِلٰي آخِرِ عُمْرِيْ۔

translation.en: 21) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which was already there in your knowledge that I would commit it۔ Then I committed it out of my own desires and acted upon and proceeded in it intentionally and was involved in it with my own wish, lust and desires۔ I committed those sins with my own wish but you did not prevent me from it (by force) and in this way you have not done any type of injustice to me۔ Hence I seek your forgiveness till the end of my life from these sins and from all those sins which your knowledge encompasses۔

segments.arabic: (22) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ مَالَ بِسَخَطِيْ فِيْهِ عَنْ رِضَاكَ، وَمَالَتْ نَفْسِيْ اِلٰي رِضَاكَ فَسَخِطْتُهٗ، اَوْ رَهِبْتُ فِيْهِ سِوَاكَ، اَوْ عَادَيْتُ فِيْهِ اَوْلِيَائَكَ اَوْ وَالَيْتُ فِيْهِ اَعْدَائَكَ، اَوِ اخْتَرْتُهُمْ عَلٰي اَصْفِيَائِكَ، اَوْ خَذَلْتُ فِيْهِ اَحِبَّائَكَ، اَوْ قَصَّرْتُ فِيْهِ عَنْ رِضَاكَ يَا خَيْرَ الْغَافِرِيْنَ۔

translation.en: 22) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins in which I preferred my anger to your happiness where as my soul was inclined to your satisfaction (wishes) but I turned against your wishes and from those sins with respect to which I was afraid of other than you۔ I bear enmity with your friends and befriended your enemies and gave them preference over your best servants and from those sins in committing which I ignored your satisfaction, Oh the most merciful!

segments.arabic: (23) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ تُبْتُ اِلَيْكَ مِنْهُ ثُمَّ عُدْتُ فِيْهِ۔

translation.en: 23) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins whose forgiveness I had asked from you but later I continued it again۔

segments.arabic: (24) وَاَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا اَعْطَيْتُكَ مِنْ نَفْسِيْ ثُمَّ لَمْ اَفِ بِهٖ۔

translation.en: 24) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those promises which I had done to you but could not fulfill it afterwards۔

segments.arabic: (25) وَاَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِلنَّعْمَةِ الَّتِيْ اَنْعَمْتَ بِهَا عَلَيَّ فَقَوَيْتُ بِهَا عَلٰي مَعْصِيَتِكَ۔

translation.en: 25) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those bounties that you had bestowed on me but I used it in your disobedience۔

segments.arabic: (26) وَاَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ خَيْرٍ اَرَدْتُ بِهٖ وَجْهَكَ فَخَالَطَنِيْ مَا لَيْسَ لَكَ۔

translation.en: 26) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those good works regarding which I had decided that I would do it for your satisfaction but later, I was not sincere in my intention۔

segments.arabic: (27) وَاَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا دَعَانِيْ اِلَيْهِ الرُّخَصَ فِيْمَا اشْتَبَهٗ عَلَيَّ مِمَّا هُوَ عِنْدَكَ حَرَامٌ۔

translation.en: 27) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those actions which were not prohibited apparently but was forbidden according to you۔

segments.arabic: (28) وَاَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِلذُّنُوْبِ الَّتِيْ لَا يَعْلَمُهَا غَيْرُكَ، وَلَا يَطَّلِعُ عَلَيْهَا سِوَاكَ، وَلَا يَحْتَمِلُهَا اِلَّا حِلْمُكَ، وَلَا يَسَعُهَا اِلَّا عَفْوُكَ۔

translation.en: 28) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which are not known to anybody except you and nobody is aware of it except you, and no one can bear it except your forbearance and there is no rescue from it other than your forgiveness۔

segments.arabic: (29) وَاَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَاَتُوْبُ اِلَيْكَ مِنْ مَظَالِمِ كَثِيْرَةٍ لِعِبَادِكَ قِبَلِيْ، يَا رَبِّ فَلَمْ اَسْتَطِعْ رَدَّهَا عَلَيْهِمْ وَتَحْلِيْلَهَا مِنْهُمْ، اَوْ شَهِدُوْا فَاسْتَحْيَيْتُ مِنِ اسْتِحْلَالِهِمْ وَالطَّلَبِ اِلَيْهِمْ وَاِعْلاَمِهِمْ ذٰلِكَ، وَاَنْتَ الْقَادِرُ عَلٰي اَنْ تَسْتَوْهِبَنِيْ مِنْهُمْ وَتُرْضِيَهُمْ عَنِّيْ كَيْفَ شِئْتَ وَبِمَا شِئْتَ يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ، وَاَحْكَمَ الْحَاكِمِيْنَ وَخَيْرَ الْغَافِرِيْنَ۔

translation.en: 29) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from some of the needs of your servant which were incumbent upon me (but I could not fulfill it) and I did not have courage to seek his pardon for it and if he is present in front of me, I feel ashamed to ask him that he forgive me where as you have the power to make him please (happy) with me, Oh the most merciful and the most forgiving!

segments.arabic: (30) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اِسْتَغْفَارِيْ اِيَّاكَ مَعَ الْاِصْرَارِ لُؤْمٌ، وَتَرْكِيَ الْاِسْتِغْفَارَ مَعَ مَعْرِفَتِيْ بِسِعَةِ جُوْدِكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ عَجْزٌ، فَكَمْ تَتَحَبَّبُ اِلَيَّ يَا رَبِّ وَاَنْتَ الْغَنِيُّ عَنِّيْ، وَكَمْ اَتَبَغَّضُ اِلَيْكَ وَاَنَا الْفَقِيْرُ اِلَيْكَ وَاِلٰي رَحْمَتَكَ، فَيَا مَنْ وَعَدَ فَوَفَا، وَاَوْعَدَ فَعَفَا، اِغْفِرْلِيْ خَطَاياَيَ، وَاعْفُ وَارْحَمْ وَاَنْتَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ

translation.en: 30) Oh my Lord! It is true that my seeking forgiveness from you with persistence is my baseness (ignobility) and the abandonment of seeking your forgiveness inspite of having recognition of your bountless mercy is my inability (helplessness)۔ Oh my Lord! How many times you have showed your affection to me though you are needless of me and how many times I rebelled against you where as I was in need of your mercy۔ Oh the one who has promised me (of forgiveness), fulfill your promise۔ Woe be to one who turned rebellious to you but you forgave him۔ Please forgive my lapses۔ Forgive me and have mercy on me Oh the most merciful!

text.en: Duas to be recited during Wudhu(Ablution)
Upon looking at the water, it is recommended to say the following:

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَقِّنِىْ حُجَّتِىْ يَوْمَ اَلْقَاكَ وَاَطْلِقْ لِسَانِىْ بِذِكْرَاكَ۔
segments.transliteration: Alla Humma laq qini hujjati yawma alqaka wa atliq lisani bizikrika.

translation.en: O Lord! Dictate to me the principles of faith on the Day I meet You, and make my tongue fluent with Your remembrance.

text.en: While washing the nose one should say:

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَا تُحَرِّمْ عَلَىَّ رِيْحَ الْجَنَّةِ وَاجْعَلْنِىْ مِمَّنْ يَشَمُّ رِيْحَهَا وَرَوْحَهَا وَطِيْبَهَا۔
segments.transliteration: Alla humma la tuharrim 'alaya rihal jannati waj 'alni mim man yashummu riha ha wa rawha ha wa tiba ha.

translation.en: O Lord! Do not deprive me of the fragrance of Paradise, and make me of those who smell its fragrance and per fume.

text.en: While washing the face, one should say:

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ بَيِّضْ وَجْهِىْ يَوْمَ تَسْوَدُّ الْوُجُوْهُ وَلَا تُسَوِّدْ وَجْهِىْ يَوْمَ تَبْيَضُّ الْوُجُوْهُ۔
segments.transliteration: Alla humma bayyiz wajhi yawma taswaddufihil wujuh wala tusawwid waj hi yawma tabyazzul wujuh.

translation.en: O Lord! Make my face bright on the Day when the faces will turn dark. Do not darken my face on the Day when the face s are bright.

text.en: While pouring water over the right elbow, one should say:

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَعْطِنِىْ كِتَابِىْ بِيَمِيْنِىْ وَالْخُلْدَ فِى الْجِنَانِ بِيَسَارِىْ وَحَاسِبْنِىْ حِسَابًا يَسِيْرًا۔
segments.transliteration: Alla humma a'tini kitabi bi yamini wal khulda fil jinani bi yasari wa hasibni hisaban yasira.

translation.en: O Lord! Give my book of deeds in my right hand, and a permanent stay in Paradise on my left, and make my reckoning an easy one.

text.en: While pouring water over the left elbow, one should say:

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَا تُعْطِنِىْ كِتَابِىْ بِشِمَالِىْ وَلَا مِنْ وَرَاۤءِ ظَهْرِىْ وَلَا تَجْعَلْهَا مَغْلُوْلَةً اِلٰى عُنُقِىْ وَاَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ مُقَطَّعَاتِ النِّيْرَانِ۔
segments.transliteration: Alla humma la tutini kitabi bishimali wala min wara'i zahri wala taj alha maghlu latan ila unuqi wa a'uzu bika min muqat ta'atin niran.

translation.en: O Lord! Do not give my book of deeds in my left hand, n or from behind my back, nor chain it to my neck. I seek refuge in You from the Hell-fire.

text.en: While performing the wiping of the head, one should say:

segments.transliteration: Alla humma ghashshini bi rahmatika wa barakatika wa 'afwika.

translation.en: O Lord! Cover me with Your Mercy, Blessings and Forgiveness.

text.en: While performing the wiping of the feet, one should say:

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ ثَبِّتْنِىْ عَلَى الصِّرَاطِ يَوْمَ تَزِلُّ الْاَقْدَامُ وَاجْعَلْ سَعْيِىْ فِيْمَا يُرْضِيْكَ عَنِّىْ يَا ذَاالْجَلَالِ وَالْاِكْرَامِ۔
segments.transliteration: Alla humma thabbitni alas sirati yawma tazillu fihil aqdam. Waj'al sa'yi fi ma yurzika 'anni ya zal jalali wal ikram.

translation.en: O Lord! Keep me firm on the Bridge (to Paradise) on the Day when the feet will slip, and help me in my efforts to do things which will please You, O' Glorious and Mighty!.

text.en: Upon completion:

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنّى اَسْئَلُكَ تَمَامَ الْوُضُوْءِ وَتَمَامَ الصَّلَاةِ وَتَمَامَ رِضْوَانِكَ وَالْجَنَّةَ۔

text.en: You may also say the following:
you may recite Surah al-Qadr (No. 97) three times and apply fragrance to your clothes and body.
